dham ca upāsya tvea jñeya tvea
ca vedāteṣu upadiśyate iti pradarśayitum paraḥ grathaḥ ārabhyate yat ca gati sāmāyāt iti uktam tat api vākya atarāṇi brahma viṣayāṇi vyācakṣāṇā brahma viparīta kāraṇa eṣedhā prapañcyate
āada maya ubhyāsāt āada maya adhikaraṇam taittirīyake aamayam prāṇa mayam maomayam vijñā amayam tasmāt vai etasmāt vijñā amayāt taraḥ ātmā aadamayaḥ iti tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha āada maya śabde an
param eva brahma ucyate yat prakṛtam satyam jñāam aatam brahma iti kim brahmaṇorthātaram iti kim tāvat prāptam brahmaṇorthātaram amukhya
ātmā aada mayaḥ syāt kasmāt a amaya ādi a mukhya ātma pravāha patita tvāt atha api syāt sarva atara tvāt mukhyaḥ eva ātmā iti a syāt priya ādi avayava yogāt śārīra tva śravaṇāt ca mukhyaḥ ced ātmā syāḥ a
priya ādi saṃsparśaḥ syāt iha tu tasya priyam eva śiraḥ ityādi śrūyate śārīra tvam ca śrūyate tasya eṣaḥ eva śārīraḥ ātmā yaḥ pūrvasya iti
tasya pūrvasya vijñā amayasya eṣaḥ eva śārīraḥ ātmā yaḥ eṣaḥ āada mayaḥ iti arthaḥ ca sa śarīrasya sataḥ priya apriya saṃsparśaḥ vārayitum śakyaḥ tasmāt saṃsārī
eva aada mayaḥ ātmā iti evam prāpte idam ucyate āada mayaḥ bhyāsāt paraḥ eva ātmā āada mayaḥ bhavitum arhati kutas abhyāsāt parasmin eva hi ātman āada śabdaḥ bahu kṛtvas
bhyasyate āada mayam prastutya rasaḥ vai saḥ iti tasya eva rasa tvam uktvā ucyate hi eva ayam bhavati kaḥ hi eva āyāt kaḥ
prāṇyāt yat eṣaḥ ākāśaḥ syāt eṣa hi eva aadayāti sā eṣā aadasya mīmāsā bhavati etam āada mayam ātmā upasaṃkrāmati āadam brahmaṇaḥ vidvā
bibheti kutas caa iti āadam brahma iti iti ca śrutyatare ca brahma iti brahmaṇi eva āada śabdaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ evam āada śabdasya
bahu kṛtvas brahmaṇi abhyāsāt āadamayaḥ ātmā brahma iti gamyate yat tu uktam aamaya ādi amukhya ātma pravāha patita tvāt āadamayasya api amukhya tvam iti ā asau doṣaḥ āadamayasya sarva atara tvāt mukhyam eva hi
śāstram loka buddhim ausarat a mayam śarīram prasiddham
uttaram uttaram ātmā iti grāhayat pratipatti saukarya apekṣayā sarvātaram mukhyam upadideśa iti śliṣṭataram yathā arudhatī darśae bahvīṣu api tārāsu amukhyāsu arudhatīṣu darśitāsu yāḥ atyā
pradarśyate sā mukhyā eva ārudhatī bhavati evam iha api āada mayasya sarva atara tva amukhyam ātma tvam yat tu brūṣe mukhyasya ātma iti adoṣaḥ śārīra tvam api
a sākṣāt eva śārīra tvam saṃsāri vat tasmāt āadamayaḥ paraḥ eva ātmā vikāra śabdāḥ ā iti ce a prācuryāt atra āha āadamayaḥ paraḥ
ātmā bhavitum arhati kasmāt vikāra śabdāt ayam ayaḥ śabdaḥ vikāra vacaḥ samadhigataḥ iti mayaṭaḥ vikāra artha tvāt tasmāt aamaya ādi śabda vat vikāra viṣayaḥ eva ayam
iti ced a prācurya arthe api mayaṭaḥ smaraṇāt tad prakṛta vacae mayaṭ iti hi pracura tāyām api mayaṭ smaryate yathā aamayaḥ yajñaḥ iti aa pracura
ucyate evam āada pracuram brahmāada mayam ucyate āada pracura tvam ca brahmaṇaḥ mauṣya tvāt ārabhya uttarasmi uttarasmi sthāe śataguṇaḥ āadaḥ iti uktvā brahmāadasya iḥ atiśaya tva avadhāraṇāt tasmāt prācurya arthe
mayaṭ tad hetu vyapadeśāt ca itas ca prācurya arthe mayaṭ yasmāt āada hetu tvam brahmaṇaḥ vyapadiśati śrutiḥ eṣa hi eva āadayāti iti āadayati iti arthaḥ yaḥ hi
āadayati sa pracurāadaḥ iti prasiddham bhavati yathā loke yaḥ yeṣām dha ekatvam āpādayati sa pracuradhaaḥ iti gamyate tadvat tasmāt prācurya arthe pi mayaṭaḥ
saṃbhavāt āadamayaḥ paraḥ eva ātmā mātravarṇikam eva ca gīyate itas ca āadamayaḥ paraḥ eva ātmā yasmāt brahma vid param iti upakramya satyam
brahma iti asmi matre yat brahma prakṛtam satya jñāāata viśeṣaṇaiḥ yasmāt ākāśa ādi krameṇa sthāvara jaṅgamāi bhūtāy ajāyata yat ca bhūtāi sṛṣṭvā
guhāyām avasthitam sarvātaram yasya vijñāāya ayotaraḥ ātmā ayotaraḥ ātmā iti prakrātam brahma iha gīyate iti matra brāhmaṇayoḥ ca ekārtha tvam
yuktam avirodhāt ayathā hi prakṛta hāā prakṛta prakriye syātām a ātmā abhidhīyate etaiṣṭhā eva ca bhārgavī vāruṇī vidyā brahma iti iti
tasmāt āadamayaḥ paraḥ eva ātmā upapatteḥ itas ca āadamayaḥ paraḥ eva ātmā etaraḥ itaraḥ īśvarāt ayaḥ saṃsārī jīvaḥ iti arthaḥ a jīva
āada maya śabdena abhidhīyate kasmāt aupapatteḥ āada mayam hi prakṛtya śrūyate saḥ ukāmayata bahu syām prajāyeya iti sa tapaḥ utapyata sa tapaḥ taptvā id sarvam asṛjata yat idam kiṃca iti

āada maya adhikāre rasaḥ vai saḥ bhavati iti jīva aada mayau vyapadiśati a hi labdhā eva labdhavyaḥ bhavati katham tarhi ātmā āveṣṭavyaḥ
param vidyate iti śruti smṛtī yāvatā a labdhā eva labdhavyaḥ bhavati iti uktam bāḍham tathā api sataḥ tattva aavabodha aimittaḥ mithyā eva deha ādiṣu a ātmasu ātma tva aiścayaḥ laukikaḥ
dṛṣṭaḥ ātmā ātmā a aviṣṭaḥ aveṣṭavyaḥ alabdhaḥ labdhavyaḥ aśrutaḥ śrotavyaḥ amataḥ matavyaḥ avijñātaḥ vijñātavyaḥ iti ādi bheda vyapadeśaḥ upapadyate pratiṣidhyate eva tu paramārthataḥ
sarvajñāt parameśvarāt ayaḥ draṣṭā śrotā vā draṣṭā ityādiā parameśvaraḥ tu avidyā kalpitāt śārīrāt kartuḥ bhoktuḥ ayaḥ yathā sūtreṇa ākāśam
adhirohataḥ saḥ eva māyāvī paramārtha rūpaḥ bhūmiṣṭhaḥ ayaḥ yathā vā ghaṭa ākāśāt ākāśaḥ ayaḥ īdṛśam ca vijñā ātma paramātma bhedam āśritya aupapatteḥ
bheda vyapadeśāt ca iti uktam kāmāt ca ca sā ukāmayata bahu syām prajāyeya iti iti kāmayitṛ tva airdeśāt ca āumāikam api sāṃkhya parikalpitam
pradhāam kāraṇa tvea vā apekṣitavyam īkṣateḥ āśabdam iti irākṛtam api pradhāam pūrva sūtra udāhṛtām kāmayitṛ tva śrutim āśritya prasaṅgāt irākriyate gati sāmāya prapañca asmi asya
ca tad yogam śāsti itas ca a pradhāe jīve vāada maya śabdaḥ yasmāt asmi āada maye prakṛte ātmai pratibuddhasya asya jīvasya tat yogam śāsti tat
yogaḥ tad yogaḥ tad bhāva āpattiḥ muktiḥ iti arthaḥ tad yogam śāsti śāstram yadā hi eva eṣa etasmin pratiṣṭhām vidate atha saḥ ubhayam gataḥ
bhavati yadā hi eva eṣa etasmin udaram ataram kurute atha tasya bhayam bhavati iti etat uktam bhavati yadā etasmin api ataram
a tādātmya rūpam paśyati tadā saṃsāra bhayā iva ṛtate yadā tu etasmin tādātmyea pratitiṣṭhati tadā saṃsāra bhayā iva ṛtate iti tat ca paramātma parigrahe
ghaṭate a pradhā a parigrahe jīva parigrahe vā tasmāt āada mayaḥ paramātmā iti siddham idam tu iha vaktavyam sa vai eṣa puruṣa arasa mayaḥ tasmāt vai etasmāt
aarasamayāt ayā utaraḥ ātmā prāṇa mayaḥ tasmāt ayā utaraḥ ātmā maomayaḥ tasmāt ayā utaraḥ ātmā vijñāa mayaḥ iti ca vikāra arthe mayaṭ pravāhe sati eva akasmāt
katham iva mayaṭaḥ prācurya artha tvam brahma viṣaya tvam ca āśrīyate iti mātravarṇika brahma adhikārāt iti ced a a amaya ādīām api tarhi brahmatva prasaṅgaḥ atra āha yuktam a amaya ādīām abrahmatvam tasmāt tasmāt
ucyamāa tvāt āadamayāt tu a kaścid ayaḥ ātaraḥ ātmā ucyate brahmatvam ayathā brahmatvam ayathā iti atra ucyate yadi api aamaya ādibhyaḥ iva aadamayāt
ātmā iti a śrūyate tathā api āadamayasya brahmatvam yatas āadamayam prakṛtya śrūyate tasya priyam eva śiraḥ modaḥ dakṣiṇaḥ pakṣaḥ pramodaḥ uttaraḥ
pakṣaḥ āadaḥ ātmā brahma puccham pratiṣṭhāḥ iti tatra yat brahma iha matravarṇe prakṛtam satyam jñāam brahma iti tat iha brahma
puccham pratiṣṭhā iti ucyate tad vijijñāpayiṣayā eva a amaya ādayaḥ pañca kośāḥ kalpyate tatra kutas brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti ucyate brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti ucyate
iva idam puccham pratiṣṭhā ityādi tatra katham brahmaṇaḥ svapradhā atvam śakyam vijñātum prakṛta tvāt iti brūmaḥ brahmaṇi a prakṛta tvam
hīyate āada mayasya brahma tvāt iti atra ucyate tathā sati tat eva brahma āada mayaḥ ātmā avayavī tat eva ca brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā avayava
iti asāmañjasyam syāt tu yuktam brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti atra eva brahmaiḥ deśe āśrayitum brahma śabda saṃyogāt āadamaya vākye brahma śabda saṃyoga abhāvāt iti api ca brahma puccham
pratiṣṭhā iti uktvā idam ucyate tat api eṣa ślokaḥ bhavati asaḥ eva sa bhavati asat brahma iti veda ced asti brahma iti ced veda
satam tatas viduḥ iti asmin ca śloke aukṛṣya adamayam brahmaṇaḥ eva bhāva abhāva vedaayoḥ guṇa doṣa abhidhāāt gamyate brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti atra brahmaṇaḥ eva
iti bhāva abhāva āśaṅkā yuktā priyamoda ādi viśiṣṭasya āada mayasya sarva loka prasiddha tvāt katham puas svapradhāam sat brahma brahma puccha tve nirdiśyate brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti
ā eṣa doṣaḥ pucchavat puccham pratiṣṭhā parāyaṇam ekaīḍam laukikasya aad a jātasya brahmā aadaḥ iti etat vivakṣyate āvayava tvam etasya eva aadasya āyāi bhūtāi mātrām upajīvati iti śrutyatarāt api ca aad mayasya
brahmatve sa viśeṣam brahma abhyupagatavyam sa viśeṣam brahma abhyupagatavyam tu brahma vākyaśeṣe śrūyate vāc maasayoḥ agocara tva abhidhāāt yatas vācaḥ a prāpya maasā saha brahmaṇaḥ vidvā
bibheti kutas iti api ca a ad apracuraḥ iti ukte duḥkha alpīyaḥ tvam api gamyate prācuryasya loke pratiyogi alpatva apekṣa tvāt tathā ca sati yatra āyat
paśyati āyat śṛṇoti āyat vijāāti sa bhūmā iti bhūmi brahmaṇi tad vyatirikta abhāva śrutiḥ uparudhyeta pratiśarīram ca priya ādi bhedāt brahma tu a
pratiśarīram bhidyate satyam jñāam brahma iti āatya śruteḥ ekaḥ devaḥ sarva bhūteṣu gūḍhaḥ sarva vyāpī sarva bhūta atarātmā iti ca śrutyatarāt a cāada maya abhyāsaḥ śrūyate prātipadika artha mātram
eva hi sarvatra abhyasyate rasaḥ vai saḥ bhavati kaḥ hi eva āyāt kaḥ prāṇyāt yat eṣaḥ ākāśaḥ
a syāt sā eṣā aadasya mīmāṃsā bhavati āadam brahmaṇaḥ vidvā a bibheti kutas caa iti āadaḥ brahma iti iti ca yadi ca āada maya śabdasya
brahma viṣaya tvam bhavet tatas uttareṣu āada mātra prayogeṣu api āada maya abhyāsaḥ kalpyeta a tu āada mayasya brahmatvam asti priya śiraḥ tva ādibhiḥ hetubhiḥ iti avocāma tasmāt śrutyatare
brahma iti āada pada prātipadikasya brahmaṇi prayoga darśaāt yat eṣaḥ ākāśe syāt iti brahma viṣayaḥ prayogaḥ tu āada maya abhyāsaḥ iti
avagatavyam yaḥ tu ayam etam āada maya śabdasya abhyāsaḥ etam āada mayam ātmā am upasaṃkrāmati iti a tasya brahma viṣaya tvam asti vikāra ātma

text1:
syāt iti brahma viṣayaḥ prayogaḥ na tu ānanda maya abhyāsaḥ iti avagantavyam
yaḥ tu ayam mayaṭ antasya eva ānanda maya śabdasya abhyāsaḥ etam ānanda mayam ātmānam upasaṃkrāmati iti na tasya brahma viṣaya tvam asti
vikāra ātmanām eva anna maya ādīnām anātmanām upasaṃkramitavyānām pravāhe patita tvāt
nanu ānanda mayasya upasaṃkramitavyasya anna maya ādi vat abrahmatve sati nā eva viduṣaḥ brahma prāptiḥ phalam nirdiṣṭam bhavet
na eṣa doṣaḥ ānanda maya upasaṃkramaṇa nirdeśena eva viduṣaḥ puccha pratiṣṭhā bhūta brahma prāpteḥ phalasya nirdiṣṭa tvāt tat api eṣa ślokaḥ bhavati yatas vācaḥ nivartante
text2:
syāt iti brahma viṣayaḥ prayogaḥ tu āada maya abhyāsaḥ iti
avagatavyam yaḥ tu ayam etam āada maya śabdasya abhyāsaḥ etam āada mayam ātmā am upasaṃkrāmati iti a tasya brahma viṣaya tvam asti vikāra ātma upasaṃkramitavyāām pravāhe patita tvāt
au a a da mayasya upasaṃkramitavyasya a a maya ādi vat a brahmatve sati ā eva viduṣaḥ brahma prāptiḥ phalam bhavet ā eṣa doṣaḥ viduṣaḥ puccha pratiṣṭhā bhūta brahma prāpteḥ phalasya tat api eṣa
ślokaḥ bhavati yatas vācaḥ iva ṛtate

text1:
bahu syām prajāyeya iti iti iyam śrutiḥ udāhṛtā sā brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti anena saṃnihitatareṇa brahmaṇā saṃbadhyamānā na ānanda mayasya brahma tām pratibodhayati
tad apekṣa tvāt ca uttarasya granthasya rasaḥ vai saḥ ityādeḥ na ānanda maya viṣaya tā
nanu saḥ kāmayate iti brahmaṇi puṃliṅga nirdeśaḥ na upapadyate
na ayam doṣaḥ tasmāt vai etasmāt ātmanaḥ ākāśaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ iti atra pum liṅgena api ātma śabdena brahmaṇaḥ prakṛta tvāt
yat tu bhārgavī vāruṇī vidyā ānandaḥ brahma iti vyajānāt iti tasyām mayaṭ a śravaṇāt priya śiraḥ tva ādi a śravaṇāt ca yuktam ānandasya brahmatvam
tasmāt aṇu mātram api viśeṣam an āśritya na svatas eva priyaśiraḥ tva ādi brahmaṇaḥ upapadyate
na ca iha sa viśeṣam brahma vāc manasa gocara atikramaṇa śruteḥ
tasmāt anna maya ādiṣu iva ānanda maye vikāra arthe eva mayaṭ vijñeyaḥ na prācurya arthaḥ
sūtrāṇi tu evam vyākhyeyāni brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti atra kim ānanda maya avayava tvena brahma vivakṣyate uta svapradhāna tvena iti
puccha śabdāt avayava tvena iti prāpte ucyate ānanda mayaḥ bhyāsāt ānanda mayaḥ ātmā iti atra brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti svapradhānam eva brahma upadiśyate
abhyāsāt asan eva sa bhavati iti asmin nigamana śloke brahmaṇaḥ eva kevalasya abhyasyamāna tvāt
vikāra śabdāt na iti ced na prācuryāt
text2:
bahu syām prajāyeya iti iti iyam śrutiḥ udāhṛtā sā brahma
puccham pratiṣṭhāḥ iti saṃihitatareṇa brahmaṇā saṃbadhyamāā āada mayasya brahma tām pratibodhayati tad apekṣa tvāt ca uttarasya grathasya rasaḥ vai saḥ ityādeḥ āada maya viṣaya tā
iti brahmaṇi pum liṅgaiḥ deśaḥ opapadyate doṣaḥ tasmāt vai etasmāt ātmā ākāśaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ iti atra brahmaṇaḥ prakṛta tvāt yat tu
bhārgavī vāruṇī vidyā āadaḥ brahma iti vyajāāt iti tasyām mayaṭ a śravaṇāt priyaśiraḥ tva ādi a śravaṇāt ca yuktam āadasya brahma tvam tasmāt aṇu mātram api viśeṣam a āśritya a
svatas eva priya śiraḥ tva ādi brahmaṇaḥ upapadyate a ca iha sa viśeṣam brahma pratipipādayiṣitam vikāra arthaḥ eva mayaṭ vijñeyaḥ a prācurya arthaḥ
sūtrāṇi tu evam vyākhyeyāi brahma puccham pratiṣṭhāḥ iti atra kim brahma vivakṣyate uta brahma vivakṣyate uta puccha śabdāt prāpte ucyate
ātmā iti atra brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti eva brahma upadiśyate abhyāsāt asaḥ eva sa bhavati iti asmi brahmaṇa
eva kevalasya abhyasyamāa tvāt vikāra śabdāḥ prācuryāt

text1:
taḥ
puccham iti avayava śabdāt na svapradhāna tvam brahmaṇaḥ iti yat uktam tasya parihāraḥ vaktavyaḥ
atrā ucyate na ayam doṣaḥ prācuryāt api avayava śabda upapatteḥ
prācuryam prāya āpattiḥ avayava prāye vacanam iti arthaḥ
anna maya ādīnām hi śiraḥ ādiṣu puccha anteṣu avayaveṣu ukteṣu
text2:
t puccham iti avayava śabdāḥ a svapradhāa tvam brahmaṇaḥ iti yat uktam tasya parihāraḥ vaktavyaḥ
atrā ucyate doṣaḥ prācuryāt api avayava śabda upapatteḥ prācuryam prāya āpattiḥ avayava prāye iti arthaḥ hi śiraḥ ādiṣu avayaveṣu ukteṣu

text1:
avayava antarāṇi uktvā avayava prāya āpattyā brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti āha na avayava vivakṣayā
yatkāraṇam abhyāsāt iti svapradhāna tvam brahmaṇaḥ samarthitam
tad hetu vyapadeśāt ca sarvasya hi vikāra jātasya sa ānanda mayasya kāraṇa tvena brahma vyapadiśyate idam sarvam asṛjata yat idam kiṃca iti
na ca kāraṇam sat brahma sva vikārasya ānanda mayasya mukhyayā vṛttyā avayavaḥ upapadyate
aparāṇi api sūtrāṇi yathāsaṃbhavam puccha vākya nirdiṣṭasya eva brahmaṇaḥ upapādakāni draṣṭavyāni
antar tad dharma upadeśāt
antar adhikaraṇam
idam āmnāyate atha yaḥ eṣaḥ ntarāditye hiraṇmayaḥ puruṣaḥ dṛśyate hiraṇya śmaśruḥ hiraṇya keśaḥ ā praṇakhāt sarvaḥ eva suvarṇaḥ tasya yathā kapyāsam puṇḍarīkam evam akṣiṇī tasya uditi nāma saḥ eṣa sarvebhyaḥ pāpmabhyaḥ uditaḥ udeti ha vai sarvebhyaḥ pāpmabhyaḥ yaḥ evam veda iti adhidaivatam
atha adhyātmam api atha yaḥ eṣaḥ ntarakṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate ityādi
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim vidyā karma atiśaya vaśāt prāpta utkarṣaḥ kaścid saṃsārī sūrya maṇḍale cakṣuṣi ca upāsya tvena śrūyate kim vā nitya siddhaḥ parameśvaraḥ
iti
kim tāvat prāptam
saṃsāri iti
kutas
rūpavat tva śravaṇāt
āditya puruṣe tāvat hiraṇya śmaśruḥ ityādi rūpam udāhṛtam
akṣi puruṣe tat eva atideśena prāpyate tasya etasya tat eva rūpam yat amuṣya rūpam iti
na ca parameśvarasya rūpavat tvam yuktam aśabdam asparśam arūpam avyayam iti śruteḥ
ādhāra śravaṇāt ca yaḥ eṣaḥ ntar āditye yaḥ eṣaḥ ntar akṣiṇi iti
na hi anādhārasya sva mahima pratiṣṭhitasya sarva vyāpinaḥ parameśvarasya ādhāraḥ upadiśyeta
sa bhagavaḥ kasmin pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti sve mahimni iti ākāśa vat sarva gataḥ ca nityaḥ iti ca śrutī bhavataḥ
aiśvarya maryādā śruteḥ ca saḥ eṣa ye ca amuṣmāt parāñcaḥ lokāḥ teṣām ca īṣṭe deva kāmānām ca iti āditya puruṣasya aiśvarya maryādā
saḥ eṣa ye ca etasmāt arvāñcaḥ lokāḥ teṣām ca īṣṭe manuṣya kāmānām ca iti akṣi puruṣasya
na ca parameśvarasya maryādāvat aiśvaryam yuktam
eṣa sarva īśvaraḥ eṣa bhūta adhipatiḥ eṣa bhūta pālaḥ eṣa setuḥ vidharaṇaḥ eṣām lokānām a saṃbhedāya iti a viśeṣa śruteḥ
tasmāt na akṣi ādityayoḥ antar parameśvaraḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ antar tad dharma upadeśāt iti
yaḥ eṣaḥ ntar āditye yaḥ eṣaḥ ntar akṣiṇi iti ca śrūyamāṇaḥ puruṣaḥ parameśvaraḥ eva na saṃsārī
kutas
tad dharma upadeśāt
tasya hi parameśvarasya dharmāḥ iha upadiṣṭāḥ
tat yathā tasya uditi nāma iti śrāvayitvā tasya ādityapuruṣasya nāma saḥ eṣa sarvebhyaḥ pāpmabhyaḥ uditaḥ iti sarva pāpma apagamena nirvakti
tat eva ca kṛta nirvacanam nāma akṣi puruṣasya api atidiśati yat nāma tat nāma iti
sarva pāpma apagamaḥ ca paramātmanaḥ eva śrūyate yaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā ityādau
tathā cākṣuṣe puruṣe sā eva ṛc tat sāma tat uktham tat yajuḥ tat brahma iti ṛk sāma ādi ātmaka tām nirdhārayati
sā ca parameśvarasya upapadyate sarva kāraṇa tvāt sarva ātmaka tva upapatteḥ
pṛthivī agni ādi ātmake ca adhidaivatam ṛk sāme vāc prāṇa ādi ātmake ca adhyātmam anukramya āha tasya ṛc ca sāma ca geṣṇau iti adhidaivatam
tathā adhyātmam api yau amuṣya geṣṇau tau geṣṇau iti
tat ca sarva ātmaka tve sati eva upapadyate
tat ye ime vīṇāyām gāyanti etam tu eva te gāyanti tasmāt te dhana sanayaḥ iti ca laukikeṣu api gāneṣu asya eva gīyamāna tvam darśayati
tat ca parameśvara parigrahe eva ghaṭate yat yat vibhūtimat sattvam śrīmat ūrjitam eva vā
tat tat eva avagaccha tvam mama tejaḥ oṃśa saṃbhavam iti bhagavadgītā darśanāt
loka kāma īśitṛ tvam api niraṅkuśam śrūyamāṇam parameśvaram gamayati
yat tu uktam hiraṇya śmaśru tva ādi rūpavat tva śravaṇam parameśvare na upapadyate iti atra brūmaḥ syāt parameśvarasya api icchā vaśāt māyā mayam rūpam sādhaka anugraha artham māyā hi eṣā mayā sṛṣṭā yat mām paśyasi nārada
sarva bhūta guṇaiḥ yuktam mā evam mām jñātum arhasi iti smaraṇāt
api ca yatra tu nirasta sarva viśeṣam pārameśvaram rūpam upadiśyate bhavati tatra śāstram aśabdam asparśam arūpam avyayam ityādi
sarva kāraṇa tvāt tu vikāra dharmaiḥ api kaiścid viśiṣṭaḥ parameśvaraḥ upāsya tvena nirdiśyate sarva karmā sarva kāmaḥ sarva gandhaḥ sarva rasaḥ ityādinā
tathā hiraṇya śmaśru tva ādi nirdeśaḥ pi bhaviṣyati
yat api ādhāra śravaṇāt na parameśvaraḥ iti atrā ucyate sva mahima pratiṣṭhasya api ādhāra viśeṣa upadeśaḥ upāsana arthaḥ bhaviṣyati
sarvagata tvāt brahmaṇaḥ vyoma vat sarva antara tva upapatteḥ
aiśvarya maryādā śravaṇam api adhyātma adhidaivata vibhāga apekṣam upāsana artham eva
tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva akṣi ādityayoḥ antar upadiśyate
bheda vyapadeśāt ca anyaḥ
asti ca āditya ādi śarīra abhimānibhyaḥ jīvebhyaḥ nyaḥ īśvaraḥ ntaryāmī yaḥ āditye tiṣṭhan ādityāt antaraḥ yam ādityaḥ na veda yasya ādityaḥ śarīram yaḥ ādityam antaraḥ yamayati eṣa te ātmā antaryāmī amṛtaḥ iti śruti antare bheda vyapadeśāt
tatra hi ādityāt antaraḥ yam ādityaḥ na veda iti vedituḥ ādityāt vijñāna ātmanaḥ nyaḥ ntaryāmī spaṣṭam nirdiśyate
saḥ eva iha api antarāditye puruṣaḥ bhavitum arhati śruti sāmānyāt
tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva iha upadiśyate iti siddham
ākāśaḥ tad liṅgāt
ākāśa adhikaraṇam
idam āmananti asya lokasya kā gatiḥ iti ākāśaḥ iti ha uvāca sarvāṇi ha vai imāni bhūtāni ākāśāt eva samutpadyante ākāśam prati astam yanti ākāśaḥ hi eva ebhyaḥ jyāyān ākāśaḥ parāyaṇam iti
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim ākāśa śabdena param brahma abhidhīyate uta bhūtākāśam iti
