tat hi prasiddhatareṇa prayogeṇa śīghram buddhim ārohati
na ca ayam ākāśa śabdaḥ ubhayoḥ sādhāraṇaḥ śakyaḥ vijñātum aneka artha tva prasaṅgāt
tasmāt brahmaṇi gauṇaḥ eva ākāśa śabdaḥ bhavitum arhati
vibhu tva ādibhiḥ hi bahubhiḥ dharmaiḥ sadṛśam ākāśena brahma bhavati
na ca mukhya saṃbhave gauṇaḥ rthaḥ grahaṇam arhati
saṃbhavati ca iha mukhyasya eva ākāśasya grahaṇam
nanu bhūta ākāśa parigrahe vākyaśeṣaḥ na upapadyate sarvāṇi ha vai imāni bhūtāni ākāśāt eva samutpadyante ityādiḥ
na eṣa doṣaḥ bhūtākāśasya api vāyu ādi krameṇa kāraṇa tva upapatteḥ
vijñāyate hi tasmāt vai etasmāt ātmanaḥ ākāśaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ ākāśāt vāyuḥ vāyoḥ agniḥ ityādi
jyāyaḥ tu aparāyaṇa tve api bhūta antara apekṣayā upapadyete bhūtākāśasya api
tasmāt ākāśa śabdena bhūtākāśasya grahaṇam iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ
ākāśaḥ tad liṅgāt
ākāśa śabdena iha brahmaṇaḥ grahaṇam yuktam
kutas
tad liṅgāt
parasya hi brahmaṇaḥ idam liṅgam sarvāṇi ha vai imāni bhūtāni ākāśāt eva samutpadyante iti
parasmāt hi brahmaṇaḥ bhūtānām utpattiḥ iti vedānteṣu maryādā
nanu bhūtākāśasya api vāyu ādi krameṇa kāraṇa tvam darśitam
satyam darśitam
tathā api mūla kāraṇasya brahmaṇaḥ parigrahāt ākāśāt eva iti avadhāraṇam sarvāṇi iti ca bhūta viśeṣaṇam na anukūlam syāt
tathā ākāśam prati astam yanti iti brahma liṅgam ākāśaḥ hi eva ebhyaḥ jyāyān ākāśaḥ parāyaṇam iti ca jyāyaḥ tu a parāyaṇa tve
jyāyaḥ tvam hi an āpekṣikam paramātmani eva ekasmin āmnātam jyāyān pṛthivyāḥ jyāyān antarikṣāt jyāyān divaḥ jyāyān ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ iti
tathā parāyaṇa tvam api parama kāraṇa tvāt paramātmani eva upapannataram bhavati
śrutiḥ ca vijñānam ānandam brahma rātiḥ dātuḥ parāyaṇam iti
api ca anta vat tu adoṣeṇa śālāvatyasya pakṣam ninditvā anantam kiṃcid vaktu kāmena jaivalinā ākāśaḥ parigṛhītaḥ
tam ca ākāśam udgīthe saṃpādya upasaṃharati saḥ eṣa paras varīyān udgīthaḥ saḥ eṣaḥ nantaḥ iti
tat ca ānantyam brahma liṅgam
yat punar uktam bhūtākāśam prasiddhi balena prathamataram pratīyate iti atra brūmaḥ prathamataram pratītam api tad vākya śeṣa gatān brahma guṇān dṛṣṭvā na parigṛhyate
darśitaḥ ca brahmaṇi api ākāśa śabdaḥ ākāśaḥ ha vai nāma nāma rūpayoḥ nirvahitā ityādau
tathā ākāśa paryāya vācinām api brahmaṇi prayogaḥ dṛśyate ṛcaḥ akṣare parame vyoman yasmin devāḥ adhi viśve niṣeduḥ sā eṣā bhārgavī vāruṇī vidyā parame vyoman pratiṣṭhitā Ä kam brahma kham brahma kham purāṇam iti ca evamādau
vākya upakrame vartamānasya ākāśa śabdasya vākyaśeṣa vaśāt yuktā brahma viṣaya tva avadhāraṇā
agniḥ adhīte nuvākam iti hi vākya upakrama gataḥ pi agni śabdaḥ māṇavaka viṣayaḥ dṛśyate
tasmāt ākāśa śabdam brahma iti siddham
atas eva prāṇaḥ
prāṇa adhikaraṇam
udgīthe prastotar yā devatā prastāvam anvāyattā iti upakramya śrūyate katamā sā devatā iti prāṇaḥ iti ha uvāca sarvāṇi ha vai imāni bhūtāni prāṇam eva abhisaṃviśanti prāṇam abhyujjihate sā eṣā devatā prastāvam anvāyattā iti
tatra saṃśaya nirṇayau pūrvavat eva draṣṭavyau
prāṇa bandhana hi somya manaḥ prāṇasya prāṇam iti ca evamādau brahma viṣayaḥ prāṇa śabdaḥ dṛśyate
vāyu vikāre tu prasiddhataraḥ loka vedayoḥ
atas iha prāṇa śabdena katarasya upādānam yuktam iti bhavati saṃśayaḥ
kim punar atra yuktam
vāyu vikārasya pañca vṛtteḥ prāṇasya upādānam yuktam
tatra hi prasiddhataraḥ prāṇa śabdaḥ iti avocāma
nanu pūrvavat iha api tad liṅgāt brahmaṇaḥ eva grahaṇam yuktam
iha api hi vākyaśeṣe bhūtānām saṃveśana udgamanam pārameśvaram karma pratīyate
na mukhye pi prāṇe bhūta saṃveśana udgamanasya darśanāt
evam hi āmnāyate yadā vai puruṣaḥ svapiti prāṇam tarhi vāc apyeti prāṇam cakṣuḥ prāṇam śrotram prāṇam manaḥ sa yadā prabudhyate prāṇāt eva adhi punar jāyante iti
pratyakṣam ca etat svāpa kāle prāṇa vṛttau a parilupyamānāyām indriya vṛttayaḥ parilupyante prabodha kāle ca punar prādurbhavanti iti
indriya sāra tvāt ca bhūtānām aviruddhaḥ mukhye prāṇe bhūta saṃveśana udgamana vādī vākyaśeṣaḥ
api ca ādityaḥ annam ca udgītha pratihārayoḥ devate prastāva devatāyāḥ prāṇasya anantaram nirdiśyeta
na ca tayoḥ brahmatvam asti
tad sāmānyāt ca prāṇasya api na brahma tvam iti evam prāpte sūtrakāraḥ āha atas eva prāṇaḥ iti
tad liṅgāt iti pūrva sūtre nirdiṣṭam
atas eva tad liṅgāt prāṇa śabdam api param brahma bhavitum arhati
prāṇasya api hi brahma liṅga saṃbandhaḥ śrūyate sarvāṇi ha vai imā
text2:
avayava ātarāṇi
uktvā avayava prāya āpattyā brahma puccham pratiṣṭhā iti āha āvayava vivakṣayā yatkāraṇam abhyāsāt iti svapradhāa tvam brahmaṇaḥ samarthitam tad hetu vyapadeśāt ca sarvasya hi vikāra jātasya
brahma vyapadiśyate id sarvam asṛjata yat idam kiṃca iti a ca kāraṇam sat brahma sva vikārasya a da mayasya mukhyayā vṛttyā avayavaḥ upapadyate aparāṇi
api sūtrāṇi yathāsaṃbhavam puccha vākyaiḥ diṣṭasya eva brahmaṇaḥ upapādakāi draṣṭavyāi atas tad dharma upadeśāt idam āmāyate atha yaḥ eṣa utarāditye hiraṇmayaḥ puruṣaḥ dṛśyate hiraṇya śmaśruḥ hiraṇya keśaḥ ā praṇakhāt sarvaḥ eva suvarṇaḥ
tasya yathā kapyāsam puṇḍarīkam evam akṣiṇī tasya uditi āma saḥ eṣa sarvebhyaḥ pāpmabhyaḥ uditaḥ udeti ha vai sarvebhyaḥ pāpmabhyaḥ yaḥ evam veda iti adhidaivatam
atha adhyātmam api atha yaḥ puruṣaḥ dṛśyate ityādi tatra saṃśayaḥ kim vidyā karma atiśaya vaśāt prāpta utkarṣaḥ kaścid saṃsārī sūrya maṇḍale cakṣuṣi śrūyate kim vā iti asiddhaḥ parameśvaraḥ
iti kim tāvat prāptam saṃsāri iti kutas rūpavat tva śravaṇāt āditya puruṣe tāvat hiraṇya śmaśruḥ ityādi rūpam udāhṛtam akṣi puruṣe pi tat eva atideśe prāpyate tasya etasya tat eva rūpam yat amuṣya rūpam iti
a ca parameśvarasya rūpavat tvam yuktam a śabdam a sparśam a rūpam avyayam iti śruteḥ ādhāra śravaṇāt ca yaḥ eṣa utarāditye yaḥ eṣa utarakṣiṇi iti a hi a ādhārasya sva mahima pratiṣṭhitasya sarva vyāpi aḥ parameśvarasya ādhāraḥ upadiśyeta
sa bhagavaḥ kasmipratiṣṭhitaḥ iti sve mahimi iti ākāśa vat sarva gataḥ ca ityaḥ iti ca śrutī bhavataḥ aiśvarya maryādā śruteḥ ca saḥ eṣa ye ca amuṣmāt parāñcaḥ lokāḥ teṣām ca īṣṭe
ca iti āditya puruṣasya aiśvarya maryādā saḥ eṣa ye ca etasmāt arvāñcaḥ lokāḥ teṣām ca īṣṭe ca iti akṣi puruṣasya ca parameśvarasya maryādāvat aiśvaryam yuktam eṣa sarva īśvara
eṣa bhūta adhipatiḥ eṣa bhūta pālaḥ eṣa setuḥ vidharaṇaḥ eṣām iti aviśeṣa śruteḥ tasmāt akṣi ādityayoḥ atas parameśvaraḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ atas tad dharma upadeśāt iti yaḥ eṣa utarāditye yaḥ eṣa utarakṣiṇi iti
ca śrūyamāṇaḥ puruṣaḥ parameśvaraḥ eva a saṃsārī kutas tad dharma upadeśāt tasya hi parameśvarasya dharmāḥ iha upadiṣṭāḥ tat yathā tasya uditi āmaḥ iti śrāvayitvā tasya ādityapuruṣasya
saḥ eṣa sarvebhyaḥ pāpmabhyaḥ uditaḥ iti tat eva ca tat eva ca iti sarva pāpma apagamaḥ ca paramātmaaḥ eva śrūyate
yaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā ityādau tathā cākṣuṣe puruṣe sā eva ṛc tat sāma tat uktham tat yajuḥ tat brahma iti ṛk sāma ādi ātmaka tām dhārayati sā ca parameśvarasya upapadyate sarva kāraṇa tvāt sarva ātmaka tva upapatteḥ pṛthivī agi ādi ātmake ca adhidaivatam ṛk sāme
vāc prāṇa ādi ātmake ca adhyātmam aukramya āha tasya ṛc ca sāma ca geṣṇau iti adhidaivatam tathā adhyātmam api yau amuṣya geṣṇau tau geṣṇau iti tat ca sarva ātmaka tve sati eva upapadyate tat yaḥ ime vīṇāyām gāyati etam
tu eva te gāyati tasmāt te iti ca laukikeṣu api gāeṣu asya eva gīya māa tvam darśayati tat ca parameśvara parigrahe eva ghaṭate yat yat vibhūtimat sattvam śrīmat ūrjitam eva vā tat tat eva avagaccha tvam
mama tejaḥ oṃśa saṃbhavam iti bhagavadgītā ādarśaāt loka kāma īśitṛ tvam api iraṅkuśam śrūyamāṇam parameśvaram gamayati yat tu uktam hiraṇya śmaśru tva ādi rūpavat tva śravaṇam parameśvare opapadyate iti atra brūmaḥ syāt parameśvarasya api icchā vaśā māyā mayam rūpam sādhaka augraha artham māyā
hi eṣā mayā sṛṣṭā yamām paśyasi ārada sarva bhūta guṇaiḥ yuktam mā evam mām jñātum arhasi iti smaraṇāt api ca yatra tu pārameśvaram rūpam upadiśyate bhavati
tatra śāstram aśabdam asparśam arūpam avyayam ityādi sarva kāraṇa tvāt tu vikāra dharmaiḥ api kaiścid viśiṣṭaḥ parameśvaraḥ upāsya tve nirdiśyate sarva karmā sarva kāmaḥ sarva gadhaḥ sarva rasaḥ ityādi tathā bhaviṣyati yat api ādhāra śravaṇāt parameśvara
iti atrā ucyate sva mahima pratiṣṭhasya api ādhāra viśeṣa upadeśaḥ upāsa arthaḥ bhaviṣyati sarvagata tvāt brahmaṇaḥ vyoma vat sarvātaratva upapatteḥ aiśvarya maryādā śravaṇam api adhyātma adhidaivata vibhāga apekṣam upāsa artham eva tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva akṣi ādityayoḥ atas upadiśyate bheda vyapadeśāt ca ayaḥ asti ca āditya ādi śarīra abhimā jīvebhyaḥ yaḥ īśvara ūtaryāmī yaḥ āditye tiṣṭha ādityāt ataraḥ yam ādityaḥ ataraḥ ya
a veda yasya ādityaḥ śarīram yaḥ ādityam ataraḥ yamayati eṣa te ātmā ataryāmī amṛtaḥ iti śruti atare bheda vyapadeśāt tatra hi ādityāt ataraḥ yam ādityaḥ a veda iti vedituḥ ādityāt vijñā ātma oya utaryāmī
spaṣṭam irdiśyate saḥ eva iha apyatara āditye puruṣaḥ bhavitum arhati śruti sāmāyāt tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva iha upadiśyate iti siddham ākāśaḥ tad liṅgāt ākāśa adhikaraṇam idam āmaati asya lokasya kā gatiḥ iti ākāśaḥ iti ha uvāca
sarvāṇi ha vai imāi bhūtāy ākāśāt eva samutpadyate ākāśam prati astam yati ākāśaḥ hi eva ebhyaḥ jyāyāḥ ākāśaḥ parāyaṇam iti tatra
saṃśayaḥ kim ākāśa śabdena param brahma abhidhīyate uta bhūtākāśam iti kutas saṃśayaḥ ubhayatra prayoga darśaāt bhūta viśeṣe tāvat su prasiddhaḥ loka vedayoḥ ākāśa śabdaḥ brahmaṇi api kvacid
dṛśyate yatra vākyaśeṣa vaśāt asādhāraṇa guṇa śravaṇāt brahma bhavati yathā yat eṣaḥ ākāśaḥ syāt iti ākāśaḥ ha vai
āmaḥ āma rūpayoḥ te yad atarā tat brahma iti ca evamādau atas saṃśayaḥ kim puar atra yuktam bhūtākāśam iti kutas tat hi
prasiddhatareṇa prayogeṇa śīghram buddhim ārohati a ca ayam ākāśa śabdaḥ ubhayoḥ sādhāraṇaḥ śakyaḥ vijñātum a eka artha tva prasaṅgāt tasmāt brahmaṇi gauṇaḥ eva ākāśa śabdaḥ bhavitum arhati
vibhu tva ādibhiḥ hi bahubhiḥ dharmaiḥ sadṛśam brahma bhavati ca mukhya saṃbhave gauṇaḥ rthaḥ grahaṇam arhati saṃbhavati ca iha mukhyasya eva ākāśasya grahaṇam
bhūtākāśa parigrahe vākya śeṣaḥ o upapadyate sarvāṇi ha vai imāi bhūtāni ākāśāt eva samutpadyate ityādiḥ ā eṣa doṣaḥ bhūtākāśasya api vāyu ādi krameṇa kāraṇa tva upapatteḥ vijñāyate hi tasmāt
vai etasmāt ātmanaḥ ākāśaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ ākāśāt vāyuḥ vāyoḥ agiḥ ityādi jyāyaḥ tu aparāyaṇa tve api bhūta atara apekṣayā upapadyete bhūtākāśasya api tasmāt ākāśa śabde bhūtākāśasya grahaṇam
iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ākāśaḥ tad liṅgāt ākāśa śabdena iha brahmaṇaḥ grahaṇam yuktam kutas tad liṅgāt parasya hi brahmaṇaḥ idam liṅgam sarvāṇi ha vā
ākāśāt eva samutpadyate iti parasmāt hi brahmaṇaḥ bhūtāām utpattiḥ iti bhūtākāśasya api vāyu ādi krameṇa kāraṇa tvam darśitam satyam
darśitam tathā api mūla kāraṇasya brahmaṇaḥ parigrahāt ākāśāt eva iti avadhāraṇam sarvāṇi iti ca bhūta viśeṣaṇam syāt tathā ākāśam prati astam yati iti brahma liṅgam ākāśaḥ
hi eva ebhyaḥ jyāyāḥ ākāśaḥ parāyaṇam iti ca jyāyaḥ tu a parāyaṇa tve jyāyaḥ tvam hi a āpekṣikam paramātman eva ekasmin jyāyāḥ pṛthivyāḥ jyāyāḥ atarikṣāt
jyāyāḥ divaḥ jyāyāḥ ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ iti tathā parāyaṇa tvam api parama kāraṇa tvāt eva upapaataram bhavati śrutiḥ ca brahma rātiḥ
dātuḥ parāyaṇam iti api tu adoṣeṇa śālāvatyasya pakṣam kiṃcid kiṃcid parigṛhītaḥ tam ca ākāśam udgīthe saṃpādya upasaṃharati saḥ eṣa
paras varīyāḥ udgīthaḥ saḥ eṣaḥ atas iti tat ca āatyam brahma liṅgam yat uktam bhūtākāśam prasiddhi balea prathamataram pratīyate iti atra brūmaḥ prathamataram pratītam api tad vākyaśeṣa gatā
brahma guṇāḥ dṛṣṭvā darśitaḥ ca brahmaṇi api ākāśa śabdaḥ ākāśaḥ ha vai āmaḥ ityādau tathā ākāśa paryāya vācī api brahmaṇi prayogaḥ dṛśyate
ṛcaḥ akṣare parame vyoma devāḥ adhi viśve iṣeduḥ sā eṣā bhārgavī vāruṇī vidyā parame vyoma pratiṣṭhitā kam brahma kham brahma
kham purāṇam iti ca evamādau vākya upakrame pi vartamāasya ākāśa śabdasya vākyaśeṣa vaśāt yuktā brahma viṣayatva avadhāraṇā agiḥ adhīte uvākam iti hi vākya upakrama gataḥ api agi śabdaḥ māṇavaka viṣayaḥ dṛśyate
tasmāt ākāśa śabdam brahma iti siddham atas eva prāṇaḥ prāṇa adhikaraṇam udgīthe prastotar yā devatā prastāvam avāyattā iti upakramya śrūyate katamā sā devatā iti prāṇaḥ iti ha uvāca
sarvāṇi ha vai imāi bhūtāi prāṇam eva abhisaṃviśati prāṇam abhyujjihate sā eṣā devatā prastāvam avāyattā iti tatra saṃśayaiḥ ṇayau pūrvavat eva draṣṭavyau somya prāṇasya prāṇam
iti ca evamādau brahma viṣayaḥ prāṇa śabdaḥ dṛśyate vāyu vikāre tu prasiddhataraḥ loka vedayoḥ atas iha yuktam iti bhavati saṃśayaḥ kim vāyu vikārasya
pañca vṛtteḥ prāṇasya yuktam tatra hi prasiddhataraḥ prāṇa śabdaḥ iti avocāma pūrvavat iha api tad liṅgāt brahmaṇaḥ eva grahaṇam yuktam iha api hi vākyaśeṣe bhūtāām pārameśvaram
karma pratīyate a mukhye api prāṇe bhūta saṃveśa udgama asya darśa evam hi āmāyate yadā vai puruṣaḥ svapiti prāṇam tarhi vāc apyeti prāṇam cakṣuḥ prāṇam śrotram
prāṇam sa yadā prabudhyate prāṇāt eva adhi puas jāyate iti pratyakṣam ca etat svāpa kāle prāṇa vṛttau a parilupyamāāyām idriya vṛttayaḥ parilupyate prabodha kāle ca puas prādurbhavati iti idriya sāra tvāt ca bhūtāām aviruddhaḥ mukhye
prāṇe api bhūta saṃveśa odgama avādī vākyaśeṣaḥ api ca āditya oam ca udgītha pratihārayoḥ devate prastāva devatāyāḥ a ca tayoḥ brahmatvam asti tad sāmāyāt ca prāṇasya api a brahmatvam iti evam prāpte sūtrakāraḥ āha atas
eva prāṇaḥ iti tad liṅgāt iti pūrva sūtre atas eva tad liṅgāt prāṇa śabdam api param brahma bhavitum arhati prāṇasya api hi brahma liṅga saṃbadhaḥ śrūyate sarvāṇi ha vai imā

text1:
m iti evam prāpte sūtrakāraḥ āha atas eva prāṇaḥ iti
tad liṅgāt iti pūrva sūtre nirdiṣṭam
atas eva tad liṅgāt prāṇa śabdam api param brahma bhavitum arhati
prāṇasya api hi brahma liṅga saṃbandhaḥ śrūyate sarvāṇi ha vai imāni bhūtāni prāṇam eva abhisaṃviśanti prāṇam abhyujjihate iti
prāṇa nimittau sarveṣām bhūtānām utpatti pralayau ucyamānau prāṇasya brahma tām gamayataḥ
nanu uktam mukhya prāṇa parigrahe saṃveśana udgamana darśanam aviruddham svāpa prabodhayoḥ darśanāt iti
atrā ucyate svāpa prabodhayoḥ indriyāṇām eva kevalānām prāṇa āśrayam saṃveśana udgamanam dṛśyate na sarveṣām bhūtānām
iha tu sa indriyāṇām sa śarīrāṇām ca jīva āviṣṭānām bhūtānām sarvāṇi ha vai imāni bhūtāni iti śruteḥ
yadā api bhūta śrutiḥ mahābhūta viṣayā parigṛhyate tadā api brahma liṅga tvam aviruddham
nanu saha api viṣayaiḥ indriyāṇām svāpa prabodhayoḥ prāṇe pi ayam prāṇāt ca prabhavam śrṛṇumaḥ yadā suptaḥ svapnam na kaṃcana paśyati atha asmin prāṇe eva ekadhā bhavati tadā enam vāc sarvaiḥ nāmabhiḥ saha apyeti iti
tatra api tad liṅgāt prāṇa śabdam brahma iva
yat punar uktam anna āditya saṃnidhānāt prāṇasya a brahmatvam iti tat ayuktam
vākyaśeṣa balena prāṇa śabdasya brahma viṣaya tāyām pratīyamānāyām saṃnidhānasya akiṃcitkara tvāt
yat punar prāṇa śabdasya pañca vṛttau prasiddhatara tvam tat ākāśa śabdasya iva pratividheyam
tasmāt siddham prastāva devatāyāḥ prāṇasya brahmatvam
atra kecid udāharanti prāṇasya prāṇam prāṇa bandhanam hi somya manaḥ iti ca
tat ayuktam
śabda bhedāt prakaraṇāt ca saṃśaya anupapatteḥ
yathā pituḥ pitā iti prayoge anyaḥ pitā ṣaṣṭhī nirdiṣṭāt prathamā nirdiṣṭaḥ pituḥ pitā iti gamyate
tadvat prāṇasya prāṇam iti śabda bhedāt prasiddhāt prāṇāt anyaḥ prāṇasya prāṇaḥ iti niścīyate
na hi saḥ eva tasya iti bheda nirdeśa arhaḥ bhavati
yasya ca prakaraṇe yaḥ nirdiśyate nāma antareṇa api saḥ eva tatra prakaraṇī nirdiṣṭaḥ iti gamyate
yathā jyotiṣṭoma adhikāre vasante vasante jyotiṣā yajeta iti atra jyotiḥ śabdaḥ jyotiṣṭoma viṣayaḥ bhavati tathā parasya brahmaṇaḥ prakaraṇe prāṇa bandhanam hi somya manaḥ iti śrutaḥ prāṇa śabdaḥ vāyu vikāra mātram katham avagamayet
atas saṃśaya aviṣaya tvāt na etat udāharaṇam yuktam
prastāvadevatāyām tu prāṇe saṃśaya pūrvapakṣa nirṇayāḥ upapāditāḥ
jyotiḥ caraṇa abhidhānāt
jyotiścaraṇa adhikaraṇam
idam āmananti atha yat atas paras divaḥ jyotiḥ dīpyate viśvatas pṛṣṭheṣu sarvatas pṛṣṭheṣu anuttameṣu uttameṣu lokeṣu idam vāva tat yat idam asmin antar puruṣe jyotiḥ iti
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha jyotiḥ śabdena āditya ādikam jyotiḥ abhidhīyate kim vā paraḥ ātmā
iti
artha antara viṣayasya api prāṇa śabdasya tad liṅgāt brahma viṣaya tvam uktam
iha tu tat liṅgam eva asti na asti iti vicāryate
kim tāvat prāptam
āditya ādikam eva jyotiḥ śabdena parigṛhyate iti
kutas
prasiddheḥ
tamaḥ jyotiḥ iti hi imau śabdau paraspara pratidvandvi viṣayau prasiddhau
cakṣuḥ vṛtteḥ nirodhakam śārvara ādikam tamaḥ ucyate
tasyāḥ eva anugrāhakam āditya ādikam jyotiḥ
tathā dīpyate iti iyam api śrutiḥ āditya ādi viṣayā prasiddhā
na hi rūpa ādi hīnam brahma dīpyate iti mukhyām śrutim arhati
dyu maryāda tva śruteḥ ca
na hi carācara bījasya brahmaṇaḥ sarva ātmakasya dyauḥ maryādā yuktā
kāryasya tu jyotiśaḥ paricchinnasya dyauḥ maryādā syāt
paras divaḥ jyotiḥ iti ca brāhmaṇam
nanu kāryasya api jyotiṣaḥ sarvatra gamyamāna tvāt dyu maryādāvat tvam asamañjasam
astu tarhi atrivṛt kṛtam tejaḥ prathama jam
na a trivṛt kṛtasya tejasaḥ prayojana abhāvāt iti
idam eva prayojanam yat upāsya tvam iti ced na
prayojana antara prayuktasya eva āditya ādeḥ upāsya tva darśanāt tāsām trivṛtam trivṛtam ekaikām karavāṇi iti ca a viśeṣa śruteḥ
na ca a trivṛt kṛtasya api tejasaḥ dyu maryāda tvam prasiddham
astu tarhi trivṛt kṛtam eva tat tejaḥ jyotiḥ śabdam
nanu uktam arvāk api divaḥ avagamyate gni ādikam jyotiḥ iti
na eṣa doṣaḥ
sarvatra api gamyamānasya jyotiṣaḥ paras divaḥ iti upāsana arthaḥ pradeśa viśeṣa parigrahaḥ na virudhyate
na tu niṣpradeśasya api brahmaṇaḥ pradeśa viśeṣa kalpanā bhāginī
sarvatas pṛṣṭheṣu anuttameṣu uttameṣu lokeṣu iti ca ādhāra bahutva śrutiḥ kārye jyotiṣi upapadyatetarām
idam vāva tat yat idam asmin antar puruṣe jyotiḥ iti ca kaukṣeye jyotiṣi param jyotiḥ adhyasyamānam dṛśyate
sārūpya nimittāḥ ca adhyāsāḥ bhavanti yathā tasya bhūḥ iti śiraḥ śiraḥ ekam etat akṣaram iti
kaukṣeyasya tu jyotiṣaḥ prasiddham a brahma tvam
tasya eṣā dṛṣṭiḥ tasya eṣā śrutiḥ iti ca auṣṇya ghoṣa viśiṣṭa tvasya śravaṇāt
tat etat dṛṣṭam ca śrutam ca iti upāsīta iti ca śruteḥ
cakṣuṣyaḥ ca śrutaḥ bhavati yaḥ evam veda iti ca alpa phala śravaṇāt abrahmatvam
mahate hi phalāya brahma upāsanam iṣyate
na ca anyat api kiṃcid sva vākye prāṇa ākāśa vat jyotiṣaḥ
asti brahmatva liṅgam
na ca pūrvasmin api vākye brahma nirdiṣṭam asti gāyatrī vai idam sarvam bhūtam iti chandaḥ nirdeśāt
atha api kathaṃcid pūrvasmin vākye brahma nirdiṣṭam syāt evam api na tasya iha pratyabhijñānam asti
tatra hi tri pādasya amṛtam divi iti dyauḥ adhikaraṇa tvena śrūyate
atra punar paras divaḥ jyotiḥ iti dyauḥ maryādā tvena tasmāt prākṛtam jyotiḥ iha grāhyam iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ jyotiḥ iha brahma grāhyam
kutas
caraṇa abhidhānāt pāda abhidhānāt iti arthaḥ
pūrvasmin hi vākye catuṣpād brahma nirdiṣṭam tāvān asya mahimā tatas jyāyāḥ ca puruṣaḥ
pādaḥ u sya sarvā bhūtāni tri pādasya amṛtam divi iti anena mantreṇa
tatra yat catuṣpadaḥ brahmaṇaḥ tripād amṛtam dyu saṃbandhi rūpam nirdiṣṭam tat eva iha dyu saṃbandhāt nirdiṣṭam iti pratyabhijñāyate
tat parityajya prākṛtam jyotiḥ kalpayataḥ prakṛta hāna aprakṛta prakriye prasajyeyātām
na kevalam jyotiḥ vākye eva brahma anuvṛttiḥ
parasyām api hi śāṇḍilya vidyāyām anuvartiṣyate brahma
tasmāt iha jyotiḥ iti brahma pratipattavyam
yat tu uktam jyotiḥ dīpyate iti ca etau śabdau kārye jyotiṣi prasiddhau iti na ayam doṣaḥ
prakaraṇāt brahma avagame sati anayoḥ śabdayoḥ aviśeṣaka tvāt dīpyamāna kārya jyotiḥ upalakṣite brahmaṇi api prayoga saṃbhavāt
yena sūryaḥ tapati tejasā iddhaḥ iti ca mantra varṇāt
yat vā na ayam jyotiḥ śabdaḥ cakṣuḥ vṛtteḥ eva anugrāhake tejasi vartate anyatra api prayoga darśanāt vācā eva ayam jyotiṣā āste manaḥ jyotiḥ juṣatām iti ca
tasmāt yat yat kasyacid avabhāsakam tat tat jyotiḥ śabdena abhidhīyate
tathā sati brahmaṇaḥ pi caitanya rūpasya samasta jagat avabhāsa hetutvāt upapannaḥ jyotiḥ śabdaḥ
tam eva bhāntam anubhāti sarvam tasya bhāsā sarvam idam vibhāti tat devāḥ jyotiṣām jyotiḥ āyuḥ ha upāsate mṛtam ityādi śrutibhyaḥ ca
yat api uktam dyu maryāda tvam sarva gatasya brahmaṇaḥ na upapadyate iti atra ucyate sarva gatasya api brahmaṇaḥ upāsana arthaḥ pradeśa viśeṣa parigrahaḥ na virudhyate
nanu uktam niṣpradeśasya brahmaṇaḥ pradeśa viśeṣa kalpanā na upapadyate iti
na ayam doṣaḥ niṣpradeśasya api brahmaṇaḥ upādhi viśeṣa saṃbandhāt pradeśa viśeṣa kalpanā upapatteḥ
tathā hi āditye cakṣuṣi hṛdaye iti pradeśa viśeṣa saṃbandhīni brahmaṇaḥ upāsanāni śrūyante
etena viśvatas pṛṣṭheṣu iti ādhāra bahutvam upapāditam
yat api etat uktam auṣṇya ghoṣābhyām anumite kaukṣeye kārye jyotiṣi adhyasyamāna tvāt param api divaḥ kārya jyotiḥ eva iti tat api ayuktam
parasya api brahmaṇaḥ nāma ādi pratīka tva vat kaukṣeya jyotiṣpratīka tva upapatteḥ
dṛṣṭam ca śrutam ca iti upāsīta iti tu pratīka dvārakam dṛṣṭa tvam śruta tvam ca bhaviṣyati
yat api uktam alpa phala śravaṇāt ca na brahma iti tat anupapannam
na hi iyate phalāya brahma āśrayaṇīyam iyate na iti niyame hetuḥ asti
yatra hi nirasta sarva viśeṣa saṃbandham param brahma ātma tvena upadiśyate tatra eka rūpam eva phalam mokṣaḥ iti avagamyate
yatra tu guṇa viśeṣa saṃbandham pratīka viśeṣa saṃbandham vā brahma upadiśyate tatra saṃsāra gocarāṇi eva uccāvacāni phalāni dṛśyante anna ādaḥ vasu dānaḥ vindate vasu yaḥ evam veda ityādyāsu śrutiṣu
yadi api na sva vākye kiṃcid jyotiṣaḥ brahmatva liṅgam asti tathā api pūrvasmin vākye dṛśyamānam grahītavyam bhavati
tat uktam sūtrakāreṇa jyotiścaraṇa abhidhānāt iti
katham punar vākya antara gatena brahma saṃnidhānena jyotiḥ śrutiḥ sva viṣayāt śakyā pracyāvayitum
na eṣa doṣaḥ atha yat atas paras divaḥ jyotiḥ iti prathamatara paṭhitena yad śabdena sarvanāmnā dyu saṃbandhāt pratyabhijñāyamāne pūrva vākya nirdiṣṭe brahmaṇi sva sāmarthyena parāmṛṣṭe sati arthāt jyotiḥ śabdasya api brahma viṣaya tva upapatteḥ
tasmāt iha jyotiḥ iti brahma pratipattavyam
chandaḥ bhidhānāt na iti ced na tathā cetaḥ ṛpaṇa nigadāt tathā hi darśanam
atha yat uktam pūrvasmin api vākye na brahma abhihitam asti gāyatrī vai idam sarvam bhūtam yat idam kiṃca iti gāyatrī ākhyasya chandasaḥ bhihita tvāt iti
tat parihartavyam
katham punar chandaḥ abhidhānāt na brahma abhihitam iti śakyate vaktum
yāvatā tāvān asya mahimā iti etasyām ṛci catuṣpād brahma darśitam
na etat asti
gāyatrī vai idam sarvam iti gāyatrīm upakramya tām eva bhūta pṛthivī śarīra hṛdaya vāc prāṇa prabhedaiḥ vyākhyāya sā eṣā catuṣpadā ṣaḍvidhā gāyatrī tat etat ṛcā abhyanūktam tāvān asya mahimā iti tasyām eva vyākhyāta rūpāyām gāyatryām udāhṛtaḥ mantraḥ katham akasmāt brahma catuṣpād abhidadhyāt
yaḥ u pi tatra yat vai tat brahma iti brahma śabdaḥ saḥ u pi chandasaḥ prakṛta tvāt chandaḥ viṣayaḥ eva
yaḥ etām evam brahma upaniṣadam veda iti atra hi veda upaniṣadam iti vyācakṣate
tasmāt chandaḥ abhidhānāt na brahmaṇaḥ prakṛta tvam iti ced nā eṣa doṣaḥ
tathā cetaḥ arpaṇa nigadāt tathā gāyatrī ākhya chandaḥ dvāreṇa tad anugate brahmaṇi cetasaḥ rpaṇam citta samādhānam anena brāhmaṇa vākyena nigadyate gāyatrī vai idam sarvam iti
na hi akṣara saṃniveśa mātrāyāḥ gāyatryāḥ sarva ātmaka tvam saṃbhavati
tasmāt yat gāyatrī ākhya vikāre nugatam jagat kāraṇam brahma nirdiṣṭam tat iha sarvam iti ucyate yathā sarvam khalu idam brahma iti
kāryam ca kāraṇāt avyatiriktam iti vakṣyāmaḥ tad ananyatvam ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ iti atra
tathā anyatra api vikāra dvāreṇa brahmaṇaḥ upāsanam dṛśyate etam hi eva bahvṛcāḥ mahati ukthe mīmāṃsante etam agnau adhvaryavaḥ etam mahāvrate chandogāḥ iti
tasmāt asti chandaḥ abhidhāne pi pūrvasmin vākye catuṣpād brahma nirdiṣṭam
tat eva jyotiḥ vākye pi parāmṛśyate upāsana antara vidhānāya
aparaḥ āha
sākṣāt eva gāyatrī śabdena brahma pratipādyate saṃkhyā sāmānyāt
yathā gāyatrī catuṣpadā ṣaḍakṣaraiḥ pādaiḥ tathā brahma catuṣpād
tathā anyatra api chandaḥ abhidhāyī śabdaḥ rtha antare saṃkhyā sāmānyāt prayujyamānaḥ dṛśyate
tat yathā te vai ete pañca anye pañca anye daśa santaḥ tat kṛtam iti upakramya āha sā eṣā virāj annādī iti
asmin pakṣe brahma eva abhihitam iti na chandaḥ abhidhānam
sarvathā api asti pūrvasmin vākye prakṛtam brahma iti
bhūta ādi pāda vyapadeśa upapatteḥ ca evam
itas ca evam abhyupagantavyam asti pūrvasmin vākye prakṛtam brahma iti
yatas bhūta ādīn pādān vyapadiśati śrutiḥ
bhūta pṛthivī śarīra hṛdayāni hi nirdiśya āha sā eṣā catuṣpadā ṣaḍvidhā gāyatrī iti
na hi brahma an āśrayaṇe kevalasya chandasaḥ bhūta ādayaḥ pādāḥ upapadyante
api ca brahma an āśrayaṇe na iyam ṛc saṃbadhyeta tāvān asya mahimā iti
anayā hi ṛcā sva rasena brahmā eva abhidhīyate pādaḥ u sya sarvā bhūtāni tri pādasya amṛtam divi iti sarva ātma tva upapatteḥ
puruṣasūkte pi iyam ṛc brahma para tayā eva samāmnāyate
smṛtiḥ ca brahmaṇaḥ evaṃrūpa tām darśayati viṣṭabhya aham idam kṛtsnam eka aṃśena sthitaḥ jagat iti
yat vai tat brahma iti ca nirdeśaḥ
evam sati mukhya arthaḥ upapadyate
te vai ete pañca brahma puruṣāḥ iti ca hṛdaya suṣiṣu brahma puruṣa śrutiḥ brahma saṃbandhi tāyām vivakṣitāyām saṃbhavati
tasmāt asti pūrvasmin vākye brahma prakṛtam
tat eva brahma jyotiḥ vākye dyu saṃbandhāt pratyabhijñāyamānam parāmṛśyate iti sthitam
upadeśa bhedāt na iti ced na ubhayasmin api avirodhāt
yat api etat uktam pūrvatra tripādasya amṛtam divi iti saptamyā dyauḥ ādhāra tvena upadiṣṭā
iha punar atha yat atas paras divaḥ iti pañcamyā maryādā tvena
tasmāt upadeśa bhedāt na tasya iha pratyabhijñānam asti iti tat parihartavyam
atrā ucyate na ayam doṣaḥ ubhayasmin api avirodhāt
ubhayasmin api saptamī ante pañcamī ante ca upadeśe na pratyabhijñānam virudhyate
yathā loke vṛkṣa agreṇa saṃbaddhaḥ u pi śyenaḥ ubhayathā upadiśyamānaḥ dṛśyate vṛkṣa agre śyenaḥ vṛkṣa agrāt paratas śyenaḥ iti ca evam divya eva sat brahma divaḥ param iti upadiśyate
aparaḥ āha yathā loke vṛkṣa agreṇa asaṃbaddhaḥ pi śye
text2:
m iti evam prāpte sūtrakāraḥ āha atas
eva prāṇaḥ iti tad liṅgāt iti pūrva sūtre atas eva tad liṅgāt prāṇa śabdam api param brahma bhavitum arhati prāṇasya api hi brahma liṅga saṃbadhaḥ śrūyate sarvāṇi ha vai imā idam
bhūtāi prāṇam eva abhisaṃviśati prāṇam abhyujjihate iti prāṇa aimittau sarveṣām bhūtāām utpatti pralayau ucyamāau prāṇasya brahmatām gamayataḥ mukhya prāṇa parigrahe pi saṃveśa udgama adarśa amaviruddham svāpa prabodhayoḥ darśaāt iti atra ucyate svāpa prabodhayoḥ idriyāṇām eva kevalāām prāṇa āśrayam saṃveśa odgama amaviruddham dṛśyate
sarveṣām bhūtāām iha tu sa idriyāṇām sa śarīrāṇām ca jīva āviṣṭāām bhūtāām sarvāṇi ha vai imāi bhūtāi iti śruteḥ yadā api bhūta śrutiḥ mahābhūta viṣayā parigṛhyate
tadā api brahma liṅga tvam aviruddham saha api viṣayaiḥ idriyāṇām svāpa prabodhayoḥ prāṇe pi ayam prāṇāt ca prabhavam śrṛṇumaḥ yadā suptaḥ svapam paśyati atha asmi prāṇaḥ eva ekadhā bhavati vāc sarvaiḥ āmabhiḥ
saha apyeti iti tatra api tad liṅgāt prāṇa śabdam brahma iva yat puas uktam prāṇasya abrahmatvam iti tat ayuktam vākyaśeṣa balea prāṇa śabdasya brahma viṣaya tāyām pratīyamāāyām saṃidhāasya akiṃcitkara tvāt yat puas
prāṇa śabdasya pañca vṛttau prasiddhatara tvam tat ākāśa śabdasya iva pratividheyam tasmāt siddham prastāva devatāyāḥ prāṇasya brahmatvam atra kecid udāharati prāṇasya prāṇam hi somya
iti ca tat ayuktam śabda bhedāt prakaraṇāt ca saṃśaya aupapatteḥ yathā pituḥ pitā iti prayoge ayaḥ pitā ṣaṣṭhīirdiṣṭāt prathama airdiṣṭaḥ pituḥ pitā iti gamyate
tadvat prāṇasya prāṇam iti śabda bhedāt prasiddhāt prāṇāt ayaḥ prāṇasya prāṇaḥ iti hi saḥ eva tasya iti bhedaiḥ deśa arhaḥ bhavati yasya
ca prakaraṇe yaḥ irdiśyate saḥ eva tatra prakaraṇī irdiṣṭaḥ iti gamyate yathā jyotiṣṭoma adhikāre vasate vasate jyotiṣā yajeta iti atra
jyotiḥ śabdaḥ jyotiṣṭoma viṣayaḥ bhavati tathā parasya brahmaṇaḥ prakaraṇe hi somya maaḥ iti śrutaḥ prāṇa śabdaḥ vāyu vikāra mātram katham avagamayet atas saṃśaya aviṣaya tvā ā etat
udāharaṇam yuktam prastāvadevatāyām tu prāṇe saṃśaya pūrvapakṣaiḥ ṇayā upapāditāḥ jyotiścaraṇa abhidhāāt jyotiścaraṇa adhikaraṇam idam atha yat atas paras divaḥ jyotiḥ dīpyate viśvatas pṛṣṭheṣu
sarvatas pṛṣṭheṣu auttameṣu uttameṣu lokeṣu idam vāva tat yat idam asmi atas puruṣe jyotiḥ iti tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha jyotiḥ śabde āditya ādikam jyotiḥ abhidhīyate kim vā paraḥ ātmā iti artha atara viṣayasya api
prāṇa śabdasya tad liṅgāt brahma viṣaya tvam uktam iha tu tad liṅgam eva asti āsti iti vicāryate kim tāvat prāptam āditya ādikam eva parigṛhyate iti kutas prasiddheḥ
jyotiḥ iti hi imau śabdau paraspara pratidva dvi viṣayau prasiddhau cakṣuḥ vṛtteḥ śārvara ādikam tamaḥ ucyate tasyāḥ eva au grāhakam āditya ādikam jyotiḥ tathā dīpyate iti iyam api śrutiḥ
āditya ādi viṣayā prasiddhā hi brahma dīpyate iti mukhyām śrutim arhati dyu maryāda tva śruteḥ ca a hi carācara bījasya brahmaṇaḥ sarva ātmakasya dyauḥ maryādā yuktā
kāryasya tu jyotiśaḥ dyauḥ maryādā syāt paras divaḥ jyotiḥ iti ca brāhmaṇam kāryasya api jyotiṣaḥ sarvatra dyu maryādāvat tvam asamañjasam astu
tarhi a trivṛt kṛtam tejaḥ prathama jam a a trivṛt kṛtasya tejasaḥ iti idam eva prayojaam yat upāsya tvam iti ced a prayoja a tara prayuktasya eva āditya ādeḥ upāsya tva darśaāt tāsām
trivṛtam trivṛtam ekaikām karavāṇi iti ca a viśeṣa śruteḥ a ca a trivṛt kṛtasya api tejasaḥ dyu maryāda tvam prasiddham astu tarhi trivṛt kṛtam eva tat tejaḥ jyotiḥ śabdam api divaḥ vagamyate igya ādikam
jyotiḥ iti ā eṣa doṣaḥ sarvatra api gamyamā asya jyotiṣaḥ paras divaḥ iti upāsa arthaḥ pradeśa viśeṣa parigrahaḥ virudhyate a tu brahmaṇaḥ pradeśa viśeṣa kalpaā bhāgiī
sarvatas pṛṣṭheṣu auttameṣu uttameṣu lokeṣu iti ca ādhāra bahutva śrutiḥ kārye jyotiṣi upapadyatetarām idam vāva tat yat idam asmi atas puruṣe jyotiḥ iti ca
kaukṣeye jyotiṣi param jyotiḥ dṛśyate sārūpya aimittāḥ ca adhyāsāḥ bhavati yathā tasya bhūḥ iti śiraḥ śiraḥ ekam etat akṣaram iti kaukṣeyasya
tu jyotiṣaḥ prasiddham a brahma tvam tasya eṣā dṛṣṭiḥ tasya eṣā śrutiḥ iti ca auṣṇya ghoṣa viśiṣṭa tvasya śravaṇāt tat etat dṛṣṭam ca śrutam ca iti upāsīta iti ca
śruteḥ cakṣuṣyaḥ ca śrutaḥ bhavati yaḥ evam veda iti ca alpa phala śravaṇāt abrahmatvam mahate hi phalāya iṣyate
jyotiṣaḥ asti brahmatva liṅgam a ca pūrvasmi api vākye brahma gāyatrī vai idam sarvam bhūtam iti atha api kathaṃcid pūrvasmi
vākye brahma syāt evam api a tasya iha asti tatra hi tri pādasya amṛtam divi iti śrūyate atra puras
divaḥ jyotiḥ iti tasmāt prākṛtam jyotiḥ iha grāhyam iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ jyotiḥ iha brahma grāhyam kutas caraṇa abhidhāāt pāda abhidhāāt iti arthaḥ
pūrvasmi hi vākye catuṣpād brahma tāvā asya mahimā tatas jyāyāḥ ca puruṣaḥ pādaḥ usya sarvā tri pādasya amṛtam divi matreṇa tatra yat catuṣpadaḥ brahmaṇaḥ tri pād amṛtam
tat eva iha pratyabhijñāyate tat parityajya prākṛtam jyotiḥ kalpayataḥ prakṛta hāā prakṛta prakriye prasajyeyātām a kevalam jyotiḥ vākye eva brahma āvṛttiḥ parasyām api hi śāṇḍilya vidyāyām auvartiṣyate brahma tasmāt iha
jyotiḥ iti brahma pratipattavyam yat tu uktam jyotiḥ dīpyate iti ca etau śabdau kārye jyotiṣi prasiddhau iti ā ayam doṣaḥ prakaraṇāt brahma avagame satya ayoḥ śabdayoḥ aviśeṣaka tvāt dīpyamā a kārya jyotiḥ upalakṣite brahmaṇi api prayoga saṃbhavāt ye ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam ayam aya
sūryaḥ tapati tejasā iddhaḥ iti ca matra varṇāt yat vā ā ayam jyotiḥ śabdaḥ cakṣuḥ vṛtteḥ eva au grāhake tejasi vartate prayoga darśaāt vācā eva ayam jyotiṣā āste mao jyotiḥ juṣatām iti ca tasmāt yat yat kasyacid avabhāsakam tat tat jyotiḥ śabdena abhidhīyate
tathā sati brahmaṇaḥ api caitaya rūpasya samasta jagat avabhāsa hetutvāt jyotiḥ śabdaḥ tam eva sarvam tasya bhāsā sarvam idam vibhāti tat devāḥ jyotiṣām jyotiḥ āyuḥ ha upāsata imṛtam ityādi śrutibhyaḥ ca yat api uktam dyu maryāda tvam sarva gatasya
brahmaṇaḥ opapadyate iti atra ucyate sarva gatasya api brahmaṇaḥ upāsa arthaḥ pradeśa viśeṣa parigrahaḥ virudhyate iṣpradeśasya brahmaṇaḥ pradeśa viśeṣa kalpaḥ opapadyate iti ā ayam doṣaḥ iṣpradeśasya api brahmaṇaḥ
upādhi viśeṣa saṃbadhāt pradeśa viśeṣa kalpa upapatteḥ tathā hi āditye cakṣuṣi hṛdaye iti brahmaṇaḥ śrūyate viśvatas pṛṣṭheṣu iti ādhāra bahutvam upapāditam yat api etat uktam auṣṇya ghoṣābhyām aumite kaukṣeye kārye jyotiṣi adhyasyam āa tvāt param api
divaḥ kārya jyotiḥ eva iti tat api ayuktam parasya api brahmaṇaḥ āma ādi pratīka tva vat kaukṣeya jyotiḥ pratīka tva upapatteḥ dṛṣṭam ca śrutam ca iti upāsīta iti tu pratīka dvārakam dṛṣṭa tvam śruta tvam ca bhaviṣyati yat api
uktam alpa phala śravaṇāt ca a brahma iti tat aupapaam a hi iyate phalāya brahma āśrayaṇīyam iyate hetuḥ asti yatra hi
param brahma ātma tvena upadiśyate tatra eka rūpam eva phalam mokṣaḥ iti avagamyate yatra tu guṇa viśeṣa saṃbadham pratīka viśeṣa saṃbadham vā brahma upadiśyate tatra saṃsāra gocarāṇi eva uccāvacāi dṛśyate
vasu dāḥ vidate vasu yaḥ evam veda ityādyāsu śrutiṣu yadi api sva vākye kiṃcid jyotiṣaḥ brahmatva liṅgam asti tathā api pūrvasmin vākye grahītavyam bhavati tat uktam sūtrakāreṇa
jyotiḥ caraṇa abhidhāāt iti katham jyotiḥ śrutiḥ sva viṣayāt śakyā pracyāvayitum ā eṣa doṣaḥ atha yat atas paras divaḥ jyotiḥ iti prathamatara paṭhite yat śabde
pūrva vākyaiḥ diṣṭe brahmaṇi parāmṛṣṭe sati arthāt jyotiḥ śabdasya api brahma viṣaya tva upapatteḥ tasmāt iha jyotiḥ iti brahma pratipattavyam tathā hi atha yat uktam pūrvasmi api vākye
a brahma abhihitam asti gāyatrī vai id sarvam bhūtam yat idam kiṃca iti gāyatrī ākhyasya chadasā abhihita tvāt iti tat parihartavyam katham brahma abhihitam iti śakyate vaktum yāvatā tāvā asya mahimā
iti etasyām ṛci catuṣpād brahma darśitam ā etat asti gāyatrī vai id sarvam iti gāyatrīm upakramya tām eva bhūta pṛthivī śarīra hṛdaya vāc prāṇa prabhedaiḥ vyākhyāya sā eṣā catuṣpadā ṣaḍvidhā gāyatrī tat etat ṛcā abhyaūktam tāvā asya mahimā iti tasyām eva
vyākhyāta rūpāyām gāyatryām udāhṛtaḥ matraḥ katham akasmāt brahma catuṣpād abhidadhyāt yaḥ api tatra yat vai tat brahma iti brahma śabdaḥ saḥ api chadasaḥ prakṛta tvāt chadaḥ viṣayaḥ eva yaḥ etām evam brahma upaiṣadam veda iti atra
hi veda upaiṣadam iti vyācakṣate brahmaṇaḥ prakṛta tvam iti ced doṣaḥ tathā tathā gāyatrī ākhya chadaḥ dvāreṇa tad augate brahmaṇi cetasā ūrpaṇam citta samādhām brāhmaṇa vākye igadyate
gāyatrī vai id sarvam iti hi akṣara saṃiveśa mātrāyāḥ gāyatryāḥ sarva ātmaka tvam saṃbhavati tasmāt yat gāyatrī ākhya vikāreugatam jagat kāraṇam brahma tat iha sarvam iti ucyate yathā sarvam khalu idam brahma iti
kāryam ca kāraṇāt avyatiriktam iti vakṣyāmaḥ tad aaya tvam ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ iti atra tathā yatra api vikāra dvāreṇa brahmaṇaḥ dṛśyate etam hi eva bahvṛcāḥ mahati ukthe mīmāṃsate etam agau adhvaryavaḥ etam mahāvrate chadogāḥ
iti tasmāt asti pūrvasmin vākye catuṣpād brahma tat eva jyotiḥ vākye api parāmṛśyate aparaḥ āha sākṣāt eva brahma pratipādyate saṃkhyā sāmāyāt yathā gāyatrī catuṣpadā
ṣaṣ akṣaraiḥ pādaiḥ tathā brahma catuṣpād dṛśyate tat yathā te vai ete pañca āye pañca āye daśa satas tat kṛtam iti upakramya āha sā eṣā
virāj ādī iti asmin pakṣe brahma eva abhihitam iti sarvathā api asti pūrvasmi vākye prakṛtam brahma iti bhūta ādi pāda vyapadeśa upapatteḥ ca evam itas ca evam abhyupagatavyam asti pūrvasmi vākye prakṛtam brahma iti yatas bhūta ādī pādau vyapadiśati śrutiḥ bhūta pṛthivī śarīra hṛdaya ādi api anya api anya api anya api anya api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api api ap
hi irdiśya āha sā eṣā catuṣpadā ṣaḍvidhā gāyatrī iti a hi brahma a āśrayaṇe kevalasya chadasaḥ bhūta ādayaḥ pādāḥ upapadyate api ca brahma a āśrayaṇe eyam ṛc saṃbadhyeta
tāvā asya mahimā iti aayā hi ṛcā brahma eva abhidhīyate pādaḥ usya sarvā tri pādasya amṛtam divi iti sarva ātma tva upapatteḥ puruṣasūkte api iyam ṛc brahma para tayā eva samāmāyate smṛtiḥ ca brahmaṇaḥ
evaṃrūpa tām darśayati viṣṭabhya aham idam sthitaḥ jagat iti yat vai tat brahma iti evam sati mukhya arthaḥ upapadyate te vai ete pañca
brahma puruṣāḥ iti ca hṛdaya suṣiṣu brahma puruṣa śrutiḥ brahma saṃbadhi tāyām vivakṣitāyām saṃbhavati tasmāt asti pūrvasmi vākye brahma prakṛtam tat eva brahma jyotiḥ vākye parāmṛśyate iti sthitam upadeśa bhedāḥ iti ca ā ubhayasmin api avirodhāt
yat api etat uktam pūrvatra tri pādasya amṛtam divi iti saptamyā dyauḥ ādhāra tve upadiṣṭā iha atha yat atas paras divaḥ iti pañcamyā maryādā tve tasmāt upadeśa bhedāt tasya iha pratyabhijñā am asti iti
tat parihartavyam atra ucyate doṣaḥ ubhayasmin api avirodhāt ubhayasmin api saptamyate pañcamyate ca upadeśe virudhyate yathā loke vṛkṣa agreṇa saṃbaddhaḥ api śyeaḥ dṛśyate vṛkṣa agre
śyeaḥ vṛkṣa agrāt paratas śyeaḥ iti ca evam divya eva sat brahma divaḥ param iti upadiśyate aparaḥ āha yathā loke vṛkṣa agreṇa asaṃbaddhaḥ api śye

text1:
aḥ dṛśyate vṛkṣa agre śyenaḥ vṛkṣa agrāt paratas śyenaḥ iti ca evam divya eva sat brahma divaḥ param iti upadiśyate
aparaḥ āha yathā loke vṛkṣa agreṇa asaṃbaddhaḥ pi śyenaḥ ubhayathā upadiśyamānaḥ dṛśyate vṛkṣa agre śyenaḥ vṛkṣa agrāt paratas śyenaḥ iti ca evam divaḥ param api sat brahma divi iti upadiśyate
tasmāt asti pūrva nirdiṣṭasya brahmaṇaḥ iha pratyabhijñānam
atas param eva brahma jyotiḥ śabdam iti siddham
prāṇaḥ tathā anugamāt
prātardana adhikaraṇam
asti kauṣītakibrāhmaṇa upaniṣadi indrapratardana ākhyāyikā pratardanaḥ ha vai daivodāsiḥ indrasya priyam dhāma upajagāma yuddhena ca pauruṣeṇa ca iti ārabhya āmnātā
tasyām śrūyate sa ha uvāca prāṇaḥ smi prajñā ātmā tam mām āyuḥ amṛtam iti upāssva iti
tathā uttaratra api atha khalu prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti
tathā na vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt iti
ante ca saḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā ānandaḥ jaraḥ mṛtaḥ ityādi
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha prāṇa śabdena vāyu mātram abhidhīyate uta devatā ātmā uta jīvaḥ athavā param brahma iti
nanu atas eva prāṇaḥ iti atra varṇitam prāṇa śabdasya brahma para tvam
iha api ca brahma liṅgam asti ānandaḥ jaraḥ mṛtaḥ ityādi
katham iha punar saṃśayaḥ saṃbhavati
aneka liṅga darśanāt iti brūmaḥ
na kevalam iha brahma liṅgam eva upalabhyate
santi hi itara liṅgāni api mām eva vijānīhi iti indrasya vacanam devatā ātma liṅgam
idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti prāṇa liṅgam
na vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt ityādi jīva liṅgam
atas upapannaḥ saṃśayaḥ
tatra prasiddheḥ vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ iti prāpte idam ucyate prāṇa śabdam brahma vijñeyam
kutas
tathā anugamāt
tathā hi paurvāparyeṇa paryālocyamāne vākye padānām samanvayaḥ brahma pratipādana paraḥ upalabhyate
upakrame tāvat varam vṛṇīṣva iti indreṇa uktaḥ pratardanaḥ paramam puruṣa artham varam upacikṣepa tvam eva me varam vṛṇīṣva yam tvam manuṣyāya hitatamam manyase iti
tasmai hitatama tvena upadiśyamānaḥ prāṇaḥ katham paramātmā na syāt
na hi anyatra paramātma vijñānāt hitatama prāptiḥ asti tam eva viditvā ati mṛtyum eti na anyaḥ panthāḥ vidyate yanāyaḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
tathā sa yaḥ mām veda na ha vai tasya kenacana karmaṇā lokaḥ mīyate na steyena na bhrūṇahatyayā ityādi ca brahma parigrahe ghaṭate
brahma vijñānena hi sarva karma kṣayaḥ prasiddhaḥ kṣīyante ca asya karmāṇi tasmin dṛṣṭe parāvare ityādyāsu śrutiṣu
prajñā ātma tvam ca brahma pakṣe eva upapadyate
na hi acetanasya vāyoḥ prajñā ātma tvam saṃbhavati
tathā upasaṃhāre pi ānandaḥ jaraḥ mṛtaḥ iti ānanda tva ādīni ca na brahmaṇaḥ nyatra samyak saṃbhavanti
sa na sādhunā karmaṇā bhūyān bhavati na u eva a sādhunā karmaṇā kanīyān eṣa hi eva sādhu karma kārayati tam yam ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ unninīṣate
eṣaḥ u eva asādhu karma kārayati tam yam ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ ninīṣate iti eṣa loka adhipatiḥ eṣa lokapālaḥ eṣa loka īśaḥ iti ca
sarvam etat parasmin brahmaṇi āśrīyamāṇe nugantum śakyate na mukhye prāṇe
tasmāt prāṇaḥ brahma
na vaktuḥ ātma upadeśāt iti ced adhyātma sambandha bhūmā hi asmin
yat uktam prāṇaḥ brahma iti tat ākṣipyate na param brahma prāṇa śabdam
kasmāt
vaktuḥ ātma upadeśāt
vaktā hi indraḥ nāma kaścid vigrahavān devatā viśeṣaḥ svam ātmānam pratardanāya ācacakṣe mām eva vijānīhi iti upakramya smi prajñā ātmā iti ahaṃkāra vādena
saḥ eva vaktuḥ ātma tvena upadiśyamānaḥ prāṇaḥ katham brahma syāt
na hi brahmaṇaḥ vaktṛ tvam saṃbhavati avāgamanāḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
tathā vigraha saṃbandhibhiḥ eva brahmaṇi asaṃbhavadbhiḥ dharmaiḥ indraḥ ātmānam tuṣṭāva triśīrṣāṇam tvāṣṭra mahana marut mukhāni atīn śālāvṛkebhyaḥ prāyaccham iti evamādibhiḥ
prāṇa tvam ca indrasya balavat tvāt upapadyate
prāṇaḥ vai balam iti hi vijñāyate
balasya ca indraḥ devatā prasiddhā
yā ca kācid bala prakṛtiḥ indrasya karma eva tat iti hi vadanti
prajñā ātmatvam api apratihata jñāna tvāt devatā ātmanaḥ saṃbhavati
a pratihata jñānāḥ devatāḥ iti hi vadanti
niścite ca evam devatā ātma upadeśe hitatama tva ādi vacanāni yathāsaṃbhavam tad viṣayāṇi eva yojayitavyāni
tasmāt vaktuḥ indrasya ātma upadeśāt na prāṇaḥ brahma iti ākṣipya pratisamādhīyate adhyātma saṃbandha bhūmā hi asmin iti
adhyātma saṃbandhaḥ pratyagātma saṃbandhaḥ tasya bhūmā bāhulyam asmin adhyāye upalabhyate
yāvat hi asmin śarīre prāṇaḥ vasati tāvat āyuḥ iti prāṇasya eva prajñā ātmanaḥ pratyak bhūtasya āyuḥ pradāna upasaṃhārayoḥ svātantryam darśayati na devatā viśeṣasya parācīnasya
tathā astitve ca prāṇānām niḥśreyasam iti adhyātmam eva indriya āśrayam prāṇam darśayati
tathā prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti
na vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt iti ca upakramya tat yathā rathasya areṣu nemiḥ arpitā nābhau arāḥ arpitāḥ evam eva etāḥ bhūtamātrāḥ prajñāmātrāsu arpitāḥ prajñāmātrāḥ prāṇe rpitāḥ saḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā ānandaḥ jaraḥ mṛtaḥ iti viṣaya indriya vyavahāra ara nābhi bhūtam pratyagātmānam eva upasaṃharati
sa me ātmā iti vidyāt iti ca upasaṃhāraḥ pratyagātma parigrahe sādhuḥ na parācīna parigrahe
ayam ātmā brahma sarva anubhūḥ iti ca śruti antaram
tasmāt adhyātma saṃbandha bāhulyāt brahma upadeśaḥ eva ayam na devatā ātma upadeśaḥ
katham tarhi vaktuḥ ātma upadeśaḥ
śāstra dṛṣṭyā tu upadeśaḥ vāmadeva vat
indraḥ nāma devatā ātmā svam ātmānam paramātma tvena aham eva param brahma iti ārṣeṇa darśanena yathāśāstram paśyan upadiśati sma mām eva vijānīhi iti
yathā tat ha etat paśyan ṛṣiḥ vāmadevaḥ pratipede ham manuḥ abhavam sūryaḥ ca iti tadvat
tat yaḥ yaḥ devānām pratyabudhyata saḥ eva tat abhavat iti śruteḥ
yat punar uktam mām eva vijānīhi iti uktvā vigraha carmaiḥ indraḥ svam ātmānam tuṣṭāva tvāṣṭra vadha ādibhiḥ iti tat parihartavyam
atrā ucyate na tāvat tvāṣṭra vadha ādīnām vijñeya indra stuti artha tvena upanyāsaḥ yasmāt evaṃkarmā aham tasmāt mām vijānīhi iti
katham tarhi
vijñāna stuti artha tvena
yatkāraṇam tvāṣṭra vadha ādīni sāhasāni upanyasya pareṇa vijñāna stutim anusaṃdadhāti tasya me tatra loma ca na mīyate sa yaḥ mām veda na ha vai tasya kena ca karmaṇā loke mīyate ityādinā
etat uktam bhavati yasmāt īdṛśāni api krūrāṇi karmāṇi kṛtavataḥ mama brahma bhūtasya loma api na hiṃsyate sa yaḥ mām veda na tasya kenacid api karmaṇā lokaḥ hiṃsyate iti
vijñeyam tu brahma eva prāṇaḥ smi prajñā ātmā iti vakṣyamāṇam
tasmāt brahma vākyam etat
jīva mukhya prāṇa liṅgāt na iti ced na upāsā traividhyāt āśrita tvāt iha tad yogāt
yadi api adhyātma saṃbandha bhūma darśanāt na parācīnasya devatā ātmanaḥ upadeśaḥ tathā api na brahma vākyam bhavitum arhati
kutas
jīva liṅgāt mukhya prāṇa liṅgāt ca
jīvasya tāvat asmin vākye vispaṣṭam liṅgam upalabhyate na vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt ityādi
atra hi vāc ādibhiḥ karaṇaiḥ vyāpṛtasya kārya karaṇa adhyakṣasya jīvasya vijñeya tvam abhidhīyate
tathā mukhya prāṇa liṅgam api atha khalu prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti
śarīra dhāraṇam ca mukhya prāṇasya dharmaḥ
prāṇa saṃvāde vāc ādīn prāṇān prakṛtya tān variṣṭhaḥ prāṇaḥ uvāca mā moham āpat yathā aham eva etat pañcadhā ātmānam pravibhajya etat bāṇam avaṣṭabhya vidhārayāmi iti śravaṇāt
ye tu imam śarīram parigṛhya iti paṭhanti teṣām imam jīvam indriya grāmam vā parigṛhya śarīram utthāpayati iti vyākhyeyam
prajñā ātma tvam api jīve tāvat cetana tvāt upapannam
mukhye pi prāṇe prajñā sādhana prāṇa antara āśraya tvāt upapannam eva
evam jīva mukhya prāṇa parigrahe ca prāṇa prajñā ātmanoḥ saha vṛtti tvena abheda nirdeśaḥ svarūpeṇa ca iti ubhayathā api nirdeśaḥ upapadyate yaḥ vai prāṇaḥ sā prajñā yā vai prajñā sa prāṇaḥ saha hi etau asmin śarīre vasataḥ saha utkrāmataḥ iti
brahma parigrahe tu kim kasmāt bhidyeta
tasmāt iha jīva mukhya prāṇayoḥ anyataraḥ ubhau vā pratīyeyātām na brahma iti ced na etat evam
upāsā traividhyāt
evam sati trividham upāsanam prasajyeta jīva upāsanam mukhya prāṇa upāsanam brahma upāsanam ca iti
na ca etat ekasmin vākye bhyupagantum yuktam
upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām hi vākya eka vākya tvam avagamyate
mām eva vijānīhi iti upakramya prāṇaḥ smi prajñā ātmā tam mām āyuḥ amṛtam iti upāssva iti uktvā ante saḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā ānandaḥ jaraḥ mṛtaḥ iti eka rūpau upakrama upasaṃhārau dṛśyete
tatra artha ekatvam yuktam āśrayitum
na ca brahma liṅgam anya paratvena pariṇetum śakyam
daśānām bhūtamātrāṇām prajñāmātrāṇām ca brahmaṇaḥ nyatra arpaṇa anupapatteḥ
āśrita tvāt ca anyatra api brahma liṅga vaśāt prāṇa śabdasya brahmaṇi pravṛtteḥ iha api ca hitatama upanyāsa ādi brahma liṅga yogāt brahma upadeśaḥ eva ayam iti gamyate
yat tu mukhya prāṇa liṅgam darśitam idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti tat asat
prāṇa vyāpārasya api paramātma āyatta tvāt paramātmani upacaritum śakya tvāt na prāṇena nā apānena martyaḥ jīvati kaścana
itareṇa tu jīvanti yasmin etau upāśritau iti śruteḥ
yat api na vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt ityādi jīva liṅgam darśitam tat api na brahma pakṣam nivārayati
na hi jīvaḥ nāma atyanta bhinnaḥ brahmaṇaḥ tattvam asi aham brahma asmi ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
buddhi ādi upādhi kṛtam tu viśeṣam āśritya brahma eva san jīvaḥ kartā bhoktā ca iti ucyate
tasya upādhi kṛta viśeṣa parityāgena sva rūpam brahma darśayitum na vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt ityādinā pratyagātma abhimukhīkaraṇa arthaḥ upadeśaḥ na virudhyate
yat vācā an abhyuditam yena vāc abhyudyate
tat eva brahma tvam viddhi na idam yat idam upāsate ityādi ca śruti antaram vacana ādi kriyā vyāpṛtasya eva ātmanaḥ brahmatvam darśayati
yat punar etat uktam saha hi etau asmin śarīre vasataḥ saha utkrāmataḥ iti prāṇa prajñā ātmanoḥ bheda darśanam brahma vādinaḥ na upapadyate iti na eṣa doṣaḥ
jñāna kriyā śakti dvaya āśrayayoḥ buddhi prāṇayoḥ pratyagātma upādhi bhūtayoḥ bheda nirdeśa upapatteḥ
upādhi dvaya upahitasya tu pratyagātmanaḥ svarūpeṇa abhedaḥ iti atas prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā iti ekīkaraṇam aviruddham
athavā na upāsā traividhyāt āśrita tvāt iha tad yogāt iti asya ayam anyaḥ rthaḥ na brahma vākye jīva mukhya prāṇa liṅgam virudhyate
katham
upāsā traividhyāt
trividham iha brahmaṇaḥ upāsanam vivakṣitam prāṇa dharmeṇa prajñā dharmeṇa svadharmeṇa ca
tatra āyuḥ amṛtam iti upāssva āyuḥ prāṇaḥ iti idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti tasmāt etat eva uktham upāsīta iti ca prāṇa dharmaḥ
atha yathā asyai prajñāyai sarvāṇi bhūtāni ekībhavanti tat vyākhyāsyāmaḥ iti upakramya vāc eva asyāḥ ekam aṅgam adūduhat tasyai nāma parastāt prativihitā bhūtamātrā prajñayā vācam samāruhya vācā sarvāṇi nāmāni āpnoti iti ādiḥ prajñā dharmaḥ
tāḥ vai etāḥ daśa eva bhūtamātrāḥ adhiprajñam daśa prajñāmātrāḥ adhibhūtam
yadi bhūtamātrāḥ na syuḥ na prajñāmātrāḥ syuḥ
yadi prajñāmātrāḥ na syuḥ na bhūtamātrāḥ syuḥ
na hi anyataratas rūpam kiṃcana sidhyet
na u etat nānā
tat yathā rathasya areṣu nemiḥ arpitā nābhau arāḥ arpitāḥ evam eva etāḥ bhūtamātrāḥ prajñāmātrāsu arpitāḥ prajñāmātrāḥ prāṇe rpitāḥ saḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā iti ādiḥ brahma dharmaḥ
tasmāt brahmaṇaḥ eva etat upādhi dvaya dharmeṇa svadharmeṇa ca ekam upāsanam trividham vivakṣitam
anyatra api manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ ityādau upādhi dharmeṇa brahmaṇaḥ upāsanam āśritam
iha api tat yujyate vākyasya upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām eka artha tva avagamāt prāṇa prajñā ātma brahma liṅga avagamāt ca
tasmāt brahma vākyam eva etat iti siddham
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye prathama adhyāyasya prathamaḥ pādaḥ

prathamaḥ dhyāyaḥ
dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ
sarvatra prasiddha upadeśāt
sarvatraprasiddhi adhikaraṇam
idam āmnāyate sarvam khalu idam brahma tat jalān iti śāntaḥ upāsīta
atha khalu kratu mayaḥ puruṣaḥ yathā kratuḥ asimant loke puruṣaḥ bhavati tathā itas pretya bhavati sa kratum kurvīta manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ ityādi
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha manaḥ maya tva ādibhiḥ dharmaiḥ śārīraḥ ātmā upāsya tvena upadiśyate āhosvit param brahma iti
kim tāvat prāptam
śārīre iti
kutas
tasya hi kārya karaṇa adhipateḥ prasiddhaḥ manaḥ ādibhiḥ saṃbandhaḥ na parasya brahmaṇaḥ
aprāṇaḥ hi amanāḥ śubhraḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
nanu sarvam khalu idam brahma iti sva śabdena eva brahma upāttam
katham iha śārīraḥ ātmā upāsya tvena āśaṅkyate
na eṣa doṣaḥ
na idam vākyam brahma upāsana vidhi param
kim tarhi
śama vidhi param
yatkāraṇam sarvam khalu idam brahma tat jalān iti śāntaḥ upāsīta iti āha
etat uktam bhava
text2:
aḥ dṛśyate vṛkṣa agre
śyeaḥ vṛkṣa agrāt paratas śyeaḥ iti ca evam divya eva sat brahma divaḥ param iti upadiśyate aparaḥ āha yathā loke vṛkṣa agreṇa asaṃbaddhaḥ api śyeaḥ dṛśyate vṛkṣa agre
vṛkṣa agrāt paratas śyeaḥ iti ca evam divaḥ param api sat brahma divi iti upadiśyate tasmāt asti pūrvaiḥ diṣṭasya brahmaṇaḥ iha atas param eva brahma jyotiḥ śabdam iti siddham prāṇasya
tathā āugamāt prātarda adhikaraṇam asti kauṣītaki brāhmaṇa upaiṣadīdra pratarda ākhyāyikā pratardaḥ ha vai daivodāsiḥ idrasya priyam dhāma upajagāma ca pauruṣeṇa ca iti tasyām śrūyate sa ha uvāca
prāṇaḥ asmi prajñā ātmā tam mām āyuḥ amṛtam iti upāssva iti tathā uttaratra api atha khalu prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti tathā a vācam
vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt iti ate ca saḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ eva ityādi tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha vāyu mātram abhidhīyate uta devatā ātmā uta
jīvaḥ athavā param brahma iti atas eva prāṇaḥ iti atra varṇitam prāṇa śabdasya brahma para tvam iha api ca brahma liṅgam asti ityādi katham iha saṃśayaḥ
saṃbhavati a eka liṅga darśaāt iti brūmaḥ a kevalam iha brahma liṅgam eva upalabhyate sati hi itara liṅgān api mām eva vijāīhi devatā ātma liṅgam idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti prāṇa liṅgam a vācam
vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt ityādi jīva liṅgam atas saṃśayaḥ tatra prasiddheḥ vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ iti prāpte idam ucyate prāṇa śabdam brahma vijñeyam kutas tathāugamāt tathā hi
paurvāparyeṇa vākye padāām brahma pratipāda a paraḥ upalabhyate upakrame tāvat varam vṛṇīṣva iti idreṇa uktaḥ pratardaaḥ paramam puruṣa artham varam upacikṣepa tvam eva me varam vṛṇīṣva
yam tvam mauṣyāya hitatamam mayase iti tasmai hitatama tve upadiśyamāaḥ prāṇaḥ katham paramātmā syāt a hi ayatra paramātma vijñāāt hitatama prāptiḥ asti tam eva viditvā ati mṛtyum eti āyaḥ
pathā ityādi śrutibhyaḥ tathā sa yaḥ mām veda a ha vai tasya karmaṇā lokaḥ mīyate a a bhrūṇahatyayā
ityādi ca brahma parigrahe ghaṭate hi sarva karma kṣayaḥ prasiddhaḥ kṣīyate ca asya karmāṇi tasmin dṛṣṭe parāvare ityādyāsu śrutiṣu prajñā ātma tvam ca brahma pakṣe eva upapadyate
hi acetaasya vāyoḥ prajñā ātma tvam saṃbhavati tathā upasaṃhāre pi ca a samyak saṃbhavati sa a sādhuā karmaṇā
kaīyā eṣa hi eva sādhu karma kārayati tam yam ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ uiīṣate eṣaḥ u eva asādhu karma kārayati tam yam ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ udha u iīṣate iti eṣa
loka adhipatiḥ eṣa lokapālaḥ eṣa loka īśaḥ iti ca sarvam etat parasmi brahmaṇi āśrīyamāṇe iugatum śakyate a mukhye prāṇe tasmāt prāṇaḥ brahma a
vaktuḥ ātma upadeśāt iti ced adhyātma hi asmi yat uktam prāṇaḥ brahma iti tat ākṣipyate a param brahma prāṇa śabdam kasmāt vaktuḥ ātma upadeśāt vaktā kaścid vigraha vā devatā viśeṣaḥ svam ātmā am mām eva
iti upakramya prāṇaḥ asmi prajñā ātmā iti ahaṃkāra vāde saḥ eva prāṇaḥ katham brahma syāt hi brahmaṇaḥ vaktṛ tvam saṃbhavati ityādi śrutibhyaḥ tathā
vigraha saṃbadhibhiḥ eva brahmaṇi a saṃbhavadbhiḥ dharmaiḥ idraḥ tuṣṭāva triśīrṣāṇam tvāṣṭra maha amaru mukhāyatīn śālāvṛkebhyaḥ prāyaccham iti evamādibhiḥ prāṇa tvam ced rasya balavat tvāt upapadyate prāṇaḥ vai balam iti hi vijñāyate balasya ced raḥ devatā
prasiddhā yā ca kācid bala prakṛtiḥ karma eva tat iti hi vadati prajñā ātmatvam api apratihata jñāa tvāt devatā ātmanaḥ saṃbhavati apratihata jñāāḥ devatāḥ iti hi vadati ca evam devatā ātma upadeśe hitatama tva ādi vacas
yathāsaṃbhavam tad viṣayāṇi eva yojayitavyā ai tasmāt vaktuḥ idrasya ātma upadeśāt a prāṇaḥ brahma iti ākṣipya pratisamādhīyate hi asmi iti adhyātma saṃbadhaḥ pratyagātma saṃbadhaḥ tasya bhūmā bāhulyam asmi adhyāye upalabhyate yāvat hi asmin śarīre prāṇaḥ
vasati tāvat āyuḥ iti prāṇasya eva pratyak bhūtasya āyuṣpradā upasaṃhārayoḥ svātatryam darśayati devatā viśeṣasya tathā astitve ca iḥśreyasam iti adhyātmam eva idriya āśrayam prāṇam darśayati tathā prāṇaḥ eva
prajñā ātmā idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti a vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt iti ca upakramya tat yathā rathasya areṣu emiḥ arpitāḥ ābhāvarāḥ arpitāḥ evam eva etāḥ bhūtamātrāḥ prajñāmātrāsu arpitāḥ prajñāmātrāḥ
prāṇa īrpitāḥ saḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ eva iti viṣaya idriya vyavahāra ara abhibhūtam pratyagātmā am eva upasaṃharati sa me ātmā iti vidyāt iti ca upasaṃhāraḥ pratyagātma parigrahe sādhuḥ a ayam ātmā
brahma iti ca śrutyataram tasmāt adhyātma saṃbadha bāhulyāt brahma upadeśaḥ eva ayam devatā ātma upadeśaḥ katham tarhi vaktuḥ ātma upadeśaḥ śāstra dṛṣṭyā tu upadeśaḥ vāmadeva vat devatā ātmā svam ātmā paramātma tveai
aham eva param brahma iti ārṣeṇa yathāśāstram paśyaḥ upadiśati sma mām eva iti yathā tat ha etat paśya ṛṣiḥ vāmadevaḥ pratipeda iham maura bhavam sūryaḥ ca iti tadvat tat yoga
yaḥ devāām pratyabudhyata saḥ eva tat abhavat iti śruteḥ yat puaruktam mām eva iti uktvā vigraha carmaiḥ idraḥ svam ātmānam tuṣṭāva tvāṣṭra vadha ādibhiḥ iti tat parihartavyam atra ucyate a tāvat
tvāṣṭra vadha ādīnām yasmāt evaṃkarmā aham iti katham tarhi iti katham tarhi yad kāraṇam tasya me tatra loma ca astuti mausaṃdadhāti tasya me tatra loma ca astuti mausaṃdadhāti
mīyate sa yaḥ mām veda a ha vai tasya ca karmaṇā loke mīyate ityādiā etat uktam bhavati yasmāt īdṛśāi api krūrāṇi karmāṇi
kṛtavataḥ mama brahma bhūtasya loma api a hiṃsyate sa yaḥ yaḥ pi mām veda a tasya kaścitā api karmaṇā lokaḥ hiṃsyate iti vijñeyam tu brahma eva
prāṇaḥ asmi prajñā ātmā iti vakṣyamāṇam tasmāt brahma vākyam etat jīva mukhya prāṇa liṅgāḥ eti ce ā upāsā traividhyāt āśrita tvāt iha tad yogāt yadi api devatā ātma
upadeśaḥ tathā api a brahma vākyam bhavitum arhati kutas jīva liṅgāt mukhya prāṇa liṅgāt ca jīvasya tāvat asmi vākye vispaṣṭam liṅgam upalabhyate a vācam vijijñāsīta
vaktāram vidyāt ityādi atra hi vāc ādibhiḥ karaṇaiḥ vyāpṛtasya kārya karaṇa adhyakṣasya jīvasya vijñeya tvam abhidhīyate tathā mukhya prāṇa liṅgam api atha khalu prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti
śarīra dhāraṇam ca mukhya prāṇasya dharmaḥ prāṇa saṃvāde tau ariṣṭhaḥ prāṇaḥ uvāca mā moham āpat yathā aham eva etat pañcadhā ātmā am pravibhajya etat bāṇam avaṣṭabhya vidhārayāmi iti śravaṇāt
ye tu imam śarīram parigṛhya iti paṭhati teṣām imam jīvam idriya grāmam vā parigṛhya śarīram utthāpayati iti vyākhyeyam prajñā ātma tvam api jīve tāvat ceta a tvāt
mukhye pi prāṇe eva evam jīva mukhya prāṇa parigrahe ca prāṇa prajñā ātmaoḥ saha vṛtti tvena abhedairdeśaḥ svarūpeṇa ca iti ubhayathā api upapadyate yaḥ vai
prāṇaḥ sā prajñā yā vai prajñā sa prāṇaḥ saha hi etau asmin śarīre vasataḥ saha utkrāmataḥ iti brahma parigrahe tu kim kasmāt bhidyeta
tasmāt iha jīva mukhya prāṇayoḥ ubhau vā pratīyeyātām brahma iti ced evam upāsā traividhyāt evam sati trividham upāsaam prasajyeta jīva upāsaam mukhya prāṇa upāsaam
brahma upāsaam ca iti yuktam upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām hi vākya eka vākya tvam avagamyate mām eva vijāīhi iti upakramya prāṇaḥ asmi prajñā ātmā tam mām āyuḥ amṛtam iti
upāssva iti uktvā ate saḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ eva iti eka rūpau upakrama upasaṃhārau dṛśyete tatra artha eka tvam yuktam āśrayitum ca pariṇetum
śakyam bhūtamātrāṇām prajñāmātrāṇām ca brahmaṇaḥ yatra arpaṇā upapatteḥ āśrita tvāt ca a yatra api brahma liṅga vaśāt prāṇa śabdasya brahmaṇi pravṛtteḥ iha api ca hitatama upayāsa ādi brahma liṅga yogāt brahma upadeśaḥ eva ayam iti gamyate yat tu mukhya prāṇa liṅgam
darśitam idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti tat asat prāṇa vyāpārasya api paramātma āyatta tvāt paramātmay upacaritum śakya tvāt martyaḥ jīvati kaḥ ca itareṇa tu jīvati yasmin etau upāśritau iti
śruteḥ yat api a vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram vidyāt ityādi jīva liṅgam darśitam tat api a brahma pakṣam ivārayati a hi brahmaṇaḥ tattvam asi
aham brahma asmi ityādi śrutibhyaḥ buddhi ādi upādhi kṛtam tu viśeṣam āśritya brahma eva sa jīvaḥ kartā bhoktā ca iti ucyate tasya upādhi kṛta viśeṣa parityāge svarūpam brahma darśayitum a vācam vijijñāsīta vaktāram
vidyāt ityādiā pratyagātma abhimukhīkaraṇa arthaḥ upadeśaḥ virudhyate yat vācā abhyuditam vāc abhyudyate tat eva brahma tvam viddhi yat idam upāsate ityādi ca śrutyataram vacaḥ ādi kriyā vyāpṛtasya eva ātmanaḥ brahmatvam
darśayati yat puar etat uktam saha hi etau asmin śarīre vasataḥ saha utkrāmataḥ iti prāṇa prajñā ātmaoḥ bheda darśaam brahma vādī opapadyate iti ā eṣa doṣaḥ jñā akriyā śakti dvaya āśrayayoḥ
buddhi prāṇayoḥ pratyagātma upādhi bhūtayoḥ bhedaiḥ deśa upapatteḥ upādhi dvaya upahitasya tu pratyagātmanaḥ svarūpeṇa abhedaḥ iti atas prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā iti ekīkaraṇam aviruddham athavā opāsā traividhyāt āśrita tvāt iha tad yogāt iti asya ayam ayaḥ arthaḥ brahma vākye api jīva mukhya prāṇa liṅgam virudhyate
katham upāsā traividhyāt trividham iha brahmaṇaḥ upāsaam vivakṣitam prāṇa dharmeṇa prajñā dharmeṇa svadharmeṇa ca tatra āyuḥ amṛtam iti upāssva āyuḥ prāṇaḥ iti idam śarīram parigṛhya utthāpayati iti tasmāt etat eva uktham upāsīta iti
ca prāṇa dharmaḥ atha yathā asyai prajñāyai sarvāṇi bhūtāya ekībhavati tat vyākhyāsyāmaḥ iti upakramya vāc eva asyāḥ ekam aṅgam adūduhat tasyai parastāt prativihitā bhūtamātrā prajñayā vācam samāruhya vācā sarvāṇi āmāya apoti
ityādiḥ prajñā dharmaḥ tāḥ vai etāḥ daśa eva bhūtamātrāḥ adhiprajñam daśa prajñāmātrāḥ adhibhūtam yadi bhūtamātrāḥ a syuḥ a prajñāmātrāḥ syuḥ yadi prajñāmātrāḥ a
syuḥ a bhūtamātrāḥ syuḥ rūpam sidhyet tat yathā rathasya areṣu emiḥ arpitāḥ arpitāḥ evam eva etāḥ bhūtamātrāḥ prajñāmātrāsu arpitāḥ prajñāmātrāḥ prāṇa īrpitāḥ
saḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ eva prajñā ātmā ityādiḥ brahma dharmaḥ tasmāt brahmaṇaḥ eva etat upādhi dvaya dharmeṇa svadharmeṇa ca ekam upāsaam trividham vivakṣitam maomayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ ityādau upādhi dharmeṇa brahmaṇaḥ upāsaam āśritam iha api tat yujyate
vākyasya upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām eka artha tva avagamāt prāṇa prajñā ātma brahma liṅga avagamāt ca tasmāt brahma vākyam eva etat iti siddham iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye prathama adhyāyasya prathamaḥ pādaḥ murat prathamaḥ udhyāyaḥ dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ sarvatra prasiddha upadeśāt sarvatraprasiddhi adhikaraṇam
idam āmāyate sarvam khalu idam brahma tat jalāiti śātaḥ upāsīta atha khalu kratu mayaḥ puruṣaḥ yathā a kratuḥ asimat loke puruṣaḥ bhavati tathā itas pretya bhavati sa kratum kurvīta
maomayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ ityādi tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha maomaya tva ādibhiḥ dharmaiḥ śārīraḥ ātmā upāsyatvena upadiśyate āhosvit param brahma iti kim tāvat prāptam śārīraḥ iti kutas tasya hi kārya karaṇa adhipateḥ prasiddhaḥ
a parasya brahmaṇaḥ a prāṇaḥ hi a a āḥ śubhraḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ sarvam khalu idam brahma iti sva śabde eva brahma upāttam katham iha śārīre ātmā upāsya tve āśaṅkyate ā eṣa
doṣaḥ vākyam brahma upāsa a vidhi param kim tarhi śama vidhi param yatkāraṇam sarvam khalu idam brahma tat jalaiḥ iti śātaḥ upāsīta iti āha etat uktam bhava

text1:
eva brahma upāttam
katham iha śārīraḥ ātmā upāsya tvena āśaṅkyate
na eṣa doṣaḥ
na idam vākyam brahma upāsana vidhi param
kim tarhi
śama vidhi param
yatkāraṇam sarvam khalu idam brahma tat jalān iti śāntaḥ upāsīta iti āha
etat uktam bhavati yasmāt sarvam idam vikāra jātam brahmā eva tad ja tvāt tad la tvāt tad anatvāt ca na ca sarvasya eka ātma tve rāga ādayaḥ saṃbhavanti tasmāt śāntaḥ upāsīta iti
na ca śama vidhi para tve sati anena vākyena brahma upāsanam niyantum śakyate
upāsanam tu sa kratum kurvīta iti anena vidhīyate
kratuḥ saṃkalpaḥ dhyānam iti arthaḥ
tasya ca viṣaya tvena śrūyate manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ iti jīva liṅgam
atas brūmaḥ jīva viṣayam etat upāsanam iti
sarva karmā sarva kāmaḥ ityādi api śrūyamāṇam paryāyeṇa jīva viṣayam upapadyate
eṣa me ātmā antar hṛdaye ṇīyān vrīheḥ vā yavāt vā iti ca hṛdaya āyatana tvam aṇīyaḥ tvam cāra agra mātrasya jīvasya avakalpate na aparicchinnasya brahmaṇaḥ
nanu jyāyān pṛthivyāḥ ityādi api na paricchinne iti
atra brūmaḥ na tāvat aṇīyaḥ tvam jyāyaḥ tvam ca ubhayam ekasmin samāśrayitum śakyam virodhāt
anyatara āśrayaṇe ca prathama śruta tvāt aṇīyaḥ tvam yuktam āśrayitum
jyāyaḥ tvam tu brahma bhāva apekṣayā bhaviṣyati iti
niścite ca jīva viṣaya tve yat ante brahma saṃkīrtanam etat brahma iti tat api prakṛta parāmarśa ārtha tvāt jīva viṣayam eva
tasmāt manaḥ maya tva ādibhiḥ dharmaiḥ jīvaḥ upāsyaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ param eva brahma iha manaḥ maya tva ādibhiḥ dharmaiḥ upāsyam
kutas
sarvatra prasiddha upadeśāt
yat sarveṣu vedānteṣu prasiddham brahma śabdasya ālambanam jagat kāraṇam iha ca sarvam khalu idam brahma iti vākya upakrame śrutam tat eva manaḥ maya tva ādi dharmaiḥ viśiṣṭam upadiśyate iti yuktam
evam ca sati prakṛta hāna aprakṛta prakriye na bhaviṣyataḥ
nanu vākya upakrame śama vidhi vivakṣayā brahma nirdiṣṭam na sva vivakṣayā iti uktam
atrā ucyate yadi api śama vidhi vivakṣayā brahma nirdiṣṭam tathā api manaḥ maya tva ādiṣu upadiśyamāneṣu tat eva brahma saṃnihitam bhavati jīvaḥ tu na saṃnihitaḥ na ca sva śabdena upāttaḥ iti vaiṣamyam
vivakṣita guṇa upapatteḥ ca
vaktum iṣṭāḥ vivakṣitāḥ
yadi api apauruṣeye vede vaktuḥ abhāvāt na icchā arthaḥ saṃbhavati tathā api upādānena phalena upacaryate
loke pi yat śabda abhihitam upādeyam bhavati tat vivakṣitam iti ucyate yat anupādeyam tat avivakṣitam iti
tadvat vede pi upādeya tvena abhihitam vivakṣitam bhavati itarat avivakṣitam
upādāna anupādāne tu veda vākya tātparya a tātparyābhyām avagamyete
tat iha ye vivakṣitāḥ guṇāḥ upāsanāyām upādeya tvena upadiṣṭāḥ satya saṃkalpa prabhṛtayaḥ te parasmin brahmaṇi upapadyante
satya saṃkalpa tvam hi sṛṣṭi sthiti saṃhāreṣu apratibaddha śakti tvāt paramātmanaḥ eva avakalpate
paramātma guṇa tvena ca yaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā iti atra satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ iti śrutam ākāśa ātmā iti ca
ākāśa vat ātmā asya iti arthaḥ
sarvagata tva ādibhiḥ dharmaiḥ saṃbhavati ākāśena sāmyam brahmaṇaḥ
jyāyān pṛthivyāḥ ityādinā ca etat eva darśayati
yat api ākāśaḥ ātmā asya iti vyākhyāyate tat api saṃbhavati sarva jagat kāraṇasya sarva ātmanaḥ brahmaṇaḥ ākāśa ātma tvam
atas eva sarva karmā ityādi
evam iha upāsya tayā vivakṣitāḥ guṇāḥ brahmaṇi upapadyante
yat tu uktam manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ iti jīva liṅgam na tat brahmaṇi upapadyate iti
tat api brahmaṇi upapadyate iti brūmaḥ
sarva ātma tvāt hi brahmaṇaḥ jīva saṃbandhīni manaḥ maya tva ādīni brahma saṃbandhīni bhavanti
tathā ca brahma viṣaye śruti smṛtī bhavataḥ tvam strī tvam pumān asi tvam kumāraḥ uta vā kumārī
tvam jīrṇaḥ daṇḍena vañcasi tvam jātaḥ bhavasi viśvatomukhaḥ iti
sarvatas pāṇi pādam tat sarvatas akṣi śiraḥ mukham
sarvatas śrutimat loke sarvam āvṛtya tiṣṭhati iti ca
aprāṇaḥ hi amanāḥ śubhraḥ iti śrutiḥ śuddha brahma viṣayā iyam tu śrutiḥ manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ iti saguṇa brahma viṣayā iti viśeṣaḥ
atas vivakṣita guṇa upapatteḥ param eva brahma iha upāsya tvena upadiṣṭam iti gamyate
anupapatteḥ tu na śārīraḥ
pūrveṇa sūtreṇa brahmaṇi vivakṣitānām guṇānām upapattiḥ uktā
anena śārīre teṣām anupapattiḥ ucyate
tu śabdaḥ vadhāraṇa arthaḥ
brahma eva uktena nyāyena manaḥ maya tva ādi guṇam
na tu śārīraḥ jīvaḥ manaḥ maya tva ādi guṇaḥ
yatkāraṇam satya saṃkalpaḥ ākāśa ātmā avākī anādaraḥ jyāyān pṛthivyāḥ iti ca evaṃjātīyakāḥ guṇāḥ na śārīre āñjasyena upapadyante
śārīre iti śarīre bhavaḥ iti arthaḥ
nanu īśvaraḥ pi śarīre bhavati
satyam śarīre bhavati
na tu śarīre eva bhavati
jyāyān pṛthivyāḥ jyāyān antarikṣāt ākāśa vat sarva gataḥ ca nityaḥ iti ca vyāpi tva śravaṇāt
jīvaḥ tu śarīre eva bhavati tasya bhoga adhiṣṭhānāt śarīrāt anyatra vṛtti abhāvāt
karma kartṛ vyapadeśāt ca
itas ca na śārīraḥ manaḥ maya tva ādi guṇaḥ
yasmāt karma kartṛ vyapadeśaḥ bhavati etam itas pretya abhisaṃbhavitāsmi iti
etam iti prakṛtam manaḥ maya tva ādi guṇam upāsyam ātmānam karma tvena prāpya tvena vyapadiśati
abhisaṃbhavitāsmi iti śārīram upāsakam kartṛ tvena prāpaka tvena
abhisaṃbhavitāsmi iti prāptā asmi iti arthaḥ
na ca satyām gatau ekasya karma kartṛ vyapadeśaḥ yuktaḥ
tathā upāsya upāsaka bhāvaḥ pi bheda adhiṣṭhānaḥ eva
tasmāt api na śārīraḥ manaḥ maya tva ādi viśiṣṭaḥ
śabda viśeṣāt
itas ca śārīrāt anyaḥ manaḥ maya tva ādi guṇaḥ
yasmāt śabda viśeṣaḥ bhavati samāna prakaraṇe śruti antare yathā vrīhiḥ vā yavaḥ vā śyāmākaḥ vā śyāmāka taṇḍulaḥ vā evam ayam antarātman puruṣaḥ hiraṇmayaḥ iti
śārīrasya ātmanaḥ yaḥ śabdaḥ bhidhāyakaḥ saptamī antaḥ antarātman iti
tasmāt viśiṣṭaḥ nyaḥ prathama antaḥ puruṣa śabdaḥ manaḥ maya tva ādi viśiṣṭasya ātmanaḥ bhidhāyakaḥ
tasmāt tayoḥ bhedaḥ dhigamyate
smṛteḥ ca
smṛtiḥ ca śārīra paramātmanoḥ bhedam darśayati īśvaraḥ sarva bhūtānām hṛd deśe rjuna tiṣṭhati
bhrāmayan sarva bhūtāni yantra ārūḍhāni māyayā ityādyā
atra āha kaḥ punar ayam śārīraḥ nāma paramātmanaḥ nyaḥ yaḥ pratiṣidhyate anupapatteḥ tu na śārīraḥ ityādinā
śrutiḥ tu sti draṣṭā na anyaḥ taḥ sti śrotā iti evaṃjātīyakā paramātmanaḥ vārayati
tathā smṛtiḥ api kṣetrajñam ca api mām viddhi sarva kṣetreṣu bhārata iti evaṃjātīyakā iti
atra ucyate satyam eva etat paraḥ eva ātmā deha indriya manaḥ buddhi upādhibhiḥ paricchidyamānaḥ bālaiḥ śārīraḥ iti upacaryate
yathā ghaṭa karaka ādi upādhi vaśāt aparicchinnam api nabhaḥ paricchinna vat avabhāsate tadvat
tad apekṣayā ca karma kartṛ tva ādi bheda vyavahāraḥ na virudhyate prāk tat tvam asi iti ātma ekatva upadeśa grahaṇāt
gṛhīte tu ātma ekatve bandha mokṣa ādi sarva vyavahāra parisamāptiḥ eva syāt
arbhaka okaḥ tvāt tad vyapadeśāt ca na iti ced na nicāyya tvāt evam vyoma vat ca
arbhakam alpam okaḥ nīḍam eṣa me ātmā antar hṛdaye iti paricchinna āyatana tvāt sva śabdena ca aṇīyān vrīheḥ vā yavāt vā iti aṇīyaḥ tva vyapadeśāt śārīraḥ eva ara agra mātraḥ jīvaḥ iha upadiśyate na sarva gataḥ paramātmā iti yat uktam tat parihartavyam
atra ucyate na ayam doṣaḥ
na tāvat paricchinna deśasya sarvagata tva vyapadeśaḥ katham api upapadyate
sarvagatasya tu sarva deśeṣu vidyamāna tvāt paricchinna deśa vyapadeśaḥ u pi kayācid apekṣayā saṃbhavati
yathā samasta vasudhā adhipatiḥ api hi san ayodhyā adhipatiḥ iti vyapadiśyate
kayā punar apekṣayā sarva gataḥ san īśvaraḥ aṇīyān ca vyapadiśyate iti
nicāyya tvāt evam iti brūmaḥ
evam aṇīyaḥ tva ādi guṇa gaṇa upetaḥ īśvaraḥ tatra hṛdaya puṇḍarīke nicāyyaḥ draṣṭavyaḥ upadiśyate
yathā sālagrāme hariḥ
tatra asya buddhi vijñānam grāhakam
sarva gataḥ pi īśvaraḥ tatra upāsyamānaḥ prasīdati
vyoma vat ca etat draṣṭavyam
yathā sarva gatam api sat vyoma sūcī pāśa ādi apekṣayā arbhakaukaḥ ṇīyaḥ ca iti vyapadiśyate evam brahmā api
tat evam nicāyya tva apekṣam brahmaṇaḥ ṛbhaka okaḥ tvam aṇīyaḥ tvam ca na pāramārthikam
tatra yat āśaṅkyate hṛdaya āyatana tvāt brahmaṇaḥ hṛdayānām ca pratiśarīram bhinna tvāt bhinna āyatanānām ca śuka ādīnām aneka tva sāvayava tva anitya tva ādi doṣa darśanāt brahmaṇaḥ u pi tadvat prasaṅgaḥ iti tat api parihṛtam bhavati
sambhoga prāptiḥ iti ced na vaiśeṣyāt
vyoma vat sarva gatasya brahmaṇaḥ sarva prāṇi hṛdaya saṃbandhāt cit rūpa tayā ca śārīrāt a viśiṣṭa tvāt sukha duḥkha ādi saṃbhogaḥ
api a viśiṣṭaḥ prasajyeta
eka tvāt ca na hi parasmāt ātmanaḥ
anyaḥ kaścid ātmā saṃsārī vidyate
a taḥ
asti vijñātā ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
tasmāt parasya eva brahmaṇaḥ saṃbhoga prāptiḥ iti ced na
vaiśeṣyāt
na tāvat sarva prāṇi hṛdaya saṃbandhāt cit rūpa tayā ca śārīra vat brahmaṇaḥ saṃbhoga prasaṅgaḥ vaiśeṣyāt
viśeṣaḥ hi bhavati śārīra parameśvarayoḥ
ekaḥ kartā bhoktā dharma adharma ādi sādhanaḥ sukha duḥkha ādimān ca
ekaḥ tad viparītaḥ
apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇaḥ
etasmāt anayoḥ viśeṣāt ekasya bhogaḥ na itarasya
yadi ca saṃnidhāna mātreṇa vastu śaktim an āśritya kārya saṃbandhaḥ
abhyupagamyeta ākāśa ādīnām api dāha ādi prasaṅgaḥ
sarvagata aneka ātma vādinām api samau etau codya parihārau
yat api eka tvāt brahmaṇaḥ ātma antara abhāvāt śārīrasya bhogena brahmaṇaḥ bhoga prasaṅgaḥ iti atra vadāmaḥ idam tāvat devānām priyaḥ praṣṭavyaḥ katham ayam tvayā ātma antara abhāvaḥ
adhyavasitaḥ iti
tat tvam asi aham brahma asmi na anyaḥ
a taḥ
asti vijñātā ityādi śāstrebhyaḥ iti ced yathāśāstram tarhi śāstrīyaḥ rthaḥ pratipattavyaḥ na tatra ardhajaratīyam labhyam
śāstram ca tat tvam asi iti apahata pāpma tva ādi viśeṣaṇam brahma śārīrasya ātmatvena upadiśat śārīrasya eva tāvat upabhoktṛ tvam vārayati
kutas tad upabhogena brahmaṇaḥ upabhoga prasaṅgaḥ
atha a gṛhītam śārīrasya brahmaṇā ekatvam tadā mithyājñāna nimittaḥ śārīrasya upabhogaḥ
na tena paramārtha rūpasya brahmaṇaḥ saṃsparśaḥ
na hi bālaiḥ tala malina tā ādibhiḥ vyomni vikalpyamāne tala malina tā ādi viśiṣṭam eva paramārthataḥ vyoma bhavati
tat āha na vaiśeṣyāt iti
na eka tve pi śārīrasya upabhogena brahmaṇaḥ upabhoga prasaṅgaḥ vaiśeṣyāt
viśeṣaḥ hi bhavati mithyājñāna samyak jñānayoḥ
mithyā jñāna kalpitaḥ upabhogaḥ samyak jñāna dṛṣṭam ekatvam
na ca mithyājñāna kalpitena upabhogena samyak jñāna dṛṣṭam vastu saṃspṛśyate
tasmāt na upabhoga gandhaḥ śakyaḥ īśvarasya kalpayitum
attā cara acara grahaṇāt
attṛ adhikaraṇam
kaṭhavallīṣu paṭhyate yasya brahma ca kṣatram ca ubhe bhavataḥ odanaḥ
mṛtyuḥ yasya upasecanam kaḥ itthā veda yatra saḥ iti
atra kaścid odana upasecana sūcitā u ttā pratīyate
tatra kim agniḥ attā syāt uta jīvaḥ athavā paramātmā iti saṃśayaḥ
viśeṣa an avadhāraṇāt trayāṇām ca agni jīva paramātmanām asmin granthe praśna upanyāsa upalabdheḥ
kim tāvat prāptam
agniḥ attā iti
kutas
agniḥ anna ādaḥ iti śruti prasiddhibhyām
jīvaḥ vai attā syāt tayoḥ anyaḥ pippalam svādu atti iti darśanāt
na paramātmā an aścan anyaḥ bhicākaśīti iti darśanāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ attā atra paramātmā bhavitum arhati
kutas
cara acara grahaṇāt
carācaram hi sthāvara jaṅgamam mṛtyu upasecanam iha ādya tvena pratīyate
tādṛśasya ca ādyasya na paramātmanaḥ nyaḥ kārtsnyena attā saṃbhavati
paramātmā tu vikāra jātam upasaṃharan sarvam atti iti upapadyate
nanu iha carācara grahaṇam na upalabhyate
katham siddha vat carācara grahaṇam hetu tvena upādīyate
na eṣa doṣaḥ mṛtyu upasecana tvena iha ādya tvena sarvasya prāṇi nikāyasya pratīyamāna tvāt brahma kṣatrayoḥ ca prādhānyāt pradarśana artha tva upapatteḥ
