nanu uktam guhā hita tva darśanāt na paramātmā pratyetavyaḥ iti
guhā hita tva darśanāt eva paramātmā pratyetavyaḥ iti vadāmaḥ
guhā hita tvam tu śruti smṛtiṣu asakṛt paramātmanaḥ eva dṛśyate guhā hitam gahvareṣṭham purāṇam yaḥ veda nihitam guhāyām parame vyoman ātmānam anviccha guhām praviṣṭam ityādyāsu
sarva gatasya api brahmaṇaḥ upalabdhi arthaḥ deśa viśeṣa upadeśaḥ na virudhyate iti etat api uktam eva
sukṛta loka varti tvam tu chatri tva vat ekasmin api vartamānam ubhayoḥ aviruddham
chāyā ātapau iti api a viruddham
chāyā ātapa vat paraspara vilakṣaṇa tvāt saṃsāri tva asaṃsāri tvayoḥ avidyā kṛta tvāt saṃsāri tvasya pāramārthika tvāt ca asaṃsāri tvasya
tasmāt vijñāna ātma paramātmānau guhām praviṣṭau gṛhyete
kutas ca vijñāna ātma paramātmānau gṛhyete
viśeṣaṇāt ca
viśeṣaṇam ca vijñāna ātma paramātmanoḥ eva bhavati
ātmānam rathinam viddhi śarīram ratham eva tu ityādinā pareṇa granthena rathi ratha ādi rūpaka kalpanayā vijñāna ātmānam rathinam saṃsāra mokṣayoḥ gantāram kalpayati
saḥ dhvanaḥ pāram āpnoti tat viṣṇoḥ paramam padam iti paramātmānam gantavyam kalpayati
tathā tam durdarśam gūḍham anupraviṣṭam guhā hitam gahvareṣṭham purāṇam
adhyātma yoga adhigamena devam matvā dhīraḥ harṣa śokau jahāti iti pūrvasmin api granthe mantṛ mantavya tvena etau eva viśeṣitau
prakaraṇam ca idam paramātmanaḥ
brahma vidaḥ vadanti
iti ca vaktṛ viśeṣa upādānam paramātma parigrahe ghaṭate
tasmāt iha jīva paramātmānau ucyeyātām
eṣaḥ eva nyāyaḥ dvā suparṇā sayujā sakhāyā iti evamādiṣu api
tatra api hi adhyātma adhikārāt na prākṛtau suparṇau ucyete
tayoḥ anyaḥ pippalam svādu atti iti adana liṅgāt vijñāna ātmā bhavati
an aścan anyaḥ bhicākaśīti iti anaśana cetana tvābhyām paramātmā
anantare ca mantre tau eva draṣṭṛ draṣṭavya bhāvena viśinaṣṭi samāne vṛkṣe puruṣaḥ nimagnaḥ nīśayā śocati muhyamānaḥ
juṣṭam yadā paśyati anyam īśam asya mahimānam iti vīta śokaḥ iti
aparaḥ āha dvā suparṇāḥ iti neya mṛgasya adhikaraṇasya siddhāntam bhajate paiṅgi rahasya brāhmaṇena anyathā vyākhyāta tvāt tayoḥ anyaḥ pippalam svādu atti iti sattvam anaḥ can anyaḥ bhicākaśīti iti anaḥ can anyaḥ bhipaśyati jñaḥ tau etau sattva kṣetrajñau iti
sattva śabdaḥ jīvaḥ kṣetrajña śabdaḥ paramātmā iti yat ucyate tat na
sattva kṣetrajña śabdayoḥ antaḥkaraṇa śārīra para tayā prasiddha tvāt
tatra eva ca vyākhyāta tvāt tat etat sattvam yena svapnam paśyati atha yaḥ yam śārīraḥ upadraṣṭā sa kṣetrajñaḥ tau etau sattva kṣetrajñau iti
na api asya adhikaraṇasya pūrvapakṣa bhāvam bhajate
na hi atra śārīraḥ kṣetrajñaḥ kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tva ādinā saṃsāra dharmeṇa upetaḥ vivakṣyate
katham tarhi
sarva saṃsāra dharma atītaḥ brahma svabhāvaḥ caitanya mātra svarūpaḥ
anaścan anyaḥ bhicākaśīti iti anaścan anyaḥ bhipaśyati jñaḥ iti vacanāt tat tvam asi kṣetrajñam ca api mām viddhi ityādi śruti smṛtibhyaḥ ca
tāvatā ca vidyā upasaṃhāra darśanam evam eva avakalpate tau etau sattva kṣetrajñau na ha vai evaṃvidi kiṃcana rajaḥ ādhvaṃsate ityādi
katham punar asmin pakṣe tayoḥ anyaḥ pippalam svādu atti iti sattvam iti acetane sattve bhoktṛ tva vacanam iti ucyate na iyam śrutiḥ acetanasya sattvasya bhoktṛ tvam vakṣyāmi iti pravṛttā
kim tarhi
cetanasya kṣetrajñasya abhoktṛ tvam brahma svabhāvatām ca vakṣyāmi iti
tad artham sukha duḥkha ādi vikriyāvati sattve bhoktṛtvam adhyāropayati
idam hi kartṛ tvam bhoktṛ tvam ca sattva kṣetrajñayoḥ itaretara svabhāva aviveka kṛtam kalpyate
paramārthataḥ tu na anyatarasya api saṃbhavati acetana tvāt sattvasya avikriya tvāt ca kṣetrajñasya
avidyā pratyupasthāpita svabhāva tvāt ca sattvasya sutarām na saṃbhavati
tathā ca śrutiḥ yatra vai anyat iva syāt tatra anyaḥ nyat paśyet ityādinā svapna dṛṣṭa hasti ādi vyavahāra vat avidyā viṣayaḥ eva kartṛ tva ādi vyavahāram darśayati
yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kena kam paśyet ityādinā ca vivekinaḥ kartṛ tva ādi vyavahāram nivārayati
antare upapatteḥ
antara adhikaraṇam
yaḥ eṣa u kṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate eṣaḥ ātmā iti ha uvāca etat amṛtam abhayam etat brahma iti
tat yadi api asmin sarpiḥ vā udakam vā siñcati vartmanī eva gacchati ityādi śrūyate
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim ayam pratibimba ātmā akṣi adhikaraṇaḥ nirdiśyate atha vijñāna ātmā uta devatā ātmā indriyasya adhiṣṭhātā athavā īśvaraḥ iti
kim tāvat prāptam
chāyā ātmā puruṣa pratirūpaḥ iti
kutas
tasya dṛśyamāna tva prasiddheḥ yaḥ eṣaḥ u kṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate iti ca prasiddha vat upadeśāt
vijñāna ātmanaḥ vā ayam nirdeśaḥ iti yuktam
sa hi cakṣuṣā rūpam paśyan cakṣuṣi saṃnihitaḥ bhavati
ātma śabdaḥ ca asmin pakṣe nukūlaḥ bhavati
āditya puruṣaḥ vā cakṣuṣaḥ nugrāhakaḥ pratīyate raśmibhiḥ eṣaḥ smin pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti śruteḥ amṛta tva ādīnām ca devatā ātmani api kathaṃcid saṃbhavāt
na īśvaraḥ sthāna viśeṣa nirdeśāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ parameśvaraḥ eva akṣiṇi abhyantaraḥ puruṣaḥ iha upadiṣṭaḥ iti
kasmāt
upapatteḥ
upapadyate hi parameśvare guṇa jātam iha upadiśyamānam
ātmatvam tāvat mukhyayā vṛttyā parameśvare upapadyate saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi iti śruteḥ
amṛta tva abhaya tve ca tasmin asakṛt śrūyete
tathā parameśvara anurūpam etat akṣi sthānam
yathā hi parameśvaraḥ sarva doṣaiḥ aliptaḥ apahata pāpma tva ādi śravaṇāt
tathā akṣi sthānam sarva lepa rahitam upadiṣṭam tat yadi api asmin sarpiḥ vā udakam vā siñcati vartmanī eva gacchati iti śruteḥ
saṃyat vāma tva ādi guṇa upadeśaḥ ca tasmin avakalpate
etam saṃyat vāmaḥ iti ācakṣate
etam hi sarvāṇi vāmāni abhisaṃyanti eṣaḥ u eva vāmanīḥ eṣa hi sarvāṇi vāmāni nayati
eṣaḥ u eva bhāmanīḥ eṣa hi sarveṣu lokeṣu bhāti iti ca
atas upapatteḥ antaraḥ parameśvaraḥ
sthāna ādi vyapadeśāt ca
katham punar ākāśa vat sarva gatasya brahmaṇaḥ
akṣi alpam sthānam upapadyate iti atra ucyate bhavet eṣā anavakḷptiḥ yadi etat eva ekam sthānam asya nirdiṣṭam bhavet
santi hi anyāni api pṛthivī ādīni sthānāni asya nirdiṣṭāni yaḥ pṛthivyām tiṣṭhan ityādinā
teṣu hi cakṣuḥ api nirdiṣṭam yaḥ cakṣuṣi tiṣṭhan iti
sthāna ādi vyapadeśāt iti ādi grahaṇena etat darśayati na kevalam sthānam eva ekam anucitam brahmaṇaḥ nirdiśyate
kim tarhi nāma rūpam iti evaṃjātīyakam api anāma rūpasya brahmaṇaḥ nucitam nirdiśyamānam dṛśyate tasya uditi nāma hiraṇya śmaśruḥ ityādi
nirguṇam api sat brahma nāma rūpa gataiḥ guṇaiḥ saguṇam upāsana artham tatra tatra upadiśyate iti etat api uktam eva
sarva gatasya api brahmaṇaḥ upalabdhi artham sthāna viśeṣaḥ na virudhyate sālagrāme iva viṣṇoḥ iti etat api uktam eva
sukha viśiṣṭa abhidhānāt eva ca
api ca na eva atra vivaditavyam kim brahma asmin vāṃkye bhidhīyate na vā iti
sukha viśiṣṭa abhidhānāt eva brahma tvam siddham
sukha viśiṣṭam hi brahma yat vākya upakrame prakrāntam prāṇaḥ brahma kam brahma kham brahma iti tat eva iha abhihitam
prakṛta parigrahasya nyāyya tvāt ācāryaḥ tu te gatim vaktā iti ca gati mātra abhidhāna pratijñānāt
katham punar vākya upakrame sukha viśiṣṭam brahma vijñāyate iti ucyate prāṇaḥ brahma kam brahma kham brahma iti etat agnīnām vacanam śrutvā upakosalaḥ uvāca vijānāmi aham yat prāṇaḥ brahma kam ca kham ca tu na vijānāmi iti
tatra idam prativacanam yat vāva kam tat eva kham yat eva kham tat eva kam iti
tatra khaṃśabdaḥ bhūtākāśe nirūḍhaḥ loke
yadi tasya viśeṣaṇa tvena kaṃśabdaḥ sukha vācī nā upādīyeta tathā sati kevale bhūtākāśe brahma śabdaḥ nāma ādiṣu iva pratīka abhiprāyeṇa prayuktaḥ iti pratītiḥ syāt
tathā kaṃ śabdasya viṣaya indriya saṃparka janite sāmaye sukhe prasiddha tvāt yadi tasya khaṃ śabdaḥ viśeṣaṇa tvena na upādīyeta
laukikam sukham brahma iti pratītiḥ syāt
itaretara viśeṣitau tu kaṃ khaṃ śabdau sukha ātmakam brahma gamayataḥ
tatra dvitīye brahma śabde kam kham brahma iti eva ucyamāne kaṃśabdasya viśeṣaṇa tvena eva upayukta tvāt sukhasya guṇasya adhyeya tvam syāt
tat mā bhūt iti ubhayoḥ kaṃ khaṃ śabdayoḥ brahma śabda śiraḥ tvam kam brahma kham brahma iti
iṣṭam hi sukhasya api guṇasya guṇi vat dhyeya tvam
tat evam vākya upakrame sukha viśiṣṭam brahma upadiṣṭam
pratyekam ca gārhapatya ādayaḥ gnayaḥ svam svam mahimānam upadiśya eṣā somya te smadvidyā ātma vidyā ca iti upasaṃharantaḥ pūrvatra brahma nirdiṣṭam iti jñāpayanti
ācāryaḥ tu te gatim vaktā iti ca gati mātra abhidhāna pratijñānam artha antara vivakṣām vārayati
yathā puṣkarapalāśe āpaḥ na śliṣyante evam evaṃvidi pāpam karma na śliṣyate iti ca akṣi sthānam puruṣam vijānataḥ pāpmanā anupaghātam bruvan akṣi sthānasya puruṣasya brahmatvam darśayati
tasmāt prakṛtasya eva brahmaṇaḥ kṣi sthānatām saṃyat vāma tva ādi guṇatām ca uktvā arciḥ ādikām tad vidaḥ gatim vakṣyāmi iti upakramate yaḥ eṣa u kṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate eṣaḥ ātmā iti ha uvāca iti
śruta upaniṣatka gati abhidhānāt ca
itas ca akṣi sthānaḥ puruṣaḥ parameśvaraḥ yasmāt śruta upaniṣatkasya śruta rahasya vijñānasya brahma vidaḥ yā gatiḥ deva yāna ākhyā prasiddhā śrutau atha uttareṇa tapasā brahmacaryeṇa śraddhayā vidyayā ātmānam anviṣya ādityam abhijayante
etat vai prāṇānām āyatanam etat amṛtam abhayam etat parāyaṇam etasmāt na punar āvartante iti smṛtau api agniḥ jyotiḥ ahar śuklaḥ ṣaṣ māsāḥ uttarāyaṇam
tatra prayātāḥ gacchanti brahma brahma vidaḥ PNM janāḥ PNM
iti sā eva iha akṣi puruṣa vidaḥ abhidhīyamānā dṛśyate
atha yat u ca eva asmin śavyam kurvanti yadi ca na arciṣam eva abhisaṃbhavanti iti upakramya ādityāt candramasam candramasaḥ vidyutam tad puruṣaḥ mānavaḥ saḥ enān brahma gamayati eṣa deva pathaḥ brahma pathaḥ etena pratipadyamānāḥ imam mānavam āvartam na āvartante iti
tat iha brahma vid viṣayayā prasiddhayā gatyā akṣi sthānasya brahma tvam niścīyate
anavasthiteḥ asambhavāt ca nā itaraḥ
yat punar uktam chāyā ātmā vijñāna ātmā devatā ātmā vā syāt akṣi sthānaḥ iti atra ucyate na chāyā ātma ādiḥ itaraḥ iha grahaṇam arhati
kasmāt
anavasthiteḥ
na tāvat chāyā ātmanaḥ cakṣuṣi nityam avasthānam saṃbhavati
yadā eva hi kaścid puruṣaḥ cakṣuḥ āsīdati tadā cakṣuṣi puruṣa chāyā dṛśyate
apagate tasmin na dṛśyate
yaḥ eṣa u kṣiṇi puruṣaḥ iti ca śrutiḥ saṃnidhānāt sva cakṣuṣi dṛśyamānam puruṣam upāsya tvena upadiśati
na ca upāsanā kāle chāyākar
text2:
eke
ā ayam asti iti ca eke etad vidyām auśiṣṭaḥ tvayā aham varāṇām eṣa varaḥ tṛtīyaḥ iti pṛṣṭa tvāt atha jīva paramātma tatas jīvāt vilakṣaṇaḥ paramātmā pratipāditaḥ bhavati
tat api iha pratipādayitavyam ayatra dharmāt ayatra adharmāt ayatra asmāt kṛta akṛtāt ayatra bhūtāt ca bhavyāt ca yat tat paśyasi tat vada iti pṛṣṭa tvāt atra āha ākṣeptā
ubhau api etau pakṣau a saṃbhavataḥ kasmāt ṛta pāam hi karma phala upabhogaḥ sukṛtasya loke iti liṅgāt tat ca cetaasya kṣetrajñasya saṃbhavati
buddheḥ pibatau iti dvayoḥ darśayati śrutiḥ atas buddhi kṣetrajña pakṣaḥ tāvat saṃbhavati atas eva kṣetrajña paramātma pakṣaḥ api saṃbhavati
ayobhicākaśīti iti matra varṇāt iti atra ucyate ā eṣa doṣaḥ chatriṇaḥ gacchati iti eke api chatriṇā bahūām a chatriṇām chatri tva upacāra darśaāt evam eke api pibatā dvau pibatau ucyeyātām
yat vā jīvaḥ tāvat pibati īśvaraḥ tu pāyayati pāyaya api pibati iti ucyate pācayitari api paktṛ tva prasiddhi darśaāt buddhi kṣetrajña parigrahaḥ api saṃbhavati karaṇe kartṛ tva upacārāt edhāṃsi
pacati iti prayoga darśaāt a ca adhyātma adhikāreyau kaucid dvau ṛtam pibatau saṃbhavataḥ tasmāt buddhi jīvau syātām jīva paramātma au vā iti saṃśayaḥ kim tāvat prāptam buddhi kṣetrajñau
iti kutas guhām praviṣṭau iti viśeṣaṇāt yadi śarīram guhā yadi vā hṛdayam ubhayathā api buddhi kṣetrajñau guhām praviṣṭau upapadyete a ca sati
saṃbhave sarva gatasya brahmaṇaḥ viśiṣṭa deśa tvam yuktam kalpayitum sukṛtasya loke iti ca karma gocara aatikramam darśayati paramātmā tu a sukṛtasya vā duṣkṛtasya vā gocare
vartate a karmaṇā vardhate o kaīyā iti śruteḥ chāyā ātapau iti ca ceta āceta ayoḥ irdeśaḥ upapadyate chāyā ātapa vat paraspara vilakṣaṇa tvāt tasmāt buddhi kṣetrajñau iha ucyeyātām iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ vijñāātma paramātmāau iha ucyeyātām kasmāt ātmaau hi tau ubhau api cetaau sama a svabhāvau saṃkhyā śravaṇe ca sama a svabhāveṣu eva loke pratītiḥ dṛśyate
asya goḥ dvitīyaḥ uveṣṭavyaḥ iti ukte gauḥ eva dvitīyaḥ uviṣyate āśvaḥ puruṣaḥ vā tat iha dvitīya āveṣaṇāyām cetaaḥ
paramātmā eva pratīyate guhā hita tva darśaā paramātmā pratyetavyaḥ iti guhā hita tva darśaāt eva paramātmā pratyetavyaḥ iti vadāmaḥ guhā hita tvam tu śruti smṛtiṣu asakṛt paramātma eva dṛśyate
guhā hitam gahvareṣṭham purāṇam yaḥ veda ihitam guhāyām parame vyoma ātmā aviccha guhām praviṣṭam ityādyāsu sarva gatasya api brahmaṇaḥ upalabdhi arthaḥ deśa viśeṣa upadeśaḥ virudhyata
iti etat api uktam eva sukṛta loka varti tvam tu chatri tva vat ekasmin api ubhayoḥ aviruddham chāyā ātapau iti api aviruddham chāyā ātapa vat paraspara vilakṣaṇa tvāt saṃsāri tva asaṃsāri tvayoḥ
avidyā kṛta tvāt saṃsāri tvasya pāramārthika tvāt ca asaṃsāri tvasya tasmāt vijñā ātma paramātmau guhām praviṣṭau gṛhyete kutas ca vijñā ātma paramātmau gṛhyete viśeṣaṇāt ca viśeṣaṇam ca vijñā ātma paramātmaoḥ eva bhavati ātmāam rathiam
viddhi śarīram ratham eva tu ityādiā pareṇa rathi ratha ādi rūpaka kalpaayā vijñā ātmāam rathiam saṃsāra mokṣayoḥ kalpayati tat viṣṇoḥ paramam padam iti paramātmāam gatavyam
kalpayati tathā tam durdarśam gūḍham aupraviṣṭam guhā hitam gahvareṣṭham purāṇam devam matvā dhīraḥ harṣa śokau jahāti iti pūrvasmi api grathe etau eva viśeṣitau prakaraṇam
ca idam paramātmā brahma vidaḥ vadati kaṭhaḥ iti ca vaktṛ viśeṣa upādāam paramātma parigrahe ghaṭate tasmāt iha jīva paramātma au ucyeyātām eṣaḥ eva yāyaḥ dvā suparṇā sayujā sakhāyau iti evamādiṣu api
tatra api hi adhyātma adhikārāḥ a prākṛtau suparṇau ucyete tayoḥ ayaḥ pippalam svādu atti iti ada a liṅgāt vijñā ātmā bhavati iti aaśa aceta a tvābhyām paramātmā
ca tau eva draṣṭṛ draṣṭavya bhāve viśiaṣṭi vṛkṣe puruṣaḥ śocati juṣṭam yadā paśyati ayam īśam asya mahimā am iti vīta śokaḥ iti aparaḥ āha dvār
suparṇāḥ iti siddhātam bhajate paiṅgi rahasyabrāhmaṇe ayathā vyākhyāta tvāt tayoḥ ayaḥ pippalam svādu atti iti sattvam aaśca ayaḥ abhicākaśīti iti aaśca ayaḥ abhipaśyati jñaḥ tau etau sattva kṣetrajñau iti sattva śabdaḥ jīvaḥ kṣetrajña śabdaḥ paramātmā iti yat ucyate taa anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya anya
sattva kṣetrajña śabdayoḥ ataḥkaraṇa śārīra para tayā prasiddha tvāt tatra eva ca vyākhyāta tvāt tat etat sattvam svapam paśyati atha yaḥ yam śārīraḥ upadraṣṭā sa kṣetrajñaḥ tau etau sattva kṣetrajñau iti āpyasya adhikaraṇasya pūrvapakṣa bhāvam bhajate
a hi atra śārīraḥ kṣetrajñaḥ saṃsāra dharmeṇa upetaḥ vivakṣyate katham tarhi sarva saṃsāra dharma atītaḥ brahma svabhāvaḥ caitaya mātra svarūpaḥ jñaḥ iti vacaāt tattvam asi kṣetrajñam ca api mām viddhi
ityādi śruti smṛtibhyaḥ ca tāvatā ca vidyā upasaṃhāra darśam evam eva avakalpate tau etau sattva kṣetrajñau ha vā evaṃvidi kiṃcaa rajaḥ ādhvaṃsate ityādi katham tayoḥ ayaḥ pippalam svādu atti iti sattvam
iti acetae sattve ucyate śrutiḥ acetaasya sattve bhoktṛ tva vacaam iti ucyate śrutiḥ acetaasya sattvasya bhoktṛ tvam vakṣyāmi iti pravṛttā kim tarhi cetaasya kṣetrajñasya abhoktṛ tvam brahma svabhāvatām ca vakṣyāmi iti tad artham sukha duḥkha ādi vikriyāvati sattve
bhoktṛ tvam adhyāropayati idam hi kartṛ tvam bhoktṛ tvam ca sattva kṣetrajñayoḥ itaretara svabhāva aviveka kṛtam kalpyate paramārthataḥ tu āyatarasya api saṃbhavati acetaa tvāt sattvasya avikriya tvāt ca kṣetrajñasya avidyā pratyupasthāpita svabhāva tvāt ca sattvasya sutarām saṃbhavati tathā
ca śrutiḥ yatra vai ayat iva syāt tatra ayaḥ yat paśyet ityādiā avidyā viṣayaḥ eva kartṛ tva ādi vyavahāram darśayati yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kam paśyet ityādiā ca vivekiḥ kartṛ tva ādi vyavahāram
iva ārayati ataraḥ upapatteḥ atara adhikaraṇam yaḥ eṣa u kṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate eṣaḥ ātmā iti ha uvāca etat amṛtam abhayam etat brahma iti tat yadi api asmi
sarpiḥ vā udakam vā siñcati eva gacchati ityādi śrūyate tatra saṃśayaḥ kim ayam pratibimba ātmā akṣi adhikaraṇaḥ atha vijñā ātmā uta devatā ātmā idriyasya adhiṣṭhātā athavā īśvara
iti kim tāvat prāptam chāyā ātmā puruṣa pratirūpaḥ iti kutas tasya dṛśyamāa tva prasiddheḥ yaḥ eṣa ukṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate iti ca prasiddha vat upadeśāt vijñāātmao vā ayam
iḥ deśaḥ iti yuktam sa hi cakṣuṣā rūpam paśyan cakṣuṣi saṃihitaḥ bhavati ātma śabdaḥ ca asmi pakṣe ukūlaḥ bhavati āditya puruṣaḥ vā cakṣuṣaḥ u grāhakaḥ
pratīyate raśmibhiḥ eṣaḥ asmi pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti śruteḥ amṛta tva ādīām ca api kathaṃcid saṃbhavāt eśvaraḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ parameśvaraḥ eva akṣiṇi
abhyataraḥ puruṣaḥ iha upadiṣṭaḥ iti kasmāt upapatteḥ upapadyate hi parameśvare guṇa jātam ātmatvam tāva mukhyayā vṛttyā parameśvare upapadyate saḥ ātmā tat
tvam asi iti śruteḥ amṛta tva abhaya tve ca asakṛt śrūyete tathā etat etat yathā hi parameśvaraḥ sarva doṣaiḥ aliptaḥ apahata pāpma tva ādi śravaṇāt tathā akṣi sthāam sarva lepa rahitam
upadiṣṭam tat yadi api asmi sarpiḥ vā udakam vā siñcati vartmaī eva gacchati iti śruteḥ saṃyat vāma tva ādi guṇa upadeśaḥ ca avakalpate etam saṃyat vāma
iti ācakṣate etam hi sarvāṇi vāmāi abhisaṃyati eṣaḥ u eva vāmaīḥ eṣa hi sarvāṇi ayati eṣaḥ u eva bhāmaīḥ eṣa
hi sarveṣu lokeṣu bhāti iti ca atas upapatteḥ ataraḥ parameśvaraḥ sthā ādi vyapadeśāt ca katham puar ākāśa vat sarva gatasya brahmaṇaḥ akṣi alpam upapadyate iti
atra ucyate bhavet eṣā avakḷptiḥ yadi etat eva ekam bhavet sati hi api yaḥ pṛthivyām
tiṣṭhe teṣu hi cakṣuḥ api irdiṣṭam yaḥ cakṣuṣi tiṣṭhe iti sthā ādi vyapadeśāt iti ādi grahaṇe etat darśayati a kevalam brahmaṇaḥ kim tarhi āma rūpam iti evaṃjātīyakam api a āma rūpasya
dṛśyate tasya uditi hiraṇya śmaśruḥ ityādi hirguṇam api sat brahma āma rūpa gataiḥ guṇaiḥ sa guṇam upāsa artham tatra tatra upadiśyate iti etat api uktam eva sarva gatasya api brahmaṇaḥ upalabdhi artham virudhyate
sālagrāmaḥ iva viṣṇoḥ iti etat api uktam eva sukha viśiṣṭa abhidhāāt eva ca api ca vivaditavyam kim brahma a vā iti sukha viśiṣṭa abhidhāāt eva brahma tvam siddham sukha viśiṣṭam hi brahma yat vākya upakrame
prakrātam prāṇaḥ brahma kam brahma kham brahma iti tat eva iha abhihitam prakṛta parigrahasya yāyya tvāt ācāryaḥ tu te gatim vaktā iti ca gati mātra abhidhāa pratijñāāt katham puar vākya upakrame
sukha viśiṣṭam brahma vijñāyate iti ucyate prāṇaḥ brahma kam brahma kham brahma iti etat agīām vacaam śrutvā upakosalaḥ uvāca aham yat prāṇaḥ brahma
kam ca kham ca tu iti tatra idam prativacaam yat vāva kam tat eva kham yat eva kham tat
eva kam iti tatra kham śabdaḥ bhūtākāśe loke yadi tasya kaṃ śabdaḥ sukha vācī opādīyeta tathā sati kevale bhūtākāśe brahma śabdaḥ āma ādiṣu
iva pratīka abhiprāyeṇa prayuktaḥ iti pratītiḥ syāt tathā kaṃ śabdasya viṣaya idriya saṃparka ja ete sāmaye sukhe prasiddha tvāt yadi tasya khaṃśabdaḥ laukikam sukham brahma iti
pratītiḥ syāt itara itara viśeṣitau tu kaṃ khaṃ śabdau sukha ātmakam brahma gamayataḥ tatra dvitīye brahma śabde upādīyamāe kam kham brahma iti eva ucyamāe kaṃ śabdasya syāt
bhūt iti ubhayoḥ kaṃ khaṃ śabdayoḥ brahma śabda śiraḥ tvam kam brahma kham brahma iti iṣṭam hi sukhasya api guṇasya guṇi vat dhyeya tvam tat evam vākya upakrame sukha viśiṣṭam brahma upadiṣṭam pratyekam ca gārhapatya āda yogayaḥ
svam svam mahimā upadiśya eṣā somya ca iti upasaṃharataḥ pūrvatra brahma iti jñāpayati ācāryaḥ tu te gatim vaktā iti ca vārayati
yathā puṣkarapalāśe śliṣyate evam evaṃvidi pāpam karma śliṣyate iti ca akṣi sthāam puruṣam vijāataḥ puruṣasya brahmatvam darśayati tasmāt prakṛtasya eva
brahmaṇā ukṣi sthāatām saṃyat vāma tva ādi guṇatām ca uktvā arciḥ ādikām tad vidaḥ gatim vakṣyāmi iti upakramate yaḥ eṣa ukṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate eṣaḥ ātmā iti ha uvāca iti itas ca akṣi sthāaḥ puruṣaḥ parameśvaraḥ
yasmāt brahma vidaḥ yā gatiḥ devayāā ākhyā prasiddhā śrutau atha uttareṇa tapasā brahmacaryeṇa śraddhayā vidyayā ādityam abhijayate etat vai prāṇāām āyataam etat amṛtam abhayam etat parāyaṇam etasmāt puarāvartate iti smṛtau api
agiḥ jyotiḥ ahar śuklaḥ ṣaṣ māsāḥ uttarāyaṇam tatra prayātā gacchati brahma brahman vidaḥ iti sa eva iha akṣi puruṣa vidaḥ dṛśyate atha yat u ca eva asmin śavyam kurvati yadi ca
ārciṣam eva abhisaṃbhavati iti upakramya ādityāt cadramasam cadramasaḥ vidyutam tat puruṣaḥ umāavaḥ saḥ eābrahma gamayati eṣa deva pathaḥ brahma pathaḥ pratipadyamāā imam āvartam āvartate iti tat iha brahma vid viṣayayā prasiddhayā
gatyā akṣi sthāasya brahmatvam a avasthiteḥ asambhavāt ca etaraḥ yat puar uktam chāyā ātmā vijñā ātmā devatā ātmā vā syāt akṣi sthāaḥ iti atra ucyate a
chāyā ātma ādiḥ itaraḥ iha grahaṇam arhati kasmāt a avasthiteḥ cakṣuṣi saṃbhavati yadā eva hi kaścid puruṣaḥ cakṣuḥ āsīdati
tadā cakṣuṣi puruṣa chāyā dṛśyate apagate tasmin dṛśyate yaḥ eṣa ukṣiṇi puruṣaḥ iti ca śrutiḥ saṃidhāāt sva cakṣuṣi dṛśyamāam puruṣam upāsya tve upadiśati
ca upāsaā kāle chāyākar

text1:
ati
yadā eva hi kaścid puruṣaḥ cakṣuḥ āsīdati tadā cakṣuṣi puruṣa chāyā dṛśyate
apagate tasmin na dṛśyate
yaḥ eṣa u kṣiṇi puruṣaḥ iti ca śrutiḥ saṃnidhānāt sva cakṣuṣi dṛśyamānam puruṣam upāsya tvena upadiśati
na ca upāsanā kāle chāyākaram kaṃcid puruṣam cakṣuḥ samīpe saṃnidhāpya upāste iti yuktam kalpayitum
asya eva śarīrasya nāśam anu eṣa naśyati iti śrutiḥ chāyā ātmanaḥ api anavasthita tvam darśayati
asaṃbhāvat ca
text2:
ati yadā eva hi kaścid puruṣaḥ cakṣuḥ āsīdati
tadā cakṣuṣi puruṣa chāyā dṛśyate apagate tasmin dṛśyate yaḥ eṣa ukṣiṇi puruṣaḥ iti ca śrutiḥ saṃidhāāt sva cakṣuṣi dṛśyamāam puruṣam upāsya tve upadiśati
ca upāsaā kāle chāyākaram kaṃcid puruṣam cakṣuḥ samīpe saṃidhāpya upāste iti yuktam kalpayitum asya eva śarīrasya āśam aśyati iti śrutiḥ a avasthita tvam darśayati

text1:
sati na cakṣuṣi eva avasthita tvam śakyam vaktum
brahmaṇaḥ tu sarva vyāpinaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ upalabdhi arthaḥ hṛdaya ādi deśa viśeṣa saṃbandhaḥ
samānaḥ ca
text2:
sati a cakṣuṣi eva avasthita tvam śakyam vaktum brahmaṇaḥ
tu dṛṣṭaḥ upalabdhi arthaḥ hṛdaya ādi deśa viśeṣa ca

text1:
api amṛta tva ādīnām guṇānām asaṃbhavaḥ
yadi api vijñānātmā paramātmanaḥ nanyaḥ eva tathā api avidyā kām akarma kṛtam tasmin martya tvam adhyāropitam bhayam ca iti amṛta tva abhaya tve na upapadyete
saṃyat vāma tva ādayaḥ ca etasmin anaiśvaryāt anupapannāḥ eva
devatā ātmanaḥ tu raśmibhiḥ eṣaḥ u smin pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti śruteḥ yadi api cakṣuṣi avasthānam syāt tathā api ātmatvam tāvat na saṃbhavati parāc rūpa tvāt
amṛta tva ādayaḥ pi na saṃbhavanti utpatti pralaya śravaṇāt
amara tvam api devānām cira kāla avasthāna apekṣam
aiśvaryam api parameśvara āyattam na svābhāvikam
bhīṣā asmāt vātaḥ pavate bhīṣā udeti sūryaḥ
bhīṣā asmāt agniḥ ca indraḥ ca mṛtyuḥ dhāvati pañcamaḥ iti mantra varṇāt
tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva ayam akṣi sthānaḥ pratyetavyaḥ
asmin ca pakṣe dṛśyate iti prasiddha vat upādānam śāstra ādi apekṣam vidvat viṣayam prarocana artham iti vyākhyeyam
antaryāmi adhidaiva ādiṣu tad dharma vyapadeśāt
antaryāmi adhikaraṇam
yaḥ imam ca lokam param ca lokam sarvāṇi ca bhūtāni antaraḥ yamayati iti upakramya śrūyate yaḥ pṛthivyām tiṣṭhan pṛthivyāḥ antaraḥ yam pṛthivī na veda yasya pṛthivī śarīram yaḥ pṛthivīm antaraḥ yamayati eṣa te ātmā antaryāmī amṛtaḥ ityādi
atra adhidaivatam adhilokam adhivedam adhiyajñam adhibhūtam adhyātmam ca kaścid antar avasthitaḥ yamayitā antaryāmī iti śrūyate
sa kim adhidaiva ādi abhimānī devatā ātmā kaścid kim vā prāpta aṇima ādi aiśvaryaḥ kaścid yogī kim vā paramātmā kim vā artha antaram kiṃcid iti apūrva saṃjñā darśanāt saṃśayaḥ
kim tāvat naḥ pratibhāti
saṃjñāyāḥ aprasiddha tvāt saṃjñinā api aprasiddhena artha antareṇa kenacid bhavitavyam iti
athavā na anirūpita rūpam arthāntaram kiṃcid api śakyam asti iti abhyupagantum
antaryāmi śabdaḥ ca antaryamana yogena pravṛttaḥ na atyantam aprasiddhaḥ
tasmāt pṛthivī ādi abhimānī kaścid devaḥ antaryāmī syāt
tathā ca śrūyate pṛthivī eva yasya āyatanam agniḥ lokaḥ manaḥ jyotiḥ ityādi
sa ca kārya karaṇavat tvāt pṛthivī ādīn antar tiṣṭhan yamayati iti yuktam devatā ātmanaḥ yamayitṛ tvam
yoginaḥ vā kasyacid siddhasya sarva anupraveśena yamayitṛ tvam syāt
na tu paramātmā pratīyate akārya karaṇa tvāt
iti evam prāpte idam ucyate yaḥ ntaryāmī adhidaiva ādiṣu śrūyate sa paramātmā eva syāt na anyaḥ iti
kutas
tad dharma vyapadeśāt
tasya hi paramātmanaḥ dharmāḥ iha nirdiśyamānāḥ dṛśyante
pṛthivī ādi tāvat adhidaiva ādi bheda bhinnam samastam vikāra jātam antar tiṣṭhan yamayati iti paramātmanaḥ yamayitṛ tvam dharmaḥ upapadyate
sarva vikāra kāraṇa tve sati sarva śakti upapatteḥ
eṣa te ātmā antaryāmī amṛtaḥ iti ca ātma tva amṛta tve mukhye paramātmanaḥ upapadyete
yam pṛthivī na veda iti ca pṛthivī devatāyai avijñeyam antaryāmiṇam bruvan devatā ātmanaḥ darśayati
pṛthivī devatā hi aham asmi pṛthivī iti ātmānam vijānīyāt
tathā a dṛṣṭaḥ śrutaḥ ityādi vyapadeśaḥ rūpa ādi vihīna tvāt paramātmanaḥ upapadyate iti
yat tu akārya karaṇasya paramātmanaḥ yamayitṛ tvam na upapadyate iti na eṣa doṣaḥ
yān niyacchati tad kārya karaṇaiḥ eva tasya kārya karaṇavat tva upapatteḥ
tasya api anyaḥ niyantā iti anavasthā doṣaḥ ca na saṃbhavati bheda abhāvāt
bhede hi sati anavasthā doṣa upapattiḥ
tasmāt paramātmā eva antaryāmī
na ca smārtam a tad dharma abhilāpāt
syāt etat adṛṣṭa tva ādayaḥ dharmāḥ sāṃkhya smṛti kalpitasya pradhānasya api upapadyante rūpa ādi hīna tayā tasya taiḥ abhyupagamāt
apratarkyam avijñeyam prasuptam iva sarvatas iti hi smaranti
tasya api niyantṛ tvam sarva vikāra kāraṇa tvāt upapadyate
tasmāt pradhānam antaryāmi śabdam syāt
īkṣateḥ na aśabdam iti atra nirākṛtam api sat pradhānam iha adṛṣṭa tva ādi vyapadeśa saṃbhavena punar āśaṅkyate
atas uttaram ucyate na ca smārtam pradhānam antaryāmi śabdam bhavitum arhati
kasmāt
a tad dharma abhilāpāt
yadi api adṛṣṭa tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ pradhānasya saṃbhavati tathā api na draṣṭṛ tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ saṃbhavati pradhānasya acetana tvena taiḥ abhyupagamāt
a dṛṣṭaḥ draṣṭā a śrutaḥ śrotā a mataḥ mantā a vijñātaḥ vijñātā iti hi vākya śeṣaḥ iha bhavati
ātma tvam api na pradhānasya upapadyate
yadi pradhānam ātma tva draṣṭṛ tva ādi asaṃbhavāt na antaryāmī abhyupagamyate śārīraḥ tarhi antaryāmī bhavatu
śārīraḥ hi cetana tvāt draṣṭā śrotā mantā vijñātā ca bhavati ātmā ca pratyak tvāt
amṛtaḥ ca dharma adharma phala upabhoga upapatteḥ
adṛṣṭa tva ādayaḥ ca dharmāḥ śārīre su prasiddhāḥ
darśana ādi kriyāyāḥ kartari pravṛtti virodhāt na dṛṣṭeḥ draṣṭāram paśyeḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ ca
tasya ca kārya karaṇa saṃghātam antar yamayitum śīlam bhoktṛ tvāt
tasmāt śārīraḥ ntaryāmī iti atas uttaram paṭhati
śārīraḥ ca ubhaye hi bhedena enam adhīyate
na iti pūrva sūtrāt anuvartate
śārīraḥ ca na antaryāmī syāt
kasmāt
yadi api draṣṭṛ tva ādayaḥ dharmāḥ tasya saṃbhavanti tathā api ghaṭa ākāśa vat upādhi paricchinna tvāt na kārtsnyena pṛthivī ādiṣu antar avasthātum niyantum ca śaknoti
api ca ubhaye hi śākhinaḥ kāṇvāḥ mādhyaṃdināḥ ca antaryāmiṇaḥ bhedena enam śārīram pṛthivī ādi vat adhiṣṭhāna tvena niyamya tvena ca ādhīyate yaḥ vijñāne tiṣṭhan iti kāṇvāḥ
yaḥ ātmani tiṣṭhan iti mādhyaṃdināḥ
yaḥ ātmani tiṣṭhan iti asmin tāvat pāṭhe bhavati ātma śabdaḥ śārīrasya vācakaḥ
yaḥ vijñāne tiṣṭhan iti asmin api pāṭhe vijñāna śabdena śārīraḥ ucyate vijñāna mayaḥ hi śārīraḥ iti
tasmāt śārīrāt anyaḥ īśvaraḥ ntaryāmī iti siddham
katham punar ekasmin dehe dvau draṣṭārau upapadyete yaḥ ca ayam īśvaraḥ ntaryāmī yaḥ ca ayam itaraḥ śārīraḥ
kā punar iha anupapattiḥ
na anyaḥ taḥ sti draṣṭā ityādi śruti vacanam virudhyeta
atra hi prakṛtāt antaryāmiṇaḥ draṣṭāram śrotāram mantāram vijñātāram ca ātmānam pratiṣedhati
niyantṛ antara pratiṣedha artham etat vacanam iti ced na
niyantṛ antara aprasaṅgāt aviśeṣa śravaṇāt ca
atrā ucyate avidyā pratyupasthāpita kārya karaṇa upādhi nimittaḥ yam śārīra antaryāmiṇoḥ bheda vyapadeśaḥ na pāramārthikaḥ
ekaḥ hi pratyagātmā bhavati na dvau pratyagātmānau saṃbhavataḥ
ekasya eva tu bheda vyavahāraḥ upādhi kṛtaḥ yathā ghaṭa ākāśaḥ mahā ākāśaḥ iti
tatas ca jñātṛ jñeya ādi bheda śrutayaḥ pratyakṣa ādīni ca pramāṇāni saṃsāra anubhavaḥ vidhi pratiṣedha śāstram ca iti sarvam etat upapadyate
tathā ca śrutiḥ yatra hi dvaitam iva bhavati tat itaraḥ itaram paśyati iti avidyā viṣaye sarvam vyavahāram darśayati
yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kena kam paśyet iti vidyā viṣaye sarvam vyavahāram vārayati
adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ dharma ukteḥ
adṛśya tva ādi adhikaraṇam
atha parā yayā tat akṣaram adhigamyate yat tat a dreśyam a grāhyam a gotram a varṇam a cakṣuḥ śrotram tat a pāṇi pādam nityam vibhum sarva gatam su sūkṣmam tat avyayam yat bhūta yonim paripaśyanti dhīrāḥ iti śrūyate
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim ayam adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ bhūtayoniḥ pradhānam syāt uta śārīraḥ āhosvit parameśvaraḥ iti
tatra pradhānam acetanam bhūta yoniḥ iti yuktam acetanānām eva tatra dṛṣṭānta tvena upādānāt
yathā ūrṇanābhiḥ sṛjate gṛhṇate ca yathā pṛthivyām oṣadhayaḥ saṃbhavanti
yathā sataḥ puruṣāt keśa lomāni tathā akṣarāt saṃbhavati iha viśvam iti
nanu ūrṇanābhiḥ puruṣaḥ ca cetanau iha dṛṣṭānta tvena upāttau
na iti brūmaḥ
na hi kevalasya cetanasya tatra sūtra yoni tvam keśa loma yoni tvam vā asti
cetanā dhiṣṭhitam hi acetanam ūrṇanābhi śarīram sūtrasya yoniḥ puruṣa śarīram ca keśa lomnām iti prasiddham
api ca pūrvatra adṛṣṭa tva ādi abhilāpa saṃbhave pi draṣṭṛ tva ādi abhilāpa asaṃbhavāt na pradhānam abhyupagatam
iha tu adṛśya tva ādayaḥ dharmāḥ pradhāne saṃbhavanti
na ca atra virudhyamānaḥ dharmaḥ kaścid abhilapyate
nanu yaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarva vid iti ayam cetane pradhāne na saṃbhavati katham pradhānam bhūta yoniḥ pratijñāyate iti
atrā ucyate yayā tat akṣaram adhigamyate yat tat adreśyam iti akṣara śabdena adṛśya tva ādi guṇakam bhūtayonim śrāvayitvā punar ante śrāvayiṣyati akṣarāt paratas paraḥ iti
tatra yaḥ kṣarāt śrutaḥ sa sarvajñaḥ sarva vid saṃbhaviṣyati
pradhānam eva tu akṣara śabda nirdiṣṭam bhūta yoniḥ
yadā tu yoni śabdaḥ nimitta vācī tadā bhūtayoniḥ syāt dharma adharmābhyām bhūta jātasya upārjanāt iti
evam prāpte abhidhīyate yaḥ yam adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ bhūtayoniḥ sa parameśvaraḥ eva syāt na anyaḥ iti
katham etat avagamyate
dharma ukteḥ
parameśvarasya hi dharmaḥ iha ucyamānaḥ dṛśyate yaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarva vid iti
na hi pradhānasya acetanasya śārīrasya vā upādhi paricchinna dṛṣṭeḥ sarvajña tvam sarva vid tvam vā saṃbhavati
nanu akṣara śabda nirdiṣṭāt bhūtayoneḥ parasya eva etat sarvajña tvam sarva vid tvam ca na bhūtayoni viṣayam iti uktam
atra ucyate na evam saṃbhavati
yatkāraṇam akṣarāt saṃbhavati iha viśvam iti prakṛtam bhūta yonim iha jāyamāna prakṛti tvena nirdiśya anantaram api jāyamāna prakṛti tvena eva sarvajñam nirdiśati yaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarva vid yasya jñāna mayam tapaḥ
tasmāt etat brahma nāma rūpam annam ca jāyate iti
tasmāt nirdeśa sāmyena pratyabhijñāyamāna tvāt prakṛtasya eva akṣarasya bhūtayoneḥ sarvajña tvam sarva vid tvam ca dharmaḥ ucyate iti gamyate
akṣarāt paratas paraḥ iti atra api ca prakṛtāt bhūta yoni ikṣarāt paraḥ kaścid abhidhīyate
katham etat avagamyate
yena akṣaram puruṣam veda satyam provāca tām tat tvattaḥ bahma vidyām iti prakṛtasya eva akṣarasya bhūtayoneḥ adṛśya tva ādi guṇakasya vaktavya tvena pratijñāta tvāt
katham tarhi akṣarāt paratas paraḥ iti vyapadiśyate iti uttara sūtre tat vakṣyāmaḥ
api ca atra dve vidye veditavye ukte parā ca eva aparā ca iti
tatra aparām ṛgveda ādi lakṣaṇām vidyām uktvā bravīti atha parā yayā tat akṣaram adhigamyate ityādi
tatra parasyāḥ vidyāyāḥ viṣaya tvena akṣaram śrutam
yadi punar parameśvarāt anyat adṛśya tva ādi guṇakam akṣaram parikalpyeta na iyam parā vidyā syāt
para apara vibhāgaḥ hi ayam vidyayoḥ abhyudaya niḥśreyasa phala tayā parikalpyate
na ca pradhānasya vidyā niḥśreyasa phalā kenacid abhyupagamyate
tisraḥ ca vidyāḥ pratijñāyeran tvad pakṣe kṣarāt bhūtayoneḥ parasya paramātmanaḥ pratipādyamāna tvāt
dve eva tu vidye veditavye iha nirdiṣṭe
kasmin nu bhagavaḥ vijñāte sarvam idam vijñātam bhavati iti ca eka vijñānena sarva vijñāna apekṣaṇam sarva ātmake brahmaṇi vivakṣyamāṇe na acetana mātra eka āyatane pradhāne bhogya vyatirikte vā bhoktari
api ca sa brahma vidyām sarva vidyā pratiṣṭhām atharvāya jyeṣṭhaputrāya prāha iti brahma vidyām prādhānyena upakramya para apara vibhāgena parām vidyām akṣara adhigamanīm darśayan tasyāḥ brahma vidyā tvam darśayati
sā ca brahma vidyā samākhyā tad adhigamyasya akṣarasya abrahmatve bādhitā syāt
aparā ṛgveda ādi lakṣaṇā karma vidyā brahma vidyā upakrame upanyasyate brahma vidyā praśaṃsāyai plavāḥ hi ete adṛḍhāḥ yajña rūpāḥ aṣṭādaśa uktam avaram yeṣu karma
etat śreyaḥ ye bhinandanti mūḍhāḥ jarām mṛtyum te punar evā api yanti iti evamādi nindā vacanāt
ninditvā ca aparām vidyām tatas viraktasya para vidyā adhikāram darśayati parīkṣya lokān karma citān brāhmaṇaḥ nirvedam āyāt na asti akṛtaḥ kṛtena
tad vijñāna artham sa gurum eva abhigacchet samidh pāṇiḥ śrotriyam brahmaniṣṭham iti
yat tu uktam acetanānām pṛthivī ādīnām dṛṣṭānta tvena upādānāt dārṣṭāntikena api acetanena eva bhūtayoninā bhavitavyam iti tat ayuktam
na hi dṛṣṭānta dārṣṭāntikayoḥ atyanta sāmyena bhavitavyam iti
api ca sthūlāḥ pṛthivī ādayaḥ dṛṣṭānta tvena upāttāḥ iti na sthūlaḥ eva dārṣṭāntikaḥ bhūtayoniḥ abhyupagamyate
tasmāt adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ bhūtayoniḥ parameśvaraḥ eva
viśeṣaṇa bheda vyapadeśābhyām ca na itarau
itas ca parameśvaraḥ eva bhūtayoniḥ na itarau śārīraḥ pradhānam vā
kasmāt
viśeṣaṇa bheda vyapadeśābhyām
viśinaṣṭi hi prakṛtam bhūtayonim śārīrāt vilakṣaṇa tvena divyaḥ hi amūrtaḥ puruṣaḥ sa bāhya abhyantaraḥ hi ajaḥ
a prāṇaḥ hi a manāḥ śubhraḥ iti
na hi et
text2:
api amṛta tva ādīām guṇāām asaṃbhavaḥ yadi api vijñāātmā eva tathā api
a vidyā kām a karma kṛtam martya tvam adhyāropitam bhayam ca iti amṛta tva abhaya tve opapadyete saṃyat vāma tva ādayaḥ ca etasmi aaiśvaryāt eva devatā ātmaaḥ tu raśmibhiḥ eṣaḥ u smi pratiṣṭhitaḥ
iti śruteḥ yadi api cakṣuṣi syāt tathā api ātmatvam saṃbhavati parāk rūpatvāt amṛta tva ādayaḥ saṃbhavati utpatti pralaya śravaṇāt amara tvam api
devāām cira kāla avasthā a apekṣam aiśvaryam api parameśvara āyattam a svābhāvikam bhīṣā asmāt vātaḥ pavate bhīṣā udeti sūryaḥ bhīṣā asmāt agiḥ ca idraḥ ca mṛtyuḥ dhāvati pañcamaḥ iti
matra varṇāt tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva ayam akṣi sthāaḥ pratyetavyaḥ asmin ca pakṣe dṛśyate iti prasiddha vat śāstra ādi apekṣam vidvat viṣayam praroca artham iti vyākhyeyam ataryāmi adhidaiva ādiṣu tad dharma vyapadeśāt
ataryāmi adhikaraṇam yaḥ imam ca lokam param ca lokam sarvāṇi ca bhūtāyataraḥ yamayati iti upakramya śrūyate yaḥ pṛthivyām tiṣṭha pṛthivyāḥ ataraḥ yam pṛthivī
veda yasya pṛthivī śarīram yaḥ pṛthivīm ataraḥ yamayati eṣa te ātmā ataryāmī amṛtaḥ ityādi atra adhidaivatam adhilokam adhivedam adhiyajñam adhibhūtam adhyātmam ca kaścid atas avasthitaḥ yamayitā ataryāmī iti śrūyate sa kim adhidaiva ādi abhimāī devatā ātmā
kaścid kim vā prāpta aṇima ādi aiśvaryaḥ kaścid yogī kim vā paramātmā kim vā arthātaram kiṃcitaḥ iti apūrva saṃjñā darśaāt saṃśayaḥ kim tāvat pratibhāti saṃjñāyāḥ aprasiddha tvāt arthātareṇa kaścid bhavitavyam iti athavā āi rūpita rūpam arthātaram
kiṃcid api śakyam asti iti abhyupagatum ataryāmi śabdaḥ tasmāt pṛthivī ādi abhimāī kaścid syāt tathā ca śrūyate pṛthivī eva ityādi sa ca kārya karaṇavat tvāt pṛthivī ādi atas yuktam
yamayitṛ tvam vā kasyacid siddhasya yamayitṛ tvam syāt a tu paramātmā pratīyate akārya karaṇa tvāt iti evam prāpte idam ucyate yotaryāmi adhidaiva ādiṣu śrūyate sa paramātmā eva
syāt āyaḥ iti kutas tad dharma vyapadeśāt tasya hi paramātmanaḥ dharmāḥ dṛśyate pṛthivī ādi tāvat adhidaiva ādi bheda bhiam samastam vikāra jātam atas tiṣṭha yamayati iti paramātmanaḥ yamayitṛ tvam dharmaḥ upapadyate
sarva vikāra kāraṇa tve sati sarva śakti upapatteḥ eṣa te ātmā ataryāmī amṛtaḥ iti ca ātma tva amṛta tve mukhye paramātma upapadyete yam pṛthivī a veda iti ca pṛthivī devatāyāḥ avijñeyam ataryāmiṇam
darśayati pṛthivī devatā hi aham asmi pṛthivī iti ātmā tathā ityādi vyapadeśaḥ ityādi vyapadeśaḥ upapadyate iti yat tu a kārya karaṇasya yamayitṛ tvam upapadyate iti ā eṣa doṣaḥ
tad kārya karaṇaiḥ eva tasya kārya karaṇavat tva upapatteḥ tasya api ayaḥ iyatā iti a avasthā doṣaḥ ca saṃbhavati bheda abhāvāt bhede hi sati a avasthā doṣa upapattiḥ tasmāt paramātmā eva ataryāmī ca smārtam ataddharma abhilāpāt syāt etat adṛṣṭa tva ādayaḥ dharmāḥ sāṃkhya smṛti kalpitasya pradhā asya api upapadyate
tasya taiḥ abhyupagamāt apratarkyam avijñeyam prasuptam iva sarvatas iti hi smarati tasya api iyatṛ tvam sarva vikāra kāraṇa tvāt upapadyate tasmāt pradhāam ataryāmi śabdam syāt īkṣaterā śabdam iti atra irākṛtam api sat
atas uttaram ucyate ca smārtam pradhā a mataryāmi śabdam bhavitum arhati kasmāt a tad dharma abhilāpāt yadi api a dṛṣṭa tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ pradhā asya saṃbhavati tathā api a draṣṭṛ tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ saṃbhavati taiḥ abhyupagamāt adṛṣṭaḥ draṣṭā aśrutaḥ
śrotā amataḥ mata avijñātaḥ vijñātā iti hi vākyaśeṣaḥ iha bhavati ātmatvam api a pradhāasya upapadyate yadi śārīraḥ tarhi ataryāmī bhavatu śārīraḥ hi ceta atvāt draṣṭā śrotā matā
vijñātā ca bhavati ātmā ca pratyak tvāt amṛtaḥ ca dharma adharma phala upabhoga upapatteḥ adṛṣṭa tva ādayaḥ ca dharmāḥ śārīre su prasiddhāḥ darśa ādi kriyāyāḥ kartari pravṛtti virodhāt a dṛṣṭeḥ draṣṭāram paśyeḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ ca tasya
ca kārya karaṇa saṃghātam ataryamayitum śīlam bhoktṛ tvāt tasmāt śārīra utaryāmī iti atas uttaram paṭhati śārīraḥ ca ubhaye pi hi hi śārīraḥ ca ātaryāmī syāt kasmāt yadi api draṣṭṛ tva ādayaḥ dharmāḥ tasya saṃbhavati
tathā api ghaṭa ākāśa vat upādhi paricchia tvāa ca śakoti api ca ubhaye api hi śākhiaḥ kāṇvāḥ mādhyaṃdiāḥ cātaryāmiṇaḥ śārīram śārīram ca ādhīyate yaḥ yaḥ
tiṣṭhe iti kāṇvāḥ yaḥ ātmai tiṣṭhe iti mādhyaṃdiāḥ yaḥ ātmai tiṣṭhe iti asmin tāvat pāṭhe bhavati ātma śabdaḥ śārīrasya vācakaḥ yaḥ vijñāe tiṣṭhe iti asmin api
pāṭhe śārīraḥ ucyate vijñā a mayaḥ hi śārīraḥ iti tasmāt śārīra ādayaḥ īśvara utaryāmī iti siddham katham puar ekasmin dehe dvau draṣṭārau upapadyete yaḥ ca ayam īśvara utaryāmī yaḥ ca ayam itaraḥ śārīraḥ kā puariha a upapattiḥ
virudhyeta atra hi prakṛtāt ataryāmiṇaḥ yam draṣṭāram śrotāram matāram vijñātāram ca ātmā pratiṣedhati iyatratara pratiṣedha artham etat vacam iti ced a iyatratara aprasaṅgāt aviśeṣa śravaṇāt ca atra ucyate avidyā pratyupasthāpita kārya karaṇa upādhi nimittaḥ yam śārīra ataryāmiṇoḥ bheda vyapadeśaḥ
a pāramārthikaḥ ekaḥ hi pratyagātmā bhavati a dvau pratyagātmāau saṃbhavataḥ ekasya eva tu bheda vyavahāra upādhi kṛtaḥ yathā ghaṭa ākāśaḥ mahā ākāśaḥ iti tatas ca jñātṛ jñeya ādi bheda śrutayaḥ
ca sarvam etat upapadyate tathā ca śrutiḥ yatra hi dvaitam iva bhavati tat itaraḥ itaram paśyati iti avidyā viṣaye sarvam
vyavahāram darśayati yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kea kam paśyet iti vidyā viṣaye sarvam vyavahāram vārayati adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ dharma ukteḥ adṛśya tva ādi adhikaraṇam atha parā yayā tat akṣaram adhigamyate yat tat a dreśyam a grāhyam a gotram a varṇam a cakṣuḥ śrotram
tat apāṇi pādam vibhum sarva gatam su sūkṣmam tat avyayam yat bhūtayoim paripaśyati dhīrāḥ iti śrūyate tatra saṃśayaḥ kim ayam adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ syāt uta śārīraḥ āhosvit parameśvara
iti tatra pradhāam acetaam yuktam tatra tatra
iti puruṣaḥ ca cetaau iha eti brūmaḥ a hi kevalasya cetaasya tatra keśa loma yoitvam vā asti cetaḥ dhiṣṭhitam hi acetaam ūrṇaābhi śarīram sūtrasya puruṣa śarīram
ca keśalomām iti prasiddham api ca pūrvatra adṛṣṭa tva ādi abhilāpa saṃbhave pi draṣṭṛ tva ādi abhilāpa asaṃbhavāt pradhāe abhyupagatam iha tu adṛśya tva ādayaḥ dharmāḥ pradhāe saṃbhavati ca atra dharmaḥ kaścid abhilapyate yaḥ
sarvajñaḥ sarva vid iti ayam katham bhūta yoiḥ pratijñāyate iti atra ucyate yayā tat akṣaram adhigamyate yat tat adreśyam iti akṣara śabdena adṛśya tva ādi guṇakam śrāvayitvā
śrāvayiṣyati akṣarāt paratas paraḥ iti tatra yaḥ parokṣarāt śrutaḥ sa sarvajñaḥ sarva vid saṃbhaviṣyati yadā tu akṣara śabdaiḥ diṣṭam yadā tu imitta vācī tadā śārīraḥ api
syāt dharma adharmābhyām bhūta jātasya iti evam prāpte abhidhīyate yaḥ yam adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ sa parameśvaraḥ eva syāt āyaḥ iti katham etat avagamyate dharma ukteḥ parameśvarasya hi dharmaḥ iha ucyamānaḥ
dṛśyate yaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarva vid iti a hi sarvajña tvam sarva vid tvam vā saṃbhavati avakṣara śabdaiḥ diṣṭāt bhūtayoḥ parasya eva etat sarvajña tvam sarva vid tvam ca asya
atra ucyate saṃbhavati yatkāraṇam akṣarāt saṃbhavati iha viśvam iti prakṛtam saṃbhavati yatkāraṇam akṣarāt saṃbhavati iha viśvam iti prakṛtam sarvajñam irdiśya yaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarva vidyasya jñāa mayam

ḥ eva bhūtayoniḥ na itarau śārīraḥ pradhānam vā
kasmāt
viśeṣaṇa bheda vyapadeśābhyām
viśinaṣṭi hi prakṛtam bhūtayonim śārīrāt vilakṣaṇa tvena divyaḥ hi amūrtaḥ puruṣaḥ sa bāhya abhyantaraḥ hi ajaḥ

tasmāt sākṣāt aupaniṣadaḥ puruṣaḥ iha ucyate
tathā pradhānāt api prakṛtam bhūta yonim bhedena vyapadiśati akṣarāt paratas paraḥ iti
akṣaram avyākṛtam nāma rūpa bīja śakti rūpam bhūta sūkṣmam īśvara āśrayam tasya eva upādhi bhūtam sarvasmāt vikārāt paraḥ yaḥ vikāraḥ tasmāt paratas paraḥ iti bhedena vyapadiśan paramātmānam iha vivakṣitam darśayati
na atra pradhānam nāma kiṃcid svatantram tattvam abhyupagamya tasmāt bheda vyapadeśaḥ ucyate
kim tarhi
yadi pradhānam api kalpyamānam śruti avirodhena avyākṛta ādi śabda vācyam bhūta sūkṣmam parikalpyeta kalpyatām
tasmāt bheda vyapadeśāt parameśvaraḥ bhūtayoniḥ iti etat iha pratipādyate
kutas ca parameśvaraḥ bhūtayoniḥ
rūpa upanyāsāt ca
api ca akṣarāt paratas paraḥ Muṇḍaka
iti asya anantaram etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ iti prāṇa prabhṛtīnām pṛthivī paryantānām tattvānām sargam uktvā tasya eva bhūtayoneḥ sarva vikāra ātmakam rūpam upanyasyamānam paśyāmaḥ agniḥ mūrdhā cakṣuṣī candra sūryau diśaḥ śrotre vāc vivṛtāḥ ca vedāḥ
vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ hṛdayam viśvam asya padbhyām pṛthivī hi eṣa sarva bhūta antarātmā
iti
tat ca parameśvarasya eva ucitam sarva vikāra kāraṇatvāt
na śārīrasya tanu mahimnaḥ
na api pradhānasya ayam rūpa upanyāsaḥ saṃbhavati sarva bhūta antarātma tva asaṃbhavāt
tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva bhūtayoniḥ na itarau iti gamyate
katham punar bhūtayoneḥ ayam rūpa upanyāsaḥ iti gamyate
prakaraṇāt eṣaḥ iti ca prakṛta anukarṣaṇāt
bhūta yonim hi prakṛtya etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ eṣa sarva bhūta antarātmā iti vacanam bhūta yoni viṣayam eva bhavati
yathā upādhyāyam prakṛtya etasmāt adhīṣva eṣa veda vedāṅga pāragaḥ iti vacanam upādhyāya viṣayam bhavati tadvat
katham punar adṛśya tva ādi guṇakasya bhūtayoneḥ vigrahavat rūpam saṃbhavati
sarva ātma tva vivakṣayā idam ucyate na tu vigrahavat tva vivakṣayā iti adoṣaḥ aham annam aham annam aham anna aham anna ādaḥ ityādi vat
anye punar manyante na ayam bhūtayoneḥ rūpa upanyāsaḥ jāyamāna tvena upanyāsāt
etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ manaḥ sarva indriyāṇi ca
kham vāyuḥ jyotiḥ āpaḥ pṛthivī viśvasya dhāriṇī iti hi pūrvatra prāṇa ādi pṛthivī antam tattva jātam jāyamāna tvena niradikṣat
uttaratra api ca tasmāt agniḥ samidhaḥ yasya sūryaḥ iti evamādi atas ca sarvāḥ oṣadhayaḥ rasāḥ ca iti evam antam jāmāna tvena eva nirdekṣyati
iha eva katham akasmāt antarāle bhūtayoneḥ rūpam upanyasyet
sarva ātma tvam api sṛṣṭim parisamāpya upadekṣyati puruṣaḥ eva idam viśvam karma ityādinā
śruti smṛtyoḥ ca trailokya śarīrasya prajāpateḥ janma ādi nirdiśyamānam upalabhāmahe hiraṇyagarbhaḥ samavartata agre bhūtasya jātaḥ patiḥ ekaḥ āsīt
sa dādhāra pṛthivīm dyām uta imām kasmai devāya haviṣā vidhema iti samavartata iti ajāyata iti arthaḥ tathā sa vai śarīrī prathamaḥ sa vai puruṣaḥ ucyate
ādikartā sa bhūtānām brahma agre samavartata iti ca
vikārapuruṣasya api sarva bhūta antarātma tvam saṃbhavati prāṇa ātmanā sarva bhūtānām adhyātmam avasthānāt
asmin pakṣe puruṣaḥ eva idam viśvam karma iti ādi sarva rūpa upanyāsaḥ parameśvara pratipatti hetuḥ iti vyākhyeyam
vaiśvānaraḥ sādhāraṇa śabda viśeṣāt
kaḥ naḥ ātmā kim brahma iti ātmānam eva imam vaiśvānaram saṃprati adhyeṣi tam eva naḥ brūhi iti ca upakramya dyu sūrya vāyu ākāśa vāri pṛthivīnām sutejaḥ tva ādi guṇa yogam ekaika upāsana nindayā ca vaiśvānaram prati eṣām mūrdha ādi bhāvam upadiśya āmnāyate yaḥ tu etam evam prādeśa mātram abhivimānam ātmānam vaiśvānaram upāste sa sarveṣu lokeṣu sarveṣu bhūteṣu sarveṣu ātmasu annam atti
tasya ha vai etasya ātmanaḥ vaiśvānarasya mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ cakṣuḥ viśva rūpaḥ vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ pṛthak vartmā ātmā saṃdehaḥ bahulaḥ vastiḥ eva rayiḥ pṛthivī eva pādau uraḥ eva vediḥ lomāni barhiḥ hṛdayam gārhapatyaḥ manaḥ nu āhāryapacanaḥ āsyam āhavanīyaḥ ityādi
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim vaiśvānara śabdena jāṭharaḥ gniḥ upadiśyate uta bhūtāgniḥ atha tad abhimāninī devatā athavā śārīraḥ āhosvit parameśvaraḥ iti
kim punar atra saṃśaya kāraṇam
vaiśvānaraḥ iti jāṭhara bhūtāgni devatānām sādhāraṇa śabda prayogāt ātmā iti ca śārīra parameśvarayoḥ
tatra kasya upādānam nyāyyam kasya vā hānam iti bhavati saṃśayaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam
jāṭharaḥ gniḥ iti
kutas
tatra hi viśeṣeṇa kvacid prayogaḥ dṛśyate ayam agniḥ vaiśvānaraḥ yaḥ yam antar puruṣe yena idam annam pacyate yat idam adyate ityādau
agni mātram vā syāt tad sāmānyena api prayoga darśanāt viśvasmai agnim bhuvanāya devāḥ vaiśvānaram ketum ahnām akṛṇvan ityādau agni śarīrā vā devatā syāt tasyām api prayoga darśanāt vaiśvānarasya sumatau syāma rājā hi kam bhuvanānām abhiśrīḥ iti evamādyāyāḥ śruteḥ devatāyām aiśvarya ādi upetāyām saṃbhavāt
atha ātma śabda sāmānādhikaraṇyāt upakrame ca kaḥ naḥ ātmā kim brahma iti kevala ātma śabda prayogāt ātma śabda vaśena vaiśvānara śabdaḥ pariṇeyaḥ iti ucyate tathā api śārīraḥ ātmā syāt
tasya bhoktṛ tvena vaiśvānara saṃnikarṣāt prādeśa mātram iti ca viśeṣaṇasya tasmin upādhi paricchinne saṃbhavāt
tasmāt na īśvaraḥ vaiśvānaraḥ iti evam prāptam
tatra idam ucyate vaiśvānaraḥ paramātmā bhavitum arhati
kutas
sādhāraṇa śabda viśeṣāt
sādhāraṇa śabdayoḥ viśeṣaḥ sādhāraṇa śabda viśeṣaḥ
yadi api etau ubhau api ātma vaiśvānara śabdau sādhāraṇa śabdau vaiśvānara śabdaḥ tu trayāṇām sādhāraṇaḥ ātma śabdaḥ ca dvayoḥ tathā api viśeṣaḥ dṛśyate yena parameśvara paratvam tayoḥ abhyupagamyate tasya ha vā etasya ātmanaḥ vaiśvānarasya mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ ityādiḥ
atra hi parameśvaraḥ eva dyumūrdha tva ādi viśiṣṭaḥ vasthā antara gataḥ pratyagātma tvena upanyastaḥ ādhyānāya iti gamyate kāraṇa tvāt
kāraṇasya hi sarvābhiḥ kārya gatābhiḥ avasthābhiḥ avasthāvat tvāt dyu loka ādi avayava tvam upapadyate
sa sarveṣu lokeṣu sarveṣu bhūteṣu sarveṣu ātmasu annam atti iti ca sarva loka ādi āśrayam phalam śrūyamāṇam parama kāraṇa parigrahe saṃbhavati eva iha asya sarve pāpmānaḥ pradūyante iti ca tad vidaḥ sarva pāpma pradāha śravaṇam kaḥ naḥ ātmā kim brahma iti ca ātma brahma śabdābhyām upakramaḥ
iti evam antāni brahma liṅgāni parameśvaram eva gamayanti
tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva vaiśvānaraḥ
smaryamāṇam anumānam syāt iti
itas ca parameśvaraḥ eva vaiśvānaraḥ
yasmāt parameśvarasya eva agniḥ āsyam dyauḥ mūrdhā iti īdṛśam trailokya ātmakam rūpam smaryate yasya agniḥ āsyam dyauḥ mūrdhā kham nābhiḥ caraṇau kṣitiḥ
sūryaḥ cakṣuḥ diśaḥ śrotram tasmai loka ātmane namaḥ iti
tat smaryamāṇam rūpam mūla bhūtām śrutim anumāpayat asya vaiśvānara śabdasya parameśvara paratve anumānam liṅgam gamakam syāt iti arthaḥ
iti śabdaḥ hetu arthe yasmāt idam gamakam tasmāt api vaiśvānaraḥ paramātmā eva iti arthaḥ
yadi api stutiḥ iyam tasmai loka ātmane namaḥ iti tathā api stuti tvam api na asati mūla bhūte veda vākye samyak īdṛśena rūpeṇa saṃbhavati
dyām mūrdhānam yasya viprāḥ vadanti kham vai nābhim candra sūryau ca netre
diśaḥ śrotre viddhi pādau kṣitim ca saḥ u cintya ātmā sarva bhūta praṇetā iti evaṃjātīyakā ca smṛtiḥ iha udāhartavyā
śabda ādibhyaḥ ntar pratiṣṭhānāt ca na iti ced na tathā dṛṣṭi upadeśāt asambhavāt puruṣam api ca enam adhīyate
atra āha na parameśvaraḥ vaiśvānaraḥ bhavitum arhati
kutas
śabda ādibhyaḥ ntar pratiṣṭhānāt ca
śabdaḥ tāvat vaiśvānara śabdaḥ na parameśvare saṃbhavati artha antare rūḍha tvāt
tathā agni śabdaḥ saḥ eṣaḥ gniḥ vaiśvānaraḥ iti
ādi śabdāt hṛdayam gārhapatyaḥ iti ādi agni tretā prakalpanam
tat yat bhaktam prathamam āgacchet tat homīyam ityādinā ca prāṇa āhuti adhikaraṇa tā saṃkīrtanam
etebhyaḥ hetubhyaḥ jāṭharaḥ vaiśvānaraḥ pratyetavyaḥ
tathā antar pratiṣṭhānam api śrūyate puruṣe ntar pratiṣṭhitam veda iti
tat ca jāṭhare saṃbhavati
yat api uktam mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ ityādeḥ viśeṣāt kāraṇāt paramātmā vaiśvānaraḥ iti atra brūmaḥ kutas nu eṣa nirṇayaḥ yat ubhayathā api viśeṣa pratibhāne sati parameśvara viṣayaḥ eva viśeṣaḥ āśrayaṇīyaḥ na jāṭhara viṣayaḥ iti
athavā bhūtāgneḥ antar bahis ca avatiṣṭhamānasya eṣa nirdeśaḥ bhaviṣyati
tasya api hi dyu loka ādi saṃbandhaḥ mantra varṇe avagamyate yaḥ bhānunā pṛthivīm dyām uta imām ātatāna rodasī antarikṣam ityādau
athavā tad śarīrāyāḥ devatāyāḥ aiśvarya yogāt dyu loka ādi avayava tvam bhaviṣyati
tasmāt na parameśvaraḥ vaiśvānaraḥ iti
atra ucyate na tathā dṛṣṭi upadeśāt iti
na śabda ādibhyaḥ kāraṇebhyaḥ parameśvarasya pratyākhyānam yuktam
kutas
tathā jāṭhara aparityāgena dṛṣṭi upadeśāt
parameśvara dṛṣṭiḥ hi jāṭhare vaiśvānare iha upadiśyate manaḥ brahma iti upāsīta ityādi vat
athavā jāṭhara vaiśvānara upādhiḥ parameśvaraḥ iha draṣṭavya tvena upadiśyate manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ bhā rūpaḥ ityādi vat
yadi ca iha parameśvaraḥ na vivakṣyeta kevalaḥ eva jāṭharaḥ gniḥ vivakṣyeta tatas mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ ityādeḥ viśeṣasya asaṃbhavaḥ eva syāt
yathā tu devatā bhūta agni vyapāśrayeṇa api ayam viśeṣaḥ upapādayitum na śakyate tathā uttara sūtre vakṣyāmaḥ
yadi ca kevalaḥ eva jāṭharaḥ vivakṣyeta puruṣe ntar pratiṣṭhita tvam kevalam tasya syāt
na tu puruṣa tvam
puruṣam api ca enam adhīyate vājasaneyinaḥ saḥ eṣaḥ gniḥ vaiśvānaraḥ yat puruṣaḥ sa yaḥ ha etam evam agnim vaiśvānaram puruṣam puruṣe ntar pratiṣṭhitam veda iti
parameśvarasya tu sarva ātma tvāt puruṣa tvam puruṣe ntar pratiṣṭhita tvam ca ubhayam upapadyate
ye tu puruṣavidham api ca enam adhīyate iti sūtra avayavam paṭhanti teṣām eṣaḥ rthaḥ kevala jāṭhara parigrahe puruṣe ntar pratiṣṭhita tvam kevalam syāt
na tu puruṣavidha tvam
puruṣavidham api ca enam adhīyate vājasaneyinaḥ puruṣavidham puruṣe ntar pratiṣṭhitam veda iti
puruṣavidha tvam ca prakaraṇāt yat adhidaivatam dyu mūrdha tva ādi pṛthivī pratiṣṭhita tva antam yat ca adhyātmam prasiddham mūrdha tva ādi cubuka pratiṣṭhita tva antam tat parigṛhyate
śabda ādibhyaḥ ntar pratiṣṭhānāt ca na iti ced na tathā dṛṣṭi upadeśā
text2:
ḥ eva bhūtayoiḥ etarau śārīraḥ
vā kasmāt viśeṣaṇa bheda vyapadeśābhyām viśiaṣṭi hi prakṛtam śārīrāt vilakṣaṇa tve divyaḥ hi amūrtaḥ puruṣaḥ sabāhya abhyataraḥ hi ajaḥ aprāṇaḥ hi amaāḥ śubhraḥ iti a hi etat divya tva ādi viśeṣaṇam avidyā pratyupasthāpita āma rūpa pariccheda abhimāiḥ
kalpayataḥ śārīrasya upapadyate tasmāt sākṣāt aupaiṣadaḥ puruṣaḥ iha ucyate tathā pradhāāt api prakṛtam vyapadiśati akṣarāt paratas paraḥ iti akṣaram avyākṛtam āma rūpa bīja śakti rūpam bhūta sūkṣmam īśvara āśrayam tasya eva upādhi bhūtam sarvasmāt vikārāt paraḥ
tasmāt paratas paraḥ iti vyapadiśa iha vivakṣitam darśayati kiṃcid svatatram tattvam abhyupagamya tasmāt bheda vyapadeśaḥ ucyate kim tarhi yadi
śruti avirodhe avyākṛta ādi śabda vācyam bhūta sūkṣmam parikalpyeta kalpyatām tasmāt bheda vyapadeśāt parameśvaraḥ bhūta yoiḥ iti etat iha pratipādyate kutas ca parameśvaraḥ rūpa upayāsāt ca api ca akṣarāt paratas paraḥ
iti etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ iti prāṇa prabhṛtīām pṛthivī paryatāām tattvāām sargam uktvā tasya eva sarva vikāra ātmakam rūpam paśyāmaḥ agiḥ mūrdhā cakṣuṣī
cadra sūryau diśaḥ śrotre vāc vivṛtāḥ ca vedāḥ vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ hṛdayam viśvam asya padbhyām pṛthivī hi eṣa sarva bhūta atarātmā iti tat
ca parameśvarasya eva ucitam sarva vikāra kāraṇa tvāt a śārīrasya ayam rūpa upayāsaḥ saṃbhavati sarva bhūta atarātma tva asaṃbhavāt tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva etarau iti gamyate katham
bhūta yoeḥ ayam rūpa upayāsaḥ iti gamyate prakaraṇāt eṣaḥ iti ca prakṛti ākarṣaṇāt hi prakṛtyā etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ eṣa sarva bhūta atarātmā iti
vacaam eva bhavati yathā upādhyāyam prakṛtya etasmāt adhīṣva eṣa veda vedāṅga pāragaḥ iti vacaam upādhyāya viṣayam bhavati tadvat katham adṛśya tva ādi guṇakasya
vigrahavat rūpam saṃbhavati sarva ātma tva vivakṣayā idam ucyate a tu vigrahavat tva vivakṣayā iti adoṣaḥ aham aham aham aham aham ahamaādaḥ ityādi vat aye puar
rūpa upayāsaḥ etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ sarva idriyāṇi ca kham vāyuḥ jyotiḥ āpaḥ pṛthivī viśvasya dhāriṇī iti hi
pūrvatra prāṇa ādi tattva jātam uttaratra api ca tasmāt agiḥ samidhaḥ yasya sūryaḥ iti evamādi atas ca sarvāḥ oṣadhayaḥ rasāḥ
ca iti iha eva katham akasmāt rūpam upayasyet sarva ātma tvam api sṛṣṭim parisamāpya upadekṣyati puruṣaḥ eva idam viśvam karma
ityādiā śruti smṛtyoḥ ca trailokya śarīrasya prajāpateḥ jama ādi upalabhāmahe hiraṇyagarbhaḥ samavartata agre bhūtasya jātaḥ patiḥ ekaḥ āsīt sa dādhāra pṛthivīm dyām uta imām kasmai
devāya haviṣā vidhema iti samavartata iti ajāyata iti arthaḥ tathā sa vai śarīrī prathamaḥ sa vai puruṣaḥ ucyate ādikartā sa bhūtāām brahma agre
samavartata iti ca vikāra puruṣasya api sarva bhūta atara ātma tvam saṃbhavati sarva bhūtāām adhyātmam avasthāāt asmi pakṣe puruṣaḥ eva idam viśvam karma ityādi sarva rūpa upayāsaḥ parameśvara pratipatti hetuḥ iti vyākhyeyam
vaiśvāaraḥ sādhāraṇa śabda viśeṣāt kaḥ a ātmā kim brahma iti ātmā am eva imam vaiśvāaram saṃprati adhyeṣi tam eva o brūhi iti ca upakramya ca vaiśvāaram
prati eṣām mūrdha ādi bhāvam upadiśya āmāyate yaḥ tu etam evam prādeśa mātram abhivimāam ātmāam vaiśvāaram upāste sa sarveṣu lokeṣu sarveṣu bhūteṣu sarveṣu ātmasu atti tasya ha vai etasya ātmaaḥ vaiśvāarasya mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ cakṣuḥ viśva rūpaḥ vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ
pṛthak vartmā ātmā saṃdehaḥ bahulaḥ vastiḥ eva rayiḥ pṛthivī eva pādau uraḥ eva vediḥ loma ai barhiḥ hṛdayam gārhapatyaḥ āsyam āhavaīyaḥ ityādi tatra saṃśayaḥ kim vaiśvāara śabdena jāṭhara ogī upadiśyate uta
bhūtāgiḥ atha devatā athavā śārīraḥ āhosvit parameśvaraḥ iti kim saṃśaya kāraṇam vaiśvāaraḥ iti jāṭhara bhūtāgi devatāām sādhāraṇa śabda prayogāt ātmā iti ca śārīra parameśvarayoḥ tatra
yāyyam kasya vā bhavati saṃśayaḥ kim tāvat prāptam jāṭhara ogiḥ iti kutas tatra hi viśeṣeṇa kvacid prayogaḥ dṛśyate ayam agiḥ vaiśvāaraḥ yaḥ yamataḥ puruṣe pacyate
yat idam adyate ityādau agi mātram vā syāt prayoga darśaāt viśvasmai agim devāḥ vaiśvāaram ketu mahām akṛṇvaḥ ityādau agi śarīrā vā devatā syāt tasyām api prayoga darśaāt
vaiśvāarasya sumatau syāma rājā hi kam iti evamādyāyāḥ śruteḥ devatāyām aiśvarya ādi upetāyām saṃbhavāt atha ātma śabda sāmādhikaraṇyāt upakrame ca kaḥ a ātmā kim brahma iti kevala ātma śabda prayogāt ātma śabda vaśe vaiśvāara śabdaḥ
pariṇeyaḥ iti ucyate tathā api śārīraḥ ātmā syāt tasya vaiśvāara saṃikarṣāt prādeśa mātram iti ca viśeṣaṇasya saṃbhavāt tasmāeśvaraḥ vaiśvāaraḥ iti evam prāptam tatra idam ucyate vaiśvāaraḥ
paramātmā bhavitum arhati kutas sādhāraṇa śabda viśeṣāt sādhāraṇa śabdayoḥ viśeṣaḥ sādhāraṇa śabda viśeṣaḥ yadi api etau ubhau api ātma vaiśvāara śabdau sādhāraṇa śabdau vaiśvāara śabdaḥ tu trayāṇām sādhāraṇaḥ ātma śabdaḥ ca dvayoḥ tathā api viśeṣaḥ dṛśyate parameśvara para tvam tayoḥ abhyupagamyate tasya
ha vā etasya ātmaaḥ vaiśvāarasya mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ ityādiḥ atra hi parameśvaraḥ eva dyu mūrdha tva ādi viśiṣṭaḥ uvasthātara gataḥ gamyate kāraṇa tvāt kāraṇasya hi sarvābhiḥ kārya gatābhiḥ avasthābhiḥ avasthāvat tvāt
dyu loka ādi avayava tvam upapadyate sa sarveṣu lokeṣu sarveṣu bhūteṣu sarveṣu ātmasu aam atti iti ca sarva loka ādi āśrayam phalam śrūyamāṇam parama kāraṇa parigrahe saṃbhavati eva ha asya sarve pāpmāaḥ pradūyate iti ca
tad vidaḥ sarva pāpma pradāha śravaṇam kaḥ aḥ ātmā kim brahma iti ca ātma brahma śabdābhyām upakramaḥ iti brahma liṅgāi parameśvaram eva gamayati tasmāt parameśvaraḥ eva vaiśvāaraḥ smaryamāṇam aumāam syāt iti itas ca parameśvara
eva vaiśvāaraḥ yasmāt parameśvarasya eva agirā āsyam dyauḥ mūrdhā iti īdṛśam trailokya ātmakam rūpam smaryate yasya agirā āsyam dyauḥ mūrdhā kham ābhiḥ caraṇau kṣitiḥ sūryaḥ cakṣuḥ diśaḥ śrotram tasmai loka ātmai amaḥ iti
tat smaryamāṇam rūpam mūla bhūtām śrutim aumāpayat asya vaiśvāara śabdasya parameśvara paratve aumāam liṅgam gamakam syāt iti arthaḥ iti śabdaḥ hetvarthe yasmāt idam gamakam tasmāt api vaiśvāaraḥ paramātmā eva iti arthaḥ yadi api stutiḥ iyam tasmai
amaḥ iti tathā api stuti tvam api āsati mūla bhūte veda vākye samyak rūpeṇa saṃbhavati dyām mūrdhāam yasya viprāḥ vadati kham vai ābhiṃ
cadra sūryau diśaḥ śrotre viddhi pādau kṣitim ca saḥ uciti ātmā sarva bhūta praṇetā iti evaṃjātīyakā ca smṛtiḥ iha udāhartavyā śabda ādibhyaḥ utas pratiṣṭhāāt ca tathā dṛṣṭi upadeśāt asambhavāt puruṣam api atra āha
a parameśvaraḥ vaiśvāaraḥ bhavitum arhati kutas śabda ādibhyaḥ utas pratiṣṭhāāt ca śabdaḥ tāvat vaiśvāara śabdaḥ a parameśvare saṃbhavati arthātare rūḍha tvāt tathā agi śabdaḥ saḥ eṣaḥ gir vaiśvāaraḥ iti ādi śabdāt hṛdayam gārhapatyaḥ
tat yat bhaktam prathamam āgacchet tat homīyam ityādiā ca prāṇa āhuti adhikaraṇa tā saṃkīrtaam etebhyaḥ hetubhyaḥ jāṭharaḥ vaiśvāaraḥ pratyetavyaḥ tathā atas pratiṣṭhāam api śrūyate puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhitam veda iti tat ca jāṭhare saṃbhavati
yat api uktam mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ ityādeḥ viśeṣāt kāraṇāt paramātmā vaiśvāaraḥ iti atra brūmaḥ kutas yat ubhayathā api viśeṣa pratibhāe sati parameśvara viṣayaḥ eva viśeṣaḥ āśrayaṇīyaḥ jāṭhara viṣaya
iti athavā bhaviṣyati tasya api hi bhaviṣyati tasya api hi matra varṇe avagamyate yaḥ pṛthivīm dyām uta imām ātatāa rodasī atarikṣam ityādau athavā tad śarīrāyāḥ devatāyāḥ
aiśvarya yogāt dyu loka ādi avayava tvam bhaviṣyati tasmāt parameśvaraḥ vaiśvāaraḥ iti atra ucyate a tathā dṛṣṭi upadeśāt iti a śabda ādibhyaḥ kāraṇebhyaḥ parameśvarasya yuktam kutas tathā dṛṣṭi upadeśāt
parameśvara dṛṣṭiḥ hi jāṭhare vaiśvāare iha upadiśyate mao brahma iti upāsīta ityādi vat athavā jāṭhara vaiśvāara upādhiḥ parameśvaraḥ iha draṣṭavya tvena upadiśyate mao mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ bhā rūpaḥ ityādi vat yadi ca iha parameśvaraḥ an anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anya
vivakṣyeta kevalaḥ eva jāṭhara ogiḥ vivakṣyeta tatas mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ ityādeḥ viśeṣasya asaṃbhavaḥ eva syāt yathā tu devatā bhūta āgi vyapāśrayeṇa api ayam viśeṣaḥ upapādayitum śakyate tathā uttara sūtre vakṣyāmaḥ yadi
ca kevalaḥ eva jāṭharaḥ vivakṣyeta puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhita tvam kevalam tasya syāt a tu puruṣa tvam puruṣam api vājasaeyiḥ saḥ eṣa ogiḥ vaiśvāaraḥ yat puruṣaḥ sa yaḥ
ha etam evam agim vaiśvāaram puruṣam puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhitam veda iti parameśvarasya tu sarva ātma tvāt puruṣa tvam puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhita tvam ca ubhayam upapadyate ye tu puruṣavidham api iti sūtra avayavam paṭhati teṣām eṣaḥ ṛthaḥ
kevala jāṭhara parigrahe puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhita tvam kevalam syāt a tu puruṣavidha tvam puruṣavidham api vājasaeyiḥ puruṣavidham puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhitam veda iti puruṣavidha tvam ca prakaraṇāt yat adhidaivatam dyumūrdha tva ādi
yat ca adhyātmam prasiddham mūrdha tva ādi cubuka pratiṣṭhita tvātam tat parigṛhyate atas eva devatā bhūtam ca yat uktam bhūtāgeḥ api mūrdhā eva
su tejāḥ iti ādi avayava kalpaam tasya eva bhaviṣyati iti tad śarīrāyāḥ devatāyāḥ vaiśvarya yogāt iti tat parihartavyam atas ūrcyate atas eva uktebhyaḥ hetubhyaḥ devatā vaiśvāaraḥ tathā bhūtāgiḥ api api
vaiśvāaraḥ hi bhūtāgeḥ auṣṇya prakāśa mātra ātmakasya dyu mūrdha tva ādi kalpaā upapadyate vikārasya vikāra atara ātma tva asaṃbhavāt tathā devatāyāḥ sati api aiśvarya yoge a dyu mūrdha tva ādi kalpaā smbhavati akāraṇa tvāt parameśvara adhī aiśvarya tvāt ca ātma śabda saṃbhavaḥ
ca sarveṣu pakṣeṣu sthitaḥ eva sākṣāt api avirodham jaimiiḥ pūrvam jāṭhara āgi pratīkaḥ jāṭhara āgi upādhikaḥ vā parameśvaraḥ upāsyaḥ iti uktam atas pratiṣṭhita tvāt yaurodhea idāīm tu sākṣāt api
parameśvara upāsa a parigrahe kaścid virodhaḥ iti jaimiiḥ ācāryaḥ ca atra ucyate atas pratiṣṭhita tva vacaam hi iha puruṣavidham puruṣa itas
pratiṣṭhitam vede iti jāṭhara āgi abhiprāyeṇa idam ucyate tasya a prakṛta tvāt a saṃśabdita tvāt ca katham tarhi yat prakṛtam mūrdha ādi cubuka ateṣu puruṣa avayaveṣu puruṣavidha tvam kalpitam tad abhiprāyeṇa idam ucyate puruṣavidham puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhitam vede iti yathā vṛkṣe
śākhām pratiṣṭhitām paśyati iti tadvat athavā yaḥ prakṛtaḥ paramātmā adhyātmam adhidaivatam ca puruṣavidha tva upādhiḥ tasya yat kevalam sākṣi rūpam tad abhiprāyeṇa idam ucyate puruṣavidham puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhitam veda iti
ca paramātma parigrahe tad viṣayaḥ eva vaiśvāara śabdaḥ vartiṣyate viśvaḥ ca ayam araḥ ca iti viśveṣām vā ayam araḥ viśve vā arāḥ asya iti viśvāaraḥ paramātmā sarva ātma tvāt
viśvāaraḥ eva vaiśvāaraḥ taddhita uaya arthaḥ rākṣasa vāyasa ādi vat paramātma viṣayaḥ eva bhaviṣyati gārhapatya ādi kalpam prāṇa āhuti adhikaraṇa tvam ca sarva ātma tvāt upapadyate katham puas parameśvara parigrahe prādeśa mātra śrutiḥ upapadyate iti
tām vyākhyātum ārabhate abhivyakteḥ iti āśmarathyaḥ atimātrasya api parameśvarasya prādeśa mātra tvam abhivyakti nimittam syāt abhivyajyate kila prādeśa mātra parimāṇaḥ parameśvaraḥ upāsakāām kṛte pradeśa viśeṣeṣu vā hṛdaya ādiṣu upalabdhi sthāeṣu viśeṣeṇa abhivyajyate
atas parameśvare pi prādeśa mātra śrutiḥ abhivyakteḥ upapadyate iti āśmarathyaḥ ācāryaḥ ausmṛteḥ bādariḥ prādeśa mātra hṛdaya pratiṣṭhitea vā ayam prādeśa mātraḥ iti ucyate yathā prastha mitāḥ yavāḥ prasthāḥ
iti ucyate tadvat yadi api ca yaveṣu sva gatam eva parimāṇam prastha saṃbadhāt vyajyate ca iha parameśvara gatam kiṃcid parimāṇam asti yat hṛdaya saṃbadhāt
vyajyeta tathā api prayuktāyāḥ prādeśa mā

idam śrūyate yasmin dyauḥ pṛthivī ca antarikṣam ā utam manaḥ saha prāṇaiḥ ca sarvaiḥ
tam eva ekam jānatha ātmānam anyāḥ vācaḥ vimuñcatha amṛtasya eṣa setuḥ iti
atra yat etat dyu prabhṛtīnām ota tva vacanāt āyatanam kiṃcid avagamyate tat kim param brahma syāt āhosvit artha antaram iti saṃdihyate
tatra artha antaram kim api āyatanam syāt iti prāptam
kasmāt
amṛtasya eṣa setuḥ iti śravaṇāt
pāravān hi loke setuḥ prakhyātaḥ
na ca parasya brahmaṇaḥ pāravat tvam śakyam abhyupagantum anantam apāram iti śravaṇāt
artha antare ca āyatane parigṛhyamāṇe smṛti prasiddham pradhānam parigrahītavyam tasya kāraṇa tvāt āyatana tva upapatteḥ
śruti prasiddhaḥ vā vāyuḥ syāt vāyuḥ vāva gautama tat sūtram vāyunā vai gautama sūtreṇa ayam ca lokaḥ paraḥ ca lokaḥ sarvāṇi ca bhūtāni saṃdṛbdhāni bhavanti iti vāyoḥ api vidhāraṇa tva śravaṇāt
śārīraḥ vā syāt
tasya api bhoktṛ tvāt bhogyam prapañcam pratyāyatana tva upapatteḥ iti evam prāpte idam āha dyu bhu ādi āyatanam iti
dyauḥ ca bhūḥ ca dyubhuvau dyubhuvau ādī yasya tat idam dyubhu ādi
yat etat asmin vākye dyauḥ pṛthivī antarikṣam manaḥ prāṇāḥ iti evam ātmakam jagat ota tvena nirdiṣṭam tasya āyatanam param brahma bhavitum arhati
kutas
sva śabdāt ātma śabdāt iti arthaḥ
ātma śabdaḥ hi iha bhavati tam eva ekam jānatha ātmānam iti
ātma śabdaḥ ca paramātma parigrahe samyak avakalpate na artha antara parigrahe
kvacid ca sva śabdena eva brahmaṇaḥ āyatana tva śrūyate sat mūlāḥ somya imāḥ sarvāḥ prajāḥ sat āyatanāḥ sat pratiṣṭhāḥ iti
sva śabdena eva ca iha purastāt upariṣṭāt ca brahma saṃkīrtyate puruṣaḥ eva idam viśvam karma tapaḥ brahma para amṛtam iti brahma eva idam amṛtam purastāt brahma paścāt brahma dakṣiṇatas ca uttareṇa iti ca
tatra tu āyatana āyatanavat bhāva śravaṇāt
sarvam brahma iti ca sāmānādhikaraṇyāt yathā hi aneka ātmakaḥ vṛkṣaḥ śākhā skandhaḥ mūlam ca iti evam nānā rasaḥ vicitraḥ ātmā iti āśaṅkā saṃbhavati
tām nivartayitum sa avadhāraṇam āha tam eva ekam jānathaḥ ātmānam iti
etat uktam bhavati na kārya prapañca viśiṣṭaḥ vicitraḥ ātmā vijñeyaḥ
kim tarhi avidyā kṛtam kārya prapañcam vidyayā pravilāpayantaḥ tam eva ekam āyatana bhūtam ātmānam jānatha ekarasam iti
yathā yasmin āste devadattaḥ tadā ānaya iti ukte āsanam eva ānayati na devadattam
tadvat āyatana bhūtasya eva eka rasasya ātmanaḥ vijñeya tvam upadiśyate
vikāra anṛta abhisaṃdhasya ca apavādaḥ śrūyate mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyum āpnoti yaḥ iha nānā iva paśyati iti
sarvam brahma iti tu sāmānādhikaraṇyam prapañca vilāpana artham na aneka rasa tā pratipādana artham sa yathā saindhava ghanaḥ nantaraḥ bāhyaḥ kṛtsnaḥ rasa ghanaḥ eva evam vai are yam ātmā anantaraḥ bāhyaḥ kṛtsnaḥ prajñāna ghanaḥ eva iti eka rasa tā śravaṇāt
tasmāt dyubhva ādi āyatanam param brahma
yat tu uktam setu śruteḥ setoḥ ca pāravat tva upapatteḥ brahmaṇaḥ rtha antareṇa dyubhvā ādi āyatanena bhavitavyam iti atra ucyate vidhāraṇa tva mātram eva setu śrutyāḥ vivakṣyate na pāravat tva ādi
na hi mṛd dāru mayaḥ loke setuḥ dṛṣṭaḥ iti atra api mṛd dāru mayaḥ eva setuḥ abhyupagamyate
setu śabda arthaḥ vidhāraṇa tva mātram eva na pāravat tva ādi bandhana karmaṇaḥ setu śabda vyutpatteḥ
aparaḥ āha tam eva ekam jānatha ātmānam iti yat etat saṃkīrtitam ātma jñānam yat ca etat anyāḥ vācaḥ vimuñcatha iti vāc vimocanam tat atra amṛta tva sādhana tvāt amṛtasya eṣa setuḥ iti setu śrutyā saṃkīrtyate
na tu dyu bhu ādi āyatanam
tatra yat uktam setu śruteḥ brahmaṇaḥ rtha antareṇa dyubhvā ādi āyatanena bhavitavyam iti etat ayuktam
mukta upasṛpya vyapadeśāt
itas ca param eva brahma dyubhvā ādi āyatanam
yasmāt mukta upasṛpya tā asya vyapadiśyamānā dṛśyate
muktaiḥ upasṛpyam mukta upasṛpyam
deha ādiṣu anātmasu aham asmi iti ātma buddhiḥ avidyā tatas tad pūjana ādau rāgaḥ tad paribhava ādau ca dveṣaḥ tad uccheda darśanāt bhayam mohaḥ ca iti evam ayam ananta bhedaḥ nartha vrātaḥ saṃtataḥ sarveṣām naḥ pratyakṣaḥ
tad viparyayeṇa avidyā rāga dveṣa ādi doṣa muktaiḥ upasṛpyam upagamyam etat iti dyubhvā ādi āyatanam prakṛtya vyapadeśaḥ bhavati
katham
bhidyate hṛdaya granthiḥ chidyante sarva saṃśayāḥ
kṣīyante ca asya karmāṇi tasmin dṛṣṭe parāvare iti uktvā bravīti tathā vidvān nāma rūpāt vimuktaḥ parātparam puruṣam upaiti divyam iti
brahmaṇaḥ ca mukta upasṛpya tvam prasiddham śāstre yadā sarve pramucyante kāmāḥ ye hṛdi śritāḥ
atha martyaḥ mṛtaḥ bhavati atra brahma samaśnute iti evamādau
pradhāna ādīnām tu na kvacid mukta upasṛpya tvam asti prasiddham
api ca tam eva ekam jānatha ātmānam anyāḥ vācaḥ vimuñcatha amṛtasya eṣa setuḥ iti vāc vimoka pūrvakam vijñeya tvam iha dyubhvā ādi āyatanasya ucyate
tat ca śruti antare brahmaṇaḥ dṛṣṭam tam eva dhīraḥ vijñāya prajñām kurvīta brāhmaṇaḥ
na anudhyāyāt bahūn śabdān vācaḥ viglāpanam hi tat iti
tasmāt api dyubhva ādi āyatanam param brahma
na anumānam a tad śabdāt
yathā brahmaṇaḥ pratipādakaḥ vaiśeṣikaḥ hetuḥ uktaḥ na evam artha antarasya vaiśeṣikaḥ hetuḥ pratipādakaḥ sti iti āha
na anumānam sāṃkhya smṛti parikalpitam pradhānam iha dyubhvā ādi āyatana tvena pratipattavyam
kasmāt
a tad śabdāt
tasya acetanasya pradhānasya pratipādakaḥ śabdaḥ tad śabdaḥ na tad śabdaḥ a tad śabdaḥ
na hi atra acetanasya pradhānasya pratipādakaḥ kaścid śabdaḥ sti yena acetanam pradhānam kāraṇa tvena āyatana tvena vā avagamyeta
tad viparītasya cetanasya yaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarva vid ityādiḥ
atas eva na vāyuḥ api iha dyubhvā ādi āyatana tvena āśrīyate
prāṇabhṛt ca
yadi api prāṇabhṛtaḥ vijñāna ātmanaḥ ātma tvam cetana tvam ca saṃbhavati tathā api upādhi paricchinna jñānasya sarvajña tva ādi asaṃbhave sati asmāt eva a tad śabdāt prāṇabhṛt api na dyubhvā ādi āyatana tvena āśrayitavyaḥ
na ca upādhi paricchinnasya a vibhoḥ prāṇabhṛtaḥ dyubhu ādi āyatana tvam api samyak saṃbhavati
pṛthak yoga karaṇam uttara artham
kutas ca na prāṇabhṛt dyubhu ādi āyatana tvena āśrayitavyaḥ
bheda vyapadeśāt
bheda vyapadeśaḥ ca iha bhavati tam eva ekam jānatha ātmānam iti jñeya jñātṛ bhāvena
tatra prāṇabhṛt tāvat mumukṣu tvāt jñātā
pariśeṣāt ātma śabda vācyam brahma jñeyam dyu bhvā ādi āyatanam iti gamyate na prāṇabhṛt
kutas ca na prāṇabhṛt dyubhu ādi āyatana tvena āśrayitavyaḥ
prakaraṇāt
prakaraṇam ca idam paramātmanaḥ kasmin nu bhagavaḥ vijñāte sarvam idam vijñātam bhavati iti eka vijñānena sarva vijñāna apekṣaṇāt
paramātmani hi sarvātmake vijñāte sarvam idam vijñātam syāt na kevale prāṇabhṛti
kutas ca na prāṇabhṛt dyubhu ādi āyatana tvena āśrayitavyaḥ
sthiti adanābhyām ca
dyubhvā ādi āyatanam ca prakṛtya dvā suparṇā sayujā sakhāyau iti atra sthiti adane nirdiśyete
tayoḥ anyaḥ pippalam svādu atti iti karma phala aśanam
an aścan anyaḥ bhicākaśīti iti audāsīnyena avasthānam
tābhyām ca sthiti adanābhyām īśvara kṣetrajñau tatra gṛhyete
yadi ca īśvaraḥ dyubhvā ādi āyatana tvena vivakṣitaḥ tatas tasya prakṛtasya īśvarasya kṣetrajñāt pṛthak vacanam avakalpate
anyathā hi aprakṛta vacanam ākasmikam asaṃbaddham syāt
nanu tava api kṣetrajñasya īśvarāt pṛthak vacanam ākasmikam eva prasajyeta
na tasya avivakṣita tvāt
kṣetrajñaḥ hi kartṛ tvena bhoktṛ tvena ca pratiśarīram buddhi ādi upādhi saṃbaddhaḥ lokataḥ eva prasiddhaḥ na asau śrutyā tātparyeṇa vivakṣyate
īśvaraḥ tu prasiddha tvāt śrutyā tātparyeṇa vivakṣyate iti na tasya ākasmikam vacanam yuktam
guhām praviṣṭau ātmānau hi iti atra api etat darśitam dvā suparṇā iti asyām ṛci īśvara kṣetrajñau ucyete iti
yadā api paiṅgī upaniṣad kṛtena vyākhyānena asyām ṛci sattva kṣetrajñau ucyete tadā api na virodhaḥ kaścid
katham
prāṇabhṛt hi iha ghaṭa ādi chidra vat sattva ādi upādhi abhimāni tvena pratiśarīram gṛhyamāṇaḥ dyubhvā ādi āyatanam na bhavati iti pratiṣidhyate
yaḥ tu sarva śarīreṣu upādhibhiḥ vinā upalakṣyate paraḥ eva sa bhavati
yathā ghaṭa ādi chidrāṇi ghaṭa ādibhiḥ upādhibhiḥ vinā upalakṣyamāṇāni mahā ākāśe eva bhavanti tadvat prāṇabhṛtaḥ parasmāt anya tva anupapatteḥ pratiṣedhaḥ nā upapadyate
tasmāt sattva ādi upādhi abhimāninaḥ eva dyubhva ādi āyatana tva pratiṣedhaḥ
tasmāt param eva brahma dyubhvā ādi āyatanam
tat etat adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ dharma ukteḥ iti anena eva siddham
tasya eva hi bhūtayoni vākyasya madhye idam paṭhitam yasmin dyauḥ pṛthivī ca antarikṣam iti
prapañca artham tu punar upanyastam
bhūmā samprasādāt adhyupadeśāt
bhūma adhikaraṇam
idam samāmananti bhūmā tu eva vijijñāsitavyaḥ iti bhūmānam bhagavaḥ vijijñās SPs1In
iti
yatra na anyat paśyati na anyat śṛṇoti na anyat vijānāti sa bhūmā
atha yatra anyat paśyati anyat śṛṇoti anyat vijānāti tat alpam ityādi

hi iha puruṣavidham puruṣa itas
pratiṣṭhitam vede iti jāṭhara āgi abhiprāyeṇa idam ucyate tasya a prakṛta tvāt a saṃśabdita tvāt ca katham tarhi yat prakṛtam mūrdha ādi cubuka ateṣu puruṣa avayaveṣu puruṣavidha tvam kalpitam tad abhiprāyeṇa idam ucyate puruṣavidham puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhitam vede iti yathā vṛkṣe
śākhām pratiṣṭhitām paśyati iti tadvat athavā yaḥ prakṛtaḥ paramātmā adhyātmam adhidaivatam ca puruṣavidha tva upādhiḥ tasya yat kevalam sākṣi rūpam tad abhiprāyeṇa idam ucyate puruṣavidham puruṣa itas pratiṣṭhitam veda iti
ca paramātma parigrahe tad viṣayaḥ eva vaiśvāara śabdaḥ vartiṣyate viśvaḥ ca ayam araḥ ca iti viśveṣām vā ayam araḥ viśve vā arāḥ asya iti viśvāaraḥ paramātmā sarva ātma tvāt
viśvāaraḥ eva vaiśvāaraḥ taddhita uaya arthaḥ rākṣasa vāyasa ādi vat paramātma viṣayaḥ eva bhaviṣyati gārhapatya ādi kalpam prāṇa āhuti adhikaraṇa tvam ca sarva ātma tvāt upapadyate katham puas parameśvara parigrahe prādeśa mātra śrutiḥ upapadyate iti
tām vyākhyātum ārabhate abhivyakteḥ iti āśmarathyaḥ atimātrasya api parameśvarasya prādeśa mātra tvam abhivyakti nimittam syāt abhivyajyate kila prādeśa mātra parimāṇaḥ parameśvaraḥ upāsakāām kṛte pradeśa viśeṣeṣu vā hṛdaya ādiṣu upalabdhi sthāeṣu viśeṣeṇa abhivyajyate
atas parameśvare pi prādeśa mātra śrutiḥ abhivyakteḥ upapadyate iti āśmarathyaḥ ācāryaḥ ausmṛteḥ bādariḥ prādeśa mātra hṛdaya pratiṣṭhitea vā ayam prādeśa mātraḥ iti ucyate yathā prastha mitāḥ yavāḥ prasthāḥ
iti ucyate tadvat yadi api ca yaveṣu sva gatam eva parimāṇam prastha saṃbadhāt vyajyate ca iha parameśvara gatam kiṃcid parimāṇam asti yat hṛdaya saṃbadhāt
vyajyeta tathā api prayuktāyāḥ prādeśa mātra śruteḥ saṃbhavati yathā kathaṃcid ausmaraṇam iti ucyate vā ayam a prādeśa mātraḥ prādeśa mātra śruti arthavat tāyai evam parameśvare
prādeśa mātra śrutiḥ iti bādariḥ ācāryaḥ mayate ca eam asmi ātma ati ca eam parameśvaram asmi mūrdha cubuka atarāle jābālāḥ yaḥ eṣaḥ atas vyaktaḥ ātmā saḥ
vimukte pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti saḥ vimuktaḥ kasmin pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti varaṇāyām āsyām ca madhye pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti kā vai varaṇā kā ca āsi iti
tatra ca imām eva āsikām sarvāṇīdriya kṛtāi pāpāi vārayati iti sā varaṇā sarvāṇīdriya kṛtāi pāpāi āśayati iti sā āsī iti api
katamat ca asya sthāam bhavati iti bhruvoḥ ghrāṇasya ca yaḥ saṃdhiḥ saḥ eṣa dyu lokasya parasya ca saṃdhiḥ bhavati iti tasmāt upapaā parameśvare
prādeśa mātra śrutiḥ abhivimāa śrutiḥ pratyagātma tva abhiprāyā pratyagātma tayā sarvaiḥ prāṇibhiḥ abhivimīyate iti abhivimāaḥ abhigataḥ vā ayam pratyagātma tvāt vimāaḥ ca mā aviyogāt iti abhivimāaḥ abhivimimīte vā sarvam jagat kāraṇa tvāt
iti tasmāt parameśvaraḥ vaiśvāaraḥ iti siddham iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye prathama adhyāyasya dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ murat prathama udhyāyaḥ tṛtīyaḥ pādaḥ
sva śabdāt dyu bhū ādi adhikaraṇam idam śrūyate yasmin yauḥ pṛthivī cātarikṣam otam saha prāṇaiḥ ca sarvaiḥ tam eva ekam ātmā amayāḥ vācaḥ vimuñcatha amṛtasya eṣa setuḥ iti atra
yat etat kiṃcid avagamyate tat kim param brahma syāt āhosvit arthātaram iti saṃdihyate tatra arthātaram kim api āyatam syāt iti prāptam kasmāt amṛtasya eṣa setuḥ iti śravaṇāt pāravāhi loke setuḥ
prakhyātaḥ ca parasya brahmaṇaḥ pāravat tvam śakyam abhyupagatum iti śravaṇāt arthātare ca āyatae parigṛhyamāṇe smṛti prasiddham pradhāam parigrahītavyam tasya kāraṇa tvāt āyata a tva upapatteḥ śruti prasiddhaḥ vā
vāyuḥ syāt vāyuḥ vāva gautama tat sūtram vai gautama sūtreṇa ayam ca lokaḥ paraḥ ca lokaḥ sarvāṇi ca bhūtāi saṃdṛbdhāi bhavati iti vāyoḥ api
vidhāraṇa tva śravaṇāt śārīraḥ vā syāt tasya api bhoktṛ tvāt bhogyam prapañcam pratyāyata a tva upapatteḥ iti evam prāpte idam āha dyu bhū ādi āyatam iti dyauḥ ca bhūḥ ca dyu bhuvau dyu bhuvau ādī yasya tat idam
dyu bhū ādi yat etat asmin vākye dyauḥ pṛthivī atarikṣam maaḥ prāṇāḥ iti evamātmakam jagat tasya āyatam param brahma bhavitum arhati kutas sva śabdāt ātma śabdāt iti arthaḥ ātma śabdaḥ hi iha bhavati
tam eva ekam iti ātma śabdaḥ ca paramātma parigrahe samyak avakalpate ārthātara parigrahe kvacid ca śrūyate sa mūlāḥ somya imāḥ sarvāḥ prajāḥ sat āyataāḥ sat pratiṣṭhāḥ iti
sva śabdena eva ca iha purastāt upariṣṭāt ca brahma saṃkīrtyate puruṣaḥ eva idam viśvam karma tapaḥ brahma para amṛtam iti brahma eva idam amṛtam purastāt brahma paścāt brahma dakṣiṇatas ca uttareṇa iti ca tatra
tu āyata āyata avat bhāva śravaṇāt sarvam brahma iti ca sāma ādhikaraṇyāt yathā hi a eka ātmakaḥ vṛkṣaḥ śākhā skadhaḥ mūlam ca iti evam āārasaḥ vicitraḥ ātmā iti āśaṅkā saṃbhavati tām sa avadhāraṇam āha
tam eva ekam jāatha ātmāam iti etat uktam bhavati a kārya prapañca viśiṣṭaḥ vicitraḥ ātmā vijñeyaḥ kim tarhi avidyā kṛtam kārya prapañcam vidyayā pravilāpayataḥ tam eva ekam āyata abhūtam ātmāam jāatha ekarasam iti
yathā yasmin āste devadattaḥ tadā ayaḥ iti ukte devadattam devadattam vijñeya tvam upadiśyate vikāra aṛta abhisaṃdhasya ca apavādaḥ śrūyate mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyum āpoti yaḥ iha ā eva paśyati iti
sarvam brahma iti tu sāmāādhikaraṇyam prapañca vilāpa artham a ekarasa tā pratipāda artham sa yathā kṛtsaḥ rasa ghaaḥ eva evam vai areyam ātmā a taras bāhyaḥ kṛtsaḥ prajñā aghaaḥ eva iti ekarasa tā śravaṇāt
param brahma yat tu uktam setu śruteḥ setoḥ ca pāravat tva upapatteḥ brahmaṇā ūrtha atareṇa bhavitavyam iti atra ucyate vidhāraṇa tva mātram eva setu śrutyāḥ vivakṣyate a pāravat tva ādi hi mṛd dāru mayaḥ loke
setuḥ dṛṣṭaḥ iti atra api mṛd dāru mayaḥ eva setuḥ abhyupagamyate setu śabda arthaḥ api vidhāraṇa tva mātram eva setu śabda vyutpatteḥ aparaḥ āha tam eva ekam iti yat etat saṃkīrtitam ātma jñāam yat ca etat
ayā vācaḥ vimuñcatha iti tat atra amṛta tva sādhaa tvāt amṛtasya eṣa setuḥ iti setu śrutyā saṃkīrtyate tu tatra yat uktam setu śruteḥ brahmaṇā ṛtha atareṇa
bhavitavyam iti etat ayuktam mukta upasṛpya vyapadeśāt itas ca param eva brahma dyubhva ādi āyatam dṛśyate muktaiḥ upasṛpyam mukta upasṛpyam deha ādiṣu aātmasu aham asmi iti ātma buddhiḥ avidyā tatas tad pūjā ādau rāgaḥ tad paribhava ādau ca dveṣaḥ tad uccheda darśaāt bhayam
mohaḥ ca iti evam ayam aata bhedaḥ artha vrātaḥ saṃtataḥ sarveṣām pratyakṣaḥ tad viparyayeṇa avidyā rāga dveṣa ādi doṣa muktaiḥ upasṛpyam upagamyam etat iti prakṛtya vyapadeśaḥ bhavati katham bhidyate hṛdayagrathiḥ chidyate sarva saṃśayāḥ kṣīyate ca asya karmāṇi tasmin dṛṣṭe parāvare
iti uktvā bravīti tathā vidvāḥ āmarūpāt vimuktaḥ parātparam puruṣam upaiti divyam iti brahmaṇaḥ ca mukta upasṛpya tvam prasiddham śāstre yadā sarve pramucyate kāmāḥ hṛdi śritāḥ atha

kevale prāṇabhṛti kutas ca a prāṇabhṛt dyu bhū ādi āyata a tve āśrayitavyaḥ sthiti adaābhyām ca dyu bhū ādi āyataam ca prakṛtya dvā suparṇā sayujā sakhāyau iti atra sthiti adae tayoḥ ayaḥ pippalam
svādu atti iti iti tābhyām ca sthiti adaābhyām īśvara kṣetrajñau tatra gṛhyete yadi ca īśvaraḥ vivakṣitaḥ tatas tasya prakṛtasya īśvarasya kṣetrajñāt pṛthak vacaam avakalpate ayathā hi aprakṛta vacaam ākasmikam asaṃbaddham
syāt tava api kṣetrajñasya īśvarāt pṛthak vacaam ākasmikam eva prasajyeta a tasya avivakṣita tvāt kṣetrajñaḥ hi bhoktṛ tve ca pratiśarīram buddhi ādi upādhi saṃbaddhaḥ lokatas eva prasiddhaḥ āsau śrutyā tātparyeṇa
vivakṣyate īśvaraḥ tu lokataḥ prasiddha tvāt śrutyā tātparyeṇa vivakṣyate iti tasya ākasmikam yuktam guhām praviṣṭau ātma au hi iti atra api etat darśitam dvā suparṇāḥ iti asyām ṛci īśvara kṣetrajñau ucyete iti yadā api
vyākhyāeā asyām ṛci sattva kṣetrajñau ucyete tadā api a virodhaḥ kaścid katham prāṇabhṛt hi iha ghaṭa ādi chidra vat pratiśarīram gṛhyamāṇaḥ bhavati iti pratiṣidhyate yaḥ tu sarva śarīreṣu upādhibhiḥ bhavati iti pratiṣidhyate yaḥ tu sarva śarīreṣu upādhibhiḥ paraḥ eva
sa bhavati yathā ghaṭa ādi chidrāṇi ghaṭa ādibhiḥ upādhibhiḥ mahā ākāśaḥ eva bhavati tadvat prāṇabhṛtaḥ parasmāt aya tva aupapatteḥ pratiṣedhaḥ opapadyate tasmāt sattva ādi upādhi abhimāiaḥ eva dyu bhvā ādi āyataa tva pratiṣedhaḥ tasmāt param eva brahma dyu bhvā ādi āyataam tat etat
adṛśya tva ādi guṇakaḥ dharma ukteḥ siddham tasya eva hi bhūtayoi vākyasya madhye idam paṭhitam yasmin yauḥ pṛthivī cātarikṣam iti prapañca artham tu bhūmā samprasādāt adhyupadeśāt
bhūma adhikaraṇam idam samāmaati bhūmā tu eva vijijñāsitavyaḥ iti bhūmā aam bhagavaḥ vijijñāsa  yatra āyat paśyati āyat śṛṇoti āyat
sa bhūmā atha yatra ayat paśyati ayat śṛṇoti ayat tat alpam ityādi tatra saṃśayaḥ kim prāṇ

bahoḥ lopaḥ bhū ca bahoḥ iti bhūma śabdasya bhāva pratyaya anta tā smaraṇāt
kimātmakam punar tat bahu tvam iti viśeṣa ākāṅkṣāyām prāṇaḥ vai āśāyāḥ bhūyān iti saṃnidhānāt prāṇaḥ bhūmā iti pratibhāti
tathā śrutam hi eva me bhagavat dṛśebhyaḥ tarati śokam ātma vid iti
saḥ ham bhagavaḥ śocāmi tam mā bhagavān śokasya pāram tārayatu iti prakaraṇa utthānāt paramātmā bhūmā iti api pratibhāti

kim tāvat prāptam

bhūyas praśna prativacana paraṃparā darśanāt
yathā hi asti bhagavaḥ nāmnaḥ bhūyaḥ iti vāc vāva nāmnaḥ bhūyasī iti
tathā asti bhagavaḥ vācaḥ bhūyaḥ iti manaḥ vāva vācaḥ bhūyaḥ iti ca nāma ādibhyaḥ hi ā prāṇāt bhūyaḥ praśna prativacana pravāhaḥ pravṛttaḥ
na evam prāṇāt param bhūyaḥ praśna prativacanam dṛśyate asti bhagavaḥ prāṇāt bhūyaḥ iti adaḥ vāva prāṇāt bhūyaḥ iti
prāṇam eva tu nāma ādibhyaḥ āśā antebhyaḥ bhūyāṃsam prāṇaḥ vai āśāyāḥ bhūyān ityādinā sa prapañcam uktvā prāṇa darśinaḥ ca ativādi tvam ativādyasi iti ativādyasmi iti brūyāt na apahnuvīta iti abhyanujñāya eṣa tu vā ativadati yaḥ satyena ativadati iti prāṇa vratam ativādi tvam anukṛṣya a parityajya eva prāṇam satya ādi paraṃparayā bhūmānam avatārayan prāṇam eva bhūmānam manyate iti gamyate
katham punar prāṇe bhūmani vyākhyāyamāne yatra na anyat paśyati iti etat bhūmnaḥ lakṣaṇa param vacanam vyākhyāyeta iti ucyate suṣupta avasthāyām prāṇa grasteṣu karaṇeṣu darśana ādi vyavahāra nivṛtti darśanāt saṃbhavati prāṇasya api yatra na anyat paśyati iti etat lakṣaṇam
tathā ca śrutiḥ na śrṛṇoti na paśyati ityādinā sarva karaṇa vyāpāra prati astamaya rūpām suṣupti avasthām uktvā prāṇa agnayaḥ eva etasmin pure jāgrati iti tasyām eva avasthāyām pañca vṛtteḥ prāṇasya jāgaraṇam bruvatī prāṇa pradhānām suṣupti avasthām darśayati
yat ca etat bhūmnaḥ sukha tvam śrutam yaḥ vai bhūmā tat sukham iti tat api aviruddham
atra eṣa devaḥ svapnāt na paśyati atha yat etasmin śarīre sukham bhavati iti suṣupti avasthāyām eva sukha śravaṇāt
yat ca yaḥ vai bhūmā tat amṛtam iti tat api prāṇasya a viruddham
prāṇaḥ vai amṛtam iti śruteḥ
katham punar prāṇam bhūmānam manyamānasya tarati śokam ātma vid iti ātma vividiṣayā prakaraṇasya utthānam upapadyate
prāṇaḥ eva iha ātmā vivakṣitaḥ iti brūmaḥ
tathā hi prāṇaḥ ha pitā prāṇaḥ mātā prāṇaḥ bhrātā prāṇaḥ svasā prāṇaḥ ācāryaḥ prāṇaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ iti prāṇam eva sarva ātmānam karoti yathā vai arāḥ nābhau samarpitāḥ evam asmin prāṇe sarvam samarpitam iti ca
sarva ātma tva aranābhi nidarśanābhyām ca saṃbhavati vaipulya ātmikā bhūma rūpa tā prāṇasya
tasmāt prāṇaḥ bhūmā iti evam prāptam
tatas idam ucyate paramātmā eva iha bhūmā bhavitum arhati na prāṇaḥ
