hi parameśvaraḥ balāt iṣkraṣṭum śakyaḥ tatra saṃsārī saḥ eva iha api iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ paramātmā eva ayam aṅguṣṭha mātra parimitaḥ puruṣaḥ bhavitum arhati kasmāt śabdāt
īśāaḥ bhūta bhavyasya iti a hi ayaḥ parameśvarāt bhūta bhavyasya iḥ aṅkuśam īśitā etat vai tat iti ca prakṛtam pṛṣṭam iha ausaṃdadhāti etat vai tat yat pṛṣṭam brahma iti arthaḥ pṛṣṭam ca iha brahma
ayatra dharmāt ayatra adharmāt ayatra asmāt kṛta akṛtāt ayatra bhūtāt ca bhavyāt ca yat tat paśyasi tadvat vaḥ iti śabdāt eva iti abhidhā aśruteḥ eva iti parameśvaraḥ uvagamyate iti arthaḥ katham puas sarva gatasya paramātmaaḥ parimāṇa upadeśaḥ iti atra
brūmaḥ hṛdi apekṣayā tu mauṣya adhikāra tvāt sarvagatasya api paramātmanaḥ hṛdaya ivasthā am apekṣya aṅguṣṭha mātra tvam idam ucyate ākāśasya iva vaṃśa parva apekṣam arati mātra tvam hi añjasā atimātrasya paramātmanaḥ oṅguṣṭha mātra tvam upapadyate a ca ayaḥ paramātmanaḥ iha grahaṇam arhati īśā a śabda ādibhyaḥ
iti uktam prati prāṇi bhedam hṛdayāām a avasthita tvāt tad apekṣam api aṅguṣṭha mātra tvam upapadyate iti atas uttaram ucyate mauṣya adhikāra tvāt iti śāstram hi aviśeṣa pravṛttam api mauṣyāḥ eva adhikaroti śakta tvāt arthi tvāt a paryudasta tvāt upaaya ādi śāstrāt ca iti varṇitam etat adhikāra lakṣaṇe mauṣyāṇām ca iyata parimāṇaḥ
kāyaḥ iyata parimāṇam eva ca eṣām aṅguṣṭha mātram hṛdayam atas mauṣya adhikāra tvāt śāstrasya mauṣya hṛdaya avasthā āpekṣam aṅguṣṭha mātra tvam upapaam yat api uktam parimāṇa upadeśāt smṛteḥ ca saṃsārī eva ayam aṅguṣṭha mātraḥ pratyetavyaḥ iti tat pratyucyate saḥ ātmā tattvam asi ityādi vat
saṃsāriṇaḥ eva sataḥ uṅguṣṭha mātrasya brahma tvam idam upadiśyate iti dvi rūpā hi pravṛttiḥ kvacid paramātma svarūpaiḥ ūpaṇa parā kvacid paramātma ekatva upadeśa parā tat atra paramātma aikatvam upadiśyate āṅguṣṭha mātra tvam kasyacid etam eva artham pareṇa sphuṭīkariṣyati
aṅguṣṭha mātraḥ puruṣotarātmā sadā hṛdaye saṃiviṣṭaḥ tam svāt śarīrāt pravṛhe muñja ādi veṣīkām dhairyeṇa tam vidyāt śukram amṛtam iti tad upari api bādarāyaṇaḥ saṃbhavāt devatā adhikaraṇam aṅguṣṭha mātra śrutiḥ mauṣya hṛdaya apekṣā mauṣya adhikāra tvāt śāstrasya iti
uktam ucyate bāḍham mauṣyāḥ adhikaroti śāstram a tu mauṣyāḥ eva iti iha teṣām mauṣyāṇām upariṣṭāt ye deva ādayaḥ tāḥ api adhikaroti śāstram iti bādarāyaṇaḥ ācāryaḥ
kasmāt saṃbhavāt saṃbhavati hi teṣām api arthi tva ādi adhikāra kāraṇam tatra arthi tvam deva ādīām api saṃbhavati tathā sāmarthyam api teṣām saṃbhavati matra arthavāda itihāsa purāṇa lokebhyaḥ vigrahavat tva ādi avagamāt ca teṣām
kaścid pratiṣedhaḥ asti ca upaaya a śāstreṇa eṣām adhikāraḥ upaaya asya veda adhyaya artha tvāt teṣām ca svayam pratibhāta veda tvāt api ca eṣām vidyā grahaṇa artham brahmacarya ādi darśayati ekaśatam ha vai varṣāṇi maghavā prajāpatau brahmacaryam uvāsa
bhṛguḥ vai vāruṇiḥ varuṇam pitaram upasasāra adhīhi bhagavaḥ brahma ityādi yat api karmasu a adhikāra kāraṇam uktam a devānām devatātara abhāvāt iti a ṛṣīṇām iti
tad vidyāsu asti a hi idra ādīām vidyāsu adhikriyamāṇāām kiṃcid kṛtyam asti ca bhṛgu ādīām bhṛgu ādi sagotra tayā tasmāt deva ādīām api vidyāsu adhikāraḥ
vāryate deva ādi adhikāre pi aṅguṣṭha mātra śrutiḥ sva aṅguṣṭha apekṣayā virudhyeta virodhaḥ karmaṇi iti syāt etat yadi vigrahavat tva ādi abhyupagame deva ādīām vidyāsu adhikāraḥ varṇyeta vigrahavat tvāt ṛtvij ādi vadidra ādīām api svarūpa saṃidhāea
karma aṅga bhāvaḥ abhyupagamyeta tadā ca virodhaḥ karmaṇi syāt yāga aṅga bhāvaḥ dṛśyate ca saṃbhavati bahuṣu yāgeṣu yugapad ekasya idrasya sva rūpa saṃidhā upapatteḥ iti ced āyam asti
virodhaḥ kasmāt a eka pratipatteḥ ekasya api yugapad a eka svarūpa pratipattiḥ saṃbhavati katham etat avagamyate darśaāt tathā hi kati devāḥ iti upakramya trayaḥ ca trī ca śatā trayaḥ ca trī ca sahasrā
iti katame te iti asyām pṛcchāyām eva eṣām ete trayastriṃśat tu eva devāḥ iti bruvatī śrutiḥ ekaikasya devatā ātmanaḥ yugapad eka rūpatām darśayati tathā trayastriṃśatā api ṣaṣ ādi atarbhāva krameṇa
katamaḥ ekaḥ devaḥ iti prāṇaḥ iti prāṇa eka rūpa tām darśayatī tasya eva ekasya prāṇasya yugapad a eka rūpa tām darśayati tathā smṛtiḥ api vai śarīrāṇi
bharata ṛṣabha yogī kuryāt balam prāpya taiḥ ca sarvaiḥ mahīm caret prāpuyāt viṣaya a kaiścid kaiścid ugram tapaḥ caret saṃkṣipet ca sūryaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakā prāpta aṇima ādi aiśvaryāṇām yogiām api darśayati kimu
devāām a eka rūpa pratipatti saṃbhavāt ca ekaikā devatā bahubhiḥ rūpaiḥ ātmānam pravibhajya bahuṣu yāgeṣu yugapad aṅga bhāvam gacchati iti paraiḥ ca dṛśyate a tardhā ādi śakti yogāt iti upapadyate a eka pratipatteḥ darśaāt iti asya aparā vyākhyā vigrahavatām api
pratipattiḥ dṛśyate kvacid ekaḥ api gacchati yathā bahubhiḥ bhojayadbhiḥ aikaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ yugapad bhojyate kvacid ca ekaḥ api vigraha vāh ekatra yugapad aṅga bhāvam gacchati yathā bahubhiḥ amaskurvāṇaiḥ ekaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ yugapad bhojyate kvacid ca ekaḥ api vigraha vāh ekatra yugapad aṅga bhāvam gacchati yathā bahubhiḥ amaskurvāṇaiḥ ekaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ yugapad amaskriyate
tadvat iha uddeśa parityāga ātmaka tvāt yāgasya vigrahavatīm api ekām devatām uddiśya bahavaḥ svam svam dravyam yugapad parityakṣyati iti vigrahavat tve pi devāām kiṃcid karmaṇi virudhyate śabdaḥ iti ce ā atas prabhavāt pratyakṣa auma ābhyām
vigrahavat tve karmaṇi kaścid virodhaḥ śabde tu virodhaḥ prasajyeta katham autpattikam hi āśritya aapekṣa tvāt
iti vedasya prāmāṇyam sthāpitam idāīm tu vigrahavatī yadi api aiśvarya yogāt havīṃṣi bhuñjīta tathā api vigraha yogāt asmat ādi vat sā iti iti asya
śabdasya yat vaidike śabde prāmāṇyam sthitam tasya virodhaḥ syāt iti ced ayam api asti virodhaḥ kasmāt
atas prabhavāt atas eva hi vaidikāt śabdāt deva ādikam jagat prabhavati asya yatas iti atra brahma prabhava tvam jagataḥ katham
iha śabda prabhava tvam ucyate api ca vaidikāt śabdāt asya katham etāvatā virodhaḥ śabde parihṛtaḥ yāvatā vasavaḥ rudrāḥ ādityāḥ
viśvedevāḥ marutaḥ iti ete rthāḥ aityāḥ eva utpattimat tvāt tat aitya tve ca tad vāciām vaidikāām vasu ādi śabdāām aitya tvam prasiddham hi loke
devadattasya putraḥ yajñadattaḥ iti tasya kriyate iti tasmāt virodhaḥ eva śabdaḥ iti ced a go ādi śabda artha a hi
utpattimat tve tad ākṛtīām api utpattimat tvam syāt dravya guṇa karmaṇām hi vyaktayaḥ eva utpadyate ākṛtayaḥ ākṛtibhiḥ ca śabdāām saṃbadhaḥ a vyaktibhiḥ vyaktīām āatyāt saṃbadha grahaṇa a upapatteḥ vyaktiṣu utpadyamāāsu
api gavādi śabdeṣu kaścid virodhaḥ dṛśyate tathā deva ādi vyakti prabhava abhyupagame pi ākṛti itya tvāt kaścid vasu ādi śabdeṣu virodhaḥ iti draṣṭavyam ākṛti viśeṣaḥ tu
matra arthavāda ādibhyaḥ vigrahavat tva ādi avagamāt avagatavyaḥ vā idra ādi śabdāḥ tatas ca yaḥ yaḥ tat tad sthāam adhitiṣṭhati sa saḥ idra ādi śabdaiḥ abhidhīyate iti abhidhāna
doṣaḥ bhavati ca idam śabda prabhava tvam brahma prabhava tva vat upādā kāraṇatva abhiprāyeṇa ucyate katham tarhi śabde śabda vyavahāra yogya artha vyakti iṣpattiḥ atas prabhavaḥ iti ucyate katham
avagamyate śabdāt prabhavati jagat iti pratyakṣa aumāābhyām pratyakṣam hi śrutiḥ prāmāṇyam prati aapekṣa tvāt smṛtiḥ prāmāṇyam prati sāpekṣa tvāt te hi śabda pūrvām sṛṣṭim
darśayataḥ ete iti vai prajāpatiḥ devāḥ asṛjata asṛgram iti mauṣyāḥ idavaḥ iti pitṛm stiraḥ pavitram iti grahāḥ āśavaḥ iti stotram viśvāḥ iti śastram
abhisaubhaga iti ayāḥ prajāḥ iti śrutiḥ tathā yatra api sa maasā vācam mithuam samabhavat ityādiā tatra tatra śabda pūrvikā sṛṣṭiḥ śrāvyate smṛtiḥ api
ityā vāc utsṛṣṭā svayaṃbhuvā ādau veda mayī divyā yatas sarvāḥ pravṛttayaḥ iti utsarga upi ayam vācaḥ saṃpradāya pravarta ātmakaḥ draṣṭavyaḥ a yādṛśasya utsargasya asaṃbhavāt tathā āma rūpam
ca bhūtāām karmaṇām ca veda śabdebhyaḥ eva ādau sa maheśvaraḥ iti sarveṣām tu karmāṇi ca pṛthak pṛthak veda śabdebhyaḥ
eva ādau pṛthak saṃsthāḥ ca iti ca api ca cikīrṣitam artham tasya vācakam śabdam pūrvam smṛtvā paścāt tam artham
autiṣṭhati iti sarveṣām aḥ pratyakṣam etat tathā prajāpateḥ api sraṣṭuḥ sṛṣṭeḥ pūrvam vaidikāḥ śabdāḥ maasi prādurbabhūvuḥ paścāt tad augatāḥ sasarja iti gamyate
tathā ca śrutiḥ sa bhūḥ iti vyāharat sa bhūmim asṛjata iti evamādikā bhūḥ ādi śabdebhyaḥ eva maasi prādurbhūtebhyaḥ bhūḥ ādi lokā sṛṣṭā darśayati kimātmakam
śabdam abhipretya idam śabda prabhava tvam ucyate sphoṭam iti āha varṇa pakṣe hi śabdebhyaḥ deva ādi vyaktīām prabhavaḥ iti aupapam syāt varṇāḥ pratyuccāraṇam ayathā ca ayathā ca
pratīyamāa tvāt tathā hi devadattaḥ yat adhīte yajñadattaḥ yat adhīte iti ca ayam varṇa viṣayaḥ yathātva pratyayaḥ bādhaka pratyaya abhāvāt ca varṇebhyaḥ ṛtha avagatiḥ yuktāḥ hi ekaikaḥ varṇa ṛtham
pratyāyayet vyabhicārāt ca varṇa samudāya pratyayaḥ asti krama varti tvāt varṇānām varṇa ūrtham pratyāyayiṣyati iti yadi ucyeta hi śabdaḥ svayam pratīyamānaḥ artham pratyāyayet dhūma ādi vat ca
pūrva pūrva varṇa aubhava jaita saṃskāra sahitasya ati avarṇasya pratītiḥ asti apratyakṣa tvāt saṃskārāṇām kārya pratyāyitaiḥ saṃskāraiḥ varṇa ūrtham pratyāyayiṣyati iti ced a saṃskāra kāryasya api smaraṇasya krama varti tvāt tasmāt sphoṭaḥ eva śabdaḥ sa ca ekaika varṇa pratyaya āhita saṃskāra bīja itya varṇa pratyaya jaita paripāke pratyayi yeka pratyaya viṣaya tayā jhaṭiti
pratyavabhāsate ca ayam eka pratyayaḥ varṇa viṣayā smṛtiḥ tasya ca pratyuccāraṇam bheda pratyayasya varṇa viṣaya tvāt tasmāityāt śabdāt sphoṭa rūpāt abhidhāyakāt kriyā kāraka phala lakṣaṇam jagat abhidheya bhūtam prabhavati iti varṇā

text1:
atyaya āhita saṃskāra bīje ntya varṇa pratyaya janita paripāke pratyayini eka pratyaya viṣaya tayā jhaṭiti pratyavabhāsate
na ca ayam eka pratyayaḥ varṇa viṣayā smṛtiḥ
text2:
atyaya āhita saṃskāra bīja itya varṇa pratyaya jaita paripāke pratyayi yeka pratyaya viṣaya tayā jhaṭiti
pratyavabhāsate ca ayam eka pratyayaḥ varṇa viṣayā smṛtiḥ

text1:
am bheda pratyayasya varṇa viṣaya tvāt
tasmāt nityāt śabdāt sphoṭa rūpāt abhidhāyakāt kriyā kāraka phala lakṣaṇam jagat abhidheya bhūtam prabhavati iti
varṇāḥ eva tu śabdaḥ iti bhagavān upavarṣaḥ
nanu utpanna pradhvaṃsi tvam varṇānām uktam
tat na te eva iti pratyabhijñānāt
sādṛśyāt pratyabhijñānam keśa ādiṣu iva iti ced na
pratyabhijñānasya pramāṇa antareṇa bādhā anupapatteḥ
pratyabhijñānam ākṛti nimittam iti ced na
vyakti pratyabhijñānāt
yadi hi pratyuccāraṇam gava ādi vyakti vat anyāḥ anyāḥ varṇa vyaktayaḥ pratīyeran tatas ākṛti nimittam pratyabhijñānam syāt
na tu etat asti
varṇa vyaktayaḥ eva hi pratyuccāraṇam pratyabhijñāyante
dvis go śabdaḥ uccāritaḥ iti hi pratipattiḥ
na tu dvau go śabdau iti
nanu varṇāḥ api uccāraṇa bhedena bhinnāḥ pratīyante devadatta yajñadattayoḥ adhyayana dhvani śravaṇāt eva bheda pratīteḥ iti uktam
atra abhidhīyate sati varṇa viṣaye niścite pratyabhijñāne saṃyoga vibhāga abhivyaṅgya tvāt varṇānām abhivyañjaka vaicitrya nimittaḥ yam varṇa viṣayaḥ vicitraḥ pratyayaḥ na svarūpa nimittaḥ
api ca varṇa vyakti bheda vādinā api pratyabhijñāna siddhaye varṇa ākṛtayaḥ kalpayitavyāḥ
tāsu ca para upādhikaḥ bheda pratyayaḥ iti abhyupagantavyam
tat varam varṇa vyaktiṣu eva para upādhikaḥ bheda pratyayaḥ svarūpa nimittam ca pratyabhijñānam iti kalpanā lāghavam
eṣaḥ eva ca varṇa viṣayasya bheda pratyayasya bādhakaḥ pratyayaḥ yat pratyabhijñānam
katham hi ekasmin kāle bahūnām uccārayatām ekaḥ eva san gakāraḥ yugapad aneka rūpaḥ syāt udāttaḥ ca anudāttaḥ ca svaritaḥ ca sa anunāsikaḥ ca niranunāsikaḥ ca iti
atha vā dhvani kṛtaḥ yam bheda pratyayaḥ na varṇa kṛtaḥ iti adoṣaḥ
kaḥ punar ayam dhvaniḥ nāma
yaḥ dūrāt ākarṇayataḥ varṇa vivekam a pratipadyamānasya karṇa patham avatarati
pratyāsīta atas ca paṭu mṛdu tva ādi bhedam varṇeṣu āsañjayati
tad nibandhanāḥ ca udātta ādayaḥ viśeṣāḥ na varṇa svarūpa nibandhanāḥ varṇānām pratyuccāraṇam pratyabhijñāyamāna tvāt
evam ca sati sa ālambanāḥ eva ete udātta ādi pratyayāḥ bhaviṣyanti
itarathā hi varṇānām pratyabhijñāyamānānām nirbheda tvāt saṃyoga vibhāga kṛtāḥ udātta ādi viśeṣāḥ kalpyeran
saṃyoga vibhāgānām ca apratyakṣa tvāt na tad āśrayāḥ viśeṣāḥ varṇeṣu adhyavasātum śakyante iti atas nirālambanāḥ eva ete udātta ādi pratyayāḥ syuḥ
api ca na eva etat abhiniveṣṭavyam udātta ādi bhedena varṇānām pratyabhijñāyamānānām bhedaḥ bhavet iti
na hi anyasya bhedena anyasya a bhidyamānasya bhedaḥ bhavitum arhati
na hi vyakti bhedena jātim bhinnām manyante
varṇebhyaḥ ca artha pratīteḥ saṃbhavāt sphoṭa kalpanā anarthikā
na kalpayāmi aham sphoṭam pratyakṣam eva tu enam avagacchāmi ekaika varṇa grahaṇa āhita saṃskārāyāḥ buddhau jhaṭiti pratyavabhāsanāt iti ced na
asyāḥ api buddheḥ varṇa viṣaya tvāt
ekaika varṇa grahaṇa uttara kālā hi iyam ekā buddhiḥ gauḥ iti samasta varṇa viṣayā na artha antara viṣayā
katham etat avagamyate
yatas syām api buddhau gakāra ādayaḥ varṇāḥ anuvartante na tu dakāra ādayaḥ
yadi hi asyāḥ buddheḥ gakāra ādibhyaḥ rtha antaram sphoṭaḥ viṣayaḥ syāt tatas dakāra ādayaḥ iva gakāra ādayaḥ pi asyāḥ buddheḥ vyāvarteran
na tu tathā asti
tasmāt iyam eka buddhiḥ varṇa viṣayā eva smṛtiḥ
nanu aneka tvāt varṇānām na eka buddhi viṣaya tā upapadyate iti uktam tat prati brūmaḥ saṃbhavati anekasya api eka buddhi viṣaya tvam paṅktiḥ vanam senā daśa śatam sahasram ityādi darśanāt
yā tu gauḥ iti ekaḥ yam śabdaḥ iti buddhiḥ sā bahuṣu eva varṇeṣu eka artha avaccheda nibandhanā aupacārikī vana senā ādi buddhi vat eva
atra āha yadi varṇāḥ eva sāmastyena eka buddhi viṣaya tām āpadyamānāḥ padam syuḥ tatas jārāḥ rājā kapiḥ pikaḥ ityādiṣu pada viśeṣa pratipattiḥ na syāt
te eva hi varṇāḥ itaratra itaratra ca pratyavabhāsante iti
atra vadāmaḥ sati api samasta varṇa pratyavamarśe yathā krama anurodhinyaḥ eva pipīlikāḥ paṅkti buddhim ārohanti evam krama anurodhinaḥ eva hi varṇāḥ pada buddhim ārokṣyanti
tatra varṇānām aviśeṣe pi krama viśeṣa kṛtā pada viśeṣa pratipattiḥ na virudhyate
vṛddha vyavahāre ca ime varṇāḥ krama ādi anugṛhītāḥ gṛhīta artha viśeṣa saṃbandhāḥ santaḥ sva vyavahāre pi ekaika varṇa grahaṇa anantaram samasta pratyavamarśinyām buddhau tādṛśāḥ eva pratyavabhāsamānāḥ tam tam artham avyabhicāreṇa pratyāyayiṣyanti iti varṇa vādinaḥ laghīyasī kalpanā
sphoṭa vādinaḥ tu dṛṣṭa hāniḥ adṛṣṭa kalpanā ca
varṇāḥ ca ime krameṇa gṛhyamāṇāḥ sphoṭam vyañjayanti sa sphoṭaḥ rtham vyanakti iti garīyasī kalpanā syāt
atha api nāma pratyuccāraṇam anye nye varṇāḥ syuḥ tathā api pratyabhijñā ālambana bhāvena varṇa sāmānyānām avaśya abhyupagantavya tvāt varṇeṣu artha pratipādana prakriyā racitā sā sāmānyeṣu saṃcārayitavyā
tatas ca nityebhyaḥ śabdebhyaḥ deva ādi vyaktīnām prabhavaḥ iti aviruddham
atas eva ca nitya tvam
kartuḥ asmaraṇāt iti sthite vedasya nitya tve deva ādi vyakti prabhava abhyupagamena tasya virodham āśaṅkya atas prabhavāt iti parihṛtya idānīm tat eva veda nitya tvam sthitam draḍhayati atas eva ca nitya tvam iti
atas eva niyata ākṛteḥ deva ādeḥ jagataḥ veda śabda prabhava tvāt veda śabda nitya tvam api pratyetavyam
tathā ca mantravarṇaḥ yajñena vācaḥ padavīyam āyan tām anvavindan ṛṣiṣu praviṣṭām iti sthitām eva vācam anuvinnām darśayati
vedavyāsaḥ ca evam eva smarati yuga ante ntarhitān vedān sa itihāsān mahā ṛṣayaḥ
lebhire tapasā pūrvam anujñātāḥ svayaṃbhuvā iti
samāna nāma rūpa tvāt ca avṛttau api avirodhaḥ darśanāt smṛteḥ ca
atha api syāt yadi paśu ādi vyakti vat deva ādi vyaktayaḥ api saṃtatya evā utpadyeran nirudhyeran ca tatas bhidhāna abhidheya abhidhātṛ vyavahāra avicchedāt saṃbandha nitya tvena virodhaḥ śabde parihriyeta
yadā tu khalu sakalam trailokyam parityakta nāma rūpam nirlepam pralīyate prabhavati ca abhinavam iti śruti smṛti vādāḥ vadanti tadā katham avirodhaḥ iti
tatra idam abhidhīyate samāna nāma rūpa tvāt iti
tadā api saṃsārasya anādi tvam tāvat abhyupagantavyam
pratipādayiṣyati ca ācāryaḥ saṃsārasya anādi tvam upapadyate ca api upalabhyate ca iti
anādau ca saṃsāre yathā svāpa prabodhayoḥ pralaya prabhava śravaṇe pi pūrva prabodha vat uttara prabodhe vyavahārāt na kaścid virodhaḥ evam kalpa antara prabhava pralayayoḥ api iti draṣṭavyam
svāpa prabodhayoḥ ca pralaya prabhavau śrūyete yadā suptaḥ svapnam na kaṃcana paśyati atha asmin prāṇaḥ eva ekadhā bhavati tadā enam vāc sarvaiḥ nāmabhiḥ saha api eti cakṣuḥ sarvaiḥ rūpaiḥ saha apyeti śrotram sarvaiḥ śabdaiḥ saha apyeti manaḥ sarvaiḥ dhyānaiḥ saha apyeti sa yadā pratibudhyate yathā agneḥ jvalataḥ sarvāḥ diśaḥ visphuliṅgāḥ vipratiṣṭheran evam eva etasmāt ātmanaḥ sarve prāṇāḥ yathāyatanam vipratiṣṭhante prāṇe
syāt etat svāpe puruṣa antara vyavahāra avicchedāt svayam ca suṣupta prabuddhasya pūrva prabodha vyavahāra anusaṃdhāna saṃbhavāt aviruddham
mahāpralaye tu sarva vyavahāra ucchedāt janma antara vyavahāra vat ca kalpa antara vyavahārasya anusaṃdhātum aśakya tvāt vaiṣamyam iti
na eṣa doṣaḥ sati api sarva vyavahāra ucchedini mahāpralaye parameśvara anugrahāt īśvarāṇām hiraṇyagarbha ādīnām kalpa antara vyavahāra anusaṃdhāna upapatteḥ
yadi api prākṛtāḥ prāṇinaḥ na janma antara vyavahāram anusaṃdadhānāḥ dṛśyante iti tathā api na tat prākṛta vat īśvarāṇām bhavitavyam
yathā hi prāṇi tva aviśeṣe manuṣya ādi stamba paryanteṣu jñāna aiśvarya ādi pratibandhaḥ pareṇa pareṇa bhūyān bhavan dṛśyate
tathā manuṣya ādiṣu eva hiraṇyagarbha paryanteṣu jñāna aiśvarya ādi abhivyaktiḥ api pareṇa pareṇa bhūyasī bhavati iti etat śruti smṛti vādeṣu asakṛt eva anukalpa ādau prādurbhavatām pāramaiśvaryam śrūyamāṇam na śakyam na asti iti vaditum
tatas ca atīta kalpa anuṣṭhita prakṛṣṭa jñāna karmaṇām īśvarāṇām hiraṇyagarbha ādīnām vartamāna kalpa ādau prādurbhavatām parameśvara anugṛhītānām supta pratibuddha vat kalpa antara vyavahāra anusaṃdhāna upapattiḥ
tathā ca śrutiḥ yaḥ brahmāṇam vidadhāti pūrvam yaḥ vai vaidān ca prahiṇoti tasmai
devam ātma buddhi prakāśam mumukṣuḥ vai śaraṇam aham prapadye iti
smaranti ca śaunaka ādayaḥ madhucchandaḥ prabhṛtibhiḥ ṛṣibhiḥ dāśatayyaḥ dṛṣṭāḥ iti
prativedam ca evam eva kāṇḍa ṛṣi ādayaḥ smaryante
śrutiḥ api ṛṣi jñāna pūrvakam eva mantreṇa anuṣṭhānam darśayati yaḥ ha vai a vidita ārṣeya chandaḥ daivata brāhmaṇena mantreṇa yājayati vā adhyāpayati vā sthāṇum varcchati gartam vā pratipadyate iti upakramya tasmāt etāni mantre mantre vidyāt iti
prāṇinām ca sukha prāptaye dharmaḥ vidhīyate
duḥkha parihārāya ca adharmaḥ pratiṣidhyate
dṛṣṭa ānuśravika sukha duḥkha viṣayau ca rāga dveṣau bhavataḥ na vilakṣaṇa viṣayau iti atas dharma adharma phala bhūta uttarottarā sṛṣṭiḥ niṣpadyamānā pūrva sṛṣṭi sadṛśī eva niṣpadyate
smṛtiḥ ca bhavati teṣām ye yāni karmāṇi prāk sṛṣṭyām pratipedire
tāni eva te prapadyante sṛjyamānāḥ punar punar
hiṃsra ahiṃsre mṛdu krūre dharma adharma āvṛta anṛte
tad bhāvitāḥ prapadyante tasmāt tat tasya rocate iti
pralīyamānam api ca idam jagat śakti avaśeṣam eva pralīyate
śakti mūlam eva ca prabhavati
itarathā ākasmika tva prasaṅgāt
na ca aneka ākārāḥ śaktayaḥ śakyāḥ kalpayitum
tatas ca vicchidya vicchidya api udbhavatām bhūḥ ādi loka pravāhāṇām deva tiryak manuṣya lakṣaṇānām ca prāṇi nikāya pravāhāṇām varṇa āśrama dharma phala vyavasthānām ca anādau saṃsāre niyata tvam indriya viṣaya saṃbandha niyata tva vat pratyetavyam
na hi indriya viṣaya saṃbandha ādeḥ vyavahārasya pratisargam anyathātvam ṣaṣṭha indriya viṣaya kalpam śakyam utprekṣitum
atas ca sarva kalpānām tulya vyavahāra tvāt kalpa antara vyavahāra anusaṃdhāna kṣama tvāt ca īśvarāṇām samāna nāma rūpāḥ eva pratisargam viśeṣāḥ prādurbhavanti
samāna nāma rūpa tvāt ca avṛttau api mahāsarga mahāpralaya lakṣaṇāyām jagataḥ bhyupagamyamānāyām na kaścid śabda prāmāṇya ādi virodhaḥ
samāna nāma rūpa tām ca śruti smṛtī darśayataḥ sūryācandramasau dhātā yathāpūrvam akalpayat
divam ca pṛthivīm ca antarikṣam atha u suvar iti
yathā pūrvasmin kalpe sūryācandramaḥ prabhṛti jagat klṛptam tathā asmin api kalpe kalpayat iti arthaḥ
tathā agniḥ vai akāmayata
anna ādaḥ devānām asyām iti
saḥ etam agnaye kṛttikābhyaḥ puroḍāśam aṣṭākapālam niravapat iti nakṣatreṣṭi vidhau yaḥ agniḥ niravapat yasmai vā agnaye niravapat tayoḥ samāna nāma rūpa tām darśayati iti evaṃjātīyakā śrutiḥ iha udāhartavyā
smṛtiḥ api ṛṣīṇām nāmadheyāni yāḥ ca vedeṣu dṛṣṭayaḥ
śarvarī ante prasūtānām tāni eva ebhyaḥ dadāti ajaḥ
yathā ṛtuṣu ṛtu liṅgāni nānā rūpāṇi paryaye
dṛśyante tāni tāni eva tathā bhāvāḥ yuga ādiṣu
yathā abhimāninaḥ tītāḥ tulyāḥ te sāṃprataiḥ iha
devāḥ devaiḥ atītaiḥ hi rūpaiḥ nāmabhiḥ eva ca iti evaṃjātīyakā draṣṭavyā
madhu ādiṣu asambhavāt anadhikāram jaiminiḥ
iha deva ādīnām api brahma vidyāyām asti adhikāraḥ iti yat pratijñātam tat paryāvartyate deva ādīnām anadhikāram jaiminiḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
kasmāt
madhu ādiṣu asaṃbhavāt
brahmavidyāyām adhikāra abhyupagame hi vidyā tva aviśeṣāt madhu ādi vidyāsu api adhikāraḥ bhyupagamyeta
na ca evam saṃbhavati
katham
asau vai ādityaḥ deva madhu iti atra manuṣyāḥ ādityam madhu adhyāsena upāsīran
deva ādiṣu hi upāsakeṣu abhyupagamyamāneṣu ādityaḥ katham anyam ādityam upāsīta
punar ca āditya vyapāśrayāṇi pañca rohita ādīni amṛtāni anukramya vasavaḥ rudrāḥ ādityāḥ marutaḥ sādhyāḥ ca pañca deva gaṇāḥ krameṇa tat tat amṛtam upajīvanti iti upadiśya sa yaḥ etat evam amṛtam veda vasūnām eva ekaḥ bhūtvā agninā eva mukhena etat eva amṛtam dṛṣṭvā tṛpyati iti ādinā vasu ādi upajīvyāni amṛtāni vijānatām vasu ādi mahima prāptim darśayati
vasu ādayaḥ tu kān anyān vasu ādīn amṛta upajīvinaḥ vijānīyuḥ
kam vā anyam vasu ādi mahimānam prepseyuḥ
tathā agniḥ pādaḥ vāyuḥ pādaḥ ādityaḥ pādaḥ diśaḥ pādaḥ vāyuḥ vā saṃvargaḥ ādityaḥ brahma iti ādeśaḥ ityādiṣu devatā ātma upāsaneṣu na teṣām eva devatā ātmanām adhikāraḥ saṃbhavati
tathā imām eva gautama bharadvājau ayam vai gautamaḥ yam bharadvājaḥ ityādiṣu api ṛṣi saṃbandheṣu upāsaneṣu na teṣām eva ṛṣīṇām adhikāraḥ saṃbhavati
kutas ca deva ādīnām anadhikāraḥ
jyotiṣi bhāvāt ca
yat idam jyotiḥ maṇ
text2:
am bheda pratyayasya varṇa viṣaya tvāt tasmāityāt śabdāt sphoṭa rūpāt abhidhāyakāt kriyā kāraka phala lakṣaṇam jagat abhidheya bhūtam prabhavati iti varṇāḥ eva tu śabdaḥ iti
bhagavān upavarṣaḥ te eva iti pratyabhijñāāt sādṛśyāt pratyabhijñāam keśa ādiṣu iva iti ced a pratyabhijñāasya pramāṇa atareṇa bādhā upapatteḥ pratyabhijñāam ākṛti nimittam iti ced a vyakti pratyabhijñāāt yadi hi
pratyuccāraṇam gavā ādi vyakti vat ayā ayā varṇa vyaktayaḥ pratīyera tatas ākṛti nimittam syāt tu etat asti varṇa vyaktayaḥ eva hi pratyuccāraṇam pratyabhijñāyate dvis go śabdaḥ uccāritaḥ iti hi
pratipattiḥ tu dvau go śabdau iti pratīyate devadatta yajñadattayoḥ eva bheda pratīteḥ iti uktam atra abhidhīyate sati varṇa viṣaye pratyabhijñāe
saṃyoga vibhāga abhivyaṅgya tvāt varṇāām abhivyañjaka vaicitrya aimittaḥ yam varṇa viṣayaḥ vicitraḥ pratyayaḥ svarūpa aimittaḥ api ca varṇa vyakti bheda vādi api pratyabhijñā asiddhaye varṇa ākṛtayaḥ kalpayitavyāḥ tāsu ca para upādhikaḥ bheda pratyayaḥ iti abhyupagatavyam
tat varam varṇa vyaktiṣu eva para upādhikaḥ bheda pratyayaḥ svarūpa aimittam ca pratyabhijñām iti kalpa ālāghavam eṣaḥ eva ca varṇa viṣayasya bheda pratyayasya bādhakaḥ pratyayaḥ yat pratyabhijñām katham
hi ekasmin kāle uccārayatām ekaḥ eva sa gakāraḥ yugapad a eka rūpaḥ syāt udāttaḥ ca audāttaḥ ca svaritaḥ ca sāuāsikaḥ ca
ca iti atha vā dhvai kṛtaḥ yam bheda pratyayaḥ varṇa kṛtaḥ iti adoṣaḥ kaḥ ayam yaḥ dūrāt ākarṇayataḥ varṇa vivekam a pratipadyamāna asya
karṇa patham avatarati ca paṭu mṛdu tva ādi bhedam varṇeṣu āsañjayati ca udātta ādayaḥ viśeṣāḥ varṇāām pratyuccāraṇam evam ca sati sa ālambaāḥ eva ete
udātta ādi pratyayā bhaviṣyati itarathā hi varṇāām pratyabhijñāyamāāām i r bheda tvāt saṃyoga vibhāga kṛtāḥ udātta ādi viśeṣāḥ kalpyera saṃyoga vibhāgāām ca apratyakṣa tvāt tad āśrayāḥ viśeṣāḥ varṇeṣu adhyavasātum śakyate iti atas eva ete
udātta ādi pratyayāḥ syuḥ api ca varṇāām pratyabhijñāyamānāām bhedaḥ bhavet iti a hi ayasya bhede a bhidyamānasya bhedaḥ bhavitum arhati a hi
vyakti bhede jātim varṇebhyaḥ ca artha pratīteḥ saṃbhavāt kalpayāmi aham sphoṭam pratyakṣam eva tu avagacchāmi ekaika varṇa grahaṇa āhita saṃskārāyāḥ buddhau jhaṭiti
pratyavabhāsaāt iti ced a asyāḥ api buddheḥ varṇa viṣaya tvāt ekaika varṇa grahaṇa uttara kālā hi iyam ekā buddhiḥ gauḥ iti samasta varṇa viṣayā ārthātara viṣayā katham etat avagamyate yatas
syām api buddhau gakāra ādayaḥ varṇāḥ a tu dakāra ādayaḥ yadi hi asyāḥ buddheḥ gakāra ādibhyaḥ sphoṭaḥ viṣayaḥ syāt tatas dakāra ādayaḥ
iva gakāra ādayaḥ pi asyāḥ buddheḥ vyāvartera tu tathā asti tasmāt iyam eka buddhiḥ varṇa viṣayā eva smṛtiḥ a eka tvāt varṇāām aika buddhi viṣaya tā upapadyate iti uktam
tat prati brūmaḥ saṃbhavati eka buddhi viṣaya tvam paṅktiḥ daśa śatam sahasram ityādi darśaāt yā tu gauḥ iti ekaḥ yam śabda
iti buddhiḥ sā bahuṣu eva varṇeṣu aupacārikī eva atra āha yadi varṇāḥ eva eka buddhi viṣaya tām padam syuḥ
jārāḥ rājā kapiḥ pikaḥ ityādiṣu pada viśeṣa pratipattiḥ syāt te eva hi varṇāḥ itaratra itaratra ca pratyavabhāsate iti atra vadāmaḥ sati api
samasta varṇa pratyavamarśe yathā eva pipīlikāḥ paṅkti buddhim ārohati evam eva hi varṇāḥ pada buddhim ārokṣyati tatra varṇāām aviśeṣe krama viśeṣa kṛtā pada viśeṣa pratipattiḥ
virudhyate vṛddha vyavahāre ca ime varṇāḥ sataḥ sva vyavahāre pi samasta pratyavamarśiyām buddhau tādṛśāḥ eva tam tam artham avyabhicāreṇa
pratyāyayiṣyati iti varṇa vādiḥ laghīyasī sphoṭa vādiḥ tu adṛṣṭa kalpaā ca varṇāḥ ca ime krameṇa gṛhyamāṇāḥ sphoṭam vyañjayati sa sphoṭaḥ rtham vyaakti iti garīyasī
syāt atha api pratyuccāraṇam aye ye varṇāḥ syuḥ tathā api varṇa sāmāyāām avaśya abhyupagatavya tvāt varṇeṣu artha pratipāda a prakriyā racitā sā sāmāyeṣu saṃcārayitavyā tatas
ca iti ebhyaḥ śabdebhyaḥ deva ādi vyaktīām prabhavaḥ iti aviruddham atas eva ca ityatvam kartuḥ asmaraṇāt iti sthite vedasya ityatve deva ādi vyakti prabhava abhyupagame tasya virodham āśaṅkya atas prabhavāt
iti parihṛtya idāīm tat eva veda aitya tvam sthitam draḍhayati atas eva ca itya tvam iti atas eva iyatā ākṛteḥ deva ādeḥ jagataḥ veda śabda prabhava tvāt veda śabda aitya tvam api pratyetavyam tathā ca matravarṇaḥ
vācaḥ padavīyam āyan tām avavida ṛṣiṣu praviṣṭām iti sthitām eva vācam auviām darśayati vedavyāsaḥ ca evam eva smarati lebhire tapasā svayaṃbhuvā iti ca avṛttau api
smṛteḥ ca atha api syāt yadi paśu ādi vyakti vat deva ādi vyaktayaḥ pi saṃtatya evā utpadyeraḥ irudhyeran ca tatas bhidhā ābhidheya abhidhātṛ vyavahāra avicchedāt virodhaḥ śabde parihriyeta yadā tu
khalu sakalam trailokyam parityakta āma rūpam pralīyate prabhavati iti śruti smṛti vādāḥ vadati tadā katham avirodhaḥ iti tatra idam abhidhīyate iti tadā api
saṃsārasya aādi tvam tāvat abhyupagatavyam pratipādayiṣyati ca ācāryaḥ saṃsārasya aādi tvam upapadyate ca api upalabhyate ca iti a ādau ca saṃsāre yathā svāpa prabodhayoḥ pralaya prabhava śravaṇe pi pūrva prabodha vat uttara prabodhe pi
kaścid virodhaḥ evam kalpa atara prabhava pralayayoḥ api iti draṣṭavyam svāpa prabodhayoḥ ca pralaya prabhavau śrūyete yadā suptaḥ svapam a kaṃcaa paśyati atha asmi prāṇa
eva ekadhā bhavati tadā eam vāc sarvaiḥ āmabhiḥ saha api eti cakṣuḥ sarvaiḥ rūpaiḥ saha apyeti śrotram sarvaiḥ śabdaiḥ saha apyeti maaḥ sarvaiḥ dhyāaiḥ saha apyeti sa yadā

viśeṣāḥ prādurbhavati mahāsarga mahāpralaya lakṣaṇāyām jagataḥ abhyupagamyamāāyām a kaścid śabda prāmāṇya ādi virodhaḥ samāaāma rūpatām ca śruti smṛtī darśayataḥ sūryācadramasau dhātā yathāpūrvam akalpayat divam ca pṛthivīm cātarikṣam atho suvar iti
yathā pūrvasmin kalpe jagat klṛptam tathā asmin api kalpe parameśvaraḥ akalpayat iti arthaḥ tathā agiḥ vai akāmayata devāḥ āsyām iti saḥ etam agaye kṛttikābhyaḥ puroḍāśam aṣṭākapālam iḥ avapat iti akṣatra iṣṭi vidhau
yogiḥ iḥ avapat yasmai vāgaye tayoḥ samāaāma rūpa tām darśayati iti evaṃjātīyakā śrutiḥ iha udāhartavyā smṛtiḥ api ṛṣīṇām yāḥ ca vedeṣu dṛṣṭayaḥ prasūtāḥ tāya iva ebhyaḥ dadāti ajaḥ yathā ṛtuṣu ṛtu liṅgāi
paryaye dṛśyate tathā bhāvāḥ yuga ādiṣu yathā tathā bhāvāḥ yuga ādiṣu yathā sāṃprataiḥ iha devāḥ devaiḥ atītaiḥ hi rūpaiḥ āmabhiḥ eva ca iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ draṣṭavyāḥ madhu ādiṣu asambhavāt aadhikāram jaimiiḥ iha deva ādīām api
brahmavidyāyām asti adhikāraḥ iti yat pratijñātam tat paryāvartyate kasmāt madhu ādiṣu asaṃbhavāt brahmavidyāyām adhikāra abhyupagame hi vidyā tva aviśeṣāt madhu ādi vidyāsu api adhikāraḥ abhyupagamyeta ca evam saṃbhavati katham asau vā
ādityaḥ deva madhu iti atra mauṣyāḥ ādityam madhu adhyāsena upāsīra deva ādiṣu hi upāsakeṣu abhyupagamyamāeṣu ādityaḥ katham ayam ādityam upāsīta vasavaḥ rudrāḥ ādityāḥ marutaḥ sādhyāḥ ca pañca deva gaṇāḥ krameṇa
tat tat amṛtam upajīvati iti upadiśya sa yaḥ etat evam amṛtam veda ekaḥ bhūtvā eva mukhena etat eva amṛtam dṛṣṭvā tṛpyati iti ādiā vasu ādi upajīvya amṛtāi vasu ādi mahima prāptim darśayati vasu ādayaḥ tu kā
kam vā ayam vasu ādi mahimā prepseyuḥ tathā agiḥ pādaḥ vāyuḥ pādaḥ ādityaḥ pādaḥ diśaḥ pādaḥ vāyuḥ vā saṃvargaḥ ādityaḥ brahma iti ādeśaḥ ityādiṣu devatā ātma upāsaeṣu anya
teṣām eva devatā ātmanām adhikāraḥ saṃbhavati tathā imām eva gautama bharadvājau ayam vai gautamaḥ yam bharadvājaḥ ityādiṣu api teṣām eva ṛṣīṇām adhikāraḥ saṃbhavati kutas ca jyotiṣi bhāvāt
ca yat idam jyotiḥ maṇ

text1:
raḥ saṃbhavati
tathā imām eva gautama bharadvājau ayam vai gautamaḥ yam bharadvājaḥ ityādiṣu api ṛṣi saṃbandheṣu upāsaneṣu na teṣām eva ṛṣīṇām adhikāraḥ saṃbhavati
kutas ca deva ādīnām anadhikāraḥ
jyotiṣi bhāvāt ca
yat idam jyotiḥ maṇḍalam dyu sthānam ahar rātrābhyām bambhramat jagat avabhāsayati tasmin āditya ādayaḥ devatā vacanāḥ śabdāḥ prayujyante
loka prasiddheḥ vākyaśeṣa prasiddheḥ ca
na ca jyotiḥ maṇḍalasya hṛdaya ādinā vigraheṇa cetanatayā arthi tva ādinā vā yogaḥ vagantum śakyate mṛd ādi vat acetana tva avagamāt
etena agni ādayaḥ vyākhyātāḥ
syāt etat mantra arthavāda itihāsa purāṇa lokebhyaḥ deva ādīnām vigrahavat tva ādi avagamāt ayam adoṣaḥ iti ced na iti ucyate
na tāvat lokaḥ nāma kiṃcid svatantram pramāṇam asti
pratyakṣa ādibhyaḥ eva avyabhicarita viṣayebhyaḥ pramāṇebhyaḥ prasiddhaḥ eva arthaḥ lokāt prasiddhaḥ iti ucyate
na ca atra pratyakṣa ādīnām anyatamam pramāṇam asti
itihāsa purāṇānām api pauruṣeya tvāt pramāṇa antara mūla tām ākāṅkṣati
arthavādāḥ api vidhinā eka vākya tvāt stuti arthāḥ santaḥ na pārthagarthyena deva ādīnām vigraha ādi sadbhāve kāraṇa bhāvam pratipadyante
mantrāḥ api śruti ādi viniyuktāḥ prayoga samavāyinaḥ bhidhāna arthāḥ na kasyacid arthasya pramāṇam iti ācakṣate
tasmāt abhāvaḥ deva ādīnām adhikārasya
bhāvam tu bādarāyaṇaḥ sti hi
tu śabdaḥ pūrvapakṣam vyāvartayati
bādarāyaṇaḥ tu ācāryaḥ bhāvam adhikārasya deva ādīnām api manyate
yadi api madhu ādi vidyāsu devatā ādi vyāmiśrāsu asaṃbhavaḥ dhikārasya tathā api asti hi śuddhāyām brahmavidyāyām saṃbhavaḥ
arthi tva sāmarthya apratiṣedha ādi apekṣa tvāt adhikārasya
na ca kvacid asaṃbhavaḥ iti etāvatā yatra saṃbhavaḥ tatra api adhikāraḥ upodyeta
manuṣyāṇām api na sarveṣām brāhmaṇa ādīnām sarveṣu rājasūya ādiṣu adhikāraḥ saṃbhavati
tatra yaḥ nyāyaḥ saḥ bhaviṣyati
brahma vidyām ca prakṛtya bhavati liṅga darśanam śrautam deva ādi adhikārasya sūcakam tat yaḥ yaḥ devānām pratyabudhyata saḥ eva tat abhavat tathā ṛṣīṇām tathā manuṣyāṇām iti te ha ūcuḥ hanta tam ātmānam anvicchāmaḥ yam ātmānam anviṣya sarvān ca lokān āpnoti sarvān ca kāmān iti indraḥ ha vai devānām abhipravavrāja virocanaḥ surāṇām ityādi ca
smārtam api ca gandharva yājñavalkya saṃvāda ādi
yat api uktam jyotiṣi bhāvāt ca iti atra brūmaḥ jyotiḥ ādi viṣayāḥ api āditya ādayaḥ devatā vacanāḥ śabdāḥ cetanāvantam aiśvarya ādi upetam tam tam devatā ātmānam samarpayanti mantra arthavāda ādiṣu tathā vyavahārāt
asti hi aiśvarya yogāt devatānām jyotiḥ ādi ātmabhiḥ ca avasthātum yathā iṣṭam ca tam tam vigraham grahītum sāmarthyam
tathā hi śrūyate subrahmaṇya arthavāde medhātitheḥ meṣaḥ iti medhātithim ha kāṇvāyanam indraḥ meṣaḥ bhūtvā jahāra iti
smaryate ca ādityaḥ puruṣaḥ bhūtvā kuntīm upajagāma ha iti
mṛd ādiṣu api cetanāḥ adhiṣṭhātāraḥ bhyupagamyante
mṛd abravīt āpaḥ bruvan ityādi darśanāt
jyodiḥ ādeḥ tu bhūtadhātoḥ āditya ādiṣu api acetana tvam abhyupagamyate
cetanāḥ tu adhiṣṭhātāraḥ devatā ātmānaḥ mantra arthavāda ādiṣu vyavahārāt iti uktam
yat api uktam mantra arthavādayoḥ anya artha tvāt na devatā vigraha ādi prakāśana sāmarthyam iti atra brūmaḥ pratyaya apratyayau hi sadbhāva asadbhāvayoḥ kāraṇam
na anya artha tvam ananya artha tvam vā
tathā hi anya artham api prasthitaḥ pathi patitam tṛṇa parṇa ādi asti iti eva pratipadyate
atra āha viṣamaḥ upanyāsaḥ
tatra hi tṛṇa parṇa ādi viṣayam pratyakṣam pravṛttam asti yena tad astitvam pratipadyate
atra punar vidhi uddeśa eka vākya bhāvena stuti arthe rthavāde na pārthagarthyena vṛttānta viṣayā pravṛttiḥ śakyā adhyavasātum
na hi mahāvākye rtha pratyāyake vā antara vākyasya pṛthak pratyāyaka tvam asti
yathā na surām pibet iti nañvati vākye pada traya saṃbandhāt surā pāna pratiṣedhaḥ eva ekaḥ rthaḥ vagamyate
na punar surām pibet iti pada dvaya saṃbandhāt surā pāna vidhiḥ api iti
atra ucyate viṣamaḥ upanyāsaḥ
yuktam yat surā pāna pratiṣedhe pada anvayasya ekatvāt avāntaravākya arthasya agrahaṇam
vidhi uddeśa arthavādayoḥ tu arthavāda sthāni padāni pṛthak anvayam vṛttānta viṣayam pratipadya anantaram kaimarthya vaśena kāmam vidheḥ stāvaka tvam pratipadyante
yathā hi vāyavyam śvetam ālabheta bhūta kāmaḥ iti atra vidhi uddeśa vartinām vāyavya ādi padānām vidhinā saṃbandhaḥ na evam vāyuḥ vai kṣepiṣṭhā devatā vāyum eva svena bhāgadheyena upadhāvati saḥ eva enam bhūtim gamayati Maitrāyaṇī Saṃhitā
iti eṣām arthavāda gatānām padānām
na hi bhavati vāyuḥ vai ālabheta iti kṣepiṣṭhāḥ devatāḥ vai ālabheta ityādi
vāyu svabhāva saṃkīrtanena tu avāntaram anvayam pratipadya evam viśiṣṭa daivatyam idam karma iti vidhim stuvanti
tat yatra yaḥ vā antara vākya arthaḥ pramāṇa antara gocaraḥ bhavati tatra tad anuvādena artha vādaḥ pravartate
yatra pramāṇa antara viruddhaḥ tatra guṇa vādena
yatra tu tat ubhayam na asti tatra kim pramāṇa antara abhāvāt guṇa vādaḥ syāt āhostvit pramāṇa antara avirodhāt vidyamāna artha vādaḥ iti pratīti śaraṇaiḥ vidyamāna artha vādaḥ āśrayaṇīyaḥ na guṇa anuvādaḥ
etena mantraḥ vyākhyātaḥ
api ca vidhibhiḥ eva indra ādi daivatyāni havīṃṣi codayadbhiḥ apekṣitam indra ādīnām svarūpam
na hi svarūpa rahitāḥ indra ādayaḥ cetasi āropayitum śakyante
na ca cetasi an ārūḍhāyai tasyai tasyai devatāyai haviḥ pradātum śakyate
śrāvayati ca yasyai devatāyai haviḥ gṛhītam syāt tām dhyāyet vaṣaṭ kariṣyan iti
na ca śabda mātram artha svarūpam saṃbhavati śabda arthayoḥ bhedāt
tatra yādṛśam mantra arthavādayoḥ indra ādīnām svarūpam avagatam na tat tādṛśam śabda pramāṇakena pratyākhyātum yuktam
itihāsa purāṇam api vyākhyātena mārgeṇa saṃbhavat mantra arthavāda mūlaka tvāt prabhavati devatā vigraha ādi sādhayitum
pratyakṣa ādi mūlam api saṃbhavati
bhavati hi asmākam apratyakṣam api ciraṃtanānām pratyakṣam
tathā ca vyāsa ādayaḥ deva ādibhiḥ pratyakṣam vyavaharanti iti smaryate
yaḥ tu brūyāt idānīṃtanānām iva pūrveṣām api na asti deva ādibhiḥ vyavahartum sāmarthyam iti sa jagat vaicitryam pratiṣedhet
idānīm iva ca na anyadā api sārvabhaumaḥ kṣatriyaḥ sti iti brūyāt tatas ca rājasūya ādi codanāḥ uparundhyāt
idānīm iva ca kāla antare pi avyavasthita prāyān varṇa āśrama dharmān pratijānīta tatas ca vyavasthā vidhāyi śāstram anarthakam kuryāt
tasmāt dharma utkarṣa vaśāt ciraṃtanāḥ deva ādibhiḥ pratyakṣam vyavajahnuḥ iti śliṣyate
api ca smaranti svādhyāyāt iṣṭadevatā saṃprayogaḥ ityādi
yogaḥ pi aṇima ādi aiśvarya prāpti phalakaḥ smaryamāṇaḥ na śakyate sāhasa mātreṇa pratyākhyātum
śrutiḥ ca yoga māhātmyam prakhyāpayati pṛthivī ap tejaḥ nilakhe samutthite pañca ātmake yoga guṇe pravṛtte
na tasya rogaḥ na jarā na mṛtyuḥ prāptasya yoga agni mayam śarīram iti
ṛṣīṇām api mantra brāhmaṇa darśinām sāmarthyam na asmadīyena sāmarthyena upamātum yuktam
tasmāt sa mūlam itihāsa purāṇam
loka prasiddhiḥ api na sati saṃbhave nirālambanā adhyavasātum yuktā
tasmāt upapannaḥ mantra ādibhyaḥ deva ādīnām vigrahavat tva ādi avagamaḥ
tatas ca arthi tva ādi saṃbhavāt upapannaḥ deva ādīnām api brahmavidyāyām adhikāraḥ
krama mukti darśanāni api evam eva upapadyante
śugasya tad anādara śravaṇāt tad ādravaṇāt sūcyate hi
apaśūdrā adhikaraṇam
yathā manuṣya adhikāra niyamam apodya deva ādīnām api vidyāsu adhikāraḥ uktaḥ tathā eva dvijāti adhikāra niyama apavādena śūdrasya api adhikāraḥ syāt iti etām āśaṅkām nivartayitum idam adhikaraṇam ārabhyate
tatra śūdrasya api adhikāraḥ syāt iti tāvat prāptam
arthi tva sāmarthyayoḥ saṃbhavāt tasmāt śūdraḥ yajñe navaklṛptaḥ iti vat śūdraḥ vidyāyām anavaklṛptaḥ iti niṣedha aśravaṇāt
yat ca karmasu anadhikāra kāraṇam śūdrasya anagni tvam na tat vidyāsu adhikārasya apavādakam
na hi āhavanīya ādi rahitena vidyā veditum na śakyate
bhavati ca śrautam liṅgam śūdra adhikārasya upodbalakam
saṃvarga vidyāyām hi jānaśrutim pautrāyaṇam śuśrūṣum śūdra śabdena parāmṛśati aha ha āre tvā śūdra tava eva saha gobhiḥ astu iti
vidura prabhṛtayaḥ ca śūdra yoni prabhavāḥ api viśiṣṭa vijñāna saṃpannāḥ smaryante
tasmāt adhikriyate śūdraḥ vidyāsu iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ na śūdrasya adhikāraḥ veda adhyayana abhāvāt
adhīta vedaḥ hi vidita veda arthaḥ veda artheṣu adhikriyate
na ca śūdrasya veda adhyayanam asti
upanayana pūrvaka tvāt veda adhyayanasya upanayanasya ca varṇa traya viṣaya tvāt
yat tu arthi tvam na tat asati sāmarthye dhikāra kāraṇam bhavati
sāmarthyam api na laukikam kevalam adhikāra kāraṇam bhavati
śāstrīye rthe śāstrīyasya sāmarthyasya apekṣita tvāt śāstrīyasya ca sāmarthyasya adhyayana nirākaraṇena nirākṛta tvāt
yat ca idam śūdraḥ yajñe navaklṛptaḥ iti tat nyāya pūrvaka tvāt vidyāyām api anavaklṛpta tvam dyotayati
nyāyasya sādhāraṇa tvāt
yat punar saṃvarga vidyāyām śūdra śabda śravaṇam liṅgam manyase na tat liṅgam
nyāya abhāvāt
nyāya ukte hi liṅga darśanam dyotakam bhavati
na ca atra nyāyaḥ u sti
kāmam ca ayam śūdra śabdaḥ saṃvarga vidyāyām eva ekasyām śūdram adhikuryāt tad viṣaya tvāt
na sarvāsu vidyāsu
arthavāda stha tvāt tu na kvacid api ayam śūdram adhikartum utsahate
śakyate ca ayam śūdra śabdaḥ dhikṛta viṣaye yojayitum
katham iti ucyate kamvaraḥ enam etat santam sayugvānam iva raikvam āttha iti asmāt haṃsa vākyāt ātmanaḥ na ādaram śrutavataḥ jānaśruteḥ pautrāyaṇasya śuc utpede
tām ṛṣiḥ raikvaḥ śūdra śabdena anena sūcayāṃbabhūva ātmanaḥ parokṣa jña tā khyāpanāya iti gamyate jātiśūdrasya anadhikārāt
katham punar śūdra śabdena śuc utpannā sūcyate iti ucyate tadā ādravaṇāt
śucam abhidudrāva śucā vai abhidudruve śucā vā raikvam abhidudrāva iti śūdraḥ
avayava artha saṃbhavāt rūḍhi arthasya ca asaṃbhavāt
dṛśyate ca ayam syām ākhyāyikāyām
kṣatriya tva gateḥ ca uttaratra caitrarathena liṅgāt
itas ca na jātiśūdraḥ jānaśrutiḥ
yatkāraṇam prakaraṇa nirūpaṇena kṣatriya tvam asya uttaratra caitrarathena abhipratāriṇā kṣatriyeṇa samabhivyāhārāt liṅgāt gamyate
uttaratra hi saṃvarga vidyā vākya śeṣe caitrarathiḥ abhipratārī kṣatriyaḥ saṃkīrtyate atha ha śaunakam ca kāpeyam abhipratāriṇam ca kākṣasenim sūdena pariviṣyamāṇau brahmacārī bibhikṣe iti
caitrarathi tvam ca abhipratāriṇaḥ kāpeya yogāt avagantavyam
kāpeya yogaḥ hi citrarathasya avagataḥ etena vai citraratham kāpeyāḥ ayājayan iti
samāna anvayānām ca prāyeṇa samāna anvayāḥ yājakāḥ bhavanti
tasmāt caitrarathiḥ nāma ekaḥ kṣatra patiḥ ajāyata iti ca kṣatra pati tva avagamāt kṣatriya tvam asya avagantavyam
tena kṣatriyeṇa abhipratāriṇā saha samānāyām saṃvarga vidyāyām saṃkīrtanam jānaśruteḥ api kṣatriya tvam sūcayati
samānānām eva hi prāyeṇa samabhivyāhārāḥ bhavanti
kṣattṛ preṣaṇa ādi aiśvarya yogāt ca jānaśruteḥ kṣatriya tva avagatiḥ
atas na śūdrasya adhikāraḥ
saṃskāra parāmarśāt tad abhāva abhilāpāt ca
itas ca na śūdrasya adhikāraḥ yat vidyā pradeśeṣu upanayana ādayaḥ saṃskārāḥ parāmṛśyante tam ha upaninye adhīhi bhagavaḥ iti ha upasasāda brahma parāḥ brahma niṣṭhāḥ param brahma anveṣamāṇāḥ eṣa ha vai tat sarvam vakṣyati iti te ha samidh pāṇayaḥ bhagavantam pippalādam upasannāḥ iti ca
tān ha an upanīya eva iti api pradarśitā eva upanayana prāptiḥ bhavati
śūdrasya ca saṃskāra abhāvaḥ bhilapyate śūdraḥ caturthaḥ varṇaḥ ekajātiḥ iti eka jāti tva smaraṇāt
na śūdre pātakam kiṃcid na ca saṃskāram arhati iti ādibhiḥ ca
tad abhāva nirdhāraṇe ca pravṛtteḥ
itas ca na śūdrasya adhikāraḥ
yat satyavacanena śūdra tva abhāve nirdhārite jābālam gautamaḥ upanetum anuśāsitum ca pravavṛte na etat abrāhmaṇaḥ vivaktum arhati samidham somya āhara upa tvā neṣye na satyāt agāḥ iti śruti liṅgāt
śravaṇa adhyayana artha pratiṣedhāt smṛteḥ ca
itas ca na śūdrasya adhikāraḥ
yat asya smṛteḥ śravaṇa adhyayana artha pratiṣedhaḥ bhavati
veda śravaṇa pratiṣedhaḥ veda adhyayana pratiṣedhaḥ tad artha jñāna anuṣṭhānayoḥ ca pratiṣedhaḥ śūdrasya smaryate
śravaṇa pratiṣedhaḥ tāvat atha ha asya vedam upaśrṛṇvataḥ trapu jatubhyām śrotra pratipūraṇam iti
ha vai etat śamaśānam yat śūdraḥ tasmāt śūdra samīpe na adhyetavyam iti ca
atas eva adhyayana pratiṣedhaḥ
yasya hi samīpe na adhyetavyam bhavati sa katham aśrutam adhīyīta
bhavati ca veda uccāraṇe jihvā chedaḥ dhāraṇe śarīra bhedaḥ iti
atas eva ca arthāt artha jñāna anuṣṭhānayoḥ pratiṣedhaḥ bhavati na śūdrāya matim dadyāt iti dvijātīnām adhyayanam ijyā dānam iti ca
yeṣām punar pūrva kṛta saṃskāra vaśāt vidura dharmavyādha prabhṛtīnām jñāna utpattiḥ teṣām na śakyate pha
text2:
raḥ saṃbhavati tathā imām eva gautama bharadvājau ayam vai gautamaḥ yam bharadvājaḥ ityādiṣu api teṣām eva ṛṣīṇām adhikāraḥ saṃbhavati kutas ca jyotiṣi bhāvāt
ca yat idam jyotiḥ maṇḍalam dyu sthāam ahar rātrābhyām bambhramat jagat avabhāsayati tasmin āditya ādayaḥ devatā vacaāḥ śabdāḥ prayujyate loka prasiddheḥ vākyaśeṣa prasiddheḥ ca ca jyotiḥ maṇḍalasya hṛdaya ādiāḥ vigraheṇa arthi tva ādiāḥ vā yogaḥ vagatum śakyate
mṛd ādi vat aceta atva avagamāt vyākhyātāḥ syāt etat matra arthavāda itihāsa purāṇa lokebhyaḥ vigrahavat tva ādi avagamāt ayam adoṣaḥ iti ced kiṃcid svatatram pramāṇam asti pratyakṣa ādibhyaḥ eva avyabhicarita viṣayebhyaḥ pramāṇebhyaḥ prasiddha
eva arthaḥ lokāt prasiddhaḥ iti ucyate ca atra pratyakṣa ādīām ayatamam pramāṇam asti itihāsa purāṇāām api pauruṣeya tvāt pramāṇa atara mūla tām ākāṅkṣati arthavādāḥ api vidhi eka vākya tvāt stuti arthāḥ vigraha ādi sadbhāve kāraṇa bhāvam pratipadyate
api kasyacid arthasya pramāṇam iti ācakṣate tasmāt abhāvaḥ deva ādīām adhikārasya bhāvam tu bādarāyaṇaḥ sti hi tuśabdaḥ pūrvapakṣam vyāvartayati bādarāyaṇaḥ tu ācāryaḥ bhāvam adhikārasya deva ādīām api
yadi api madhu ādi vidyāsu devatā ādi vyāmiśrāsu asaṃbhavaḥ udhikārasya tathā api asti hi śuddhāyām brahmavidyāyām saṃbhavaḥ arthi tva sāmarthya a pratiṣedha ādi apekṣa tvāt adhikārasya ca kvacid asaṃbhavaḥ iti etāvatā yatra saṃbhavaḥ tatra api adhikāra upodyeta mauṣyāṇām api sarveṣām brāhmaṇa ādīām
sarveṣu rājasūya ādiṣu adhikāraḥ saṃbhavati tatra yaḥ saḥ utra api bhaviṣyati brahma vidyām ca prakṛtya bhavati liṅga darśaam śrautam deva ādi adhikārasya sūcakam tat yaḥ yaḥ devāām pratyabudhyata
saḥ eva tat abhavat tathā ṛṣīṇām tathā mauṣyāṇām iti te ha ūcuḥ hata tam ātmā avicchāmaḥ yam ātmā aviṣya sarvān ca lokān apaḥ iti sarvān ca kāmāḥ iti idraḥ ha vai devāām abhipravavrāja virocaḥ asurāṇām
ityādi ca smārtam api ca gadharva yājñavalkya saṃvāda ādi yat api uktam jyotiṣi bhāvāt ca iti atra brūmaḥ jyotiḥ ādi viṣayāḥ api āditya ādayaḥ devatā vacaāḥ śabdāḥ cetaāvatam aiśvarya ādi upetam
tam tam devatā ātmāam samarpayati matra arthavāda ādiṣu tathā vyavahārāt asti hi aiśvarya yogāt devatā āām jyotiḥ ādi ātmabhiḥ ca avasthātum yathā iṣṭam ca tam tam vigraham grahītum sāmarthyam
tathā hi śrūyate subrahmaṇya arthavāde medhātitheḥ meṣaḥ iti medhātithim ha idraḥ meṣaḥ bhūtvā jahāra iti smaryate ca ādityaḥ puruṣaḥ bhūtvā
upajagāma ha iti mṛd ādiṣu api cetaāḥ adhiṣṭhātāraḥ abhyupagamyate mṛd abravīt āpobruvaḥ ityādi darśaāt jyodiḥ ādeḥ tu bhūtadhātoḥ āditya ādiṣu api acetaa tvam abhyupagamyate cetaāḥ tu adhiṣṭhātāraḥ devatā ātmāo
matra arthavāda ādiṣu vyavahārāt iti uktam yat api uktam matra arthavādayoḥ devatā vigraha ādi prakāśa a sāmarthyam iti atra brūmaḥ pratyaya apratyayau hi sadbhāva asadbhāvayoḥ kāraṇam āya artha tvam a artha tvam vā tathā
hi aya artham api prasthitaḥ pathi patitam tṛṇa parṇa ādi asti iti eva pratipadyate atra āha viṣamaḥ upayāsaḥ tatra hi tṛṇa parṇa ādi viṣayam pratyakṣam pravṛttam asti tad astitvam
pratipadyate atra stuti arthe rthavāde a pravṛttiḥ śakyā adhyavasātum hi mahāvākye rtha pratyāyake pṛthak pratyāyaka tvam asti yathā a surāṃ
pibet iti vākye pada traya saṃbadhāt surā pāa pratiṣedhaḥ eva ekaḥ ṛthaḥ avagamyate a puaḥ surām pibet iti pada dvaya saṃbadhāt surā pāa vidhiḥ api iti atra ucyate viṣamaḥ upayāsaḥ yuktam yat surā pāa pratiṣedhe vidhi uddeśa arthavādayoḥ tu arthavāda sthāi pṛthak avayam
pratipadya kaimarthya vaśe kāmam vidheḥ stāvaka tvam pratipadyate yathā hi vāyavyam śvetam ālabheta bhūta kāmaḥ iti atra vidhi uddeśa varti vāyavya ādi padāām vidhinā vāyuḥ vai
kṣepiṣṭhā devatā vāyum eva svea bhāgadheyena upadhāvati saḥ eva eam bhūtim gamayati maitrāyaṇī saṃhitā iti eṣām arthavāda gatāām padāām a hi bhavati vāyuḥ vai ālabheta iti kṣepiṣṭhā
devatāḥ vai ālabheta ityādi tu pratipadye evam viśiṣṭa daivatyam idam karma iti vidhim stuvati tat yatra yovātara vākya arthaḥ pramāṇa atara gocaraḥ bhavati tatra pravartate
yatra pramāṇa atara viruddhaḥ tatra yatra tu tat ubhayam tatra kim pramāṇa atara abhāvāt guṇavādaḥ syāt āhostvit pramāṇa atara avirodhāt vidyamāārthavādaḥ iti pratīti śaraṇaiḥ vidyamāārthavādaḥ āśrayaṇīyaḥ a guṇāuvādaḥ
vyākhyātaḥ api ca vidhibhiḥ eva idra ādi daivatyāi havīṃṣi codayadbhiḥ apekṣitam idra ādīām sva rūpam a hi sva rūpa rahitāḥ idra ādayaḥ cetasyā āropayitum śakyate a ca cetasya ārūḍhāyai tasyai tasyai devatāyai haviḥ pradātum
śakyate śrāvayati ca yasyai devatāyai haviḥ gṛhītam syāt tām dhyāyet vaṣaṭ kariṣye iti ca śabda mātram artha svarūpam saṃbhavati śabda arthayoḥ bhedāt tatra yādṛśam svarūpam avagatam avagatam
tat tādṛśam pratyākhyātum yuktam itihāsa purāṇam api mārgeṇa saṃbhavam atra arthavāda mūlaka tvāt prabhavati devatā vigraha ādi sādhayitum pratyakṣa ādi mūlam api saṃbhavati bhavati hi asmākam apratyakṣam api ciraṃtan pratyakṣam tathā ca vyāsa ādayaḥ
deva ādibhiḥ pratyakṣam vyavaharati iti smaryate yaḥ tu brūyāt pūrveṣām api ā asti deva ādibhiḥ vyavahartum sāmarthyam iti sa jagat vaicitryam pratiṣedhet idāīm iva ca sārvabhaumaḥ kṣatriyaḥ asti iti brūyāt
tatas ca uparudhyāt idāīm iva ca tatas ca vyavasthā vidhāyi śāstram aarthakam kuryāt tasmāt dharma utkarṣa vaśāt cirantan deva ādibhiḥ pratyakṣam vyavajahuḥ iti śliṣyate api ca smarati svādhyāyāt iṣṭadevatā saṃprayogaḥ
ityādi smaryamāṇaḥ a śakyate sāhasa mātreṇa pratyākhyātum śrutiḥ ca yoga māhātmyam prakhyāpayati samutthite pañca ātmake yoga guṇe pravṛtte a tasya rogaḥ a jarā
mṛtyuḥ prāptasya śarīram iti ṛṣīṇām api yuktam tasmāt sa mūlam itihāsa purāṇam loka prasiddhiḥ api a sati saṃbhave yuktā tasmāt
matra ādibhyaḥ deva ādīām vigrahavat tva ādi avagamaḥ tatas ca arthi tva ādi saṃbhavāt deva ādīām api brahmavidyāyām adhikāraḥ evam eva upapadyate śugasya tad a ādara śravaṇāt tad ādravaṇāt sūcyate hi apaśūdrā adhikaraṇam yathā mauṣya adhikāra aiyamam apodya deva ādīām api vidyāsu adhikāraḥ uktaḥ tathā eva śūdrasya api adhikāraḥ
syāt iti etām āśaṅkām ivartayitum idam adhikaraṇam ārabhyate tatra śūdrasya api adhikāraḥ syāt iti tāvat prāptam arthi tva sāmarthyayoḥ saṃbhavāt tasmāt śūdraḥ yajñe avaklṛptaḥ iti vat śūdraḥ vidyāyām a avaklṛptaḥ iti iṣedha śravaṇāt yat ca karmasu a adhikāra kāraṇam śūdrasya a agi tvam a tad vidyāsu adhikārasya apavādakam
a hi āhavaīya ādi rahitā vidyā veditum a śakyate bhavati ca śrautam liṅgam śūdra adhikārasya upodbalakam saṃvarga vidyāyām hi jāaśrutim pautrāyaṇam śuśrūṣum śūdra śabde parāmṛśati aha hāre
tvā śūdra tava eva saha gobhiḥ astu iti vidura prabhṛtayaḥ ca api smaryate tasmāt adhikriyate śūdraḥ vidyāsu iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ a śūdrasya adhikāraḥ veda adhyaya ābhāvāt
hi vidita veda arthaḥ veda artheṣu adhikriyate a ca śūdrasya veda adhyayaam asti upaaya a pūrvaka tvāt veda adhyayaasya upaayaasya ca varṇa traya viṣaya tvāt yat tu arthi tvam a tat asati sāmarthya idhikāra kāraṇam bhavati sāmarthyam api a laukikam
kevalam adhikāra kāraṇam bhavati śāstrīya ṛthe śāstrīyasya sāmarthyasya apekṣita tvāt śāstrīyasya ca sāmarthyasya yat ca idam śūdraḥ yajñe avaklṛptaḥ iti tat yāya pūrvaka tvāt vidyāyām api a avaklṛpta tvam dyotayati yāyasya sādhāraṇa tvāt yat puas saṃvarga vidyāyām
śūdra śabda śravaṇam liṅgam tad liṅgam hi liṅga darśaam dyotakam bhavati a ca atra kāmam ca ayam śūdra śabdaḥ saṃvarga vidyāyām eva ekasyām śūdram adhikuryāt tad viṣaya tvāt
a sarvāsu vidyāsu arthavāda stha tvāt tu a kvacid api ayam śūdram adhikartum utsahate śakyate ca ayam śūdra śabda udhikṛta viṣaye yojayitum katham iti ucyate kamvaraḥ eam etat satam raikvam āttha iti asmāt haṃsa vākyāt śrutavataḥ jāaśruteḥ pautrāyaṇasya
śuc utpede tām ṛṣiḥ raikvaḥ śūdra śabde sūcayāṃbabhūva gamyate jātiśūdrasya adhikārāt katham sūcyate iti ucyate tad ādravaṇāt śucam abhidudrāva śucā
vā abhidudruve śucā vā raikvam abhidudrāva iti śūdraḥ avayava artha saṃbhavāt rūḍhi arthasya ca asaṃbhavāt dṛśyate ca ayam arthaḥ ūsyām ākhyāyikāyām kṣatriya tva gateḥ ca uttaratra liṅgāt itas ca a jātiśūdraḥ yatkāraṇam
kṣatriya tvam asya uttaratra kṣatriya tvam asya uttaratra kṣatriyeṇa samabhivyāhārāt liṅgāt gamyate uttaratra hi saṃvarga vidyā vākyaśeṣe caitrarathiḥ abhipratārī kṣatriyaḥ saṃkīrtyate atha ha śauakam ca kāpeyam abhipratāriṇam ca kākṣaseim pariviṣyamāṇau
brahmacārī bibhikṣe iti caitrarathi tvam ca abhipratāriṇaḥ kāpeya yogāt avagatavyam kāpeya yogaḥ hi citrarathasya avagataḥ vai citraratham kāpeyāḥ ayājayaḥ iti samāāvayāām ca prāyeṇa samāāvayāḥ yājakāḥ
bhavati tasmāt caitrarathi rāma ekaḥ kṣatra patiḥ ajāyata iti ca kṣatra pati tva avagamāt kṣatriya tvam asya avagatavyam kṣatriyeṇa abhipratāriṇā saha samāāyām saṃvarga vidyāyām jāa śruteḥ api kṣatriya tvam sūcayati samāāām eva hi prāyeṇa samabhivyāhārā bhavati
kṣattṛ preṣaṇa ādi aiśvarya yogāt ca kṣatriya tva avagatiḥ atas a śūdrasya adhikāraḥ saṃskāra parāmarśāt tad abhāva abhilāpāt ca itas ca a śūdrasya adhikāraḥ yat vidyā pradeśeṣu upaaya ādayaḥ saṃskārāḥ parāmṛśyate tam ha upaiye adhīhi bhagavaḥ iti ha upasasāda brahma parā manas anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhāna anuṣṭhā
brahmaiṣṭhāḥ param brahma āveṣamāṇāḥ eṣa ha vai tat sarvam vakṣyati iti te ha samidh pāṇayaḥ bhagavatam pippalādam iti ca iti api pradarśitā eva upaaya aprāptiḥ bhavati śūdrasya ca
saṃskāra abhāvaḥ abhilapyate śūdraḥ caturthaḥ varṇaḥ ekajātiḥ iti eka jāti tva smaraṇāt a śūdre pātakam ca saṃskāram arhati iti ādibhiḥ ca tad abhāvaiḥ dhāraṇe ca pravṛtteḥ itas ca a śūdrasya adhikāraḥ śūdra tva abhāve
iḥ dhārite jābālam gautamaḥ upaetum auśāsitum ca pravavṛte ā etat abrāhmaṇaḥ vivaktum arhati samidham somya āhara upa tvā eṣye a satyāt agāḥ iti śruti liṅgāt śravaṇa adhyaya artha pratiṣedhāt smṛteḥ ca itas ca a śūdrasya adhikāraḥ
yat asya smṛteḥ śravaṇa adhyaya artha pratiṣedhaḥ bhavati veda śravaṇa pratiṣedhaḥ veda adhyaya a pratiṣedhaḥ tad artha pratiṣedhaḥ śūdrasya smaryate śravaṇa pratiṣedhaḥ tāvat atha ha asya vedam upaśrṛṇvataḥ trapu jatubhyām śrotra pratipūraṇam iti ha vai etat śamaśāaṃ aṃga adhyayana artha pratiṣedhaḥ iti ha vai etat śamaśāam aṃga artha pratiṣedhaḥ iti ha vai etat śamaśāam aṃga artha pratiṣedhaḥ
yat śūdraḥ tasmāt śūdra samīpe ādhyetavyam iti ca atas eva adhyaya a pratiṣedhaḥ yasya hi samīpe pi ādhyetavyam bhavati sa katham aśrutam adhīyīta bhavati ca veda uccāraṇe jihvā chedaḥ dhāraṇe śarīra bhedaḥ iti
atas eva ca arthāt pratiṣedhaḥ bhavati a śūdrāya matim dadyāt iti iti ca yeṣām pūrva kṛta saṃskāra vaśāt vidura dharmavyādha prabhṛtīām jñā utpattiḥ teṣām

yat idam kiṃca jagat sarvam prāṇaḥ ejati niḥsṛtam
mahat bhayam vajram udyatam ye etat viduḥ amṛtāḥ te bhavanti iti etat vākyam kampane iti dhātvartha anugamāt lakṣitam
asmin vākye sarvam idam jagat prāṇa āśrayam spandate mahat ca kiṃcid bhaya kāraṇam vajra śabditam udyatam tad vijñānāt ca amṛta tva prāptiḥ iti śrūyate

katham
sarvam idam jagat pañca vṛttau vāyau prāṇa śabdite pratiṣṭhāya ejati
vāyu nimittam eva ca mahat bhayānakam vajram udyamyate
vāyau hi parjanya bhāvena vivartamāne vidyut stanayitnu vṛṣṭi aśanayaḥ vivartante iti ācakṣate
vāyu vijñānāt eva ca idam amṛta tvam
tathā hi śruti antaram vāyuḥ eva vyaṣṭiḥ vāyuḥ samaṣṭiḥ apa punarmṛtyum jayati yaḥ evam veda iti

pūrva uttara ālocanāt
pūrva uttarayoḥ hi grantha bhāgayoḥ brahma eva nirdiśyamānam upalabhāmahe
iha eva katham akasmāt antarāle vāyum nirdiśyamānam pratipadyemahi
pūrvatra tāvat tat eva śukram tat brahma tat eva amṛtam ucyate
tasimant lokāḥ śritāḥ sarve tat u na atyeti kaścana iti brahma nirdiṣṭam
tat eva iha api saṃnidhānāt jagat sarvam prāṇaḥ ejati iti ca loka āśraya tva pratyabhijñānāt nirdiṣṭam iti gamyate
prāṇa śabdaḥ u pi ayam paramātmani eva prayuktaḥ prāṇasya prāṇam iti darśanāt
ejayitṛ tvam api idam paramātmanaḥ eva upapadyate na vāyu mātrasya
tathā ca uktam na prāṇena nā apānena martyaḥ jīvati kaścana
itareṇa tu jīvanti yasmin etau upāśritau iti
uttaratra api bhayāt asya agniḥ tapati bhayāt tapati sūryaḥ
bhayāt indraḥ ca vāyuḥ ca mṛtyuḥ dhāvati pañcamaḥ iti brahmā eva nirdekṣyate na vāyuḥ sa vāyukasya jagataḥ bhaya hetu tva abhidhānāt
tat eva iha api saṃnidhānāt mahat bhayam vajram udyatam iti ca bhaya hetu tvam pratyabhijñānāt nirdiṣṭam iti gamyate
vajra śabdaḥ pi ayam bhaya hetu tva sāmānyāt prayuktaḥ
yathā hi vajram udyatam mama eva śirasi nipatet yadi aham asya śāsanam na kuryām iti anena bhayena janaḥ niyamena rāja ādi śāsane pravartate evam idam agni vāyu sūrya ādikam jagat asmāt eva brahmaṇaḥ bibhyat niyamena sva vyāpāre pravartate iti bhayānakam vajra upamitam brahma
tathā ca brahma viṣayam śruti antaram bhīṣā asmāt vātaḥ pavate

na ca iha tadvat kiṃcid sva artha parityāge kāraṇam dṛśyate
tathā ca nāḍīkhaṇḍe atha yatra etat asmāt śarīrāt utkrāmati atha etaiḥ eva raśmibhiḥ ūrdhvam ākramate iti mumukṣoḥ āditya prāptiḥ abhihitā
tasmāt prasiddham eva tejaḥ jyotiḥ śabdam iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ param eva brahma jyotiḥ śabdam
kasmāt
darśanāt
tasya hi iha prakaraṇe vaktavya tvena anuvṛttiḥ dṛśyate
yaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā iti apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇakasya ātmanaḥ prakaraṇa ādau anveṣṭavya tvena vijijñāsitavya tvena ca pratijñānāt
etam tu eva te bhūyas nuvyākhyāsyāmi iti ca anusaṃdhānāt
aśarīram vāva santam na priya apriye spṛśataḥ iti ca aśarīra tāyai jyotiḥ saṃpatteḥ asya abhidhānāt
brahma bhāvāt ca anyatra aśarīra tā anupapatteḥ
param jyotiḥ saḥ uttamaḥ puruṣaḥ iti ca viśeṣaṇāt
yat tu uktam mumukṣoḥ āditya prāptiḥ abhihitā iti na asau ātyantikaḥ mokṣaḥ gati utkrānti saṃbandhāt
na hi ātyantike mokṣe gati utkrāntī staḥ iti vakṣyāmaḥ

ākāśa śabdasya tasmin rūḍha tvāt
nāma rūpa nirvahaṇasya ca avakāśa dāna dvāreṇa tasmin yojayitum śakya tvāt
sraṣṭṛ tva ādeḥ ca spaṣṭasya brahma liṅgasya aśravaṇāt iti evam prāpte idam ucyate param eva brahma iha ākāśa śabdam bhavitum arhati

artha antara tva ādi vyapadeśāt
