puruṣāṇām kartā iti eva teṣām irdiṣṭa tvāt puruṣa viṣayasya karoti arthasya kriyā phalasya vā ayam irdeśaḥ kartṛ śabde eva tayoḥ upātta tvāt pāriśeṣyāt pratyakṣa saṃihitam jagat sarva āma etat śabde irdiśyate kriyate iti ca
tat eva jagat karma jagat api aprakṛtam asaṃśabditam ca satyam etat tathā api asati saṃidhāea saṃihita vastu mātrasya ayam irdeśaḥ iti gamyate a viśiṣṭasya pūrvatra ca
jagat eka deśa bhūtāām puruṣāṇām viśeṣa upādāāt aviśeṣitam jagat eva iha upādīyate iti gamyate etat uktam bhavati yaḥ eteṣām puruṣāṇām jagat eka deśa bhūtāām kartā viśeṣeṇa yasya vā kṛtsam eva jagat aviśeṣitam karma iti vā śabdaḥ
eka deśa avacchia kartṛ tva vyāvṛtti arthaḥ ye brahmatva abhimatāḥ puruṣāḥ kīrtitāḥ teṣām abrahmatva khyāpaāya evam evam ced tat vyākhyātam
atha yat uktam vākyaśeṣa gatāt jīva liṅga a mukhya prāṇa liṅgāt ca tayoḥ eva ayatarasya iha grahaṇam yāyyam a parameśvarasya iti tat parihartavyam atra ucyate parihṛtam ca etat opāsā traividhyāt āśrita tvāt iha tad yogāt iti atra trividham hi atra upāsaam evam sati prasajyeta jīva upāsaam
mukhya prāṇa upāsaam brahma upāsaam ca iti upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām hi brahma viṣaya tvam asya vākyasya avagamyate tatra upakramasya tāvat brahma viṣaya tvam darśitam upa

text1:
am evam sati prasajyeta jīva upāsanam mukhya prāṇa upāsanam brahma upāsanam ca iti
na ca etat nyāyyam
upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām hi brahma viṣaya tvam asya vākyasya avagamyate
tatra upakramasya tāvat brahma viṣaya tvam darśitam
upasaṃhārasya api
text2:
am evam sati prasajyeta jīva upāsaam
mukhya prāṇa upāsaam brahma upāsaam ca iti upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām hi brahma viṣaya tvam asya vākyasya avagamyate tatra upakramasya tāvat brahma viṣaya tvam darśitam upasaṃhārasya api

text1:
sarveṣām ca bhūtānām śraiṣṭhyam svārājyam ādhipatyam paryeti yaḥ evam veda iti
nanu evam sati pratardana vākya nirṇayena evā idam api vākyam nirṇīyeta
na nirṇīyate yasya vā etat karma ityasya brahma viṣaya tvena tatra anirdhārita tvāt
tasmāt atra jīva mukhya prāṇa śaṅkā punar utpadyamānā nivartyate
prāṇa śabdaḥ api brahma viṣayaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ prāṇa bandhanam hi somya manaḥ iti atra
jīva liṅgam api upakrama upasaṃhārayoḥ brahma viṣaya tvāt abheda abhiprāyeṇa yojayitavyam
anya artham tu jaiminiḥ praśna vyākhyānābhyām api ca evam eke
api ca na eva atra vivaditavyam jīva pradhānam vā idam vākyam syāt brahma pradhānam vā iti
yatas jīva parāmarśam brahma pratipatti artham asmin vākye jaiminiḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
kasmāt
text2:
sarveṣām ca bhūtāām śraiṣṭhyam
svārājyam ādhipatyam paryeti yaḥ evam veda iti sati a vākya erṇayeta eva idam api vākyam irṇīyeta yasya vā etat karma ityasya brahma viṣaya tvāt tasmāt atra
jīva mukhya prāṇa śaṅkā puar utpadyamāā iva ṛtyate prāṇa śabdaḥ api brahma viṣayaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ hi somya maaḥ iti atra jīva liṅgam api upakrama upasaṃhārayoḥ brahma viṣaya tvāt abheda abhiprāyeṇa yojayitavyam tu jaimiiḥ api ca evam eke api ca
ā eva atra vivaditavyam jīva pradhāam vā idam vākyam syāt brahma pradhāam vā iti jīva parāmarśam brahma pratipatti artham asmin vākye jaimiiḥ ācāryaḥ kasmāt

text1:
prāṇa ādi vyatirikte jīve pratibodhite punar jīva vyatirikta viṣayaḥ dṛśyate kva eṣa etat bālāke śayiṣṭa kva vā etat abhūt kutas etat āgāt iti
prativacanam api yadā suptaḥ svapnam na kaṃcana paśyati atha asmin prāṇaḥ eva ekadhā bhavati ityādi etasmāt ātmanaḥ sarve prāṇāḥ yathāyatanam vipratiṣṭhante prāṇebhyaḥ devāḥ devebhyaḥ lokāḥ iti ca suṣupti kāle ca pareṇa brahmaṇā jīvaḥ ekatām gacchati
parasmāt ca brahmaṇaḥ prāṇa ādikam jagat jāyate iti vedānta maryādā
tasmāt yatra asya jīvasya niḥsaṃbodha svastha tā rūpaḥ svāpaḥ upādhi janita viśeṣa vijñāna rahitam svarūpam yatas tat bhraṃśa rūpam āgamanam saḥ u tra paramātmā veditavya tayā śrāvitaḥ iti gamyate
api ca evam eke śākhinaḥ vājasaneyinaḥ smin eva bālākya jātaśatru saṃvāde spaṣṭam vijñāna maya śabdena jīvam āmnāya tad vyatiriktam paramātmānam āmananti yaḥ eṣa vijñāna mayaḥ puruṣaḥ kva eṣa tadā abhūt kutas etat āgāt iti praśne
prativacane pi yaḥ eṣaḥ ntar hṛdaye ākāśaḥ tasmin śete iti
ākāśa śabdaḥ ca paramātmani prayuktaḥ daharaḥ smin antarākāśaḥ iti atra
sarve ete ātmānaḥ vyuccaranti iti ca upādhimatām ātmanām anyatas vyuccaraṇam āmanantaḥ paramātmānam eva kāraṇa tvena āmananti iti gamyate
prāṇa nirākaraṇasya api suṣupta puruṣa utthāpanena prāṇa ādi vyatirikta upadeśaḥ abhyuccayaḥ
vākya anvayāt
vākya anvaya adhikaraṇam
brṛhadāraṇyake maitreyībrāhmaṇe bhidhīyate na vai are patyuḥ kāmāya iti upakramya na vai are sarvasya kāmāya sarvam priyam bhavati ātmanaḥ tu kāmāya sarvam priyam bhavati ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ śrotavyaḥ mantavyaḥ nididhyāsitavyaḥ maitreyi ātmanaḥ vai are darśanena śravaṇena matyā vijñānena idam sarvam viditam iti
tatra etat vicikitsyate kim vijñāna ātmā eva ayam draṣṭavya śrotavya tva ādi rūpeṇa upadiśyate āhosvit paramātmā iti
kutas punar eṣā vicikitsā
priya saṃsūcitena ātmanā bhoktrā upakramāt vijñāna ātma upadeśaḥ iti pratibhāti
tathā ātma vijñānena sarva vijñāna upadeśāt paramātma upadeśaḥ iti
kim tāvat prāptam
vijñāna ātma upadeśaḥ iti
kasmāt
upakrama sāmarthyāt
pati jāyā putra vitta ādikam hi bhogya bhūtam sarvam jagat ātma artha tayā priyam bhavati iti priya saṃsūcitam bhoktāram ātmānam upakramya anantaram idam ātmanaḥ darśana ādi upadiśyamānam kasya anyasya ātmanaḥ syāt
madhye pi idam mahat bhūtam anantam apāram vijñāna ghane eva etebhyaḥ bhūtebhyaḥ samutthāya tāni eva anuvinaśyati na pretya saṃjñā asti iti prakṛtasya eva mahataḥ bhūtasya draṣṭavyasya bhūtebhyaḥ samutthānam vijñāna ātma bhāvena bruvan vijñāna ātmanaḥ eva idam draṣṭavya tvam darśayati
tathā vijñātāram are kena vijānīyāt iti kartṛ vacanena śabdena upasaṃharan vijñāna ātmānam eva iha upadiṣṭam darśayati
tasmāt ātma vijñānena sarva vijñāna vacanam bhoktṛ artha tvāt bhogya jātasya aupacārikam draṣṭavyam iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ paramātma upadeśaḥ eva ayam
kasmāt
vākya anvayāt
vākyam hi idam paurvāparyeṇa avekṣyamāṇam paramātmānam pratyanvita avayavam lakṣyate
katham iti tat upapādyate amṛta tvasya tu na āśā asti vittena iti yājñavalkyāt upaśrutya yena aham na amṛtā syām kim aham tena kuryām yat eva bhagavān veda tat eva me brūhi iti amṛta tvam āśāsānāyai maitreyyai yājñavalkyaḥ ātma vijñānam upadiśati
na ca anyatra paramātma vijñānāt amṛta tvam asti iti śruti smṛti vādāḥ vadanti
tathā ca ātma vijñānena sarva vijñānam ucyamānam na anyatra parama kāraṇa vijñānāt mukhyam avakalpate
na ca etat aupacārikam āśrayitum śakyam yatkāraṇam ātma vijñānena sarva vijñānam
text2:

sarve prāṇāḥ yathāyataam vipratiṣṭhate prāṇebhyaḥ devāḥ devebhyaḥ lokāḥ iti ca suṣupti kāle ca pareṇa brahmaṇā jīvaḥ ekatām gacchati parasmāt ca brahmaṇaḥ prāṇa ādikam
jagat jāyate iti tasmāt yatra asya jīvasya svāpaḥ upādhi jaita viśeṣa vijñā a rahitam svarūpam yatas tat bhraṃśa rūpam saḥ utra paramātmā veditavya tayā śrāvitaḥ iti gamyate api ca evam eke
bālākya jātaśatru saṃvāde spaṣṭam tad vyatiriktam yaḥ eṣa vijñā a mayaḥ puruṣaḥ kva eṣa tadā abhūt kutas etat āgāt iti yaḥ eṣa vijñā a mayaḥ puruṣaḥ kva eṣa tadā abhūt kutas etat āgāt iti yaḥ eṣa utar hṛdaye ākāśaḥ tasmin śete iti
ākāśa śabdaḥ ca paramātmai prayuktaḥ daharaḥ smi atara ākāśaḥ iti atra sarve ete ātmā vyuccarati iti ca upādhimatām ātma āmayataḥ vyuccaraṇam āmaataḥ paramātmā aam eva kāraṇa tve āmaati iti gamyate prāṇaiḥ ākaraṇasya api prāṇa ādi vyatirikta upadeśaḥ abhyuccayaḥ vākyāvayāt vākyāvaya adhikaraṇam
brṛhadāraṇyake maitreyī brāhmaṇe abhidhīyate a vai are patyuḥ kāmāya iti upakramya a vai are sarvasya kāmāya sarvam priyam bhavati ātmā astu kāmāya sarvam priyam bhavati ātmā
vai are draṣṭavyaḥ śrotavyaḥ matavyaḥ ididhyāsitavyaḥ vai are darśaea matyā vijñāea idam sarvam viditam iti tatra etat vicikitsyate kim vijñā ātmā eva ayam draṣṭavya śrotavya tva ādi rūpeṇa upadiśyate
āhosvit paramātmā iti kutas bhoktrā upakramāt vijñā ātma upadeśaḥ iti pratibhāti bhoktrā upakramāt vijñā ātma upadeśaḥ iti pratibhāti sarva vijñā upadeśāt paramātma upadeśaḥ iti kim tāvat prāptam vijñā ātma upadeśaḥ iti kasmāt upakrama sāmarthyāt pati jāyā putra vitta ādikam hi bhogya bhūtam
sarvam jagat ātma artha tayā priyam bhavati iti priya saṃsūcitam bhoktāram ātmāam upakramya idam ātmao syāt madhye pi idam mahat bhūtam aatam apāram a pretya
saṃjñā asti iti prakṛtasya eva mahataḥ bhūtasya draṣṭavyasya bhūtebhyaḥ eva idam draṣṭavya tvam darśayati tathā vijñātāram are iti
darśayati bhoktṛ artha tvāt bhogya jātasya aupacārikam draṣṭavyam iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ paramātma upadeśaḥ eva ayam kasmāt vākya avayāt vākyam hi idam paurvāparyeṇa avekṣyamāṇam paramātmā aam lakṣyate katham iti tat upapādyate amṛta tvasya
tu āśāsti iti yājñavalkyāt upaśrutya syām kim aham kuryām yat eva bhagavā aveda tat eva me brūhi iti amṛta tvam āśāsāāyai maitreyyai yājñavalkyaḥ ātma vijñāam upadiśati
a ca ayatra paramātma vijñāāt amṛta tvam asti iti śruti smṛti vādāḥ vadati tathā ca sarva vijñāam ucyamāam tatra ca etat aupacārikam āśrayitum śakyam yat kāraṇam sarva vijñāam

yaḥ hi

text1:
svātantryeṇa labdha sadbhāvam paśyati tam mithyādarśinam tat eva mithyādṛṣṭam brahma kṣatra ādikam jagat parākaroti iti bheda dṛṣṭim apodya idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā iti sarvasya vastu jātasya ātma avyatirekam avatārayati
dundubhi ādi dṛṣṭāntaiḥ ca tam eva avyatirekam draḍhayati
asya mahataḥ bhūtasya niḥśvasitam etat yat ṛgvedaḥ ityādinā ca prakṛtasya ātmanaḥ nāma rūpa karma prapañca kāraṇatām vyācakṣāṇaḥ paramātmānam eva enam gamayati
tathā eva ekāyana prakriyāyām api sa viṣayasya sa indriyasya sa antaḥkaraṇasya prapañcasya ekāyanam anantaram abāhyam kṛtsnam prajñāna ghanam vyācakṣāṇaḥ paramātmānam eva enam gamayati
tasmāt paramātmanaḥ eva ayam darśana ādi upadeśaḥ iti gamyate
yat punar uktam priya saṃsūcita upakramāt vijñāna ātmanaḥ eva ayam darśana ādi upadeśaḥ iti atra brūmaḥ
pratijñā siddheḥ liṅgam āśmarathyaḥ
asti atra pratijñā ātmani vijñāte sarvam idam vijñātam bhavati idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā iti ca
tasyāḥ pratijñāyāḥ siddhim sūcayati etat liṅgam yat priya saṃsūcitasya ātmanaḥ draṣṭavyā tva ādi saṃkīrtanam
yadi hi vijñāna ātmā paramātmanaḥ nyaḥ syāt tatas paramātma vijñāne vijñāna ātmā na vijñāyate iti eka vijñānena sarva vijñānam yat pratijñātam tat hīyeta
tasmāt pratijñā siddhi artham vijñānātma paramātmanoḥ abheda aṃśena upakramaṇam iti āśmarathyaḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
utkramiṣyate evambhāvāt iti auḍulomiḥ
vijñāna ātmanaḥ eva deha indriya manaḥ buddhi saṃghāta upādhi saṃparkāt kaluṣībhūtasya jñāna dhyāna ādi sādhana anuṣṭhānāt saṃprasannasya deha ādi saṃghātāt utkramiṣyataḥ paramātmanā aikya upapatteḥ idam abhedena upakramaṇam iti auḍulomiḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
śrutiḥ ca evam bhavati eṣa saṃprasādaḥ u smāt śarīrāt samutthāya param jyotiḥ upasaṃpadya svena rūpeṇa abhiniṣpadyate iti
kvacid ca jīva āśrayam api nāma rūpam nadī nidarśanena jñāpayati yathā nadyaḥ syandamānāḥ samudre nāma rūpe vihāya
tathā vidvān nāma rūpāt vimuktaḥ parāt param puruṣam upaiti divyam iti
yathā loke nadyaḥ sva āśrayam eva nāma rūpam vihāya samudram upayanti evam sva āśrayam eva nāma rūpam vihāya param puruṣam upaiti iti hi tatra arthaḥ pratīyate dṛṣṭānta dārṣṭāntikayoḥ tulya tāyai
avasthiteḥ iti kāśakṛtsnaḥ
asya eva paramātmanaḥ nena api vijñāna ātma bhāvena avasthānāt upapannam idam abhedena upakramaṇam iti kāśakṛtsnaḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
tathā ca brāhmaṇam anena jīvena ātmanā anupraviśya nāma rūpe vyākaravāṇi iti evaṃjātīyakam parasya eva ātmanaḥ jīva bhāvena avasthānam darśayati
mantravarṇaḥ ca sarvāṇi rūpāṇi vicitya dhīraḥ nāmāni kṛtvā abhivadan yat āste
iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ
na ca tejaḥ prabhṛtīnām sṛṣṭau jīvasya pṛthak sṛṣṭiḥ śrutā yena parasmāt ātmanaḥ nyasta dvikāraḥ jīvaḥ syāt
kāśakṛtsnasya ācāryasya avikṛtaḥ parameśvaraḥ jīvaḥ na anyaḥ iti matam
āśmarathyasya tu yadi api jīvasya parasmāt ananya tvam abhipretam tathā api pratijñā siddheḥ iti sāpekṣa tva abhidhānāt kārya kāraṇa bhāvaḥ kiyān api abhipretaḥ iti gamyate
auḍulomi pakṣe punar spaṣṭam eva avasthā antara apekṣau bheda abhedau gamyete
tatra kāśakṛtsnīyam matam śruti anusāri iti gamyate pratipipādayiṣita artha anusārāt tat tvam asi ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
evam ca sati tad jñānāt amṛta tvam avakalpate
vikāra ātmaka tve hi jīvasya abhyupagamyamāne vikārasya prakṛti saṃbandhe pralaya prasaṅgāt na tad jñānāt amṛta tvam avakalpeta
atas ca sva āśrayasya nāma rūpasya asaṃbhavāt upādhi āśrayam nāma rūpam jīve upacaryate
atas eva utpattiḥ api jīvasya kvacid agni visphuliṅga udāharaṇena śrāvyamāṇā upādhi āśrayā eva veditavyā
yat api uktam prakṛtasya eva mahataḥ bhūtasya draṣṭavyasya bhūtebhyaḥ samutthānam vijñāna ātma bhāvena darśayan vijñāna ātmanaḥ eva idam draṣṭavya tvam darśayati iti tatra api iyam eva tri sūtrī yojayitavyā
pratijñā siddheḥ liṅgam āśmarathyaḥ idam atra pratijñātam ātmani vidite sarvam idam viditam bhavati idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā iti ca
upapāditam ca sarvasya nāma rūpa karma prapañcasya eka prasava tvāt eka pralaya tvāt ca dundubhi ādi dṛṣṭāntaiḥ ca kārya kāraṇayoḥ a vyatireka pratipādanāt
tasyāḥ eva pratijñāyāḥ siddhim sūcayati etat liṅgam yat mahataḥ bhūtasya bhūtebhyaḥ samutthānam vijñāna ātma bhāvena kathitam iti āśmarathyaḥ ācāryaḥ manyate abhede hi sati eka vijñānena sarva vijñānam pratijñātam avakalpate iti
utkramiṣyataḥ evaṃbhāvāt iti auḍulomiḥ utkramiṣyataḥ vijñāna ātmanaḥ jñāna dhyāna ādi sāmarthyāt saṃprasannasya pareṇa ātmanā aikya saṃbhavāt idam abheda abhidhānam iti auḍulomiḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
avasthiteḥ iti kāśakṛtsnaḥ asya eva paramātmanaḥ nena api vijñāna ātma bhāvena avasthānāt upapannam idam abheda abhidhānam iti kāśakṛtsnaḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
nanu uccheda abhidhānam etat etebhyaḥ bhūtebhyaḥ samutthāya tāni eva anuvinaśyati na pretya saṃjñā asti iti
katham etat abheda abhidhānam
na eṣa doṣaḥ
viśeṣa vijñāna vināśa abhiprāyam etat vināśa abhidhānam na ātma uccheda abhiprāyam
atra eva mā bhagavān amūmuhat na pretya saṃjñā asti iti paryanuyujya svayam eva śrutyā artha antarasya darśita tvāt na vai are ham moham bravīmi avināśī vai are yam ātmā an ucchitti dharmā mātrā saṃsargaḥ tu asya bhavati iti
etat uktam bhavati kūṭastha nityaḥ eva ayam vijñāna ghanaḥ ātmā
na asya uccheda prasaṅgaḥ sti
mātrābhiḥ tu asya bhūta indriya lakṣaṇābhiḥ avidyā kṛtābhiḥ a saṃsargaḥ vidyayā bhavati
saṃsarga abhāve ca tad kṛtasya viśeṣa vijñānasya abhāvāt na pretya saṃjñā asti iti uktam iti
yat api uktam vijñātāram are kena vijānīyāt iti kartṛ vacanena śabdena upasaṃhārāt vijñāna ātmanaḥ eva idam draṣṭavyam iti tat api kāśakṛtsnīyena eva darśanena pariharaṇīyam
api ca yatra hi dvaitam iva bhavati tat itaraḥ itaram paśyati iti ārabhya avidyā viṣaye tasya eva darśana ādi lakṣaṇam viśeṣa vijñānam prapañcya yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kena kam paśyet ityādinā vidyā viṣaye tasya eva darśana ādi lakṣaṇasya viśeṣa vijñānasya abhāvam abhidadhāti
punar ca viṣaya abhāve pi ātmānam vijānīyāt iti āśaṅkya vijñātāram are kena vijānīyāt iti āha
tatas ca viśeṣa vijñāna abhāva upapādana para tvāt vākyasya vijñāna dhātuḥ eva kevalaḥ san bhūta pūrva gatyā kartṛ vacanena tṛcāḥ nirdiṣṭaḥ iti gamyate
darśitam tu purastāt kāśakṛtsnīyasya pakṣasya śrutimat tvam
atas ca vijñāna ātma paramātmanoḥ avidyā pratyupasthāpita nāma rūpa racita deha ādi upādhi nimittaḥ bhedaḥ na pāramārthikaḥ iti eṣaḥ rthaḥ sarvaiḥ vedānta vādibhiḥ abhyupagantavyaḥ sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ekam eva advitīyam ātmā eva idam sarvam brahmā eva idam sarvam idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā na anyaḥ atas sti draṣṭā na anyat atas sti draṣṭṛ iti evaṃrūpābhyaḥ śrutibhyaḥ
smṛtibhyaḥ ca vāsudevaḥ sarvam iti kṣetrajñam ca api mām viddhi sarva kṣetreṣu bhārata samam sarveṣu bhūteṣu tiṣṭhantam parameśvaram iti evaṃrūpābhyaḥ
bheda darśana apavādāt ca anyaḥ sau anyaḥ ham asmi iti na sa veda yathā paśuḥ mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyum āpnoti yaḥ iha nānā iva paśyati iti evaṃjātīyakāt
sa vai eṣa mahān ajaḥ ātmā ajaraḥ maraḥ mṛtaḥ bhayaḥ brahma iti ca ātmani sarva vikriyā pratiṣedhāt
anyathā ca mumukṣūṇām nirapavāda vijñāna anupapatteḥ su niścita artha tva anupapatteḥ ca
nirapavādam hi vijñānam sarva ākāṅkṣā nivartakam ātma viṣayam iṣyate vedānta vijñāna su niścita arthāḥ
iti ca śruteḥ
tatra kaḥ mohaḥ kaḥ śokaḥ eka tvam anupaśyataḥ iti ca
sthita prajña lakṣaṇa smṛteḥ ca
sthite ca kṣetrajña param ātma eka tva viṣaye samyak darśane kṣetrajñaḥ paramātmā iti nāma mātra bhedāt kṣetrajñaḥ yam paramātmanaḥ bhinnaḥ paramātmā ayam kṣetrajñāt bhinnaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ ātma bheda viṣayaḥ yam
text2:
svātatryeṇa labdha sadbhāvam paśyati tam mithyādarśiam tat eva mithyādṛṣṭam brahma kṣatra ādikam jagat parākaroti iti bheda dṛṣṭim apodya idam sarvam
yat ayam ātmā iti sarvasya vastu jātasya ātmā a vyatirekam avatārayati dudubhi ādi dṛṣṭātaiḥ ca tam eva a vyatirekam draḍhayati asya mahataḥ bhūtasya ca prakṛtasya ātmanaḥ āma rūpa karma prapañca kāraṇatām vyācakṣāṇaḥ gamayati tathā eva ekāyaa prakriyāyām api sa viṣayasya
sa idriyasya sa ataḥkaraṇasya prapañcasya kṛtsam prajñā aghaam vyācakṣāṇaḥ gamayati tasmāt paramātmaaḥ eva ayam darśa ādi upadeśaḥ iti gamyate yat puar uktam priya saṃsūcita upakramāt vijñā ātmaaḥ eva ayam darśa ādi upadeśaḥ iti atra brūmaḥ
pratijñā siddheḥ liṅgam āśmarathyaḥ asti atra pratijñā vijñāte sarvam idam vijñātam bhavati idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā iti ca tasyāḥ pratijñāyāḥ siddhim sūcayati etat liṅgam yat priya saṃsūcitasya ātmanaḥ draṣṭavya tva ādi saṃkīrtaam yadi
hi vijñāātmā paramātma oyaḥ syāt tatas vijñāātmā vijñāyate iti yat pratijñātam tat hīyeta tasmāt pratijñā siddhi artham vijñāātma paramātmaoḥ abheda aṃśe upakramaṇam iti āśmarathyaḥ ācāryaḥ utkramiṣyate evambhāvāt iti
auḍulomiḥ eva deha idriya maaḥ buddhi saṃghāta upādhi saṃparkāt kaluṣībhūtasya deha ādi saṃghātāt utkramiṣyataḥ paramātma aikya upapatteḥ idam abhedena upakramaṇam iti auḍulomiḥ ācāryaḥ mayate śrutiḥ ca evam bhavati eṣa saṃprasādaḥ
smāt śarīrāt samutthāya param jyotiḥ upasaṃpadya svea rūpeṇa abhiiṣpadyate iti kvacid ca jīva āśrayam api āma rūpam jñāpayati yathā adyaḥ samudre
staṃgacchati āma rūpe vihāya tathā vidvāḥ āma rūpāt vimuktaḥ parāt param puruṣam upaiti divyam iti yathā loke adyaḥ sva āśrayam eva āma rūpam vihāya
samudram upayati evam jīvaḥ api sva āśrayam eva āma rūpam vihāya param puruṣam upaiti iti hi tatra arthaḥ pratīyate dṛṣṭāta dārṣṭātikayoḥ tulya tāyai avasthiteḥ iti kāśakṛtsaḥ asya eva
idam abhede upakramaṇam iti kāśakṛtsaḥ ācāryaḥ tathā ca brāhmaṇam āma rūpe vyākaravāṇi iti evaṃjātīyakam parasya eva ātmanaḥ jīva bhāve avasthāam
darśayati ca sarvāṇi rūpāṇi vicitya kṛtvā abhivada yat āste iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ ca tejaḥ prabhṛtīām sṛṣṭau jīvasya pṛthak sṛṣṭiḥ
śrutāḥ parasmāt ātma oyaḥ tad vikāraḥ jīvaḥ syāt kāśakṛtsasya ācāryasya avikṛtaḥ parameśvaraḥ jīvaḥ āyaḥ iti matam āśmarathyasya tu yadi api jīvasya parasmāt aaya tvam abhipretam tathā api
pratijñā siddheḥ iti sāpekṣa tva abhidhāāt kārya kāraṇa bhāvaḥ kiyā api abhipretaḥ iti gamyate auḍulomi pakṣe spaṣṭam eva avasthā tara apekṣau bheda abhedau gamyete tatra kāśakṛtsīyam matam śruti ausārī iti gamyate
tattvam asi ityādi śrutibhyaḥ evam ca sati amṛta tvam avakalpate vikāra ātmaka tve hi vikārasya prakṛti saṃbadhe pralaya prasaṅgāḥ a tajjñāāt amṛta tvam avakalpeta atas
ca sva āśrayasya āma rūpasya asaṃbhavāt upādhi āśrayam āma rūpam jīve upacaryate atas eva utpattiḥ api jīvasya kvacid śrāvyamāṇā upādhi āśrayā eva veditavyā yat api uktam prakṛtasya eva
mahataḥ bhūtasya draṣṭavyasya bhūtebhyaḥ eva idam draṣṭavya tvam darśayati iti tatra api iyam eva tri sūtrī yojayitavyā pratijñā siddheḥ liṅgam āśmarathyaḥ idam atra pratijñātam
vidite sarvam idam viditam bhavati idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā iti ca upapāditam ca sarvasya āma rūpa karma prapañcasya eka prasava tvāt eka pralaya tvāt ca dudubhi ādi dṛṣṭātaiḥ
ca kārya kāraṇayoḥ tasyāḥ eva pratijñāyāḥ siddhim sūcayati etat liṅgam mahataḥ bhūtasya bhūtebhyaḥ kathitam iti āśmarathyaḥ ācāryaḥ
abhede hi sati sarva vijñāam pratijñātam avakalpate iti utkramiṣyataḥ evaṃbhāvāt iti auḍulomiḥ utkramiṣyataḥ pareṇa ātma aikya saṃbhavāt idam abheda abhidhāam
iti auḍulomiḥ ācāryaḥ mayate avasthiteḥ iti kāśakṛtsaḥ asya eva idam abheda abhidhāam iti kāśakṛtsaḥ ācāryaḥ mayate etat
etebhyaḥ bhūtebhyaḥ samutthāya a pretya saṃjñā asti iti katham etat a bheda abhidhāam doṣaḥ etat ātma uccheda abhiprāyam atra eva mā
bhagavā amūmuha a pretya saṃjñā asti iti paryauyujya svayam eva śrutyā arthātarasya darśita tvāt a vā are ham moham bravīmi vā
are yam ātmā a ucchitti dharmā mātrā saṃsargaḥ tu asya bhavati iti etat uktam bhavati kūṭasthaityaḥ eva ayam ātmā sti mātrābhiḥ tu asya bhūta idriya lakṣaṇābhiḥ avidyā kṛtābhiḥ a saṃsargaḥ vidyayā
bhavati saṃsarga abhāve ca tad kṛtasya viśeṣa vijñāasya abhāvāt a pretya saṃjñā asti iti uktam iti yat api uktam vijñātāram are iti
śabdeā upasaṃhārāt vijñāātmaaḥ eva idam draṣṭavyam iti tat api pariharaṇīyam api ca yatra hi dvaitam iva bhavati tat itaraḥ itaram paśyati
iti ārabhya avidyā viṣaye tasya eva darśa ādi lakṣaṇam viśeṣa vijñāam prapañcya yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kam paśyet iti ādiā vidyā viṣaye tasya eva darśa ādi lakṣaṇasya viśeṣa vijñāasya abhāvam abhidadhāti
ca viṣaya abhāve pi ātmāam vijāīyāt iti āśaṅkya vijñātāram are vijāīyāt iti āha tatas ca viśeṣa vijñā abhāva upapāda a para tvāt vākyasya vijñāa dhātuḥ eva
kevalaḥ sa bhūta pūrva gatyā iti gamyate darśitam tu purastāt kāśakṛtsīyasya pakṣasya śrutimat tvam atas ca vijñā ātma paramātmaoḥ avidyā pratyupasthāpita āma rūpa racita deha ādi upādhi nimittaḥ bhedaḥ avidyā
pāramārthikaḥ iti eṣaḥ rthaḥ sarvaiḥ vedātavādibhiḥ abhyupagatavyaḥ sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ekam eva advitīyam ātmā eva idam sarvam brahmā eva idam sarvam idam sarvam
yat ayam ātmā sti draṣṭā atas sti draṣṭṛ iti evaṃrūpābhyaḥ śrutibhyaḥ smṛtibhyaḥ ca vāsudevaḥ sarvam iti kṣetrajñam ca api
mām viddhi sarva kṣetreṣu bhārata samam sarveṣu bhūteṣu tiṣṭhatam parameśvaram iti evaṃrūpābhyaḥ bheda darśa apavādāt ca ayaḥ sau ayaḥ ham asmi iti a sa veda
yathā paśuḥ mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyum yaḥ iha ā eva paśyati iti evaṃjātīyakāt sa vai eṣa mahā ajaḥ ātmā ajaraḥ maraḥ mṛtaḥ
brahma iti ca sarva vikriyā pratiṣedhāt ayathā ca mumukṣūṇām ca hi vijñāam sarva ākāṅkṣā aivartakam ātma viṣayam iṣyate iti
ca śruteḥ tatra kaḥ mohaḥ kaḥ śokaḥ eka tvam aupaśyataḥ iti ca sthita prajña lakṣaṇa smṛteḥ ca sthite ca kṣetrajña param ātma eka tva viṣaye samyak darśae kṣetrajñaḥ paramātmā iti
āma mātra bhedāt kṣetrajñaḥ yam paramātmā paramātmā ayam kṣetrajñāt iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ ātma bheda viṣayaḥ yam

text1:
ṣaṇa smṛteḥ ca
sthite ca kṣetrajña param ātma eka tva viṣaye samyak darśane kṣetrajñaḥ paramātmā iti nāma mātra bhedāt kṣetrajñaḥ yam paramātmanaḥ bhinnaḥ paramātmā ayam kṣetrajñāt bhinnaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ ātma bheda viṣayaḥ yam nirbandhaḥ nirarthakaḥ ekaḥ hi ayam ātmā nāma mātra bhedena bahudhā abhidhīyate iti
na hi satyam jñānam anantam brahma
yaḥ veda nihitam guhāyām iti kāṃcid eva ekām guhām adhikṛtya etat uktam
na ca brahmaṇaḥ nyaḥ guhāyām nihitaḥ sti tat sṛṣṭvā tat eva anuprāviśat iti sraṣṭuḥ eva praveśa śravaṇāt
ye tu nirbandham kurvanti te vedānta artham bādhamānāḥ śreyaḥ uddhāram samyak darśanam eva bādhante
kṛtakam anityam ca mokṣam kalpayanti
nyāyena ca na saṃgacchante iti
prakṛtiḥ ca pratijñā dṛṣṭānta an uparodhāt
prakṛti adhikaraṇam
yathā abhyudaya hetu tvāt dharmaḥ jijñāsyaḥ evam niḥśreyasa hetu tvāt brahma api jijñāsyam iti uktam
brahma ca janmādyasya yatas iti lakṣitam
tat ca lakṣaṇam ghaṭa rucaka ādīnām mṛd suvarṇa ādi vat prakṛti tve kulāla suvarṇakāra ādi vat nimitta tve ca samānam iti atas bhavati vimarśaḥ kimātmakam punar brahmaṇaḥ kāraṇatvam syāt iti
tatra nimitta kāraṇam eva tāvat kevalam syāt iti pratibhāti
kasmāt
īkṣā pūrvaka kartṛ tva śravaṇāt īkṣā pūrvakam hi brahmaṇaḥ kartṛ tvam avagamyate saḥ īkṣāṃcakre sa prāṇam asṛjata ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
īkṣā pūrvakam ca kartṛ tvam nimitta kāraṇeṣu eva kulāla ādiṣu dṛṣṭam
aneka kāraka pūrvikā ca kriyā phala siddhiḥ loke dṛṣṭā
sa ca nyāyaḥ ādi kartari api yuktaḥ saṃkramayitum
īśvara tva prasiddheḥ ca īśvarāṇām hi rāja vaivasvata ādīnām nimitta kāraṇa tvam eva kevalam pratīyate
tadvat parameśvarasya api nimitta kāraṇa tvam eva yuktam pratipattum
kāryam ca idam jagat sa avayavam acetanam aśuddham ca dṛśyate kāraṇena api tasya tādṛśena eva bhavitavyam kārya kāraṇayoḥ sārūpya darśanāt
brahma ca an evaṃlakṣaṇam avagamyate niṣkalam niṣkriyam śāntam niravadyam nirañjanam ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
pāriśeṣyāt brahmaṇaḥ nyat upādānakāraṇam aśuddhi ādi guṇakam smṛti prasiddham abhyupagantavyam brahma kāraṇatva śruteḥ nimitta tva mātre paryavasānāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ prakṛtiḥ ca upādānakāraṇam ca brahma abhyupagantavyam nimitta kāraṇam ca
na kevalam nimitta kāraṇam eva
kasmāt
pratijñā dṛṣṭānta an uparodhāt
evam hi pratijñā dṛṣṭāntau śrautau na upurudhyete
pratijñā tāvat uta tam ādeśam aprākṣyaḥ yena a śrutam śrutam bhavati a matam matam a vijñātam vijñātam iti
tatra ca ekena vijñātena sarvam anyat avijñātam api vijñātam bhavati iti pratīyate
tat ca upādāna kāraṇa vijñāne sarva vijñānam saṃbhavati upādāna kāraṇa avyatirekāt kāryasya
nimitta kāraṇa a vyatirekaḥ tu kāryasya na asti loke takṣṇaḥ prāsāda vyatireka darśanāt
dṛṣṭāntaḥ yathā somya ekena mṛd piṇḍena sarvam mṛd mayam vijñātam syāt vācā ārambhaṇam vikāraḥ nāmadheyam mṛttikā iti eva satyam iti upādāna kāraṇa gocaraḥ eva āmnāyate
tathā ekena loha maṇinā sarvam loha mayam vijñātam syāt ekena nakha nikṛntanena sarvam kārṣṇāyasam vijñātam syāt iti ca
tathā anyatra api kasmin nu bhagavaḥ vijñāte sarvam idam vijñātam bhavati iti pratijñā
yathā pṛthivyām oṣadhayaḥ saṃbhavanti iti dṛṣṭāntaḥ
tathā ātmani khalvare dṛṣṭe śrute mate vijñāte idam sarvam viditam iti pratijñā
sa yathā dundubheḥ hanyamānasya na bāhyān śabdān śaknuyāt grahaṇāya dundubheḥ tu grahaṇena dundubhi āghātasya vā śabdaḥ gṛhītaḥ iti dṛṣṭāntaḥ
evam yathāsaṃbhavam prati vedāntam pratijñā dṛṣṭāntau prakṛti tva sādhanau pratyetavyau
yatas iti iyam api pañcamī yatas vā imāni bhūtāni jāyante iti atra jani kartuḥ prakṛtiḥ iti viśeṣa smaraṇāt prakṛti lakṣaṇe eva apādāne draṣṭavyā
nimitta tvam tu adhiṣṭhātṛ antara abhāvāt adhigantavyam
yathā hi loke mṛd suvarṇa ādikam upādānakāraṇam kulāla suvarṇakāra ādīn adhiṣṭhātṛn apekṣya pravartate na evam brahmaṇaḥ upādānakāraṇasya sataḥ nyaḥ dhiṣṭhātā apekṣyaḥ sti prāk utpatteḥ ekam eva advitīyam iti avadhāraṇāt
adhiṣṭhātṛ antara abhāvaḥ veditavyaḥ adhiṣṭhātari hi upādānāt anyasmin abhyupagamyamāne punar api eka vijñānena sarva vijñānasya asaṃbhavāt pratijñā dṛṣṭānta uparodhaḥ eva syāt
tasmāt adhiṣṭhātṛ antara abhāvāt ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam upādāna antara abhāvāt ca prakṛti tvam
kutas ca ātmanaḥ kartṛ tva prakṛti tve
abhidhyā upadeśāt ca
abhidhyā upadeśaḥ ca ātmanaḥ kartṛ tva prakṛti tve gamayati saḥ kāmayata bahu syām prajāyeya iti tat aikṣata bahu syām prajāyeya iti ca
tatra abhidhyāna pūrvikāyāḥ svātantrya pravṛtteḥ kartā iti gamyate
bahu syām iti pratyagātma viṣaya tvāt bahu bhavana abhidhyānasya prakṛtiḥ iti api gamyate
sākṣāt ca ubhaya āmnānāt
prakṛti tvasya ayam abhyuccayaḥ
itas ca prakṛtiḥ brahma yatkāraṇam sākṣāt brahma eva kāraṇam upādāya ubhau prabhava pralayau āmnāyete sarvāṇi ha vai imāni bhūtāni ākāśāt eva samutpadyante
ākāśam pratyastam yanti iti
yat hi yasmāt prabhavati yasmin ca pralīyate tat tasya upādānam prasiddham yathā vrīhi yava ādīnām pṛthivī
sākṣāt iti ca upādāna antara anupādānam sūcayati ākāśāt eva iti
pratyastamayaḥ ca na upādānāt anyatra kāryasya dṛṣṭaḥ
ātma kṛteḥ pariṇāmāt
itas ca prakṛtiḥ brahma yatkāraṇam brahma prakriyāyām tadā ātmānam svayam akuruta iti ātmanaḥ karma tvam kartṛ tvam ca darśayati ātmānam iti karma tvam svayam akuruta iti kartṛ tvam
katham punar pūrva siddhasya sataḥ kartṛ tvena vyavasthitasya kriyamāṇa tvam śakyam saṃpādayitum
pariṇāmāt iti brūmaḥ pūrva siddhaḥ api hi sanna ātmā viśeṣeṇa vikāra ātmanā pariṇamayāmāsa ātmānam iti
vikāra ātmanā ca pariṇāmaḥ mṛd ādyāsu prakṛtiṣu upalabdhaḥ
svayam iti ca viśeṣaṇāt nimitta antara anapekṣa tvam api pratīyate
pariṇāmāt iti vā pṛthak sūtram
tasya eṣaḥ rthaḥ itas ca prakṛtiḥ brahma yatkāraṇam brahmaṇaḥ eva vikāra ātmanā ca pariṇāmaḥ sāmānādhikaraṇyena āmnāyate sat ca tyad ca abhavat niruktam ca aniruktam ca ityādinā iti
yoniḥ ca hi gīyate
itas ca prakṛtiḥ brahma yatkāraṇam brahma yoniḥ iti api paṭhyate vedānteṣu kartāram īśam puruṣam brahma yonim iti yat bhūtayonim paripaśyanti dhīrāḥ iti ca
yoni śabdaḥ ca prakṛti vacanaḥ samadhigataḥ loke pṛthivī yoniḥ oṣadhi vanaspatīnām iti
strī yoneḥ api asti eva avayava dvāreṇa garbham prati upādāna kāraṇa tvam
kvacid sthāna vacanā u pi yoni śabdaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ indra niṣade akāri iti
vākyaśeṣāt tu atra prakṛti vacana tā parigṛhyate yathā ūrṇanābhiḥ sṛjate gṛhṇate ca iti evaṃjātīyakāt

yat punar idam uktam īkṣā pūrvakam kartṛ tvam nimitta kāraṇeṣu eva kulāla ādiṣu loke dṛṣṭam na upādāneṣu ityādi tat pratyucyate na loka vat iha bhavitavyam
na hi ayam anumāna gamyaḥ rthaḥ
śabda gamya tvāt tu asya arthasya yathāśabdam iha bhavitavyam
śabdaḥ ca īkṣituḥ īśvarasya prakṛti tvam pratipādayati iti avocāma
punar ca etat sarvam vistareṇa prativakṣyāmaḥ

sarva vyākhyāna adhikaraṇam
īkṣateḥ na a śabdam iti ārabhya pradhāna kāraṇa vādaḥ sūtraiḥ eva punar punar āśaṅkya nirākṛtaḥ tasya hi pakṣasya upodbalakāni kānicid liṅga ābhāsāni vedānteṣu āpātena manda matīn prati bhānti iti
sa ca kārya kāraṇa ananyatva abhyupagamāt pratyāsannaḥ vedānta vādasya devala prabhṛtibhiḥ ca kaiścid dharmasūtra kāraiḥ sva grantheṣu āśritaḥ tena tad pratiṣedhe eva tīva kṛtaḥ na aṇu ādi kāraṇa vāda pratiṣedhe
te pi tu brahma kāraṇa vāda pakṣasya pratipakṣa tvāt pratiṣeddhavyāḥ
teṣām api upodbalakam vaidikam kiṃcid liṅgam āpātena manda matīn prati bhāyāt iti atas pradhāna malla nibarhaṇa nyāyena atidiśati etena pradhāna kāraṇa vāda pratiṣedha nyāya kalāpena sarve ṇu ādi kāraṇa vādāḥ api pratiṣiddha tayā vyākhyātāḥ veditavyāḥ teṣām api pradhāna vat aśabda tvāt śabda virodhi tvāt ca iti
vyākhyātāḥ vyākhyātāḥ iti pada abhyāsaḥ dhyāya parisamāptim dyotayati
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye prathamaḥ dhyāyaḥ

smṛti anavakāśa doṣa prasaṅgāt smṛtiḥ ca tantra ākhyā parama ṛṣi praṇītā śiṣṭa parigṛhītā anyāḥ ca tad anusāriṇyaḥ smṛtayaḥ tāḥ evam sati anavakāśāḥ prasajyeran
tāsu hi acetanam pradhānam svatantram jagataḥ kāraṇam upanibadhyate
manu ādi smṛtayaḥ tāvat codanā lakṣaṇena agnihotra ādinā dharma jātena apekṣitam artham samarpayantyaḥ sa avakāśāḥ bhavanti asya varṇasya asmin kāle nena vidhānena upanayanam īdṛśaḥ ca ācāraḥ ittham veda adhyayanam ittham samāvartanam ittham saha dharmacāriṇī saṃyogaḥ iti
tathā puruṣa arthān catur varṇa āśrama dharmān nānāvidhān vidadhati
na evam kāpila ādi smṛtīnām anuṣṭheye viṣaye avakāśaḥ sti
mokṣa sādhanam eva hi samyagdarśanam adhikṛtya tāḥ praṇītāḥ
yadi tatra api anavakāśāḥ syuḥ ānarthakyam eva āsām prasajyeta

text2:
ṣaṇa smṛteḥ ca sthite ca kṣetrajña param ātma eka tva viṣaye samyak darśae kṣetrajñaḥ paramātmā iti
āma mātra bhedāt kṣetrajñaḥ yam paramātmā paramātmā ayam kṣetrajñāt iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ ātma bheda viṣayaḥ yam ekaḥ hi ayam ātmā bahudhā abhidhīyate iti
a hi satyam jñāam brahma yaḥ veda ihitam guhāyām iti kāṃcid eva ekām guhām adhikṛtya etat uktam a ca brahmaṇaḥ yaḥ
guhāyām sti tat sṛṣṭvā tat eva auprāviśat iti sraṣṭuḥ eva praveśa śravaṇāt ye tu kurvati te śreyaḥ uddhāram samyak darśam
eva bādhate kṛtakam aityam ca mokṣam kalpayati ca a saṃgacchate iti prakṛtiḥ ca pratijñā dṛṣṭātā uparodhāt prakṛti adhikaraṇam yathā abhyudaya hetu tvāt dharmaḥ jijñāsyaḥ evam iḥśreyasa hetu tvāt brahma api jijñāsyam iti uktam
brahma ca yatas iti lakṣitam tat ca lakṣaṇam ghaṭa rucaka ādīām mṛd suvarṇa ādi vat prakṛti tve kulāla suvarṇakāra ādi vaimitta tve ca bhavati vimarśaḥ kimātmakam puar brahmaṇaḥ kāraṇatvam syāt iti tatra
imittakāraṇam eva tāvat kevalam syāt iti pratibhāti kasmāt īkṣā pūrvaka kartṛ tva śravaṇāt īkṣā pūrvakam hi brahmaṇaḥ kartṛ tvam avagamyate saḥ īkṣāṃcakre sa prāṇam asṛjata ityādi śrutibhyaḥ īkṣā pūrvakam ca kartṛ tvam imittakāraṇeṣu eva kulāla ādiṣu
dṛṣṭam ca kriyā phala siddhiḥ loke dṛṣṭā sa ca ādi kartari api yuktaḥ saṃkramayitum īśvara tva prasiddheḥ ca īśvarāṇām hi imitta kāraṇa tvam eva kevalam pratīyate tadvat parameśvarasya api imitta kāraṇa tvam eva
yuktam pratipattum kāryam ca idam jagat sāvayavam acetaam aśuddham ca dṛśyate kāraṇe api tasya bhavitavyam kārya kāraṇayoḥ sārūpya darśaāt brahma ca a evaṃlakṣaṇam avagamyate iṣkalam iṣkriyam śātam iravadyam irañjaam
ityādi śrutibhyaḥ pāriśeṣyāt brahmaṇaḥ yat upādāakāraṇam aśuddhi ādi guṇakam smṛti prasiddham abhyupagatavyam brahma kāraṇatva śruteḥ imitta tva mātre paryavasāāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ prakṛtiḥ ca upādāakāraṇam ca brahma abhyupagatavyam imitta kāraṇam ca a kevalam imitta kāraṇam eva kasmāt pratijñā dṛṣṭātā uparodhāt evam hi pratijñā dṛṣṭātau
śrautau pratijñā tāvat uta tam ādeśam aprākṣyaḥ ye aśrutam śrutam bhavati amatam matam avijñātam vijñātam iti tatra ca eke vijñātea sarvam ayat avijñātam api vijñātam bhavati iti pratīyate tat ca upādā kāraṇa vijñāe
saṃbhavati upādā kāraṇa a vyatirekāt kāryasya imitta kāraṇa a vyatirekaḥ tu kāryasya loke takṣṇaḥ prāsāda vyatireka darśaāt yathā somya sarvam mṛ mayam vijñātam syāt vācā ārambhaṇam vikāraḥ āmadheyam mṛttikā iti eva
satyam iti upādā akāraṇa gocaraḥ tathā sarvam loha mayam vijñātam syāt sarvam kārṣṇāyasam vijñātam syāt iti ca tathā yatra api
bhagavaḥ vijñāte sarvam idam vijñātam bhavati iti pratijñā yathā pṛthivyām oṣadhayaḥ saṃbhavati iti dṛṣṭātaḥ tathā khalvare dṛṣṭe śrute mate vijñāte idam
sarvam viditam iti pratijñā sa yathā dudubheḥ hayamāasya bāhyān śabdān śakuyāt grahaṇāya dudubheḥ tu dudubhyā ghātasya vā śabdaḥ gṛhītaḥ iti dṛṣṭātaḥ evam yathāsaṃbhavam
pratijñā dṛṣṭātau prakṛti tva sādhaau pratyetavyau yatas iti iyam api pañcamī yatas vā imāi bhūtāi jāyate iti atra prakṛtiḥ iti viśeṣa smaraṇāt prakṛti lakṣaṇe eva apādāe draṣṭavyāḥ imitta tvam tu adhiṣṭhātratara abhāvāt adhigatavyam
yathā hi loke mṛd suvarṇa ādikam upādā akāraṇam kulāla suvarṇakāra ādi adhiṣṭhātṛ apekṣya pravartate brahmaṇaḥ upādā akāraṇasya brahmaṇaḥ upādā akāraṇasya prāk utpatteḥ ekam eva advitīyam iti avadhāraṇāt adhiṣṭhātṛ atara abhāvaḥ api veditavyaḥ adhiṣṭhātari hi sarva vijñānasya asaṃbhavāt pratijñādṛṣṭāta uparodhaḥ
eva syāt tasmāt adhiṣṭhātṛ atara abhāvāt ātmaaḥ kartṛ tvam upādāātara abhāvāt ca prakṛti tvam kutas ca ātmaaḥ kartṛ tva prakṛti tve abhidhyā upadeśāt ca abhidhyā upadeśaḥ ca ātmaaḥ kartṛ tva prakṛti tve gamayati sā u kāmayata bahu syām prajāyeya iti tat aikṣata bahu
syām prajāyeya iti ca tatra abhidhyā a pūrvikāyāḥ svātatrya pravṛtteḥ kartā iti gamyate bahu syām iti pratyagātma viṣaya tvāt bahu bhava abhidhyā asya prakṛtiḥ iti api gamyate sākṣāt prakṛti tvasya ayam abhyuccayaḥ itas ca prakṛtiḥ brahma yat kāraṇam sākṣāt brahma eva
kāraṇam upādāya ubhau prabhava pralayau āmāyete sarvāṇi ha vai imāi bhūtāya ākāśāt eva samutpadyate ākāśam pratyastam yati iti yat hi yasmāt prabhavati yasmin ca pralīyate tat tasya upādāam prasiddham yathā
vrīhi yava ādīām pṛthivī sākṣāt iti ca sūcayati ākāśāt eva iti prati asta mayaḥ ca kāryasya dṛṣṭaḥ ātma kṛteḥ pariṇāmāt itas ca prakṛtiḥ brahma yatkāraṇam
brahma prakriyāyām tat ātmā am svayam akuruta iti ātmanaḥ karma tvam kartṛ tvam ca darśayati ātman am iti karma tvam svayam akuruta iti kartṛ tvam katham puas pūrva siddhasya sataḥ vyavasthitasya
kriyamāṇa tvam śakyam saṃpādayitum pariṇāmāt iti brūmaḥ pūrva siddhaḥ api hi sa ātmā viśeṣeṇa vikāra ātmā pariṇamayāmāsa ātmā am iti ca pariṇāmaḥ mṛd ādyāsu prakṛtiṣu upalabdhaḥ svayam iti ca pratīyate
pariṇāmāt iti vā pṛthak sūtram tasya eṣa ṛthaḥ itas ca prakṛtiḥ brahma yatkāraṇam brahmaṇaḥ eva ca pariṇāmaḥ sat ca tyad ca abhavaiḥ uktam ca iti ādi eti ca
hi gīyate itas ca prakṛtiḥ brahma yatkāraṇam brahma yoiḥ iti api paṭhyate kartāram īśam puruṣam brahmayoim iti yat bhūtayoim paripaśyati dhīrāḥ iti ca yoi śabdaḥ ca prakṛti vacaḥ
samadhigataḥ loke pṛthivī iti strī yoeḥ api asti eva avayava dvāreṇa garbham prati upādā kāraṇa tvam yoi śabdaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ iti vākya śeṣāt tu atra prakṛtivacaatā parigṛhyate yathā ūrṇaābhiḥ
sṛjate gṛhṇate ca iti evaṃjātīyakāt tat evam prakṛti tvam brahmaṇaḥ prasiddham yat puar idam uktam īkṣā pūrvakam kartṛ tvam imitta kāraṇeṣu eva kulāla ādiṣu loke dṛṣṭam tat pratyucyate a loka vat iha bhavitavyam
hi ayam aumā agamyaḥ ṛthaḥ śabda gamya tvāt tu asya arthasya yathāśabdam iha bhavitavyam śabdaḥ ca īkṣituḥ īśvarasya prakṛti tvam pratipādayati iti avocāma puas ca etat sarvam vistareṇa prativakṣyāmaḥ sarve vyākhyātāḥ vyākhyātāḥ sarva vyākhyā adhikaraṇam īkṣateḥ āśabdam iti ārabhya
pradhā a kāraṇa vādaḥ sūtraiḥ eva puas puas āśaṅkyaḥ irākṛtaḥ tasya hi pakṣasya upodbalakāi kāicid liṅga ābhāsāi mada matī prati bhāti iti sa ca kārya kāraṇa āaya tva abhyupagamāt
pratyāsaḥ vedāta vādasya devala prabhṛtibhiḥ ca kaiścid dharmasūtra kāraiḥ sva gratheṣu āśritaḥ tad pratiṣedhe eva tīva kṛtaḥ āṇu ādi kāraṇavāda pratiṣedhe te tu brahma kāraṇavāda pakṣasya pratipakṣa tvāt
pratiṣeddhavyāḥ teṣām api upodbalakam vaidikam kiṃcid liṅgam mada matī prati bhāyāt iti atas sarve ṇu ādi kāraṇavādāḥ api pratiṣiddha tayā
vyākhyātāḥ veditavyāḥ teṣām api pradhā a vat aśabda tvāt śabda virodhi tvāt ca iti vyākhyātāḥ vyākhyātāḥ iti pada abhyāsaḥ dhyāya parisamāptim dyotayati iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye
prathamaḥ dhyāyaḥ murat dvitīyaḥ udhyāyaḥ prathamaḥ pādaḥ smṛti a avakāśa doṣa prasaṅgaḥ iti āya smṛti a avakāśa doṣa prasaṅgāt smṛti adhikaraṇam yat uktam brahma eva sarvajñam jagataḥ kāraṇam iti tat ayuktam
kutas smṛti a avakāśa doṣa prasaṅgāt smṛtiḥ ca tatra ākhyā parama ṛṣi praṇītā śiṣṭa parigṛhītāḥ ayāḥ ca tad ausāriṇyaḥ smṛtayaḥ tāḥ evam sati a avakāśāḥ prasajyera tāsu hi a cetaam pradhāam
svatatram jagataḥ kāraṇam mava ādi smṛtayaḥ tāvat artham samarpayatyaḥ sa avakāśā bhavati asya varṇasya asmi kāle īdṛśaḥ ca ācāraḥ ittham
ittham samāvarta ittham saha dharmacāriṇī saṃyogaḥ iti tathā puruṣa arthān catur varṇa āśrama dharmāḥ vidadhati evam kāpila ādi smṛtīām auṣṭheye viṣaye avakāśaḥ sti mokṣa sādhaam eva hi
samyak darśaam adhikṛtya tāḥ praṇītāḥ yadi tatra api a avakāśāḥ syuḥ āarthakyam eva āsām prasajyeta vyākhyātavyāḥ katham puar īkṣati ādibhyaḥ hetubhyaḥ brahmā eva
sarvajñam jagataḥ kāraṇam iti avadhāritaḥ śruti arthaḥ ākṣipyate bhavet ayam ākṣepaḥ svatatra prajñāām paratatra prajñāḥ tu prāyeṇa svātatryeṇa śruti artham avadhārayitum
a śakuvataḥ prakhyāta praṇetṛkāsu smṛtiṣu avalambera ca śruti artham pratipitsera asmad kṛte ca vyākhyāe a viśvasyuḥ bahu māāt smṛtīām praṇetṛṣu kapila prabhṛtīām ca ārṣam jñāam a pratihatam
smaryate śrutiḥ ca bhavati ṛṣim prasūtam kapilam yaḥ tam agre bibharti jāyamāam ca paśyet iti tasmai ā eṣām matam ayathārtham
śakyam saṃbhāvayitum tarka avaṣṭambhe ca te ṛtham pratiṣṭhāpayati tasmāt api vyākhyeyāḥ iti ākṣepaḥ tasya samādhiḥ āya smṛtya avakāśa doṣa prasaṅgāt iti yadi
smṛti a avakāśa doṣa prasaṅge īśvara kāraṇa vādaḥ ākṣipyeta evam api ayāḥ smṛtayaḥ avakāśāḥ prasajyera tāḥ udāhariṣyāmaḥ yad tat sūkṣmam avijñeyam iti param brahma prakṛtya 
sa hi atarātmā bhūtāām kṣetrajñaḥ ca iti kathyate iti ca uktvā tasmāt avyaktam triguṇam dvijasattama iti āha tathā yatra api
avyaktam puruṣe brahmaiḥ guṇe saṃpralīyate iti āha atas ca saṃkṣepam imam śrṛṇudhvam ārāyaṇaḥ sarvam idam purāṇaḥ sa sarga kāle ca
karoti sargam saṃhāra kāle ca tat atti bhūyas iti purāṇe bhagavadgītāsu ca aham kṛtsasya jagataḥ prabhavaḥ pralayaḥ tathā iti eva
ca prakṛtyā āpastambaḥ paṭhati tasmāt kāyāḥ prabhavati sarve sa mūlam śāśvatikaḥ saḥ ityaḥ iti evam aekaśas smṛtiṣu api īśvaraḥ ca prakāśyate
smṛti bale a eva uttaram pravakṣyāmi iti darśitam tu śrutīām īśvara kāraṇa vādam prati tātparyam vipratipattau ca smṛtīām avaśya kartavye yatara parigrahe yatara parityāge ca śruti ausāriṇyaḥ
smṛtayaḥ pramāṇam a apekṣyāḥ itarāḥ tat uktam pramāṇa lakṣaṇe virodhe tu aapekṣam syāt asati hi iti
atareṇa kaścid upalabhate iti śakyam saṃbhāvayitum imitta abhāvāt śakyam kapila ādīām siddhāām apratihata jñāa tvāt iti ced a siddheḥ api sa apekṣa tvāt hi siddhiḥ
sa ca dharmaḥ codaā lakṣaṇaḥ tatas ca pūrva siddhāyāḥ codaāyāḥ śakyate siddha vyapāśraya kalpaāyām api bahu tvāt siddhāām pradarśitā prakāreṇa smṛti vipratipattau satyām
a śruti vyapāśrayāt ayaḥ irṇaya kāraṇam asti paratatra prajñasya api ākasmāt smṛti viśeṣa viṣayaḥ pakṣapātaḥ yuktaḥ kasyacid kvacid pakṣapāte sati puruṣam ati vaiśvarūpyeṇa tattva avyavasthā aprasaṅgāt tasmāt tasya api smṛti vipratipatti upayāse
ca sa mārge prajñā saṃgrahaṇīyā yā tu śrutiḥ kapilasya jñā atiśayam pradarśayatī pradarśitā tayā śruti viruddham api kāpilam matam śraddhātum śakyam
kapilam iti śruti sāma āya mātra tvāt ayasya ca kapilasya sagara putrāṇām prataptuḥ smaraṇāt ca prāpti rahitasya a sādhaka tvāt bhavati ca āyā maoḥ māhātmyam prakhyāpayatī śrutiḥ yat
vai kiṃca mauḥ avadat tat bheṣajam iti ca sarva bhūteṣu ca ātmāam sarva bhūtāi ca ātmai saṃpaśyaḥ ātma yājī vai svārā

na vilakṣaṇa tvāt asya tathātvam ca śabdāt
na vilakṣaṇa tva adhikaraṇam
brahma asya jagataḥ nimitta kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ced yasya pakṣasya ākṣepaḥ smṛti nimittaḥ parihṛtaḥ
tarka nimittaḥ idānīm ākṣepaḥ parihriyate
kutas punar asmin avadhārite āgama arthe tarka nimittasya ākṣepasya avakāśaḥ
nanu dharme iva brahmaṇi api anapekṣaḥ āgamaḥ bhavitum arhati
bhavet ayam avaṣṭambhaḥ yadi pramāṇa antara an avagāhyaḥ āgama mātra prameyaḥ yam arthaḥ syāt anuṣṭheya rūpaḥ iva dharmaḥ
pariniṣpanna rūpam tu brahma avagamyate
pariniṣpanne ca vastuni pramāṇa antarāṇām asti avakāśaḥ yathā pṛthivī ādiṣu
yathā ca śrutīnām paraspara virodhe sati eka vaśena itarāḥ nīyante evam pramāṇa antara virodhe tad vaśena eva śrutiḥ nīyeta
dṛṣṭa sādharmyeṇa ca adṛṣṭam artham samarpayantī yuktiḥ anubhavasya saṃnikṛṣyate viprakṛṣyate tu śrutiḥ aitihya mātreṇa svārtha abhidhānāt
anubhava avasānam ca brahma vijñānam avidyāyāḥ nivartakam mokṣa sādhanam ca dṛṣṭa phala tayā iṣyate
śrutiḥ api śrotavyaḥ mantavyaḥ iti śravaṇa vyatirekeṇa mananam vidadhatī tarkam api atra ādartavyam darśayati
atas tarka nimittaḥ punar ākṣepaḥ kriyate na vilakṣaṇa tvāt asya iti
yat uktam cetanam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ iti tat na upapadyate
kasmāt
vilakṣaṇa tvāt asya vikārasya prakṛtyāḥ idam hi brahma kāryatvena abhipreyamāṇam jagat brahma vilakṣaṇam acetanam aśuddham ca dṛśyate
brahma ca jagat vilakṣaṇam cetanam śuddham ca śrūyate
na ca vilakṣaṇa tve prakṛti vikāra bhāvaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ
na hi rucaka ādayaḥ vikārāḥ mṛd prakṛtikāḥ bhavanti śarāva ādayaḥ vā suvarṇa prakṛtikāḥ
mṛdā eva tu mṛd anvitāḥ vikārāḥ prakriyante suvarṇena ca suvarṇa anvitāḥ
tathā idam api jagat acetanam sukha dukha moha anvitam sat acetanasya eva sukha duḥkha moha ātmakasya kāraṇasya kāryam bhavitum arhati na vilakṣaṇasya brahmaṇaḥ
brahma vilakṣaṇa tvam ca asya jagataḥ śuddhi acetana tva darśanāt avagantavyam aśuddham hi idam jagat sukha duḥkha moha ātmaka tayā pratīyate prīti paritāpa viṣāda ādi hetutvāt svarga naraka ādi uccāvaca prapañca tvāt ca
acetanam ca idam jagat cetanam prati kārya kāraṇa bhāvena upakaraṇa bhāva upagamāt
na hi sāmye sati upakārya upakāraka bhāvaḥ bhavati
na hi pradīpau parasparasya upakurutaḥ
nanu cetanam api kārya kāraṇam svāmi bhṛtya nyāyena bhoktuḥ upakariṣyati
na svāmi bhṛtyayoḥ api acetana aṃśasya eva cetanam pratyupakāraka tvāt
yaḥ hi ekasya cetanasya parigrahaḥ buddhi ādiḥ acetana bhāgaḥ saḥ eva anyasya cetanasya upakaroti na tu svayam eva cetanaḥ cetanā antarasya upakaroti apakaroti vā
niratiśayāḥ hi akartāraḥ cetanāḥ iti sāṃkhyāḥ manyante
tasmāt acetanam kāryakāraṇam
na ca kāṣṭha loṣṭa ādīnām cetana tve kiṃcid pramāṇam asti
prasiddhaḥ ca ayam cetana acetana vibhāgaḥ loke
tasmāt brahma vilakṣaṇa tvāt na idam jagat tad prakṛtikam
yaḥ pi kaścid ācakṣīta śrutyā jagataḥ cetana prakṛtikatām tad balena eva samastam jagat cetanam avagamiṣyāmi prakṛti rūpasya vikāre nvaya darśanāt
avibhāvanam tu caitanyasya pariṇāma viśeṣāt bhaviṣyati
yathā spaṣṭa caitanyānām api ātmanām svāpa mūrchā ādi avasthāsu caitanyam na vibhāvyate evam kāṣṭha loṣṭa ādīnām api caitanyam na vibhāvayiṣyate
etasmāt eva ca vibhāvita tva a vibhāvita tva kṛtāt viśeṣāt rūpa ādi bhāva abhāvābhyām ca kārya kāraṇānām ātmanām ca cetana tva aviśeṣe guṇa pradhāna bhāvaḥ na virotsyate
yathā ca pārthiva tva aviśeṣe māṃsa sūpa odana ādīnām pratyātma vartinaḥ viśeṣāt paraspara upakāri tvam bhavati evam iha api bhaviṣyati
pravibhāga prasiddhiḥ api atas eva na virotsyate iti tena api kathaṃcid cetana tva acetana tva lakṣaṇam vilakṣaṇa tvam parihriyeta
śuddhi aśuddhi tva lakṣaṇam tu vilakṣaṇa tvam nā eva parihriyate
na ca itarat api vilakṣaṇa tvam parihartum śakyate iti āha tathātvam ca śabdāt iti
an avagamyamānam eva hi idam loke samastasya vastunaḥ cetana tvam cetana prakṛtika tva śravaṇāt śabda śaraṇa tayā kevalayā utprekṣeta
tat ca śabdena eva virudhyate yatas śabdāt api tathātvam avagamyate
tathātvam iti prakṛti vilakṣaṇa tvam kathayati
śabdaḥ eva vijñānam ca a vijñānam ca iti kasyacid vibhāgasya acetana tām śrāvayan cetanāt brahmaṇaḥ vilakṣaṇam acetanam jagat śrāvayati
nanu cetanatvam api kvacid acetana tva abhimatānām bhūta indriyāṇām śrūyate yathā mṛd abravīt āpaḥ bruvan iti tat tejaḥ aikṣata tāḥ āpaḥ aikṣanta iti ca evamādyā bhūta viṣayā cetana tva śrutiḥ
indriya viṣayāḥ api te ha ime prāṇāḥ ahaṃśreyase vivadamānāḥ brahma jagmuḥ iti te ha vācam ūcuḥ tvam naḥ udgāya iti iti evamādyā indriya viṣayā iti

viśeṣa anugatibhyām viśeṣaḥ hi bhoktṛṇām bhūta indriyāṇām ca cetana acetana pravibhāga lakṣaṇaḥ prāk abhihitaḥ
sarva cetana tāyām ca asau na upapadyeta
api ca kauṣītakinaḥ prāṇa saṃvāde karaṇa mātra āśaṅkā vinivṛttaye dhiṣṭhātṛ cetana parigrahāya devatā śabdena viśiṣanti etāḥ ha vai devatāḥ ahaṃśreyase vivadamānāḥ iti tāḥ vai etāḥ sarvāḥ devatāḥ prāṇe niḥśreyasam viditvā iti ca
anugatāḥ ca sarvatra abhimāninyaḥ cetanāḥ devatāḥ mantra arthavāda itihāsa purāṇa ādibhyaḥ vagamyante agniḥ vāc bhūtvā mukham prāviśat iti evamādikā ca śrutiḥ karaṇeṣu anugrāhikām devatām anugatām darśayati
prāṇa saṃvāda vākya śeṣe ca te ha prāṇāḥ prajāpatim pitaram etya ūcuḥ iti śreṣṭha tva nirdhāraṇāya prajāpati gamanam tad vacanāt ca ekaika utkramaṇena anvaya vyatirekābhyām prāṇa śraiṣṭhya pratipattiḥ tasmai bali haraṇam iti ca evaṃjātīyakaḥ smat ādiṣu iva vyavahāraḥ nugamyamānaḥ bhimāni vyapadeśam draḍhayati
tat tejaḥ aikṣata iti api parasyāḥ eva devatāyāḥ adhiṣṭhātryāḥ sva vikāreṣu anugatāyāḥ iyam īkṣā vyapadiśyate iti draṣṭavyam
tasmāt vilakṣaṇam eva idam brahmaṇaḥ jagat
vilakṣaṇa tvāt ca na brahma prakṛtikam iti ākṣipte pratividhatte
dṛśyate tu
