dṛśyate hi loke cetana tvena prasiddhebhyaḥ puruṣa ādibhyaḥ vilakṣaṇānām keśa nakha ādīnām utpattiḥ acetana tvena ca prasiddhebhyaḥ gomaya ādibhyaḥ vṛścika ādīnām
nanu acetanāni eva puruṣa ādi śarīrāṇi acetanānām keśa nakha ādīnām kāraṇāni acetanāni eva ca vṛścika ādi śarīrāṇi acetanānām gomaya ādīnām kāryāṇi iti
ucyate evam api kiṃcid acetanam cetanasya āyatana bhāvam upagacchati kiṃcid na iti asti eva vailakṣaṇyam
mahān ca ayam pāriṇāmikaḥ svabhāva viprakarṣaḥ puruṣa ādīnām keśa nakha ādīnām ca rūpa ādi bhedāt tathā gomaya ādīnām vṛścika ādīnām ca
atyanta sārūpye ca prakṛti vikāra bhāvaḥ eva pralīyeta
atha ucyeta asti kaścid pārthiva tva ādi svabhāvaḥ puruṣa ādīnām keśa nakha ādiṣu anuvartamānaḥ gomaya ādīnām ca vṛścika ādiṣu iti
brahmaṇaḥ pi tarhi sattā lakṣaṇaḥ svabhāvaḥ ākāśa ādiṣu anuvartamānaḥ dṛśyate
vilakṣaṇa tvena ca kāraṇena brahma prakṛtika tvam jagataḥ dūṣayatā kim aśeṣasya brahma svabhāvasya ananuvartanam vilakṣaṇa tvam abhipreyate uta yasya kasyacid
atha caitanyasya iti vaktavyam

na hi asati atiśaye prakṛti vikāra bhāvaḥ iti bhavati
dvitīye ca asiddha tvam
dṛśyate hi sattā lakṣaṇaḥ brahma svabhāvaḥ ākāśa ādiṣu anuvartamānaḥ iti uktam
tṛtīye tu dṛṣṭānta abhāvaḥ
kim hi yat caitanyena ananvitam tat abrahma prakṛtikam dṛṣṭam iti brahma kāraṇa vādinam pratyudāhriyeta samastas
text2:
ca prāpti rahitasya a sādhaka tvāt bhavati ca āyā maoḥ māhātmyam prakhyāpayatī śrutiḥ yat
vai kiṃca mauḥ avadat tat bheṣajam iti ca sarva bhūteṣu ca ātmāam sarva bhūtāi ca ātmai saṃpaśyaḥ ātma yājī vai svārājyam adhigacchati iti sarva ātma tva darśaam praśaṃsatā
kāpilam matam idyate iti gamyate kapilaḥ hi ātma bheda abhyupagamāt mahābhārate api ca bahavaḥ puruṣāḥ brahma uta aho eke eva tu
iti vicārya bahavaḥ puruṣāḥ rāja sāṃkhya yoga vicāriṇām iti para pakṣam upayasya tat bahūām puruṣāṇām hi yathā ekā ucyate tathā tam puruṣam
viśvam ākhyāsyāmi guṇa adhikam iti upakramya ātmā tava ca ye ca āye dehi saṃjñitāḥ sarveṣām sākṣi bhūtaḥ a grāhyaḥ kaścid kvacid viśvamūrdhā
viśva bhujaḥ viśva pāda akṣiāsikaḥ ekaḥ carati bhūteṣu svaira cārī yathāsukham iti sarva ātmatā eva śrutiḥ ca sarva ātmatāyām bhavati sarvāṇi bhūtāni ātmā eva abhūt tatra
kaḥ mohaḥ kaḥ śokaḥ eka tvam aupaśyataḥ iti evaṃvidhāḥ atas ca siddham ātma bheda kalpaayā api kāpilasya tatrasya ca a kevalam sva tatra prakṛti kalpaayā eva iti
vedasya hi svārthe prāmāṇyam raveḥ iva rūpa viṣaye puruṣa vacasām tu mūla atara apekṣam vaktṛ smṛti vyavahitam ca iti viprakarṣaḥ tasmāt veda viruddhe viṣaye doṣaḥ
kutas ca smṛti a avakāśa doṣa prasaṅgaḥ doṣaḥ itareṣām ca aupalabdheḥ pradhā itarāṇi smṛtau kalpitāi mahat ādīi vede loke ca upalabhyate bhūta idriyāṇi
tāvat loka veda prasiddha tvāt śakyate smartum a loka veda prasiddha tvāt tu mahat ādīām ṣaṣṭhasya iva idriya arthasya smṛtiḥ avakalpate yat api kvacid tatparam iva śravaṇam avabhāsate tat api
atatparam vyākhyātam āumāikam api ekeṣām iti atra kārya smṛteḥ aprāmāṇyāt kāraṇa smṛteḥ api aprāmāṇyam yuktam iti abhiprāyaḥ tasmāt api
doṣaḥ tarka avaṣṭambham tu a vilakṣaṇa tvāt iti ārabhya umathiṣyati yogaḥ pratyuktaḥ yoga pratyukti adhikaraṇam yoga smṛtiḥ api pratyākhyātā draṣṭavyā iti atidiśati tatra api śruti virodhe
svatatram eva kāraṇam mahat ādīi ca kāryāṇi a loka veda prasiddhāi kalpyate evam sati pūrveṇa eva etat gatam kimartham puar atidiśyate asti hi
atra abhyadhikā āśaṅkā samyak darśa ābhyupāyaḥ hi yogaḥ veda vihitaḥ śrotavyaḥ matavyaḥ ididhyāsitavyaḥ iti sthāpya samam śarīram
śvetāśvatara upaiṣadi dṛśyate liṅgāi ca vaidikāi yoga viṣayāṇi sahasraśas upalabhyate tām yogam iti mayate sthirām idriya dhāraṇām kaṭhaḥ iti vidyām etām yoga vidhim ca
kṛtsam kaṭhaḥ iti yoga śāstre api atha tad darśa abhyupāyaḥ yogaḥ iti yogaḥ aṅgīkriyate atas atas artha eka deśa tvāt aṣṭaka ādi smṛti vat yoga smṛtiḥ api bhaviṣyati iti iyam api
adhikā śaṅkā atideśe artha eka deśa saṃpratipattau api artha eka deśa vipratipatteḥ pūrva uktāyāḥ satīṣu api adhyātma viṣayāsu bahvīṣu smṛtiṣu sāṃkhya yoga smṛtyoḥ eva irā karaṇe yatas kṛtaḥ sāṃkhya yogau hi
loke prakhyātau śiṣṭaiḥ ca parigṛhītau liṅge ca śraute upabṛṃhitau tad kāraṇam jñātvā devam mucyate sarva pāśaiḥ iti irā karaṇam tu a bhū
vedaiḥ apekṣeṇa yoga mārgeṇa vā iḥśreyasam adhigamyate iti śrutiḥ hi vaidikāt ātma eka tva vijñāāt ayaḥ iḥśreyasa sādhaam vārayati tam eva viditvā ati mṛtyum eti āyaḥ
pathā vidyate iti dvaitiḥ hi te sāṃkhyāḥ yogāḥ ca ātma eka tva darśiḥ yat tu uktam tad kāraṇam iti
vaidikam eva tatra jñāam dhyāam ca sāṃkhya yoga śabdābhyām abhilapyete pratyāsatteḥ iti avagatavyam tu virudhyete eva sāṃkhya yoga smṛtyoḥ sāvakāśa tvam
tat yathā a saṅgaḥ hi ayam puruṣaḥ iti evamādi śruti prasiddham eva puruṣasya viśuddha tvam sāṃkhyaiḥ abhyupagamyate tathā ca yaugaiḥ api atha
parivrāj vivarṇa vāsāḥ parigrahaḥ iti evamādi śruti prasiddham eva sarvāṇi tarka smaraṇāi api tarka upapattibhyām tattva jñāāya upakurvati iti ced
upakurvatu tu tattva jñāam tu maute tam bṛhatam tam tu aupaiṣadam puruṣam pracchāmi
iti evamādi śrutibhyaḥ a vilakṣaṇa tvāt asya tathātvam ca śabdāt avilakṣaṇa tva adhikaraṇam brahma asya jagataḥ imitta kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ced yasya pakṣasya ākṣepaḥ smṛti imittaḥ parihṛtaḥ tarka aimittaḥ idāīm
ākṣepaḥ parihriyate kutas asmi avadhārite āgama arthe tarka aimittasya ākṣepasya avakāśaḥ dharme iva brahmaṇi api a apekṣaḥ āgamaḥ bhavitum arhati bhavet ayam
yadi āgama mātra prameyaḥ yam arthaḥ syāt auṣṭheya rūpaḥ iva dharmaḥ tu brahma avagamyate ca pramāṇa atarāṇām asti avakāśaḥ yathā pṛthivī ādiṣu
yathā ca paraspara virodhe satī eka vaśe itarā īyate evam pramāṇa atara virodhe tad vaśe eva śrutiḥ īyeta dṛṣṭa sādharmyeṇa ca adṛṣṭam artham samarpayatī yuktiḥ aubhavasya saṃikṛṣyate
viprakṛṣyate tu śrutiḥ aitihya mātreṇa sva artha abhidhāāt ca avidyāyāḥ mokṣa sādhaam ca dṛṣṭa phala tayā iṣyate śrutiḥ api śrotavyaḥ matavyaḥ iti śravaṇa vyatirekeṇa
vidadhatī tarkam api atra ādartavyam darśayati atas tarka aimittaḥ ākṣepaḥ kriyate a vilakṣaṇa tvāt asya iti yat uktam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam
prakṛtiḥ iti kasmāt vilakṣaṇa tvāt asya vikārasya prakṛtyāḥ idam hi brahma kārya tveā abhipreyamāṇam jagat brahma vilakṣaṇam acetaam aśuddham ca dṛśyate brahma ca jagat vilakṣaṇam
śuddham ca śrūyate a ca vilakṣaṇa tve prakṛti vikāra bhāvaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ hi rucaka ādayaḥ vikārāḥ mṛd prakṛtikā bhavati śarāva ādayaḥ vā suvarṇa prakṛtikāḥ mṛdā eva tu mṛdavitā
vikārāḥ prakriyate ca suvarṇāvitāḥ tathā idam api jagat acetaam sukha dukha moha āvitam sat acetaasya eva sukha duḥkha moha ātmakasya kāraṇasya kāryam bhavitum arhati a vilakṣaṇasya brahmaṇaḥ brahma vilakṣaṇa tvam ca asya avagatavyam
aśuddham hi idam jagat sukha duḥkha moha ātmaka tayā pratīyate prīti paritāpa viṣāda ādi hetu tvāt svarga araka ādi uccāvaca prapañca tvāt ca acetaam ca idam jagat prati kārya kāraṇa bhāve upakaraṇa bhāva upagamāt hi sāmye sati upakārya upakāraka bhāvaḥ bhavati
a hi pradīpau parasparasya upakurutaḥ au cetaam api kārya kāraṇam bhoktuḥ upakariṣyati a svāmi bhṛtyayoḥ api a cetaa aṃśasya eva cetaam pratyupakāraka tvāt yaḥ hi ekasya cetaasya parigrahaḥ buddhi ādiḥ
acetaa bhāgaḥ saḥ eva ayasya cetaasya upakaroti tu svayam eva cetaaḥ cetaātarasya upakaroti apakaroti vā hi akartāraḥ cetaāḥ iti sāṃkhyāḥ tasmāt acetaam kārya kāraṇam ca kāṣṭha loṣṭa ādīām cetaa tve
kiṃcid pramāṇam asti prasiddhaḥ ca ayam cetaḥ a ceta a vibhāgaḥ loke tasmāt brahma vilakṣaṇa tvāā idam jagat tad prakṛtikam yaḥ api kaścid ācakṣīta śrutyā jagataḥ ceta a prakṛtika tām tad bale eva samastam jagat cetaam avagamiṣyāmi prakṛti rūpasya tu caitayasya pariṇāma viśeṣāt bhaviṣyati yathā
spaṣṭa caitayānām svāpa mūrchā ādi avasthāsu caitayam vibhāvyate evam kāṣṭha loṣṭa ādīām api caitayam vibhāvayiṣyate etasmāt eva ca vibhāvita tva a vibhāvita tva kṛtāt viśeṣāt rūpa ādi bhāva abhāvābhyām ca kārya kāraṇānām ātmaām ca virotsyate
yathā ca pārthiva tva aviśeṣe api viśeṣāt paraspara upakāri tvam bhavati evam iha api bhaviṣyati pravibhāga prasiddhiḥ api atas eva virotsyate iti kathaṃcid cetaa tva acetaa tva lakṣaṇam vilakṣaṇa tvam parihriyeta śuddhi aśuddhi tva lakṣaṇam tu
vilakṣaṇa tvam ca itarat api vilakṣaṇa tvam parihartum śakyate iti āha tathātvam ca śabdāt iti hi idam loke samastasya cetaa tvam cetaa prakṛtika tva śravaṇāt śabda śaraṇa tayā kevalayā utprekṣeta tat ca
virudhyate yatas śabdāt api tathātvam avagamyate tathātvam iti prakṛti vilakṣaṇa tvam kathayati śabdaḥ eva ca a vijñāam ca iti kasyacid vibhāgasya acetaa tām śrāvayan cetaāt brahmaṇaḥ vilakṣaṇam acetaam jagat śrāvayati cetaa tvam api
kvacid acetaa tva abhimatāām bhūta idriyāṇām śrūyate yathā mṛd abravīt āpobruvaḥ iti tat tejaḥ aikṣata tāḥ āpaḥ aikṣata iti ca evamādyā bhūta viṣayā cetaa tva śrutiḥ idriya viṣayāḥ api te heme
prāṇāḥ ahaṃśreyase vivadamāāḥ brahma jagmuḥ iti te ha vācam ūcuḥ tvam udgāya iti iti evamādya idriya viṣayā iti atas uttaram paṭhati abhimāi vyapadeśaḥ tu viśeṣa augatibhyām tuśabdaḥ āśaṅkām
a khalu mṛd abravīt iti evaṃjātīyakayā śrutyā bhūta idriyāṇām cetaa tvam yatas bhimāi vyapadeśaḥ eṣaḥ mṛd ādi abhimāiyaḥ vāc ādi abhimāiyaḥ ca cetaādevatāḥ vada asaṃvada ādiṣu cetaociteṣu
vyavahāreṣu vyapadiśyate a bhūta idriya mātram kasmāt viśeṣa augatibhyām viśeṣaḥ hi bhoktṛṇām bhūta idriyāṇām ca cetaā cetaa pravibhāga lakṣaṇaḥ prāc abhihitaḥ sarva cetaa tāyām ca asau opapadyeta api ca kauṣītakiaḥ prāṇa saṃvāde
devatā śabde viśiṣati etāḥ ha vai devatāḥ ahaṃśreyase vivadamānāḥ iti tāḥ vai etāḥ sarvāḥ devatāḥ prāṇe iḥśreyasam viditvā iti ca
augatāḥ ca sarvatra abhimāiyaḥ cetaāḥ devatāḥ matra arthavāda itihāsa purāṇa ādibhyaḥ uvagamyate agiḥ vāc bhūtvā mukham prāviśat iti evamādikā ca śrutiḥ karaṇeṣu augrāhikām devatām augatām darśayati prāṇa saṃvāda vākyaśeṣe ca te ha prāṇāḥ prajāpatim pitaram etya ūcuḥ
iti śreṣṭha tvaiḥ dhāraṇāya prajāpati gamaam tad vacaāt ca ekaika utkramaṇa āvayavyatirekābhyām prāṇa śraiṣṭhya pratipattiḥ tasmai bali haraṇam iti ca evaṃjātīyakaḥ usmad ādiṣu iva draḍhayati tat tejaḥ aikṣata iti api parasyāḥ eva devatāyāḥ adhiṣṭhātryāḥ sva vikāreṣu augatāyāḥ iyam īkṣā
vyapadiśyate iti draṣṭavyam tasmāt vilakṣaṇam eva idam brahmaṇaḥ jagat vilakṣaṇa tvāt ca a brahma prakṛtikam iti ākṣipte pratividhatte dṛśyate tu tuśabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati yat uktam vilakṣaṇa tvāt ā idam jagat
brahma prakṛtikam iti dṛśyate hi loke prasiddhebhyaḥ puruṣa ādibhyaḥ utpattiḥ ca prasiddhebhyaḥ gomaya ādibhyaḥ vṛścika ādīām
eva puruṣa ādi śarīrāṇi acetaāām keśa akha ādīām kāraṇāi acetaāi eva ca vṛścika ādi śarīrāṇi acetaāām gomaya ādīām kāryāṇi iti ucyate evam api kiṃcid acetaam upagacchati kiṃcid
eti asti eva vailakṣaṇyam mahān ca ayam pāriṇāmikaḥ svabhāva viprakarṣaḥ puruṣa ādīām keśa akha ādīām ca rūpa ādi bhedāt tathā gomaya ādīām vṛścika ādīām ca atyata sārūpye ca prakṛti vikāra bhāvaḥ eva
pralīyeta atha ucyeta asti kaścid pārthiva tva ādi svabhāvaḥ puruṣa ādīām keśa akha ādiṣu gomaya ādīām ca vṛścika ādiṣu iti brahmaṇaḥ tarhi sattā lakṣaṇaḥ svabhāvaḥ ākāśa ādiṣu dṛśyate
ca brahma prakṛtika tvam jagataḥ dūṣayatā kim aśeṣasya brahma svabhāvasya āauvartaam vilakṣaṇa tvam abhipreyate uta yasya kasyacid atha vaktavyam prathame vikalpe samasta prakṛti vikāra bhāva uccheda prasaṅgaḥ
a hi asati atiśaye prakṛti vikāra bhāvaḥ iti bhavati dvitīye ca asiddha tvam dṛśyate hi sattā lakṣaṇaḥ brahma svabhāvaḥ iti uktam tṛtīye tu dṛṣṭa atā abhāvaḥ kim hi tat abrahma prakṛtikam
dṛṣṭam iti brahma kāraṇa vādiam pratyudāhriyeta samastas

text1:
asiddha tvam
dṛśyate hi sattā lakṣaṇaḥ brahma svabhāvaḥ
text2: asiddha tvam dṛśyate hi sattā lakṣaṇaḥ brahma svabhāvaḥ

text1:
iti uktam
tṛtīye tu dṛṣṭānta abhāvaḥ
kim hi yat caitanyena ananvitam tat abrahma prakṛtikam dṛṣṭam iti brahma kāraṇa vādinam pratyudāhriyeta samastasya asya vastu jātasya brahma prakṛtika tva abhyupagamāt
āgama virodhaḥ tu prasiddhaḥ eva cetanam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ca iti āgama tātparyasya prasādhita tvāt
yat tu uktam pariniṣpanna tvāt brahmaṇi pramāṇa antarāṇi saṃbhaveyuḥ iti tat api manoratha mātram
rūpa ādi abhāvāt hi na ayam arthaḥ pratyakṣasya gocaraḥ
liṅga ādi abhāvāt ca na anumāna ādīnām
āgama mātra samadhigamyaḥ eva tu ayam arthaḥ dharma vat
tathā ca śrutiḥ na eṣā tarkeṇa matiḥ āpaneyā proktā anyena eva su jñānāya preṣṭhaḥ iti
kaḥ addhā veda kaḥ iha pravocat iyam visṛṣṭiḥ yatas ābabhūva iti ca ete ṛcau nija siddhānām api īśvarāṇām durbodhatām jagat kāraṇasya darśayataḥ
smṛtiḥ api bhavati acintyāḥ khalu ye bhāvāḥ na tān tarkeṇa yojayet iti avyaktaḥ yam acintyaḥ yam avikāryaḥ yam ucyate iti ca na me viduḥ sura gaṇāḥ prabhavam na mahā ṛṣayaḥ
aham ādiḥ hi devānām mahā ṛṣīṇām ca sarvaśas iti ca evaṃjātīyakā
yat api śravaṇa vyatirekeṇa mananam vidadhat śabdaḥ eva tarkam api ādartavyam darśayati iti uktam na anena miṣeṇa śuṣka tarkasya atra ātmalābhaḥ saṃbhavati
śruti anugṛhītaḥ eva hi atra tarkaḥ nubhava aṅgatvena āśrīyate svapnānta buddhāntayoḥ ubhayoḥ itaretara vyabhicārāt ātmanaḥ nanu āgata tvam saṃprasāde ca prapañca parityāgena sat ātmanā saṃpatteḥ niṣprapañca sat ātmaka tvam prapañcasya brahma prabhava tvāt kārya kāraṇa ananyatva nyāyena brahma avyatirekaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ
tarka apratiṣṭhānāt iti ca kevalasya tarkasya vipralambhaka tvam darśayiṣyati
yaḥ u pi cetana kāraṇa śravaṇa balena eva samastasya jagataḥ cetana tām utprekṣeta tasya api vijñānam ca a vijñānam ca iti cetana acetana vibhāga śravaṇam vibhāvanā a vibhāvanābhyām caitanyasya śakyate eva yojayitum
parasya eva tu idam api vibhāga śravaṇam na yujyate
katham
parama kāraṇasya hi atra samasta jagat ātmanā samavasthānam śrāvyate vijñānam ca a vijñānam ca abhavat iti
tatra yathā cetanasya acetana bhāvaḥ nā upapadyate vilakṣaṇa tvāt evam acetanasya api cetana bhāvaḥ nā upapadyate
pratyukta tvāt tu vilakṣaṇa tvasya yathā śrutyā eva cetanam kāraṇam grahītavyam bhavati
asat iti ced na pratiṣedha mātra tvāt
yadi cetanam śuddham śabda ādi hīnam ca brahma tad viparītasya acetanasya aśuddhasya śabda ādimataḥ ca kāryasya kāraṇam iṣyeta asat tarhi kāryam prāk utpatteḥ iti prasajyeta
aniṣṭam ca etat satkārya vādinaḥ tava iti ced na eṣa doṣaḥ pratiṣedha mātra tvāt
pratiṣedha mātram hi idam
na asya pratiṣedhasya pratiṣedhyam asti
na hi ayam pratiṣedhaḥ prāk utpatteḥ sattvam kāryasya pratiṣeddhum śaknoti
katham
yathā eva hi idānīm api idam kāryam kāraṇa ātmanā sat evam prāk utpatteḥ api iti gamyate
na hi idānīm api idam kāryam kāraṇa ātmānam antareṇa svatantram eva asti sarvam tam parādāt yaḥ nyatra ātmanaḥ sarvam veda ityādi śravaṇāt
kāraṇa ātmanā tu sattvam kāryasya prāc utpatteḥ aviśiṣṭam
nanu śabda ādi hīnam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam bāḍham na tu śabda ādimat kāryam kāraṇa ātmanā hīnam prāk utpatteḥ idānīm vā asti
tena na śakyate vaktum prāk utpatteḥ asatkāryam iti
vistareṇa ca etat kārya kāraṇa ananyatva vāde vakṣyāmaḥ
apītau tadvat prasaṅgāt asamañjasam
atra āha yadi sthaulya sāvayavat tva acetana tva paricchinna tva aśuddhi ādi dharmakam kāryam brahma kāraṇakam abhyupagamyeta tadā api itau pralaye pratisaṃsṛjyamānam kāryam kāraṇa avibhāgam āpadyamānam kāraṇam ātmīyena dharmeṇa dūṣayet iti api itau kāraṇasya api brahmaṇaḥ kāryasya iva aśuddhi ādi rūpatā prasaṅgāt sarvajñam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam iti asamañjasam idam aupaniṣadam darśanam
api ca samastasya vibhāgasya avibhāga prāpteḥ punar utpattau niyama kāraṇa abhāvāt bhoktṛ bhogya ādi vibhāgena utpattiḥ na prāpnoti iti asamañjasam
api ca bhoktṛṇām pareṇa brahmaṇā avibhāgam gatānām karma ādi nimitta pralaye pi punarutpattau abhyupagamyamānāyām muktānām api punarutpatti prasaṅgāt asamañjasam
atha idam jagat apītau api vibhaktam eva pareṇa brahmaṇā avatiṣṭheta evam api apītiḥ ca na saṃbhavati kāraṇa a vyatiriktam ca kāryam na saṃbhavati iti asamañjasam eva iti
atrā ucyate
na tu dṛṣṭānta bhāvāt
na eva asmadīye darśane kiṃcid asāmañjasyam asti
yat tāvat abhihitam kāraṇam api gacchat kāryam kāraṇam ātmīyena dharmeṇa dūṣayet iti na tat dūṣaṇam
kasmāt
dṛṣṭānta bhāvāt santi hi dṛṣṭāntāḥ yathā kāraṇam apigacchat kāryam kāraṇam ātmīyena dharmeṇa na dūṣayati
tat yathā śarāva ādayaḥ mṛd prakṛtikāḥ vikārāḥ vibhāga avasthāyām uccāvaca madhyama prabhedāḥ santaḥ punar prakṛtim apigacchantaḥ na tām ātmīyena dharmeṇa saṃsṛjanti
rucaka ādayaḥ ca suvarṇa vikārāḥ apītau na punar suvarṇam ātmīyena dharmeṇa saṃsṛjanti
pṛthivī vikāraḥ caturvidhaḥ bhūta grāmaḥ na pṛthivīm api itau ātmīyena dharmeṇa saṃsṛjati
tvad pakṣasya tu na kaścid dṛṣṭāntaḥ sti
apītiḥ eva hi na saṃbhavet yadi kāraṇe kāryam svadharmeṇa eva avatiṣṭheta
ananya tve pi kārya kāraṇayoḥ kāryasya kāraṇa ātmatvam na tu kāraṇasya kārya ātmatvam ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ iti atra vakṣyāmaḥ
ati alpam ca idam ucyate kāryam apītau ātmīyena dharmeṇa kāraṇam saṃsṛjet iti
sthitau api hi samānaḥ yam prasaṅgaḥ kārya kāraṇayoḥ ananyatva abhyupagamāt
idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā ātmā eva idam sarvam brahma eva idam amṛtam purastāt sarvam khalu idam brahma iti evamādyābhiḥ hi śrutibhiḥ aviśeṣeṇa triṣu api kāleṣu kāryasya kāraṇāt ananya tvam śrāvyate
tatra yaḥ parihāraḥ kāryasya tad dharmāṇām ca avidyā adhyāropita tvāt na taiḥ kāraṇam saṃsṛjyate iti api itau api sa samānaḥ
asti ca ayam aparaḥ dṛṣṭāntaḥ yathā svayam prasāritayā māyayā māyāvī triṣu api kāleṣu na saṃspṛśyate avastu tvāt evam paramātmā api saṃsāra māyayā na saṃspṛśyate iti
yathā ca svapna dṛś ekaḥ svapna darśana māyayā na saṃspṛśyate prabodha saṃprasādayoḥ an anvāgata tvāt evam avasthā traya sākṣī ekaḥ vyabhicārī avasthā trayeṇa vyabhicāriṇā na saṃspṛśyate
māyā mātram hi etat yat paramātmanaḥ vasthā traya ātmanā avabhāsanam rajjvā iva sarpa ādi bhāvena iti
atra uktam vedānta artha saṃpradāya vidbhiḥ ācāryaiḥ anādi māyayā suptaḥ yadā jīvaḥ prabudhyate
ajam anidram asvapnam advaitam budhyate tadā iti
tatra yat uktam apītau kāraṇasya api kāryasya iva sthaulya ādi doṣa prasaṅgaḥ iti etat ayuktam
yat punar etat uktam samastasya vibhāgasya avibhāga prāpteḥ punar vibhāgena utpattau niyama kāraṇam na upapadyate iti ayam api adoṣaḥ dṛṣṭānta bhāvāt eva yathā hi suṣupti samādhi ādau api satyām svābhāvikyām avibhāga prāptau mithyājñānasya anapodita tvāt pūrvavat punar prabodhe vibhāgaḥ bhavati evam iha api bhaviṣyati
śrutiḥ ca atra bhavati imāḥ sarvāḥ prajāḥ sati saṃpadya na viduḥ sati saṃpadyāmahe iti te iha vyāghraḥ vā siṃhaḥ vā vṛkaḥ vā varāhaḥ vā kīṭaḥ vā pataṅgaḥ vā daṃśaḥ vā maśakaḥ vā yat yat bhavanti tadā bhavanti iti
yathā hi avibhāge pi paramātmani mithyājñāna pratibaddhaḥ vibhāga vyavahāraḥ svapna vat avyāhataḥ sthitau dṛśyate evam apītau api mithyājñāna pratibaddhā eva vibhāga śaktiḥ anumāsyate
etena muktānām punarutpatti prasaṅgaḥ pratyuktaḥ samyak jñānena mithyājñānasya apodita tvāt
yaḥ punar ayam ante paraḥ vikalpaḥ utprekṣitaḥ atha idam jagat apītau api vibhaktam eva pareṇa brahmaṇā avatiṣṭheta iti saḥ u pi anabhyupagamāt eva pratiṣiddhaḥ
tasmāt samañjasam idam aupaniṣadam darśanam
sva pakṣa doṣāt ca
sva pakṣe ca ete prativādinaḥ sādhāraṇāḥ doṣāḥ prāduḥṣyuḥ
katham iti ucyate yat tāvat abhihitam vilakṣaṇa tvāt na idam jagat brahma prakṛtikam iti pradhāna prakṛtikatāyām api samānam etat śabda ādi hīnāt pradhānāt śabda ādimataḥ jagataḥ utpatti abhyupagamāt
atas eva ca vilakṣaṇa kārya utpatti abhyupagamāt samānaḥ prāk utpatteḥ asatkārya vāda prasaṅgaḥ
tathā api ītau kāryasya kāraṇa avibhāga abhyupagamāt tadvat prasaṅgaḥ pi samānaḥ
tathā mṛdita sarva viśeṣeṣu vikāreṣu apītau avibhāga ātma tām gateṣu idam asya puruṣasya upādānam idam asya iti prāk pralayāt pratipuruṣam ye niyatāḥ bhedāḥ na te tathā eva punarutpattau niyantum śakyante kāraṇa abhāvāt
vinā eva ca kāraṇena niyame bhyupagamyamāne kāraṇa abhāva sāmyāt muktānām api punar bandha prasaṅgaḥ
atha kecid bhedāḥ api itau avibhāgam āpadyante kecid na iti ced ye na āpadyante teṣām pradhāna kārya tvam na prāpnoti iti evam ete doṣāḥ sādhāraṇa tvāt na anyatarasmin pakṣe codayitavyāḥ bhavanti iti adoṣa tām eva eṣām draḍhayati avaśya āśrayitavya tvāt
tarka apratiṣṭhānāt api anyathā numeyam iti ced evam api avimokṣa prasaṅgaḥ
itas ca na āgama gamye rthe kevalena tarkeṇa pratyavasthātavyam
yasmāt nirāgamāḥ puruṣa utprekṣā mātra nibandhanāḥ tarkāḥ apratiṣṭhitāḥ bhavanti utprekṣāyāḥ niraṅkuśa tvāt
tathā hi kaiḥ cit abhiyuktaiḥ yatnena utprekṣitāḥ tarkāḥ abhiyuktataraiḥ anyaiḥ ābhāsyamānāḥ dṛśyante
taiḥ api utprekṣitāḥ santaḥ tatas nyaiḥ ābhāsyante iti na pratiṣṭhita tvam tarkāṇām śakyam āśrayitum puruṣam ati vairūpyāt
atha kasyacid prasiddha māhātmyasya kapilasya anyasya vā saṃmataḥ tarkaḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti āśrīyeta evam api apratiṣṭhita tvam eva prasiddha māhātmya abhimatānām api tīrthakarāṇām kapila kaṇabhuj prabhṛtīnām paraspara vipratipatti darśanāt
atha ucyeta anyathā vayam anumāsyāmahe yathā na a pratiṣṭhā doṣaḥ bhaviṣyati
na hi pratiṣṭhitaḥ tarkaḥ eva na asti iti śakyate vaktum
etat api hi tarkāṇām apratiṣṭhita tvam tarkeṇa eva pratiṣṭhāpyate keṣāṃcid tarkāṇām apratiṣṭhita tva darśanena anyeṣām api tad jātīyakānām tarkāṇām apratiṣṭhita tva kalpanāt
sarva tarka apratiṣṭhāyām ca lokavyavahāra uccheda prasaṅgaḥ
atīta vartamāna adhva sāmyena hi anāgate pi adhvani sukha duḥkha prāpti parihārāya pravartamānaḥ lokaḥ dṛśyate
śruti artha vipratipattau ca artha ābhāsa nirākaraṇena samyak artha nirdhāraṇam tarkeṇa eva vākya vṛtti nirūpaṇa rūpeṇa kriyate
manuḥ api ca evam eva manyate pratyakṣam anumānam ca śāstram ca vividha āgamam
trayam su viditam kāryam dharma śuddhim abhīpsatā iti
ārṣam dharma upadeśam ca veda śāstra avirodhinā
yaḥ tarkeṇa anusaṃdhatte sa dharmam veda na itaraḥ iti ca Manu
bruvan
ayam eva ca tarkasya alaṃkāraḥ yat apratiṣṭhita tvam nāma
evam hi sāvadya tarka parityāgena niravadyaḥ tarkaḥ pratipattavyaḥ bhavati
na hi pūrvajaḥ mūḍhaḥ āsīt iti ātmanā api mūḍhena bhavitavyam iti kiṃcid asti pramāṇam
tasmāt na tarka apratiṣṭhānam doṣaḥ iti ced evam api avimokṣa prasaṅgaḥ
yadi api kvacid viṣaye tarkasya pratiṣṭhita tvam upalakṣyate tathā api prakṛte tāvat viṣaye prasajyate eva apratiṣṭhita tva doṣāt anirmokṣaḥ tarkasya
na hi idam ati gambhīram bhāva yāthātmyam mukti nibandhanam āgamam antareṇa utprekṣitum api śakyam
rūpa ādi abhāvāt hi na ayam arthaḥ pratyakṣasya gocaraḥ liṅga ādi abhāvāt ca na anumāna ādīnām iti ca avocāma
api ca samyak jñānāt mokṣaḥ iti sarveṣām mokṣa vādinām abhyupagamaḥ
tat ca samyak jñānam eka rūpam vastu tantra tvāt
eka rūpeṇa hi avasthitaḥ yaḥ rthaḥ sa paramārthaḥ
loke tad viṣayam jñānam samyak jñānam iti ucyate yathā agniḥ uṣṇaḥ iti
tatra evam sati samyak jñāne puruṣāṇām vipratipattiḥ anupapannā
tarka jñānānām tu anyonya virodhāt prasiddhā vipratipattiḥ
yat hi kenacid tārkikeṇa idam eva samyak jñānam iti pratiṣṭhāpitam tad apareṇa vyutthāpyate
tena api pratiṣṭhāpitam pareṇa vyutthāpyate iti ca prasiddham loke
katham eka rūpa anavasthita viṣayam tarka prabhavam samyak jñānam bhavet
na ca pradhāna vādī tarka vidām uttamaḥ iti sarvaiḥ tārkikaiḥ parigṛhītaḥ yena tadīyam matam samyak jñānam iti pratipadyemahi
na ca śakyante tīta anāgata vartamānāḥ tārkikāḥ ekasmin deśe kāle ca samāhartum yena tad matiḥ eka rūpa eka artha viṣayā samyak matiḥ iti syāt
vedasya tu nitya tve vijñāna utpatti hetu tve ca sati vyavasthita artha viṣaya tva upapatteḥ tad janitasya jñānasya samyaktvam atīta anāgata vartamānaiḥ sarvaiḥ api tārkikaiḥ apahnotum aśakyam
atas siddham asya eva aupaniṣadasya jñānasya samyak jñāna tvam
atas nyatra samyak jñāna tva anupapatteḥ saṃsāra avimokṣaḥ eva prasajyeta
atas āgama vaśena āgama anusāri tarka vaśena ca cetanam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ca iti sthitam
etena śiṣṭa a parigrahāḥ api vyākhyātāḥ
śiṣṭa aparigraha adhikaraṇam
vaidikasya darśanasya pratyāsanna tvāt gurutara tarka bala upeta tvāt veda anusāribhiḥ ca kaiśc
text2:
iti uktam tṛtīye tu dṛṣṭa atā abhāvaḥ kim hi tat abrahma prakṛtikam
dṛṣṭam iti brahma kāraṇa vādiam pratyudāhriyeta samastasya asya vastu jātasya brahma prakṛtika tva abhyupagamāt āgama virodhaḥ tu prasiddhaḥ eva brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ca iti āgama tātparyasya prasādhita tvāt yat tu uktam brahmaṇi
pramāṇa ātarāṇi saṃbhaveyuḥ iti tat api maoratha mātram rūpa ādi abhāvāt hi ā ayam arthaḥ pratyakṣasya gocaraḥ liṅga ādi abhāvāt ca āgama mātra samadhigamyaḥ eva tu ayam
dharma vat tathā ca śrutiḥ su jñāāya preṣṭhaḥ iti kaḥ addhā veda kaḥ iha pravocat iyam visṛṣṭiḥ yata
ābabhūva iti ca ete ṛcau api īśvarāṇām durbodhatām jagat kāraṇasya darśayataḥ smṛtiḥ api bhavati acityāḥ khalu ye bhāvāḥ a tān tarkeṇa yojayet
iti avyaktaḥ yam acityaḥ yam avikāryaḥ yam ucyate iti ca a me viduḥ sura gaṇāḥ prabhavam a mahā ṛṣayaḥ aham ādiḥ hi devāām
mahā ṛṣīṇām ca sarvaśas iti ca evaṃjātīyakāḥ yat api śravaṇa vyatirekeṇa maaam vidadhat śabdaḥ eva tarkam api ādartavyam darśayati iti uktam miṣeṇa śuṣka tarkasya atra ātmalābhaḥ
saṃbhavati eva hi atra tarkaḥ ubhava aṅga tve āśrīyate ubhayoḥ itaretara vyabhicārāt avāgata tvam saṃprasāde ca sat ātma saṃpatteḥ prapañcasya brahma prabhava tvāt
brahma avyatirekaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ tarka apratiṣṭhāāt iti ca kevalasya tarkasya vipralambhaka tvam darśayiṣyati samastasya jagataḥ cetaa tām utprekṣeta tasya api
ca iti cetaā ceta a vibhāga śravaṇam caitayasya śakyate eva yojayitum parasya eva tu idam api vibhāga śravaṇam yujyate katham parama kāraṇasya hi atra
samasta jagat ātmaā śrāvyate ca a vijñāam ca bhavat iti tatra yathā opapadyate vilakṣaṇa tvāt evam acetaasya api opapadyate pratyukta tvāt tu vilakṣaṇa tvasya yathā
śrutyā eva kāraṇam grahītavyam bhavati asat iti ce pratiṣedha mātra tvāt yadi cetaam śuddham ca brahma tad viparītasya acetaasya aśuddhasya śabda ādimataḥ ca kāryasya kāraṇam iṣyeta
asat tarhi kāryam prāk utpatteḥ iti prasajyeta aiṣṭam ca etat satkārya vādi astava iti ced ā eṣa doṣaḥ pratiṣedha mātra tvāt pratiṣedha mātram hi idam ā asya pratiṣedhasya pratiṣedhyam asti a hi ayam pratiṣedhaḥ prāk utpatteḥ sattvam
kāryasya pratiṣeddhum katham yathā eva hi idāīm api idam kāryam sat evam prāk utpatteḥ api iti gamyate svatatram eva asti sarvam tam parādāt yaḥ yatra ātmā
sarvam vedaḥ ityādi śravaṇāt kāraṇa ātmaā tu sattvam kāryasya prāc utpatteḥ aviśiṣṭam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam bāḍham tu śabda ādimat kāryam kāraṇa ātmā prāc utpatteḥ idāīm
śakyate vaktum prāk utpatteḥ asatkāryam iti vistareṇa ca etat kārya kāraṇa āaya tva vāde vakṣyāmaḥ apītau tadvat prasaṅgāt asamañjasam atra āha yadi kāryam brahma kāraṇakam abhyupagamyeta
tadā api itau pralaye pratisaṃsṛjyamāam kāryam kāraṇa avibhāgam āpadyamāam kāraṇam dūṣayet iti api itau kāraṇasya api brahmaṇaḥ kāryasya iva aśuddhi ādi rūpa tā prasaṅgāt sarvajñam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam iti asamañjasam idam aupaiṣadam api ca samastasya
vibhāgasya avibhāga prāpteḥ puar utpattau iyam akāraṇa abhāvāt bhoktṛ bhogya ādi vibhāgena utpattiḥ iti asamañjasam api ca bhoktṛṇām pareṇa brahmaṇā avibhāgam gatāām karma ādi nimitta pralaye pi puar utpattau abhyupagamyamāāyām muktāām api puar utpatti prasaṅgāt asamañjasam atha idam jagat apītau api vibhaktam eva pareṇa brahmaṇā avatiṣṭheta
evam api apītiḥ ca a saṃbhavati kāraṇa a vyatiriktam ca kāryam a saṃbhavati iti asamañjasam eva iti atra ucyate a tu dṛṣṭāta bhāvāt kiṃcid asāmañjasyam asti yat tāvat abhihitam
kāraṇam api gacchat kāryam kāraṇam dūṣayet iti a tat dūṣaṇam kasmāt dṛṣṭāta bhāvāt sati hi dṛṣṭātāḥ yathā kāraṇam apigacchat kāryam kāraṇam ātmīyea
dharmeṇa dūṣayati tat yathā śarāva ādayaḥ mṛd prakṛtikāḥ vikārāḥ vibhāga avasthāyām uccāvaca madhyama prabhedāḥ sataḥ puas prakṛtim apigacchataḥ a tām ātmīyea dharmeṇa saṃsṛjati rucaka ādayaḥ ca suvarṇa vikārāḥ apītau a puas
suvarṇam ātmīyea dharmeṇa saṃsṛjati pṛthivī vikāraḥ caturvidhaḥ bhūta grāmaḥ dharmeṇa saṃsṛjati tvad pakṣasya tu a kaścid dṛṣṭātosti apītiḥ eva hi a saṃbhavet yadi kāraṇe kāryam
svadharmeṇa eva avatiṣṭheta kārya kāraṇayoḥ kāryasya kāraṇa ātmatvam a tu kāraṇasya kārya ātmatvam ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ iti atra vakṣyāmaḥ ati alpam ca idam ucyate kāryam dharmeṇa kāraṇam saṃsṛjet iti sthitau api
hi prasaṅgaḥ kārya kāraṇayoḥ aaya tva abhyupagamāt idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā ātmā eva idam sarvam brahma eva idam amṛtam purastāt sarvam khalu idam brahma iti evamādyābhiḥ hi śrutibhiḥ aviśeṣeṇa triṣu api
kāleṣu kāryasya śrāvyate tatra yaḥ parihāraḥ kāryasya tad dharmāṇām ca avidyā adhyāropita tvāt taiḥ kāraṇam saṃsṛjyate iti api itau api sa samaḥ asti ca ayam aparaḥ dṛṣṭātaḥ
yathā svayam prasāritayā māyayā māyāvī triṣu api kāleṣu a saṃspṛśyate avastu tvāt evam paramātmā api saṃsāra māyayā a saṃspṛśyate iti yathā ca svapadṛś ekaḥ
svapa darśa a māyayā saṃspṛśyate prabodha saṃprasādayoḥ a avāgata tvāt evam avasthā traya sākṣī ekaḥ vyabhicārī avasthā trayeṇa vyabhicāriṇā saṃspṛśyate māyā mātram hi etat yat paramātma vasthā traya ātma a avabhāsaam rajjvā iva sarpa ādi bhāve iti
atra uktam vedātārtha saṃpradāya vidbhiḥ ācāryaiḥ a ādi māyayā suptaḥ yadā jīvaḥ prabudhyate ajam aidram a svapam advaitam budhyate tadā iti tatra yat uktam apītau kāraṇasya api kāryasya iva sthaulya ādi doṣa prasaṅgaḥ iti
etat ayuktam yat puar etat uktam samastasya vibhāgasya avibhāga prāpteḥ iyam akāraṇam iti ayam api adoṣaḥ dṛṣṭa āta bhāvāt eva yathā hi suṣupti samādhi ādau api satyām svābhāvikyām avibhāga prāptau mithyā jñā asya apodita tvāt pūrvavat puar prabodhe vibhāgaḥ bhavati evam iha api
bhaviṣyati śrutiḥ ca atra bhavati imāḥ sarvāḥ prajāḥ sati saṃpadya a viduḥ sati saṃpadyāmahe iti te iha vyāghraḥ vā siṃhaḥ vā vṛkaḥ
vā varāhaḥ vā kīṭaḥ vā pataṅgaḥ vā daṃśaḥ vā maśakaḥ vā yat yat bhavati tadā bhavati iti yathā hi avibhāge pi mithyājñā apratibaddhaḥ vibhāga vyavahāraḥ
svapa vat avyāhataḥ sthitau dṛśyate evam apītau api mithyājñā a pratibaddhā eva muktāām muktāām puar utpatti prasaṅgaḥ pratyuktaḥ yaḥ vikalpaḥ utprekṣitaḥ atha idam jagat apītau api vibhaktam eva pareṇa
brahmaṇā avatiṣṭheta iti saḥ upi a abhyupagamāt eva pratiṣiddhaḥ tasmāt samañjasam idam aupaiṣadam darśaam sva pakṣa doṣāt ca sva pakṣe ca ete sādhāraṇāḥ doṣāḥ prāduḥṣyuḥ katham iti ucyate yat tāvat
abhihitam vilakṣaṇa tvā ā idam jagat brahma prakṛtikam iti pradhā aprakṛtikatāyām api etat śabda ādi hīāt śabda ādimataḥ jagataḥ utpatti abhyupagamāt atas eva ca vilakṣaṇa kārya utpatti abhyupagamāt samaḥ prāk utpatteḥ
asatkārya vāda prasaṅgaḥ tathā apītau kāryasya kāraṇa avibhāga abhyupagamāt tadvat prasaṅgaḥ api samaḥ tathā mṛdita sarva viśeṣeṣu vikāreṣu apītau avibhāga ātma tām gateṣu idam asya puruṣasya upādāam idam asya iti prāk pralayāt pratipuruṣam ye iyatā bhedāḥ te tathā eva puar utpattau
śakyate kāraṇa abhāvāt ca kāraṇa abhāva sāmyām uktāām api atha kecid bhedāḥ api itau avibhāgam āpadyate ced ye āpadyate teṣām iti
evam ete doṣāḥ sādhāraṇa tvāḥ pakṣe codayitavyā bhavati iti adoṣa tām eva eṣām draḍhayati avaśya āśrayitavya tvāt tarka apratiṣṭhāāt api ayathā umā iyam iti ced evam api
avimokṣa prasaṅgaḥ itas ca āgama gamye rthe tarkeṇa pratyavasthātavyam yasmai tarkāḥ apratiṣṭhitāḥ bhavati utprekṣāyāḥ tathā hi kaiḥ cit
abhiyuktaiḥ yateḥ utprekṣitāḥ tarkāḥ abhiyuktataraiḥ dṛśyate taiḥ api utprekṣitāḥ satas tatas yaiḥ ābhāsyate iti a pratiṣṭhita tvam tarkāṇām śakyam āśrayitum
puruṣam ati vairūpyāt atha kasyacid prasiddha māhātmyasya kapilasya ayasya vā saṃmataḥ tarkaḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ iti āśrīyeta evam api apratiṣṭhita tvam eva prasiddha māhātmya abhimatāām api tīrthakarāṇām
kapila kaṇabhuj prabhṛtīām paraspara vipratipatti darśaāt atha ucyeta ayathā vayam aumāsyāmahe yathā ā pratiṣṭhā doṣaḥ bhaviṣyati a hi pratiṣṭhitaḥ tarkaḥ eva ā asti iti śakyate vaktum etat api hi tarkāṇām apratiṣṭhita tvam tarkeṇa eva pratiṣṭhāpyate
keṣāṃcid tarkāṇām apratiṣṭhita tva darśaeāyeṣām api sarva tarka apratiṣṭhāyām ca lokavyavahāra uccheda prasaṅgaḥ hi hi sukha duḥkha prāpti parihārāya lokaḥ dṛśyate śruti artha vipratipattau
samyak arthaiḥ dhāraṇam tarkeṇa eva kriyate mauḥ api ca evam eva kriyate mauḥ api ca evam eva pratyakṣam aumāam ca śāstram ca vividha āgamam trayam su viditam kāryam dharma śuddhim
abhīpsatā iti ārṣam dharma upadeśam ca yaḥ tarkeṇa ausaṃdhatte sa dharmam vedaḥ etaraḥ iti ca bruva ayam eva ca tarkasya alaṃkāraḥ
evam hi sāvadya tarka parityāge evam hi sāvadya tarka parityāge tarkaḥ pratipattavyaḥ bhavati hi pūrvajaḥ mūḍhaḥ āsīt iti bhavitavyam iti
kiṃcid asti pramāṇam tasmāt tarka apratiṣṭhā doṣaḥ iti ced evam api avimokṣa prasaṅgaḥ yadi api kvacid viṣaye tarkasya pratiṣṭhita tvam upalakṣyate tathā api prakṛte tāvat viṣaye prasajyate eva apratiṣṭhita tva doṣāt tarkasya
a hi idam ati gambhīram bhāva yāthātmyam āgamam atareṇa utprekṣitum api śakyam rūpa ādi abhāvāt dhi ā ayam arthaḥ pratyakṣasya gocaraḥ liṅga ādi abhāvāt ca iti ca avocāma
api ca mokṣaḥ iti sarveṣām mokṣa vādiām abhyupagamaḥ tat ca eka rūpam vastu tatra tvāt eka rūpeṇa hi avasthitaḥ yaḥ ṛthaḥ sa paramārthaḥ loke
tad viṣayam samyak jñāam iti ucyate yathā agiḥ uṣṇaḥ iti tatra evam sati samyak jñāe puruṣāṇām vipratipattiḥ tarka jñāāām tu prasiddhā vipratipattiḥ yat
dhi keacid tārkikeṇa idam eva iti pratiṣṭhāpitam tad apareṇa vyutthāpyate pratiṣṭhāpitam pareṇa vyutthāpyate iti ca prasiddham loke katham eka rūpa avasthita viṣayam
tarka prabhavam samyak jñāam bhavet a ca pradhāa vādī tarka vidām uttamaḥ iti sarvaiḥ tārkikaiḥ parigṛhītaḥ tadīyam matam samyak jñāam iti pratipadyemahi a ca
śakyate tīta āāgata vartamāāḥ tārkikāḥ ekasmi deśe kāle ca samāhartum eka rūpā eka artha viṣayā samyak matiḥ iti syāt vedasya tu itya tve vijñā utpatti hetu tve ca sati
vyavasthita artha viṣaya tva upapatteḥ sarvaiḥ api tārkikaiḥ apahotum aśakyam atas siddham asya eva aupaiṣadasya jñā asya samyak jñā a tvam atas yatra samyak jñā a tva aupapatteḥ saṃsāra avimokṣaḥ eva
prasajyeta atas āgama vaśea ca brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ca iti sthitam ete śiṣṭa aparigrahāḥ api vyākhyātāḥ śiṣṭa aparigraha adhikaraṇam vaidikasya darśaasya pratyāsa tvāt
gurutara tarka bala upeta tvāt vedāusāribhiḥ ca kaiśc

text1:
brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ca iti sthitam
etena śiṣṭa a parigrahāḥ api vyākhyātāḥ
śiṣṭa aparigraha adhikaraṇam
vaidikasya darśanasya pratyāsanna tvāt gurutara tarka bala upeta tvāt veda anusāribhiḥ ca kaiścid śiṣṭaiḥ kenacid aṃśena parigṛhīta tvāt pradhāna kāraṇa vādam tāvat vyapāśritya yaḥ tarka nimittaḥ ākṣepaḥ vedānta vākyeṣu udbhāvitaḥ sa parihṛtaḥ
idānīm aṇu ādi vāda vyapāśrayeṇa api kaiścid manda matibhiḥ vedānta vākyeṣu punar tarka nimittaḥ ākṣepaḥ āśaṅkyate iti atas pradhāna malla nibarhaṇa nyāyena atidiśati parigṛhyante iti parigrahāḥ
na parigrahāḥ aparigrahāḥ
śiṣṭānām aparigrahāḥ śiṣṭa aparigrahāḥ
etena prakṛte
text2:
brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ca iti sthitam ete śiṣṭa aparigrahāḥ api vyākhyātāḥ śiṣṭa aparigraha adhikaraṇam vaidikasya darśaasya pratyāsa tvāt
gurutara tarka bala upeta tvāt vedāusāribhiḥ ca kaiścid śiṣṭaiḥ parigṛhīta tvāt pradhā a kāraṇa vādam tāvat vyapāśritya yaḥ tarka aimittaḥ ākṣepaḥ sa parihṛtaḥ idāīm aṇu ādi vāda vyapāśrayeṇa api kaiścid
mada matibhiḥ tarka aimittaḥ ākṣepaḥ āśaṅkyate iti atas tarka aimittaḥ ākṣepaḥ āśaṅkyate iti atas parigṛhyate iti parigrahāḥ a parigrahāḥ aparigrahāḥ śiṣṭāām aparigrahāḥ śiṣṭa aparigrahāḥ ete prakṛte

text1:
a
śiṣṭaiḥ manu vyāsa prabhṛtibhi
text2:
a
śiṣṭaiḥ mauvyāsa prabhṛtibhi

text1:
ḥ ye ṇu ādi kāraṇa vādāḥ te pi pratiṣiddha tayā vyākhyātāḥ nirākṛtāḥ draṣṭavyāḥ
tulya tvāt nirākaraṇa kāraṇasya na atra punar āśaṅkitavyam kiṃcid asti
tulyam atrā api parama gambhīrasya jagat kāraṇasya tarka anavagāhya tvam tarkasya ca apratiṣṭhita tvam anyathā anumāne pi avimokṣaḥ āgama virodhaḥ ca iti evaṃjātīyakam nirākaraṇa kāraṇam
bhoktṛ āpatteḥ avibhāgaḥ ced syāt loka vat
bhoktṛ āpatti adhikaraṇam
anyathā punar brahma kāraṇa vādaḥ tarka balena eva ākṣipyate
yadi api śrutiḥ pramāṇam sva viṣaye bhavati tathā api pramāṇa antareṇa viṣaya apahāre nyaparā bhavitum arhati yathā mantra arthavādau
tarkaḥ pi sva viṣayāt anyatra apratiṣṭhitaḥ syāt yathā dharma adharmayoḥ
kim atas yadi evam
atas idam ayuktam yat pramāṇa antara prasiddha artha bādhanam śruteḥ
katham punar pramāṇa antara prasiddhaḥ rthaḥ śrutyā bādhyate iti atra ucyate prasiddhaḥ hi ayam bhoktṛ bhogya vibhāgaḥ loke bhoktā cetanaḥ śārīraḥ bhogyāḥ śabda ādayaḥ viṣayāḥ iti
yathā bhoktā devadattaḥ bhogya odana iti
tasya ca vibhāgasya abhāvaḥ prasajyeta yadi bhoktā bhogya bhāvam āpadyeta bhogyam vā bhoktṛ bhāvam āpadyeta
tayoḥ ca itaretarabhāva āpattiḥ parama kāraṇāt brahmaṇaḥ na anyatvāt prasajyeta
na ca asya prasiddhasya vibhāgasya bādhanam yuktam
yathā tu adyatve bhoktṛ bhogyayoḥ vibhāgaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ tathā atīta anāgatayoḥ api kalpayitavyaḥ
tasmāt prasiddhasya asya bhoktṛ bhogya vibhāgasya abhāva prasaṅgāt ayuktam idam brahma kāraṇatā avadhāraṇam iti ced kaścid codayet tam prati brūyāt syāt loka vat iti
upapadyate eva ayam asmad pakṣe vibhāgaḥ evam loke dṛṣṭa tvāt
tathā hi samudrāt udaka ātmanaḥ na anya tve tad vikārāṇām phena vīcī taraṅga budbuda ādīnām itaretara vibhāgaḥ itaretara asaṃśleṣa ādi lakṣaṇaḥ ca vyavahāraḥ upalabhyate
na ca samudrāt udaka ātmanaḥ na anyatve tad vikārāṇām phena taraṅga ādīnām itaretarabhāva āpattiḥ bhavati
na ca teṣām itaretara bhāvānām pattau api samudra ātmanaḥ bhavati
evam iha api na bhoktṛ bhogyayoḥ itaretarabhāva āpattiḥ na ca parasmāt brahmaṇaḥ bhaviṣyati
yadi api bhoktā na brahmaṇaḥ vikāraḥ tat sṛṣṭvā tat eva anuprāviśat iti sraṣṭuḥ eva avikṛtasya kārya anupraveśena bhoktṛ tva śravaṇāt tathā api kāryam anupraviṣṭasya asti upādhi nimittaḥ vibhāgaḥ ākāśasya iva ghaṭa ādi upādhi nimittaḥ iti atas parama kāraṇāt brahmaṇaḥ nanyatve pi upapadyate bhoktṛ bhogya lakṣaṇaḥ vibhāgaḥ samudra taraṅga ādi nyāyena iti uktam
tad ananya tvam ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ
ārambhaṇa adhikaraṇam
abhyupagamya ca imam vyāvahārikam bhoktṛ bhogya lakṣaṇam vibhāgam syāt loka vat iti parihāraḥ bhihitaḥ
na tu ayam vibhāgaḥ paramārthataḥ sti yasmāt tayoḥ kārya kāraṇayoḥ ananyatvam avagamyate
kāryam ākāśa ādikam bahu prapañcam jagat
kāraṇam param brahma
tasmāt kāraṇāt paramārthataḥ na anyatvam vyatirekeṇa abhāvaḥ kāryasya avagamyate
kutas
ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ
ārambhaṇa śabdaḥ tāvat eka vijñānena sarva vijñānam pratijñāya dṛṣṭānta apekṣāyām ucyate yathā somya ekena mṛd piṇḍena sarvam mṛd mayam vijñātam syāt vācā ārambhaṇam vikāraḥ nāmadheyam mṛttikā iti eva satyam iti
etat uktam bhavati ekena mṛd piṇḍena paramārthataḥ mṛd ātmanā vijñātena sarvam mṛd mayam ghaṭa śarāva udañcana ādikam mṛd ātmaka tva aviśeṣāt vijñātam bhavet
yatas vācā ārambhaṇam vikāraḥ nāmadheyam vācā eva kevalam asti iti ārabhyate vikāraḥ ghaṭaḥ śarāvaḥ udañcanam ca iti
na tu vastu vṛttena vikāraḥ nāma kaścid asti
nāmadheya mātram hi etat anṛtam
mṛttikā iti eva satyam iti eṣa brahmaṇaḥ dṛṣṭāntaḥ āmnātaḥ
tatra śrutāt vācā ārambhaṇa śabdāt dārṣṭāntike brahma vyatirekeṇa kārya jātasya abhāvaḥ iti gamyate
punar ca tejaḥ bannānām brahma kārya tām uktvā tejaḥ banna kāryāṇām tejaḥ banna vyatirekeṇa abhāvam bravīti apāgāt agneḥ agni tvam vācā ārambhaṇam vikāraḥ nāmadheyam trīṇi rūpāṇi iti eva satyam ityādinā
ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ iti ādi śabdāt aitadātmyam idam sarvam tat satyam saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā brahma eva idam sarvam ātmā eva idam sarvam na iha nānā asti kiṃcana iti evamādi api ātma ekatva pratipādana param vacana jātam udāhartavyam
na ca anyathā eka vijñānena sarva vijñānam saṃpadyate
tasmāt yathā ghaṭa karaka ādi ākāśānām mahā ākāśāt ananya tvam yathā ca mṛgatṛṣṇikā udaka ādīnām ūṣara ādibhyaḥ dṛṣṭa naṣṭa svarūpa tvāt sva rūpeṇa tu anupākhya tvāt
evam asya bhogya bhoktṛ ādi prapañca jātasya brahma vyatirekeṇa abhāvaḥ iti draṣṭavyam
nanu aneka ātmakam brahma
yathā vṛkṣaḥ neka śākhaḥ evam aneka śakti pravṛtti yuktam brahma
atas ekatvam nānātvam ca ubhayam api satyam eva yathā vṛkṣaḥ iti ekatvam śākhāḥ iti ca nānātvam
yathā ca samudra ātmanā ekatvam phena taraṅga ādi ātmanā nānātvam yathā ca mṛd ātmanā ekatvam ghaṭa śarāva ādi ātmanā nānātvam
tatra eka tva aṃśena jñānāt mokṣa vyavahāraḥ setsyati
nānātva aṃśena tu karmakāṇḍa āśrayau laukika vaidika vyavahārau setsyataḥ iti
evam ca mṛd ādi dṛṣṭāntāḥ anurūpāḥ bhaviṣyanti iti
na evam syāt mṛttikā iti eva satyam iti prakṛti mātrasya dṛṣṭānte satya tva avadhāraṇāt vācā ārambhaṇa śabdena ca vikāra jātasya anṛta tva abhidhānāt dārṣṭāntike aitadātmyam idam sarvam tat satyam iti ca parama kāraṇasya eva ekasya satya tva avadhāraṇāt saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi śvetaketo iti ca śārīrasya brahma bhāva upadeśāt
svayam prasiddham hi etat śārīrasya brahma ātma tvam upadiśyate na yatna antara prasādhyam
atas ca idam śāstrīyam brahma ātmatvam abhyupagamyamānam svābhāvikasya śārīra ātmatvasya bādhakam saṃpadyate rajju ādi buddhayaḥ iva sarpa ādi buddhīnām
bādhite ca śārīra ātma tve tad āśrayaḥ samastaḥ svābhāvikaḥ vyavahāraḥ bādhitaḥ bhavati yat prasiddhaye paraḥ brahmaṇaḥ kalpyeta
darśayati ca yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kena kam paśyet ityādinā brahma ātma tva darśinam prati samastasya kriyā kāraka phala lakṣaṇasya vyavahārasya abhāvam
na ca ayam vyavahāra abhāvaḥ vasthā viśeṣa nibaddhaḥ bhidhīyate iti yuktam vaktum tat tvam asi iti brahma ātma bhāvasya anavasthā viśeṣa nibandhana tvāt
taskara dṛṣṭāntena ca anṛta abhisaṃdhasya bandhanam satya abhisaṃdhasya ca mokṣam darśayan ekatvam eva ekam pāramārthikam darśayati mithyājñāna vijṛmbhitam ca nānātvam
ubhaya satyatāyām hi katham vyavahāra gocaraḥ jantuḥ anṛta abhisaṃdhaḥ iti ucyate
mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyum āpnoti yaḥ iha nānā iva paśyati iti ca bheda dṛṣṭim apavadan etat eva darśayati
na ca asmin darśane jñānāt mokṣaḥ iti upapadyate samyak jñāna apanodyasya kasyacid mithyājñānasya saṃsāra kāraṇa tvena anabhyupagamāt
ubhaya satyatāyām hi katham ekatva jñānena nānātva jñānam apanudyate iti ucyate
nanu ekatva ekānta abhyupagame nānātva abhāvāt pratyakṣa ādīni laukikāni pramāṇāni vyāhanyerana nirviṣaya tvāt sthāṇu ādiṣu iva puruṣa ādi jñānāni
tathā vidhi pratiṣedha śāstram api bheda apekṣa tvāt tad abhāve vyāhanyeta
mokṣa śāstrasya api śiṣya śāsitṛ ādi bheda apekṣa tvāt tad abhāve vyāghātaḥ syāt
katham ca anṛtena mokṣa śāstreṇa pratipāditasya ātma ekatvasya satya tvam upapadyeta iti
atrā ucyate na eṣa doṣaḥ sarva vyavahārāṇām eva prāk brahma ātmatā vijñānāt satya tva upapatteḥ svapna vyavahārasya iva prāk bodhāt
yāvat hi na satya ātma ekatva pratipattiḥ tāvat pramāṇa prameya phala lakṣaṇeṣu vikāreṣu anṛta tva buddhiḥ na kasyacid utpadyate
vikārān eva tu aham mama iti avidyayā ātma ātmīyena bhāvena sarvaḥ jantuḥ pratipadyate svābhāvikīm brahma ātmatām hitvā
tasmāt prāk brahma ātmatā prabodhāt upapannaḥ sarvaḥ laukikaḥ vaidikaḥ ca vyavahāraḥ yathā suptasya prākṛtasya janasya svapne uccāvacān bhāvān paśyataḥ niścitam eva pratyakṣa abhimatam vijñānam bhavati prāk prabodhāt na ca pratyakṣa ābhāsa abhiprāyaḥ tad kāle bhavati tadvat
katham tu asatyena vedānta vākyena satyasya brahma ātmatvasya pratipattiḥ upapadyeta
na hi rajju sarpeṇa daṣṭaḥ mriyate
na api mṛgatṛṣṇikā ambhasā pāna avagāhana ādi prayojanam kriyate iti
na eṣa doṣaḥ śaṅkā viṣa ādi nimitta maraṇa ādi kārya upalabdheḥ svapna darśana avasthasya ca sarpa daṃśana udaka snāna ādi kārya darśanāt
tad kāryam api anṛtam eva iti ced brūyāt tatra brūmaḥ yadi api svapna darśana avasthasya sarpa daṃśana udaka snāna ādi kāryam anṛtam tathā api tad avagatiḥ satyam eva phalam pratibuddhasya api a bādhyamāna tvāt
na hi svapnāt utthitaḥ svapna dṛṣṭam sarpa daṃśana udaka snāna ādi kāryam mithyā iti manyamānaḥ tat avagatim api mithyā iti manyate kaścid

ḥ ye ṇu ādi kāraṇa vādāḥ te pi pratiṣiddha tayā vyākhyātāḥ irākṛtāḥ draṣṭavyāḥ tulya tvāt irākaraṇa kāraṇasya ā atra āśaṅkitavyam kiṃcid
asti tulyam atra api parama gambhīrasya jagat kāraṇasya tarka a avagāhya tvam tarkasya ca a pratiṣṭhita tvam ayathā a vimokṣaḥ āgama virodhaḥ ca iti evaṃjātīyakam irā karaṇa kāraṇam bhoktṛ āpatteḥ avibhāgaḥ ced syāt
loka vat bhoktṛ āpatti adhikaraṇam ayathā brahma kāraṇa vādaḥ yadi api śrutiḥ pramāṇam sva viṣaye bhavati tathā api pramāṇa atareṇa viṣaya apahāre bhavitum arhati yathā matra arthavādau
sva viṣayāt syāt yathā dharma adharmayoḥ kim atas yadi evam atas idam ayuktam yat pramāṇa atara prasiddha artha bādhaam śruteḥ katham puas pramāṇa atara prasiddhaḥ
rthaḥ śrutyā bādhyate iti atra ucyate prasiddhaḥ hi ayam bhoktṛ bhogya vibhāgaḥ loke bhoktā cetaḥ śārīraḥ bhogyāḥ śabda ādayaḥ viṣayāḥ iti yathā bhoktā devadattaḥ
bhogyaḥ iti tasya ca vibhāgasya abhāvaḥ prasajyeta yadi bhoktā bhogya bhāvam āpadyeta bhogyam vā bhoktṛ bhāvam āpadyeta tayoḥ ca itaretara bhāva āpattiḥ parama kāraṇāt brahmaṇaḥ aya tvāt
prasajyeta ca asya prasiddhasya vibhāgasya yuktam yathā tu adyatve bhoktṛ bhogyayoḥ vibhāgaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ tathā atīta aāgatayoḥ api kalpayitavyaḥ tasmāt prasiddhasya asya bhoktṛ bhogya vibhāgasya abhāva prasaṅgāt ayuktam
idam brahma kāraṇatā avadhāraṇam iti ced kaścid codayet tam prati brūyāt syāt loka vat iti upapadyate eva ayam asmad pakṣe vibhāgaḥ evam loke dṛṣṭa tvāt
tathā hi samudrāt udaka ātman aya tve tad vikārāṇām itaretara vibhāgaḥ itaretara asaṃśleṣa ādi lakṣaṇaḥ ca vyavahāraḥ upalabhyate a ca samudrāt udaka ātman aya tve tad vikārāṇām
itaretara bhāva āpattiḥ bhavati ca teṣām itaretara bhāvāām pattau api bhavati evam iha api a bhoktṛ bhogyayoḥ itaretara bhāva āpattiḥ ca parasmāt
brahmaṇaḥ ya tvam bhaviṣyati yadi api bhoktā a brahmaṇaḥ vikāraḥ tat sṛṣṭvā tat eva auprāviśat iti sraṣṭuḥ eva avikṛtasya bhoktṛ tva śravaṇāt tathā api kāryam
upādhi imittaḥ vibhāgaḥ ākāśasya iva ghaṭa ādi upādhi imittaḥ iti atas parama kāraṇāt brahmaṇaḥ aya tve pi upapadyate bhoktṛ bhogya lakṣaṇaḥ vibhāgaḥ uktam tad aaya tvam ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ ārambhaṇa adhikaraṇam abhyupagamya
ca imam vyāvahārikam bhoktṛ bhogya lakṣaṇam vibhāgam syāt loka vat iti parihāraḥ bhihitaḥ a tu ayam vibhāgaḥ paramārthataḥ sti yasmāt tayoḥ kārya kāraṇayoḥ aaya tvam avagamyate
kāryam ākāśa ādikam bahu prapañcam jagat kāraṇam param brahma tasmāt kāraṇāt paramārthataḥ aya tvam vyatirekeṇa abhāvaḥ kāryasya avagamyate kutas ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ ārambhaṇa śabdaḥ tāvat sarva vijñāam pratijñāya
ucyate yathā somya ekea sarvam mṛ mayam vijñātam syāt vācā ārambhaṇam vikāraḥ āmadheyam mṛttikā iti eva satyam iti etat uktam bhavati
sarvam mṛd mayam ghaṭa śarāva udañca ādikam mṛd ātmaka tva aviśeṣāt vijñātam bhavet yatas vācā ārambhaṇam vikāraḥ āmadheyam vācā eva kevalam asti iti ārabhyate vikāraḥ ghaṭaḥ
śarāvaḥ kaścid asti āmadheya mātram hi etat aṛtam mṛttikā iti eva satyam iti eṣa brahmaṇaḥ
tatra śrutāt vācā ārambhaṇa śabdāt dārṣṭātike brahma vyatirekeṇa kārya jātasya abhāvaḥ iti gamyate ca brahma kārya tām uktvā tejaḥ ba a kāryāṇām tejaḥ ba a vyatirekeṇa abhāvam bravīti apāgāt
ageḥ agi tvam vācā ārambhaṇam vikāraḥ āmadheyam trīṇi rūpāṇi iti eva satyam ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ iti ādi śabdāt aitadātmyam idam sarvam tat satyam saḥ ātmā tat
tvam asi idam sarvam yat ayam ātmā brahma eva idam sarvam ātmā eva idam sarvam iti evamādi api ātma ekatva pratipāda aparam udāhartavyam

sa ca sva ātma bhūtān eva ghaṭa ākāśa sthānīyān avidyā pratyupasthāpita nāma rūpa kṛta kārya karaṇa saṃghāta anurodhinaḥ jīva ākhyān vijñāna ātmanaḥ pratīṣṭe vyavahāra viṣaye

tathā ca uktam yatra na anyat paśyati na anyat śṛṇoti na anyat vijānāti sa bhūmā iti
yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kena kam paśyet ityādinā ca

tathā īśvaragītāsu api na kartṛ tvam na karmāṇi lokasya sṛjati prabhuḥ
na karma phala saṃyogam svabhāvaḥ tu pravartate na ādatte kasyacid pāpam na ca eva sukṛtam vibhuḥ

iti mahā samudra ādi sthānīya tām brahmaṇaḥ kathayati a pratyākhyāya eva kārya prapañcam pariṇāma prakriyām ca āśrayati sa guṇeṣu upāsaneṣu upayokṣyate iti
bhāve ca upalabdheḥ
itas ca kāraṇāt ananya tvam kāryasya yat kāraṇam bhāvaḥ eva kāraṇasya kāryam upalabhyate na abhāve
tat yathā satyām mṛdi ghaṭaḥ upalabhyate satsu ca tantuṣu paṭaḥ
na ca niyamena anya bhāve nyasya upalabdhiḥ dṛṣṭā
na hi aśvaḥ goḥ anyaḥ san goḥ bhāvaḥ eva upalabhyate
na ca kulāla bhāve eva ghaṭaḥ upalabhyate sati api nimitta naimittika bhāve
nanu anyasya bhāve pi anyasya upalabdhiḥ niyatā dṛśyate yathā agni bhāve dhūmasya iti
na iti ucyate udvāpite pi agnau gopāla ghuṭikā ādi dhāritasya dhūmasya dṛśyamāna tvāt
atha dhūmam kayācid avasthayā viśiṃṣyāt īdṛśaḥ dhūmaḥ na asati agnau bhavati iti na evam api kaścid doṣaḥ
tad bhāva anuraktām hi buddhim kārya kāraṇayoḥ ananyatve hetum vayam vadāmaḥ
na ca asau agni dhūmayoḥ vidyate
bhāvāt ca upalabdheḥ iti vā sūtram
na kevalam śabdāt eva kārya kāraṇayoḥ ananyatvam pratyakṣa upalabdhi bhāvāt ca tayoḥ ananyatvam iti arthaḥ
bhavati hi pratyakṣa upalabdhiḥ kārya kāraṇayoḥ ananyatve
tat yathā tantu saṃsthāne paṭe tantu vyatirekeṇa paṭaḥ nāma kāryam na eva upalabhyate kevalāḥ tu tantavaḥ ātāna vitānavantaḥ pratyakṣam upalabhyante tathā tantuṣu aṃśavaḥ aṃśuṣu tad avayavāḥ
anayā pratyakṣa upalabdhyā lohita śukla kṛṣṇāni trīṇi rūpāṇi tatas vāyu mātram ākāśa mātram ca iti anumeyam tatas param brahma ekam eva advitīyam
tatra sarva pramāṇānām niṣṭhām avocāma
sattvāt ca avarasya
itas ca kāraṇāt kāryasya ananya tvam yat kāraṇam prāk utpatteḥ kāraṇa ātmanā eva kāraṇe sattvam avara kālīnasya kāryasya śrūyate sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ātmā vai idam ekaḥ eva agre āsīt ityādau idam śabda gṛhītasya kāryasya kāraṇena sāmānādhikaraṇyāt
yat ca yat ātmanā yatra na vartate na tat tatas utpadyate yathā sikatābhyaḥ tailam
tasmāt prāk utpatteḥ ananyatvāt utpannam api ananyat eva kāraṇāt kāryam iti avagamyate
yathā ca kāraṇam brahma triṣu kāleṣu sattvam na vyabhicarati evam kāryam api jagatī traṣu kāleṣu sattvam na vyabhicarati
ekam ca punar sattvam
atas pi ananya tvam kāraṇāt kāryasya
asat vyapadeśāt na iti ced na dharma antareṇa vākyaśeṣāt
nanu kvacid asattvam api prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya vyapadiśati śrutiḥ asat eva idam agre āsīt iti asat vai idam agre āsīt iti ca
tasmāt asat vyapadeśāt na prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya sattvam iti ced nā iti brūmaḥ
na hi ayam atyanta asattva abhiprāyeṇa prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya asat vyapadeśaḥ
kim tarhi vyākṛta nāma rūpa tvāt dharmāt avyākṛta nāma rūpa tvam dharma antaram tena dharma antareṇa ayam asat vyapadeśaḥ prāk utpatteḥ sataḥ eva kāryasya kāraṇa rūpeṇa ananyasya
katham etat avagamyate
vākya śeṣāt
yad upakrame saṃdigdha artham vākyam tat śeṣāt niścīyate
iha ca tāvat asat eva idam agre āsīt iti asat śabdena upakrame nirdiṣṭam yat tat eva punar tad śabdena parāmṛśya sat iti viśinaṣṭi tat sat āsīt iti asataḥ ca pūrva apara kāla asaṃbandhāt āsīt śabda anupapatteḥ ca
asat vai idam agre āsīt iti atra api tadā ātmānam svayam akuruta iti vākyaśeṣe viśeṣaṇāt na atyanta asattvam
tasmāt dharma antareṇa eva ayam asat vyapadeśaḥ prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya
nāma rūpa vyākṛtam hi vastu sat śabda arham loke prasiddham
atas prak nāma rūpa vyākaraṇāt asat iva āsīt iti upacaryate
yukteḥ śabda antarāt ca
yukteḥ ca prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya sattvam ananya tvam ca kāraṇāt avagamyate śabda antarāt ca
yuktiḥ tāvat varṇyate dadhi ghaṭa rucaka ādi arthibhiḥ pratiniyatāni kāraṇāni kṣīra mṛttikā suvarṇa ādīni upādīyamānāni loke dṛśyante
na hi dadhi arthibhiḥ mṛttikā upādīyate na ghaṭa arthibhiḥ kṣīram
tat asatkārya vāde na upapadyeta
aviśiṣṭe hi prāk utpatteḥ sarvasya sarvatra asattve kasmāt kṣīrāt eva dadhi utpadyate na mṛttikāyāḥ
mṛttikāyāḥ eva ca ghaṭaḥ utpadyate na kṣīrāt
atha aviśiṣṭe pi prāk asattve kṣīre eva dadhnaḥ kaścid atiśayaḥ na mṛttikāyām mṛttikāyām eva ca ghaṭasya kaścid atiśayaḥ na kṣīre iti ucyeta atas tarhi atiśayavat tvāt prāk avasthāyāḥ asatkārya vāda hāniḥ satkārya vāda siddhiḥ ca
śaktiḥ ca kāraṇasya kārya niyama arthā kalpyamānā na anyā asatī vā kāryam niyacchet asattva aviśeṣāt anya tva aviśeṣāt ca
tasmāt kāraṇasya ātma bhūtā śaktiḥ śakteḥ ca ātma bhūtam kāryam
api ca kārya kāraṇayoḥ dravya guṇa ādīnām ca aśva mahiṣa vat bheda buddhi abhāvāt tādātmyam abhyupagantavyam
samavāya kalpanāyām api samavāyasya samavāyibhiḥ saṃbandhe bhyupagamyamāne tasya tasya anyonyaḥ saṃbandhaḥ kalpayitavyaḥ iti anavasthā prasaṅgaḥ anabhyupagamyamāne ca viccheda prasaṅgaḥ
atha samavāyaḥ svayam saṃbandha rūpa tvāt an apekṣya eva aparam saṃbandham saṃbadhyeta saṃyogaḥ pi tarhi svayam saṃbandha rūpa tvāt an apekṣya eva aparam samavāyam saṃbadhyeta
tādātmya pratīteḥ ca dravya guṇa ādīnām samavāya kalpanā ānarthakyam
katham ca kāryam avayavi dravyam kāraṇeṣu avayava dravyeṣu vartamānam vartate
kim samasteṣu avayaveṣu varteta uta pratyavayavam
yadi tāvat samasteṣu varteta tatas vayavi anupalabdhiḥ prasajyeta samasta avayava saṃnikarṣasya aśakya tvāt
na hi bahu tvam samasteṣu āśrayeṣu vartamānam vyasta āśraya grahaṇena gṛhyate
atha avayavaśas samasteṣu varteta tadā api ārambhaka avayava vyatirekeṇa avayavinaḥ vayavāḥ kalpyeran yaiḥ ārambhakeṣu avayaveṣu avayavaśas vayavī varteta
kośa avayava vyatiriktaiḥ hi avayavaiḥ asiḥ kośam vyāpnoti
anavasthā ca evam prasajyeta teṣu teṣu avayaveṣu vartayitum anyeṣām anyeṣām avayavānām kalpanīya tvāt
atha pratyavayavam varteta tadā ekatra vyāpāre nyatra avyāpāraḥ syāt
na hi devadattaḥ srughne saṃnidhīyamānaḥ tat ahar eva pāṭaliputre saṃnidhīyate
yugapad anekatra vṛttau aneka tva prasaṅgaḥ syāt devadatta yajñadattayoḥ iva srughna pāṭaliputra nivāsinoḥ
go tva ādi vat pratyekam parisamāpteḥ na doṣaḥ iti ced na
tathā pratīti abhāvāt
yadi go tva ādi vat pratyekam parisamāptaḥ vayavī syāt yathā go tvam prati vyakti pratyakṣam gṛhyate evam avayavī api pratyavayavam pratyakṣam gṛhyeta
na ca evam niyatam gṛhyate
pratyeka parisamāptau ca avayavinaḥ kāryeṇa adhikārāt tasya ca ekatvāt śṛṅgeṇa api stana kāryam kuryāt urasā ca pṛṣṭha kāryam
na ca evam dṛśyate
prāk utpatteḥ ca kāryasya asattve utpattiḥ akartṛkā nirātmikā ca syāt
utpattiḥ ca nāma kriyā sā sa kartṛkā eva bhavitum arhati gati ādi vat
kriyā ca nāma syāt akartṛkā ca iti vipratiṣidhyeta
ghaṭasya ca utpattiḥ ucyamānā ca ghaṭa kartṛkā kiṃtarhi anya kartṛkā iti kalpyā syāt
tathā kapāla ādīnām api utpattiḥ ucyamānāni akartṛkā eva kalpyeta
tathā ca sati ghaṭaḥ utpadyate id yukte kulāla ādīni kāraṇāni utpadyante iti uktam syāt
na ca loke ghaṭa utpattiḥ iti ukte kulāla ādīnām api utpadyamāna tā pratīyate utpanna tā pratīteḥ
atha sva kāraṇa sattā saṃbandhe evā utpattiḥ ātma lābhaḥ ca kāryasya iti ced katham alabdha ātmakam saṃbadhyeta iti vaktavyam
satoḥ hi dvayoḥ saṃbandhaḥ saṃbhavati na sat asatoḥ asatoḥ vā
abhāvasya ca nirupākhya tvāt prāk utpatteḥ iti maryādā karaṇam anupapannam
satām hi loke kṣetra gṛha ādīnām maryādā dṛṣṭā na abhāvasya
na hi vandhyāputraḥ rājā babhūva prāk pūrṇavarmaṇaḥ bhiṣekāt iti evaṃjātīyakena maryādā karaṇena nirupākhyaḥ vandhyāputraḥ rājā babhūva bhavati bhaviṣyati iti vā viśeṣyate
yadi ca kāraka vyāpārāt ūrdhvam abhaviṣyat tatas idam api upāpatsyata kārya bhāvaḥ pi kāraka vyāpārāt ūrdhvam bhaviṣyati iti
vayam tu paśyāmaḥ vandhyā putrasya kārya abhāvasya ca abhāva tva aviśeṣāt yathā bandhyā putraḥ kāraka vyāpārāt ūrdhvam na bhaviṣyati evam kārya abhāvaḥ api kāraka vyāpārāt ūrdhvam na bhaviṣyati iti
nanu evam sati kāraka vyāpāraḥ narthakaḥ prasajyeta
yathā eva hi prāk siddha tvāt kāraṇa svarūpa siddhaye na kaścid vyāpriyate evam prāk siddha tvāt tad ananyatvāt ca kāryasya svarūpa siddhaye na kaścid vyāpriyeta
vyāpriyate ca
atas kāraka vyāpāra arthavat tvāya manyāmahe prāk utpatteḥ abhāvaḥ kāryasya iti ced na eṣa doṣaḥ
yatas kāryākāreṇa kāraṇam vyavasthāpayataḥ kāraka vyāpārasya arthavat tvam upapadyate
kārya ākāraḥ pi kāraṇasya ātma bhūtaḥ eva anātma bhūtasya an ārabhya tvāt iti abhāṇi
na ca viśeṣa darśana mātreṇa vastu anya tvam bhavati
na hi devadattaḥ saṃkucita hasta pādaḥ prasārita hasta pādaḥ ca viśeṣeṇa dṛśyamānaḥ u pi vastu anya tvam gacchati saḥ eva iti pratyabhijñānāt
tathā pratidinam aneka saṃsthānānām api pitṛ ādīnām na vastu anya tvam bhavati mama pitā mama bhrātā mama putraḥ iti pratyabhijñānāt
janma uccheda anantarita tvāt tatra yuktam na anyatra iti ced na
kṣīra ādīnām api dadhi ādi ākāra saṃsthānasya pratyakṣa tvāt
adṛśyamānānām api vaṭa dhānā ādīnām samāna jātīya avayava antara upacitānām aṅkura ādi bhāvena darśana gocara tā āpattau janma saṃjñā
teṣām eva avayavānām apacaya vaśāt adarśana āpattau uccheda saṃjñā
tatra īdṛś janma uccheda antarita tvāt ced asataḥ sattva āpattiḥ sataḥ ca asattva āpattiḥ tathā sati garbha vāsinaḥ uttānaśāyinaḥ ca bheda prasaṅgaḥ
tathā ca bālya yauvana sthāvireṣu api bheda prasaṅgaḥ pitṛ ādi vyavahāra lopa prasaṅagaḥ ca
etena kṣaṇabhaṅga vādaḥ prativaditavyaḥ
yasya tu punar prāk utpatteḥ asat kāryam tasya nirviṣayaḥ kāraka vyāpāraḥ syāt abhāvasya viṣaya tva anupapatteḥ ākāśa hanana prayojana khaṅga ādi aneka āyudha prayukti vat
samavāyi kāraṇa viṣayaḥ kāraka vyāpāraḥ syāt iti ced na
anya viṣayeṇa kāraka vyāpāreṇa anya niṣpatteḥ atiprasaṅgāt
samavāyi kāraṇasya eva ātma atiśayaḥ kāryam iti ced na
satkārya tā āpatteḥ
tasmāt kṣīra ādīni eva dravyāṇi dadhi ādi bhāvena avatiṣṭhamānāni kārya ākhyām labhante iti na kāraṇāt anyat kāryam varṣa

viiyujyate phalavat saṃidhau aphalam
tat aṅgam itivat a tu svatatram phalāya kalpyate iti a hi pariṇāmavat tva vijñāāt pariṇāmavat tvam ātmaaḥ phalam syāt iti vaktum yuktam kūṭastha aitya tva ātmanaḥ
mokṣasya ekatva aikātyāt īśitṛ īśitavya abhāve īśvara kāraṇa pratijñā virodhaḥ iti ced a avidyā ātmaka āma rūpa bīja vyākaraṇa apekṣa tvāt sarvajñatvasya tasmāt vai etasmāt ātmanaḥ ākāśaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ ityādi vākyebhyaḥ iti aśuddha buddha mukta svarūpāt sarvajñāt
sarva śakteḥ īśvarāt vā iti eṣaḥ rthaḥ pratijñātaḥ asya yatas iti sā pratijñā tad avasthā eva
rthaḥ iha ucyate katham ocyate atyatam ātmanaḥ ekatvam advitīya tvam ca bruvatā śṛṇu yathā ocyate sarvajñasya īśvarasya ātma bhūte iva avidyā kalpite āma rūpe tattva ayatvābhyām airvacaīye saṃsāra prapañca bīja bhūte
sarvajñasya īśvarasya māyā śaktiḥ prakṛtiḥ iti a śruti smṛtyoḥ abhilapyete tābhyām ayaḥ sarvajñaḥ īśvaraḥ ākāśaḥ vai āmaḥ āma rūpayoḥ te yat atarā tat
brahma iti śruteḥ āma rūpe vyākaravāṇi sarvāṇi rūpāṇi vicitya ekam bījam bahudhā yaḥ
karoti ityādi śrutibhyaḥ ca evam avidyā kṛta āma rūpa upādhi aurodhi īśvaraḥ bhavati vyom iva ghaṭa karaka ādi upādhi aurodhi sa ca svātma bhūtāḥ eva ghaṭa ākāśa sthāīyāḥ avidyā pratyupasthāpita āma rūpa kṛta kārya karaṇa saṃghāta aurodhiḥ pratīṣṭe vyavahāra viṣaye tat evam avidyā ātmaka upādhi pariccheda apekṣam
eva īśvarasya īśvara tvam sarvajña tvam sarva śakti tvam ca a paramārthataḥ vidyayā apāsta sarva upādhi svarūpe ātmai īśitṛ īśitavya sarvajña tva ādi vyavahāraḥ upapadyate tathā ca uktam yatra āyat paśyati āyat śṛṇoti āyat
sa bhūmā iti yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kaḥ kam paśyet ca evam paramārtha avasthāyām sarva vyavahāra abhāvam vadati sarve
tathā īśvaragītāsu api a kartṛ tvam a karmāṇi lokasya sṛjati prabhuḥ a karma phala saṃyogam svabhāvaḥ tu pravartate ādatte kasyacid pāpam a ca eva sukṛtam
