bhavati iti hi buddhim kārya kāraṇayoḥ aaya tve hetum vayam vadāmaḥ a ca asau agi dhūmayoḥ vidyate bhāvāt ca upalabdheḥ iti vā sūtram a kevalam
śabdāt eva kārya kāraṇayoḥ aaya tvam pratyakṣa upalabdhi bhāvāt ca tayoḥ aaya tvam iti arthaḥ bhavati hi pratyakṣa upalabdhiḥ kārya kāraṇayoḥ aaya tve tat yathā paṭe tatu vyatirekeṇa paṭaḥ kāryam kevalāḥ tu tatavaḥ pratyakṣam upalabhyate
tathā tatuṣu aṃśavaḥ aṃśuṣu tad avayavāḥ aayā pratyakṣa upalabdhyā lohita śukla kṛṣṇāi trīṇi rūpāṇi tatas vāyu mātram ākāśa mātram ca iti aumeyam tatas param brahma ekam eva advitīyam tatra sarva pramāṇāām iṣṭhām avocāma sattvāt ca avarasya
itas ca kāraṇāt kāryasya āaya tvam yat kāraṇam prāk utpatteḥ kāraṇa ātmā eva kāraṇe sattvam avarakālīasya kāryasya śrūyate sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ātmā vai idam eka
eva agre āsīt ityādau idam śabda gṛhītasya kāryasya sāmāādhikaraṇyāt yat ca yad ātma yatra a vartate a tat tatas utpadyate yathā sikatābhyaḥ tailam tasmāt prāk utpatteḥ aaya tvāt utpaam api aayat eva kāraṇāt kāryam iti avagamyate yathā ca
kāraṇam brahma triṣu kāleṣu sattvam vyabhicarati evam kāryam api jagatī traṣu kāleṣu sattvam vyabhicarati ekam ca sattvam kāraṇāt kāryasya
asat vyapadeśāḥ ce a dharma atareṇa vākyaśeṣāt kvacid asat tvam api prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya vyapadiśati śrutiḥ asat eva idam agre āsīt iti asat vai idam agre āsīt iti
ca tasmāt asat vyapadeśāḥ prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya sattvam iti ced ā iti brūmaḥ hi ayam atyatā sattva abhiprāyeṇa prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya asat vyapadeśaḥ kim tarhi vyākṛta āma rūpa tvāt dharmāt avyākṛta āma rūpa tvam dharma ataram dharma atareṇa ayam asat vyapadeśaḥ prāk utpatteḥ sata
eva kāryasya kāraṇa rūpeṇa āayasya katham etat avagamyate vākyaśeṣāt yat upakrame saṃdigdha artham vākyam tat śeṣāḥ cīyate iha ca tāvat asat eva idam agre āsīt iti asat śabdena upakrame yat tat eva parāmṛśya
sat iti viśiaṣṭi tat sat āsīt iti asataḥ ca āsīt śabda aupapatteḥ ca asat vai idam agre āsīt iti atra api tat ātmā aam svayam akuruta iti vākyaśeṣe tasmāt dharma atareṇa eva ayam asat vyapadeśaḥ prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya āma rūpa vyākṛtam
hi vastu sat śabda arham loke prasiddham atas praṅ āma rūpa vyākaraṇāt asat iva āsīt iti upacaryate yukteḥ śabda atarāt ca yukteḥ ca prāk utpatteḥ kāryasya sattvam ca kāraṇāt avagamyate
śabda atarāt ca yuktiḥ tāvat varṇyate dadhi ghaṭa rucaka ādi arthibhiḥ kāraṇāi loke dṛśyate a hi dadhi arthibhiḥ mṛttikā upādīyate a ghaṭa arthibhiḥ kṣīram tat
asatkārya vāde opapadyeta a viśiṣṭe hi prāk utpatteḥ sarvasya sarvatra asattve kasmāt kṣīrāt eva dadhi utpadyate a mṛttikāyāḥ mṛttikāyāḥ eva ca ghaṭaḥ utpadyate a
kṣīrāt atha aviśiṣṭe pi prāk asattve kṣīre eva dadhaḥ kaścid atiśayaḥ a mṛttikāyām mṛttikāyām eva ca ghaṭasya kaścid atiśayaḥ a kṣīre
iti ucyeta atas tarhi atiśayavat tvāt prāk avasthāyāḥ asatkārya vāda hāiḥ satkārya vāda siddhiḥ ca śaktiḥ ca kāraṇasya kārya aiyama arthā āyāḥ asatī vā kāryam iyacchet
asattva aviśeṣāt ca tasmāt kāraṇasya ātma bhūtā śaktiḥ śakteḥ ca ātma bhūtam kāryam api ca kārya kāraṇayoḥ dravya guṇa ādīām ca aśva mahiṣa vat bheda buddhi abhāvāt tādātmyam abhyupagatavyam samavāya kalpaāyām api samavāyasya
samavāyibhiḥ saṃbadhe bhyupagamyamāe tasya tasya ayoyaḥ saṃbadhaḥ kalpayitavyaḥ iti a avasthā prasaṅgaḥ ca viccheda prasaṅgaḥ atha samavāyaḥ svayam saṃbadha rūpa tvāt a apekṣya eva aparam saṃbadham saṃbadhyeta saṃyogaḥ
tarhi svayam tarhi svayam a apekṣya eva aparam samavāyam saṃbadhyeta tādātmya pratīteḥ ca dravya guṇa ādīām samavāya kalpa āarthakyam katham ca kāryam avayavi dravyam kāraṇeṣu avayava dravyeṣu vartamāam vartate kim
samasteṣu avayaveṣu varteta uta pratyavayavam yadi tāvat samasteṣu varteta tatas vayavī aupalabdhiḥ prasajyeta samasta avayava saṃikarṣasya aśakya tvāt hi bahu tvam samasteṣu āśrayeṣu vyasta āśraya grahaṇea
gṛhyate atha avayavaśas samasteṣu varteta tadā api ārambhaka avayava vyatirekeṇa avayaviḥ vayavāḥ kalpyera yaiḥ ārambhakeṣu avayaveṣu avayavaśas vayavī varteta kośa avayava vyatiriktaiḥ hi avayavaiḥ asiḥ kośam
ca evam prasajyeta teṣu teṣu avayaveṣu vartayitum avayavāām avayavāām atha pratyavayavam varteta tadā ekatra vyāpāre yatra avyāpāraḥ syāt hi devadattaḥ
srughe tat ahar eva pāṭaliputre saṃidhīyate
srugha pāṭaliputraivāsioḥ go tva ādi vat pratyekam parisamāpteḥ a doṣaḥ iti ced a tathā pratīti abhāvāt yadi go tva ādi vat pratyekam parisamāptaḥ vayavī syāt yathā go tvam prati vyakti pratyakṣam gṛhyate
evam avayavi api prati avayavam pratyakṣam gṛhyeta ca evam iyatam gṛhyate pratyeka parisamāptau ca avayaviḥ kāryeṇa adhikārāt tasya ca ekatvāt śṛṅgeṇa api staa kāryam kuryāt urasā ca
ca evam dṛśyate prāk utpatteḥ ca kāryasya asattve utpattiḥ akartṛkā ca syāt utpattiḥ ca kriyā sā sa kartṛkā eva bhavitum
arhati gati ādi vat kriyā ca syāt akartṛkā ca iti vipratiṣidhyeta ghaṭasya ca utpattiḥ ucyamāā ca ghaṭa kartṛkā kiṃtarhi iti kalpyā syāt
tathā kapāla ādīām api utpattiḥ ucyamāāī akartṛkā eva kalpyeta tathā ca sati ghaṭaḥ utpadyate yukte utpadyate iti uktam syāt
ca loke ghaṭa utpattiḥ iti ukte kulāla ādīām api utpadyamāatā pratīyate atha sva kāraṇa sattā saṃbadhaḥ evā utpattiḥ ātmalābhaḥ ca kāryasya iti ced katham alabdha ātmakam
saṃbadhyeta iti vaktavyam satoḥ hi dvayoḥ saṃbadhaḥ saṃbhavati a sat asatoḥ asatoḥ vā abhāvasya ca prāk utpatteḥ iti maryādā karaṇam aupapaam satām
hi loke kṣetra gṛha ādīām maryādā dṛṣṭā hi vadhyāputraḥ rājā babhūva prāk pūrṇavarmaṇaḥ bhiṣekāt iti evaṃjātīyake maryādā karaṇe vadhyāputraḥ rājā
babhūva bhavati bhaviṣyati iti vā viśeṣyate yadi ca kāraka vyāpārāt ūrdhvam abhaviṣyat tatas idam api upāpatsyata kārya bhāvaḥ pi kāraka vyāpārāt ūrdhvam
bhaviṣyati iti vayam tu paśyāmaḥ vadhyā putrasya kārya abhāvasya ca abhāva tva aviśeṣāt yathā badhyā putraḥ kāraka vyāpārāt ūrdhvam bhaviṣyati evam kārya abhāvaḥ pi kāraka vyāpārāt ūrdhvam bhaviṣyati iti
evam sati kāraka vyāpāraḥ arthakaḥ prasajyeta yathā eva hi prāk siddha tvāt kāraṇa sva rūpa siddhaye a kaścid vyāpriyate evam prāk siddha tvāt tad aaya tvāt ca kāryasya sva rūpa siddhaye pi
a kaścid vyāpriyeta vyāpriyate ca atas kāraka vyāpāra arthavat tvāya mayāmahe prāk utpatteḥ abhāvaḥ kāryasya iti ced ā eṣa doṣaḥ yatas kāryākāreṇa kāraṇam vyavasthāpayataḥ kāraka vyāpārasya arthavat tvam
upapadyate kārya akāraḥ pi kāraṇasya ātma bhūtaḥ eva a ātma bhūtasya a ārabhya tvāt iti abhāṇi a ca viśeṣa darśa mātreṇa bhavati hi devadattaḥ saṃkucita hasta pādaḥ prasārita hasta pādaḥ ca viśeṣeṇa
vastu aya tvam gacchati saḥ eva iti pratyabhijñāāt tathā api bhavati mama pitā mama bhrātā mama putraḥ iti
tatra yuktam tatra yuktam a kṣīra ādīām api dadhi ādi ākāra saṃsthā asya pratyakṣa tvāt adṛśyamāāām api vaṭa dhā ādīām aṅkura ādi bhāve a darśa agocara tā āpattau jama saṃjñā teṣām eva avayavāām apacaya vaśāt adarśa āpattau uccheda saṃjñā tatra īdṛś jama uccheda ātarita tvāt ced asataḥ sattva āpattiḥ sataḥ ca asattva āpattiḥ
tathā sati bheda prasaṅgaḥ tathā ca bālya yauva a sthāvireṣu api bheda prasaṅgaḥ pitṛ ādi vyavahāra lopa prasaṅagaḥ ca kṣaṇabhaṅga vādaḥ prativaditavyaḥ yasya tu prāk utpatteḥ asat kāryam
tasya iḥ viṣayaḥ kāraka vyāpāraḥ syāt abhāvasya viṣaya tva aupapatteḥ samavāyi kāraṇa viṣayaḥ kāraka vyāpāraḥ syāt iti ced a aya viṣayeṇa kāraka vyāpāreṇa ayaiṣpatteḥ atiprasaṅgāt samavāyi kāraṇasya eva ātma atiśayaḥ kāryam iti ced a satkārya tā āpatteḥ tasmāt kṣīra ādīyā iva
dravyāṇi kārya ākhyām labhate iti a kāraṇāt ayat kāryam varṣa

text1:
yāpāreṇa anya niṣpatteḥ atiprasaṅgāt
samavāyi kāraṇasya eva ātma atiśayaḥ kāryam iti ced na
satkārya tā āpatteḥ
tasmāt kṣīra ādīni eva dravyāṇi dadhi ādi bhāvena avatiṣṭhamānāni kārya ākhyām labhante iti na kāraṇāt anyat kāryam varṣa śatena api śakyam kalpayitum
tathā mūlakāraṇam eva ā antyāt kāryāt tena tena kārya ākāreṇa naṭa vat sarva vyavahāra āspada tvam pratipadyate
evam yukteḥ kāryasya prāc utpatteḥ sattvam ananya tvam ca kāraṇāt avagamyate
śabda antarāt ca etat avagamyate pūrva sūtre sat vyapadeśinaḥ śabdasya udāhṛta tvāt tatas nyaḥ sat vyapadeśī śabdaḥ śabda antaram sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ekam eva advitīyam ityādi
tat ha eke āhuḥ asat eva idam agre āsīt iti ca asat pakṣam upakṣipya katham asataḥ sat jāyeta iti ākṣipya sat eva somya idam agre āsīt iti avadhārayati
tatra idam śabda vācyasya kāryasya prāk utpatteḥ sat śabda vācyena kāraṇena sāmānādhikaraṇyasya śrūyamāṇa tvāt sattva ananyatve prasidhyataḥ
yadi tu prāk utpatteḥ asat kāryam syāt paścāt ca utpadyamānam kāraṇe samaveyāt tat anyat kāraṇāt syāt tatra yena aśrutam śrutam bhavati iti iyam pratijñā pīḍyeta
sattva ananyatva avagateḥ tu iyam pratijñā samarthyate
paṭa vat ca
yathā ca saṃveṣṭitaḥ paṭaḥ na vyaktam gṛhyate kim ayam paṭaḥ kim vā anyat dravyam iti
saḥ eva prasāritaḥ yat saṃveṣṭitam dravyam tat paṭaḥ eva iti prasāraṇena abhivyaktaḥ gṛhyate
yathā ca saṃveṣṭana samaye paṭaḥ iti gṛhyamāṇaḥ na viśiṣṭa āyāma vistāraḥ gṛhyate
saḥ eva prasāraṇa samaye viśiṣṭa āyāma vistāraḥ gṛhyate na saṃveṣṭita rūpāt anyaḥ yam bhinnaḥ paṭaḥ iti evam tantu ādi kāraṇa avastham paṭa ādi kāryam aspaṣṭam sat turī vema kuvinda ādi kāraka vyāpāra abhivyaktam spaṣṭam gṛhyate
atas saṃveṣṭita prasārita paṭa nyāyena eva ananyat kāraṇāt kāryam iti arthaḥ
yathā ca prāṇa ādi
yathā ca loke prāṇa apāna ādiṣu prāṇa bhedeṣu prāṇāyāmena niruddheṣu kāraṇa mātreṇa rūpeṇa vartamāneṣu jīvana mātram kāryam nirvartyate na ākuñcana prasāraṇa ādikam kārya antaram
teṣu eva prāṇabhedeṣu punar pravṛtteṣu jīvanāt adhikam ākuñcana prasāraṇa ādikam api kārya antaram nirvartyate
na ca prāṇa bhedānām prabhedavataḥ prāṇāt anya tvam samīraṇa svabhāva aviśeṣāt evam kāryasya kāraṇāt ananya tvam
atas ca kṛtsnasya jagataḥ brahma kārya tvāt tad ananya tvāt ca siddhā eṣā śrautī pratijñā yena a śrutam śrutam bhavati a matam matam avijñātam vijñātam iti
itara vyapadeśāt
itara vyapadeśa adhikaraṇam
anyathā punar cetana kāraṇa vādaḥ ākṣipyate cetanāt hi jagat prakriyāyām āśrīyamāṇāyām hita akaraṇa ādayaḥ doṣāḥ prasajyante
kutas
itara vyapadeśāt
itarasya śārīrasya brahma ātmatvam vyapadiśati śrutiḥ saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi śvetaketo iti pratibodhanāt
yat vai itarasya ca brahmaṇaḥ śārīra ātma tvam vyapadiśati tat sṛṣṭvā tat eva anuprāviśat iti sraṣṭuḥ eva avikṛtasya brahmaṇaḥ kārya anupraveśena śārīra ātma tva darśanāt
anena jīvena ātmanā anupraviśya nāma rūpe vyākaravāṇi iti ca parā devatā jīvam ātma śabdena vyapadiśantī na brahmaṇaḥ bhinnaḥ śārīraḥ iti darśayati
tasmāt yat brahmaṇaḥ sraṣṭṛ tvam tat śārīrasya eva iti
atas ca svatantraḥ kartā san hitam eva ātmanaḥ saumanasya karam kuryāt na ahitam janma maraṇa jarā roga ādi aneka anartha jālam
na hi kaścid aparatantraḥ bandhanāgāram ātmanaḥ kṛtvā anupraviśati
na ca svayam atyanta nirmalaḥ san atyanta malinam deham ātma tvena upeyāt
kṛtam api kathaṃcid yat duḥkha karam tat icchayā jahyāt
sukha karam ca upādadīta
smaret ca mayā idam jagat bimbam vicitram viracitam iti
sarvaḥ hi lokaḥ spaṣṭam kāryam kṛtvā smarati mayā idam kṛtam iti
yathā ca māyāvī svayam prasāritām māyām icchayā anāyāsena eva upasaṃharati evam śārīraḥ pi imām sṛṣṭim upasaṃharet
svakīyam api tāvat śarīram śārīraḥ na śaknoti anāyāsena upasaṃhartum
evam hita kriyā ādi adarśanāt anyāyyā cetanāt jagat prakriyā iti gamyate
adhikam tu bheda nirdeśāt
tu śabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati
yat sarvajñam sarva śakti brahma nitya śuddha buddha mukta svabhāvam śārīrāt adhikam anyat tat vayam jagataḥ sraṣṭṛ brūmaḥ
na tasmin hita akaraṇa ādayaḥ doṣāḥ prasajyante
na hi tasya hitam kiṃcid kartavyam asti ahitam vā parihartavyam nitya mukta svabhāva tvāt
na ca tasya jñāna pratibandhaḥ śakti pratibandhaḥ vā kvacid api asti sarvajña tvāt sarva śakti tvāt ca
śārīraḥ tu anevaṃvidhaḥ
tasmin prasajyante hita akaraṇa ādayaḥ doṣāḥ
na tu tam vayam jagataḥ sraṣṭāram brūmaḥ
kutas etat
bheda nirdeśāt ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ śrotavyaḥ mantavyaḥ nididhyāsitavyaḥ saḥ nveṣṭavyaḥ sa vijijñāsitavyaḥ satā somya tadā saṃpannaḥ bhavati śārīraḥ ātmā prājñena ātmanā anvārūḍhaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ kartṛ karma ādi bheda nirdeśaḥ jīvāt adhikam brahma darśayati
nanu abheda nirdeśaḥ api darśitaḥ tattvam asi iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ
katham bheda abhedau viruddhau saṃbhaveyātām
na eṣa doṣaḥ mahākāśa ghaṭa ākāśa nyāyena ubhaya saṃbhavasya tatra tatra pratiṣṭhāpita tvāt
api ca yadā tat tvam asi iti evaṃjātīyakena abheda nirdeśena abhedaḥ pratibodhitaḥ bhavati apagatam bhavati tadā jīvasya saṃsāri tvam brahmaṇaḥ ca sraṣṭṛ tvam samastasya mithyā jñāna vijṛmbhitasya bheda vyavahārasya samyak jñānena bādhita tvāt
tatra kutas eva sṛṣṭiḥ
kutas vā hita akaraṇa ādayaḥ doṣāḥ
avidyā pratyupasthāpita nāma rūpa kṛta kārya karaṇa saṃghāta upādhya viveka kṛtā hi bhrāntiḥ hita akaraṇa ādi lakṣaṇaḥ saṃsāraḥ na tu paramārthataḥ sti iti asakṛt avocāma janma maraṇa chedana bhedana ādi abhimāna vat
abādhite tu bheda vyavahāre saḥ nveṣṭavyaḥ sa vijijñāsitavyaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakena bheda nirdeśena avagamyamānam brahmaṇaḥ dhika tvam hita akaraṇa ādi doṣa prasaktim niruṇaddhi
aśma ādi vat ca tad anupapattiḥ
yathā ca loke pṛthivī tva sāmānya anvitānām api aśmanām kecid mahārhāḥ maṇayaḥ vajra vaiḍūrya ādayaḥ anye madhyama vīryāḥ sūryakānta ādayaḥ anye prahīṇāḥ śvāyasa prakṣepaṇa arhāḥ pāṣāṇāḥ iti anekavidham vaicitryam dṛśyate
yathā ca eka pṛthivī vyapāśrayāṇām api bījānām bahuvidham patra puṣpa phala gandha rasa ādi vaicitryam candana kiṃpāka campaka ādiṣu upalakṣyate
yathā ca ekasya api anna rasasya lohita ādīni keśa loma ādīni ca vicitrāṇi kāryāṇi bhavanti evam ekasya api brahmaṇaḥ jīva prājña pṛthaktvam kārya vaicitryam ca upapadyate iti atas tad anupapattiḥ para parikalpita doṣa anupapattiḥ iti arthaḥ
śruteḥ ca prāmāṇyāt vikārasya ca vācā ārambhaṇa mātra tvāt svapna dṛśya bhāva vaicitrya vat ca iti abhyuccayaḥ
upasaṃhāra darśanāt na iti ced na kṣīravat hi
upasaṃhāra darśana adhika ramam
cetanam brahma ekam advitīyam jagataḥ kāraṇam iti yat uktam tat na upapadyate
kasmāt
upasaṃhāra darśanāt
iha hi loke kulāla ādayaḥ ghaṭa paṭa ādīnām kartāraḥ mṛd daṇḍa cakra sūtra salila ādi aneka kāraka upasaṃhāreṇa saṃgṛhīta sādhanāḥ santaḥ tat tat kāryam kurvāṇāḥ dṛśyante
brahma ca asahāyam tava abhipretam
tasya sādhana antara an upasaṃgrahe sati katham sraṣṭṛ tvam upapadyeta
tasmāt na brahma jagat kāraṇam iti ced nā eṣa doṣaḥ
yatas kṣīra vat dravya svabhāva viśeṣāt upapadyate yathā hi loke kṣīram jalam vā svayam eva dadhi hima karaka ādi bhāvena pariṇamate na apekṣya bāhyam sādhanam tathā iha api bhaviṣyati
nanu kṣīra ādi api dadhi ādi bhāvena pariṇamamānam apekṣate eva bāhyam sādhanam auṣṇya ādikam
katham ucyate kṣīravat hi iti
na eṣa doṣaḥ
svayam api hi kṣīram yām ca yāvatīm ca pariṇāma mātrām anubhavati tāvatī eva tu āryate tu auṣṇya ādinā dadhi bhāvāya
yadi ca svayam dadhi bhāva śīla tā na syāt na eva auṣṇya ādinā api balāt dadhi bhāvam āpadyeta
na hi vāyuḥ ākāśaḥ vai auṣṇya ādinā balāt dadhi bhāvam āpadyate
sādhana sāmagryā ca tasya pūrṇa tā saṃpādyate
paripūrṇa śaktikam tu brahma
na tasya anyena kenacid pūrṇa tā saṃpādayitavyā
śrutiḥ ca bhavati na tasya kāryam karaṇam ca vidyate na tad samaḥ ca abhyadhikaḥ ca dṛśyate
parā asya śaktiḥ vividhā eva śrūyate svābhāvikī jñāna bala kriyā ca iti
tasmāt ekasya api brahmaṇaḥ vicitra śakti yogāt kṣīra ādi vat vicitra pariṇāmaḥ upapadyate
deva ādi vat api loke
syāt etat upapadyate kṣīra ādīnām acetanānām an apekṣya api bāhyam sādhanam dadhi ādi bhāvaḥ dṛṣṭa tvāt
cetanāḥ punar kulāla ādayaḥ sādhana sāmagrīm apekṣya eva tasmai tasmai kāryāya pravartamānāḥ dṛśyante
katham brahma cetanam sat asahāyam pravarteta iti deva ādi vat iti brūmaḥ yathā loke devāḥ pitaraḥ ṛṣayaḥ iti evamādayaḥ mahā prabhāvāḥ cetanāḥ api santaḥ na apekṣya eva kiṃcid bāhyam sādhanam aiśvarya viśeṣa yogāt abhidhyāna mātreṇa svatas eva bahūni nānā saṃsthānāni śarīrāṇi prāsāda ādīni ratha ādīni ca nirmimāṇāḥ upalabhyante mantra arthavāda itihāsa purāṇa prāmāṇyāt
tantunābhaḥ ca svatas eva tantūn sṛjati
balākā ca antareṇa eva śukram garbham dhatte
padminī ca an apekṣya kiṃcid prasthāna sādhanam saraḥ ntarāt saraḥ ntaram pratiṣṭhate evam cetanam api brahma an apekṣya eva bāhyam sādhanam svatas eva jagat srakṣyati
sa yadi brūyāt ye ete deva ādayaḥ brahmaṇaḥ dṛṣṭāntāḥ upāttāḥ te dārṣṭāntikena brahmaṇā na samānāḥ bhavanti
śarīram eva hi acetanam deva ādīnām śarīra antara ādi vibhūti utpādane upādānam na tu cetanaḥ ātmā
tantunābhasya ca kṣudratara jantu bhakṣaṇāt lālā kaṭhina tām āpadyamānā tantuḥ bhavati
balākā ca stanayitnu rava śravaṇāt garbham dhatte
padminī ca cetana prayuktā satī acetanena eva śarīreṇa saraḥ ntarāt saraḥ ntaram upasarpati vallī iva vṛkṣam na tu svayam evā acetanā saraḥ ntara upasarpaṇe vyāpriyate
tasmāt na ete brahmaṇaḥ dṛṣṭāntāḥ iti tam prati brūyāt na ayam doṣaḥ
kulāla ādi dṛṣṭānta vailakṣaṇya mātrasya vivakṣita tvāt iti yathā hi kulāla ādīnām deva ādīnām ca samāne cetana tve kulāla ādayaḥ kārya ārambhe bāhyam sādhanam apekṣante na deva ādayaḥ
tathā brahma cetanam api na bāhyam sādhanam apekṣiṣyate iti etāvat vayam deva ādi udāharaṇena vivakṣāmaḥ
tasmāt yathā ekasya sāmarthyam dṛṣṭam tathā sarveṣām eva bhavitum arhati iti na asti ekānte iti abhiprāyaḥ
kṛtsna prasaktiḥ niravayava tva śabda kopaḥ vā
kṛtsna prasakti adhikaraṇam
cetanam ekam advitīyam brahma kṣīra ādi vat deva ādi vat ca an apekṣya bāhyam sādhanam svayam pariṇamamānam jagataḥ kāraṇam iti sthitam
śāstra artha pariśuddhaye tu punar ākṣipati
kṛtsna prasaktiḥ kṛtsnasya brahmaṇaḥ kārya rūpeṇa pariṇāmaḥ prāpnoti niravayava tvāt yadi brahma pṛthivī ādi vat sa avayavam abhaviṣyat tatas sya eka deśaḥ paryaṇaṃsyat eka deśaḥ ca avasthāsyata
niravayavam tu brahma śrutibhyaḥ vagamyate niṣkalam niṣkriyam śāntam niravadyam nirañjanam divyaḥ hi amūrtaḥ puruṣaḥ sa bāhya abhyantaraḥ hi ajaḥ idam mahat bhūtam anantam apāram vijñāna ghanaḥ eva saḥ eṣa na iti na iti ātmā a sthūlam an aṇu ityādyābhyaḥ sarva viśeṣa pratiṣedhinībhyaḥ
tatas ca eka deśa pariṇāma asaṃbhavāt kṛtsna pariṇāma prasaktau satyām mūla ucchedaḥ prasajyeta
draṣṭavya tā upadeśa ānarthakyam ca āpadyeta ayatna dṛṣṭa tvāt kāryasya tad vyatiriktasya ca brahmaṇaḥ saṃbhavāt
aja tva ādi śabda vyākopaḥ ca
atha etad doṣa parijihīrṣayā sāvayavam eva brahma abhyupagamyeta tathā api ye niravayava tvasya pratipādakāḥ śabdāḥ udāhṛtāḥ te prakupyeyuḥ
sāvayava tve ca anitya tva prasaṅgaḥ iti sarvathā ayam pakṣaḥ na ghaṭayitum śakyate iti ākṣipati
śruteḥ tu śabda mūla tvāt
tu śabdena ākṣepam pariharati
na khalu asmad pakṣe kaścid api doṣaḥ sti
na tāvat kṛtsna prasaktiḥ asti
kutas
śruteḥ yathā eva hi brahmaṇaḥ jagat utpattiḥ śrūyate evam vikāra vyatirekeṇa api brahmaṇaḥ śrūyate prakṛti vikārayoḥ bhedena vyapadeśāt sā iyam devatā aikṣata hanta aham imāḥ tisraḥ devatāḥ anena jīvena ātmanā anupraviśya nāma rūpe vyākaravāṇi iti tāvān asya mahimā tatas jyāyāḥ ca pūruṣaḥ
pādaḥ u sya viśvā bhūtāni tri pādasya amṛtam divi iti ca evaṃjātīyakāt
tathā hṛdaya āyatana tva vacanāt
sat saṃpatti vacanāt ca yadi ca kṛtsnam brahma kārya bhāvena upayuktam syāt satā somya tadā saṃpannaḥ bhavati iti suṣupti gatam viśeṣaṇam anupapannam syāt vikṛtena brahmaṇā nitya saṃpanna tvāt avikṛtasya ca brahmaṇaḥ bhāvāt
tathā indriya gocara tva pratiṣedhāt brahmaṇaḥ vikārasya ca indriya gocara tva upapatteḥ
tasmāt asti avikṛtam brahma
na ca niravayava tva śabda vyākopaḥ sti śrūyamāṇa tvāt eva niravayava tvasya api abhyupagamyamāna tvāt
śabda mūlam ca brahma śabda pramāṇakam na indriya ādi pramāṇakam
tat yathāśabdam abhyupagantavyam
śabdaḥ ca ubhayam api brahmaṇaḥ pratipādayati akṛtsna prasaktim niravayava tvam ca
laukikānām api maṇi mantra oṣadhi prabhṛtīnām deśa kāla nimitta vaicitrya vaśāt śaktayaḥ viruddha aneka kārya viṣayāḥ dṛśy
text2:
yāpāreṇa ayaiṣpatteḥ atiprasaṅgāt samavāyi kāraṇasya eva ātma atiśayaḥ kāryam iti ced a satkārya tā āpatteḥ tasmāt kṣīra ādīyā iva
dravyāṇi kārya ākhyām labhate iti a kāraṇāt ayat kāryam varṣa śate api śakyam kalpayitum tathā mūla kāraṇam eva a atyāt kāryāt kāryākāreṇa aṭa vat sarva vyavahāra āspada tvam pratipadyate evam
yukteḥ kāryasya prāk utpatteḥ sattvam ca kāraṇāt avagamyate śabda atarāt ca etat avagamyate pūrva sūtre sat vyapadeśiaḥ śabdasya udāhṛta tvāt tatoyaḥ sat vyapadeśī śabdaḥ śabdātaram sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ekam eva advitīyam ityādi tat ha eke āhuḥ asat eva idam agre
āsīt iti ca asat pakṣam upakṣipya katham asataḥ sat jāyeta iti ākṣipya sat eva somya idam agre āsīt iti avadhārayati tatra idam śabda vācyasya kāryasya prāk utpatteḥ sat śabda vācyā ia
sāmāādhikaraṇyasya śrūyamāṇa tvāt sattva aaya tve prasidhyataḥ yadi tu prāk utpatteḥ asat kāryam syāt paścāt ca utpadyamāam kāraṇe samaveyāt tat ayat kāraṇāt syāt
tatra ye a śrutam śrutam bhavati iti iyam pratijñā pīḍyeta sattva āaya tva avagateḥ tu iyam pratijñā samarthyate paṭa vat ca yathā ca saṃveṣṭitaḥ paṭaḥ vyaktam gṛhyate
kim ayam paṭaḥ kim vā ayat dravyam iti saḥ eva prasāritaḥ yat saṃveṣṭitam dravyam tat paṭaḥ eva iti prasāraṇe abhivyaktaḥ gṛhyate yathā ca saṃveṣṭa a samaye paṭaḥ iti gṛhyamāṇaḥ api a
viśiṣṭa āyāma vistāraḥ gṛhyate saḥ eva prasāraṇa samaye viśiṣṭa āyāma vistāraḥ gṛhyate paṭaḥ iti evam tatva ādi kāraṇa avastham paṭa ādi kāryam aspaṣṭam sat turī vema kuvida ādi kāraka vyāpāra abhivyaktam spaṣṭam gṛhyate atas
saṃveṣṭita prasārita paṭa yad kāraṇāt kāryam iti arthaḥ yathā ca prāṇa ādi yathā ca loke prāṇa apā ādiṣu prāṇabhedeṣu prāṇāyāmeṣu iruddheṣu kāraṇa mātreṇa rūpeṇa vartamāeṣu jīva amātram kāryam ākuñca aprasāraṇa ādikam teṣu eva
prāṇabhedeṣu pravṛtteṣu ākuñca aprasāraṇa ādikam api ca prāṇabhedāām prabhedavataḥ samīraṇa svabhāva aviśeṣāt evam kāryasya kāraṇāt aaya tvam atas ca kṛtsasya jagataḥ brahma kārya tvāt tad aaya tvāt ca
siddhā eṣā śrautī pratijñā yena aśrutam śrutam bhavati amatam matam avijñātam vijñātam iti itara vyapadeśāt hita akaraṇa ādi doṣa prasaktiḥ itara vyapadeśa adhikaraṇam ayathā puas ceta akāraṇa vādaḥ ākṣipyate jagat prakriyāyām āśrīyamāṇāyām hita akaraṇa ādayaḥ doṣāḥ prasajyate
kutas itara vyapadeśāt itarasya śārīrasya brahma ātma tvam vyapadiśati śrutiḥ saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi śvetaketo iti pratibodhaāt yat vā itarasya ca brahmaṇaḥ śārīra ātma tvam vyapadiśati tat sṛṣṭvā
tat eva auprāviśat iti sraṣṭuḥ eva avikṛtasya brahmaṇaḥ śārīra ātma tva darśaāt āma rūpe vyākaravāṇi iti ca parā devatā jīvam ātma śabdea vyapadiśatī brahmaṇaḥ
iti darśayati tasmāt yat brahmaṇaḥ sraṣṭṛ tvam tat śārīrasya eva iti atas ca svatatraḥ kartā sa hitam eva ātmaaḥ saumaasya karam kuryāt āhitam hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatraḥ a hi kaścid aparatatra
ca svayam atyataiḥ malaḥ sa deham ātma tveā upeyāt kṛtam api kathaṃcid yat duḥkha karam tat icchayā jahyāt sukha karam ca upādadīta smaret ca mayā idam jagat bimbam vicitram viracitam iti sarvaḥ hi lokaḥ spaṣṭam
kāryam kṛtvā smarati mayā idam kṛtam iti yathā ca māyāvī svayam prasāritām māyām icchayā a āyāseā eva upasaṃharati evam śārīraḥ api imām sṛṣṭim upasaṃharet svakīyam api tāvat śarīram
evam hita kriyā ādi adarśaāt ayāyyā cetaāt jagat prakriyā iti gamyate adhikam tu bhedaiḥ deśāt tuśabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati yat sarvajñam sarva śakti brahma iti aśuddha buddha mukta svabhāvam śārīrāt adhikam ayat tat vayam jagataḥ sraṣṭṛ brūmaḥ
doṣāḥ prasajyate a hi tasya hitam kiṃcid kartavyam asti ahitam vā parihartavyam iti amukta svabhāva tvāt a ca tasya jñā a pratibadhaḥ śakti pratibadhaḥ vā kvacid api asti
sarvajña tvāt sarva śakti tvāt ca śārīraḥ tu a evaṃvidhaḥ tasmin prasajyate hita akaraṇa ādayaḥ doṣāḥ tu tam vayam jagataḥ sraṣṭāram brūmaḥ kutas etat bhedaiḥ deśāt ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ śrotavyaḥ
matavyaḥ ididhyāsitavyaḥ saḥ u veṣṭavyaḥ sa vijijñāsitavyaḥ satā somya tadā saṃpaaḥ bhavati śārīraḥ ātmā iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ kartṛ karma ādi bhedaiḥ deśaḥ jīvāt adhikam brahma darśayati avabhedaiḥ deśaḥ api darśitaḥ
tat tvam asi iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ katham bheda abhedau viruddhau saṃbhaveyātām ā eṣa doṣaḥ mahākāśa ghaṭa ākāśa yāyeḥ ubhaya saṃbhavasya tatra tatra pratiṣṭhāpita tvāt api ca yadā tat tvam asi iti evaṃjātīyakaiḥ abhedaiḥ deśe abhedaḥ pratibodhitaḥ bhavati apagatam
bhavati tadā jīvasya saṃsāri tvam brahmaṇaḥ ca sraṣṭṛ tvam samastasya bheda vyavahārasya bādhita tvāt tatra kutas eva sṛṣṭiḥ kutas vā hita akaraṇa ādayaḥ doṣāḥ avidyā pratyupasthāpita āma rūpa kṛta kārya karaṇa saṃghāta upādhi aviveka kṛtā
hi bhrātiḥ hita akaraṇa ādi lakṣaṇaḥ saṃsāraḥ a tu paramārthataḥ sti iti asakṛt avocāma a bādhite tu bheda vyavahāre saḥ veṣṭavyaḥ sa vijijñāsitavyaḥ iti evaṃjātīyake a
bhedaiḥ deśeā avagamyamāam brahmaṇaḥ dhika tvam hita akaraṇa ādi doṣa prasaktim aśma ādi vat ca tad aupapattiḥ yathā ca loke keci mahārhāḥ maṇayaḥ vajra vaiḍūrya ādayaḥ aye madhyama vīryāḥ sūryakāta ādayaḥ aye prahīṇāḥ
śva āyasa prakṣepaṇa arhāḥ pāṣāṇāḥ ca eka pṛthivī vyapāśrayāṇām api bījāām bahuvidham patra puṣpa phala gadha rasa ādi vaicitryam ca vicitrāṇi kāryāṇi bhavati evam ekasya api
brahmaṇaḥ jīva prājña pṛthaktvam kārya vaicitryam ca upapadyate iti atas tad aupapattiḥ para parikalpita doṣa aupapattiḥ iti arthaḥ śruteḥ ca prāmāṇyāt vikārasya ca vācā ārambhaṇa mātra tvāt svapa dṛśya bhāva vaicitrya vat ca iti abhyuccayaḥ kṣīra vat hi upasaṃhāra darśa adhikaramam brahma ekam advitīyam
jagataḥ kāraṇam iti yat uktam kasmāt upasaṃhāra darśaāt iha hi loke kulāla ādayaḥ ghaṭa paṭa ādīām kartāraḥ mṛd daṇḍa cakra sūtra salila ādi a eka kāraka upasaṃhāreṇa saṃgṛhīta sādhaāḥ sataḥ tat tat kāryam kurvāṇāḥ dṛśyate brahma ca asahāyam tava abhipretam
tasya sati katham sraṣṭṛ tvam upapadyeta brahma jagat kāraṇam iti ced ā eṣa doṣaḥ yatas kṣīravat dravya svabhāva viśeṣāt upapadyate yathā hi loke kṣīram jalam vā svayam eva
pariṇamate apekṣya bāhyam tathā iha api bhaviṣyati kṣīra ādi api dadhi ādi bhāvea pariṇamamāam apekṣate eva bāhyam auṣṇya ādikam katham ucyate kṣīra vat hi iti doṣaḥ svayam api hi
kṣīram yām ca yāvatīm ca tāvatī eva tvāryate dadhi bhāvāya yadi ca svayam dadhi bhāva śīla tā syāt balāt dadhi bhāvam āpadyeta hi
vāyuḥ ākāśaḥ vā balāt dadhi bhāvam āpadyate ca tasya pūrṇa tā saṃpādyate paripūrṇa śaktikam tu brahma śrutiḥ ca bhavati a tasya
kāryam karaṇam ca vidyate a tad samaḥ ca abhyadhikaḥ ca dṛśyate parā asya śaktiḥ vividhā eva śrūyate svābhāvikī jñā abala kriyā ca iti tasmāt ekasya api brahmaṇaḥ vicitra śakti yogāt kṣīra ādi vat vicitra pariṇāmaḥ upapadyate deva ādi vat api
loke syāt etat upapadyate kṣīra ādīām acetaāām a apekṣya api bāhyam dadhi ādi bhāvaḥ dṛṣṭa tvāt cetaāḥ kulāla ādayaḥ sādhaa sāmagrīm apekṣya eva tasmai tasmai kāryāya dṛśyate
katham brahma cetaam sat asahāyam pravarteta iti deva ādi vat iti brūmaḥ yathā loke devāḥ pitaraḥ ṛṣayaḥ iti evamādayaḥ mahā prabhāvāḥ cetaāḥ api sataḥ apekṣya eva kiṃcid bāhyam abhidhyā a mātreṇa
svatas eva śarīrāṇi śarīrāṇi ca irmimāṇā upalabhyate matra arthavāda itihāsa purāṇa prāmāṇyāt tatu ābhaḥ ca svatas eva tatū sṛjati balākā ca atareṇa eva śukram garbham
dhatte padmiī ca a apekṣya kiṃcid sarotarāt sarotaram pratiṣṭhate evam brahma a apekṣya eva bāhyam svatas eva jagat srakṣyati sa yadi brūyāt
ye ete deva ādayaḥ brahmaṇaḥ upāttāḥ te brahmaṇā bhavati śarīram eva hi acetaam deva ādīām
tu cetaaḥ ātmā tatu ābhasya ca kṣudratara jatu bhakṣaṇāt lālā tatuḥ bhavati balākā ca staayituḥ avaśravaṇāt garbham dhatte padmiī ca cetaa prayuktā satī śarīreṇa
sarotarāt sarotaram upasarpati vallī iva vṛkṣam a tu svayam eva acetasā sarotara upasarpaṇe vyāpriyate tasmai ā ete brahmaṇaḥ dṛṣṭātāḥ iti tam prati brūyāt ā ayam doṣaḥ kulāla ādi dṛṣṭāta vailakṣaṇya mātrasya
vivakṣita tvāt iti yathā hi kulāla ādīām deva ādīām ca kulāla ādayaḥ kārya ārambhe bāhyam apekṣate a deva ādayaḥ tathā brahma a bāhyam apekṣiṣyata
iti etāvat vayam vivakṣāmaḥ tasmāt yathā ekasya sāmarthyam dṛṣṭam tathā sarveṣām eva bhavitum arhati iti iti abhiprāyaḥ kṛtsa prasaktiḥ iravayava tva śabda kopaḥ vā kṛtsa prasakti adhikaraṇam brahma kṣīra ādi vat deva ādi vat ca a apekṣya bāhyam svayam
pariṇamamāam jagataḥ kāraṇam iti sthitam śāstra artha pariśuddhaye tu kṛtsa prasaktiḥ kṛtsasya brahmaṇaḥ kārya rūpeṇa pariṇāmaḥ yadi brahma pṛthivī ādi vat sa avayavam abhaviṣyat tatas asya eka deśaḥ paryaṇaṃsyat eka deśaḥ ca avasthāsyata
tu brahma śrutibhyaḥ uvagamyate iṣkalam iṣkriyam śātam iravadyam divyaḥ hi amūrtaḥ puruṣaḥ hi ajaḥ idam mahat bhūtam aatam apāram eva saḥ eṣa
eti eti ātmā asthūlam aaṇu ityādyābhyaḥ sarva viśeṣa pratiṣedhibhyaḥ tatas ca eka deśa pariṇāma asaṃbhavāt kṛtsa pariṇāma prasaktau satyām mūla ucchedaḥ prasajyeta draṣṭavya tā upadeśa āarthakyam ca āpadyeta ayata dṛṣṭa tvāt kāryasya tad vyatiriktasya ca brahmaṇaḥ usaṃbhavāt aja tva ādi śabda vyākopaḥ ca atha etad doṣa parijihīrṣayā sāvayavam eva brahma abhyupagamyeta
tathā api ye iḥ avayava tvasya pratipādakāḥ śabdāḥ udāhṛtāḥ te prakupyeyuḥ sāvayava tve ca āitya tva prasaṅgaḥ iti sarvathā ayam pakṣaḥ ghaṭayitum śakyate iti ākṣipati śruteḥ tu śabda mūla tvāt tuśabde ākṣepam pariharati
khalu asmad pakṣe kaścid api doṣaḥ asti kutas śruteḥ yathā eva hi brahmaṇaḥ jagat utpattiḥ śrūyate evam vikāra vyatirekeṇa api śrūyate prakṛti vikārayoḥ vyapadeśāt sā iyam
devatā aikṣata hata aham imāḥ tisraḥ devatāḥ āma rūpe vyākaravāṇi iti tāvā asya mahimā tatas jyāyāḥ ca pūruṣaḥ pādaḥ usya viśvā tri pādasya amṛtam divi iti ca evaṃjātīyakāt
tathā hṛdaya āyata atva vacaāt sat saṃpatti vacaāt ca yadi ca kṛtsam brahma kārya bhāvena upayuktam syāt satā somya tadā saṃpaaḥ bhavati iti suṣupti gatam viśeṣaṇam aupapam syāt brahmaṇā
iti asaṃpaatvāt avikṛtasya ca brahmaṇaḥ bhāvāt tathā idriya gocaratva pratiṣedhāt brahmaṇaḥ vikārasya ca idriya gocaratva upapatteḥ tasmāt asti avikṛtam brahma śrūyamāṇa tvāt eva śrūyamāṇa tvāt eva śabda mūlam ca brahma śabda pramāṇakam edriya ādi pramāṇakam tat yathāśabdam abhyupagatavyam
śabdaḥ ca ubhayam api brahmaṇaḥ pratipādayati akṛt sa prasaktim ca laukikāām api maṇi matra oṣadhi prabhṛtīām deśa kā laimitta vaicitrya vaśāt śaktayaḥ viruddhā eka kārya viṣayā dṛśyate tāḥ api tarkeṇa avagatum śakyate asya vastunaḥ etāvatya
etad sahāyāḥ etad viṣayāḥ etad prayojaāḥ ca śaktayaḥ iti kim uta acitya svabhāvasya brahmaṇaḥ rūpam tathā ca āhuḥ paurāṇikāḥ acityāḥ khalu ye bhāvāḥ a
tān tarkeṇa yojayet prakṛtibhyaḥ param yat ca tat acityasya lakṣaṇam iti tasmāt śabda mūlaḥ eva atīdriya artha yāthātmya adhigamaḥ śakyate viruddha ūrthaḥ pratyāyayitum ca brahma pariṇamate
ca kṛtsam iti yadi iḥ avayavam brahma syāt ā eva pariṇameta kṛtsam eva vā pariṇameta atha kaścit rūpeṇa pariṇameta kaścit ca avatiṣṭheta iti rūpa bheda kalpāt sa avayavam eva prasajyeta kriyā viṣaye hi
atirātre ṣoḍaśiam gṛhṇāti ā atirātre ṣoḍaśiam gṛhṇāti iti evaṃjātīyakāyām virodha pratītau api vikalpa āśrayaṇam virodha a parihāra kāraṇam bhavati iha tu vikalpa āśrayaṇe api a virodha parihāraḥ saṃbhavati tasmāt durghaṭam etat iti
ā eṣa doṣaḥ avidyā kalpita rūpa bheda abhyupagamāt hi avidyā kalpitea rūpa bhedea sa avayavam vastu saṃpadyate a hi timira upahata iva cadramāḥ eva bhavati avidyā kalpitea ca ca āma rūpa lakṣaṇea
rūpa bhede vyākṛta avyākṛta ātmake tattva airvacaīye brahma pariṇāma ādi sarva vyavahāra āspada tvam pratipadyate pāramārthike ca rūpeṇa sarva vyavahāra atītam apariṇatam avatiṣṭhate vācā ārambhaṇa mātra tvāt ca avidyā kalpitasya āma rūpa bhedasya iti brahmaṇaḥ
kupyati ca iyam pariṇāma śrutiḥ pariṇāma pratipāda arthā tad pratipattau phala aavagamāt sarva vyavahāra hīa brahma ātma bhāva pratipāda arthā tu eṣā tad pratipattau phala avagamāt saḥ eṣaḥ eti eti ātmā iti upakramya āha abhayam vai jaaka prāptaḥ asi
iti tasmāt asmad pakṣe a kaścid api doṣa prasaṅgaḥ asti hi api ca hi eva atra vivaditavyam katham ekasmin brahmaṇi sṛṣṭiḥ syāt iti yatas
sṛṣṭiḥ paṭhyate a tatra rathāḥ a ratha yogāḥ bhavati atha sṛjate ityādiā loke pi deva ādiṣu māyāvya ādiṣu ca vicitrāḥ hasti aśva ādi sṛṣṭayaḥ

text1:
śabdam abhyupagantavyam
śabdaḥ ca ubhayam api brahmaṇaḥ pratipādayati akṛtsna prasaktim niravayava tvam ca
laukikānām api maṇi mantra oṣadhi prabhṛtīnām deśa kāla nimitta vaicitrya vaśāt śaktayaḥ viruddha aneka kārya viṣayāḥ dṛśyante
tāḥ api tāvat na upadeśam antareṇa kevalena tarkeṇa avagantum śakyante asya vastunaḥ etāvatyaḥ etad sahāyāḥ etad viṣayāḥ etad prayojanāḥ ca śaktayaḥ iti
kim uta acintya svabhāvasya brahmaṇaḥ rūpam vinā śabdena na nirūpyeta
tathā ca āhuḥ paurāṇikāḥ acintyāḥ khalu ye bhāvāḥ na tān tarkeṇa yojayet
prakṛtibhyaḥ param yat ca tat acintyasya lakṣaṇam iti
tasmāt śabda mūlaḥ eva atīndriya artha yāthātmya adhigamaḥ
nanu śabdena api na śakyate viruddhaḥ rthaḥ pratyāyayitum niravayavam ca brahma pariṇamate na ca kṛtsnam iti
yadi niravayavam brahma syāt na eva pariṇameta kṛtsnam eva vā pariṇameta
atha kenacid rūpeṇa pariṇameta kenacid ca avatiṣṭheta iti rūpa bheda kalpanāt sa avayavam eva prasajyeta
kriyā viṣaye hi atirātre ṣoḍaśinam gṛhṇāti na atirātre ṣoḍaśinam gṛhṇāti iti evaṃjātīyakāyām virodha pratītau api vikalpa āśrayaṇam virodha a parihāra kāraṇam bhavati puruṣa tantra tvāt ca anuṣṭhānasya
iha tu vikalpa āśrayaṇena api na virodha parihāraḥ saṃbhavati a puruṣa tantra tvāt vastunaḥ
tasmāt durghaṭam etat iti na eṣa doṣaḥ avidyā kalpita rūpa bheda abhyupagamāt
na hi avidyā kalpitena rūpa bhedena sa avayavam vastu saṃpadyate
na hi timira upahata nayanena anekaḥ iva candramāḥ dṛśyamānaḥ nekaḥ eva bhavati
avidyā kalpitena ca nāma rūpa lakṣaṇena rūpa bhedena vyākṛta avyākṛta ātmakena tattva anya tvābhyām anirvacanīyena brahma pariṇāma ādi sarva vyavahāra āspada tvam pratipadyate
pāramārthikena ca rūpeṇa sarva vyavahāra atītam apariṇatam avatiṣṭhate vācā ārambhaṇa mātra tvāt ca avidyā kalpitasya nāma rūpa bhedasya iti na niravayava tvam brahmaṇaḥ kupyati
na ca iyam pariṇāma śrutiḥ pariṇāma pratipādana arthā tad pratipattau phala anavagamāt
sarva vyavahāra hīna brahma ātma bhāva pratipādana arthā tu eṣā tad pratipattau phala avagamāt
saḥ eṣa na iti na iti ātmā iti upakramya āha abhayam vai janaka prāptaḥ si iti
tasmāt asmad pakṣe na kaścid api doṣa prasaṅgaḥ sti
ātmani ca iva vicitrāḥ ca hi
api ca na eva atra vivaditavyam katham ekasmin brahmaṇi svarūpa anupamardena eva aneka ākārā sṛṣṭiḥ syāt iti
yatas ātmani api ekasmin svapna dṛśi sva rūpa anupamardena eva aneka ākārā sṛṣṭiḥ paṭhyate na tatra rathāḥ na ratha yogāḥ na panthānaḥ bhavanti atha rathān ratha yogān pathaḥ sṛjate ityādinā
loke pi deva ādiṣu māyāvi ādiṣu ca sva rūpa an upamardena eva vicitrāḥ hasti aśva ādi sṛṣṭayaḥ dṛśyante
tathā ekasmin api brahmaṇi svarūpa anupamardena eva aneka ākārā sṛṣṭiḥ bhaviṣyati iti
sva pakṣa doṣāt ca
pareṣām api eṣa samānaḥ sva pakṣa doṣaḥ pradhāna vādinaḥ hi niravayavam aparicchinnam śabda ādi hīnam pradhānam sa avayavasya paricchinnasya śabda ādimataḥ kāryasya kāraṇam iti sva pakṣaḥ
tatra api kṛtsna prasaktiḥ niravayava tvāt pradhānasya prāpnoti niravayava tva abhyupagama kopaḥ vā
nanu nā eva taiḥ niravayavam pradhānam abhyupagamyate
sattva rajaḥ tamāṃsi hi trayaḥ guṇāḥ
teṣām sāmya avasthā pradhānam
taiḥ eva avayavaiḥ tat sāvayavam iti na evaṃjātīyakena sāvayava tvena prakṛtaḥ doṣaḥ parihartum pāryate yatas sattva rajaḥ tamasām api ekaikasya samānam niravayava tvam ekaikam eva ca itara dvaya anugṛhītam sajātīyasya prapañcasya upādānam iti samāna tvāt sva pakṣa doṣa prasaṅgasya
tarka apratiṣṭhānāt sāvayavatvam eva iti ced evam api anitya tva ādi doṣa prasaṅgaḥ
atha śaktayaḥ eva kārya vaicitrya sūcitāḥ avayavāḥ iti abhiprāyaḥ tāḥ tu aviśiṣṭāḥ
tathā aṇu vādinaḥ u pi aṇuḥ aṇu antareṇa saṃyujyamānaḥ niravayava tvāt yadi kārtsnyena saṃyujyeta tatas prathima anupapatteḥ aṇu mātra tva prasaṅgaḥ
atha eka deśena saṃyujyeta tathā api niravayava tva abhyupagama kopaḥ iti sva pakṣe samānaḥ eṣa doṣaḥ
samāna tvāt ca na anyatarasmin eva pakṣe upakṣeptavyaḥ bhavati
parihṛtaḥ tu brahma vādinā sva pakṣe doṣaḥ
sarva upetā ca tad darśanāt
sarva upeta adhikaraṇam
ekasya api brahmaṇaḥ vicitra śakti yogāt upapadyate vicitraḥ vikāra prapañcaḥ iti uktam
tat punar katham avagamyate vicitra śakti yuktam param brahma iti
tat ucyate sarva upetā ca tad darśanāt
sarva śakti yuktā ca parā devatā iti abhyupagantavyam
kutas
tad darśanāt
tathā hi darśayati śrutiḥ sarva śakti yogam parasyāḥ devatāyāḥ sarva karmā sarva kāmaḥ sarva rasaḥ sarvam idam abhyāttaḥ vāki anādaraḥ satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ yaḥ sarvajñaḥ sarva vid etasya vai akṣarasya praśāsane gārgi sūryācandramasau vidhṛtau tiṣṭhataḥ iti evaṃjātīyakā
vikaraṇa tvāt na iti ced tat uktam
syāt etat vikaraṇām parām devatām śāsti śāstram acakṣuṣkam aśrotram avāgamanāḥ iti evaṃjātīyakam
katham sā sarva śakti yuktā api satī kāryāya prabhavet
deva ādayaḥ hi cetanāḥ sarva śakti yuktāḥ api santaḥ ādhyātmika kārya karaṇa saṃpannāḥ eva tasmai tasmai kāryāya prabhavantaḥ vijñāyante
katham ca na iti na iti iti pratiṣiddha sarva viśeṣāyāḥ devatāyāḥ sarva śakti yogaḥ saṃbhavet iti ced yat atra vaktavyam tat purastāt eva uktam
śruti avagāhyam eva idam ati gambhīram brahma na tarka avagāhyam
na ca yathā ekasya sāmarthyam dṛṣṭam tathā anyasya api sāmarthyena bhavitavyam iti niyamaḥ u sti iti
pratiṣiddha sarve viśeṣasya api brahmaṇaḥ sarva śakti yogaḥ saṃbhavati iti etat api avidyā kalpita rūpa bheda upanyāsena uktam eva
tathā ca śāstram a pāṇi pādaḥ javanaḥ grahītā paśyati a cakṣuḥ sa śrṛṇoti a karṇaḥ iti brahmaṇaḥ sarva sāmarthya yogam darśayati
na prayojanavat tvāt
prayojanavat tva adhikaraṇam
anyathā punar cetana kartṛ tvam jagataḥ ākṣipati na khalu cetanaḥ paramātmā idam jagat bimbam viracayitum arhati
kutas
prayojanavat tvāt pravṛttīnām
cetanaḥ hi loke buddhi pūrva kārī puruṣaḥ pravartamānaḥ na manda upakramām api tāvat pravṛttim ātma prayojana anupayoginīm ārabhamāṇaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ kim uta gurutara saṃrambhām
bhavati ca loka prasiddhi anuvādinī śrutiḥ na vai are sarvasya kāmāya sarvam priyam bhavati ātmanaḥ tu kāmāya sarvam priyam bhavati iti
gurutara saṃrambhā ca iyam pravṛttiḥ yat uccāvaca prapañcam jagat bimbam viracayitavyam
yadi iyam api pravṛttiḥ cetanasya paramātmanaḥ ātma prayojana upayoginī parikalpyeta paritṛpta tvam paramātmanaḥ śrūyamāṇam bādhyeta
prayojana abhāve vā pravṛtti abhāvaḥ syāt
atha san unmattaḥ buddhi aparādhāt antareṇa eva ātma prayojanam pravartamānaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ tathā paramātmā api pravartiṣyate iti ucyeta tathā sati sarvajña tvam paramātmanaḥ śrūyamāṇam bādhyeta
tasmāt aśliṣṭā cetanāt sṛṣṭiḥ iti
loka vat tu līlā kaivalyam
tu śabdena ākṣepam pariharati
yathā loke kasyacid āpta eṣaṇasya rājñaḥ rāja amātyasya vā vyatiriktam kiṃcid prayojanam an abhisaṃdhāya kevalam līlā rūpāḥ pravṛttayaḥ krīḍā vihāreṣu bhavanti
yathā ca ucchvāsa praśvāsa ādayaḥ na abhisaṃdhāya bāhyam kiṃcid prayojanam svabhāvāt eva saṃbhavanti
evam īśvarasya api an apekṣya kiṃcid prayojana antaram svabhāvāt eva kevalam līlā rūpā pravṛttiḥ bhaviṣyati
na hi īśvarasya prayojana antaram nirūpyamāṇam nyāyataḥ śrutitaḥ vā saṃbhavati
na ca svabhāvaḥ paryanuyoktum śakyate
yadi api asmākam iyam jagat bimba viracanā gurutara saṃrambhā iva ābhāti tathā api parameśvarasya līlā eva kevalā iyam aparimita śakti tvāt
yadi nāma loke līlāsu api kiṃcid sūkṣmam prayojanam utprekṣyeta tathā api nā eva atra kiṃcid prayojanam utprekṣitum śakyate āpta kāma śruteḥ
na api apravṛttiḥ unmatta pravṛttiḥ vā sṛṣṭi śruteḥ sarvajña śruteḥ ca
na ca iyam parama artha viṣayā sṛṣṭi śrutiḥ
avidyā kalpita nāma rūpa vyavahāra gocara tvāt brahma ātma bhāva pratipādana para tvāt ca iti etat api nā eva vismartavyam
vaiṣamya nairghṛṇye na sāpekṣa tvāt tathā hi darśayati
vaiṣamya nairghṛṇya adhikaraṇam
punar ca jagat janma ādi hetu tvam īśvarasya ākṣipyate sthūṇā nikhanana nyāyena pratijñātasya arthasya dṛḍhīkaraṇāya
na īśvaraḥ jagataḥ kāraṇam upapadyate
kutas
vaiṣamya nairghṛṇya prasaṅgāt kāṃścid atyanta sukha bhājaḥ karoti deva ādīn kāṃścid atyanta duḥkha bhājaḥ paśu ādīn kāṃścid madhyama bhoga bhājaḥ manuṣya ādīn iti evam viṣamām sṛṣṭim nirmimāṇasya īśvarasya pṛthagjanasya iva rāga dveṣa upapatteḥ śruti smṛti avadhārita svaccha tvāt īśvara svabhāva vilopaḥ prasajyeta
tathā khala janaiḥ api jugupsitam nirghṛṇa tvam ati krūra tvam duḥkha yoga vidhānāt sarva prajā upasaṃhārāt ca prasajyeta
tasmāt vaiṣamya nairghṛṇya prasaṅgāt na īśvaraḥ kāraṇam iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ vaiṣamya nairghṛṇye na īśvarasya prasajyete
kasmāt
sāpekṣa tvāt
yadi hi nirapekṣaḥ kevalaḥ īśvaraḥ viṣamām sṛṣṭim nirmimīte syātām etau doṣau vaiṣamyam nairghṛṇyam ca
na tu nirapekṣasya nirmātṛ tvam asti
sāpekṣaḥ hi īśvaraḥ viṣamām sṛṣṭim nirmimīte
kim apekṣate iti ced dharma adharmau apekṣate iti vadāmaḥ
atas sṛjyamāna prāṇi dharma adharma apekṣā viṣamā sṛṣṭiḥ iti na ayam īśvarasya aparādhaḥ
īśvaraḥ tu parjanya vat draṣṭavyaḥ yathā hi parjanyaḥ vrīhi yava ādi sṛṣṭau sādhāraṇam kāraṇam bhavati vrīhi yava ādi vaiṣamye tu tad tad bīja gatāni eva asādhāraṇāni sāmarthyāni kāraṇāni bhavanti evam īśvaraḥ deva manuṣya ādi sṛṣṭau sādhāraṇam kāraṇam bhavati deva manuṣya ādi vaiṣamye tu tad tad jīva gatāni eva asādhāraṇāni karmāṇi kāraṇāni bhavanti
evam īśvaraḥ sāpekṣa tvāt na vaiṣamya nairghṛṇyābhyām duṣyati
katham punar avagamyate sa apekṣaḥ īśvaraḥ nīca madhyama uttamam saṃsāram nirmimīte iti
tathā hi darśayati śrutiḥ eṣa hi eva sādhu karma kārayati tam yam ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ unninīṣate eṣaḥ u eva asādhu karma kārayati tam yam adhas ninīṣate

upapadyate ca saṃsārasya anādi tvam ādimat tve hi saṃsārasya akasmāt udbhūteḥ muktānām api punar saṃsāra udbhūti prasaṅgaḥ akṛta abhyāgama kṛta vipraṇāśa prasaṅgaḥ ca sukha duḥkha ādi vaiṣamyasya nirnimitta tvāt
na ca īśvaraḥ vaiṣamya hetuḥ iti uktam
na ca avidyā kevalā vaiṣamyasya kāraṇam eka rūpa tvāt
rāga ādi kleśa vāsanā ākṣipta karma apekṣā tu avidyā vaiṣamya karī syāt
na ca karma antareṇa śarīram saṃbhavati na ca śarīram antareṇa karma saṃbhavati iti itaretara āśraya tva prasaṅgaḥ
anādi tve tu bīja aṅkura nyāyena upapatteḥ na kaścid doṣaḥ bhavati
upalabhyate ca saṃsārasya anādi tvam śruti smṛtyoḥ

text2:
śabdam abhyupagatavyam
śabdaḥ ca ubhayam api brahmaṇaḥ pratipādayati akṛt sa prasaktim ca laukikāām api maṇi matra oṣadhi prabhṛtīām deśa kā laimitta vaicitrya vaśāt śaktayaḥ viruddhā eka kārya viṣayā dṛśyate tāḥ api tarkeṇa avagatum śakyate asya vastunaḥ etāvatya
etad sahāyāḥ etad viṣayāḥ etad prayojaāḥ ca śaktayaḥ iti kim uta acitya svabhāvasya brahmaṇaḥ rūpam tathā ca āhuḥ paurāṇikāḥ acityāḥ khalu ye bhāvāḥ a
tān tarkeṇa yojayet prakṛtibhyaḥ param yat ca tat acityasya lakṣaṇam iti tasmāt śabda mūlaḥ eva atīdriya artha yāthātmya adhigamaḥ śakyate viruddha ūrthaḥ pratyāyayitum ca brahma pariṇamate
ca kṛtsam iti yadi iḥ avayavam brahma syāt ā eva pariṇameta kṛtsam eva vā pariṇameta atha kaścit rūpeṇa pariṇameta kaścit ca avatiṣṭheta iti rūpa bheda kalpāt sa avayavam eva prasajyeta kriyā viṣaye hi
atirātre ṣoḍaśiam gṛhṇāti ā atirātre ṣoḍaśiam gṛhṇāti iti evaṃjātīyakāyām virodha pratītau api vikalpa āśrayaṇam virodha a parihāra kāraṇam bhavati iha tu vikalpa āśrayaṇe api a virodha parihāraḥ saṃbhavati tasmāt durghaṭam etat iti
ā eṣa doṣaḥ avidyā kalpita rūpa bheda abhyupagamāt hi avidyā kalpitea rūpa bhedea sa avayavam vastu saṃpadyate a hi timira upahata iva cadramāḥ eva bhavati avidyā kalpitea ca ca āma rūpa lakṣaṇea
rūpa bhede vyākṛta avyākṛta ātmake tattva airvacaīye brahma pariṇāma ādi sarva vyavahāra āspada tvam pratipadyate pāramārthike ca rūpeṇa sarva vyavahāra atītam apariṇatam avatiṣṭhate vācā ārambhaṇa mātra tvāt ca avidyā kalpitasya āma rūpa bhedasya iti brahmaṇaḥ
kupyati ca iyam pariṇāma śrutiḥ pariṇāma pratipāda arthā tad pratipattau phala aavagamāt sarva vyavahāra hīa brahma ātma bhāva pratipāda arthā tu eṣā tad pratipattau phala avagamāt saḥ eṣaḥ eti eti ātmā iti upakramya āha abhayam vai jaaka prāptaḥ asi
iti tasmāt asmad pakṣe a kaścid api doṣa prasaṅgaḥ asti hi api ca hi eva atra vivaditavyam katham ekasmin brahmaṇi sṛṣṭiḥ syāt iti yatas
sṛṣṭiḥ paṭhyate a tatra rathāḥ a ratha yogāḥ bhavati atha sṛjate ityādiā loke pi deva ādiṣu māyāvya ādiṣu ca vicitrāḥ hasti aśva ādi sṛṣṭayaḥ
dṛśyate tathā ekasmin api brahmaṇi sṛṣṭiḥ bhaviṣyati iti sva pakṣa doṣāt ca pareṣām api eṣa samāaḥ sva pakṣa doṣaḥ hi hi a paricchiam śabda ādi hīam pradhāam sa avayavasya
śabda ādimataḥ kāryasya kāraṇam iti sva pakṣaḥ tatra api iḥ sa prasaktiḥ iḥ avayava tvāt pradhā asya iḥ avayava tva abhyupagama kopaḥ vā taiḥ iḥ avayavam abhyupagamyate sattva rajaḥ tamāṃsi hi
trayaḥ guṇāḥ teṣām sāmya avasthā taiḥ eva avayavaiḥ tat sa avayavam iti aivaṃjātīyake sa avayava tve prakṛtaḥ doṣaḥ parihartum pāryate yatas sattva rajaḥ tamasām api ekaikasya
ekaikam eva ca itara dvaya ā u gṛhītam sajātīyasya prapañcasya iti sva pakṣa doṣa prasaṅgasya tarka apratiṣṭhāāt sāvayavatvam eva iti ced evam api aitya tva ādi doṣa prasaṅgaḥ atha śaktayaḥ eva
kārya vaicitrya sūcitāḥ avayavāḥ iti abhiprāyaḥ tāḥ tu aviśiṣṭāḥ tathā aṇu vādiḥ api aṇuḥ aṇvatareṇa saṃyujyamānaḥ yadi saṃyujyeta tatas
aṇu mātra tva prasaṅgaḥ saṃyujyeta tathā api iḥ avayava tva abhyupagama kopaḥ iti sva pakṣe pi eṣa doṣaḥ samāa tvāt ca pakṣe upakṣeptavyaḥ bhavati parihṛtaḥ tu sva pakṣe doṣaḥ
sarva upetā ca tad darśaāt sarva upeta adhikaraṇam ekasya api brahmaṇaḥ vicitra śakti yogāt upapadyate vicitraḥ vikāra prapañcaḥ iti uktam tat puas katham avagamyate vicitra śakti yuktam param brahma iti tat ucyate sarva upetā ca tad darśaāt sarva śakti yuktā
ca parā devatā iti abhyupagatavyam kutas tad darśaāt tathā hi darśayati śrutiḥ sarva śakti yogam parasyāḥ devatāyāḥ sarva karmā sarva kāmaḥ sarva rasaḥ sarvam idam abhyāttaḥ vākya ādaraḥ satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ yaḥ sarvajñaḥ
sarva vid etasya vai akṣarasya praśāsae gārgi sūryācadramasau vidhṛtau tiṣṭhataḥ iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ vikaraṇa tvā ā iti ced tat uktam syāt etat vikaraṇām parām devatām śāsti
śāstram acakṣuṣkam aśrotram avāgamaāḥ iti evaṃjātīyakam katham sā sarva śakti yuktā api satī kāryāya prabhavet deva ādayaḥ hi cetaāḥ sarva śakti yuktāḥ api sataḥ ādhyātmika kārya karaṇa saṃpaāḥ eva tasmai tasmai kāryāya
prabhavataḥ vijñāyate katham ca eti eti iti pratiṣiddha sarva viśeṣāyāḥ devatāyāḥ sarva śakti yogaḥ saṃbhavet iti ced yat atra vaktavyam tat purastāt eva uktam śruti avagāhyam
eva idam ati gambhīram brahma a tarka avagāhyam a ca yathā ekasya sāmarthyam dṛṣṭam bhavitavyam iti bhavitavyam iti pratiṣiddha sarve viśeṣasya api brahmaṇaḥ sarva śakti yogaḥ
saṃbhavati iti etat api avidyā kalpita rūpa bheda upayāseā uktam eva tathā ca śāstram a pāṇi pādaḥ grahītā paśyati a cakṣuḥ sa śrṛṇoti a karṇaḥ iti a karaṇasya api brahmaṇaḥ sarva sāmarthya yogam darśayati
a prayoja avat tvāt prayoja avat tva adhikaraṇam ayathā puas ceta akartṛ tvam jagataḥ ākṣipati a khalu cetaaḥ paramātmā idam jagat bimbam viracayitum arhati kutas prayoja avat tvāt pravṛttīām cetao hi loke buddhi pūrva kārī puruṣaḥ
mada upakramām api tāvat pravṛttim ātma prayoja āupayogiīm ārabhamāṇaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ kim uta gurutara saṃrambhām bhavati ca loka prasiddhi auvādiī śrutiḥ a vai are sarvasya kāmāya sarvam priyam bhavati ātmā astu kāmāya
sarvam priyam bhavati iti gurutara saṃrambhā ca iyam pravṛttiḥ yat uccāvaca prapañcam jagat bimbam viracayitavyam yadi iyam api pravṛttiḥ cetaasya paramātmaaḥ ātma prayoja upayogiī parikalpyeta paritṛpta tvam paramātmaaḥ śrūyamāṇam bādhyeta prayoja a abhāve
vā pravṛtti abhāvaḥ api syāt atha saḥ buddhi aparādhāt atareṇa eva ātma prayojaam pravartamāaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ tathā paramātmā api pravartiṣyate iti ucyeta tathā sati sarvajña tvam paramātmanaḥ śrūyamāṇam bādhyeta
tasmāt aśliṣṭā cetaāt sṛṣṭiḥ iti loka vat tu līlā kaivalyam tuśabde ākṣepam pariharati yathā loke kasyacid āpta eṣaṇasya rājñaḥ rāja amātyasya vā vyatiriktam kiṃcid kevalam līlā rūpāḥ
pravṛttayaḥ krīḍā vihāreṣu bhavati yathā ca ucchvāsa praśvāsa ādayaḥ abhisaṃdhāya bāhyam kiṃcid svabhāvāt eva saṃbhavati evam īśvarasya api a apekṣya kiṃcid svabhāvāt eva kevalam
līlā rūpā pravṛttiḥ bhaviṣyati a hi īśvarasya śrutitaḥ vā saṃbhavati a ca svabhāvaḥ paryauyoktum śakyate yadi api asmākam iyam
gurutara saṃrambhā iva ābhāti tathā api parameśvarasya līlā eva kevalā iyam aparimita śakti tvāt yadi loke līlāsu api kiṃcid sūkṣmam utprekṣyeta tathā api kiṃcid
utprekṣitum śakyate āpta kāma śruteḥ āpī apravṛttiḥ vā sṛṣṭi śruteḥ sarvajña śruteḥ ca ca iyam paramārtha viṣayā sṛṣṭi śrutiḥ avidyā kalpita āma rūpa vyavahāra gocara tvāt brahma ātma bhāva pratipāda apara tvāt ca iti etat api
ā eva vismartavyam vaiṣamya aairghṛṇye a sāpekṣa tvāt tathā hi darśayati vaiṣamya airghṛṇya adhikaraṇam ca jagat jama ādi hetu tvam īśvarasya ākṣipyate pratijñātasya arthasya dṛḍhīkaraṇāya eśvaraḥ jagataḥ kāraṇam upapadyate
kutas vaiṣamya airghṛṇya prasaṅgāt kāṃścid atyata sukha bhājaḥ karoti deva ādī kāṃścid atyata duḥkha bhājaḥ paśu ādī madhyama bhoga bhājaḥ mauṣya ādī iti evam viṣamām sṛṣṭim irmimāṇasya īśvarasya rāga dveṣa upapatteḥ śruti smṛti avadhārita svaccha tvāt
īśvara svabhāva vilopaḥ prasajyeta tathā khala jaaiḥ api jugupsitam ati krūra tvam duḥkha yoga vidhāāt sarva prajā upasaṃhārāt ca prasajyeta tasmāt vaiṣamya airghṛṇya prasaṅgāḥ eśvaraḥ kāraṇam iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ
vaiṣamya aairghṛṇye eśvarasya prasajyete kasmāt sāpekṣa tvāt yadi hi irapekṣaḥ kevalaḥ īśvaraḥ viṣamām sṛṣṭim syātām etau doṣau vaiṣamyam airghṛṇyam ca asya
tu ir apekṣasya irmātṛ tvam asti sa apekṣaḥ hi īśvaraḥ viṣamām sṛṣṭim irmimīte kim apekṣate iti ced dharma adharmau apekṣate iti vadāmaḥ atas viṣamā
sṛṣṭiḥ iti ā ayam īśvarasya aparādhaḥ īśvaraḥ tu parjaya vat draṣṭavyaḥ yathā hi parjayaḥ vrīhi yava ādi sṛṣṭau sādhāraṇam kāraṇam bhavati vrīhi yava ādi vaiṣamye tu tad tad bīja gatāi eva a sādhāraṇāi sāmarthyāi
bhavati evam īśvaraḥ deva mauṣya ādi sṛṣṭau sādhāraṇam kāraṇam bhavati deva mauṣya ādi vaiṣamye tu eva asādhāraṇāi karmāṇi kāraṇāi bhavati evam īśvaraḥ sa apekṣa tvāt a vaiṣamya airghṛṇyābhyām
duṣyati katham avagamyate sa apekṣaḥ saṃsāram saṃsāram irmimīta iti tathā hi darśayati śrutiḥ eṣa hi eva sādhu karma kārayati
tam yam ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ uiīṣate eṣaḥ u eva asādhu karma kārayati tam yam adhas iīṣate
puṇyaḥ vai karmaṇā bhū pāpaḥ iti ca smṛtiḥ api prāṇi karma viśeṣa apekṣam eva īśvarasya āugrahītṛ tvam igrahītṛ tvam ca darśayati ye yathā mām
prapadyate tān tathā eva bhajāmi aham / iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ a karma avibhāgāt iti ce ā ādi tvāt sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ekam eva advitīyam iti
prāk sṛṣṭeḥ avibhāga avadhāraṇā ā asti karma yat apekṣya viṣamā sṛṣṭiḥ syāt sṛṣṭi uttara kālam hi śarīra ādi vibhāga apekṣam karma karma apekṣaḥ ca śarīra ādi vibhāgaḥ iti itaretara āśraya tvam prasajyeta atas
vibhāgāt ūrdhvam karma apekṣaḥ īśvaraḥ pravartatām prāk vibhāgāt vaicitrya aimittasya karmaṇaḥ bhāvāt tulyā eva ādyā sṛṣṭiḥ ced ā eṣa doṣaḥ a ādi tvāt saṃsārasya bhavet
eṣa doṣaḥ yadi ādimā ayam saṃsāraḥ syāt aādau tu saṃsāre bīja aṅkura vat karmaṇaḥ sarga vaiṣamyasya ca pravṛttiḥ virudhyate katham
avagamyate a ādiḥ eṣa saṃsāraḥ iti atas uttaram paṭhati upapadyate ca api upalabhyate ca upapadyate ca saṃsārasya a ādi tvam ādimat tve hi saṃsārasya akasmāt udbhūteḥ
api ca sukha duḥkha udbhūti prasaṅgaḥ akṛta abhyāgama kṛta vipraṇāśa prasaṅgaḥ ca sukha duḥkha ādi vaiṣamyasya ca īśvaraḥ vaiṣamya hetuḥ iti uktam ca avidyā kevalā vaiṣamyasya kāraṇam eka rūpa tvāt rāga ādi kleśa vāsa ākṣipta karma apekṣā tu avidyā
vaiṣamya karī syāt a ca karma atareṇa śarīram saṃbhavati a ca śarīram atareṇa karma saṃbhavati iti itaretara āśraya tva prasaṅgaḥ a ādi tve tu a kaścid
doṣaḥ bhavati upalabhyate ca saṃsārasya a ādi tvam śruti smṛtyoḥ śrutau tāvat iti sarga pramukhe śārīram a ādiḥ saṃsāraḥ iti
darśayati ādimattve tu prāk sa katham jīva śabde sarga pramukhe bhilapyeta ca dhārayiṣyati iti atas bhilapyeta a āgatāt hi atītaḥ
balīyāḥ bhavati sūryācadramasau dhātā yathāpūrvam akalpayat iti ca matra varṇaḥ pūrva kalpa sadbhāvam darśayati smṛtau api a ādi tvam saṃsārasya upalabhyate a rūpam
asya iha tathā upalabhyate a ca ādiḥ a ca saṃpratiṣṭhā iti purāṇe ca atīta a āgatāām ca kalpāām a parimāṇam asti iti sthāpitam sarva dharma upapatteḥ ca
sarva dharma upapatti adhikaraṇam brahma jagataḥ kāraṇam prakṛtiḥ ca iti asmi avadhārite veda arthe paraiḥ upakṣiptā vilakṣaṇa tva ādī doṣā paryahārṣīt ācāryaḥ idāīm parapakṣa pratiṣedha pradhāam prakaraṇam prāripsamāṇaḥ
sva pakṣa parigraha pradhāam prakaraṇam upasaṃharati yasmāt asmi brahmaṇi kāraṇe parigṛhyamāṇe pradarśitea prakāreṇa sar

text1:
aṇa tva ādīn doṣān paryahārṣīt ācāryaḥ
idānīm parapakṣa pratiṣedha pradhānam prakaraṇam prāripsamāṇaḥ sva pakṣa parigraha pradhānam prakaraṇam upasaṃharati
yasmāt asmin brahmaṇi kāraṇe parigṛhyamāṇe pradarśitena prakāreṇa sarve kāraṇa dharmāḥ upapadyante sarvajñam sarva śakti mahā māyam ca brahma iti tasmāt an atiśaṅkanīyam idam aupaniṣadam darśanam iti
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye dvitīya adhyāyasya prathamaḥ pādaḥ
dvitīyaḥ dhyāyaḥ
dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ
racanā anupapatteḥ ca na anumānam
racanā anupapatti adhikaraṇam
yadi api idam vedānta vākyānām aidaṃparyam nirūpayitum śāstram pravṛttam na tarka śāstra vat kevalābhiḥ yuktibhiḥ kaṃcid siddhāntam sādhayitum dūṣayitum vā pravṛttam
tathā api vedānta vākyāni vyācakṣāṇaiḥ samyak darśana pratipakṣa bhūtāni sāṃkhya ādi darśanāni nirākaraṇīyāni iti tad arthaḥ paraḥ pādaḥ pravartate
vedānta artha nirṇayasya ca samyak darśana artha tvāt tad nirṇayena sva pakṣa sthāpanam prathamam kṛtam tat vyabhyarhitam para pakṣa pratyākhyānāt iti
nanu mumukṣūṇām mokṣa sādhana tvena samyak darśana nirūpaṇāya sva pakṣa sthāpanam eva kevalam kartum yuktam kim para pakṣa nirākaraṇena para dveṣa karaṇena
bāḍham evam
tathā api mahājana parigṛhītāni mahānti sāṃkhya ādi tantrāṇi
text2:
aṇa tva ādī doṣā paryahārṣīt ācāryaḥ idāīm parapakṣa pratiṣedha pradhāam prakaraṇam prāripsamāṇaḥ
sva pakṣa parigraha pradhāam prakaraṇam upasaṃharati yasmāt asmi brahmaṇi kāraṇe parigṛhyamāṇe pradarśitea prakāreṇa sarve kāraṇa dharmāḥ upapadyate sarvajñam sarva śakti mahā māyam ca brahma iti tasmāt
idam aupaiṣadam iti iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye dvitīya adhyāyasya prathamaḥ pādaḥ dvitīyaḥ udhyāyaḥ dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ ca
yadi api idam śāstram pravṛttam a tarka śāstra vat kevalābhiḥ yuktibhiḥ kaṃcid siddhātam sādhayitum dūṣayitum vā pravṛttam tathā api
vyācakṣāṇaiḥ samyak darśa a pratipakṣa bhūtāi sāṃkhya ādi darśaāi tad arthaḥ paraḥ pādaḥ pravartate ca samyak darśa artha tvāt sva pakṣa sthāpaam prathamam kṛtam tat vyabhyarhitam para pakṣa pratyākhyāāt iti mumukṣūṇām

text1:
samyak vyākhyānam iti etāvat pūrvam kṛtam iha tu vākya nirapekṣaḥ svatantraḥ tad yukti pratiṣedhaḥ kriyate iti eṣa viśeṣaḥ
tatra sāṃkhyāḥ manyante yathā ghaṭa śarāva ādayaḥ bhedāḥ mṛd ātma tayā anvīyamānāḥ mṛd ātmaka sāmānya pūrvakāḥ loke dṛṣṭāḥ tathā sarve eva bāhya ādhyātmikāḥ bhedāḥ sukha duḥkha moha ātma tayā anvīyamānāḥ sukha duḥkha moha ātmaka sāmānya pūrvakāḥ bhavitum arhanti
yat sukha duḥkha moha ātmakam sāmānyam tat triguṇam pradhānam mṛd vat acetanam cetanasya puruṣasya artham sādhayitum svabhāvena eva vicitreṇa vikāra ātmanā pravartate iti
tathā parimāṇa ādibhiḥ api liṅgaiḥ tat eva pradhānam anumimate
tatra vadāmaḥ yadi dṛṣṭānta balena eva etat nirūpyeta na acetanam loke cetanā anadhiṣṭhitam svatantram kiṃcid viśiṣṭa puruṣa artha nirvartana samarthān vikārān viracayat dṛṣṭam
geha prāsāda śayana āsana vihāra bhūmi ādayaḥ hi loke prajñāvadbhiḥ śilpibhiḥ yathākālam sukha duḥkha prāpti parihāra yogyāḥ racitāḥ dṛśyante
tathā idam jagat akhilam pṛthivī ādi nānā karma phala upabhoga yogyam bāhyam ādhyātmikam ca śarīra ādi nānā jāti anvitam pratiniyata avayava vinyāsam aneka karma phala anubhava adhiṣṭhānam dṛśyamānam prajñāvadbhiḥ saṃbhāvitatamaiḥ śilpibhiḥ manasā api ālocayitum aśakyam sat katham acetanam pradhānam racayet
loṣṭa pāṣāṇa ādiṣu adṛṣṭa tvāt
mṛd ādiṣu api kumbhakāra ādi adhiṣṭhiteṣu viśiṣṭa ākārā racanā dṛśyate tadvat pradhānasya api cetanā antara dhiṣṭhita tva prasaṅgaḥ
na ca mṛd ādi upādāna svarūpa vyapāśrayeṇa eva dharmeṇa mūla kāraṇam avadhāraṇīyam na bāhya kumbhakāra ādi vyapāśrayeṇa iti kiṃcid niyāmakam asti
na ca evam sati kiṃcid virudhyate pratyuta śrutiḥ anugṛhyate cetana kāraṇa samarpaṇāt
atas racanā anupapatteḥ ca hetoḥ na acetanam jagat kāraṇam anumātavyam bhavati
anvaya ādi anupapatteḥ ca iti ca śabdena hetoḥ asiddhim samuccinoti
na hi bāhya ādhyātmikānām bhedānām sukha duḥkha moha ātmaka tayā anvayaḥ upapadyate sukha ādīnām ca antara tva pratīteḥ śabda ādīnām ca a tad rūpa tva pratīteḥ tad nimitta tva pratīteḥ ca śabda ādi aviśeṣe ca bhāvanā viśeṣāt sukha ādi viśeṣa upalabdheḥ
tathā parimitānām bhedānām mūla aṅkura ādīnām saṃsarga pūrvaka tvam dṛṣṭvā bāhya ādhyātmikānām bhedānām parimita tvāt saṃsarga pūrvaka tvam anumimānasya sattva rajaḥ tamasām api saṃsarga pūrvaka tva prasaṅgaḥ parimita tva aviśeṣāt
kārya kāraṇa bhāvaḥ tu prekṣā pūrvaka nirmitānām śayana āsana ādīnām dṛṣṭaḥ iti na kārya kāraṇa bhāvāt bāhya ādhyātmikānām bhedānām acetana pūrvaka tvam śakyam kalpayitum
pravṛtteḥ ca
āstām tāvat iyam racanā
tad siddhi arthāḥ yā pravṛttiḥ sāmya avasthānāt pracyutiḥ sattva rajaḥ tamasām aṅga aṅgi bhāva rūpa āpattiḥ viśiṣṭa kārya abhimukha pravṛtti tā sā api nā acetanasya pradhānasya svatantrasya upapadyate mṛd ādiṣu adarśanāt ratha ādiṣu ca
na hi mṛd ādayaḥ ratha ādayaḥ vā svayam acetanāḥ santaḥ cetanaiḥ kulāla ādibhiḥ aśva ādibhiḥ vā anadhiṣṭhitāḥ viśiṣṭa kārya abhimukha pravṛttayaḥ dṛśyante
dṛṣṭāt ca adṛṣṭa siddhiḥ
atas pravṛtti anupapatteḥ api hetoḥ na acetanam jagat kāraṇam anumātavyam bhavati
nanu cetanasya api pravṛttiḥ kevalasya na dṛṣṭā satyam etat tathā api cetana saṃyuktasya ratha ādeḥ acetanasya pravṛttiḥ dṛṣṭā
na tu acetana saṃyuktasya cetanasya pravṛttiḥ dṛṣṭā
kim punar atra yuktam yasmin pravṛttiḥ dṛṣṭā tasya sā uta yat saṃprayuktasya dṛṣṭā tasya eva sā iti
nanu yasmin dṛśyate pravṛttiḥ tasya eva sā iti yuktam ubhayoḥ pratyakṣa tvāt
na tu pravṛtti āśraya tvena kevalaḥ cetanaḥ ratha ādi vat pratyakṣaḥ
pravṛtti āśraya deha ādi saṃyuktasya eva tu cetanasya sadbhāva siddhiḥ kevala acetana ratha ādi vailakṣaṇyam jīvat dehasya dṛṣṭam iti
atas eva ca pratyakṣe dehe sati caitanyasya darśanāt asati ca adarśanāt dehasya eva caitanyam api iti lokāyatikāḥ pratipannāḥ
tasmāt acetanasya eva pravṛttiḥ iti
tat abhidhīyate na brūmaḥ yasmin acetane pravṛttiḥ dṛśyate na tasya sā iti
bhavatu tasya eva sā
sā tu cetanāt bhavati iti brūmaḥ tad bhāve bhāvāt tad abhāve ca abhāvāt yathā kāṣṭha ādi vyapāśrayā api dāha prakāśa ādi lakṣaṇā vikriyā anupalabhyamānā api ca kevale jvalane jvalanāt eva bhavati tad saṃyoge darśanāt tad viyoge ca adarśanāt tadvat
lokāyatikānām api cetanaḥ eva cetanānām ratha ādīnām pravartakaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ iti avipratiṣiddham cetanasya pravartaka tvam
nanu tava deha ādi saṃyuktasya api ātmanaḥ vijñāna sva rūpa mātra vyatirekeṇa pravṛtti anupapatteḥ anupapannam pravartaka tvam iti ced na
ayaskānta vat rūpa ādi vat ca pravṛtti rahitasya api pravartaka tva upapatteḥ
yathā ayaskāntaḥ maṇiḥ svayam pravṛtti rahitaḥ u pi ayasaḥ pravartakaḥ bhavati yathā ca rūpa ādayaḥ viṣayāḥ svayam pravṛtti rahitāḥ api cakṣuḥ ādīnām pravartakāḥ bhavanti evam pravṛtti rahitaḥ u pi īśvaraḥ sarva gataḥ sarva ātmā sarvajñaḥ sarva śaktiḥ ca san sarvam pravartayet iti upapannam
ekatvāt pravartya abhāve pravartaka tva anupapattiḥ iti ced na
avidyā pratyupasthāpita nāma rūpa māyā āveśa vaśena asakṛt pratyukta tvāt
tasmāt saṃbhavati pravṛttiḥ sarvajña kāraṇa tve na tu acetana kāraṇa tve
payaḥ mbu vat ced tatra api
syāt etat yathā kṣīram acetanam svabhāvena eva vatsa vivṛddhi artham pravartate yathā ca jalam acetanam svabhāvena eva loka upakārāya syandate evam pradhānam api acetanam svabhāvena eva puruṣa artha siddhaye pravartiṣyate iti
na etat sādhu ucyate yatas tatra api payaḥ mbunoḥ cetanā dhiṣṭhitayoḥ eva pravṛttiḥ iti anumimīmahe ubhaya vādi prasiddhe ratha ādau acetane kevale pravṛtti adarśanāt
śāstram ca yaḥ u psu tiṣṭhan yaḥ u paḥ ntaraḥ yamayati etasya vai akṣarasya praśāsane gārgi prācyaḥ nyāḥ nadyaḥ syandante iti evaṃjātīyakam samastasya loka parispanditasya īśvara dhiṣṭhita tām śrāvayati
tasmāt sādhya pakṣa nikṣipta tvāt payaḥ mbu vat iti anupanyāsaḥ cetanāyāḥ ca dhenvāḥ sneha icchayā payasaḥ pravartaka tva upapatteḥ vatsa coṣaṇena ca payasaḥ ākṛṣyamāṇa tvāt
na ca ambunā u pi atyantam anapekṣā nimna bhūmi ādi apekṣa tvāt syandanasya
cetanā apekṣa tvam tu sarvatra upadarśitam
upasaṃhāra darśanāt na iti ced na kṣīravat hi iti atra tu bāhya nimitta nirapekṣam api sva āśrayam kāryam bhavati iti etat loka dṛṣṭyā nidarśitam
śāstra dṛṣṭyā punar sarvatra eva īśvara apekṣa tvam āpadyamānam na parāṇudyate
vyatireka anavasthiteḥ ca anapekṣa tvāt
sāṃkhyānām trayaḥ guṇāḥ sāmyena avatiṣṭhamānāḥ pradhānam
na tu tad vyatirekeṇa pradhānasya pravartakam nivartakam vā kiṃcid bāhyam apekṣyam avasthitam asti
puruṣaḥ tu udāsīnaḥ na pravartakaḥ na nivartakaḥ iti atas napekṣam pradhānam
anapekṣa tvāt ca kadācid pradhānam mahat ādi ākāreṇa pariṇamate kadācid na pariṇamate iti etat ayuktam
īśvarasya tu sarvajña tvāt sarva śakti tvāt mahāmāya tvāt ca pravṛtti apravṛttī na virudhyete
anyatra abhāvāt ca ca tṛṇa ādi vat
syāt etat yathā tṛṇa pallava udaka ādi nimitta antara nirapekṣam svabhāvāt eva kṣīra ādi ākāreṇa pariṇamate evam pradhānam api mahat ādi ākāreṇa pariṇaṃsyate iti
katham ca nimitta antara nirapekṣam tṛṇa ādi iti gamyate
nimitta antara anupalambhāt
yadi hi kiṃcid nimitta antaram upalabhemahi tatas yathākāmam tena tena nimittena tṛṇa ādi upādāya kṣīram saṃpādayemahi
na tu saṃpādayāmahe
tasmāt svābhāvikaḥ tṛṇa ādeḥ pariṇāmaḥ
tathā pradhānasya api syāt iti
atrā ucyate bhavet tṛṇa ādi vat svābhāvikaḥ pradhānasya api pariṇāmaḥ yadi tṛṇa ādeḥ api svābhāvikaḥ pariṇāmaḥ bhyupagamyeta
na tu abhyupagamyate nimitta antara upalabdheḥ
katham nimitta antara upalabdhiḥ
anyatra abhāvāt
dhenvā eva hi upabhuktam tṛṇa ādi kṣīrībhavati na prahīṇam anaḍuha ādi upabhuktam vā
yadi hi nirnimittam etat syāt dhenu śarīra saṃbandhāt anyatra api tṛṇa ādi kṣīrībhavet
na ca yathākāmam mānuṣaiḥ na śakyam saṃpādayitum iti etāvatā nirnimittam bhavati
bhavati hi kiṃcid kāryam mānuṣa saṃpādyam kiṃcid daiva saṃpādyam manuṣyāḥ api śaknuvanti eva svocitena upāyena tṛṇa ādi upādāya kṣīram saṃpādayitum
prabhūtam hi kṣīram kāmayamānāḥ prabhūtam ghāsam dhenum cārayanti
tatas ca prabhūtam kṣīram labhante
tasmāt na tṛṇa ādi vat svābhāvikaḥ pradhānasya pariṇāmaḥ
abhyupagame pi artha abhāvāt
svābhāvikī pradhānasya pravṛttiḥ na bhavati iti sthāpitam
atha api nāma bhavataḥ śraddhām anurudhyamānāḥ svābhāvikīm eva pradhānasya pravṛttim abhyupagacchema tathā api doṣaḥ nuṣajyeta eva
kutas
artha abhāvāt
yadi tāvat svābhāvikī pradhānasya pravṛttiḥ na kiṃcid anyat iha apekṣate iti ucyeta tatas yathā eva sahakāri kiṃcid na apekṣate evam prayojanam api kiṃcid na apekṣiṣyate iti atas pradhānam puruṣasya artham sādhayitum pravartate iti iyam pratijñā hīyeta
sa yadi brūyāt sahakārī eva kevalam na apekṣate na prayojanam api iti
tathā api pradhāna pravṛtteḥ prayojanam vivektavyam bhogaḥ vā syāt apavargaḥ vā ubhayam vā iti
bhogaḥ ced kīdṛśaḥ na ādheya atiśayasya puruṣasya bhogaḥ bhavet
anirmokṣa prasaṅgaḥ ca
apavargaḥ ced prāk api pravṛtteḥ apavargasya siddha tvāt pravṛttiḥ anarthikā syāt śabda ādi anupalabdhi prasaṅgaḥ ca
ubhaya arthatā abhyupagame pi bhoktavyānām pradhāna mātrāṇām ānantyāt anirmokṣa prasaṅgaḥ eva
na ca autsukya nivṛtti arthā pravṛttiḥ
na hi pradhānasya acetanasya autsukyam saṃbhavati
na ca puruṣasya nirmalasya
dṛkśakti sarga śakti vaiyarthya bhayāt ced pravṛttiḥ tarhi dṛkśakti anuccheda vat sarga śakti anucchedāt saṃsāra anucchedāt anirmokṣa prasaṅgaḥ eva
tasmāt pradhānasya puruṣa arthā pravṛttiḥ iti etat ayuktam
puruṣa aśma vat iti ced tathā pi
syāt etat yathā kaścid puruṣaḥ dṛkśakti saṃpannaḥ pravṛtti śakti vihīnaḥ paṅguḥ aparam puruṣam pravṛtti śakti saṃpannam dṛkśakti vihīnam andham adhiṣṭhāya pravartayati yathā vā ayaskāntaḥ śmā svayam a pravartamānaḥ pi ayaḥ pravartayati evam puruṣaḥ pradhānam pravartayiṣyati iti dṛṣṭānta pratyayena punar pratyavasthānam
atrā ucyate tathā api nā eva doṣāt nirmokṣaḥ sti
abhyupeta hānam tāvat doṣaḥ āpatati pradhānasya svatantrasya pravṛtti abhyupagamāt puruṣasya ca pravartaka tva anabhyupagamāt
katham ca udāsīnaḥ puruṣaḥ pradhānam pravartayet
paṅguḥ api hi andham puruṣam vāc ādibhiḥ pravartayati
na evam puruṣasya kaścid api pravartana vyāpāraḥ sti niṣkriya tvāt nirguṇa tvāt ca
na api ayaskānta vat saṃnidhi mātreṇa pravartayet saṃnidhi nitya tvena pravṛtti nitya tva prasaṅgāt
ayaskāntasya tu anitya saṃnidheḥ asti sva vyāpāraḥ saṃnidhiḥ

dṛśyate dṛṣṭāt ca adṛṣṭa siddhiḥ atas pravṛtti aupapatteḥ api hetoḥ ācetaam jagat kāraṇam aumātavyam bhavati pravṛttiḥ kevalasya a dṛṣṭā satyam etat tathā api
ratha ādeḥ a cetaasya pravṛttiḥ dṛṣṭā a tu a ceta a saṃyuktasya ceta asya pravṛttiḥ dṛṣṭā kim atra yuktam pravṛttiḥ dṛṣṭā tasya sā
uta yat saṃprayuktasya dṛṣṭā tasya eva sā iti yasmi dṛśyate pravṛttiḥ tasya eva sā iti yuktam ubhayoḥ pratyakṣa tvāt a tu kevalaḥ cetaḥ ratha ādi vat pratyakṣaḥ
pravṛtti āśraya deha ādi saṃyuktasya eva tu sadbhāva siddhiḥ kevala aceta aratha ādi vailakṣaṇyam jīvat dehasya dṛṣṭam iti atas eva ca pratyakṣe dehe sati caitayasya darśaāt asati ca a darśaāt dehasya eva caitayam api iti lokāyatikāḥ tasmāt acetaasya eva
pravṛttiḥ iti tat abhidhīyate a brūmaḥ tasya sā iti bhavatu tasya eva sā sā tu cetaāt bhavati iti brūmaḥ tad bhāve bhāvāt tad abhāve ca abhāvāt yathā
kāṣṭha ādi vyapāśrayā api dāha prakāśa ādi lakṣaṇā vikriyā ca kevale jvalae jvalaāt eva bhavati tad saṃyoge darśaāt tad viyoge ca adarśaāt tadvat lokāyatikāām api cetaaḥ eva ratha ādīām pravartakaḥ dṛṣṭa
iti avipratiṣiddham cetaasya pravartaka tvam tava deha ādi saṃyuktasya api ātmanaḥ vijñāa sva rūpa mātra vyatirekeṇa pravṛtti aupapatteḥ aupapaam pravartaka tvam iti ced a ayaskāta vat rūpa ādi vat ca pravṛtti rahitasya api pravartaka tva upapatteḥ yathā āyaskātaḥ maṇiḥ svayam pravṛtti rahitaḥ api ayasaḥ pravartakaḥ bhavati
yathā ca rūpa ādayaḥ viṣayāḥ svayam pravṛtti rahitāḥ api cakṣuḥ ādīām pravartakā bhavati evam pravṛtti rahitaḥ upi īśvaraḥ sarva gataḥ sarva ātmā sarvajñaḥ sarva śaktiḥ ca sa sarvam pravartayet iti upapaam ekatvāt pravartya abhāve
pravartaka tva aupapattiḥ iti ced a avidyā pratyupasthāpita āma rūpa māyā āveśa vaśe asakṛt pratyukta tvāt tasmāt saṃbhavati pravṛttiḥ sarvajña kāraṇa tve a tu aceta akāraṇa tve payaḥ mbu vat ced tatra api syāt etat yathā kṣīram acetaam svabhāvena eva
vatsa vivṛddhi artham pravartate yathā ca jalam acetaam svabhāvea eva loka upakārāya syadate evam pradhāam api acetaam svabhāvea eva puruṣa artha siddhaye pravartiṣyate iti ā etat sādhu ucyate yatas tatra api payaḥ mbuoḥ cetaḥ dhiṣṭhitayoḥ eva
ubhaya vādi prasiddhe ratha ādau acetae kevale pravṛtti adarśaāt śāstram ca yā upsu tiṣṭha yā upotaraḥ yamayati etasya vai akṣarasya praśāsae gārgi adyaḥ syadate iti evaṃjātīyakam
samastasya loka parispaditasya īśvara adhiṣṭhita tām śrāvayati tasmāt sādhya pakṣa aikṣipta tvāt payaḥ mbu vat iti aupayāsaḥ cetaāyāḥ ca ca payasaḥ pravartaka tva upapatteḥ ca payasaḥ ākṛṣyamāṇa tvāt ca ambu opi atyatama apekṣā cetaḥ apekṣa tvam tu sarvatra upadarśitam upasaṃhāra darśa iti
kṣīra vat hi iti atra tu bāhya aimittaiḥ apekṣam api sva āśrayam kāryam bhavati iti etat loka dṛṣṭyā śāstra dṛṣṭyā sarvatra eva īśvara apekṣa tvam āpadyamāam a parāṇudyate vyatireka avasthiteḥ ca a apekṣa tvāt sāṃkhyāām trayaḥ guṇāḥ sāmye avatiṣṭhamāāḥ
a tu tad vyatirekeṇa pradhāasya pravartakam vā kiṃcid bāhyam apekṣyam avasthitam asti puruṣaḥ tu udāsīḥ a pravartakaḥ a iti atoapekṣam pradhāam a apekṣa tvāt ca kadācid pradhāam mahat ādi ākāreṇa pariṇamate
pariṇamate iti etat ayuktam īśvarasya tu sarvajña tvāt sarva śakti tva a mahāmāya tvāt ca pravṛtti apravṛttī virudhyete ayatra abhāvāt ca ca tṛṇa ādi vat syāt etat yathā tṛṇa pallava udaka ādi imitta ataraiḥ apekṣam svabhāvāt eva kṣīra ādi ākāreṇa pariṇamate evam pradhāam api
mahat ādi ākāreṇa pariṇaṃsyate iti katham ca imitta ataraiḥ apekṣam tṛṇa ādi iti gamyate imitta atara aupalambhāt yadi hi kiṃcid imitta ataram upalabhemahi tatas yathākāmam tṛṇa ādi upādāya kṣīram saṃpādayemahi
a tu saṃpādayāmahe tasmāt svābhāvikaḥ tṛṇa ādeḥ pariṇāmaḥ tathā pradhā asya api syāt iti atra ucyate bhavet tṛṇa ādi vat svābhāvikaḥ pradhā asya api pariṇāmaḥ yadi tṛṇa ādeḥ api svābhāvikaḥ pariṇāmaḥ abhyupagamyeta a tu abhyupagamyate imitta atara upalabdheḥ katham
imitta atara upalabdhiḥ ayatra abhāvāt eva hi upabhuktam tṛṇa ādi kṣīrībhavati a prahīṇam aaḍuha ādi upabhuktam vā yadi hi tṛṇa ādi kṣīrībhavet ca yathākāmam
śakyam saṃpādayitum iti etāvatā bhavati bhavati hi kiṃcid kāryam māuṣa saṃpādyam kiṃcid daiva saṃpādyam mauṣyāḥ api tṛṇa ādi upādāya kṣīram saṃpādayitum prabhūtam hi kṣīram kāmayamāṇaḥ
prabhūtam ghāsam cārayati tatas ca prabhūtam kṣīram labhate tasmāt tṛṇa ādi vat svābhāvikaḥ pradhā asya pariṇāmaḥ abhyupagame api artha abhāvāt svābhāvikī pradhā asya pravṛttiḥ bhavati iti sthāpitam atha api
bhavataḥ svābhāvikīm eva pradhā asya pravṛttim abhyupagacchema tathā api doṣaḥ uṣajyeta eva kutas artha abhāvāt yadi tāvat svābhāvikī pradhā asya pravṛttiḥ a kiṃcid ayat iha apekṣate iti ucyeta tatas yathā eva sahakāri kiṃcid apekṣate
evam kiṃcid apekṣiṣyate iti atas pradhāam puruṣasya artham sādhayitum pravartate iti iyam pratijñā hīyeta sa yadi brūyāt sahakārī eva kevalam āpekṣate a prayojaam api iti tathā api
vivektavyam bhogaḥ vā syāt apavargaḥ vā ubhayam vā iti bhogaḥ ced kīdṛśaḥ ādheya atiśayasya puruṣasya bhogaḥ bhavet mokṣa prasaṅgaḥ ca apavargaḥ ced prāk api pravṛtteḥ apavargasya siddha tvāt pravṛttiḥ aarthikā
syāt śabda ādi aupalabdhi prasaṅgaḥ ca ubhaya arthatā abhyupagame pi bhoktavyāām pradhā amātrāṇām mokṣa prasaṅgaḥ eva pravṛttiḥ hi saṃbhavati ca puruṣasya dṛkśakti sarga śakti vaiyarthya bhayāt ced pravṛttiḥ tarhi dṛkśakti auccheda vat sarga śakti aucchedāt saṃsāra aucchedāt mokṣa prasaṅgaḥ
eva tasmāt pradhā asya puruṣa arthā pravṛttiḥ iti etat ayuktam puruṣa aśma vat iti ced tathā syāt etat yathā kaścid puruṣaḥ pravṛtti śakti vihīaḥ
paṅguḥ aparam puruṣam pravṛtti śakti saṃpaam dṛś śakti vihīam adham adhiṣṭhāya pravartayati yathā vā ayaskātaḥ śmā svayam a pravartamānaḥ pi ayaḥ pravartayati evam puruṣaḥ
pravartayiṣyati iti atra ucyate tathā api tāvat doṣaḥ āpatati pradhāasya svatatrasya pravṛtti abhyupagamāt puruṣasya ca
pravartaka tva abhyupagamāt katham ca udāsīḥ puruṣaḥ pradhām pravartayet paṅguḥ api hi puruṣam vāc ādibhiḥ pravartayati puruṣasya kaścid api sti
ca āpi ayaskāta vat saṃidhi mātreṇa pravartayet pravṛtti itya tva prasaṅgāt ayaskātasya tu aitya saṃidheḥ asti sva vyāpāraḥ saṃidhiḥ

na api ayaskānta vat saṃnidhi mātreṇa pravartayet
text2: ca āpi ayaskāta vat saṃidhi mātreṇa pravartayet

text1:
pravṛtti nitya tva prasaṅgāt
ayaskāntasya tu anitya saṃnidheḥ asti sva vyāpāraḥ saṃnidhiḥ parimārjana ādi apekṣā ca asya asti iti anupanyāsaḥ puruṣa aśma vat iti
tathā pradhānasya acaitanyāt puruṣasya ca audāsīnyāt tṛtīyasya ca tayoḥ saṃbandhayituḥ abhāvāt saṃbandha anupapattiḥ
yogyatā nimitte ca saṃbandhe yogyatā anucchedāt anirmokṣa prasaṅgaḥ
pūrvavat ca iha api artha abhāvaḥ vikalpayitavyaḥ
paramātmanaḥ tu svarūpa vyapāśrayam audāsīnyam māyā vyapāśrayam ca pravartaka tvam iti asti atiśayaḥ
aṅgi tva anupapatteḥ ca
itas ca na pradhānasya pravṛttiḥ avakalpate yat hi sattva rajaḥ tamasām anyonya guṇa pradhāna bhāvam utsṛjya sāmyena sva rūpa mātreṇa avasthānam sā pradhāna avasthā
tasyām avasthāyām anapekṣa svarūpāṇām sva rūpa praṇāśa bhayāt parasparam pratyaṅga aṅgi bhāva anupapatteḥ bāhyasya ca kasyacid kṣobhayituḥ abhāvāt guṇa vaiṣamya nimittaḥ mahat ādi utpādaḥ na syāt
anyathā numitau ca jña śakti viyogāt
atha api syāt anyathā vayam anumimīmahe yathā na ayam anantaraḥ doṣaḥ prasajyeta
na hi anapekṣa svabhāvāḥ kūṭasthāḥ ca asmābhiḥ guṇāḥ abhyupagamyante pramāṇa abhāvāt
kārya vaśena tu guṇānām svabhāvaḥ bhyupagamyate
yathā yathā kārya utpādaḥ upapadyate tathā tathā eteṣām svabhāvaḥ bhyupagantavyaḥ

iti ca asti abhyupagamaḥ
tasmāt sāmya avasthāyām api vaiṣamya upagama yogyāḥ eva guṇāḥ avatiṣṭhante iti
evam api pradhānasya jña śakti viyogāt racanā anupapatti ādayaḥ pūrva uktāḥ doṣāḥ tad avasthāḥ eva
jña śaktim api tu anumimānaḥ prativādi tvāt nivarteta cetanam ekam aneka prapañcasya jagataḥ upādānam iti brahma vāda prasaṅgāt
vaiṣamya upagama yogyāḥ api guṇāḥ sāmya avasthāyām nimitta abhāvāt nā eva vaiṣamyam bhajeran bhajamānāḥ vā nimitta abhāva aviśeṣāt sarvadā eva vaiṣamyam bhajeran iti prasajyate eva ayam doṣaḥ

paraspara viruddhaḥ ca ayam sāṃkhyānām abhyupagamaḥ kvacid sapta indriyāṇi anukrāmanti kvacid ekādaśa

tu svarūpa vyapāśrayam audāsīyam māyā vyapāśrayam ca pravartaka tvam iti asti atiśayaḥ aṅgi tva aupapatteḥ ca itas ca a pradhā asya pravṛttiḥ avakalpate yat hi sattva rajaḥ tamasām
utsṛjya sāmyea svarūpa mātreṇa avasthāam sā pradhā avasthā tasyām avasthāyām aapekṣa svarūpāṇām svarūpa praṇāśa bhayāt parasparam pratyaṅga aṅgi bhāva aupapatteḥ bāhyasya ca kasyacid kṣobhayituḥ abhāvāt guṇa vaiṣamyaimittaḥ mahat ādi utpādaḥ asti
syāt ayathā umitau ca jña śakti viyogāt atha api syāt ayathā vayam yathā ā ayam doṣaḥ prasajyeta a hi a apekṣa svabhāvāḥ kūṭasthāḥ ca asmābhiḥ
guṇāḥ abhyupagamyate pramāṇa abhāvāt tu guṇāām svabhāvaḥ bhyupagamyate yathā yathā kārya utpādaḥ upapadyate tathā tathā eteṣām svabhāvaḥ bhyupagatavyaḥ calam guṇa vṛttam iti
