śarīra abhāvāt śarīra pratiṣṭhe hi saṃyoge sati ātma guṇaḥ prayataḥ jāyate saṃyoge sati ātma guṇaḥ prayataḥ jāyate dṛṣṭam imittam pratyākhyātavyam sarga uttara kālam hi tat sarvam ādyasya karmaṇaḥ imittam saṃbhavati
atha adṛṣṭam ādyasya karmaṇaḥ imittam iti ucyeta tat puarātma samavāyi vā syāt aṇu samavāyi vā ubhayathā api ādṛṣṭa aimittam aṇuṣu karma avakalpeta adṛṣṭasya acetaa tvāt a hi acetaam svatatram pravartate pravartayati vā iti sāṃkhya parīkṣāyām abhihitam
tasyām avasthāyām acetaa tvāt ātma samavāyi tva abhyupagamāt ca ādṛṣṭam aṇuṣu karmaṇaḥ imittam syāt asaṃbadhāt adṛṣṭavatā puruṣeṇa asti saṃbadhaḥ iti ced saṃbadha sātatyāt pravṛtti sātatya prasaṅgaḥ iyāma kātara abhāvāt tat evam iyatasya kasyacid karma aimittasya abhāvāt aṇuṣu ādyam karma syāt
saṃyogaḥ syāt saṃyoga abhāvāt ca dvi auṇaka ādi kārya jātam syāt saṃyogaḥ ca aṇoḥ aṇvatareṇa vā syāt vā sarva ātma
ced upacaya aupapatteḥ aṇu mātra tva prasaṅgaḥ dṛṣṭa viparyaya prasaṅgaḥ ca pradeśavataḥ dravyasya pradeśavatā dravya atareṇa saṃyogasya dṛṣṭa tvāt ced sāvayava tva prasaṅgaḥ paramāṇūām kalpitāḥ pradeśāḥ syuḥ iti ced
kalpitāām avastu tvāt avastu eva saṃyogaḥ iti syāt asati ca asamavāyi kāraṇe dvyaṇuka ādi kārya dravyam otpadyeta yathā ca ādisarge imitta abhāvāt saṃyoga utpatti artham karma
saṃbhavati evam mahāpralaye pi vibhāga utpatti artham karma saṃbhavet hi tatra api kiṃci taimittam dṛṣṭam asti adṛṣṭam api bhoga prasiddhi artham
pralaya prasiddhi artham iti atas syāt saṃyoga utpatti artham vibhāga utpatti artham vā karma atas ca saṃyoga vibhāga abhāvāt tad āyattayoḥ sarga pralayayoḥ abhāvaḥ prasajyeta tasmāt
yam paramāṇu kāraṇa vādaḥ samavāya abhyupagamāt ca sāmyāt a avasthiteḥ samavāya abhyupagamāt ca tad abhāvaḥ iti saṃbadhyate dvābhyām ca aṇubhyām dvyaṇukam utpadyamāam aṇubhyām aṇvoḥ samavaiti iti
abhyupagamyate bhavatā a ca evam abhyupagacchatā śakyate ṇu kāraṇatā samarthayitum kutas sāmyāt a avasthiteḥ yathā eva hi aṇubhyām sat dvyaṇukam samavāya lakṣaṇa tābhyām
saṃbadhyate evam samavāyaḥ samavāyibhyaḥ sa samavāya lakṣaṇena eva samavāyibhiḥ saṃbadhyeta atyata bheda sāmyāt tatas ca yaḥ yaḥ kalpayitavyaḥ iti
aavasthā eva prasajyeta iha pratyaya grāhyaḥ samavāyaḥ iti asaṃbaddhaḥ eva samavāyibhiḥ gṛhyate āsaṃbaddhaḥ vā tatas ca saṃbadhaḥ kalpayitavyaḥ
prasajyeta iti ā iti ucyate saṃyogaḥ upi evam sati saṃyogibhiḥ iti asaṃbaddhaḥ eva iti samavāyavaḥ apekṣeta atha arthātara tvāt saṃyogaḥ saṃbadha ātaram apekṣeta samavāyaḥ u pi tarhi
artha atara tvāt saṃbadhātaram apekṣeta a ca guṇa tvāt saṃyogaḥ saṃbadhātaram apekṣate a samavāyaḥ aguṇa tvāt iti yujyate vaktum apekṣā kāraṇasya tulya tvāt guṇa paribhāṣāyāḥ ca atatra tvāt tasmāt
arthātaram samavāyam abhyupagacchataḥ prasajyeta eva a avasthā prasajyamāāyām ca a avasthāyām eka asiddhau sarva asiddheḥ dvābhyām aṇubhyām dvyaṇukam tasmāt api aupapaḥ paramāṇu kāraṇa vādaḥ eva ca bhāvāt
api ca aṇavaḥ pravṛtti svabhāvāḥ vā ubhaya svabhāvāḥ vā aubhaya svabhāvāḥ vā abhyupagamyate gatyatara abhāvāt caturdhā api upapadyate pravṛtti svabhāva tve ityam eva pravṛtteḥ bhāvāt pralaya abhāva prasaṅgaḥ
eva eva i vṛtteḥ bhāvāt sarga abhāva prasaṅgaḥ ubhaya svabhāva tvam ca virodhāt asamañjasam aubhaya svabhāva tve tu imitta vaśāt pravṛtti ivṛttyoḥ adṛṣṭa ādeḥ imittasya iti a pravṛtti prasaṅgaḥ
atatra tve pi adṛṣṭa ādeḥ tasmāt api aupapaaḥ paramāṇu kāraṇa vādaḥ rūpa ādimat tvāt ca viparyayaḥ sa avayavāām dravyāṇām avayavaśas vibhajyamāāām yatas paraḥ vibhāgaḥ a paraḥ
saṃbhavati te caturvidhāḥ rūpa ādimataḥ paramāṇavaḥ caturvidhasya rūpa ādimataḥ bhūtabhautikasya ārambhakāḥ ityāḥ ca iti yat vaiśeṣikāḥ abhyupagacchati sa teṣām abhyupagamaḥ eva yatas rūpa ādimat tvāt
paramāṇūām aṇu tva aitya tva viparyayaḥ prasajyeta parama kāraṇa apekṣayā sthūla tvam aitya tvam ca teṣām abhipreta viparītam āpadyeta iti arthaḥ kutas evam loke dṛṣṭa tvāt yat hi loke rūpa ādimat vastu
tat sva kāraṇa apekṣayā sthūlam aityam ca dṛṣṭam tat yathā paṭaḥ tatū apekṣya sthūlaḥ ityaḥ ca bhavati tatavaḥ ca aṃśū apekṣya sthūlāḥ aityāḥ
ca bhavati tathā ca amī paramāṇavaḥ rūpa ādimataḥ taiḥ abhyupagamyate tasmāt te pi kāraṇavataḥ tad apekṣayā sthūlāḥ aityāḥ ca prāpuvati yat ca itya tve
kāraṇam taiḥ uktam sat iti tat api evam sati aṇuṣu prakāreṇa aṇūām api kāraṇavat tva upapatteḥ yat api
ityatve dvitīyam kāraṇam uktam aityam iti ca viśeṣataḥ pratiṣedha abhāvaḥ iti tat api ityatvam sādhayati asati hi yasmin kasmin
itye itya śabde añaḥ samāsaḥ upapadyate a paramāṇu itya tvam eva apekṣyate tat ca asti eva ityam parama kāraṇam brahma ca śabda artha vyavahāra mātreṇa
kasyacid arthasya prasiddhiḥ bhavati pramāṇa atara siddhayoḥ śabda arthayoḥ vyavahāra avatārāt yat api ityatve tṛtīyam kāraṇam uktam avidyā ca iti tat yadi evam
satām kāraṇāām pratyakṣeṇa agrahaṇam avidyā iti tatas dvyaṇuka aityatā api āpadyeta atha a dravya tve sati iti viśeṣyeta tathā api akāraṇavat tvam eva ityatā nimittam āpadyeta tasya ca prāk eva ukta tvāt
avidyā ca iti puaruktam syāt atha api kāraṇa vibhāgāt kāraṇa viāśāt ca āyasya tṛtīyasya viāśa hetoḥ asaṃbhavaḥ vidyā sā paramāṇūām itya tvam khyāpayati iti vyākhyāyeta āvaśyam
vastu dvābhyām eva hetubhyām viaṣṭum arhati iti saṃyoga sacive hi ca dravye dravya ātarasya ārambhake etat evam syāt yadā
tu apāsta viśeṣam sāmāyā ātmakam kāraṇam viśeṣavat avasthātaram āpadyamāam ārambhakam abhyupagamyate tadā upapadyate tasmāt rūpa ādimat tvāt syāt abhipreta viparyayaḥ paramāṇūām tasmāt api
aupapaaḥ paramāṇu kāraṇa vādaḥ ubhayathā ca doṣāt sthūlā pṛthivī rūpa rasa sparśa guṇāḥ sūkṣmāḥ āpaḥ rūpa sparśa guṇam sūkṣmataram tejaḥ sparśa guṇaḥ sūkṣmatamaḥ vāyuḥ iti evam etāi catvāri catvāri
sthūla sūkṣma sūkṣmatara sūkṣmatama tāratamya upetāḥ ca loke lakṣyate tadvat paramāṇavaḥ api upacita apacita guṇāḥ kalpera vā ubhayathā api ca eva syāt tāvat upacita apacita guṇa tve upacita guṇāām mūrti upacayāt aparamāṇu tva prasaṅgaḥ ca atareṇa api mūrti upacayam aparamāṇu tva prasaṅgaḥ mūrti upacayāt aparamāṇu tva prasaṅgaḥ ca atareṇa api mūrti upacayam aparamāṇu tva prasaṅgaḥ ca atareṇa api mūrti upacayam aparamāṇu tva pras
guṇa upacayaḥ bhavati iti ucyeta kāryeṣu bhūteṣu guṇa upacaye mūrti upacaya darśaāt tu upacita apacita guṇa tve paramāṇu tva sāmya prasiddhaye yadi tāvat sarve ekaika guṇāḥ eva kalpyera tatas tejasi sparśasya upalabdhiḥ syāt apsu rūpa sparśayoḥ pṛthivyām
ca rasa rūpa sparśāām kāraṇa guṇa pūrvaka tvāt kārya guṇāām atha sarve caturguṇāḥ eva kalpyera gadhasya upalabdhiḥ syāt tejasi gadha rasayoḥ vāyau ca gadha rūpa rasāām ca evam dṛśyate tasmāt api aupapaḥ
paramāṇu kāraṇa vādaḥ aparigrahāt ca atyatam aapekṣā pradhā a kāraṇa vādaḥ ayam tu paramāṇu kāraṇa vādaḥ kaiścid api śiṣṭaiḥ api
parigṛhītaḥ iti atyatam eva ādaraṇīyaḥ veda vādibhiḥ api ca vaiśeṣikāḥ tatra artha bhūtā ṣaṣ padārthā dravya guṇa karma sāmāya viśeṣa samavāya ākhyā atyata bhiā bhia lakṣaṇā abhyupagacchati yathā śvas śaśaḥ iti tathātvam
ca abhyupagamya tad viruddham dravya adhīatvam śeṣāṇām abhyupagacchati te opapadyate katham yathā hi loke śaśa kuśa palāśa prabhṛtīām satām etaretara adhīatvam bhavati evam dravya ādīām api atyatabhiatvāt
ā eva guṇa ādīām bhavitum arhati atha bhavati guṇa ādīām tatas dravya bhāve bhāvāt dravya abhāve bhāvāt dravyam eva saṃsthā ādi bhedāt bhavati yathā
devadattaḥ ekaḥ eva saḥ avasthā tara yogāt a eka śabda pratyaya bhāj bhavati tadvat tathā sati sāṃkhya siddhāta prasaṅgaḥ sva siddhāta virodhaḥ ca āpadyeyātām ageḥ ayasya api sataḥ dhūmasya agi a dhī a tvam dṛśyate satyam
dṛśyate bheda pratīteḥ tu iha tu śuklaḥ kambalaḥ rohiṇī dheuḥ īlam utpalam iti dravyasya eva tasya tasya viśeṣaṇea
dravya guṇayoḥ agi dhūmayoḥ iva bheda pratītiḥ asti tasmāt dravya ātmaka tā guṇasya karma sāmāya viśeṣa samavāyāām dravya ātmaka tā vyākhyātā guṇāām dravya adhīatvam dravya guṇayoḥ ayuta siddha tvāt iti yadi
ucyeta tat ayuta siddha tvam apṛthak deśa tvam vā syāt apṛthak kāla tvam vā apṛthak svabhāva tvam vā sarvathā api opapadyate apṛthak deśa tve tāvat sva abhyupagamaḥ virudhyeta katham tatva ārabdhaḥ hi
paṭaḥ tatu deśaḥ bhyupagamyate a paṭa deśaḥ paṭasya tu guṇāḥ śukla tva ādayaḥ paṭa deśāḥ abhyupagamyate a tatu deśāḥ tathā ca āhuḥ dravyāṇi dravyātaram ārabhate guṇāḥ ca
guṇa ātaram iti tatavaḥ hi kāraṇa dravyāṇi kārya dravyam paṭam ārabhate tatu gatāḥ ca guṇāḥ śukla ādayaḥ kārya dravye paṭe śukla ādi guṇa ātaram ārabhate iti hi te
bhyupagacchati saḥ bhyupagamaḥ dravya guṇayoḥ apṛthak deśa tve bādhyeta atha apṛthak kāla tvam ayuta siddha tvam ucyeta savya dakṣiṇayoḥ api go viṣāṇayoḥ ayuta siddha tvam prasajyeta tathā apṛthak svabhāva tve tu ayuta siddha tve
dravya guṇayoḥ ātma bhedaḥ saṃbhavati tasya saṃyogaḥ ayuta siddhayoḥ tu samavāyaḥ iti ayam abhyupagamaḥ mṛṣā eva teṣām prāk siddhasya kāryāt
kāraṇasya ayuta siddha tva aupapatteḥ eva ayam abhyupagamaḥ syāt ayuta siddhasya kāryasya samavāyaḥ iti evam api prāk asiddhasya alabdha ātmakasya kāryasya opapadyate dvaya āyatta tvāt saṃbadhasya
siddham bhūtvā saṃbadhyate iti ced prāk kāraṇa saṃbadhāt kāryasya siddhau abhyupagamyamāāyām ayuta siddhi abhāvāt kārya kāraṇayoḥ saṃyoga vibhāgau vidyete
syāt yathā ca utpaa mātrasya akriyasya kārya dravyasya vibhubhiḥ ākāśa ādibhiḥ dravya ataraiḥ saṃbadhaḥ saṃyogaḥ eva abhyupagamyate a samavāyaḥ evam kāraṇa dravyeṇa api saṃbadhaḥ saṃyogaḥ eva syāt a samavāyaḥ
saṃyogasya samavāyasya vā saṃbadhasya saṃbadhi vyatirekeṇa astitve kiṃcid pramāṇam asti saṃbadhi śabda pratyaya vyatirekeṇa saṃyoga samavāya śabda pratyaya darśaāt tayoḥ astitvam iti ced a eka tve svarūpa bāhya rūpa apekṣayā a eka śabda pratyaya darśaāt
yathā ekaḥ pi sa devadattaḥ loke sva rūpam ca apekṣya bhavati mauṣyaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ śrotriyaḥ bālaḥ yuvā sthaviraḥ pitā putraḥ pautraḥ
bhrātā jāmātā iti yathā ca ekā api satī rekhā

text1: eka śabda pratyaya bhāj bhavati
text2: eka śabda pratyaya bhāj bhavati

text1: uṣyaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ śrotriyaḥ vadānyaḥ bālaḥ yuvā sthaviraḥ pitā putraḥ pautraḥ bhrātā jāmātā iti yathā ca ekā api satī rekhā sthāna anya tvena niviśamānā eka daśa śata sahasra ādi śabda pratyaya bhedam anubhavati tathā
text2:
uṣyaḥ brāhmaṇaḥ śrotriyaḥ bālaḥ yuvā sthaviraḥ pitā putraḥ pautraḥ
bhrātā jāmātā iti yathā ca ekā api satī rekhā eka daśa śata sahasra ādi śabda pratyaya bhedam tathā

text1: eva saṃbandhi śabda pratyaya vyatirekeṇa saṃyoga samavāya śabda pratyaya arha tvam na
text2: eva saṃbadhi śabda pratyaya vyatirekeṇa saṃyoga samavāya śabda pratyaya arha tvam iti upa

text1:
api saṃbandhi viṣaya tve saṃbandha śabda pratyayayoḥ saṃtata bhāva prasaṅgaḥ
svarūpa bāhya rūpa apekṣayā iti ukta uttara tvāt
tathā aṇu ātma manasām apradeśa tvāt na saṃyogaḥ saṃbhavati pradeśavataḥ dravyasya pradeśavatā dravya antareṇa saṃyoga darśanāt
kalpitāḥ pradeśāḥ aṇu ātma manasām bhaviṣyanti iti ced na
avidyamāna artha kalpanāyām sarva artha siddhi prasaṅgāt iyān eva avidyamānaḥ viruddhaḥ viruddhaḥ vā arthaḥ kalpanīyaḥ na atas dhikaḥ iti niyama hetu abhāvāt kalpanāyāḥ ca sva āyatta tvāt prabhūta tva saṃbhavāt ca na ca vaiśeṣikaiḥ kalpitebhyaḥ ṣaḍbhyaḥ padārthebhyaḥ nye dhikāḥ śatam sahasram vā arthāḥ na kalpayitavyāḥ iti nivārakaḥ hetuḥ asti
tasmāt yasmai yasmai yat yat rocate tat tat sidhyet
kaścid kṛpāluḥ prāṇinām duḥkha bahulaḥ saṃsāraḥ eva mā bhūt iti kalpayet
anyaḥ vā vyasanī muktānām api punar utpattim kalpayet
kaḥ tayoḥ nivārakaḥ syāt
kiṃca anyat dvābhyām paramāṇubhyām niravayavābhyām sa avayavasya dvyaṇukasya ākāśena iva saṃśleṣa anupapattiḥ
na hi ākāśasya pṛthivī ādīnām ca jatu kāṣṭha vat saṃśleṣaḥ sti
kārya kāraṇa dravyayoḥ āśrita āśraya bhāvaḥ nyathā na upapadyate iti avaśyam kalpyaḥ samavāyaḥ iti ced na
itaretara āśraya tvāt kārya kāraṇayoḥ hi bheda siddhau āśrita āśraya bhāva siddhiḥ āśrita āśraya bhāva siddhau ca tayoḥ bheda siddhiḥ kuṇḍa badara vat iti itaretara āśraya tā syāt
na hi kārya kāraṇayoḥ bhedaḥ āśrita āśraya bhāvaḥ vā vedāntavādibhiḥ abhyupagamyate kāraṇasya eva saṃsthāna mātram kāryam iti abhyupagamāt
kiṃca anyat paramāṇūnām paricchinna tvāt yāvatyaḥ diśaḥ ṣaḍ aṣṭau daśa vā tāvadbhiḥ avayavaiḥ sa avayavāḥ te syuḥ sāvayava tvāt anityāḥ ca iti nitya tva niravayava tva abhyupagamaḥ bādhyeta
yān tvam diś bheda bhedinaḥ vayavān kalpayasi te eva paramāṇavaḥ iti ced na
sthūla sūkṣma tāratamya krameṇa parama kāraṇāt vināśa upapatteḥ yathā pṛthivī dvyaṇuka ādi apekṣayā sthūlatamā vastu bhūtā api vinaśyati tatas sūkṣmam sūkṣmataram ca pṛthivī eka jātīyakam vinaśyati tatas dvyaṇukam tathā paramāṇavaḥ pi pṛthivī eka jātīyaka tvāt vinaśyeyuḥ
vinaśyantaḥ api avayava vibhāgena eva vinaśyanti iti ced na ayam doṣaḥ
yatas ghṛta kāṭhinya vilayana vat api vināśa upapattim avocāma yathā hi ghṛta suvarṇa ādīnām avibhajyamāna avayavānām api agni saṃyogāt drava bhāva āpattyā kāṭhinya vināśaḥ bhavati evam paramāṇūnām api parama kāraṇa bhāva āpattyā mūrti ādi vināśaḥ bhaviṣyati
tathā kārya ārambhaḥ u pi na avayava saṃyogena eva kevalena bhavati kṣīra jala ādīnām antareṇa api avayava saṃyoga antaram dadhi hima ādi kārya ārambha darśanāt
tat evam asāratara tarka saṃdṛbdha tvāt īśvara kāraṇa śruti viruddha tvāt śruti pravaṇaiḥ ca śiṣṭaiḥ manu ādibhiḥ a parigṛhīta tvāt atyantam eva anapekṣā asmin paramāṇu kāraṇa vāde kāryā āryaiḥ śreyaḥ orthibhiḥ iti vākyaśeṣaḥ
samudāye ubhaya hetuke tad aprāptiḥ
samudāya adhikaraṇam
vaiśeṣika rāddhāntaḥ duryukti yogāt veda virodhāt śiṣṭa aparigrahāt ca na apekṣitavyaḥ iti uktam
saḥ ūrdhva vaināśikaḥ iti vaināśika tva sāmyāt sarva vaināśika rāddhāntaḥ natarām apekṣitavyaḥ iti idam idānīm upapādayāmaḥ
sa ca bahu prakāraḥ pratipatti bhedāt vineya bhedāt vā
tatra ete trayaḥ vādinaḥ bhavanti kecid sarva astitva vādinaḥ
kecid vijñāna astitva mātra vādinaḥ
anye punar sarva śūnyatva vādinaḥ iti
tatra ye sarva astitva vādinaḥ bāhyam āntaram ca vastu abhyupagacchanti bhūtam bhautikam ca cittam caittam ca tān tāvat pratibrūmaḥ
tatra bhūtam pṛthivī dhātu ādayaḥ bhautikam rūpa ādayaḥ cakṣuḥ ādayaḥ ca catuṣṭaye ca pṛthivī ādi paramāṇavaḥ khara sneha uṣṇa īraṇa svabhāvāḥ te pṛthivī ādi bhāvena saṃhanyante iti manyante
tathā rūpa vijñāna vedanā saṃjñā saṃskāra saṃjñakāḥ pañca kandhāḥ te pi ādhyātmam sarva vyavahāra āspada bhāvena saṃhanyante iti manyante
tatra idam abhidhīyate yaḥ yam ubhaya hetukaḥ ubhaya prakāraḥ samudāyaḥ pareṣām abhipretaḥ aṇu hetukaḥ ca bhūta bhautika saṃhati rūpaḥ skandha hetukaḥ ca pañca skandhī rūpaḥ tasmin ubhaya hetuke samudāye bhipreyamāṇe tad aprāptiḥ syāt samudāya aprāptiḥ samudāya bhāva anupapattiḥ iti arthaḥ
kutas
samudāyinām acetana tvāt citta abhijvalanasya ca samudāya siddhi adhīna tvāt anyasya ca kasyacid cetanasya bhoktuḥ praśāsituḥ vā sthirasya saṃhantuḥ anabhyupagamāt nirapekṣa pravṛtti abhyupagame ca pravṛtti anuparama prasaṅgāt āśayasya api anyatva ananyatvābhyām anirūpya tvāt kṣaṇikatva abhyupagamāt ca nirvyāpāra tvāt pravṛtti anupapatteḥ
tasmāt samudāya anupapattiḥ
samudāya anupapattau ca tad āśrayā lokayātrā lupyeta
itaretara pratyaya tvāt iti ced na utpatti mātra nimitta tvāt
yadi api bhoktā praśāsitā vā kaścid cetanaḥ saṃhantā sthiraḥ nā abhyupagamyate tathā api avidyā ādīnām itaretara kāraṇa tvāt upapadyate lokayātrā
tasyām ca upapadyamānāyām na kiṃcid aparam apekṣitavyam asti
te ca avidyā ādayaḥ avidyā saṃskāraḥ vijñānam nāma rūpam ṣaṣ āyatanam sparśaḥ vedanā tṛṣṇā upādānam bhavaḥ jātiḥ jarā maraṇam śokaḥ paridevanā duḥkham durmanas tā iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ itaretara hetukāḥ saugate samaye kvacid saṃkṣiptāḥ nirdiṣṭāḥ kvacid prapañcitāḥ
sarveṣām api ayam pratyākhyeyaḥ
tat evam avidyā ādi kalāpe paraspara nimitta naimittika bhāvena ghaṭīyantra vat aniśam āvartamāne rtha ākṣiptaḥ upapannaḥ saṃghātaḥ iti ced tat na
kasmāt
utpatti mātra nimitta tvāt bhavet upapannaḥ saṃghātaḥ yadi saṃghātasya kiṃcid nimittam avagamyeta
na tu avagamyate
yatas itaretara pratyaya tve pi avidyā ādīnām pūrva pūrvam uttara uttarasya utpatti mātra nimittam bhavat bhavet na tu saṃghāta utpatteḥ kiṃcid nimittam saṃbhavati
nanu avidyā ādibhiḥ arthāt ākṣipyate saṃghātaḥ iti uktam
atrā ucyate yadi tāvat ayam abhiprāyaḥ avidyā ādayaḥ saṃghātam antareṇa ātmānam alabhamānāḥ apekṣante saṃghātam iti tatas tasya saṃghātasya kiṃcid nimittam vaktavyam
tat ca nityeṣu api aṇuṣu abhyugamyamāneṣu āśraya āśrayi bhūteṣu ca bhoktṛṣu satsu na saṃbhavati iti uktam vaiśeṣika parīkṣāyām
kim aṅga punar kṣaṇikeṣu api aṇuṣu bhoktṛ rahiteṣu āśraya āśrayi śūnyeṣu vā abhyupagamyamāneṣu saṃbhavet
atha ayam abhiprāyaḥ avidyā ādayaḥ eva saṃghātasya nimittam iti katham tam eva āśritya ātmānam labhamānāḥ tasya eva nimittam syuḥ
atha manyase saṃghātāḥ eva anādau saṃsāre saṃtatya anuvartante tad āśrayāḥ ca avidyā ādayaḥ iti tadā api saṃghātāt saṃghāta antaram utpadyamānam niyamena vā sadṛśam eva utpadyeta aniyamena vā sadṛśam visadṛśam vā utpadyeta
niyama abhyupagame manuṣya pudgalasya deva tiryagyoni nāraka prāpti abhāvaḥ prāpnuyāt
aniyama abhyupagame manuṣya pudgalaḥ kadācid kṣaṇena hastī bhūtvā devaḥ vā punar manuṣyaḥ vā bhavet iti prāpnuyāt
ubhayam api abhyupagama viruddham
api ca yad bhoga arthaḥ saṃghātaḥ syāt sa jīvaḥ nā asti sthiraḥ bhoktā iti tava abhyupagamaḥ
tatas ca bhogaḥ bhoga arthaḥ eva sa na anyena prārthanīyaḥ
tathā mokṣaḥ mokṣa arthaḥ eva iti mumukṣuṇā na anyena bhavitavyam
anyena ced prārthyeta ubhayam bhoga mokṣa kāla avasthāyinā tena bhavitavyam

tasmāt itaretara utpatti mātra nimitta tvam avidyā ādīnām yadi bhavet bhavatu nāma
na tu saṃghātaḥ sidhyet bhoktṛ abhāvāt iti abhiprāyaḥ
uttara utpāde ca pūrva nirodhāt
uktam etat avidyā ādīnām utpatti mātra nimitta tvāt na saṃghāta siddhiḥ asti iti
tat api tu utpatti mātra nimitta tvam na saṃbhavati iti idam idānīm upapādyate
kṣaṇabhaṅga vādinaḥ yam abhyupagamaḥ uttarasmin kṣaṇe utpadyamāne pūrvaḥ kṣaṇaḥ nirudhyate iti
na ca evam abhyupagacchatā pūrva uttarayoḥ kṣaṇayoḥ hetu phala bhāvaḥ śakyate saṃpādayitum nirudhyamānasya niruddhasya vā pūrva kṣaṇasya abhāva grasta tvāt uttara kṣaṇa hetu tva anupapatteḥ
atha bhāva bhūtaḥ pariniṣpanna avasthaḥ pūrva kṣaṇaḥ uttara kṣaṇasya hetuḥ iti abhiprāyaḥ tathā api nā upapadyate bhāva bhūtasya punar vyāpāra kalpanāyām kṣaṇa antara saṃbandha prasaṅgāt
atha bhāvaḥ eva asya vyāpāraḥ iti abhiprāyaḥ tathā api nā evā upapadyate hetu svabhāva an uparaktasya phalasya utpatti asaṃbhavāt
svabhāva uparāga abhyupagame ca hetu svabhāvasya phala kāla avasthāyi tve sati kṣaṇa bhaṅga abhyupagama tyāga prasaṅgaḥ
vinā eva vā svabhāva uparāgeṇa hetu phala bhāvam abhyupagacchataḥ sarvatra tad prāpteḥ atiprasaṅgaḥ
api ca utpāda nirodhau nāma vastunaḥ svarūpam eva vā syātām avasthā antaram vā vastu antaram eva vā sarvathā api nā upapadyate
yadi tāvat vastunaḥ svarūpam eva utpāda nirodhau syātām tatas vastu śabdaḥ utpāda nirodha śabdau ca paryāyāḥ prāpnuyuḥ
atha asti kaścid viśeṣaḥ iti manyeta utpāda nirodha śabdābhyām madhya vartinaḥ vastunaḥ ādi anta ākhye avasthe abhilapyete iti evam api ādi anta madhya kṣaṇa traya saṃbandhi tvāt vastunaḥ kṣaṇika tva abhyupagama hāniḥ
atha atyanta vyatiriktau evā utpāda nirodhau vastunaḥ syātām aśva mahiṣa vat tatas vastu utpāda nirodhābhyām a saṃspṛṣṭam iti vastunaḥ śāśvata tva prasaṅgaḥ
yadi ca darśana adarśane vastunaḥ utpāda nirodhau syātām evam api draṣṭṛ dharmau tau na vastu dharmau iti vastunaḥ śāśvata tva prasaṅgaḥ eva
tasmāt api asaṃgatam saugatam matam
asati pratijñā uparodhaḥ yaugapadyam anyathā
kṣaṇabhaṅga vāde pūrva kṣaṇaḥ nirodha grasta tvāt na uttarasya kṣaṇasya hetuḥ bhavati iti uktam
atha asati eva hetau phala utpattim brūyāt tatas pratijñā uparodhaḥ syāt caturvidhān hetūn pratītya citta caittāḥ utpadyante iti iyam pratijñā hīyeta
nirhetukāyām ca utpattau apratibandhāt sarvam sarvatra utpadyeta
atha uttara kṣaṇa utpattiḥ yāvat tāvat avatiṣṭhate pūrva kṣaṇe iti brūyāt tatas yaugapadyam hetu phalayoḥ syāt
tathā api pratijñā uparodhaḥ eva syāt kṣaṇikāḥ sarve saṃskārāḥ iti iyam pratijñā uparudhyeta
pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā nirodha aprāptiḥ avicchedāt
api ca vaināśikāḥ kalpayanti buddhi bodhyam trayāt anyat saṃskṛtam kṣaṇikam ca iti
tat api ca trayam pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā nirodhau ākāśam ca iti ācakṣate
trayam api ca etat avastu abhāva mātram nirupākhyam iti manyante
buddhi pūrvakaḥ kila vināśaḥ bhāvānām pratisaṃkhyā nirodhaḥ nāma bhāṣyate
tad viparītaḥ pratisaṃkhyā nirodhaḥ
āvaraṇa abhāva mātram ākāśam iti
teṣām ākāśam parastāt pratyākhyāsyati
nirodha dvayam idānīm pratyācaṣṭe pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā nirodhayoḥ aprāptiḥ asaṃbhavaḥ iti arthaḥ
kasmāt
avicchedāt etau hi pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā nirodhau saṃtāna gocarau vā syātām bhāva gocarau vā
na tāvat saṃtāna gocarau saṃbhavataḥ sarveṣu api saṃtāneṣu saṃtāninām avicchinnena hetu phala bhāvena saṃtāna vicchedasya asaṃbhavāt
na api bhāva gocarau saṃbhavataḥ na hi bhāvānām niranvayaḥ nirupākhyaḥ vināśaḥ saṃbhavati sarvāsu api avasthāsu pratyabhijñāna balena anvayi aviccheda darśanāt aspaṣṭa pratyabhijñānāsu api avasthāsu kvacid dṛṣṭena anvayi avicchedena anyatra api tad anumānāt
tasmāt para parikalpitasya nirodha dvayasya anupapattiḥ
ubhayathā ca doṣāt
yaḥ yama vidyā ādi nirodhaḥ pratisaṃkhyā nirodha antaḥpātī para parikalpitaḥ sa samyak jñānāt vā sa parikarāt syāt
svayam eva vā pūrvasmin vikalpe nirhetuka vināśa abhyupagama hāni prasaṅgaḥ
uttarasmin tu mārga upadeśa ānarthakya prasaṅgaḥ
evam ubhayathā api doṣa prasaṅgāt asamañjasam idam darśanam
ākāśe ca aviśeṣāt
yat ca teṣām eva abhipretam nirodha dvayam ākāśam ca nirupākhyam iti tatra nirodha dvayasya nirupākhya tvam purastāt nirākṛtam
ākāśasya idānīm nirākriyate
ākāśe ca ayuktaḥ nirupākhya tva abhyupagamaḥ pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā nirodhayoḥ iva vastu tva pratipatteḥ aviśeṣāt
āgama prāmāṇyāt tāvat ātmanaḥ ākāśaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ ākāśasya ca vastu tva prasiddhiḥ
vipratipannān prati tu śabda guṇa anumeya tvam vaktavyam gandha ādīnām guṇānām pṛthivī ādi vastu āśraya tva darśanāt
api ca āvaraṇa abhāva mātram ākāśam icchatām ekasmin suparṇe patati āvaraṇasya vidyamāna tvāt suparṇa antarasya utpitsataḥ na avakāśa tva prasaṅgaḥ
yatra āvaraṇa abhāvaḥ tatra patiṣyati iti ced yena āvaraṇa abhāvaḥ viśeṣyate tat tarhi vastu bhūtam eva ākāśam syāt na āvaraṇa abhā
text2:
a saṃbadhi viṣaya tve saṃbadha śabda pratyayayoḥ saṃtata bhāva prasaṅgaḥ svarūpa bāhya rūpa apekṣayā iti ukta uttara tvāt tathā aṇu ātma maasām a pradeśa tvā saṃyogaḥ saṃbhavati pradeśavataḥ dravyasya pradeśavatā dravya atareṇa saṃyoga darśaāt kalpitāḥ pradeśāḥ aṇu ātma maasām
bhaviṣyati iti ced sarva artha siddhi prasaṅgāt iyāḥ eva a vidyamāāḥ viruddhaḥ viruddhaḥ vā arthaḥ kalpaīyaḥ ātodhikaḥ iti iyam ahetu abhāvāt kalpaāyāḥ ca sva āyatta tvāt prabhūta tva saṃbhavāt ca
a ca vaiśeṣikaiḥ kalpitebhyaḥ ṣaḍbhyaḥ padārthebhyaḥ śatam sahasram vā arthāḥ a kalpayitavyāḥ iti hetuḥ asti tasmāt yasmai yasmai
yat yat rocate tat tat sidhyet kaścid kṛpāluḥ prāṇiām duḥkha bahulaḥ saṃsāraḥ eva mā bhūt iti kalpayet ayaḥ vā muktāām
api utpattim kalpayet kaḥ tayoḥ syāt kiṃca ayat dvābhyām paramāṇubhyām sa avayavasya dvyaṇukasya ākāśe eva saṃśleṣa a upapattiḥ hi ākāśasya ca
jatu kāṣṭha vat saṃśleṣaḥ usti kārya kāraṇa dravyayoḥ āśrita āśraya bhāvaḥ yathā opapadyate iti avaśyam kalpyaḥ samavāyaḥ iti ced a itaretara āśraya tvāt kārya kāraṇayoḥ hi bheda siddhau āśrita āśraya bhāva siddhiḥ āśrita āśraya bhāva siddhau ca
tayoḥ bheda siddhiḥ kuṇḍa badara vat iti itaretara āśraya tā syāt hi kārya kāraṇayoḥ bhedaḥ āśrita āśraya bhāvaḥ vā vedātava ādibhiḥ abhyupagamyate kāraṇasya eva saṃsthā amātram kāryam iti abhyupagamāt kiṃca ayat paramāṇūām
yāvatyaḥ diśaḥ ṣaḍ aṣṭau daśa vā tāvadbhiḥ avayavaiḥ sa avayavāḥ te syuḥ sa avayava tvāt aityāḥ ca iti itya tvaiḥ avayava tva abhyupagamaḥ bādhyeta yān tvam
kalpayasi te eva paramāṇavaḥ iti ced a sthūla sūkṣma tāratamya krameṇa ā parama kāraṇāt yathā pṛthivī dvyaṇuka ādi apekṣayā sthūlatamā vastu bhūtā api tatas
sūkṣmam sūkṣmataram ca pṛthivī eka jātīyakam viaśyati tatas dvyaṇukam tathā paramāṇavaḥ api pṛthivī eka jātīyaka tvāt viaśyeyuḥ viaśyatā upi avayava vibhāge eva viaśyati iti ced doṣaḥ yatas ghṛta kāṭhiya vilaya avat api
viāśa upapattim avocāma yathā hi ghṛta suvarṇa ādīām api a gi saṃyogāt drava bhāva āpattyā kāṭhiya viāśaḥ bhavati evam paramāṇūām api parama kāraṇa bhāva āpattyā mūrti ādi viāśaḥ bhaviṣyati tathā kārya ārambhaḥ pi
bhavati kṣīra jala ādīām atareṇa api avayava saṃyoga ataram dadhi hima ādi kārya ārambha darśaāt tat evam asāratara tarka saṃdṛbdha tvāt īśvara kāraṇa śruti viruddha tvāt śruti pravaṇaiḥ ca śiṣṭaiḥ mavādibhiḥ a parigṛhīta tvāt atyatam eva a apekṣā asmi paramāṇu kāraṇa vāde
kāryāḥ āryaiḥ śreyaḥ orthibhiḥ iti vākyaśeṣaḥ samudāyaḥ ubhaya hetuke tad aprāptiḥ samudāya adhikaraṇam vaiśeṣika rāddhātaḥ duryukti yogāt veda virodhāt śiṣṭa aparigrahāt ca āpekṣitavyaḥ iti uktam iti
vaiāśika tva sāmyāt atarām apekṣitavyaḥ iti idam idāīm upapādayāmaḥ sa ca bahu prakāraḥ pratipatti bhedāt vieya bhedāt vā tatra ete trayaḥ vādiḥ bhavati kecid sarva astitva vādiḥ kecid vijñā astitva mātra vādiḥ
iti tatra ye sarva astitva vādiḥ iti tatra ye sarva astitva vādiḥ bāhyam ātaram ca vastu abhyupagacchati bhūtam bhautikam ca cittam caittam ca tān tāvat pratibrūmaḥ
tatra bhūtam pṛthivī dhātu ādayaḥ bhautikam rūpa ādayaḥ cakṣuḥ ādayaḥ ca catuṣṭaye ca pṛthivī ādi paramāṇavaḥ kha rasa iha uṣṇa īraṇa svabhāvāḥ te saṃhayate iti tathā rūpa vijñā aveda āsaṃjñā saṃskāra saṃjñakāḥ
te pi ādhyātmam sarva vyavahāra āspada bhāvena saṃhayate iti tatra idam abhidhīyate yaḥ yam ubhaya hetukaḥ ubhaya prakāraḥ samudāyaḥ pareṣām abhipretaḥ aṇu hetukaḥ ca bhūta bhautika saṃhati rūpaḥ skadha hetukaḥ
ca ubhaya hetuke samudāye bhipreyamāṇe tad aprāptiḥ syāt samudāya aprāptiḥ samudāya bhāva aupapattiḥ iti arthaḥ kutas samudāyiām citta abhijvalaasya ca samudāya siddhi adhī atvāt
ca kasyacid bhoktuḥ praśāsituḥ vā sthirasya saṃhatuḥ a abhyupagamāt i r apekṣa pravṛtti abhyupagame ca pravṛtti auparama prasaṅgāt āśayasya api aya tva a aya tvābhyām airūpya tvāt kṣaṇika tva abhyupagamāt ca iḥ vyāpāra tvāt pravṛtti aupapatteḥ tasmāt
samudāya aupapattiḥ samudāya aupapattau ca tad āśrayā lokayātrā lupyeta itaretara pratyaya tvāt iti ce ā utpatti mātra aimitta tvāt yadi api bhoktā praśāsitā vā kaścid saṃhatā sthiraḥ abhyupagamyate
tathā api avidyā ādīām itaretara kāraṇa tvāt upapadyate lokayātrā tasyām ca upapadyamāāyām a kiṃcid aparam apekṣitavyam asti te ca avidyā ādayaḥ avidyā saṃskāraḥ vijñāam rūpam ṣaṣ āyatanam
sparśaḥ tṛṣṇā bhavaḥ jātiḥ jarā maraṇam śokaḥ paridevaā duḥkham iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ itaretara hetukāḥ saugate samaye kvacid saṃkṣiptāḥ irdiṣṭāḥ
kvacid sarveṣām api ayam pratyākhyeyaḥ tat evam avidyā ādi kalāpe ghaṭīyatra vat aiśam āvartamāne ṛtha ākṣiptaḥ saṃghātaḥ iti ced
a kasmāt utpatti mātra aimitta tvāt bhavet saṃghātaḥ yadi saṃghātasya imittam avagamyeta a tu avagamyate yatas itaretara pratyaya tve pi avidyā ādīām pūrva pūrvam uttara uttarasya utpatti mātra aimittam
bhavat bhavet a tu saṃghāta utpatteḥ imittam saṃbhavati avidyā ādibhiḥ arthāt ākṣipyate saṃghātaḥ iti uktam atra ucyate yadi tāvat ayam abhiprāyaḥ
avidyā ādayaḥ saṃghātam a labhamāā apekṣate saṃghātam iti tatas tasya saṃghātasya kiṃci imittam vaktavyam tat ca ityeṣu api aṇuṣu āśraya āśrayi bhūteṣu ca
bhoktṛṣu satsu uktam vaiśeṣika parīkṣāyām kim aṅga kṣaṇikeṣu api aṇuṣu bhoktṛ rahiteṣu āśraya āśrayi śūyeṣu saṃbhavet atha ayam abhiprāyaḥ avidyā ādayaḥ eva
saṃghātasya imittam iti katham tam eva āśritya ātmāam tasya eva imittam syuḥ atha saṃghātāḥ eva ādau saṃsāre saṃtatya āvartate tad āśrayāḥ ca avidyā ādayaḥ iti tadā api
saṃghātāt vā sadṛśam eva utpadyeta vā sadṛśam visadṛśam vā utpadyeta iyama abhyupagame mauṣya pudgalasya deva tiryagyoiāraka prāpti abhāvaḥ aiyama abhyupagame api mauṣya pudgalaḥ kadācid aiyama abhyupagame api mauṣya pudgalaḥ kadācid
hastī bhūtvā devaḥ vā mauṣyaḥ vā bhavet iti prāpuyāt ubhayam api abhyupagama viruddham api ca yad bhoga arthaḥ saṃghātaḥ syāt sa jīvaḥ
sthiraḥ bhoktā iti tava abhyupagamaḥ tatas ca bhogaḥ bhoga arthaḥ eva saḥ prārthaīyaḥ tathā mokṣaḥ mokṣa arthaḥ eva iti mumukṣuṇā bhavitavyam
ced prārthyeta ubhayam bhavitavyam avasthāyi tve kṣaṇika tva abhyupagama virodhaḥ tasmāt itaretara utpatti mātra nimitta tvam avidyā ādīām yadi bhavet bhavatu tu saṃghātaḥ sidhyet bhoktṛ abhāvāt iti abhiprāyaḥ
uttara utpāde ca pūrva airodhāt uktam etat avidyā ādīām saṃghāta siddhiḥ asti iti tat api tu utpatti mātra aimitta tvam saṃbhavati iti idam idāīm upapādyate kṣaṇabhaṅga vādiḥ yam
abhyupagamaḥ uttarasmi kṣaṇe utpadyamāe pūrvaḥ kṣaṇaḥ irudhyate iti ca evam abhyupagacchatā pūrva uttarayoḥ kṣaṇayoḥ hetu phala bhāvaḥ śakyate saṃpādayitum irudhyamāasya iruddhasya vā pūrva kṣaṇasya abhāva grasta tvāt
uttara kṣaṇa hetu tva aupapatteḥ atha bhāva bhūtaḥ pūrva kṣaṇaḥ uttara kṣaṇasya hetuḥ iti abhiprāyaḥ tathā api opapadyate bhāva bhūtasya vyāpāra kalpaāyām atha bhāvaḥ eva asya vyāpāraḥ iti
abhiprāyaḥ tathā api ā eva upapadyate hetu svabhāva a uparaktasya phalasya utpatti asaṃbhavāt svabhāva uparāga abhyupagame ca hetu svabhāvasya phala kāla avasthāyi tve sati kṣaṇa bhaṅga abhyupagama tyāga prasaṅgaḥ vā svabhāva uparāgeṇa hetu phala bhāvam abhyupagacchataḥ sarvatra tad prāpteḥ atiprasaṅgaḥ api
ca utpāda erodhau vastuaḥ svarūpam eva vā syātām avasthātaram vā vastvataram eva vā sarvathā api upapadyate yadi tāvat vastuaḥ svarūpam evā utpāda erodhau syātām
tatas vastu śabdaḥ utpāda erodha śabdau ca paryāyāḥ prāpuyuḥ atha asti kaścid viśeṣaḥ iti mayā itas utpāda erodha śabdābhyām abhilapyete iti evam api
vastuaḥ kṣaṇika tva abhyupagama hāiḥ atha atyata vyatiriktau evā utpāda airodhau vastuaḥ syātām aśva mahiṣa vat tatas vastu utpāda airodhābhyām a saṃspṛṣṭam iti vastuaḥ śāśvata tva prasaṅgaḥ yadi ca utpāda airodhau
syātām evam api draṣṭṛ dharmau tau a vastu dharmau iti vastuaḥ śāśvata tva prasaṅgaḥ eva tasmāt api asaṃgatam saugatam matam asati pratijñā uparodhaḥ yaugapadyam ayathā
kṣaṇabhaṅga vāde uttarasya kṣaṇasya hetuḥ bhavati iti uktam atha asati eva hetau phala utpattim brūyāt tatas pratijñā uparodhaḥ syāt citta caittāḥ utpadyate iti iyam
pratijñā hīyeta iḥ hetukāyām ca utpattau apratibadhāt sarvam sarvatra utpadyeta atha uttara kṣaṇa utpattiḥ yāvat tāvat avatiṣṭhate pūrva kṣaṇe iti brūyāt tatas yaugapadyam hetu phalayoḥ syāt tathā api pratijñā uparodhaḥ eva syāt kṣaṇikāḥ sarve saṃskārāḥ
iti iyam pratijñā uparudhyeta pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā irodha aprāptiḥ avicchedāt api ca vaiāśikāḥ kalpayati buddhi bodhyam trayāt ayat saṃskṛtam kṣaṇikam ca iti tat api ca trayam pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā irodhau ākāśam ca iti ācakṣate trayam api ca etat avastu
abhāva mātram iti buddhi pūrvakaḥ kila bhāṣyate tad viparītaḥ upratisaṃkhyā irodhaḥ āvaraṇa abhāva mātram ākāśam iti teṣām ākāśam parastāt pratyākhyāsyati irodha dvayam idāīm pratyācaṣṭe pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā irodhayoḥ aprāptiḥ asaṃbhavaḥ iti arthaḥ kasmāt
avicchedāt etau hi pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā irodhau saṃtā a gocarau vā syātām bhāva gocarau vā a tāvat saṃtā a gocarau saṃbhavataḥ sarveṣu api saṃtā eṣu saṃtā a vicchedasya asaṃbhavāt bhāva gocarau saṃbhavataḥ
a hi bhāvāām viāśaḥ saṃbhavati sarvāsu api avasthāsu aspaṣṭa pratyabhijñāsu api avasthāsu tasmāt para parikalpitasya irodha dvayasya a upapattiḥ ubhayathā ca doṣāt yaḥ yam avidyā ādi irodhaḥ pratisaṃkhyā irodha atas pātī para parikalpitaḥ
sa samyak jñāāt vā sa parikarāt syāt svayam eva vā pūrvasmin vikalpe uttarasmin tu mārga upadeśa āarthakya prasaṅgaḥ evam ubhayathā api doṣa prasaṅgāt asamañjasam idam ākāśe ca aviśeṣāt yat ca teṣām eva abhipretam ākāśam
ca irupākhyam iti tatra irodha dvayasya irupākhya tvam purastāt irākṛtam ākāśasya idāīm irākriyate ākāśe ca ayuktaḥ irupākhya tva abhyupagamaḥ pratisaṃkhyā pratisaṃkhyā irodhayoḥ iva vastu tva pratipatteḥ aviśeṣāt āgama prāmāṇyāt tāvat ātma artha anubhūtiḥ
ākāśaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ ākāśasya ca vastu tva prasiddhiḥ tu śabda guṇa aumeya tvam vaktavyam guṇānām pṛthivī ādi vastu āśraya tva darśaāt api ca āvaraṇa abhāva mātram ākāśam icchatām ekasmi suparṇe
patati āvaraṇasya suparṇa atarasya utpitsataḥ avakāśa tva prasaṅgaḥ yatra āvaraṇa abhāvaḥ tatra patiṣyati iti ced viśeṣyate tat tarhi vastu bhūtam eva ākāśam syāt a āvaraṇa abhā

text1: suparṇe patati āvaraṇasya
text2:
suparṇe
patati āvaraṇasya

text1:
suparṇa antarasya utpitsataḥ na avakāśa tva prasaṅgaḥ
yatra āvaraṇa abhāvaḥ tatra patiṣyati iti ced yena āvaraṇa abhāvaḥ viśeṣyate tat tarhi vastu bhūtam eva ākāśam syāt na āvaraṇa abhāva mātram
api ca āvaraṇa abhāva mātram ākaśam manyamānasya saugatasya sva abhyupagama virodhaḥ prasajyeta
saugate hi samaye pṛthivī bhagavan kiṃsaṃniśrayā iti asmin praśna prativacana pravāhe pṛthivī ādīnām ante vāyuḥ kiṃsaṃniśrayaḥ iti asya
text2:
suparṇa atarasya utpitsataḥ avakāśa tva prasaṅgaḥ yatra āvaraṇa abhāvaḥ tatra patiṣyati iti ced viśeṣyate tat tarhi vastu bhūtam eva ākāśam syāt a āvaraṇa abhāva mātram api ca āvaraṇa abhāva mātram
saugatasya sva abhyupagama virodhaḥ prasajyeta saugate hi samaye pṛthivī bhagava kiṃsaṃiśrayā iti asmi vāyuḥ kiṃsaṃiśrayaḥ iti asya

text1:
bhavati vāyuḥ ākāśa saṃniśrayaḥ iti
tat ākāśasya a vastu tve na samañjasam syāt
tasmāt api ayuktam ākāśasya avastu tvam
api ca nirodha dvayam ākāśam ca trayam api etat nirupākhyam avastu nityam ca iti vipratiṣiddham
na hi avastunaḥ nitya tvam anitya tvam vā saṃbhavati vastu āśraya tvāt dharma dharmi vyavahārasya
dharma dharmi bhāve hi ghaṭa ādi vat vastu tvam eva syāt na nirupākhya tvam
anusmṛteḥ ca
api ca vaināśikaḥ sarvasya vastunaḥ kṣaṇikatām abhyupayan upalabdhuḥ api kṣaṇikatām abhyupeyāt
na ca sā saṃbhavati
anusmṛteḥ anubhavam upalabdhim anūtpadyamānam smaraṇam eva anusmṛtiḥ
sā ca upalabdhi eka kartṛkā satī saṃbhavati puruṣa antara upalabdhi viṣaye puruṣa antarasya smṛti adarśanāt
katham hi aham adaḥ drākṣam idam idānīm paśyāmi iti ca pūrva uttara darśini ekasmin asati pratyayaḥ syāt
api ca darśana smaraṇayoḥ kartari ekasmin pratyakṣaḥ pratyabhijñā pratyayaḥ sarvasya lokasya prasiddhaḥ aham adaḥ drākṣam idam paśyāmi iti
yadi hi tayoḥ bhinnaḥ kartā syāt tatas aham smarāmi adrākṣīt anyaḥ iti pratīyāt
na tu evam pratyeti kaścid
yatra evam pratyayaḥ tatra darśana smaraṇayoḥ bhinnam eva kartāram sarva lokaḥ vagacchati smarāmi aham asau adaḥ drākṣīt iti
iha tu aham adaḥ drākṣam iti darśana smaraṇayoḥ vaināśikaḥ pi ātmānam eva ekam kartāram avagacchati
na na aham iti ātmanaḥ darśanam nirvṛttam nihnute yathā agniḥ an uṣṇaḥ prakāśaḥ iti vā
tatra evam sati ekasya
text2:
bhavati vāyuḥ ākāśa saṃiśrayaḥ iti tat ākāśasya a vastu tve samañjasam syāt tasmāt api ayuktam ākāśasya a vastu tvam api ca ca irodha dvayam ākāśam ca trayam api etaiḥ upākhyam avastu ca iti
vipratiṣiddham vā saṃbhavati vastu āśraya tvāt dharma dharmi vyavahārasya dharma dharmi bhāve hi ghaṭa ādi vat vastu tvam eva syāt ca api ca
vaiāśikaḥ sarvasya vastuaḥ kṣaṇikatām abhyupaye upalabdhuḥ api kṣaṇikatām abhyupeyāt ca sā saṃbhavati ausmṛteḥ aubhavam smaraṇam eva ausmṛtiḥ sā ca upalabdhi eka kartṛkā satī saṃbhavati puruṣa atara upalabdhi viṣaye
puruṣa atarasya smṛti adarśaāt katham hi aham adā udrākṣam idam idāīm paśyāmi iti ca pratyayaḥ syāt api ca darśa a smaraṇayoḥ pratyabhijñā pratyayaḥ sarvasya lokasya prasiddhaḥ
aham adā udrākṣam idam paśyāmi iti yadi hi tayoḥ kartā syāt tatas aham smarāmi adrākṣīt ayaḥ iti pratīyāt a tu evam pratyeti kaścid yatra evam
pratyayaḥ tatra darśa a smaraṇayoḥ bhiam eva kartāram sarva lokaḥ uvagacchati smarāmi aham asau adā udrākṣīt iti iha tu aham adā udrākṣam iti darśa a smaraṇayoḥ vaiāśikaḥ upi ātmāam eva ekam kartāram avagacchati yathā
iti vā tatra evam sati ekasya

text1:
eva pratipattim pratyabhijānan eka kartṛkām ā uttamāt ucchvāsāt atītāḥ ca pratipattīḥ janmanaḥ ātma eka kartṛkāḥ pratisaṃdadhānaḥ katham kṣaṇabhaṅga vādī vaināśikaḥ na apatrapeta
sa yadi brūyāt sādṛśyāt etat saṃpatsyate iti tam pratibrūyāt tena idam sadṛśam iti dvaya āyatta tvāt sādṛśyasya kṣaṇabhaṅga vādinaḥ sadṛśayoḥ dvayoḥ vastunoḥ grahītuḥ ekasya abhāvāt sādṛśya nimittam pratisaṃdhānam iti mithyāpralāpaḥ eva syāt
syāt ced pūrva uttarayoḥ kṣaṇayoḥ sādṛśyasya grahītā ekaḥ tathā sati ekasya kṣaṇa dvaya avasthānāt kṣaṇika tva pratijñā pīḍyeta
tena idam sadṛśam iti pratyaya antaram eva idam na pūrva uttara kṣaṇa dvaya grahaṇa nimittam iti ced na
tena idam iti bhinna padārtha upādānāt
pratyaya antaram eva ced sādṛśya viṣayam syāt tena idam sadṛśam iti vākya prayogaḥ narthakaḥ syāt sādṛśyam iti eva prayogaḥ prāpnuyāt
yadā hi loke prasiddhaḥ padārthaḥ parīkṣakaiḥ na parigṛhyate tadā sva pakṣa siddhiḥ para pakṣa doṣaḥ vā ubhayam api ucyamānam parīkṣakāṇām ātmanaḥ ca yathārtha tvena na buddhi saṃtānam ārohati
evam eva eṣaḥ rthaḥ iti niścitam yat tat eva vaktavyam
tatas bahu pralāpi tvam ātmanaḥ kevalam prakhyāpayet
na ca ayam sādṛśyāt saṃvyavahāraḥ yuktaḥ
tad bhāva avagamāt tad sadṛśa bhāva anavagamāt ca
bhavet api kadācid bāhya vastuni vipralambha saṃbhavāt tat eva idam syāt tat sadṛśam vā iti saṃdehaḥ
upalabdhari tu na kadācid bhavati saḥ eva aham syām tad sadṛśaḥ vā iti yaḥ eva aham pūrvedyus adrākṣam saḥ eva aham adya smarāmi iti niścita tad bhāva upalambhāt
tasmāt api anupapannaḥ vaināśika samayaḥ
na asataḥ dṛṣṭa tvāt
itas ca anupapannaḥ vaināśika samayaḥ yatas sthiram anuyāyi kāraṇam an abhyupagacchatām abhāvāt bhāva utpattiḥ iti etat āpadyeta
darśayanti ca abhāvāt bhāva utpattim na an upamṛdya prādurbhāvāt iti
vinaṣṭāt hi kila bījāt aṅkuraḥ utpadyate tathā vinaṣṭāt kṣīrāt dadhi mṛd piṇḍāt ca ghaṭaḥ
kūṭasthāt ced kāraṇāt kāryam utpadyeta aviśeṣāt sarvam sarvatas utpadyeta
tasmāt abhāva grastebhyaḥ bīja ādibhyaḥ ṅkura ādīnām utpadyamāna tvāt abhāvāt bhāva utpattiḥ iti manyante
tatra idam ucyate na asataḥ dṛṣṭa tvāt iti
na abhāvāt bhāvaḥ utpadyate
yadi abhāvāt bhāvaḥ utpadyeta abhāva tva aviśeṣāt kāraṇa viśeṣa abhyupagamaḥ narthakaḥ syāt
na hi bīja ādīnām upamṛditānām yaḥ bhāvaḥ tasya abhāvasya śaśaviṣāṇa ādīnām ca niḥsvabhāva tva aviśeṣāt abhāva tve kaścid viśeṣaḥ sti
yena bījāt eva aṅkuraḥ jāyate kṣīrāt eva dadhi iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ kāraṇa viśeṣa abhyupagamaḥ rthavān syāt
nirviśeṣasya tu abhāvasya kāraṇa tva abhyupagame śaśaviṣāṇa ādibhyaḥ pi aṅkura ādayaḥ jāyeran
na ca evam dṛśyate
yadi punar abhāvasya api viśeṣaḥ bhyupagamyeta utpala ādīnām iva nīla tva ādiḥ tatas viśeṣavat tvāt eva abhāvasya bhāva tvam utpala ādi vat prasajyeta
nā api abhāvaḥ kasyacid utpatti hetuḥ syāt abhāva tvāt eva śaśaviṣāṇa ādi vat
abhāvāt ca bhāva utpattau abhāva anvitam eva sarvam kāryam syāt
na ca evam dṛśyate sarvasya ca vastunaḥ svena svena rūpeṇa bhāva ātmanā eva upalabhyamāna tvāt
na ca mṛd anvitāḥ śarāva ādayaḥ bhāvāḥ tantu ādi vikārāḥ kenacid abhyupagamyante
mṛd vikārān eva tu mṛd anvitān bhāvān lokaḥ pratyeti
yat tu uktam sva rūpa upamardam antareṇa kasyacid kūṭasthasya vastunaḥ kāraṇa tva anupapatteḥ abhāvāt bhāva utpattiḥ bhavitum arhati iti tat duruktam sthira svabhāvānām eva suvarṇa ādīnām pratyabhijñāyamānānām rucaka ādi kāraṇa bhāva darśanāt
yeṣu api bīja ādiṣu sva rūpa upamardaḥ lakṣyate teṣu api na asau upamṛdyamānā pūrva avasthā uttara avasthāyāḥ kāraṇam abhyupagamyate an upamṛdyamānānām eva anuyāyinām bīja ādi avayavānām aṅkura ādi kāraṇa bhāva abhyupagamāt
tasmāt asadbhyaḥ śaśaviṣāṇa ādibhyaḥ sat utpatti adarśanāt sadbhyaḥ ca suvarṇa ādibhyaḥ sat utpatti darśanāt anupapannaḥ yam abhāvāt bhāva utpatti abhyupagamaḥ
api ca caturbhiḥ citta caittāḥ utpadyante paramāṇubhyaḥ ca bhūta bhautika lakṣaṇaḥ samudāyaḥ utpadyate iti abhyupagamya punar abhāvāt bhāva utpattim kalpayadbhiḥ abhyupagamam apahnuvānaiḥ vaināśikaiḥ sarvaḥ lokaḥ ākulīkriyate
udīsīnānām api ca evam siddhiḥ
yadi ca abhāvāt bhāva utpattiḥ abhyupagamyeta evam sati udāsīnānām anīhamānānām api janānām abhimata siddhiḥ syāt abhāvasya sulabha tvāt
kṛṣīvalasya kṣetra karmaṇi aprayatamānasya api sasya niṣpattiḥ syāt
kulālasya ca mṛd saṃskriyāyām aprayatamānasya api amatra utpattiḥ
tantuvāyasya api tantūn a tanvānasya api tanvānasya iva vastra lābhaḥ
svarga apavargayoḥ ca na kaścid kathaṃcid samīheta
na ca etat yujyate abhyupagamyate vā kenacid
tasmāt anupapannaḥ yam abhāvāt bhāva utpatti abhyupagamaḥ
na abhāvaḥ upalabdheḥ
na abhāva adhikaraṇam
evam bāhya artha vādam āśritya samudāya aprāpti ādiṣu dūṣaṇeṣu udbhāviteṣu vijñāna vādī bauddhaḥ idānīm pratyavatiṣṭhate keṣāṃcid kila vineyānām bāhye vastuni abhiniveśam ālakṣya tad anurodhena bāhya artha vāda prakriyā iyam viracitā
na asau sugata abhiprāyaḥ
tasya tu vijñāna eka skandha vādaḥ eva abhipretaḥ
tasmin ca vijñāna vāde buddhi ārūḍhena rūpeṇa antasthaḥ eva pramāṇa prameya phala vyavahāraḥ sarvaḥ upapadyate sati api bāhya arthe buddhi āroham antareṇa pramāṇa ādi vyavahāra anavatārāt
katham punar avagamyate antasthaḥ eva ayam sarva vyavahāraḥ na vijñāna vyatiriktaḥ bāhyaḥ rthaḥ asti iti
tad asaṃbhavāt iti āha sa hi bāhyaḥ rthaḥ bhyupagamyamānaḥ paramāṇavaḥ vā syuḥ tad samūhāḥ vā stambha ādayaḥ syuḥ
tatra na tāvat paramāṇavaḥ stambha ādi pratyaya paricchedyāḥ bhavitum arhanti paramāṇu ābhāsa jñāna anupapatteḥ
na api tad samūhāḥ stambha ādayaḥ teṣām paramāṇubhyaḥ nya tva ananya tvābhyām nirūpayitum aśakya tvāt
evam jāti ādīn api pratyācakṣīta
api ca anubhava mātreṇa sādhāraṇa ātmanaḥ jñānasya jāyamānasya yaḥ yam prati viṣayam pakṣapātaḥ stambha jñānam kuḍya jñānam ghaṭa jñānam paṭa jñānam iti na asau jñāna gata viśeṣam antareṇa upapadyate iti avaśyam viṣaya sārūpyam jñānasya aṅgīkartavyam
aṅgīkṛte ca tasmin viṣaya ākārasya jñānena eva avaruddha tvāt apārthikā bāhya artha sadbhāva kalpanā
api ca saha upalambha niyamāt abhedaḥ viṣaya vijñānayoḥ āpatati
na hi anayoḥ ekasya anupalambhe nyasya upalambhaḥ sti
na ca etat svabhāva viveke yuktam pratibandha kāraṇa abhāvāt
tasmāt api artha abhāvaḥ
svapna ādi vat ca idam draṣṭavyam yathā hi svapna māyā marīci udaka gandharvanagara ādi pratyayāḥ vinā eva bāhyena arthena grāhya grāhaka ākārāḥ bhavanti
evam jāgarita gocarāḥ api stambha ādi pratyayāḥ bhavitum arhanti iti avagamyate pratyaya tva aviśeṣāt
katham punar asati bāhya arthe pratyaya vaicitryam upapadyate
vāsanā vaicitryāt iti āha anādau hi saṃsāre bīja aṅkura vat vijñānānām vāsanānām ca anyonya nimitta naimittika bhāvena vaicitryam na vipratiṣidhyate
api ca anvaya vyatirekābhyām vāsanā nimittam eva jñāna vaicitryam iti avagamyate svapna ādiṣu antareṇa api artham vāsanā nimittasya jñāna vaicitryasya ubhābhyām api āvābhyām abhyupagamyamāna tvāt antareṇa tu vāsanām artha nimittasya jñāna vaicitryasya mayā an abhyupagamyamāna tvāt
tasmāt api abhāvaḥ bāhya arthasya iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ
na abhāvaḥ upalabdheḥ iti
na khalu abhāvaḥ bāhyasya arthasya adhyavasātum śakyate
kasmāt
upalabdheḥ upalabhyate hi prati pratyayam bāhyaḥ rthaḥ stambhaḥ kuḍyam ghaṭaḥ paṭaḥ iti
na ca upalabhyamānasya eva abhāvaḥ bhavitum arhati
yathā hi kaścid bhuñjānaḥ sādhyāyām tṛptau svayam anubhūyamānāyām evam brūyāt na aham bhuñje na vā tṛpyāmi iti tadvat indriya saṃnikarṣeṇa svayam upalabhamānaḥ eva bāhyam artham na aham upalabhe na ca saḥ sti iti bruvan katham upādeya vacanaḥ syāt
nanu na aham evam bravīmi na kaṃcid artham upalabhe iti
kim tu upalabdhi vyatiriktam na upalabhe iti bravīmi
bāḍham evam bravīṣi niraṅkuśa tvāt te tuṇḍasya na tu yukti upetam bravīṣi yatas upalabdhi vyatirekaḥ balāt arthasya abhyupagantavyaḥ upalabdheḥ eva
na hi kaścid upalabdhim eva stambhaḥ kuḍyam ca iti upalabhate
upalabdhi viṣaya tvena eva tu stambha kuḍya ādīn sarve laukikāḥ upalabhante
atas ca evam eva sarve laukikāḥ upalabhante
yat pratyācakṣāṇāḥ api bāhyam artham evam ācakṣate yat antar jñeya rūpam tat bahis vat avabhāsate iti te hi sarva loka prasiddhām bahis avabhāsamānām saṃvidam pratilabhamānāḥ pratyākhyātu kāmāḥ ca bāhyam artham bahis vat iti vatkāram kurvanti
itarathā hi kasmāt bahirvat iti brūyuḥ
na hi viṣṇu mitraḥ vandhyā putra vat avabhāsate iti kaścid ācakṣīta
tasmāt yathānubhavam tattvam abhyupagacchadbhiḥ bahis eva avabhāsate iti yuktam abhyupagantum na tu bahis vat avabhāsate iti
nanu bāhyasya arthasya asaṃbhavāt bahis vat avabhāsate iti adhyavasitam
na ayam sādhuḥ adhyavasāyaḥ yatas pramāṇa pravṛtti apravṛtti pūrvakau saṃbhava asaṃbhavau avadhāryete na punar saṃbhava asaṃbhava pūrvake pramāṇa pravṛtti apravṛttī
yat hi pratyakṣa ādīnām anyatamena api pramāṇena upalabhyate tat saṃbhavati
yat tu na kenacid api pramāṇena upalabhyate tat na saṃbhavati
iha tu yathāsvam sarvaiḥ eva pramāṇaiḥ bāhyaḥ rthaḥ upalabhyamānaḥ katham vyatireka avyatireka ādi vikalpaiḥ na saṃbhavati iti ucyeta upalabdheḥ eva
na ca jñānasya viṣaya sārūpyāt viṣaya nāśaḥ bhavati asati viṣaye viṣaya sārūpya anupapatteḥ bahis upalabdheḥ ca viṣayasya
atas eva saha upalambha niyamaḥ api pratyaya viṣayayoḥ upāya upeya bhāva hetukaḥ na abheda hetukaḥ iti abhyupagantavyam
api ca ghaṭa jñānam paṭa jñānam iti viśeṣaṇayoḥ ghaṭa paṭayoḥ bhedaḥ na viśeṣyasya jñānasya yathā śuklaḥ gauḥ kṛṣṇaḥ gauḥ iti śauklya kārṣṇyayoḥ eva bhedaḥ na go tvasya
dvābhyām ca bhedaḥ ekasya siddhaḥ bhavati ekasmāt ca dvayoḥ
tasmāt artha jñānayoḥ bhedaḥ
tathā ghaṭa darśanam ghaṭa smaraṇam iti atra api pratipattavyam
atra api hi viśeṣyayoḥ eva darśana smaraṇayoḥ bhedaḥ na viśeṣaṇasya ghaṭasya yathā kṣīra gandhaḥ kṣīra rasaḥ iti viśeṣyayoḥ eva gandha rasayoḥ bhedaḥ na viśeṣaṇasya kṣīrasya tadvat
api ca dvayoḥ vijñānayoḥ pūrva uttara kālayoḥ sva saṃvedanena eva upakṣīṇayoḥ itaretara grāhya grāhaka tva anupapattiḥ
tatas ca vijñāna bheda pratijñā kṣaṇika tva ādi dharma pratijñā sva lakṣaṇa sāmānya lakṣaṇa vāsya vāsaka tva avidyā upaplava sat asat dharma bandha mokṣa ādi pratijñāḥ ca sva śāstra gatāḥ tāḥ hīyeran
kiṃca anyat vijñānam vijñānam iti abhyupagacchatā bāhya arthaḥ stambhaḥ kuḍyam iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ
text2:
eva pratipattim pratyabhijāa eka kartṛkām ā uttamāt ucchvāsāt atītāḥ ca pratipattīḥ
ātma eka kartṛkāḥ katham kṣaṇabhaṅga vādī vaiāśikaḥ āpatrapeta sa yadi brūyāt sādṛśyāt etat saṃpatsyate iti tam pratibrūyāt te idam sadṛśam iti dvaya āyatta tvāt sādṛśyasya kṣaṇabhaṅga vādiḥ sadṛśayoḥ dvayoḥ vastuoḥ grahītuḥ ekasya abhāvāt sādṛśya nimittam
mithyā pralāpaḥ eva syāt syāt ced pūrva uttarayoḥ kṣaṇayoḥ sādṛśyasya grahītā ekaḥ tathā sati ekasya kṣaṇa dvaya avasthāāt kṣaṇika tva pratijñā pīḍyeta sadṛśam iti pratyaya ātaram eva idam a pūrva uttara kṣaṇa dvaya grahaṇa aimittam iti ced a pūrva uttara kṣaṇa dvaya grahaṇa aimittam iti ced
idam iti ced sādṛśya viṣayam syāt sadṛśam iti vākya prayogaḥ arthakaḥ syāt sādṛśyam iti eva prayogaḥ prāpuyāt yadā hi loke prasiddhaḥ padārthaḥ
parīkṣakaiḥ parigṛhyate tadā sva pakṣa siddhiḥ para pakṣa doṣaḥ vā ubhayam api ucyamāam parīkṣakāṇām ātma ca buddhi saṃtāam ārohati evam eva eṣa ṛthaḥ iti yat tat eva vaktavyam tatas yat ucyamāam bahu pralāpi tvam ātma kevalam
prakhyāpayet ca ayam sādṛśyāt saṃvyavahāraḥ yuktaḥ tad bhāva avagamāt tad sadṛśa bhāva aavagamāt ca bhavet api kadācid bāhya vastui vipralambha saṃbhavāt tat eva idam syāt tad sadṛśam vā iti saṃdehaḥ upalabdhari tu saṃdehaḥ api as
kadācid bhavati saḥ eva aham syām tad sadṛśaḥ vā iti yaḥ eva aham pūrvedyus adrākṣam saḥ eva aham adya smarāmi iti tasmāt api aupapaḥ vaiāśika samayaḥ āsatas dṛṣṭa tvāt itas ca aupapaaḥ
vaiāśika samayaḥ yatas sthiram auyāyi kāraṇam a abhyupagacchatām abhāvāt bhāva utpattiḥ iti etat āpadyeta darśayati ca abhāvāt bhāva utpattim prādurbhāvāt iti viaṣṭāt hi kila bījāt
aṅkuraḥ utpadyate tathā viaṣṭāt kṣīrāt dadhi mṛd piṇḍāt ca ghaṭaḥ kūṭasthāt ced kāraṇāt kāryam utpadyeta aviśeṣāt sarvam sarvatas utpadyeta tasmāt abhāva grastebhyaḥ
bīja ādibhyaḥ abhāvāt bhāva utpattiḥ iti tatra idam ucyate āsataḥ dṛṣṭa tvāt iti ā bhāvāt bhāvaḥ utpadyate yadi abhāvāt bhāvaḥ utpadyeta abhāva tva aviśeṣāt
kāraṇa viśeṣa abhyupagamaḥ arthakaḥ syāt hi bīja ādīām upamṛditāām yaḥ bhāvaḥ tasya abhāvasya śaśaviṣāṇa ādīām ca kaścid viśeṣaḥ sti bījāt eva aṅkuraḥ
jāyate kṣīrāt eva dadhi iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ kāraṇa viśeṣa abhyupagamaḥ ṛthavāsyāt tu abhāvasya kāraṇa tva abhyupagame śaśaviṣāṇa ādibhyaḥ pi aṅkura ādayaḥ jāyera ca evam dṛśyate yadi
abhāvasya api viśeṣaḥ bhyupagamyeta utpala ādīām iva tatas viśeṣa vat tvāt eva abhāvasya bhāva tvam utpala ādi vat prasajyeta abhāvaḥ kasyacid utpatti hetuḥ syāt abhāva tvāt eva śaśaviṣāṇa ādi vat abhāvāt
ca bhāva utpattau abhāva āvitam eva sarvam kāryam syāt ca evam dṛśyate sarvasya ca vastuaḥ rūpeṇa ca ca
śarāva ādayaḥ bhāvāḥ tatva ādi vikārāḥ keacid abhyupagamyate mṛd vikārāḥ eva tu bhāvāḥ lokaḥ pratyeti yat tu uktam svarūpa upamardam atareṇa kasyacid kūṭasthasya vastuaḥ kāraṇa tva aupapatteḥ abhāvāt
bhāva utpattiḥ bhavitum arhati iti tat duruktam sthira svabhāvāām eva suvarṇa ādīām pratyabhijñāyamāām rucaka ādi kāraṇa bhāva darśaāt yeṣu api bīja ādiṣu sva rūpa upamardaḥ lakṣyate teṣu api āsau pūrva avasthā
uttara avasthāyāḥ kāraṇam abhyupagamyate bīja ādi avayavāām aṅkura ādi kāraṇa bhāva abhyupagamāt tasmāt asadbhyaḥ śaśaviṣāṇa ādibhyaḥ sat utpatti adarśaāt sadbhyaḥ ca suvarṇa ādibhyaḥ sat utpatti darśaāt aupapaḥ abhāvāt
bhāva utpatti abhyupagamaḥ api ca caturbhiḥ citta caittāḥ utpadyate paramāṇubhyaḥ ca bhūta bhautika lakṣaṇaḥ samudāyaḥ utpadyate iti abhyupagamya puara bhāvāt bhāva utpattim kalpayadbhiḥ abhyupagamam vaiāśikaiḥ
lokaḥ ākulīkriyate api ca evam siddhiḥ yadi ca abhāvāt bhāva utpattiḥ abhyupagamyeta evam sati api syāt abhāvasya sulabha tvāt kṛṣīvalasya kṣetra karmaṇi aprayata māasya api sasya aiṣpattiḥ syāt kulālasya ca mṛd saṃskriyāyām aprayata māasya api
amatra utpattiḥ vastra lābhaḥ svarga apavargayoḥ ca a kaścid kathaṃcid samīheta a ca etat yujyate abhyupagamyate vā keacid tasmāt aupapaoyam abhāvāt bhāva utpatti abhyupagamaḥ ābhāvaḥ upalabdheḥ ābhāva adhikaraṇam evam bāhya artha vādam āśritya
samudāya aprāpti ādiṣu dūṣaṇeṣu udbhāviteṣu vijñāa vādī bauddhaḥ idāīm pratyavatiṣṭhate keṣāṃcid kila bāhye ālakṣya bāhya artha vāda prakriyā iyam viracitā āsau sugata abhiprāyaḥ tasya tu
vijñāaikaskadhavādaḥ eva abhipretaḥ tasmin ca vijñāa vāde rūpeṇa ātasthe eva pramāṇa prameya phala vyavahāraḥ sarvaḥ upapadyate sati api bāhya arthe buddhi āroham atareṇa pramāṇa ādi vyavahāra avatārāt katham avagamyate
atasthaḥ eva ayam sarva vyavahāraḥ bāhyaḥ ṛthaḥ asti iti tad asaṃbhavāt iti āha sa hi paramāṇavaḥ vā syuḥ tad samūhāḥ vā stambha ādayaḥ syuḥ tatra
a tāvat paramāṇavaḥ stambha ādi pratyaya paricchedyāḥ bhavitum arhati paramāṇu ābhāsa jñā ā upapatteḥ tad samūhāḥ stambha ādayaḥ teṣām aśakya tvāt evam jāti ādī api pratyācakṣīta api ca
aubhava mātreṇa jñāasya jāyamāasya prati viṣayam pakṣapātaḥ stambha jñāam kuḍya jñāam ghaṭa jñāam paṭa jñāam iti ā asau jñāa gata viśeṣam atareṇa upapadyate iti avaśyam viṣaya sārūpyam jñāasya aṅgīkartavyam aṅgīkṛte
ca viṣaya ākārasya api ca svabhāva viveke yuktam
pratibadha kāraṇa abhāvāt tasmāt api artha abhāvaḥ svapa ādi vat ca idam draṣṭavyam yathā hi svapa māyā marīci udaka gadharva agara ādi pratyayā grāhya grāhaka ākārā bhavati evam jāgarita gocarā api stambha ādi pratyayā bhavitum arhati iti
avagamyate pratyaya tva aviśeṣāt katham asati bāhya arthe pratyaya vaicitryam upapadyate iti āha a ādau hi saṃsāre bīja aṅkura vat vaicitryam a
vipratiṣidhyate api ca avayavi atirekābhyām vāsa āimittam eva jñā avaicitryam iti avagamyate svapa ādiṣu atareṇa api artham vāsa āimittasya jñā avaicitryasya ubhābhyām api āvābhyām abhyupagamyamāa tvāt atareṇa tu
artha nimittasya jñā a vaicitryasya mayā tasmāt api abhāvaḥ bāhya arthasya iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ābhāvaḥ upalabdheḥ iti a khalu abhāvaḥ bāhyasya arthasya adhyavasātum śakyate
kasmāt upalabdheḥ upalabhyate hi prati pratyayam bāhyaḥ ṛthaḥ stambhaḥ kuḍyam ghaṭaḥ paṭaḥ iti ca upalabhyamāasya eva abhāvaḥ bhavitum arhati yathā hi kaścid
sādhyāyām tṛptau svayam evam brūyāt ā aham bhuñje a vā tṛpyāmi iti tadvat idriya saṃikarṣeṇa svayam upalabhamāa eva bāhyam artham ā aham upalabhe
a ca saḥ asti iti bruva katham upādeya vacaḥ syāt au ā aham evam bravīmi a kaṃcid artham upalabhe iti kim tu upalabdhi vyatiriktam
opalabhe iti bravīmi bāḍham evam bravīṣi iraṅkuśa tvāt te tuṇḍasya a tu yukti upetam bravīṣi yatas upalabdhi vyatirekaḥ api balāt arthasya abhyupagatavyaḥ upalabdheḥ eva arthaḥ
hi kaścid upalabdhim eva stambhaḥ kuḍyam ca iti upalabhate upalabdhi viṣaya tve eva tu stambha kuḍya ādī sarve laukikāḥ upalabhate atas ca evam eva sarve laukikāḥ
upalabhate yat pratyācakṣāṇāḥ api bāhyam artham evam ācakṣate yat tat bahis vat avabhāsate iti te api hi sarva loka prasiddhām bahis avabhāsamāām saṃvidam
pratyākhyātu kāmāḥ ca bāhyam artham bahis vat iti vatkāram kurvati itarathā hi kasmāt bahis vat iti brūyuḥ a hi viṣṇu mitraḥ vadhyā putra vat avabhāsate iti
kaścid ācakṣīta tasmāt yathā aubhavam tattvam abhyupagacchadbhiḥ bahis eva avabhāsate iti yuktam abhyupagatum a tu bahis vat avabhāsate iti bāhyasya arthasya asaṃbhavāt bahis vat avabhāsate
iti adhyavasitam sādhuḥ adhyavasāyaḥ yatas pramāṇa pravṛtti apravṛtti pūrvakau saṃbhava asaṃbhavau avadhāryete saṃbhava asaṃbhava pūrvake pramāṇa pravṛtti apravṛttī yat hi pratyakṣa ādīām pramāṇeā upalabhyate tat saṃbhavati yat
tu a keacid api pramāṇena upalabhyate saṃbhavati iha tu yathāsvam sarvaiḥ eva pramāṇaiḥ katham vyatireka avyatireka ādi vikalpaiḥ saṃbhavati iti
ucyeta upalabdheḥ eva ca viṣaya sārūpyāt viṣaya āśaḥ bhavati asati viṣaye viṣaya sārūpya aupapatteḥ bahis upalabdheḥ ca viṣayasya atas eva pratyaya viṣayayoḥ upāya upeya bhāva hetukaḥ
a abheda hetukaḥ iti abhyupagatavyam api ca ghaṭa jñāam paṭa jñāam iti viśeṣaṇayoḥ ghaṭa paṭayoḥ bhedaḥ a viśeṣyasya jñāasya yathā śuklaḥ gauḥ kṛṣṇaḥ
gauḥ iti śauklya kārṣṇyayoḥ eva bhedaḥ a go tvasya dvābhyām ca bhedaḥ ekasya siddhaḥ bhavati ekasmāt ca dvayoḥ tasmāt bhedaḥ tathā
ghaṭa darśaam ghaṭa smaraṇam iti atra api pratipattavyam atra api hi viśeṣyayoḥ eva darśa a smaraṇayoḥ bhedaḥ a viśeṣaṇasya ghaṭasya yathā kṣīragadhaḥ kṣīra rasaḥ iti viśeṣyayoḥ eva
bhedaḥ a viśeṣaṇasya kṣīrasya tadvat api ca dvayoḥ vijñāayoḥ upakṣīṇayoḥ itaretara grāhya grāhaka tva aupapattiḥ tatas ca vijñā abheda pratijñā kṣaṇika tva ādi dharma pratijñā sva lakṣaṇa sāmāya lakṣaṇa vāsya vāsaka tva avidyā upaplava sat asat dharma badha mokṣa ādi pratijñāḥ ca
sva śāstra gatāḥ tāḥ hīyera kiṃca ayat vijñāam vijñāam iti abhyupagacchatā bāhya arthaḥ stambhaḥ kuḍyam iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ

text1:
ā sva lakṣaṇa sāmānya lakṣaṇa vāsya vāsaka tva avidyā upaplava sat asat dharma bandha mokṣa ādi pratijñāḥ ca sva śāstra gatāḥ tāḥ hīyeran
kiṃca anyat vijñānam vijñānam iti abhyupagacchatā bāhya arthaḥ stambhaḥ kuḍyam iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ kasmāt na abhyupagamyate iti vaktavyam
vijñānam anubhūyate iti ced arthaḥ nubhūyate eva iti yuktam abhyupagantum
atha vijñānam prakāśa ātmaka tvāt pradīpa vat svayam evā anubhūyate na tathā arthaḥ iti ced atyanta viruddhām svātmani kriyām abhyupagacchasi agniḥ ātmānam dahati itivat
aviruddham tu loka prasiddham sva ātma vyatiriktena vijñānena bāhya arthaḥ nubhūyate iti nā icchasi
aho pāṇḍityam mahat darśitam
na ca artha vyatiriktam api vijñānam svayam
text2:
ā sva lakṣaṇa sāmāya lakṣaṇa vāsya vāsaka tva avidyā upaplava sat asat dharma badha mokṣa ādi pratijñāḥ ca
sva śāstra gatāḥ tāḥ hīyera kiṃca ayat vijñāam vijñāam iti abhyupagacchatā bāhya arthaḥ stambhaḥ kuḍyam iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ kasmai iti vaktavyam iti
ced bāhyaḥ api arthaḥ udbhūyate eva iti yuktam abhyupagatum atha prakāśa ātmaka tvāt pradīpa vat svayam tathā bāhyaḥ api arthaḥ iti ced atyata viruddhām svātmaiḥ
kriyām abhyupagacchasi dahati itivat aviruddham tu loka prasiddham iti ecchasi aho pāṇḍityam mahat darśitam a ca artha vyatiriktam api
svayam

text1:
kriyā virodhāt eva
nanu vijñānasya svarūpa vyatirikta grāhya tve tat api anyena grāhyam tat api anyena iti anavasthā prāpnoti
api ca pradīpa vat avabhāsa ātmaka tvāt jñānasya jñāna antaram kalpayataḥ sama tvāt avabhāsya avabhāsaka bhāva anupapatteḥ kalpanā ānarthakyam iti tat ubhayam api asat vijñāna grahaṇa mātre eva vijñāna sākṣiṇaḥ grahaṇa ākāṅkṣā anutpādāt anavasthā śaṅkā anupapatteḥ sākṣi pratyayayoḥ ca svabhāva vaiṣamyāt upalabdhṛ upalabhya bhāva upapatteḥ svayaṃsiddhasya ca sākṣiṇaḥ pratyākhyeya tvāt
kiṃca anyat pradīpavat vijñānam avabhāsaka antara nirapekṣam svayam eva prathate iti bruvatā a pramāṇa gamyam vijñānam an avagantṛkam iti uktam syāt śilāghana madhya stha pradīpa sahasra prathana vat
bāḍham evam anubhava rūpa tvāt tu vijñānasya iṣṭaḥ naḥ pakṣaḥ tvayā anujñāyate iti ced na
anyasya avagantuḥ cakṣuḥ sādhanasya pradīpa ādi prathana darśanāt
atas vijñānasya api avabhāsya tva aviśeṣāt sati eva anyasmin avagantari prathanam pradīpa vat iti avagamyate
sākṣiṇaḥ vagantuḥ svayam siddha tām upakṣipatā svayam prathate vijñānam iti eṣaḥ eva mama pakṣaḥ tvayā vācoyukti antareṇa āśritaḥ iti ced na
vijñānasya utpatti pradhvaṃsa aneka tva ādi viśeṣavat tva abhyupagamāt
atas pradīpa vat vijñānasya api vyatirikta avagamya tvam asmābhiḥ prasādhitam
vaidharmyāt ca na svapna ādi vat
yat uktam bāhya artha apalāpinā svapna ādi pratyaya vat jāgarita gocarāḥ api stambha ādi pratyayāḥ vinā eva bāhyena arthena bhaveyuḥ pratyaya tva aviśeṣāt iti tat prativaktavyam
atra ucyate na svapna ādi pratyaya vat jāgrat pratyayāḥ bhavitum arhanti
kasmāt
vaidharmyāt vaidharmyam hi bhavati svapna jāgaritayoḥ
kim punar vaidharmyam
bādhā bādhau iti brūmaḥ bādhyate hi svapna upalabdham vastu pratibuddhasya mithyā mayā upalabdhaḥ mahājana samāgamaḥ iti na hi asti mama mahājana samāgamaḥ nidrā glānam tu me manaḥ babhūva tena eṣā bhrāntiḥ udbabhūva iti
evam māyā ādiṣu api bhavati yathāyatham bādhaḥ
na evam jāgarita upalabdham vastu stambha ādikam kasyāṃcid api avasthāyām bādhyate
api ca smṛtiḥ eṣā yat svapna darśanam
upalabdhiḥ tu jāgarita darśanam
smṛti upalabdhyoḥ ca pratyakṣam antaram svayam anubhūyate artha viprayoga saṃprayoga ātmakam iṣṭam putram smarāmi na upalabhe upalabdhum icchāmi iti
tatra evam sati na śakyate vaktum mithyā jāgarita upalabdhiḥ upalabdhi tvāt svapna upalabdhi vat iti ubhayoḥ antaram svayam anubhavatā
na ca sva anubhava apalāpaḥ prājña mānibhiḥ yuktaḥ kartum
api ca anubhava virodha prasaṅgāt jāgarita pratyayānām svatas nirālambana tām vaktum aśaknuvatā svapna pratyaya sādharmyāt vaktum iṣyate
na ca yaḥ yasya svatas dharmaḥ na saṃbhavati saḥ nyasya sādharmyāt tasya saṃbhaviṣyati
na hi agniḥ uṣṇaḥ nubhūyamānaḥ udaka sādharmyāt śītaḥ bhaviṣyati
darśitam tu vaidharmyam svapna jāgaritayoḥ
na bhāvaḥ n upalabdheḥ
yat api uktam vinā api arthena jñāna vaicitryam vāsanā vaicitryāt eva avakalpate iti tat prativaktavyam
atrā ucyate na bhāvaḥ vāsanānām upapadyate tvad pakṣe n upalabdheḥ bāhyānām arthānām
artha upalabdhi nimittāḥ hi pratyartham nānā rūpāḥ vāsanāḥ bhavanti
an upalabhyamāneṣu tu artheṣu kiṃnimittāḥ vicitrāḥ vāsanāḥ bhaveyuḥ
anādi tve pi andha paraṃparā nyāyena apratiṣṭhā evā anavasthā vyavahāra lopinī syāt nā abhiprāya siddhiḥ
yau api anvaya vyatirekau artha apalāpinā upanyastau vāsanā nimittam eva idam jñāna jāt
text2:
kriyā virodhāt eva au vijñāasya sva rūpa vyatirikta grāhya tve tat api grāhyam tat api iti api ca
pradīpa vat avabhāsa ātmaka tvāt jñāasya jñā ātaram kalpayataḥ sama tvāt avabhāsya avabhāsaka bhāva aupapatteḥ kalpa āarthakyam iti tat ubhayam api asat vijñā a grahaṇa mātre eva vijñā sākṣiṇaḥ grahaṇa ākāṅkṣā utpādāt aavasthā śaṅkā upapatteḥ sākṣi pratyayayoḥ ca svabhāva vaiṣamyāt upalabdhṛ upalabhya bhāva upapatteḥ
svayaṃsiddhasya ca sākṣiṇā u pratyākhyeya tvāt kiṃca ayat pradīpa vat vijñāam avabhāsa kātaraiḥ apekṣam svayam eva prathate iti bruvatā a pramāṇa gamyam vijñāam iti uktam syāt bāḍham
evam aubhava rūpa tvāt tu vijñāasya iṣṭaḥ aḥ pakṣaḥ tvayā iti ced cakṣuḥ sādhaasya pradīpa ādi prathaa darśaāt atas vijñāasya api avabhāsya tva aviśeṣāt sati avagatari
pradīpa vat iti avagamyate sākṣiṇā uvagatuḥ svayaṃsiddha tām upakṣipatā svayam prathate vijñāam iti eṣaḥ eva mama pakṣaḥ tvayā vācoyuktyatareṇa āśritaḥ iti ced a
vijñā asya utpatti pradhvaṃsa a eka tva ādi viśeṣavat tva abhyupagamāt atas pradīpa vat vijñā asya api vyatirikta avagamya tvam asmābhiḥ prasādhitam vaidharmyāt ca yat uktam sva pa ādi pratyaya vat jāgarita gocarāḥ api stambha ādi pratyayāḥ bhaveyuḥ pratyaya tva aviśeṣāt iti tat prativaktavyam
atra ucyate a svapa ādi pratyaya vat jāgrat pratyayā bhavitum arhati kasmāt vaidharmyāt vaidharmyam hi bhavati svapa jāgaritayoḥ kim puar vaidharmyam bādhā bādhau iti brūmaḥ bādhyate hi svapa upalabdham vastu pratibuddhasya mithyā
mayā upalabdhaḥ mahā jaa samāgamaḥ iti hi asti mama mahā jaa samāgamaḥ tu me babhūva bhrātiḥ udbabhūva iti evam māyā ādiṣu api bhavati yathāyatham bādhaḥ
jāgarita upalabdham vastu stambha ādikam kasyāṃcid api avasthāyām bādhyate api ca smṛtiḥ eṣā upalabdhiḥ tu smṛti upalabdhyoḥ ca pratyakṣam ataram artha viprayoga saṃprayoga ātmakam iṣṭam putram smarāmi opalabhe upalabdhum icchāmi iti
tatra evam sati a śakyate vaktum mithyā jāgarita upalabdhiḥ upalabdhi tvāt svapa upalabdhi vat iti ubhayoḥ ataram svayamaubhava tā ca sva aubhava apalāpaḥ kartum api ca aubhava virodha prasaṅgāt jāgarita pratyayāām
vaktum aśakuvatā svapa pratyaya sādharmyāt vaktum iṣyate ca yaḥ yasya svatas saṃbhavati saḥ yasya sādharmyāt tasya saṃbhaviṣyati a hi udaka sādharmyāt śītaḥ bhaviṣyati darśitam tu
vaidharmyam svapa jāgaritayoḥ yat api uktam jñā a vaicitryam iti tat prativaktavyam atra ucyate a bhāvaḥ upapadyate tvad pakṣe upalabdheḥ bāhyāām arthāām artha upalabdhi nimittāḥ hi pratyartham
bhavati tu artheṣu kiṃimittāḥ vicitrāḥ bhaveyuḥ syāt syāt

text1:
artha upalabdhyā vāsanā anupapatteḥ
api ca vinā api vāsanābhiḥ artha upalabdhi upagamāt vinā tu artha upalabdhyā vāsanā utpatti anabhyupagamāt artha sadbhāvam eva anvaya vyatirekau api pratiṣṭhāpayataḥ
api ca vāsanāḥ nāma saṃskāra viśeṣāḥ
saṃskārāḥ ca na āśrayam antareṇa avakalpante evam loke dṛṣṭa tvāt
na ca tava vāsanā āśrayaḥ kaścid asti pramāṇataḥ n upalabdheḥ
kṣaṇika tvāt ca
yat api ālayavijñānam nāma vāsanā āśraya tvena parikalpitam tat api kṣaṇika tva abhyupagamāt anavasthita svarūpam sat pravṛtti vijñāna vat na vāsanānām adhikaraṇam bhavitum arhati
na hi kāla traya saṃbandhini ekasmin anvayini asati kūṭasthe vā sarva artha darśini deśa kāla nimitta apekṣa vāsanā adhīna smṛti pratisaṃdhāna ādi vyavahāraḥ saṃbhavati
sthira svarūpa tve
text2:
artha upalabdhyā vāsas upapatteḥ api ca viā api vāsas artha upalabdhi upagamāt tu artha upalabdhyā vāsas utpatti abhyupagamāt artha sadbhāvam eva avayavyatirekau api pratiṣṭhāpayataḥ api ca saṃskāra viśeṣāḥ saṃskārāḥ ca āśrayam atareṇa avakalpate evam loke
dṛṣṭa tvāt ca tava vāsa āśrayaḥ kaścid asti pramāṇataḥ upalabdheḥ kṣaṇika tvāt ca yat api ālayavijñāam parikalpitam tat api kṣaṇika tva abhyupagamāt aavasthita svarūpam sat bhavitum arhati
hi ekasmin asati kūṭasthe vā sarva artha darśii deśa kāla aimitta apekṣa vāsa ādhī smṛti pratisaṃdhā ādi vyavahāraḥ saṃbhavati sthira svarūpa tve

text1: dūṣaṇāni udbhāvitāni uttara utpāde ca pūrva nirodhāt iti evamādī
text2: dūṣaṇāy udbhāvitāi uttara utpāde ca pūrva airodhāt iti evamādī

text1:
i
evam etau dvau api vaināśika pakṣau nirākṛtau bāhya artha vādi pakṣaḥ vijñāna vādi pakṣaḥ ca
śūnyavādi pakṣaḥ tu sarva pramāṇa vipratiṣiddhaḥ iti tad nirākaraṇāya na ādaraḥ kriyate
na hi ayam sarva pramāṇa siddhaḥ lokavyavahāraḥ nyat tattvam an adhigamya śakyate pahnotum apavāda abhāve utsarga prasiddheḥ
sarvathā nupapatteḥ ca
kim bahunā
sarva prakāreṇa yathā yathā ayam vaināśika samayaḥ upapattimat tvāya parīkṣyate tathā tathā sikatā kūpa vat vidīryate eva
na kāṃcid api atra upapattim paśyāmaḥ
atas ca anupapannaḥ vaināśika tantra vyavahāraḥ
api ca bāhya artha vijñāna śūnya vāda trayam itaretara viruddham upadiśatā sugatena spaṣṭīkṛtam saṃbaddha pralāpi tvam pradveṣaḥ vā prajāsu viruddha artha pratipattyā vimuhyeyuḥ imāḥ prajāḥ iti
sarvathā api an ādaraṇīyaḥ yam sugata samayaḥ śreyaskāmaiḥ iti abhiprāyaḥ
na ekasmin asambhavāt
ekasmin asaṃbhava adhikaraṇam
nirastaḥ sugata samayaḥ
vivasana samayaḥ idānīm nirasyate
sapta ca eṣām padārthāḥ saṃmatāḥ jīva ajīva āsrava saṃvara nirjara bandha mokṣāḥ nāma
saṃkṣepataḥ tu dvau eva padārthau jīva ajīva ākhyau yathāyogam tayoḥ eva itara antarbhāvāt iti manyante
tayoḥ imam aparam prapañcam ācakṣate pañca astikāyāḥ nāma jīva astikāyaḥ pudgala astikāyaḥ dharma astikāyaḥ dharma astikāyaḥ ākāśa astikāyaḥ ca iti
sarveṣām api eṣām avāntarabhedān bahuvidhān sva samaya parikalpitān varṇayanti
sarvatra ca imam saptabhaṅgīnayam nāma nyāyam avatārayanti syāt asti syāt na asti syāt asti ca na asti ca syāt avaktavyaḥ syāt asti ca avaktavyaḥ ca syāt na asti ca avaktavyaḥ ca syāt asti ca na asti ca avaktavyaḥ ca iti
evam eva ekatva nitya tva ādiṣu api imam sapta bhaṅgī nayam yojayanti
atra ācakṣmahe na ayam abhyupagamaḥ yuktaḥ iti
kutas
ekasmin asaṃbhavāt
na hi ekasmin dharmiṇi yugapad sat asat tva ādi viruddha dharma samāveśaḥ saṃbhavati śīta uṣṇa vat
ye ete sapta padārthāḥ nirdhāritāḥ etāvantaḥ evaṃrūpāḥ ca iti te tathā eva vā syuḥ na eva vā tathā syuḥ
itarathā hi tathā vā syuḥ atathā vā iti anirdhārita rūpam jñānam saṃśaya jñāna vat apramāṇam eva syāt
nanu aneka ātmakam vastu iti nirdhārita rūpam eva jñānam utpadyamānam saṃśaya jñāna vat na apramāṇam bhavitum arhati
na iti brūmaḥ niraṅkuśam hi anekānta tvam sarva vastuṣu pratijānānasya nirdhāraṇasya api vastu tva aviśeṣāt syāt asti syāt na asti ityādi vikalpa upanipātāt anirdhāraṇa ātmaka tā eva syāt
evam nirdhārayituḥ nirdhāraṇa phalasya ca syāt pakṣe stitā syāt ca pakṣe nāstitā iti
evam sati katham pramāṇa bhūtaḥ san tīrthakaraḥ pramāṇa prameya pramātṛ pramitiṣu anirdhāritāsu upadeṣṭum śaknuyāt
katham vā tad abhiprāya anusāriṇaḥ tad upadiṣṭe rthe nirdhārita rūpe pravarteran
aikāntika phalatva nirdhāraṇe hi sati tad sādhana anuṣṭhānāya sarvaḥ lokaḥ na ākulaḥ pravartate na anyathā
atas ca anirdhārita artham śāstram praṇayan matta unmatta vat anupādeya vacanaḥ syāt
tathā pañcānām astikāyānām pañcatva saṃkhyā asti vā na asti vā iti vikalpyamānā syāt tāvat ekasmin pakṣe pakṣa antare tu na syāt iti atas nyūna saṃkhyā tvam adhika saṃkhyā tvam vā prāpnuyāt
na ca eṣām padārthānām avaktavya tvam saṃbhavati
a vaktavyāḥ ced na ucyeran
ucyante ca avaktavyāḥ ca iti vipratiṣiddham
ucyamānāḥ ca tathā eva avadhāryante na avadhāryante iti ca
tathā tad avadhāraṇa phalam samyak darśanam asti vā na asti vā evam tad viparītam asamyak darśanam api asti vā na asti vā iti pralapan matta unmatta pakṣasya eva pakṣaḥ syāt na pratyayitavya pakṣasya
svarga apavargayoḥ ca pakṣe bhāvaḥ pakṣe ca abhāvaḥ tathā pakṣe nitya tā pakṣe ca anitya tā iti anavadhāraṇāyām pravṛtti anupapattiḥ
anādisiddha jīva prabhṛtīnām ca sva śāstra avadhṛta svabhāvānām ayathā avadhṛta svabhāva tva prasaṅgaḥ
evam jīva ādiṣu padārtheṣu ekasmin dharmiṇi sattva asattvayoḥ viruddhayoḥ dharmayoḥ asaṃbhavāt sattve ca ekasmin dharme sattvasya dharma antarasya asaṃbhavāt asattve ca evam sattvasya asaṃbhavāt asaṃgatam idam ārhatam matam

yat tu pudgala saṃjñakebhyaḥ ṇubhyaḥ saṃghātāḥ saṃbhavanti iti kalpayanti tat pūrveṇa eva aṇu vāda nirākaraṇena nirākṛtam bhavati iti atas na pṛthak tad nirākaraṇāya prayatyate
evam ca ātma akārtsnyam
yathā ekasmin dharmiṇi viruddha dharma asaṃbhavaḥ doṣaḥ syāt vāde prasaktaḥ evam ātmanaḥ api jīvasya akārtsnyam aparaḥ doṣaḥ prasajyeta
katham
śarīra parimāṇaḥ hi jīvaḥ iti ārhatāḥ manyante
śarīra parimāṇa tāyām ca satyām akṛtsnaḥ sarva gataḥ paricchinnaḥ ātmā iti atas ghaṭa ādi vat anitya tvam ātmanaḥ prasajyeta
śarīrāṇām ca anavasthita parimāṇa tvāt manuṣya jīvaḥ manuṣya śarīra parimāṇaḥ bhūtvā punar kenacid karma vipākena hasti janma prāpnuvan na kṛtsnam hasti śarīram vyāpnuyāt
puttikā janma ca prāpnuvan na kṛtsnaḥ puttikā śarīre saṃmīyeta
samānaḥ eṣaḥ ekasmin api janmani kaumāra yauvana sthāvireṣu doṣaḥ
syāt etat ananta avayavaḥ jīvaḥ
tasya te eva avayavāḥ alpe śarīre saṃkuceyuḥ
mahati ca vikaseyuḥ iti
teṣām punar anantānām jīva avayavānām samāna deśa tvam prativihanyate vā na vā iti vaktavyam
pratighāte tāvat na ananta avayavāḥ paricchinne deśe saṃmīyeran
apratighāte pi eka avayava deśa tva upapatteḥ sarveṣām avayavānām prathima anupapatteḥ jīvasya aṇu mātra tva prasaṅgaḥ syāt
api ca śarīra mātra paricchinnānām jīva avayavānām ānantyam na utprekṣitum api śakyam
atha paryāyeṇa bṛhat śarīra pratipattau kecid jīva avayavāḥ upagacchanti tanu śarīra pratipattau ca kecid apagacchanti iti ucyeta
tatra api ucyate
na ca paryāyāt api avirodhaḥ vikāra ādibhyaḥ
na ca paryāyeṇa api avayava upagama apagamābhyām etat deha parimāṇa tvam jīvasya avirodhena upapādayitum śakyate
kutas
vikāra ādi doṣa prasaṅgāt avayava upagama apagamābhyām hi aniśam āpūryamāṇasya apakṣīyamāṇasya ca jīvasya vikriyāvat tvam tāvat aparihāryam
vikriyāvat tve ca carma ādi vat anitya tvam prasajyeta
tatas ca bandha mokṣa abhyupagamaḥ bādhyeta karma aṣṭaka pariveṣṭitasya jīvasya alābū vat saṃsāra sāgare nimagnasya bandhana ucchedāt ūrdhvagāmi tvam bhavati iti
kiṃca anyat āgacchatām apagacchatām ca avayavānām āgama apāya dharmavat tvāt eva anātma tvam śarīra ādi vat
tatas ca avasthitaḥ kaścid avayavaḥ ātmā iti syāt
na ca sa nirūpayitum śakyate ayam asau iti
kiṃca anyat āgacchantaḥ ca ete jīva avayavāḥ kutas prādurbhavanti apagacchantaḥ ca kva vā līyante iti vaktavyam
na hi bhūtebhyaḥ prādurbhaveyuḥ bhūteṣu ca nilīyeran abhautika tvāt jīvasya
nā api kaścid anyaḥ sādhāraṇaḥ sādhāraṇaḥ vā jīvānām avayava ādhāraḥ nirūpyate pramāṇa abhāvāt
kiṃca anyat an avadhṛta sva rūpaḥ ca evam sati ātmā syāt āgacchatām apagacchatām ca avayavānām aniyata parimāṇa tvāt
atas evamādi doṣa prasaṅgāt na paryāyeṇa api avayava upagama apagamau ātmanaḥ āśrayitum śakyete
athavā pūrveṇa sūtreṇa śarīra parimāṇasya ātmanaḥ upacita apacita śarīra antara pratipattau akārtsnya prasañjana dvāreṇa anitya tāyām coditāyām punar paryāyeṇa parimāṇa anavasthāne srotaḥ saṃtāna nityatā nyāyena ātmanaḥ nitya tā syāt yathā rakta paṭānām vijñāna anavasthāne tad saṃtāna nityatā tadvat visicām api iti āśaṅkya anena sūtreṇa uttaram ucyate saṃtā

i evam etau dvau api vaiāśika pakṣau bāhya artha vādi pakṣaḥ vijñāa vādi pakṣaḥ ca śūyavādi pakṣaḥ tu sarva pramāṇa vipratiṣiddhaḥ iti tairākaraṇāya
ādaraḥ kriyate hi ayam sarva pramāṇa siddhaḥ lokavyavahāraḥ yat tattvam a adhigamya apavāda abhāve utsarga prasiddheḥ sarvathā upapatteḥ ca kim sarva prakāreṇa yathā yathā ayam vaiāśika samayaḥ upapattimat tvāya parīkṣyate tathā tathā
sikatā kūpa vat vidīryate eva a kāṃcid api atra upapattim paśyāmaḥ atas ca aupapaḥ vaiāśika tatra vyavahāraḥ api ca bāhya artha vijñāaśūya vāda trayam itaretara viruddham upadiśatā sugate spaṣṭīkṛtam saṃbaddha pralāpi tvam pradveṣaḥ vā prajāsu viruddha artha pratipattyā
vimuhyeyuḥ imāḥ prajāḥ iti sarvathā api a ādaraṇīyaḥ yam sugata samayaḥ śreyaskāmaiḥ iti abhiprāyaḥ aikasmiasambhavāt ekasmiasaṃbhava adhikaraṇam irastaḥ sugata samayaḥ vivasaa samayaḥ idāīm irasyate sapta ca eṣām
padārthāḥ saṃmatāḥ saṃkṣepataḥ tu dvau eva padārthau jīva ajīva ākhyau yathāyogam tayoḥ eva itara atarbhāvāt iti tayoḥ imam aparam prapañcam ācakṣate pañca astikāyāḥ jīva astikāyaḥ pudgala astikāyaḥ dharma astikāyaḥ dharma astikāyaḥ ākāśa astikāyaḥ ca iti
sarveṣām api eṣām sarvatra ca imam sapta bhaṅgī ayam avatārayati syāt asti syāt asti syāt asti ca āsti ca syāt avaktavyaḥ syāt asti ca avaktavyaḥ ca syāt asti ca avaktavyaḥ ca syāt asti ca āsti
ca avaktavyaḥ ca iti evam eva ekatva aityatva ādiṣu api imam sapta bhaṅgī ayam yojayati atra ācakṣmahe ā ayam abhyupagamaḥ yuktaḥ iti kutas ekasmin asaṃbhavāt hi ekasmin dharmiṇi yugapad sat asat tva ādi viruddha dharma samāveśaḥ saṃbhavati śīta uṣṇa vat ye ete sapta padārthāḥ etāvataḥ

yat punar idam ucyate vāsudevāt saṃkarṣaṇaḥ utpadyate saṃkarṣaṇāt ca pradyumnaḥ pradyumnāt ca aniruddhaḥ iti atra brūmaḥ na vāsudeva saṃjñakāt paramātmanaḥ saṃkarṣaṇa saṃjñakasya jīvasya utpattiḥ saṃbhavati anitya tva ādi doṣa prasaṅgāt
utpattimat tve hi jīvasya anitya tva ādayaḥ doṣāḥ prasajyeran
tatas ca nā eva asya bhagavat prāptiḥ mokṣaḥ syāt kāraṇa prāptau kāryasya pravilaya prasaṅgāt
pratiṣedhiṣyati ca ācāryaḥ jīvasya utpattim na ātmā aśruteḥ nitya tvāt ca tābhyaḥ iti
tasmāt asaṃgatā eṣā kalpanā
na ca kartuḥ karaṇam
itas ca asaṃgatā eṣā kalpanā yasmāt na hi loke kartuḥ devadatta ādeḥ karaṇam paraśu ādi utpadyamānam dṛśyate
varṇayanti ca bhāgavatāḥ kartuḥ jīvāt saṃkarṣaṇa saṃjñakāt karaṇam manaḥ pradyumna saṃjñakam utpadyate kartṛ jāt ca tasmāt aniruddha saṃjñakaḥ haṃkāraḥ utpadyate iti
na ca etat dṛṣṭāntam antareṇa adhyavasātum śaknumaḥ
na ca evaṃbhūtām śrutim upalabhāmahe
vijñāna ādi bhāve vā tad apratiṣedhaḥ
atha api syāt na ca ete saṃkarṣaṇa ādayaḥ jīva ādi bhāvena abhipreyante
kim tarhi īśvarāḥ eva ete sarve jñāna aiśvarya śakti bala vīrya tejobhiḥ aiśvarya dharmaiḥ anvitāḥ abhyupagamyante vāsudevāḥ eva ete sarve nirdoṣāḥ niradhiṣṭhānāḥ niravadyāḥ ca iti
tasmāt na ayam yathā varṇitaḥ utpatti asaṃbhavaḥ doṣaḥ prāpnoti iti
atrā ucyate evam api tad apratiṣedhaḥ utpatti asaṃbhavasya apratiṣedhaḥ prāpnoti eva ayam utpatti asaṃbhavaḥ doṣaḥ prakāra antareṇa iti abhiprāyaḥ
katham
yadi tāvat ayam abhiprāyaḥ paraspara bhinnāḥ eva ete vāsudeva ādayaḥ catvāraḥ īśvarāḥ tulya dharmāṇaḥ na eṣām eka ātmaka tvam asti iti tatas neka īśvara kalpanā ānarthakyam ekena eva īśvareṇa īśvara kārya siddheḥ
siddhānta hāniḥ ca bhagavān eva ekaḥ vāsudevaḥ paramārtha tattvam iti abhyupagamāt
atha ayam abhiprāyaḥ ekasya eva bhagavataḥ ete catvāraḥ vyūhāḥ tulya dharmāṇaḥ iti tathā api tad avasthaḥ evā utpatti asaṃbhavaḥ
na hi vāsudevāt saṃkarṣaṇasya utpattiḥ saṃbhavati saṃkarṣaṇāt ca pradyumnasya pradyumnāt ca aniruddhasya atiśaya abhāvāt
bhavitavyam hi kārya kāraṇayoḥ atiśayena yathā mṛd haṭayoḥ
na hi asati atiśaye kāryam kāraṇam iti avakalpate
na ca pañcarātra siddhāntibhiḥ vāsudeva ādiṣu ekasmin sarveṣu vā jñāna aiśvarya ādi tāratamya kṛtaḥ kaścid bhedaḥ bhyupagamyate
vāsudevāḥ eva hi sarve vyūhāḥ nirviśeṣāḥ iṣyante
na ca ete bhagavat vyūhāḥ catur saṃkhyāyām eva avatiṣṭheran brahma ādi stamba paryantasya samastasya eva jagataḥ bhagavat vyūha tva avagamāt
vipratiṣedhāt ca
vipratiṣedhaḥ ca asmin śāstre bahuvidhaḥ upalabhyate guṇa guṇi tva kalpanā ādi lakṣaṇaḥ
jñāna aiśvarya śakti bala vīrya tejāṃsi guṇāḥ ātmānaḥ eva ete bhagavantaḥ vāsudevāḥ ityādi darśanāt
veda vipratiṣedhaḥ ca bhavati caturṣu vedeṣu param śreyaḥ labdhvā śāṇḍilyaḥ idam śāstram adhigatavān ityādi veda nindā darśanāt
tasmāt asaṃgatā eṣā kalpanā iti siddham
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye dvitīya adhyāyasya dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ

dvitīyaḥ dhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyaḥ pādaḥ
na viyat aśruteḥ
viyat adhikaraṇam
kim asya ākāśasya utpattiḥ asti uta na asti iti
tatra tāvat pratipadyate na viyat aśruteḥ iti
na khalu ākāśam utpadyate
kasmāt
aśruteḥ na hi asya utpatti prakaraṇe śravaṇam asti
chāndogye hi sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ekam eva advitīyam iti sat śabda vācyam brahma prakṛtya tat aikṣata tat tejaḥ sṛjate iti ca pañcānām mahābhūtānām madhyamam tejaḥ ādi kṛtvā trayāṇām tejaḥ bannānām utpattiḥ śrāvyate
śrutiḥ ca naḥ pramāṇam atīndriya artha vijñāna utpattau
na ca atra śrutiḥ asti ākāśasya utpatti pratipādinī
tasmāt na ākāśasya utpattiḥ iti
asti tu
tuśabdaḥ pakṣa a
