kṣīravat hi iti yat ca uktam ākāśasya utpattau a pūrva uttara kālayoḥ viśeṣaḥ saṃbhāvayitum śakyate iti tat ayuktam viśeṣeṇa pṛthivī ādibhyaḥ abhaḥ sva rūpa vat idāīm adhyavasīyate
saḥ eva viśeṣaḥ prāk utpatteḥ āsīt iti gamyate yathā ca brahma a sthūla ādibhiḥ pṛthivī ādi svabhāvaiḥ svabhāvavat asthūlam aaṇu ityādi śrutibhyaḥ evam ākāśa svabhāve api a svabhāvavat aākāśam iti śruteḥ avagamyate tasmāt prāk utpatteḥ aākāśam iti sthitam
yat api uktam pṛthivī ādi vaidharmyāt ākāśasya aja tvam iti tat api asat śruti virodhe sati utpatti asaṃbhava aumāasya ābhāsa tva upapatteḥ utpatti aumāasya ca darśita tvāt aityam ākāśam aitya guṇa āśraya tvāt ghaṭa ādi vat ityādi prayoga saṃbhavāt ca ātmaya aikātikam iti ced prati aitya guṇa āśraya tva asiddheḥ vibhu tva ca prati asiddha tvāt
yat ca uktam etat śabdāt ca iti tatra amṛta tva śrutiḥ tāvat viyati amṛtāḥ divaukasaḥ iti vat draṣṭavyā utpatti pralayayoḥ upapādita tvāt ākāśa vat sarva gataḥ ca ityaḥ iti api kriyate ākāśa sama tvāya yathā iṣuḥ iva savitā dhāvati iti
kṣipra gati tvāya ucyate a iṣu tulya gati tvāya tadvat ete ā atatva upamā aśrutiḥ vyākhyātā jyāyāḥ ākāśāt ityādi śrutibhyaḥ ca brahmaṇaḥ sakāśāt ākāśasya u parimāṇa tva siddhiḥ a tasya pratimā asti iti ca darśayati iti ca brahmaṇaḥ yeṣām ākāśa ādīām ārta tvam
darśayati tapasi brahma śabda vat ākāśasya jama śruteḥ gauṇa tvam iti etat ākāśa saṃbhava śrutyā aumāābhyām parihṛtam tasmāt brahma kāryam viyat iti siddham mātariśvā vyākhyātaḥ mātariśva adhikaraṇam atideśaḥ yam viyat vyākhyāea mātariśvā api viyat āśrayaḥ vāyuḥ vyākhyātaḥ tatra api ete yathāyogam
pakṣāḥ racayitavyāḥ vāyuḥ utpadyate chadogāām utpatti prakaraṇe āmāam iti ekaḥ pakṣaḥ asti tu taittirīyāṇām utpatti prakaraṇe ākāśāt vāyuḥ iti pakṣa ataram tatas ca śrutyoḥ vipratiṣedhe sati gauṇī vāyoḥ utpatti śrutiḥ asaṃbhavāt iti aparaḥ abhiprāyaḥ
asaṃbhavaḥ ca sā eṣā astamitā devatā yat vāyuḥ iti astamaya pratiṣedhāt amṛta tva ādi śravaṇāt ca pratijñā uparodhāt yāvat vikāram ca vibhāga abhyupagamāt utpadyate vāyuḥ iti siddhātaḥ astamaya pratiṣedha upara vidyā viṣayaḥ āpekṣikaḥ ca amṛta tva ādi śravaṇam vāyoḥ ākāśasya ca
tulyayoḥ utpatti prakaraṇe śravaṇa aśravaṇayoḥ ekam eva adhikaraṇam ubhaya viṣayam astu kim atideśe asati viśeṣaḥ iti ucyate satyam evam etat tathā api mada dhiyām śabda mātra kṛta āśaṅkā aivṛtti arthaḥ yam atideśaḥ kriyate saṃvarga vidyā ādiṣu hi upāsyata vāyoḥ mahābhāga tva śravaṇāt astamaya pratiṣedha ādibhyaḥ ca bhavati kasyacid iti asambhavaḥ tu satas upapatteḥ
asaṃbhava adhikaraṇam utpattim upaśrutya brahmaṇaḥ api bhavet kutaścid utpattiḥ iti syāt kasyacid matiḥ tathā vikārebhyaḥ eva ākāśa ādibhyaḥ uttareṣām vikārāṇām utpattim upaśrutya ākāśasya api vikārāt eva brahmaṇaḥ utpattiḥ iti kaścid mayeta tām āśaṅkām apaetum idam sūtram asaṃbhavaḥ tu iti a khalu
brahmaṇaḥ sat ātmakasya kutaścid ayataḥ saṃbhavaḥ utpattiḥ āśaṅkitavyā kasmāt aupapatteḥ samātram hi brahma tasya samātrāt eva utpattiḥ saṃbhavati asati atiśaye prakṛti vikāra bhāva aupapatteḥ sat viśeṣāt dṛṣṭa viparyayāt sāmāyāt viśeṣāḥ
utpadyamāā dṛśyate mṛd ādeḥ ghaṭa ādayaḥ a tu viśeṣebhyaḥ āpi asataḥ irā ātmaka tvāt katham asataḥ sat jāyeta iti ca ākṣepa śravaṇāt sa kāraṇam ca asya
ca adhipaḥ iti ca brahmaṇaḥ jaayitāram vārayati viyat pavaayoḥ puar utpattiḥ pradarśitā a tu brahmaṇaḥ sā asti iti vaiṣamyam a ca vikārebhyaḥ vikāra atara utpatti darśaāt brahmaṇaḥ api
vikāra tvam bhavitum arhati mūlaprakṛtyā abhyupagame avasthā prasaṅgāt yā mūlaprakṛtiḥ abhyupagamyate tat eva ca brahma iti avirodhaḥ brahma iti avirodhaḥ chādogye sa mūla tvam tejasaḥ śrāvitam taittirīyake tu vāyu mūla tvam tatra
prati śruti vipratipattau satyām prāptam tāvat brahmayoikam tejaḥ iti kutas sa devaḥ iti upakramya tat tejaḥ sṛjataḥ iti upadeśāt sarvavijñāa pratijñāyāḥ ca brahma prabhava tve sarvasya saṃbhavāt tad jalāḥ iti ca aviśeṣa śruteḥ
etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ iti ca upakramya śrutyatare sarvasya aviśeṣeṇa brahma ja tva upadeśāt taittirīyake ca sa tapaḥ taptvā idam sarvam asṛjata yat idam kiṃca iti aviśeṣa śravaṇāt tasmāt vāyoragiḥ iti
krama upadeśaḥ draṣṭavyaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ iti evam prāpte ucyate tejaḥ atas mātariśvaaḥ jāyate iti kasmāt tathā hi āha vāyoragiḥ iti avyavahite hi
tejasaḥ brahma ja tve sati asati vāyu ja tve vāyoragiḥ iti iyam śrutiḥ kadarthitā syāt krama arthā eṣā bhaviṣyati iti uktam ā iti brūmaḥ tasmāt vai etasmāt ātman ākāśaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ iti
purastāt ātmanaḥ pañcamībhiḥ deśāt tasya eva ca saṃbhavateḥ iha adhikārāt parastāt api tad adhikāre pṛthivyāḥ oṣadhayaḥ iti apādāa pañcamī darśaāt vāyoḥ agiḥ iti apādāa pañcamī eva eṣā iti gamyate api ca vāyoḥ ūrdhvam agiḥ saṃbhūtaḥ iti
kalpyaḥ upapadārtha yogaḥ klṛptaḥ tu kāraka artha yogaḥ saṃbhūtaḥ iti tasmāt eṣā śrutiḥ tejasā uvagamayati avitarā api śrutiḥ brahma yoitvam tejasā uvagamayati tat tejaḥ sṛjate iti a tasyāḥ pāraṃparya ja tve pi avirodhāt yadā api hi ākāśam
vāyum ca sṛṣṭvā brahma kalpyate tadā api brahma ja tvam tejasaḥ virudhyate yathā tasyāḥ śrṛtam tasyāḥ dadhi tasyāḥ āmikṣā ityādi darśayati
ca brahmaṇaḥ iti tathā ca īśvara smaraṇam bhavati buddhiḥ jñā asaṃmohaḥ bhavati bhāvāḥ bhūtāām mattaḥ eva pṛthagvidhāḥ iti yadi api buddhi ādayaḥ
sva kāraṇebhyaḥ pratyakṣam bhavataḥ dṛśyate tathā api sarvasya bhāva jātasya sākṣāt praṇāḍyā vā īśvara vaṃśya tvāt śrutayaḥ vyākhyātāḥ tāsām sarvathā upapatteḥ tu ayathā upapatteḥ pratijñā api sat vaṃśya tva mātram apekṣate as vaṃśya tva mātram apekṣate
avyavahita jaya tvam iti avirodhaḥ āpaḥ atas tathā hi āha āpaḥ atas tejasaḥ jāyate kasmāt tathā hi āha tat aposṛjata iti ageḥ apaḥ iti ca sati
saṃśayaḥ tejasaḥ tu sṛṣṭim vyākhyāya pṛthivyāḥ vyākhyāsya apotariyām iti āpaḥ iti sūtrayāṃbabhūva pṛthivī adhikāra rūpa śabda atarebhyaḥ pṛthivī adhikāra adhikaraṇam tāḥ āpaḥ aikṣata bahvyaḥ syāma prajāyemahi iti
tāḥ aam asṛjata iti śrūyate tatra saṃśayaḥ kim vrīhi yava ādi abhyavahāryam vai oda ādi ucyate kim vā pṛthivī iti tatra prāptam tāvat
vrīhi yava ādi oda ādi vā parigrahītavyam iti tatra hi aa śabdaḥ prasiddhaḥ loke vākyaśeṣaḥ u pi etam artham upodbalayati tasmāt yatra kva ca a varṣati tat
eva bhūyiṣṭham aam bhavati iti vrīhi yava ādi eva hi sati varṣaṇe bahu bhavati evam prāpte brūmaḥ pṛthivī eva iyam
vivakṣyate iti kasmāt adhikārāt rūpāt śabda atarāt ca adhikāraḥ tāvat tat tejaḥ sṛjata tat apaḥ sṛjata iti mahābhūta viṣayaḥ vartate tatra krama prāptām
pṛthivīm mahābhūtam vilaṅghya ākasmāt vrīhi ādi parigrahaḥ yāyyaḥ tathā rūpam api vākya śeṣe pṛthivī auguṇam dṛśyate yat kṛṣṇam tat iti a hi oda ādeḥ
abhyavahāryasya kṛṣṇa tvaiyamaḥ sti vrīhi ādīām pṛthivyāḥ api ā eva kṛṣṇa tvaiyamaḥ sti payaḥ pāṇḍurasya aṅgāra rohitasya ca kṣetrasya darśaāt ā ayam doṣaḥ bāhulya apekṣa tvāt bhūyiṣṭham hi
pṛthivyāḥ kṛṣṇam rūpam a tathā śvetarohite paurāṇikāḥ api pṛthivī chāyām śarvarīm upadiśati sā ca kṛṣṇa ābhāsā iti atas kṛṣṇam rūpam pṛthivyāḥ iti
śliṣyate śrutyataram api adabhyaḥ pṛthivī iti bhavati tat yat apām śaraḥ āsīt tat samahayata sā pṛthivī abhavat iti ca
pṛthivyāḥ tu vrīhi ādeḥ utpattim darśayati pṛthivyāḥ oṣadhayaḥ oṣadhībhyaḥ am iti ca evam adhikāra ādiṣu pṛthivyāḥ pratipādakeṣu satsu kutas vrīhi ādi pratipattiḥ prasiddhiḥ api
adhikāra ādibhiḥ eva bādhyate asya tad dvāreṇa pṛthivyāḥ eva adbhyaḥ prabhava tvam sūcayati iti draṣṭavyam tasmāt pṛthivīyam a śabdaḥ iti tu
tad liṅgāt saḥ tad abhidhyā adhikaraṇam kim imāi viyat ādīi bhūtāi svayam eva sva vikārān sṛjati āhosvit parameśvaraḥ eva tam tam vikāram sṛjati iti saṃdehe sati prāptam tāvat
svayam eva sṛjati iti kutas ākāśāt vāyuḥ vāyoḥ agiḥ ityādi svātatrya śravaṇāt au acetaāām svatatrāṇām pravṛttiḥ pratiṣiddhā ā eṣa doṣaḥ tat tejaḥ aikṣata tāḥ āpaḥ aikṣata iti ca bhūtāām api
cetas atva śravaṇāt iti evam prāpte abhidhīyate saḥ eva parameśvaraḥ avatiṣṭhamānaḥ abhidhyāya tam tam vikāram sṛjati iti kutas tad liṅgāt tathā hi śāstram yaḥ
pṛthivyām pṛthivyāḥ ataraḥ yam pṛthivī veda yasya pṛthivī śarīram yaḥ pṛthivīm ataraḥ yamayati iti evaṃjātīyakam sādhyakṣāṇām eva bhūtāām pravṛttim darśayati tathā
sā ukāmayata bahu syām prajāyeya iti iti prastutya sat ca tyad ca abhavat tat ātmā am svayam akuruta iti ca tasya eva ca sarva ātma bhāvam darśayati yat tu īkṣaṇa śravaṇam ap tejasoḥ tat parameśvara āveśa vaśāt eva draṣṭavyam
draṣṭā iti īkṣitratara pratiṣedhāt prakṛta tvāt ca sataḥ īkṣituḥ tat aikṣata bahu syām prajāyeya iti iti atra viparyayeṇa tu krama ūtaḥ upapadyate ca viparyaya adhikaraṇam bhūtāām utpatti kramaḥ cititaḥ atha idāīm apyaya kramaḥ cityate
krameṇa apyayaḥ uta utpatti krameṇa athavā trayaḥ api ca utpatti sthiti pralayāḥ bhūtāām brahma āyattāḥ śrūyate yatas vai imāi bhūtāi jāyate yea jātāi jīvati
yat prayati abhisaṃviśati iti tatra aiyamaḥ viśeṣāt iti prāptam athavā utpatteḥ kramasya śruta tvāt pralayasya api krama ākāṅkṣiṇaḥ saḥ eva kramaḥ syāt iti evam prāptam tatas brūmaḥ viparyayeṇa tu pralaya kramaḥ
atas utpatti kramāt bhavitum arhati tathā hi loke dṛśyate krameṇa sopāam ārūḍhaḥ tatas krameṇa avarohati iti api ca dṛśyate mṛdaḥ jātam ghaṭa śarāva ādi apyaya kāle
mṛd bhāvam apyeti adbhyaḥ ca jātam himakaraka ādi ap bhāvam apyeti iti atas ca upapadyate etat yat pṛthivī adbhyaḥ jātā satī sthiti kāla v

text1:
ūḍhaḥ tatas viparītena krameṇa avarohati iti
api ca dṛśyate mṛdaḥ jātam ghaṭa śarāva ādi apyaya kāle mṛd bhāvam apyeti adbhyaḥ ca jātam himakaraka ādi ap bhāvam apyeti iti
atas ca upapadyate etat yat pṛthivī adbhyaḥ jātā satī sthiti kāla vyatikrāntau apaḥ apīyāt
āpaḥ ca tejasaḥ jātāḥ satyaḥ tejaḥ apīyuḥ
evam krameṇa sūkṣmam sūkṣmataram ca anantaram anantarataram kāraṇam apītya sarvam kārya jātam parama kāraṇam parama sūkṣmam ca brahma apyeti iti veditavyam
na hi sva kāraṇa vyatikrameṇa kāraṇa kāraṇe kārya apyayaḥ nyāyyaḥ
smṛtau api utpatti krama viparyayeṇa eva apyaya kramaḥ tatra tatra darśitaḥ jagat pratiṣṭhā devarṣe pṛthivī apsu pralīyate
jyotiṣi āpaḥ pralīyante jyotiḥ vāyau pralīyate iti evamādau
utpatti kramaḥ tu utpattau eva śruta tvāt na apyaye bhavitum arhati
na ca asau ayogya tvāt apyayena ākāṅkṣyate
na hi kārye dhriyamāṇe kāraṇasya apyayaḥ yuktaḥ kāraṇa apyaye kāryasya avasthāna anupapatteḥ
kārya apyaye tu kāraṇasya avasthānam yuktam mṛd ādiṣu evam dṛṣṭa tvāt
antarā vijñāna manasī krameṇa tad liṅgāt iti ced na aviśeṣāt
antarā vijñāna adhikaraṇam
bhūtānām utpatti pralayau anuloma pratiloma kramābhyām bhavataḥ iti uktam
ātma ādiḥ utpattiḥ pralayaḥ ca ātma antaḥ iti api uktam
sa indriyasya tu manasaḥ buddheḥ ca sadbhāvaḥ prasiddhaḥ śruti smṛtyoḥ buddhim tu sārathim viddhi manaḥ pragraham eva ca
indriyāṇi hayān āhuḥ ityādi liṅgebhyaḥ
tayoḥ api kasmiṃścid antarāle krameṇa utpatti pralayau upasaṃgrāhyau sarvasya vastu jātasya brahma ja tva abhyupagamāt
api ca ātharvaṇe utpatti prakaraṇe bhūtānām ātmanaḥ ca antarāle karaṇāni anukramyante etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ manaḥ sarva indriyāṇi ca
kham vāyuḥ jyotiḥ āpaḥ pṛthivī viśvasya dhāriṇī iti
tasmāt pūrva ukta utpatti pralaya krama bhaṅga prasaṅgaḥ bhūtānām iti ced na
aviśeṣāt yadi tāvat bhautikāni karaṇāni tatas bhūta utpatti pralayābhyām eva eṣām utpatti pralayau bhavataḥ iti na etayoḥ krama antaram mṛgyam
bhavati ca bhautika tve liṅgam karaṇānām anna mayam hi somya manaḥ āpaḥ mayaḥ prāṇaḥ tejaḥ mayī vāc iti evaṃjātīyakam
vyapadeśaḥ pi kvacid bhūtānām karaṇānām ca brāhmaṇa parivrājaka nyāyena netavyaḥ
atha tu abhautikāni karaṇāni tathā api bhūta utpatti kramaḥ na karaṇaiḥ viśiṣyate prathamam karaṇāni utpadyante caramam bhūtāni prathamam vā bhūtāni utpadyante caramam karaṇāni iti
ātharvaṇe tu samāmnāya krama mātram karaṇānām bhūtānām ca na tatra utpatti kramaḥ ucyate
tathā anyatra api pṛthak eva bhūta kramāt karaṇa kramaḥ āmnāyate prajāpatiḥ vai idam agre āsīt saḥ ātmānam aikṣata sa manaḥ sṛjata tat manaḥ eva āsīt tat ātmānam aikṣata tat vācam asṛjata ityādinā
tasmāt nā asti bhūta utpatti kramasya bhaṅgaḥ
carācara vyapāśrayaḥ tu syāt tad vyapadeśaḥ bhāktaḥ tad bhāva bhāvi tvāt
carācara vyapāśraya adhikaraṇam
staḥ jīvasya api utpatti pralayau jātaḥ devadattaḥ mṛtaḥ devadattaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakāt laukika vyapadeśāt jātakarma ādi saṃskāra vidhānāt ca iti syāt kasyacid bhrāntiḥ
tām apanudāmaḥ
na jīvasya utpatti pralayau staḥ śāstra phala saṃbandha upapatteḥ
śarīra anuvināśini hi jīve śarīra antara gata iṣṭa aniṣṭa prāpti parihāra arthau vidhi pratiṣedhau anarthakau syātām
śrūyate ca jīva apetam vāva kila idam mriyate na jīvaḥ mriyate iti
nanu laukikaḥ janma maraṇa vyapadeśaḥ jīvasya darśitaḥ
satyam darśitaḥ
bhāktaḥ tu eṣa jīvasya janma maraṇa vyapadeśaḥ
kimāśrayaḥ punar ayam mukhyaḥ yad apekṣayā bhāktaḥ iti
ucyate carācara vyapāśrayaḥ
sthāvara jaṅgama śarīra viṣayau janma maraṇa śabdau
sthāvara jaṅgamāni hi bhūtāni jāyante ca mriyante ca
atas tad viṣayau janma maraṇa śabdau mukhyau santau tad sthe jīvātmani upacaryete tad bhāva bhāvi tvāt śarīra prādurbhāva tirobhāvayoḥ hi satoḥ janma maraṇa śabdau bhavataḥ na asatoḥ
na hi śarīra saṃbandhāt anyatra jīvaḥ jātaḥ mṛtaḥ vā kenacid lakṣyate
sa vai ayam puruṣaḥ jāyamānaḥ śarīram abhisaṃpadyamānaḥ saḥ utkrāman mriyamāṇaḥ iti ca śarīra saṃyoga viyoga nimittau eva janma maraṇa śabdau darśayati
jātakarma ādi vidhānam api deha prādurbhāva apekṣam eva draṣṭavyam abhāvāt jīva prādurbhāvasya
jīvasya parasmāt ātmanaḥ utpattiḥ viyat ādīnām iva asti na asti vā iti etat uttareṇa sūtreṇa vakṣyati
deha āśrayau tāvat jīvasya sthūlau utpatti pralayau na staḥ iti etat anena sūtreṇa avocat
na ātmā śruteḥ nitya tvāt ca tābhyaḥ
ātma adhikaraṇam
asti ātmā jīva ākhyaḥ śarīra indriya pañjara adhyakṣaḥ karma phala saṃbandhī
sa kim vyoma ādi vat utpadyate brahmaṇaḥ āhosvit brahma vat eva na utpadyate iti śruti vipratipatteḥ viśayaḥ
kāsucid śrutiṣu agni visphuliṅga ādi nidarśanaiḥ rjīvātmanaḥ parasmāt brahmaṇaḥ utpattiḥ āmnāyate
kāsucid tu avikṛtasya eva parasya brahmaṇaḥ kārya praveśena jīva bhāvaḥ vijñāyate na ca utpattiḥ āmnāyate iti
tatra prāptam tāvat utpadyate jīvaḥ iti
kutas
pratijñā an uparodhāt eva
ekasmin vidite sarvam idam viditam iti iyam pratijñā sarvasya vastu jātasya brahma prabhava tve sati nā uparudhyeta tattva antara tve tu jīvasya pratijñā iyam uparudhyeta
na ca avikṛtaḥ paramātmā eva jīvaḥ iti śakyate vijñātum lakṣaṇa bhedāt apahata pāpma tva ādi dharmakaḥ hi paramātmā tad viparītaḥ hi jīvaḥ
vibhāgāt ca asya vikāra tva siddhiḥ yāvān hi ākāśa ādiḥ pravibhaktaḥ sa sarvaḥ vikāraḥ
tasya ca ākāśa ādeḥ utpattiḥ samadhigatā
jīvātmā api puṇya apuṇya karmā sukha duḥkha yuj pratiśarīram pravibhaktaḥ iti tasya api prapañca utpatti avasare utpattiḥ bhavitum arhati
api ca yathā agneḥ kṣudrāḥ visphuliṅgāḥ vyuccaranti evam eva asmāt ātmanaḥ sarve prāṇāḥ iti prāṇa ādeḥ bhogya jātasya sṛṣṭim śiṣṭvā sarve ete ātmānaḥ vyuccaranti iti bhoktṛṇām ātmanām pṛthak sṛṣṭim śāsti
yathā su dīptāt pāvakāt visphuliṅgāḥ sahasraśas prabhavante sarūpāḥ
tathā akṣarāt vividhāḥ somya bhāvāḥ prajāyante tatra ca eva apiyanti iti ca jīvātmanām utpatti pralayau ucyete sarūpa vacanāt jīvātmānaḥ hi paramātmanā sarūpāḥ bhavanti caitanya yogāt
na ca kvacid aśravaṇam anyatra śrutam vārayitum arhati śruti antara gatasya api aviruddhasya adhikasya arthasya sarvatra upasaṃhartavya tvāt
praveśa śrutiḥ api evam sati vikāra bhāva āpattyā eva vyākhyātavyā tat ātmānam svayam akuruta ityādi vat
tasmāt utpadyate jīvaḥ iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ na ātmā jīvaḥ utpadyate iti
kasmāt
aśruteḥ
na hi asya utpatti prakaraṇe śravaṇam asti bhūyaḥsu pradeśeṣu
nanu kvacid aśravaṇam anyatra śrutam na vārayati iti uktam
satyam uktam
utpattiḥ eva tu asya na saṃbhavati iti vadāmaḥ
kasmāt
nitya tvāt ca tābhyaḥ ca śabdāt aja tva ādibhyaḥ ca nitya tvam hi asya śrutibhyaḥ vagamyate tathā aja tvam avikāri tvam avikṛtasya eva brahmaṇaḥ jīva ātmanā avasthānam brahma ātmanā ca iti
na ca evaṃrūpasya utpattiḥ upapadyate
tāḥ kāḥ śrutayaḥ
na jīvaḥ mriyate sa vai eṣa mahān ajaḥ ātmā ajaraḥ maraḥ mṛtaḥ bhayaḥ brahma na jāyate mriyate vā vipaścit ajaḥ nityaḥ śāśvataḥ yam purāṇaḥ tat sṛṣṭvā tat eva anuprāviśat anena jīvena ātmanā anupraviśya nāma rūpe vyākaravāṇi saḥ eṣaḥ iha praviṣṭaḥ ā nakha agrebhyaḥ tat tvam asi aham brahma asmi ayam ātmā brahma sarva anubhūḥ iti evamādyāḥ nitya tva vādinyaḥ satyaḥ jīvasya utpattim pratibadhnanti
nanu pravibhakta tvāt vikāraḥ vikāra tvāt ca utpadyate iti uktam
atra ucyate na asya pravibhāgaḥ svatas sti ekaḥ devaḥ sarva bhūteṣu gūḍhaḥ sarva vyāpī sarva bhūta antarātmā iti śruteḥ
buddhi ādi upādhi nimittam tu asya pravibhāga pratibhānam ākāśasya iva ghaṭa ādi saṃbandha nimittam
tathā ca śāstram sa vai ayam ātmā brahma vijñāna mayaḥ manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa mayaḥ cakṣuḥ mayaḥ śrotra mayaḥ iti evamādi brahmaṇaḥ eva avikṛtasya sataḥ sya ekasya aneka buddhi ādi maya tvam darśayati
tad maya tvam ca asya tad vivikta svarūpa anabhivyaktyā tad uparakta svarūpa tvam strī mayaḥ jālmaḥ ityādi vat draṣṭavyam
yat api kvacid asya utpatti pralaya śravaṇam tat api atas eva upādhi saṃbandhāt netavyam upādhi utpattyā asya utpattiḥ tad pralayena ca pralayaḥ iti
tathā ca darśayati prajñāna ghanaḥ eva etebhyaḥ bhūtebhyaḥ samutthāya tāni eva anu vinaśyati na pretya saṃjñā asti iti
tathā upādhi pralayaḥ eva ayam na ātma vilayaḥ iti etat api atra eva mā bhagavān moha antam āpīpadat na vai aham imam vijānāmi na pretya saṃjñā asti iti praśna pūrvakam pratipādayati na vai are ham moham bravīmi avināśī vai are yam ātmā an ucchitti dharmā mātrā saṃsargaḥ tu asya bhavati iti
pratijñā an uparodhaḥ pi avikṛtasya eva brahmaṇaḥ jīva bhāva abhyupagamāt
lakṣaṇa bhedaḥ pi anayoḥ upādhi nimittaḥ eva atas ūrdhvam vimokṣāya eva brūhi iti ca prakṛtasya eva vijñāna mayasya ātmanaḥ sarva saṃsāra dharma pratyākhyānena paramātma bhāva pratipādanāt
tasmāt na eva ātmā utpadyate pravilīyate ca iti
jñaḥ taḥ eva
jñā adhikaraṇam
sa kim kāṇabhujānām iva āgantuka caitanyaḥ svatas cetanaḥ āhosvit sāṃkhyānām iva nitya caitanya svarūpaḥ eva iti vādi vipratipatteḥ saṃśayaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam
āgantukam ātmanaḥ caitanyam ātma manaḥ saṃyoga jam agni ghaṭa saṃyoga ja rohita ādi guṇavat iti prāptam
nitya caitanya tve hi supta mūrchita graha āviṣṭānām api caitanyam syāt
te pṛṣṭāḥ santaḥ na kiṃcid vayam cetayemahi iti jalpanti
svasthāḥ ca cetayamānāḥ dṛśyante
atas kādācitka caitanya tvāt āgantuka caitanyaḥ ātmā iti
evam prāpte abhidhīyate jñaḥ nitya caitanyaḥ yam ātmā atas eva yasmāt eva na utpadyate param eva brahma avikṛtam upādhi saṃparkāt jīva bhāvena avatiṣṭhate
parasya hi brahmaṇaḥ caitanya svarūpa tvam āmnātam vijñānam ānandam brahma satyam jñānam anantam brahma anantaraḥ bāhyaḥ kṛtsnaḥ prajñāna ghanaḥ eva ityādiṣu śrutiṣu
tat eva ced param brahma jīvaḥ tasmāt jīvasya api nitya caitanya svarūpa tvam agni auṣṇya prakāśa vat iti gamyate
vijñāna maya prakriyāyām ca śrutayaḥ bhavanti a suptaḥ suptān abhicākaśīti atra ayam puruṣaḥ svayam jyotiḥ bhavati iti na hi vijñātuḥ vijñāteḥ viparilopaḥ vidyate iti evaṃrūpāḥ
atha yaḥ veda idam jighrāṇi iti saḥ ātmā iti ca sarvaiḥ karaṇa dvāraiḥ idam veda idam veda iti vijñānena anusaṃdhānāt tad rūpa tva siddhiḥ
nitya caitanya svarūpa tve ghrāṇa ādi ānarthakyam iti ced na gandha ādi viṣaya viśeṣa pariccheda ārthatvāt
tathā hi darśayati gandhāya ghrāṇam ityādi
yat tu supta ādayaḥ na cetayante iti tasya śrutyā eva parihāraḥ bhihitaḥ suṣuptam prakṛtya yat vai tat na paśyati paśyan vai tat na paśyati
na hi draṣṭuḥ dṛṣṭeḥ viparilopaḥ vidyate vināśi tvāt
na tu tad dvitīyam asti tatas yat paśyet ityādinā
etat uktam bhavati viṣaya abhāvāt iyam acetayamānatā na caitanya abhāvāt iti yathā viyat āśrayasya prakāśasya prakāśya abhāvāt anabhivyaktiḥ na svarūpa abhāvāt tadvat
vaiśeṣika ādi tarkaḥ ca śruti virodhaḥ ābhāsībhavati
tasmāt nitya caitanya svarūpaḥ eva ātmā iti niścinumaḥ
utkrānti gati āgatīnām
utkrānti gati adhikaraṇam
idānīm tu kiṃparimāṇaḥ jīvaḥ iti cintyate kim aṇu parimāṇaḥ uta madhyama parimāṇaḥ āhosvit mahā parimāṇaḥ iti
nanu ca na ātmā utpadyate nitya caitanyaḥ ca ayam iti uktam
atas ca paraḥ eva ātmā jīvaḥ iti āpatati
parasya ca ātmanaḥ nanta tvam āmnātam
tatra kutas jīvasya parimāṇa cintā avatāraḥ iti
ucyate satyam etat
utkrānti gati āgati śravaṇāni tu jīvasya paricchedam prāpayanti
sva śabdena ca asya kvacid aṇu parimāṇa tvam āmnāyate
tasya sarvasya an ākula tva upapādanāya ayam ārambhaḥ
tatra prāptam tāvat utkrānti gati āgatīnām śravaṇāt paricchinnaḥ ṇu parimāṇaḥ jīvaḥ iti
utkrāntiḥ tāvat sa yadā asmāt śarīrāt utkrāmati saha eva etaiḥ sarvaiḥ utkrāmati iti
gatiḥ api ye vai ke ca asmāt lokāt prayanti candramasam eva te sarve gacchanti iti
āgatiḥ api tasmāt lokāt punar aiti asmai lokāya karmaṇe iti
āsām utkrānti gatyāgatīnām śravaṇāt paricchinnaḥ tāvat jīvaḥ iti prāpnoti na hi vibhoḥ calanam avakalpate iti
sati paricchede śarīra parimāṇa tvasya ārhata parīkṣāyām nirasta tvāt aṇuḥ ātmā iti gamyate
sva ātmanā ca uttarayoḥ
utkrāntiḥ grāma svāmya nivṛtti vat deha svāmya nivṛttyā karma kṣayeṇa avakalpeta
uttare tu gati āgatī na acalataḥ saṃbhavataḥ
sva ātmanā hi tayoḥ saṃbandhaḥ bhavati gameḥ kartṛ stha kriyā tvāt
amadhyama parimāṇasya ca gati āgatī aṇu tve eva saṃbhavataḥ
satyoḥ ca gati āgatyoḥ utkrāntiḥ api apasṛptiḥ eva dehāt iti pratīyate
na hi an apasṛptasya dehāt gati āgatī syātām deha pradeśānām ca utkrāntau apādāna tva vacanāt cakṣuṣṭas vā mūrdhnaḥ vā anyebhyaḥ vā śaḥ īra deśebhyaḥ iti
saḥ etāḥ tejaḥ mātrāḥ samabhyādadānaḥ hṛdayam eva anvavakrāmati śukram ādāya punar aiti sthānam iti ca antare śarīre śārīrasya gati āgatī bhavataḥ
tasmāt api asya aṇu tv
text2:
ūḍhaḥ tatas krameṇa avarohati iti api ca dṛśyate mṛdaḥ jātam ghaṭa śarāva ādi apyaya kāle
mṛd bhāvam apyeti adbhyaḥ ca jātam himakaraka ādi ap bhāvam apyeti iti atas ca upapadyate etat yat pṛthivī adbhyaḥ jātā satī sthiti kāla vyatikrātau apaḥ apīyāt āpaḥ ca tejasaḥ jātāḥ satyaḥ tejaḥ apīyuḥ
evam krameṇa sūkṣmam sūkṣmataram ca kāraṇam apītya sarvam kārya jātam parama kāraṇam parama sūkṣmam ca brahma apyeti iti veditavyam a hi sva kāraṇa vyatikrameṇa kāraṇa kāraṇe kārya apyayaḥ yāyyaḥ
smṛtau api utpatti krama viparyayeṇa eva apyaya kramaḥ tatra tatra darśitaḥ jagat pratiṣṭhā deva ṛṣe pṛthivī apsu pralīyate jyotiṣi āpaḥ pralīyate jyotiḥ vāyau pralīyate iti evamādau utpatti kramaḥ tu utpattau eva bhavitum arhati a ca asau ayogya tvāt apyaye ākāṅkṣyate
a hi kārye dhriyamāṇe kāraṇasya apyayaḥ yuktaḥ kāraṇa apyaye kāryasya avasthā a upapatteḥ kārya apyaye tu kāraṇasya avasthā yuktam mṛd ādiṣu evam dṛṣṭa tvāt atarā vijñāamaasī krameṇa tad liṅgāt iti ca iā aviśeṣāt
bhūtāām utpatti pralayau auloma pratiloma kramābhyām bhavataḥ iti uktam ātma ādiḥ utpattiḥ pralayaḥ ca ātmā atas iti api uktam sa idriyasya tu maasaḥ buddheḥ ca sadbhāvaḥ prasiddhaḥ śruti smṛtyoḥ buddhim tu sārathim viddhi maaḥ pragraham eva ca
idriyāṇi ityādi liṅgebhyaḥ tayoḥ api kasmiṃścid atarāle krameṇa utpatti pralayau upasaṃgrāhyau sarvasya vastu jātasya brahma ja tva abhyupagamāt api ca ātharvaṇe utpatti prakaraṇe etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ sarva idriyāṇi ca
kham vāyuḥ jyotiḥ āpaḥ pṛthivī viśvasya dhāriṇī iti tasmāt pūrva ukta utpatti pralaya krama bhaṅga prasaṅgaḥ bhūtāām iti ced a aviśeṣāt yadi tāvat bhautikāi karaṇāi tatas bhūta utpatti pralayābhyām eva eṣām utpatti pralayau bhavataḥ iti ā etayoḥ
mṛgyam bhavati ca bhautika tve liṅgam karaṇāām hi somya āpaḥ mayaḥ prāṇaḥ tejaḥ mayī vāc iti evaṃjātīyakam vyapadeśaḥ api kvacid bhūtāām karaṇāām ca etavyaḥ
atha tu abhautikāi karaṇāi tathā api bhūta utpatti kramaḥ karaṇaiḥ viśiṣyate prathamam karaṇāt utpadyate caramam bhūta prathamam vā bhūtāt utpadyate caramam karaṇāi iti ātharvaṇe tu
bhūtāām ca tatra utpatti kramaḥ ucyate tathā pṛthak eva bhūta kramāt karaṇa kramaḥ prajāpatiḥ vai idam agre āsīt saḥ ātmā amaikṣata sa maosṛjata tamaḥ eva āsīt tat ātmā amaikṣata tat vācam asṛjata ityādi
tasmāt asti bhūta utpatti kramasya bhaṅgaḥ carācara vyapāśrayaḥ tu syāt tad vyapadeśaḥ bhāktaḥ tad bhāva bhāvi tvāt carācara vyapāśraya adhikaraṇam staḥ jīvasya api utpatti pralayau jātaḥ devadattaḥ mṛtaḥ devadattaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakāt laukika vyapadeśāt jātakarma ādi saṃskāra vidhāāt ca iti syāt kasyacid bhrātiḥ tāmapaudāmaḥ a jīvasya utpatti pralayau
staḥ hi jīve hi jīve śarīra atara gata iṣṭa a iṣṭa prāpti parihāra arthau vidhi pratiṣedhau aarthakau syātām śrūyate ca jīva apetam vāva kila idam mriyate a jīvaḥ mriyate iti
jama maraṇa vyapadeśaḥ jīvasya darśitaḥ satyam darśitaḥ bhāktaḥ tu eṣa jīvasya jama maraṇa vyapadeśaḥ kimāśrayaḥ mukhyaḥ yad apekṣayā bhāktaḥ iti ucyate carācara vyapāśrayaḥ sthāvara jaṅgama śarīra viṣayau jama maraṇa śabdau hi
bhūta āi jāyate ca mriyate ca atas tad viṣayau jama maraṇa śabdau mukhyau satau tad sthe jīva ātmayupacaryete tad bhāva bhāvi tvāt śarīra prādurbhāva tirobhāvayoḥ hi satoḥ jama maraṇa śabdau bhavataḥ āsatoḥ hi
jātaḥ mṛtaḥ vā kecid lakṣyate sa vai ayam puruṣaḥ jāyamāaḥ śarīram abhisaṃpadyamāaḥ saḥ utkrāma mriyamāṇaḥ iti ca śarīra saṃyoga viyoga aimittau eva jama maraṇa śabdau darśayati jātakarma ādi vidhāam api deha prādurbhāva apekṣam eva
draṣṭavyam abhāvāt jīva prādurbhāvasya jīvasya parasmāt ātmā utpattiḥ viyat ādīām iva asti āsti vā iti etat uttareṇa sūtreṇa vakṣyati deha āśrayau tāvat jīvasya sthūlau utpatti pralayau staḥ iti etad aea sūtreṇa avocat ātma a śruteḥ iti atvāt ca tābhyaḥ ātma adhikaraṇam asti ātmā
jīva ākhyaḥ śarīra idriya pañjara adhyakṣaḥ karma phala saṃbadhī sa kim vyoma ādi vat utpadyate brahmaṇaḥ āhosvit brahma vat eva ā utpadyate iti śruti vipratipatteḥ viśayaḥ kāsucid śrutiṣu parasmāt brahmaṇaḥ utpattiḥ āmāyate kāsucid tu avikṛtasya eva
parasya brahmaṇaḥ jīva bhāvaḥ vijñāyate a ca utpattiḥ āmāyate iti tatra prāptam tāvat utpadyate jīvaḥ iti kutas pratijñā uparodhāt eva
iti iyam pratijñā sarvasya vastu jātasya brahma prabhava tve sati oparudhyeta tattva atara tve tu jīvasya pratijñā iyam uparudhyeta a ca a vikṛtaḥ paramātmā eva jīvaḥ iti śakyate vijñātum lakṣaṇa bhedāt
apahata pāpma tva ādi dharmakaḥ hi paramātmā tad viparītaḥ hi jīvaḥ vibhāgāt ca asya vikāra tva siddhiḥ yāvā hi ākāśa ādiḥ pravibhaktaḥ sa sarvaḥ vikāraḥ tasya ca ākāśa ādeḥ utpattiḥ samadhigatā jīvātmā api
puṇya apuṇya karmā sukha duḥkha yuj pratiśarīram pravibhaktaḥ iti tasya api prapañca utpatti avasare utpattiḥ bhavitum arhati api ca yathā āgeḥ kṣudrāḥ visphuliṅgāḥ vyuccarati evam eva asmāt ātmanaḥ sarve prāṇāḥ iti prāṇa ādeḥ bhogya jātasya sṛṣṭim śiṣṭvā
sarve ete vyuccarati iti bhoktṛṇām ātma pṛthak sṛṣṭim śāsti yathā su dīptāt pāvakāt visphuliṅgāḥ sahasraśas prabhavate sarūpāḥ tathā akṣarāt vividhāḥ somya bhāvāḥ prajāyate tatra ca eva apiyati iti
ca utpatti pralayau ucyete sarūpa vacaāt hi bhavati caitaya yogāt ca kvacid aśravaṇam ayatra śrutam vārayitum arhati śruti atara gatasya api aviruddhasya adhikasya arthasya sarvatra upasaṃhartavya tvāt praveśa śrutiḥ api evam sati vikāra bhāva āpattyā eva vyākhyātavyā
tadā ātmā aam svayam akuruta ityādi vat tasmāt utpadyate jīvaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ātmā jīvaḥ utpadyate iti kasmāt aśruteḥ a hi asya utpatti prakaraṇe śravaṇam asti bhūyaḥsu pradeśeṣu
kvacid aśravaṇam ayatra śrutam a vārayati iti uktam satyam uktam utpattiḥ eva tvasya a saṃbhavati iti vadāmaḥ kasmāt itya tvāt ca tābhyaḥ caśabdāt aja tva ādibhyaḥ ca itya tvam hi asya śrutibhyaḥ uvagamyate tathā aja tvam
avikāri tvam avikṛtasya eva brahmaṇaḥ ca iti ca evaṃrūpasya utpattiḥ upapadyate tāḥ kāḥ śrutayaḥ jīvaḥ mriyate sa vai eṣa mahā ajaḥ ātmā ajaroma romṛta ubhayaḥ brahma
a jāyate mriyate vā vipaścit ajaḥ ityaḥ śāśvataḥ yam purāṇaḥ tat sṛṣṭvā tat eva auprāviśat āma rūpe vyākaravāṇi saḥ eṣaḥ iha praviṣṭaḥ ā
akha agrebhyaḥ tat tvam asi aham brahma asmi ayam ātmā brahma sarva aubhūḥ iti evamādyāḥ satyaḥ jīvasya utpattim pratibadhati pravibhakta tvāt vikāraḥ vikāra tvāt ca utpadyate iti uktam atra ucyate pravibhāgaḥ svatas sti
ekaḥ devaḥ sarva bhūteṣu gūḍhaḥ sarva vyāpī sarva bhūta atarātmā iti śruteḥ buddhi ādi upādhi nimittam tu asya ākāśasya iva tathā ca śāstram sa vai ayam ātmā
brahma vijñāa mayaḥ mao mayaḥ prāṇa mayaḥ cakṣuḥ mayaḥ śrotra mayaḥ iti evamādi brahmaṇaḥ eva avikṛtasya sataḥ asya ekasya a eka buddhi ādi maya tvam darśayati tamaya tvam ca asya tad vivikta svarūpa abhivyaktyā tad uparakta svarūpa tvam strī mayaḥ jālmaḥ ityādi vat draṣṭavyam yat api
kvacid asya utpatti pralaya śravaṇam tat api atas upādhi utpattyā asya utpattiḥ ca pralayaḥ iti tathā ca darśayati eva etebhyaḥ bhūtebhyaḥ samutthāya a pretya
saṃjñā asti iti tathā upādhi pralaye eva ayam ātma vilayaḥ iti etat api atra eva mā vā aham imam vijāāmi a pretya saṃjñā asti iti praśa pūrvakam pratipādayati a vā
are ham moham bravīmi aviāśī vai are iyam ātmā a ucchitti dharmā mātrā saṃsargaḥ tu asya bhavati iti pratijñā uparodhaḥ upi avikṛtasya eva brahmaṇaḥ jīva bhāva abhyupagamāt lakṣaṇa bhedaḥ upi a yoḥ upādhi imitte eva atas ūrdhvam vimokṣāya eva brūhi iti ca prakṛtasya eva
sarva saṃsāra dharma pratyākhyāea paramātma bhāva pratipādaāt tasmāt eva ātmā utpadyate pravilīyate ca iti jñā utaḥ eva jñā adhikaraṇam sa kim āhosvit sāṃkhya iva iti acaitaya svarūpaḥ eva iti vādi vipratipatteḥ saṃśayaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam āgatukam ātma aścaitayam ātma maaḥ saṃyoga jam agi ghaṭa saṃyoga ja rohita ādi guṇavat iti prāptam iti acaitaya tve hi supta mūrchita graha āviṣṭāām api caitayam syāt te pṛṣṭāḥ sataḥ a kiṃcid vayam cetayemahi iti jalpati svasthāḥ ca cetayamānāḥ
dṛśyate atas kādācitka caitaya tvāt āgatuka caitayaḥ ātmā iti evam prāpte abhidhīyate jñaḥ iti a caitayaḥ yam ātmā atas eva yasmāt eva otpadyate param eva brahma avikṛtam upādhi saṃparkāt jīva bhāve avatiṣṭhate parasya hi brahmaṇaḥ caitaya svarūpa tvam āmātam
brahma satyam jñāamaatam brahma kṛtsaḥ eva ityādiṣu śrutiṣu tat eva ced param brahma jīvaḥ tasmāt jīvasya api gamyate vijñā amaya prakriyāyām ca śrutayaḥ
bhavati a suptaḥ supta a abhicākaśīti atra ayam puruṣaḥ svayam jyotiḥ bhavati iti a hi vijñātuḥ vijñāteḥ viparilopaḥ vidyate iti evaṃrūpāḥ atha yaḥ veda idam jighrāṇi iti saḥ ātmā iti ca
sarvaiḥ karaṇa dvāraiḥ idam veda idam veda iti tad rūpa tva siddhiḥ iti acaitaya svarūpa tve ghrāṇa ādi āarthakyam iti ced a gadha ādi viṣaya viśeṣa pariccheda artha tvāt tathā hi darśayati gadhāya ghrāṇam ityādi
yat tu supta ādayaḥ cetayataḥ iti tasya śrutyā eva parihāraḥ abhihitaḥ suṣuptam prakṛtya yat vai paśyati hi draṣṭuḥ dṛṣṭeḥ viparilopaḥ
a tu tat dvitīyam asti tatas yat vibhaktam yat paśyet ityādiā etat uktam bhavati viṣaya abhāvāt iyam acetayamāatā a caitayābhāvāt iti yathā viyat āśrayasya prakāśasya prakāśya abhāvāt a abhivyaktiḥ a svarūpa abhāvāt tadvat vaiśeṣika ādi tarkaḥ ca śruti virodha
ābhāsībhavati eva ātmā iti utkrātigati adhikaraṇam idāīm tu kiṃparimāṇaḥ jīvaḥ iti cityate kim aṇu parimāṇaḥ uta madhyama parimāṇaḥ āhosvit mahā parimāṇaḥ iti
ca ātmā utpadyate ca ayam iti uktam atas ca paraḥ eva ātmā jīvaḥ iti āpatati parasya ca tatra kutas
jīvasya parimāṇa citā avatāraḥ iti ucyate satyam etat tu jīvasya paricchedam prāpayati ca asya kvacid aṇu parimāṇa tvam tasya sarvasya ākula tva upapāda ayam ārambhaḥ
tatra prāptam tāvat śravaṇāt jīvaḥ iti utkrātiḥ tāvat sa yadā asmāt śarīrāt utkrāmati saha eva etaiḥ sarvaiḥ utkrāmati iti gatiḥ api
ye vai ke ca asmāt lokāt prayati ca cadramasam eva te sarve gacchati iti āgatiḥ api tasmāt lokāt puar aiti asmai lokāya
karmaṇe iti āsām śravaṇāt tāvat jīvaḥ iti hi vibhoḥ aṇuḥ
ātmā iti gamyate sva ātma ā ca uttarayoḥ utkrātiḥ kadācid acalataḥ api grāma svāmi aivṛtti vat deha svāmi aivṛttyā karma kṣayeṇa avakalpeta uttare tu gati āgatī ācalataḥ saṃbhavataḥ sva ātma ā hi tayoḥ bhavati gameḥ
kartṛ stha kriyā tvāt amadhyama parimāṇasya ca gati āgatī aṇu tve eva saṃbhavataḥ satyoḥ ca gati āgatyoḥ utkrātiḥ api apasṛptiḥ eva dehāt iti pratīyate hi dehāt gati āgatī syātām deha pradeśāām ca utkrātau cakṣuṣṭoma
vā mūrdhaḥ vāyebhyaḥ vā śaīra deśebhyaḥ iti saḥ etāḥ tejaḥ mātrāḥ samabhyādadai hṛdayam eva avavakrāmati śukram ādāya puaraiti iti ca atare api śarīre śārīrasya gati āgatī bhavataḥ tasmāt api asya aṇu tv

text1:
cakṣuṣṭas vā mūrdhnaḥ vā anyebhyaḥ vā śaḥ īra deśebhyaḥ iti
saḥ etāḥ tejaḥ mātrāḥ samabhyādadānaḥ hṛdayam eva anvavakrāmati śukram ādāya punar aiti sthānam iti ca antare śarīre śārīrasya gati āgatī bhavataḥ
tasmāt api asya aṇu tva siddhiḥ
na aṇuḥ a tad śruteḥ iti ced na itara adhikārāt
atha api syāt na aṇuḥ ayam ātmā
kasmāt
a tad śruteḥ
aṇu tva viparīta parimāṇa śravaṇāt iti arthaḥ
sa vai eṣa mahān ajaḥ ātmā yaḥ yam vijñāna mayaḥ prāṇeṣu ākāśa vat sarva gataḥ ca nityaḥ satyam jñānam anantam brahma iti evaṃjātīyakā hi śrutiḥ ātmanaḥ ṇu tve vipratiṣidhyeta iti ced na eṣa doṣaḥ
kasmāt
itara adhikārāt parasya hi ātmanaḥ prakriyāyām eṣā parimāṇa antara śrutiḥ parasya eva ātmanaḥ prādhānyena vedānteṣu veditavya tvena prakṛta tvāt virajaḥ paras ākāśāt iti evaṃvidhāt ca parasya eva ātmanaḥ tatra tatra viśeṣa adhikārāt
nanu yaḥ yam vijñāna mayaḥ prāṇeṣu iti śārīre eva mahat tva saṃbandhi tvena pratinirdiśyate śāstra dṛṣṭyā tu eṣa nirdeśaḥ vāmadeva vat draṣṭavyaḥ
tasmāt prājña viṣaya tvāt parimāṇa antara śravaṇasya na jīvasya aṇu tvam virudhyate
sva śabda unmānābhyām ca
itas ca aṇuḥ ātmā yatas sākṣāt eva asya aṇu tva vācī śabdaḥ śrūyate eṣaḥ ṇuḥ ātmā cetasā veditavyaḥ yasmin prāṇaḥ pañcadhā saṃviveśa iti
prāṇa saṃbandhāt ca jīvaḥ eva ayam aṇuḥ abhihitaḥ iti gamyate
tathā unmānam api jīvasya aṇimānam gamayati vāla agra śata bhāgasya śatadhā kalpitasya ca
bhāgaḥ jīvaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ iti
ārā agra mātraḥ dṛṣṭaḥ iti ca unmāna antaram
nanu aṇu tve sati eka deśa sthasya sakala deha gata upalabdhiḥ virudhyate
dṛśyate ca jāhnavī hrada nimagnānām sarva aṅga śaitya upalabdhiḥ nidāgha samaye ca sakala śarīra paritāpa upalabdhiḥ iti atas uttaram paṭhati
avirodhaḥ candana vat
yathā hi haricandana binduḥ śarīra eka deśa saṃbaddhaḥ san sakala deha vyāpinam āhlādam karoti evam ātmā api deha eka deśa sthaḥ sakala deha vyāpinīm upalabdhim kariṣyati
tvak saṃbandhāt ca asya sakala śarīra gatā vedanā na virudhyate
tvac ātmanoḥ hi saṃbandhaḥ kṛtsnāyām tvaci vartate
tvac ca kṛtsna śarīra vyāpinī iti
avasthiti vaiśeṣyāt iti ced nā abhyupagamāt hṛdi hi
atra āha yat uktam avirodhaḥ candana vat iti tat ayuktam dṛṣṭānta dārṣṭāntikayoḥ atulya tvāt
siddhe hi ātmanaḥ deha eka deśa stha tve candana dṛṣṭāntaḥ bhavati pratyakṣam tu candanasya avasthiti vaiśeṣyam eka deśa stha tvam sakala deha āhlādanam ca
ātmanaḥ punar sakala deha upalabdhi mātram pratyakṣam na eka deśa varti tvam
anumeyam tu tat iti yat api ucyeta na ca atra anumānam saṃbhavati kim ātmanaḥ sakala śarīra gatā vedanā tvac indriyasya iva sakala deha vyāpinaḥ sataḥ kim vā vibhoḥ nabhasaḥ iva āhosvit candana bindoḥ iva aṇoḥ eka deśa sthasya iti saṃśaya anativṛtteḥ iti
atra ucyate na ayam doṣaḥ
kasmāt
abhyupagamāt
abhyupagamyate hi candanasya iva deha eka deśa vṛtti tvam avasthiti vaiśeṣyam
katham iti ucyate hṛdi hi eṣaḥ ātmā paṭhyate vedānteṣu hṛdi hi eṣaḥ ātmā sa vai eṣaḥ ātmā hṛdi katamaḥ ātmā iti yaḥ yam vijñāna mayaḥ prāṇeṣu hṛdi antar jyotiḥ puruṣaḥ ityādi upadeśebhyaḥ
tasmāt dṛṣṭānta dārṣṭāntikayoḥ avaiṣamyāt yuktam eva etat avirodhaḥ candana vat iti
guṇāt vā loka vat
caitanya guṇa vyāpteḥ vā aṇoḥ api sataḥ jīvasya sakala deha vyāpi kāryam na virudhyate yathā loke maṇi pradīpa prabhṛtīnām apavaraka eka deśa vartinām api prabhā apavaraka vyāpinī satī kṛtsne pavarake kāryam karoti tadvat
syāt kadācid candanasya sāvayava tvāt sūkṣma avayava visarpaṇena api sakala dehe āhlādayitṛ tvam
na tu aṇoḥ jīvasya avayavāḥ santi yaiḥ ayam sakala deham visarpet iti āśaṅkya guṇāt vā loka vat iti uktam
katham punar guṇaḥ guṇi vyatirekeṇa anyatra varteta
na hi paṭasya śuklaḥ guṇaḥ paṭa vyatirekeṇa anyatra vartamānaḥ dṛśyate
pradīpa prabhā vat bhavet iti ced na
tasyāḥ api dravya tva abhyupagamāt nibiḍa avayavam hi tejaḥ dravyam pradīpaḥ pravirala avayavam tu tejaḥ dravyam eva prabhā iti atas uttaram paṭhati
vyatirekaḥ gandha vat
yathā guṇasya api sataḥ gandhasya gandhavat dravya vyatirekeṇa vṛttiḥ bhavati aprāpteṣu api kusuma ādiṣu gandhavatsu kusuma gandha upalabdheḥ
evam aṇoḥ api sataḥ jīvasya caitanya guṇa vyatirekaḥ bhaviṣyati
atas ca anaikāntikam etat guṇa tvāt rūpa ādi vat āśraya viśleṣa anupapattiḥ iti guṇasya eva sataḥ gandhasya āśraya viśleṣa darśanāt
gandhasya api saha eva āśrayeṇa viśleṣaḥ iti ced na
yasmāt mūla dravyāt viśleṣaḥ tasya kṣaya prasaṅgāt
a kṣīyamāṇam api tat pūrva avasthātaḥ gamyate
anyathā tad pūrva avasthaiḥ guru tva ādibhiḥ hīyeta
syāt etat gandha āśrayāṇām viśliṣṭānām avayavānām alpa tvāt san api viśleṣaḥ na upalakṣyate
sūkṣmāḥ hi gandha paramāṇavaḥ sarvatas viprasṛtāḥ gandha buddhim utpādayanti nāsikāpuṭam anupraviśantaḥ iti ced na
atīndriya tvāt paramāṇūnām sphuṭa gandha upalabdheḥ ca nāgakesara ādiṣu
na ca loke pratītiḥ gandhavat dravyam āghrātam iti
gandhaḥ eva āghrātaḥ iti tu laukikāḥ pratiyanti
rūpa ādiṣu āśraya vyatireka anupalabdheḥ gandhasya api ayuktaḥ āśraya vyatirekaḥ iti ced na
pratyakṣa tvāt anumāna apravṛtteḥ
tasmāt yat yathā loke dṛṣṭam tat tathā eva anumantavyam nirūpakaiḥ na anyathā
na hi rasaḥ guṇaḥ jihvayā upalabhyate iti atas rūpa ādayaḥ pi guṇāḥ jihvayā eva upalabhyeran iti niyantum śakyate
tathā ca darśayati
hṛdaya āyatana tvam aṇu parimāṇa tvam ca ātmanaḥ abhidhāya tasya eva ā lomabhyaḥ ā nakha agrebhyaḥ iti caitanyena guṇena samasta śarīra vyāpi tvam darśayati
pṛthak upadeśāt
prajñayā śarīram samāruhya iti ca ātma prajñayoḥ kartṛ karaṇa bhāvena pṛthak upadeśāt caitanya guṇena eva asya śarīra vyāpi tā gamyate
tat eṣām prāṇānām vijñānena vijñānam ādāya iti ca kartuḥ śārīrāt pṛthak vijñānasya upadeśaḥ etam eva abhiprāyam upodbalayati
tasmāt aṇuḥ ātmā iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ
tad guṇa sāra tvāt tu tad vyapadeśaḥ prājña vat
tu śabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati
na etat asti aṇuḥ ātmā iti
utpatti aśravaṇāt parasya eva tu brahmaṇaḥ praveśa śravaṇāt tādātmya upadeśāt ca param eva brahma jīvaḥ iti uktam
param eva ced brahma jīvaḥ tasmāt yāvat param brahma tāvān eva jīvaḥ bhavitum arhati
parasya ca brahmaṇaḥ vibhu tvam āmnātam
tasmāt vibhuḥ jīvaḥ
tathā ca sa vai eṣa mahān ajaḥ ātmā yaḥ yam vijñāna mayaḥ prāṇeṣu iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ jīva viṣayāḥ vibhu tva vādāḥ śrautāḥ smārtāḥ ca samarthitāḥ bhavanti
na ca aṇoḥ jīvasya sakala śarīra gatā vedanā upapadyate
tvak saṃbandhāt syāt iti ced na
kaṇṭaka todane sakala śarīra gatā eva vedanā prasajyeta tvac kaṇṭakayoḥ hi saṃyogaḥ kṛtsnāyām tvaci vartate tvac ca kṛtsna śarīra vyāpinī iti
pāda tale eva tu kaṇṭaka nunnaḥ vedanām pratilabhate
na ca aṇoḥ guṇa vyāptiḥ upapadyate guṇasya guṇi deśa tvāt
guṇa tvam eva hi guṇinam an āśritya guṇasya hīyeta
pradīpa prabhāyāḥ ca dravya antara tvam vyākhyātam
gandhaḥ pi guṇa tva abhyupagamāt sa āśrayaḥ eva saṃcaritum arhati anyathā guṇa tva hāni prasaṅgāt
tathā ca uktam bhagavatā dvaipāyanena upalabhya apsu ced gandham kecid brūyuḥ anaipuṇāḥ
pṛthivyām eva tam vidyāt apaḥ vāyum ca saṃśritam iti
yadi ca caitanyam jīvasya samasta śarīram vyāpnuyāt na aṇuḥ jīvaḥ syāt
caitanyam eva hi asya svarūpam agneḥ iva auṣṇya prakāśau na atra guṇa guṇi vibhāgaḥ vidyate iti
śarīra parimāṇa tvam ca pratyākhyātam
pariśeṣāt vibhuḥ jīvaḥ
katham tarhi aṇu tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ iti atas āha tad guṇa sāra tvāt tu tad vyapadeśaḥ iti
tasyāḥ buddheḥ guṇāḥ tad guṇāḥ icchā dveṣaḥ sukham duḥkham iti evamādayaḥ tad guṇāḥ sāraḥ pradhānam yasya ātmanaḥ saṃsāri tve saṃbhavati sa tad guṇa sāraḥ tasya bhāvaḥ tad guṇa sāra tvam
na hi buddheḥ guṇaiḥ vinā kevalasya ātmanaḥ saṃsāri tvam asti
buddhi upādhi dharma adhyāsa nimittam hi kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tva ādi lakṣaṇam saṃsāri tvam akartuḥ abhoktuḥ ca asaṃsāriṇaḥ nitya muktasya sataḥ ātmanaḥ
tasmāt tad guṇa sāra tvāt buddhi parimāṇena asya parimāṇa vyapadeśaḥ tad utkrānti ādibhiḥ ca asya utkrānti ādi vyapadeśaḥ na svatas
tathā ca vālāgra śata bhāgasya śatadhā kalpitasya ca
bhāgaḥ jīvaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ sa ca ānantyāya kalpate iti aṇu tvam jīvasya uktvā tasya eva punar ānantyam āha
tat ca evam eva samañjasam syāt yadi aupacārikam aṇu tvam jīvasya bhavet pāramārthikam ca ānantyam
na hi ubhayam mukhyam avakalpeta
na ca ānantyam aupacārikam iti śakyam vijñātum sarva upaniṣatsu brahma ātma bhāvasya pratipipādayiṣita tvāt
tathā itarasmin api unmāne buddheḥ guṇena ātma guṇena ca eva ārā agra mātraḥ hi avaraḥ dṛṣṭaḥ iti ca buddhi guṇa saṃbandhena eva ārā agra mātra tām śāsti na svena eva ātmanā
eṣaḥ ṇuḥ ātmā cetasā veditavyaḥ iti atra api na jīvasya aṇu parimāṇa tvam śiṣyate parasya eva ātmanaḥ cakṣuḥ ādi anavagrāhya tvena jñāna prasāda gamya tvena ca prakṛta tvāt jīvasya api ca mukhya aṇu parimāṇa tva anupapatteḥ
tasmāt durjñāna tva abhiprāyam idam aṇu tva vacanam upādhi abhiprāyam vā draṣṭavyam
tathā prajñayā śarīram samāruhya iti evaṃjātīyakeṣu api bheda upadeśeṣu buddhyā eva upādhi bhūtayā jīvaḥ śarīram samāruhya iti evam yojayitavyam vyapadeśa mātram vā śilāputrakasya śarīram ityādi vat
na hi atra guṇa guṇi vibhāgaḥ vidyate iti uktam
hṛdaya āyatana tva vacanam api buddheḥ eva tad āyatana tvāt
tathā utkrānti ādīnām api upādhyāyattatām darśayati kasmin nu aham utkrāntaḥ utkrāntaḥ bhaviṣyāmi kasmin vā pratiṣṭhite pratiṣṭhāsyāmi iti sa prāṇam asṛjata iti
utkrānti abhāve hi gati agatyoḥ api abhāvaḥ vijñāyate
na hi an apasṛptasya dehāt gatya āgatī syātām
evam upādhi guṇa sāra tvāt jīvasya aṇu tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ prājña vat
yathā prājñasya paramātmanaḥ saguṇeṣu upāsaneṣu upādhi guṇa sāra tvāt aṇīyaḥ tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ aṇīyān vrīheḥ vā yavāt vā manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ sarva gandhaḥ sarva rasaḥ satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ iti evaṃprakāraḥ tadvat
syāt etat yadi buddhi guṇa sāra tvāt ātmanaḥ saṃsāri tvam kalpyeta tatas buddhi ātmanoḥ bhinnayoḥ saṃyoga avasānam avaśyaṃbhāvi iti atas buddhi viyoge sati ātmanaḥ vibhaktasya anālakṣya tvāt asattvam asaṃsāri tvam vā prasajyeta iti atas uttaram paṭhati
yāvadātmabhāvi tvāt ca na doṣaḥ tad darśanāt
na iyam anantara nirdiṣṭa doṣa prāptiḥ āśaṅkanīyā
kasmāt
yāvat ātma bhāvi tvāt buddhi saṃyogasya yāvat ayam ātmā saṃsārī bhavati yāvat asya samyak darśanena saṃsāri tvam na nivartate tāvat asya buddhyā saṃyogaḥ na śāmyati
yāvat eva ca ayam buddhi upādhi saṃbandhaḥ tāvat eva asya jīva tvam saṃsāri tvam ca
paramārthataḥ tu na jīvaḥ nāma buddhi upādhi parikalpita svarūpa vyatirekeṇa asti
na hi nitya mukta svarūpāt sarvajñāt īśvarāt anyaḥ cetanaḥ dhātuḥ dvitīyaḥ vedānta artha nirūpaṇāyām upalabhyate sti draṣṭā śrotā mantā vijñātā na anyat atas sti draṣṭṛ śrotṛ mantṛ vijñātṛ tattvam asi aham brahma asmi ityādi śruti śatebhyaḥ
katham punar avagamyate yāvat ātma bhāvī buddhi saṃyogaḥ iti
tad darśanāt iti āha
tathā hi śāstram darśayati yaḥ yam vijñāna mayaḥ prāṇeṣu hṛdi antar jyotiḥ puruṣaḥ sa samānaḥ san ubhau lokau anusaṃcarati dhyāyati iva lelāyati iva ityādi
tatra vijñāna mayaḥ iti buddhi mayaḥ iti etat uktam bhavati pradeśa antare vijñāna mayaḥ manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa mayaḥ cakṣuḥ mayaḥ śrotra mayaḥ iti vijñāna mayasya manaḥ ādibhiḥ saha pāṭhāt
buddhi maya tvam ca tad guṇa sāra tvam eva abhipreyate yathā loke strī mayaḥ devadattaḥ iti strī rāga ādi pradhānaḥ bhidhīyate tadvat
sa samānaḥ san ubhau lokau anusaṃcarati iti ca loka antara gamane pi aviyogam buddhyā darśayati
kena samānaḥ
tayā eva buddhyā iti gamyate saṃnidhānāt
tat ca darśayati dhyāyati iva lelāyati iva iti
etat uktam bhavati na ayam svatas dhyāyati na api calati dhyāyantyām buddhau dhyāyati iva calantyām buddhau calati iva iti
api ca mithyā jñāna puraḥsaraḥ yam ātmanaḥ buddhi upādhi saṃbandhaḥ
na ca mithyājñānasya samyak jñānāt anyatra nivṛttiḥ asti iti atas yāvat brahma ātma tā anavabodhaḥ tāvat ayam buddhi upādhi saṃbandhaḥ na śāmyati
darśayati ca veda aham etam puruṣam mahāntam āditya varṇam tamasaḥ parastāt
tam eva viditvā ati mṛtyum eti na anyaḥ panthāḥ vidyate yanāyaḥ iti
nanu suṣupta pralayayoḥ na śakyate buddhi saṃbandhaḥ ātmanaḥ bhyupagantum satā somya tadā saṃpannaḥ bhavati svam api itas bhavati iti vacanāt kṛtsna vikāra pralaya abhyupagamāt ca
tat katham yāvadātmabhāvitvam buddhi saṃbandhasya iti atrā ucyate
puṃstva ādivat tvasya sataḥ abhivyakti yogāt
yathā loke puṃstva ādīni bīja ātmanā vidyamānāni eva bālya ādiṣu anupalabhyamānāni avidyamāna vat abhipreyamāṇāni yauvana ādiṣu āvirbhavanti
na avidyamānāni utpadyante ṣaṇḍa ādīnām api tad utpatti prasaṅgāt evam ayam api buddhi saṃbandhaḥ śakti ā
text2:
cakṣuṣṭoma
vā mūrdhaḥ vāyebhyaḥ vā śaīra deśebhyaḥ iti saḥ etāḥ tejaḥ mātrāḥ samabhyādadai hṛdayam eva avavakrāmati śukram ādāya puaraiti iti ca atare api śarīre śārīrasya gati āgatī bhavataḥ tasmāt api asya aṇu tva siddhiḥ
āṇuḥ a tad śruteḥ iti ced itara adhikārāt atha api syāt āṇuḥ ayam ātmā kasmāt a tad śruteḥ aṇu tva viparīta parimāṇa śravaṇāt iti arthaḥ sa vai eṣa mahā ajaḥ ātmā yaḥ yam vijñā a mayaḥ prāṇeṣu ākāśa vat sarva gataḥ ca satyam satyam
brahma iti evaṃjātīyakā hi śrutiḥ ātma oṇu tve vipratiṣidhyeta iti ced ā eṣa doṣaḥ kasmāt itara adhikārāt parasya hi ātmanaḥ prakriyāyām eṣā parimāṇa atara śrutiḥ parasya eva ātmanaḥ prādhāyea prakṛta tvāt
virajaḥ paras ākāśāt iti evaṃvidhāt ca parasya eva ātmanaḥ tatra tatra viśeṣa adhikārāt yaḥ yam vijñā a mayaḥ prāṇeṣu iti śārīre eva pratiirdiśyate śāstra dṛṣṭyā tu eṣaḥ irdeśaḥ
vāmadeva vat draṣṭavyaḥ tasmāt prājña viṣaya tvāt parimāṇa atara śravaṇasya ca itas ca aṇuḥ ātmā yatas sākṣāt eva asya aṇu tva vācī śabdaḥ śrūyate eṣa uṇuḥ ātmā cetasā veditavyaḥ yasmin prāṇaḥ pañcadhā saṃviveśa iti
jīvaḥ eva ayam aṇuḥ abhihitaḥ iti gamyate tathā umāam api jīvasya aṇimāam gamayati vāla agra śata bhāgasya śatadhā kalpitasya ca bhāgaḥ jīvaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ iti ārā agra mātraḥ hi avaraḥ api dṛṣṭaḥ iti
ca a vaṇu tve sati eka deśa sthasya sakala deha gata upalabdhiḥ virudhyate dṛśyate ca sarva aṅga śaitya upalabdhiḥ idāgha samaye ca sakala śarīra paritāpa upalabdhiḥ iti atas uttaram paṭhati avirodhaḥ cadaa vat yathā hi
śarīra eka deśa saṃbaddhaḥ api sa sakala deha vyāpiam āhlādam karoti evam ātmā api deha eka deśa sthaḥ sakala deha vyāpiīm upalabdhim kariṣyati tvac saṃbadhāt ca asya sakala śarīra gatā virudhyate tvac ātmaoḥ hi saṃbadhaḥ kṛtsāyām tvaci vartate tvac ca kṛtsa śarīra vyāpi iti
avasthiti vaiśeṣyāt iti ced abhyupagamāt hṛdi hi atra āha yat uktam avirodhaḥ cadaa vat iti tat ayuktam dṛṣṭāta dārṣṭātikayoḥ atulya tvāt siddhe hi deha eka deśa stha tve bhavati pratyakṣam tu cadaasya avasthiti vaiśeṣyam eka deśa stha tvam sakala deha āhlādam ca ātmaaḥ ca
sakala deha upalabdhi mātram pratyakṣam aikadeśavartitvam aumeyam tu tat iti yat api ucyeta sakala śarīra gatāḥ sataḥ kim vā vibhoḥ abhasaḥ
iva āhosvit cada abidoḥ iva aṇoḥ eka deśa sthasya iti saṃśaya aativṛtteḥ iti atra ucyate doṣaḥ kasmāt abhyupagamāt abhyupagamyate hi deha eka deśa vṛtti tvam avasthiti vaiśeṣyam katham iti ucyate hṛdi hi eṣaḥ ātmā paṭhyate
hṛdi hi eṣaḥ ātmā sa vai eṣaḥ ātmā hṛdi katamaḥ ātmā iti yaḥ yam vijñā a mayaḥ prāṇeṣu hṛdi atas jyotiḥ puruṣaḥ ityādi upadeśebhyaḥ tasmāt dṛṣṭa a ta dārṣṭātikayoḥ avaiṣamyāt yuktam eva etat avirodhaḥ ca daa vat
iti guṇāt vā loka vat caitaya guṇa vyāpteḥ vā aṇoḥ api sataḥ jīvasya sakala deha vyāpi kāryam virudhyate yathā loke maṇi pradīpa prabhṛtīām apavaraka eka deśa vartiām api prabhā satī kāryam karoti
tadvat syāt sakala dehe āhlādayitṛ tvam sakala dehe āhlādayitṛ tvam a tu aṇoḥ jīvasya avayavāḥ sati yaiḥ ayam sakala deham visarpet iti āśaṅkya guṇāt vā loka vat iti uktam katham varteta
a hi paṭasya śuklaḥ guṇaḥ paṭa vyatirekeṇa a yatra dṛśyate pradīpa prabhāvat bhavet iti ced a tasyāḥ api dravya tva abhyupagamāt ibiḍa avayavam hi tejaḥ dravyam pradīpaḥ pravirala avayavam tu
tejaḥ dravyam eva prabhā iti atas uttaram paṭhati vyatirekaḥ gadha vat yathā guṇasya api sataḥ gadhasya gadhavat dravya vyatirekeṇa vṛttiḥ bhavati aprāpteṣu api kusuma ādiṣu gadhavatsu kusuma gadha upalabdheḥ evam aṇoḥ api sataḥ
jīvasya caitaya guṇa vyatirekaḥ bhaviṣyati atas ca aaikātikam etat guṇa tvāt rūpa ādi vat āśraya viśleṣa aupapattiḥ iti guṇasya eva sataḥ gadhasya āśraya viśleṣa darśaāt gadhasya api saha eva āśrayeṇa viśleṣaḥ iti ced a yasmāt mūla dravyāt viśleṣaḥ tasya kṣaya prasaṅgāt a kṣīyamāṇam api tat pūrva avasthātaḥ
gamyate ayathā tat pūrva avasthaiḥ guru tva ādibhiḥ hīyeta syāt etat gadha āśrayāṇām viśliṣṭāām avayavāām alpatvāt sa api viśleṣaḥ opalakṣyate sūkṣmāḥ hi gadha paramāṇavaḥ sarvatas viprasṛtāḥ gadha buddhim utpādayati iti ced a ati idriya tvāt paramāṇūām
sphuṭa gadha upalabdheḥ ca āga kesara ādiṣu a ca loke pratītiḥ gadha vat dravyam āghrātam iti gadhaḥ eva āghrātaḥ iti tu laukikāḥ pratiyati rūpa ādiṣu āśraya vyatireka a upalabdheḥ gadhasya api ayuktaḥ āśraya vyatirekaḥ iti ced a pratyakṣa tvāt aumāā pravṛtteḥ
tasmāt yat yathā loke dṛṣṭam tat tathā eva aumatavyam hi rasaḥ guṇaḥ jihvayā upalabhyate iti atas rūpa ādayaḥ api guṇāḥ jihvayā eva upalabhyera eti
śakyate tathā ca darśayati hṛdaya āyata atvam aṇu parimāṇa tvam ca abhidhāya tasya eva ā lomabhyaḥ ā akha agrebhyaḥ iti samasta śarīra vyāpi tvam darśayati pṛthak upadeśāt prajñayā
śarīram samāruhya iti ca ātma prajñayoḥ kartṛ karaṇa bhāve pṛthak upadeśāt asya śarīra vyāpi tā gamyate tat eṣām prāṇāām vijñāam ādāya iti ca kartuḥ śārīrāt pṛthak vijñāasya upadeśaḥ etam eva abhiprāyam upodbalayati
tasmāt aṇuḥ ātmā iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ tad guṇa sāra tvāt tu tad vyapadeśaḥ prājña vat tuśabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati aitat asti aṇuḥ ātmā iti utpatti aśravaṇāt parasya eva tu brahmaṇaḥ praveśa śravaṇāt tādātmya upadeśāt ca param eva brahma
jīvaḥ iti uktam param eva ced brahma jīvaḥ tasmāt yāvat param brahma tāvā eva jīvaḥ bhavitum arhati parasya ca brahmaṇaḥ vibhu tvam āmātam tasmāt vibhuḥ jīvaḥ tathā ca sa vai eṣa
mahā ajaḥ ātmā yaḥ yam vijñā a mayaḥ prāṇeṣu iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ jīva viṣayāḥ vibhu tva vādāḥ śrautāḥ smārtāḥ ca samarthitā bhavati ca aṇoḥ jīvasya sakala śarīra gatā upapadyate
sakala śarīra gatā eva vedaā prasajyeta tvac kaṇṭakayoḥ hi saṃyogaḥ kṛtsāyām tvaci vartate tvac ca pāda tale eva tu pratilabhate ca aṇoḥ guṇa vyāptiḥ upapadyate
guṇasya guṇi deśa tvāt guṇa tvam eva hi guṇi āśritya guṇasya hīyeta pradīpa prabhāyāḥ ca dravya ātara tvam vyākhyātam gadhaḥ api guṇa tva abhyupagamāt sa āśrayaḥ eva saṃcaritum arhati ayathā guṇa tva hāi prasaṅgāt tathā ca uktam bhagavatā dvaipāyaea
upalabhya apsu ced gadham kecid brūyuḥ aaipuṇāḥ pṛthivyām eva tam vidyāt apaḥ vāyum ca saṃśritam iti yadi ca caitayam jīvasya samasta śarīram vyāpuyāt āṇuḥ jīvaḥ syāt caitayam eva hi
asya svarūpam ageḥ iva auṣṇya prakāśau guṇa guṇi vibhāgaḥ vidyate iti śarīra parimāṇa tvam ca pratyākhyātam pariśeṣāt vibhuḥ jīvaḥ katham tarhi aṇu tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ iti atas āha tad guṇa sāra tvāt tu tad vyapadeśaḥ iti tasyāḥ
buddheḥ guṇāḥ tad guṇāḥ icchā dveṣaḥ sukham duḥkham iti evamādayaḥ tad guṇāḥ sāraḥ pradhā yasya ātmaaḥ saṃsāri tve saṃbhavati sa tad guṇa sāraḥ tasya bhāvaḥ tad guṇa sāra tvam hi buddheḥ guṇaiḥ kevalasya
ātmaaḥ saṃsāri tvam asti buddhi upādhi dharma adhyāsa nimittam hi kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tva ādi lakṣaṇam saṃsāri tvam akartuḥ abhoktuḥ ca asaṃsāriṇaḥ iti amuktasya sataḥ ātmaaḥ tasmāt tad guṇa sāra tvāt buddhi parimāṇe ā asya parimāṇa vyapadeśaḥ tad utkrāti ādibhiḥ ca asya utkrāti ādi vyapadeśaḥ a svataḥ tathā ca vāla agra śata bhāgasya śatadhā
kalpitasya ca bhāgaḥ jīvaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ sa ca āatyāya kalpate iti aṇu tvam jīvasya uktvā tasya eva puarāatyam āha tat ca evam eva samañjasam syāt yadi aupacārikam aṇu tvam jīvasya bhavet pāramārthikam
a hi ubhayam mukhyam avakalpeta a ca āatyam aupacārikam iti śakyam vijñātum sarva upaiṣatsu brahma ātmabhāvasya pratipipādayiṣita tvāt tathā itarasmi api umāe ca eva ārā agra mātraḥ hi avaraḥ api dṛṣṭaḥ
iti ca ārā agra mātra tām śāsti a eṣa uṇuḥ ātmā cetasā veditavyaḥ iti atra api a jīvasya aṇu parimāṇa tvam śiṣyate ca prakṛta tvāt jīvasya api
ca mukhya aṇu parimāṇa tva aupapatteḥ tasmāt durjñāatva abhiprāyam idam aṇu tva vacaam upādhi abhiprāyam vā draṣṭavyam tathā prajñayā śarīram samāruhya iti evaṃjātīyakeṣu api bheda upadeśeṣu buddhyā eva upādhi bhūtayā jīvaḥ śarīram samāruhya iti evam yojayitavyam vyapadeśa mātram vā
śilāputrakasya śarīram ityādi vat vidyate iti uktam buddheḥ eva tad āyata a tvāt tathā aham utkrātaḥ utkrātaḥ bhaviṣyāmi kasmivā pratiṣṭhite pratiṣṭhāsyāmi iti
sa prāṇam asṛjata iti utkrāti abhāve hi gati āgatyoḥ api abhāvaḥ vijñāyate a hi dehāt gati āgatī syātām evam upādhi guṇa sāra tvāt jīvasya aṇu tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ prājña vat yathā prājñasya paramātmaaḥ sa guṇeṣu upāsaeṣu upādhi guṇa sāra tvāt aṇīyaḥ tva ādi vyapadeśaḥ aṇīyā vrīheḥ vā
yavāt vā maomayaḥ prāṇa mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ sarvagadhaḥ sarva rasaḥ satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ iti evaṃprakāraḥ tadvat syāt etat yadi buddhi guṇa sāra tvāt ātmanaḥ saṃsāri tvam kalpyeta tatas buddhi ātmaoḥ saṃyoga avasāam avaśyaṃbhāvi iti atas buddhi viyoge sati
ātmanaḥ a ālakṣya tvāt asattvam asaṃsāri tvam vā prasajyeta iti atas uttaram paṭhati yāvat ātma bhāvi tvāt ca doṣaḥ tad darśaāt kasmāt yāvat ātma bhāvi tvāt buddhi saṃyogasya yāvat ayam ātmā saṃsārī bhavati yāvat asya samyak darśaiḥ saṃsāri tvam asya
tāvat asya buddhyā saṃyogaḥ śāmyati yāvat eva ca ayam buddhi upādhi saṃbadhaḥ tāvat eva asya jīva tvam saṃsāri tvam ca paramārthataḥ tu buddhi upādhi parikalpita svarūpa vyatirekeṇa asti a hi
iti a mukta svarūpāt sarvajñāt īśvara ādayaḥ dhātuḥ dvitīyaḥ dhātuḥ dvitīyaḥ dhātuḥ dvitīyaḥ dhātuḥ dvitīyaḥ dhātuḥ dvitīyaḥ draṣṭā śrotā matā vijñātā draṣṭṛ śrotṛ matṛ vijñātṛ tattvam asi aham brahma asmi ityādi śruti śatebhyaḥ katham yāvat ātma bhāvī
buddhi saṃyogaḥ iti tad darśaāt iti āha tathā hi śāstram darśayati yaḥ yam vijñā a mayaḥ prāṇeṣu hṛdi atas jyotiḥ puruṣaḥ sa samāaḥ saubhau lokau ausaṃcarati dhyāyati iva lelāyati iva ityādi tatra
vijñā amayaḥ iti buddhi mayaḥ iti etat uktam bhavati pradeśa atare vijñā amayaḥ mao mayaḥ prāṇa mayaḥ cakṣuḥ mayaḥ śrotra mayaḥ iti vijñā amayasya maa ādibhiḥ saha pāṭhāt buddhi maya tvam ca tad guṇa sāra tvam eva abhipreyate yathā loke
strī mayaḥ devadattaḥ iti strī rāga ādi pradhāaḥ abhidhīyate tadvat sa saubhau iti ca iti ca tayā eva buddhyā iti gamyate
tat ca darśayati dhyāyati iva lelāyati iva iti etat uktam bhavati ā ayam svatas dhyāyati ā api calati dhyāyatyām buddhau dhyāyati iva calatyām buddhau calati iva iti api ca
buddhi upādhi saṃbadhaḥ ca mithyājñā asya samyagjñā ādayatra i vṛttiḥ asti iti atas yāvat brahma ātmatā avabodhaḥ tāvat ayam buddhi upādhi saṃbadhaḥ śāmyati darśayati ca veda aham etam puruṣam mahātam āditya varṇam tamasaḥ parastāt tam eva
viditvā ati mṛtyum eti āyaḥ pathā iti suṣupta pralayayoḥ śakyate suṣupta pralayayoḥ śakyate suṣupta pralayayoḥ śakyate satā somya tadā bhavati svam api itas bhavati iti
kṛt sa vikāra pralaya abhyupagamāt ca tat katham yāvadātmabhāvitvam buddhisaṃbadhasya iti atra ucyate puṃstva ādivat tvasya sataḥ abhivyakti yogāt yathā loke bīja ātman iva yauva ādiṣu āvirbhavati a avidyamāāī utpadyate ṣaṇḍa ādīām api tad utpatti prasaṅgāt evam ayam api buddhisaṃbadhaḥ
śakti ā

text1:
a ādiṣu āvirbhavanti
na avidyamānāni utpadyante ṣaṇḍa ādīnām api tad utpatti prasaṅgāt evam ayam api buddhi saṃbandhaḥ śakti ātmanā vidyamānaḥ eva suṣupta pralayayoḥ punar prabodha prasavayoḥ āvirbhavati
evam hi etat yujyate
na hi ākasmikī kasyacid utpattiḥ saṃbhavati atiprasaṅgāt
darśayati ca suṣuptāt utthānam avidyā ātmaka bīja sadbhāva kāritam sati saṃpadya na viduḥ sati saṃpadyāmahe iti te iha vyāghraḥ vā siṃhaḥ vā ityādinā
tasmāt siddham etat yāvat ātma bhāvī buddhi ādi upādhi saṃbandhaḥ iti
nitya upalabdhi anupalabdhi prasaṅgaḥ nyatara niyamaḥ vā nyathā
tat ca ātmanaḥ upādhi bhūtam antaḥkaraṇam manaḥ buddhiḥ vijñānam cittam iti ca anekadhā tatra tatra abhilapyate
kvacid ca vṛtti vibhāgena saṃśaya ādi vṛttikam manaḥ iti ucyate niścaya ādi vṛttikam buddhiḥ iti
tat ca evam bhūtam antaḥkaraṇam avaśyam asti iti abhyupagantavyam anyathā hi anabhyupagamyamāne tasmin nitya upalabdhi anupalabdhi prasaṅgaḥ syāt ātma indriya viṣayāṇām upalabdhi sādhanānām saṃnidhāne sati nityam eva upalabdhiḥ prasajyeta
atha sati api hetu samavadhāne phala abhāvaḥ tatas nityam evā anupalabdhiḥ prasajyeta
na ca evam dṛśyate
athavā anyatarasya ātmanaḥ indriyasya vā śakti pratibandhaḥ bhyupagantavyaḥ
na ca ātmanaḥ śakti pratibandhaḥ saṃbhavati avikriya tvāt
na api indriyasya
na hi tasya pūrva uttarayoḥ kṣaṇayoḥ apratibaddha śaktikasya sataḥ kasmāt śaktiḥ pratibadhyeta
tasmāt yasya avadhāna anavadhānābhyām upalabdhi anupalabdhī bhavataḥ tat manaḥ
tathā ca śrutiḥ anyatramanāḥ abhūvam na adarśam anyatramanāḥ abhūvam na aśrauṣam iti manasā hi eva paśyati manasā śrṛṇoti iti ca
kāma ādayaḥ ca asya vṛttayaḥ iti darśayati kāmaḥ saṃkalpaḥ vicikitsā śraddhā aśraddhā dhṛtiḥ adhṛtiḥ hrīḥ dhīḥ bhīḥ iti etat sarvam manaḥ eva iti
tasmāt yuktam etat tad guṇa sāra tvāt tad vyapadeśaḥ iti
kartā śāstra arthavat tvāt
kartṛ adhikaraṇam
tad guṇa sāra tva adhikāreṇa eva aparaḥ jīva dharmaḥ prapañcyate
kartā ca ayam jīvaḥ syāt
kasmāt
śāstra arthavat tvāt evam ca yajeta juhuyāt dadyāt iti evaṃvidham vidhi śāstram arthavat
vihāra upadeśāt
itas ca jīvasya kartṛ tvam yat jīva prakriyāyām saṃdhye sthāne vihāram upadiśati saḥ īyate mṛtaḥ yatra kāmam iti sve śarīre yathākāmam parivartate iti ca
upādānāt
itas ca asya kartṛ tvam yat jīva prakriyāyām eva karaṇānām upādānam saṃkīrtayati tat eṣām prāṇānām vijñānena vijñānam ādāya iti prāṇān gṛhītvā iti ca
vyapadeśāt ca kriyāyām na ced nirdeśa viparyayaḥ
itas ca jīvasya kartṛ tvam yat asya laukikīṣu vaidikīṣu ca kriyāsu kartṛ tvam vyapadiśati śāstram vijñānam yajñam tanute karmāṇi tanute ca iti
nanu vijñāna śabdaḥ buddhau samadhigataḥ katham anena jīvasya kartṛ tvam sūcyate iti na iti ucyate jīvasya eva eṣa nirdeśaḥ na buddheḥ
na ced jīvasya syāt nirdeśa viparyayaḥ syāt vijñānena iti evam niradekṣyat
tathā hi anyatra buddhi vivakṣāyām vijñāna śabdasya karaṇa vibhakti nirdeśaḥ dṛśyate tat eṣām prāṇānām vijñānena vijñānam ādāya iti
iha tu vijñānam yajñam tanute iti kartṛ sāmānādhikaraṇya nirdeśāt buddhi vyatiriktasya eva ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam sūcyate iti adoṣaḥ
atra āha yadi buddhi vyatiriktaḥ jīvaḥ kartā syāt sa svatantraḥ san priyam hitam ca eva ātmanaḥ niyamena saṃpādayet na viparītam
viparītam api tu saṃpādayan upalabhyate
na ca svatantrasya ātmanaḥ īdṛśī pravṛttiḥ aniyamena upapadyate iti atas uttaram paṭhati
upalabdhi vat aniyamaḥ
yathā ayam ātma upalabdhim prati svatantraḥ aniyamena iṣṭam aniṣṭam ca upalabhate evam aniyamena eva iṣṭam aniṣṭam ca saṃpādayiṣyati
upalabdhau api asvātantryam upalabdhi hetu upādāna upalambhāt iti ced na viṣaya prakalpanā mātra prayojana tvāt upalabdhi hetūnām
upalabdhau tu an anya apekṣa tvam ātmanaḥ caitanya yogāt
api ca arthakriyāyām api na atyantam ātmanaḥ svātantryam asti deśa kāla nimitta viśeṣa apekṣa tvāt
na ca sahāya apekṣasya kartuḥ kartṛ tvam nivartate
bhavati hi edha udaka ādi apekṣasya api paktuḥ paktṛ tvam
sahakāri vaicitryāt ca iṣṭa aniṣṭa arthakriyāyām aniyamena pravṛttiḥ ātmanaḥ na virudhyate
śakti viparyayāt
itas ca vijñāna vyatiriktaḥ jīvaḥ kartā bhavitum arhati
yadi punar vijñāna śabda vācyā buddhiḥ eva kartrī syāt tatas śakti viparyayaḥ syāt karaṇa śaktiḥ buddheḥ hīyeta kartṛ śaktiḥ ca āpadyeta
satyām ca buddheḥ kartṛ śaktau tasyāḥ eva ahaṃpratyaya viṣaya tvam abhyupagantavyam ahaṃkāra pūrvikāyāḥ eva pravṛtteḥ sarvatra darśanāt aham gacchāmi aham āgacchāmi aham bhuñje aham pibāmi iti ca
tasyāḥ ca kartṛ śakti yuktāyāḥ sarva artha kāri karaṇam anyat kalpayitavyam
śaktaḥ u pi hi san kartā karaṇam upādāya kriyāsu pravartamānaḥ dṛśyate
tatas ca saṃjñā mātre vivādaḥ syāt na vastu bhedaḥ kaścid karaṇa vyatiriktasya kartṛ tva abhyupagamāt
samādhi abhāvāt ca
yaḥ u pi ayam aupaniṣada ātma pratipatti prayojanaḥ samādhiḥ upadiṣṭaḥ vedānteṣu ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ śrotavyaḥ mantavyaḥ nididhyāsitavyaḥ saḥ nveṣṭavyaḥ sa vijijñāsitavyaḥ om iti evam dhyāyatha ātmānam iti evaṃlakṣaṇaḥ saḥ u pi asati ātmanaḥ kartṛ tve na upapadyeta
tasmāt api asya kartṛ tva siddhiḥ
yathā ca takṣa ubhayathā
takṣa adhikaraṇam
evam tāvat śāstra arthavat tva ādibhiḥ hetubhiḥ kartṛ tvam śārīrasya pradarśitam
tat punar svābhāvikam vā syāt upādhi nimittam vā iti cintyate
tatra etaiḥ eva śāstra arthavat tva ādibhiḥ hetubhiḥ svābhāvikam kartṛ tvam apavāda hetu abhāvāt iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ na svābhāvikam kartṛ tvam ātmanaḥ saṃbhavati anirmokṣa prasaṅgāt
kartṛ tva svabhāva tve hi ātmanaḥ na kartṛ tvāt nirmokṣaḥ saṃbhavati agneḥ iva auṣṇyāt
na ca kartṛ tvāt anirmuktasya asti puruṣa artha siddhiḥ kartṛ tvasya duḥkha rūpa tvāt
nanu sthitāyām api kartṛ tva śaktau kartṛ tva kārya parihārāt puruṣa arthaḥ setsyati
tad parihāraḥ ca nimitta parihārāt yathā agneḥ dahana śakti yuktasya api kāṣṭha viyogāt dahana kārya abhāvaḥ tadvat na nimittānām api śakti lakṣaṇena saṃbandhena saṃbaddhānām atyanta parihāra asaṃbhāvāt
nanu mokṣa sādhana vidhānāt mokṣaḥ setsyati na sādhana āyattasya anitya tvāt
api ca nitya śuddha mukta ātma pratipādanāt mokṣa siddhiḥ abhimatā
tādṛś ātma pratipādanam ca na svābhāvike kartṛ tve
tasmāt upādhi dharma adhyāsena eva ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam na svābhāvikam
tathā ca śrutiḥ dhyāyati iva lelāyati iva iti ātma indriya manaḥ yuktam bhoktā iti āhuḥ manīṣiṇaḥ iti ca upādhi saṃpṛktasya eva ātmanaḥ bhoktṛ tva ādi viśeṣa lābham darśayati
na hi vivekinām parasmāt anyaḥ jīvaḥ nāma kartā bhoktā vā vidyate draṣṭā ityādi śravaṇāt
paraḥ eva tarhi saṃsārī kartā bhoktā ca prasajyeta
parasmāt anyaḥ ced citimān jīvaḥ kartā buddhi ādi saṃghāta vyatiriktaḥ na syāt na avidyā pratyupasthāpita tvāt kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tvayoḥ
tathā ca śāstram yatra hi dvaitam iva bhavati tat itaraḥ itaram paśyati iti avidyā avasthāyām kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tve darśayitvā vidyā avasthāyām te eva kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tve nivārayati yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kena kam paśyet iti
tathā svapna jāgaritayoḥ ātmanaḥ upādhi saṃparka kṛtam śramam śyenasya iva ākāśe viparipatataḥ śrāvayitvā tad abhāvam suṣuptau prājñena ātmanā saṃpariṣvaktasya śrāvayati tat vai asya etat āpta kāmam ātma kāmam akāmam rūpam śoka antaram iti ārabhya eṣā asya paramā gatiḥ eṣā asya paramā saṃpad eṣā u sya paramaḥ lokaḥ eṣā u sya paramaḥ ānandaḥ iti upasaṃhārāt
tat etat āha ācāryaḥ yathā ca takṣobhayathāḥ iti
tu arthe ca ayam caḥ paṭhitaḥ
na evam mantavyam svābhāvikam eva ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam agneḥ iva auṣṇyam iti
yathā tu takṣā loke vāsi ādi karaṇa hastaḥ kartā duḥkhī bhavati saḥ eva sva gṛham prāptaḥ vimukta vāsi ādi karaṇaḥ svasthaḥ nirvṛtaḥ nirvyāpāraḥ sukhī bhavati evam avidyā pratyupasthāpita dvaita saṃpṛktaḥ ātmā svapna jāgarita avasthayoḥ kartā duḥkhī bhavati saḥ tad śrama apanuttaye svam ātmānam param brahma praviśya vimukta kārya karaṇa saṃghātaḥ kartā sukhī bhavati saṃprasāda avasthāyām tathā mukti avasthāyām api avidyā dhvānt
takṣa dṛṣṭāntaḥ ca etāvatā aṃśena draṣṭavyaḥ takṣā hi viśiṣṭeṣu takṣaṇa ādi vyāpāreṣu apekṣya eva pratiniyatāni karaṇāni kartā bhavati sva śarīreṇa tu akartā eva
evam ayam ātmā sarva vyāpāreṣu apekṣya eva manaḥ ādīni karaṇāni kartā bhavati sva ātmanā tu kartā eva iti
na tu ātmanaḥ takṣṇaḥ iva avayavāḥ santi yaiḥ hasta ādibhiḥ iva vāsi ādīni takṣā manaḥ ādīni karaṇāni ātmā upādadīta nyasyet vā
yat tu uktam śāstra arthavat tva ādibhiḥ hetubhiḥ svābhāvikam ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam iti tat na vidhi śāstram tāvat yathāprāptam kartṛ tvam upādāya kartavya viśeṣam upadiśati na kartṛ tvam ātmanaḥ pratipādayati
na ca svābhāvikam asya kartṛ tvam asti brahma ātmatva upadeśāt iti avocāma
tasmāt avidyā kṛtam kartṛ tvam upādāya vidhi śāstram pravartiṣyate
kartā vijñāna ātmā puruṣaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakam api śāstram anuvāda rūpatvāt yathāprāptam eva avidyā kṛtam kartṛ tvam anuvadiṣyati
etena vihāra upādāne parihṛte tayoḥ api anuvāda rūpa tvāt
nanu saṃdhye sthāne prasupteṣu karaṇeṣu sve śarīre yathākāmam parivartate iti vihāraḥ upadiśyamānaḥ kevalasya ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam āvahati
tathā upādāne pi tat eṣām prāṇānām vijñānena vijñānam ādāya iti karaṇeṣu karma karaṇa vibhaktī śrūyamāṇe kevalasya ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam gamayataḥ iti
atrā ucyate na tāvat saṃdhye sthāne tyantam ātmanaḥ karaṇa viramaṇam asti sa dhīḥ svapnaḥ bhūtvā imam lokam atikrāmati iti tatra api dhī saṃbandha śravaṇāt
tathā ca smaranti indriyāṇām uparame manaḥ nu uparatam yadi
sevate viṣayān eva tat vidyāt svapna darśanam iti
kāma ādayaḥ ca manasaḥ vṛttayaḥ iti śrutiḥ
tāḥ ca svapne dṛśyante
tasmāt samanāḥ eva svapte viharati
vihāraḥ pi ca tatratyaḥ vāsanā mayaḥ eva na tu pāramārthikaḥ sti
tathā ca śrutiḥ ivakāra anubaddham eva svapna vyāpāram varṇayati uta iva strībhiḥ saha modamānaḥ jakṣat uta iva api bhayāni paśyan iti
laukikāḥ api tathā eva svapnam kathayanti ārukṣam iva giri śrṛṅgam adrākṣam iva vana rājim iti
tathā upādāne pi yadi api karaṇeṣu karma karaṇa vibhakti nirdeśaḥ tathā api tad saṃpṛktasya eva ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam draṣṭavyam kevale kartṛ tva asaṃbhavasya darśita tvāt
bhavati ca loke neka prakārā vivakṣā yodhāḥ yudhyante yodhaiḥ rājā yudhyate iti
api ca asmin upādāne karaṇa vyāpāra uparama mātram vivakṣyate na svātantryam kasyacid abuddhi pūrvakasya api svāpe karaṇa vyāpāra uparam asya dṛṣṭa tvāt
yaḥ tu ayam vyapadeśaḥ darśitaḥ vijñānam yajñam tanute iti sa buddheḥ eva kartṛ tvam prāpayati vijñāna śabdasya tatra prasiddha tvāt manaḥ nantaram pāṭhāt ca tasya śraddhā eva śiraḥ iti ca vijñāna mayasya ātmanaḥ śraddhā ādi avayava tva saṃkīrtanāt śraddhā ādīnām ca buddhi dharma tva prasiddheḥ vijñānam devāḥ sarve brahma jyeṣṭham upāsate iti ca vākya śeṣāt jyeṣṭha tvasya ca prathama ja tvasya buddhau prasiddha tvāt saḥ eṣa vācaḥ c
na ca buddheḥ śakti viparyayaḥ karaṇānām kartṛ tva abhyupagame bhavati sarva kārakāṇām eva sva sva vyāpāreṣu kartṛ tvasya avaśyaṃbhāvi tvāt
upalabdhi apekṣam tu eṣām karaṇānām karaṇa tvam
sā ca ātmanaḥ
na ca tasyām api asya kartṛ tvam asti nitya upalabdhi svarūpa tvāt
ahaṃkāra pūrvakam api kartṛ tvam na upalabdhuḥ bhavitum arhati ahaṃkārasya api upalabhyamāna tvāt
na ca evam sati karaṇa antara kalpanā prasaṅgaḥ buddheḥ karaṇa tva abhyupagamāt
samādhi abhāvaḥ tu śāstra arthavat tvena eva parihṛtaḥ yathāprāptam eva kartṛ tvam upādāya samādhi vidhānāt
tasmāt kartṛ tvam api ātmanaḥ upādhi nimittam eva iti sthitam
parāt tu tad śruteḥ
parāyatta adhikaraṇam
yat idam avidyā avasthāyām upādhi nibandhanam kartṛ tvam jīvasya abhihitam tat kim an apekṣya īśvaram bhavati āhosvit īśvara apekṣam iti bhavati vicāraṇā
tatra prāptam tāvat na īśvaram apekṣate jīvaḥ kartṛ tve iti
kasmāt
apekṣā prayojana abhāvāt
ayam hi jīvaḥ svayam eva rāga dveṣa ādi doṣa prayuktaḥ kāraka antara sāmagrī saṃpannaḥ kartṛ tvam anubhavitum śaknoti
tasya kim īśvaraḥ kariṣyati
na ca loke kṛṣi ādikāsu kriyāsu anaḍuha ādi vat iti
kleśa ātmakena ca kartṛ tvena jantūn saṃsṛjataḥ īśvarasya nairghṛṇyam prasajyeta
viṣama phalam ca eṣām kartṛ tvam vidadhataḥ vaiṣamyam
nanu vaiṣamya nairghṛṇye na sāpekṣa tvāt iti uktam satyam uktam sati tu īśvarasya sāpekṣa tva saṃbhave
sāpekṣa tvam ca īśvarasya saṃbhavati satoḥ jantūnām dharma adharmayoḥ
tayoḥ ca sadbhāvaḥ sati jīvasya kartṛ tve
tat eva ced kartṛ tvam īśvara apekṣam syāt kiṃviṣayam īśvarasya sāpekṣa tvam

a ādiṣu āvirbhavati a avidyamāāī utpadyate ṣaṇḍa ādīām api tad utpatti prasaṅgāt evam ayam api buddhisaṃbadhaḥ
śakti ātmaā eva suṣupta pralayayoḥ puas prabodha prasavayoḥ āvirbhavati evam hi etat yujyate a hi ākasmikī kasyacid utpattiḥ saṃbhavati atiprasaṅgāt darśayati ca suṣuptāt utthāam avidyā ātmaka bīja sadbhāva kāritam sati saṃpadya
viduḥ sati saṃpadyāmahe iti te iha vyāghraḥ vā siṃhaḥ vā tasmāt siddham etat yāvat ātma bhāvī iti iti upalabdhi aupalabdhi prasaṅga uyataraiyamaḥ vā ayathā tat ca ātma upādhi bhūtam
ataḥkaraṇam buddhiḥ cittam iti ca tatra tatra abhilapyate kvacid ca saṃśaya ādi vṛttikam iti ucyate iścaya ādi vṛttikam buddhiḥ iti tat ca evam bhūtam ataḥkaraṇam avaśyam asti iti abhyupagatavyam ayathā hi upalabdhi aupalabdhi prasaṅgaḥ
syāt ātma idriya viṣayāṇām upalabdhi sādhaāām sati ityam eva upalabdhiḥ prasajyeta atha sati api hetu samavadhāe phala abhāvaḥ prasajyeta ca evam dṛśyate athavā idriyasya vā
śakti pratibadhaḥ abhyupagatavyaḥ a ca ātmaaḥ śakti pratibadhaḥ saṃbhavati avikriya tvāt āpi idriyasya a hi tasya pūrva uttarayoḥ kṣaṇayoḥ apratibaddha śaktikasya satā ukasmāt śaktiḥ pratibadhyeta tasmāt
tathā ca śrutiḥ ayatramaāḥ abhūvam ādarśam ayatramaāḥ abhūvam āśrauṣam iti maasā hi eva paśyati maasā śrṛṇoti iti ca kāma ādayaḥ ca asya vṛttayaḥ iti darśayati
kāmaḥ saṃkalpaḥ vicikitsā śraddhā aśraddhā dhṛtiḥ adhṛtiḥ hrīḥ dhīḥ bhīḥ iti etat sarvam me eva iti tasmāt yuktam etat tad guṇa sāra tvāt tad vyapadeśaḥ iti kartā śāstra arthavat tvāt kartṛ adhikaraṇam tad guṇa sāra tva adhikāreṇa eva aparaḥ api jīva dharmaḥ prapañcyate kartā ca ayam ayam anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anyaḥ anya
jīvaḥ syāt kasmāt śāstra arthavat tvāt evam ca yajeta juhuyāt dadyāt iti evaṃvidham vidhi śāstram arthavat vihāra upadeśāt itas ca jīvasya kartṛ tvam yat jīva prakriyāyām vihāram upadiśati saḥ
īyate mṛtaḥ yatra kāmam iti sve śarīre yathākāmam parivartate iti ca upādāāt itas ca asya kartṛ tvam yat jīva prakriyāyām eva karaṇāām upādāam saṃkīrtayati tat eṣām prāṇāām vijñāea vijñāam ādāya
iti prāṇāḥ gṛhītvā iti ca vyapadeśāt ca kriyāyām itas ca jīvasya kartṛ tvam yat asya laukikīṣu vaidikīṣu ca kriyāsu kartṛ tvam vyapadiśati śāstram
yajñam taute karmāṇi ca iti vijñāa śabdaḥ buddhau samadhigataḥ katham aea jīvasya kartṛ tvam sūcyate iti ā iti ucyate jīvasya eva eṣa buddheḥ
ced jīvasya syāt syāt tathā hi buddhi vivakṣāyām vijñāa śabdasya karaṇa vibhakti nirdeśaḥ dṛśyate tat eṣām prāṇāām iti iha
tu yajñam taute iti kartṛ sāma ādhikaraṇyaiḥ deśāt buddhi vyatiriktasya eva ātmaaḥ kartṛ tvam sūcyate iti adoṣaḥ atra āha yadi buddhi vyatiriktaḥ jīvaḥ kartā syāt sa svatatraḥ sa priyam hitam
saṃpādayet a viparītam viparītam api tu ca svatatrasya ātmanaḥ īdṛśī pravṛttiḥ aiyamena upapadyate iti atas uttaram paṭhati upalabdhi vat aiyamaḥ yathā ayam ātma upalabdhim
prati ca upalabhate evam aiyameaiveṣṭam aiṣṭam ca saṃpādayiṣyati upalabdhau api asvātatryam upalabdhi hetu upādā upalambhāt iti ced upalabdhau tu api ca arthakriyāyām api
ātyatam ātmanaḥ svātatryam asti deśa kāla aimitta viśeṣa apekṣa tvāt a ca sahāya apekṣasya kartuḥ kartṛ tvam iva ṛtate bhavati hi edha udaka ādi apekṣasya api paktuḥ paktṛ tvam sahakāri vaicitryāt ca iṣṭa aiṣṭa artha kriyāyām aiyamea pravṛttiḥ ātmanaḥ virudhyate śakti viparyayāt itas ca
vijñā a vyatiriktaḥ jīvaḥ kartā bhavitum arhati yadi puar vijñā a śabda vācyā buddhiḥ eva kartrī syāt tatas śakti viparyayaḥ syāt karaṇa śaktiḥ buddheḥ hīyeta kartṛ śaktiḥ ca āpadyeta satyām ca buddheḥ kartṛ śaktau tasyāḥ eva
ahaṃpratyaya viṣaya tvam abhyupagatavyam ahaṃkāra pūrvikāyāḥ eva pravṛtteḥ sarvatra darśaāt aham gacchāmi aham āgacchāmi aham bhuñje aham pibāmi iti ca tasyāḥ ca kartṛ śakti yuktāyāḥ sarva artha kāri karaṇam ayat kalpayitavyam śaktā upi
hi sa kartā karaṇam upādāya kriyāsu pravartamāaḥ dṛśyate tatas ca saṃjñā mātre vivādaḥ syāt a vastu bhedaḥ kaścid karaṇa vyatiriktasya kartṛ tva abhyupagamāt samādhi abhāvāt ca ayam
samādhiḥ upadiṣṭaḥ ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ śrotavyaḥ matavyaḥ ididhyāsitavyaḥ saḥ veṣṭavyaḥ sa vijijñāsitavyaḥ om iti evam dhyāyatha om iti evam dhyāyatha
iti evaṃlakṣaṇaḥ saḥ api asati ātmaaḥ kartṛ tve opapadyeta tasmāt api asya kartṛ tva siddhiḥ yathā ca takṣā ubhayathā takṣa adhikaraṇam evam tāvat śāstra arthavat tva ādibhiḥ hetubhiḥ kartṛ tvam
śārīrasya pradarśitam tat puas svābhāvikam vā syāt upādhi nimittam vā iti cityate tatra etaiḥ eva śāstra arthavat tva ādibhiḥ hetubhiḥ svābhāvikam kartṛ tvam apavāda hetu abhāvāt iti evam prāpte
brūmaḥ a svābhāvikam kartṛ tvam saṃbhavati aiḥ mokṣa prasaṅgāt kartṛ tva svabhāva tve hi saṃbhavati ageḥ iva auṣṇyāt ca puruṣa artha siddhiḥ
kartṛ tvasya duḥkha rūpa tvāt sthitāyām api kartṛ tva śaktau kartṛ tva kārya parihārāt puruṣa arthaḥ setsyati tad parihāraḥ ca imitta parihārāt yathā ageḥ daha a śakti yuktasya api kāṣṭha viyogāt daha a kārya abhāvaḥ tadvat a imittāām api
atyata parihāra asaṃbhāvāt mokṣaḥ setsyati a aitya tvāt api ca iti aśuddha mukta ātma pratipādaāt mokṣa siddhiḥ abhimatā tādṛś ca abhimantā
svābhāvike tasmāt upādhi dharma adhyāse eva ātmanaḥ kartṛ tvam a svābhāvikam tathā ca śrutiḥ dhyāyati iva lelāyati iva iti bhoktā iti āhuḥ maīṣiṇaḥ iti ca upādhi saṃpṛktasya eva ātmanaḥ
bhoktṛ tva ādi viśeṣa lābham darśayati hi parasmāt kartā bhoktā vā vidyate draṣṭā ityādi śravaṇāt paraḥ eva tarhi saṃsārī
kartā bhoktā ca prasajyeta parasmāt ayaḥ ced citimān jīvaḥ kartā syāt a avidyā pratyupasthāpita tvāt kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tvayoḥ tathā ca śāstram yatra
hi dvaitam iva bhavati tat itaraḥ itaram paśyati iti avidyā avasthāyām kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tve darśayitvā vidyā avasthāyām te eva kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tve iva ārayati yatra tu asya
sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kea kam paśyet iti tathā svapa jāgaritayoḥ ātma upādhi saṃparka kṛtam śramam śyeasya iva ākāśe viparipatataḥ śrāvayitvā tad abhāvam suṣuptau saṃpariṣvaktasya śrāvayati
tat vai asya etat āpta kāmam ātma kāmam akāmam rūpam śokātaram iti ārabhya eṣā asya paramā gatiḥ eṣā asya paramā saṃpad eṣā usya paramaḥ lokaḥ eṣā usya parama
