u
ityādyāḥ paripaṭhitāḥ gṛhyeran pañca saṃkhyā atirekāt
nanu atra api śrotra ādi nirapekṣā bhūta bhaviṣyat ādi viṣayā aparā manasaḥ vṛttiḥ asti iti samānaḥ pañca saṃkhyā atirekaḥ
evam tarhi para matam apratiṣiddham anumatam bhavati iti nyāyāt iha api yoga śāstra prasiddhāḥ manasaḥ pañca vṛttayaḥ parigṛhyante pramāṇa viparyaya vikalpa nidrā smṛtayaḥ nāma
bahu vṛtti tva mātreṇa vā manaḥ prāṇasya nidarśanam iti draṣṭavyam
jīva upakaraṇa tvam api prāṇasya pañcavṛtti tvāt manovat iti vā yojayitavyam
aṇuḥ ca
śreṣṭha aṇu tva adhikaraṇam
aṇuḥ ca ayam mukhyaḥ prāṇaḥ pratyetavyaḥ itara prāṇa vat
aṇu tvam ca iha api saukṣmya paricchedau na paramāṇu tulya tvam pañcabhiḥ vṛttibhiḥ kṛtsna śarīra vyāpi tvāt
sūkṣmaḥ prāṇaḥ utkrāntau pārśva sthena anupalabhyamāna tvāt
paricchinnaḥ ca utkrānti gati āgati śrutibhyaḥ
nanu vibhu tvam api prāṇasya samāmnāyate samaḥ
text2:
ca pañca karmedriyāṇi sarva artha viṣayam traikālya vṛtti maas tu ekam aekavṛttikam tat eva vṛtti bhedāt kvacid bhia vat vyapadiśyate buddhiḥ ahaṃkāraḥ cittam ca iti tathā ca śrutiḥ
kāma ādyāḥ āāvidhāḥ vṛttīḥ aukramya āha etat sarvam me eva iti api ca sapta eva catvāraḥ eva prāṇāḥ abhimatāḥ syuḥ sthā abhedāt hi ete catvāraḥ sataḥ sapta
gaṇyate dve śrotre dve cakṣuṣī dve āsike ekā vāc iti a ca tāvatām eva vṛtti bhedāḥ itare prāṇāḥ iti śakyate vaktum hasta ādi vṛttīām atyata vijātīya tvāt
tathā vai puruṣe prāṇāḥ ābhiḥ daśamī iti atra api deha chidra bheda abhiprāyeṇa eva daśa prāṇāḥ ucyate a prāṇa tattva bheda abhiprāyeṇa ābhiḥ daśamī iti vacaāt hi kaścit prāṇaḥ
prasiddhaḥ asti mukhyasya tu prāṇasya bhavati ābhiḥ api ekam atas ābhiḥ daśamī iti ucyate kvacid upāsa artham katicid prāṇāḥ gaṇyate kvacid pradarśa artham tat evam vicitre sati kva kim
param vivektavyam prāṇa viṣayam pramāṇam iti sthitam iyam aparā sūtra dvaya yojaā sapta eva prāṇāḥ syuḥ yatas gatiḥ śrūyate tam utkrāmatam prāṇaḥ u utkrāmati prāṇam sarve
prāṇāḥ aūtkrāmati iti atra sarva śabdaḥ utra paṭhyate tat katham saptāām eva gatiḥ pratijñāyate iti viśeṣita tvāt iti āha sapta eva hi prāṇāḥ cakṣuḥ ādayaḥ tvac paryatāḥ viśeṣitāḥ iha prakṛtāḥ sa yatra eva
cākṣuṣaḥ puruṣaḥ parāṅ paryāvartate ithārūpa jñaḥ bhavati ekībhavati a paśyati iti āhuḥ iti evamādi prakṛta gāmī ca sarva śabdaḥ bhavati yathā sarve brāhmaṇāḥ bhojayitavyāḥ iti ye imatritāḥ
prakṛtāḥ brāhmaṇāḥ te eva sarva śabdena ucyate evam iha api ye prakṛtāḥ sapta prāṇāḥ te eva sarva śabdena ucyate iti iti katham doṣaḥ
tattva abhedāt vṛtti bhede pi sapta tva upapatteḥ tasmāt sapta eva prāṇāḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ hasta ādayaḥ tu apare saptabhyā utiriktāḥ prāṇāḥ pratīyate hastaḥ vai grahaḥ ityādi śrutiṣu graha tvam ca gṛhyate
badhyate kṣetrajñaḥ graha saṃjñakea iti sa ca kṣetrajñaḥ ā ekasmin eva śarīre badhyate śarīra atareṣu api tulya tvāt badhaasya tasmāt śarīra atara saṃcāri idam graha saṃjñakam iti arthāt uktam bhavati tathā
ca smṛtiḥ liṅgea prāṇa ādyea sa yujyate baddhasya vai badhaḥ mokṣaḥ muktasya ca iti prāk mokṣāt aviyogam
darśayati ātharvaṇe ca cakṣuḥ ca draṣṭavyam ca iti atra tulyavat hasta ādi idriyāṇi hastau ca ādātavyam ca upasthaḥ ca ca pāyuḥ ca visarjayitavyam ca pādau ca gatavyam
ca iti tathā daśa ime puruṣe prāṇāḥ ātmā ekādaśaḥ te yadā asmāt śarīra amartyāt utkrāmati atha rodayati iti ekādaśāām prāṇāām utkrātim darśayati ca prāṇa śabde a prakaraṇa vaśe saptasu eva avasthāpayitum śakyate
prakaraṇāt śabdasya balīyaḥ tvāt sarve brāhmaṇāḥ bhojayitavyāḥ iti atra api sarveṣām eva brāhmaṇāām grahaṇam yāyyam sarva śabda sāmarthyāt sarva bhoja a saṃbhavāt tu tatra sarva śabdasya vṛttiḥ āśritā iha tu a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a ca a
kiṃcid sarva śabda artha saṃkocae kāraṇam asti tasmāt atra aśeṣāṇām prāṇāām parigrahaḥ pradarśa artham ca tasmāt ekādaśa eva prāṇāḥ śabdataḥ kāryataḥ ca iti siddham aṇavaḥ ca prāṇa aṇu tva adhikaraṇam prāṇāām eva
aṇavaḥ ca ete prakṛtāḥ prāṇāḥ pratipattavyāḥ aṇu tvam ca eṣām saukṣmya paricchedau a paramāṇu tulya tvam sūkṣmāḥ ete prāṇāḥ sthūlāḥ ced syuḥ maraṇa kāle bilāt ahiḥ iva upalabhyera mriyamāṇasya pārśva sthaiḥ
paricchiāḥ ca ete prāṇāḥ sarva gatāḥ ced syuḥ utkrāti gati āgati śruti vyākopaḥ syāt tad guṇa sāra tvam ca jīvasya sidhyet sarvagatāām api vṛtti lābhaḥ śarīra deśe syāt iti ced a vṛtti mātrasya karaṇa tva upapatteḥ yat eva hi
upalabdhi sādhaam vṛttiḥ tasya eva karaṇa tvam saṃjñā mātre vivādaḥ iti tasmāt sūkṣmāḥ prāṇāḥ iti adhyavasyāmaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ ca prāṇa śraiṣṭhya adhikaraṇam mukhyaḥ ca prāṇa
itara prāṇa vat brahma vikāraḥ iti atidiśati tat ca aviśeṣeṇa eva sarva prāṇāām brahma vikāra tvam ākhyātam etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ maaḥ sarva idriyāṇi ca iti sa idriya maaḥ vyatirekeṇa prāṇasya utpatti śravaṇāt sa prāṇam asṛjata ityādi śravaṇebhyaḥ ca kimarthaḥ
adhika āśaṅkā vāraṇa arthaḥ āsadāsīye hi brahma pradhāe sūkte matra varṇaḥ bhavati a mṛtyuḥ āsīt amṛtam a tarhi a rātryā aha āsīt praketaḥ āīt avātam svadhayā tat ekam kiṃca āsa
iti iti prāṇa karma upādāāt prāk utpatteḥ satam iva prāṇam sūcayati tasmāt ajaḥ prāṇaḥ iti jāyate kasyacid matiḥ tām atideśe apaudati āīt śabdaḥ api a prāk utpatteḥ prāṇa sadbhāvam sūcayati avātam
iti viśeṣaṇāt aprāṇaḥ hi amaāḥ śubhraḥ iti ca mūlaprakṛteḥ prāṇa ādi samasta viśeṣa rahita tvasya darśita tvāt tasmāt kāraṇa sadbhāva pradarśa arthaḥ eva ayam āīt śabdaḥ iti śreṣṭhaḥ iti ca mukhyam prāṇam abhidadhāti prāṇaḥ
vāva jyeṣṭhaḥ ca śreṣṭhaḥ ca iti śruti nirdeśāt jyeṣṭhaḥ ca prāṇaḥ śukra aiṣeka kālāt ārabhya tasya vṛtti lābhāt ced tasya tadāīm vṛtti lābhaḥ syāt
saṃbhavet vā śrotra ādīām tu jyeṣṭha tvam śreṣṭhaḥ ca prāṇaḥ guṇa ādhikyāt a vai śakṣyāmaḥ tvat ṛte jīvitum iti śruteḥ a vāyu kriye pṛthak upadeśāt vāyu kriyā adhikaraṇam sa
puarmukhyaḥ prāṇaḥ kiṃsvarūpaḥ iti idāīm jijñāsyate tatra prāptam tāvat śruteḥ vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ iti evam hi śrūyate yaḥ prāṇaḥ sa vāyuḥ
saḥ eṣa vāyuḥ pañcavidhaḥ prāṇa upāaḥ vyāaḥ udāaḥ samāaḥ iti athavā tatra ātarīya abhiprāyāt samasta karaṇa vṛttiḥ prāṇaḥ iti prāptam evam hi tatra ātarīyāḥ ācakṣate sāmāyā
karaṇa vṛttiḥ prāṇa ādyāḥ vāyavaḥ pañca iti atra ucyate a vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ karaṇa vyāpāraḥ kutas pṛthak upadeśāt vāyoḥ tāvat prāṇasya pṛthak upadeśaḥ bhavati prāṇaḥ eva brahmaṇaḥ caturthaḥ pādaḥ
sa jyotiṣā bhāti ca tapati ca iti a hi vāyuḥ eva sa vāyoḥ pṛthak upadiśyeta tathā karaṇa vṛtteḥ api pṛthak upadeśaḥ bhavati
tatra tatra vṛtti vṛttimatoḥ abhedāt hi karaṇa vyāpāraḥ eva sa karaṇebhyaḥ pṛthak upadiśyeta tathā etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ sarva idriyāṇi ca kham vāyuḥ iti evamādayaḥ api
vāyoḥ karaṇebhyaḥ ca prāṇasya ca samastāām karaṇāām ekā vṛttiḥ saṃbhavati pratyekam eka eka vṛtti tvāt samudāyasya ca akāraka tvāt etat bhaviṣyati yathā eka pañjara varti anuprāṇi
ekādaśa pakṣiṇaḥ pratyekam pratiiyata vyāpārāḥ sataḥ saṃbhūya ekam pañjaram cālayati evam eka śarīravartin ekādaśa prāṇāḥ pratyekam pratiiyata vṛttayaḥ sataḥ saṃbhūya ekām prāṇa ākhyām vṛttim pratilapsyate iti ā iti ucyate
yuktam tatra pratyeka vṛttibhiḥ avātara vyāpāraiḥ pañjara cāla āurūpaiḥ eva upetāḥ pakṣiṇaḥ saṃbhūya ekam pañjaram cālayeyuḥ iti tathā dṛṣṭa tvāt iha tu śravaṇa ādi avātara vyāpāra upetāḥ prāṇāḥ a saṃbhūya prāṇyuḥ iti yuktam pramāṇa abhāvāt
atyata vijātīya tvāt ca śravaṇa ādibhyaḥ tathā prāṇasya śreṣṭha tvāt yuddha ūṣaṇam guṇa bhāva upagamaḥ ca tam prati vāc ādīām a karaṇa vṛtti mātre prāṇa iva kalpate tasmāt ayaḥ vāyu kriyābhyām prāṇaḥ katham tarhi iyam śrutiḥ yaḥ
prāṇaḥ sa vāyuḥ iti ucyate vāyuḥ eva ayam pañca vyūhaḥ prāṇaḥ bhaṇyate bheda abheda śrutī atas ca ubhe api bheda abheda śrutī
virudhyete syāt etat prāṇaḥ api tarhi jīva vat asmi śarīre svātatryam śreṣṭha tvāt guṇa bhāva upagamāt ca tam prati tathā hi a ekavidhā vibhūtiḥ prāṇasya śrāvyate
supteṣu vāc ādiṣu prāṇaḥ eva ekaḥ jāgarti prāṇaḥ eva ekaḥ mṛtyoḥ prāṇaḥ saṃvargaḥ vāc ādī saṃvṛṅkte prāṇaḥ mātā iva putrāḥ iti tasmāt prāṇasya api jīva vat
svātatrya prasaṅgaḥ tam pariharati cakṣuḥ ādi vat tu tad saha śiṣṭi ādibhyaḥ tuśabdaḥ prāṇasya jīva vat svātatryam vyāvartayati yathā rāja prakṛti vat jīvasya kartṛ tvam bhoktṛ tvam ca prati upakaraṇāi
svatatrāṇi tathā mukhyaḥ api prāṇaḥ rāja matri vat jīvasya upakaraṇa bhūtaḥ a svatatraḥ kutas tad saha śiṣṭi ādibhyaḥ taiḥ cakṣuḥ ādibhiḥ saha eva prāṇaḥ śiṣyate prāṇa saṃvāda ādiṣu ca saha
yuktam bṛhat rathaṃtara ādi vat ādi śabde saṃhata tva acetaa tva ādī prāṇasya svātatryaiḥ ākaraṇa hetū darśayati syāt etat yadi cakṣuḥ ādi vat prāṇasya jīvam prati karaṇa bhāvaḥ abhyupagamyeta viṣaya ātaram rūpa ādi vat prasajyeta rūpa āloca ādibhiḥ vṛttibhiḥ yathāsvam
jīvam prati karaṇa bhāvaḥ bhavati api ca ekādaśa eva kārya jātāi parigaṇitāi yad artham ekādaśa prāṇāḥ saṃgṛhītāḥ tu dvādaśam aparam kārya jātam avagamyate yad artham ayam dvādaśaḥ prāṇaḥ
pratijñāyate iti atas uttaram paṭhati akaraṇa tvāt ca a doṣaḥ tathā hi darśayati a tāvat viṣaya atara prasaṅgaḥ doṣaḥ akaraṇa tvāt prāṇasya a hi cakṣuḥ ādi vat prāṇasya viṣaya paricchede karaṇa tvam abhyupagamyate a
ca asya etāvatā kārya abhāvaḥ eva kasmāt tathā hi śrutiḥ mukhya prāṇasya vaiśeṣikam kāryam darśayati prāṇa saṃvāda ādiṣu atha ha prāṇāḥ aham śreyasi
vyūdire iti upakramya yasmin iva utkrāte śarīram pāpiṣṭhataram iva dṛśyeta sa vaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ iti ca upayasya pratyekam tad vṛtti mātra hīam yathāpūrvam darśayitvā prāṇa uccikramiṣāyām
vāc ādi śaithilya āpattim śarīra pāta prasaṅgam ca darśayatī śrutiḥ prāṇa aimittām śarīra idriya sthitim darśayati tau ariṣṭhaḥ prāṇaḥ uvāca mā moham āpat yathā aham eva etat pañcadhā ātmā am pravibhajya etat bāṇam avaṣṭabhya vidhārayāmi iti ca etam eva artham śrutiḥ āha prāṇa iau
kulāyam iti ca supteṣu cakṣuḥ ādiṣu prāṇa aimittām śarīra rakṣām darśayati yasmāt kasmāt ca aṅgāt prāṇaḥ utkrāmati tat eva tat śuṣyati iti yat aśāti yat pibati iti ca
prāṇa aimittām śarīra idriya puṣṭim darśayati kasmin aham utkrātaḥ utkrātaḥ bhaviṣyāmi kasmin vā pratiṣṭhite pratiṣṭhāsyāmi iti sa prāṇam asṛjata iti ca prāṇa aimitte jīvasya utkrāti pratiṣṭhe darśayati pañca vṛttiḥ maaḥ vat vyapadiśyate itas ca asti mukhyasya
prāṇasya vaiśeṣikam kāryam yatkāraṇam pañca vṛttiḥ ayam vyapadiśyate śrutiṣu prāṇa upāaḥ vyāaḥ udāaḥ samāaḥ iti vṛtti bhedaḥ ca ayam kārya bheda apekṣaḥ prāṇaḥ prāc vṛttiḥ ucchvāsa ādi karmā apāaḥ avāc vṛttiḥ riśvāsa ādi karmā vyāaḥ
tayoḥ saṃdhau vīryavat karma hetuḥ udāaḥ ūrdhva vṛttiḥ utkrāti ādi hetuḥ samāaḥ samam sarveṣu aṅgeṣu iti evam pañca vṛttiḥ prāṇaḥ mao vat yathā maasaḥ pañca vṛttayaḥ evam prāṇasya api iti arthaḥ
śrotra ādi nimittāḥ śabda ādi viṣayāḥ pañca vṛttayaḥ prasiddhāḥ a tu kāmaḥ saṃkalpaḥ bṛ u ityādyāḥ paripaṭhitāḥ gṛhyera pañca saṃkhyā atirekāt śrotra ādi irapekṣā bhūta bhaviṣyat ādi viṣayā aparā
vṛttiḥ asti iti pañca saṃkhyā atirekaḥ evam tarhi para matam apratiṣiddham aumatam bhavati iti yāyāt iha api yoga śāstra prasiddhāḥ maasaḥ pañca vṛttayaḥ parigṛhyate bahu vṛtti tva mātreṇa vā
prāṇasya iti draṣṭavyam jīva upakaraṇa tvam api prāṇasya pañca vṛtti tvāt mao vat iti vā yojayitavyam aṇuḥ ca śreṣṭha aṇu tva adhikaraṇam aṇuḥ ca ayam mukhyaḥ prāṇaḥ pratyetavyaḥ itara prāṇa vat
aṇu tvam ca iha api saukṣmya paricchedau a paramāṇu tulya tvam pañcabhiḥ vṛttibhiḥ sūkṣmaḥ prāṇaḥ utkrātau vibhu tvam api prāṇasya samāmāyate samaḥ

text1: āṇu tulya tvam pañcabhiḥ vṛttibhiḥ
text2: āṇu tulya tvam pañcabhiḥ vṛttibhiḥ

text1: sūkṣmaḥ prāṇaḥ utkrānta
text2: sūkṣmaḥ prāṇaḥ utkrāta

text1: u vibhu tvam api prāṇasya samāmnāyate samaḥ
text2: u vibhu tvam api prāṇasya samāmāyate samaḥ

text1:
samaḥ ebhiḥ tribhiḥ lokaiḥ samaḥ nena sarveṇa iti evamādiṣu pradeśeṣu
tat ucyate ādhidaivikena samaṣṭi vyaṣṭi rūpeṇa hairaṇyagarbheṇa prāṇa ātmanā eva etat vibhu tvam āmnāyate na ādhyātmikena
api ca samaḥ pluṣiṇā ityādinā sāmya vacanena pratiprāṇi vartinaḥ prāṇasya paricchedaḥ eva pradarśyate
tasmāt adoṣaḥ
jyotiḥ ādi adhiṣṭhānam tu tad āmananāt
jyotiḥ ādi adhikaraṇam
te punar prakṛtāḥ prāṇāḥ kim sva mahimnā eva svasmai svasmai kāryāya prabhavanti āhosvit devatā dhiṣṭhitāḥ prabhavanti iti vicāryate
tatra prāptam tāvat yathāsvam kārya śakti yogāt sva mahimnā eva prāṇāḥ pravarteran iti
api ca devatā dhiṣṭhitānām prāṇānām pravṛttau abhyugamyamānāyām tāsām eva adhiṣṭhātrīṇām devatānām bhoktṛ tva prasaṅgāt śārīrasya bhoktṛ tvam pralīyeta
atas sva mahimnā eva eṣām pravṛttiḥ iti
evam prāpte idam ucyate jyotiḥ ādi adhiṣṭhānam tu iti
tu śabdena pūrvapakṣaḥ vyāvartyate
jyotiḥ ādibhiḥ agni ādi abhimāninībhiḥ devatābhiḥ adhiṣṭhitam vāc ādi karaṇa jātam sva kāryeṣu pravartate iti pratijānīte
hetum ca vyācaṣṭhe tad āmananāt iti
tathā hi āmananti agniḥ vāc bhūtvā mukham prāviśat ityādi
agneḥ ca ayam vāc bhāvaḥ mukha praveśaḥ ca devatā ātmanā adhiṣṭhātṛ tvam aṅgīkṛtya ucyate
na hi devatā saṃbandham pratyākhyāya agneḥ vāci mukhe vā kaścid viśeṣa saṃbandhaḥ dṛśyate
tathā vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ bhūtvā nāsike prāviśat iti evamādi api yojayitavyam
tathā anyatra api vāc eva brahmaṇaḥ caturthaḥ pādaḥ saḥ gninā jyotiṣā bhāti ca tapati ca iti evamādinā vāc ādīnām agni ādi jyotiṣṭva ādi vacanena etam eva artham draḍhayati
sa vai vācam eva prathamām atyavahat sā yadā mṛtyum atyamucyata saḥ gniḥ abhavat iti ca evamādinā vāc ādīnām agni ādi bhāva āpatti vacanena etam eva artham dyotayati
sarvatra ca adhyātma adhidaivata vibhāgena vāc ādi agni ādi anukramaṇam anayā eva pratyāsattyā bhavati
smṛtau api vāc adhyātmam iti prāhuḥ brāhmaṇāḥ tattva darśinaḥ
vaktavyam adhibhūtam tu vahniḥ tatra adhidaivatam ityādinā vāc ādīnām agni ādi devatā adhiṣṭhita tvam sa prapañcam pradarśitam
yat uktam sva kārya śakti yogāt sva mahimnā eva prāṇāḥ pravarteran iti tat ayuktam śaktānām api śakaṭa ādīnām anaḍuha ādi adhiṣṭhitānām pravṛtti darśanāt
ubhayathā upapattau ca āgamāt vāc ādīnām devatā dhiṣṭhita tvam eva niścīyate
yat api uktam devatānām eva adhiṣṭhātrīṇām bhoktṛ tva prasaṅgaḥ na śārīrasya iti tat parihriyate
prāṇavatā śabdāt
satīṣu api prāṇānām adhiṣṭhātrīṣu devatāsu prāṇavatā kārya karaṇa saṃghāta svāminā śārīreṇa eva eṣām prāṇānām saṃbandhaḥ śruteḥ avagamyate
tathā hi śrutiḥ atha yatra etat ākāśam anuviṣaṇṇam cakṣuḥ sa cākṣuṣaḥ puruṣaḥ darśanāya cakṣuḥ atha yaḥ veda idam jighrāṇi iti saḥ ātmā gandhāya ghrāṇam iti evaṃjātīyakā śārīreṇa eva prāṇānām saṃbandham śrāvayati
api ca aneka tvāt pratikaraṇam adhiṣṭhātrīṇām devatānām na bhoktṛ tvam asmin śarīre vakalpate
ekaḥ hi ayam asmin śarīre śārīraḥ bhoktā pratisaṃdhāna ādi saṃbhavāt avagamyate
tasya ca nitya tvāt
tasya ca śārīrasya asmin śarīre bhoktṛ tvena nitya tvam puṇya pāpa upalepa saṃbhavāt sukha duḥkha upabhoga saṃbhavāt ca na devatānām
tāḥ hi parasmin aiśvarye pade vatiṣṭhamānāḥ na hīne smin śarīre bhoktṛ tvam pratilabdhum arhanti
śrutiḥ ca bhavati puṇyam eva amum gacchati na ha vai devān pāpam gacchati iti
śārīreṇa eva ca nityaḥ prāṇānām saṃbandhaḥ utkrānti ādiṣu tad anuvṛtti darśanāt tam utkrāmantam prāṇaḥ nu utkrāmati prāṇam anūtkrāmantam sarve prāṇāḥ anūtkrāmanti ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
tasmāt satīṣu api karaṇānām niyantrīṣu devatāsu na śārīrasya bhoktṛ tvam apagacchati
karaṇa pakṣasya eva hi devatā na bhoktṛ pakṣasya iti
te indriyāṇi tad vyapadeśāt anyatra śreṣṭhāt
indriya adhikaraṇam
mukhyaḥ ca ekaḥ itare ca ekādaśa prāṇāḥ anukrāntāḥ
tatra idam a param saṃdihyate kim mukhyasya eva prāṇasya vṛtti bhedāḥ itare prāṇāḥ āhosvit tattva antarāṇi iti
kim tāvat prāptam mukhyasya eva itare vṛtti bhedāḥ iti
kutas
śruteḥ
tathā hi śrutiḥ mukhyam itarān ca prāṇān saṃnidhāpya mukhya ātma tām itareṣām khyāpayati hanta asya eva sarve rūpam asāma iti te etasya eva sarve rūpam abhavan iti
prāṇa eka śabda tvāt ca eka tva adhyavasāyaḥ
itarathā hi anyāyyam aneka artha tvam prāṇa śabdasya prasajyeta ekatra vā mukhyasya itaratra lākṣaṇika tvam āpadyeta
tasmāt yathā ekasya eva prāṇasya prāṇa ādyāḥ pañca vṛttayaḥ evam vāc ādyāḥ api ekādaśa iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ tattva antarāṇi eva prāṇāt vāc ādīni iti
kutas
vyapadeśa bhedāt
kaḥ yam vyapadeśa bhedaḥ
te prakṛtāḥ prāṇāḥ śreṣṭham varjayitvā avaśiṣṭāḥ ekādaśa indriyāṇi iti ucyante śrutau evam vyapadeśa bheda darśanāt etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ manaḥ sarva indriyāṇi ca iti hi evaṃjātīyakeṣu pradeśeṣu pṛthak prāṇaḥ vyapadiśyate pṛthak ca indriyāṇi
nanu manasaḥ api evam sati varjanam indriya tvena prāṇa vat syāt manaḥ sarva indriyāṇi ca iti pṛthak vyapadeśa darśanāt
satyam etat smṛtau tu ekādaśa indriyāṇi iti manaḥ pi indriya tvena śrotra ādi vat saṃgṛhyate
prāṇasya tu indriya tvam na śrutau smṛtau vā prasiddham asti
vyapadeśa bhedaḥ ca ayam tattva bheda pakṣe upapadyate
tattva ekatve tu saḥ eva ekaḥ san prāṇe indriya vyapadeśam labhate na labhate ca iti vipratiṣiddham
tasmāt tattva antara bhūtāḥ mukhyāt itare
kutas ca tattva antara bhūtāḥ
bheda śruteḥ
bhedena vāc ādibhyaḥ prāṇaḥ sarvatra śrūyate te ha vācam ūcuḥ iti upakramya vāc ādīn asura pāpma vidhvastān upanyasya upasaṃhṛtya vāc ādi prakaraṇam atha ha imam āsanyam prāṇam ūcuḥ iti asura vidhvaṃsinaḥ mukhyasya prāṇasya pṛthak upakramaṇāt
tathā manaḥ vācam prāṇam tāni ātmane kurute iti evamādyāḥ api bheda śrutayaḥ udāhartavyāḥ
tasmāt api tattva antara bhūtāḥ mukhyāt itare
kutas ca tattva antara bhūtāḥ
vailakṣaṇyāt ca
vailakṣaṇyam ca bhavati mukhyasya itareṣām ca supteṣu vāc ādiṣu mukhyaḥ ekaḥ jāgarti
saḥ eva ca ekaḥ mṛtyunā anāptaḥ āptāḥ tu itare tasya eva ca sthiti utkrāntibhyām deha dhāraṇa patana hetu tvam na indriyāṇām
viṣaya ālocana hetu tvam ca indriyāṇām na prāṇasya iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ bhūyān lakṣaṇa bhedaḥ prāṇa indriyāṇām
tasmāt api eṣām tattva antara bhāva siddhiḥ
yat uktam te etasya eva sarve rūpam abhavan iti śruteḥ prāṇaḥ eva indriyāṇi iti tat ayuktam tatra api paurvāparya ālocanāt bheda pratīteḥ
tathā hi vadiṣyāmi eva aham iti vāc dadhre iti vāc ādīni indriyāṇi anukramya tāni mṛtyuḥ śramaḥ bhūtvā upayeme tasmāt śrāmyati eva vāc iti ca śrama rūpeṇa mṛtyunā grasta tvam vāc ādīnām abhidhāya atha imam eva na āpnodyaḥ yam madhyamaḥ prāṇaḥ iti pṛthak prāṇam mṛtyunā an abhibhūtam tam anukrāmati
ayam vai naḥ śreṣṭhaḥ iti ca śreṣṭha tām asya avadhārayati tasmāt tad avirodhena vāc ādiṣu parispanda lābhasya prāṇa āyatta tvam tad rūpa bhavanam vāc ādīnām iti mantavyam na tu tādātmyam
atas eva ca prāṇa śabdasya indriyeṣu lākṣaṇika tva siddhiḥ
tathā ca śrutiḥ te etasya eva sarve rūpam abhavan
tasmāt ete etena ākhyāyante prāṇāḥ iti mukhya prāṇa viṣayasya eva prāṇa śabdasya indriyeṣu lākṣaṇikīm vṛttim darśayati
tasmāt tattva antarāṇi prāṇāt vāc ādīni indriyāṇi iti
saṃjñā mūrti klṛptiḥ tu trivṛt kurvataḥ upadeśāt
saṃjñā mūrti klṛpti adhikaraṇam
sat prakriyāyām tejaḥ bannānām sṛṣṭim abhidhāya upadiśyate sā iyam devatā aikṣata hanta aham imāḥ tisraḥ devatāḥ anena jīvena ātmanā anupraviśya nāma rūpe vyākaravāṇi iti
tāsām trivṛtam trivṛtam ekaikām karavāṇi iti tatra saṃśayaḥ kim jīva kartṛkam idam nāma rūpa vyākaraṇam āhosvit parameśvara kartṛkam iti
tatra prāptam tāvat jīva kartṛkam eva idam nāma rūpa vyākaraṇam iti
kutas
anena jīvena ātmanā iti viśeṣaṇāt yathā loke cāreṇa aham para sainyam anupraviśya saṃkalayāni iti evaṃjātīyake prayoge cāra kartṛkam eva sat sainya saṃkalanam hetu kartṛ tvāt rājā ātmani adhyāropayati saṃkalayāni iti uttama puruṣa prayogeṇa
evam jīva kartṛkam eva sat nāma rūpa vyākaraṇam hetu kartṛ tvāt devatāḥ ātmani adhyāropayati vyākaravāṇi iti uttamapuruṣa prayogeṇa
api ca ḍittha ḍavittha ādiṣu nāmasu ghaṭa śarāva ādiṣu ca rūpeṣu jīvasya eva vyākartṛ tvam dṛṣṭam
tasmāt jīva kartṛkam eva idam nāma rūpa vyākaraṇam iti evam prāpte abhidhatte saṃjñā mūrti klṛptiḥ tu iti
tu śabdena pakṣam vyāvartayati
saṃjñā mūrti klṛptiḥ iti nāma rūpa vyākriyā iti etat
trivṛt kurvataḥ iti parameśvaram lakṣayati trivṛt karaṇe tasya nirapavāda kartṛ tva nirdeśāt yā iyam saṃjñā klṛptiḥ mūrti klṛptiḥ ca agniḥ ādityaḥ candramāḥ vidyut iti tathā kuśa kāśa palāśa ādiṣu paśu mṛga manuṣya ādiṣu ca pratyākṛti prativyakti ca aneka prakārā sā khalu parameśvarasya eva tejaḥ bannānām nirmātuḥ kṛtiḥ bhavitum arhati
kutas
upadeśāt
tathā hi sā iyam devatā iti upakramya vyākaravāṇi iti uttamapuruṣa prayogeṇa parasya eva brahmaṇaḥ vyākartṛ tvam iha upadiśyate
nanu jīvena iti viśeṣaṇāt jīva kṛrtṛka tvam vyākaraṇasya adhyavasitam na etat evam
jīvena iti etat anupraviśya iti anena saṃbadhyate ānantaryāt
na vyākaravāṇi iti anena tena hi saṃbandhe vyākaravāṇi iti ayam devatā viṣaye uttama puruṣaḥ aupacārikaḥ kalpyeta
na ca giri nadī samudra ādiṣu nānāvidheṣu nāma rūpeṣu anīśvarasya jīvasya vyākaraṇa sāmarthyam asti
yeṣu api ca asti sāmarthyam teṣu api parameśvara āyattam eva tat
na ca jīvaḥ nāma parameśvarāt atyanta bhinnaḥ cāraḥ iva rājñaḥ ātmanā iti viśeṣaṇāt upādhi mātra nibandhana tvāt ca jīva bhāvasya
tena tat kṛtam api nāma rūpa vyākaraṇam parameśvara kṛtam eva bhavati
parameśvaraḥ eva ca nāma rūpayoḥ vyākartā iti sarva upaniṣad siddhāntaḥ ākāśaḥ ha vai nāma nāma rūpayoḥ nirvahitā ityādi śrutibhyaḥ
tasmāt parameśvarasya eva trivṛt kurvataḥ karma nāma rūpa vyākaraṇam
trivṛtkaraṇa pūrvakam eva idam iha nāma rūpa vyākaraṇam vivakṣyate pratyekam nāma rūpa vyākaraṇasya tejaḥ banna utpatti vacanena eva ukta tvāt
tat ca trivṛtkaraṇam agni āditya candra vidyutsu śrutiḥ darśayati yat agneḥ rohitam rūpam tejasaḥ tat rūpam yat śuklam tat apām yat kṛṣṇam tat annasya ityādinā
tatra agniḥ iti idam rūpam vyākriyate sati ca rūpa vyākaraṇe viṣaya pratilambhāt agniḥ iti idam nāma vyākriyate
evam eva āditya candra vidyutsu api draṣṭavyam
anena ca agni ādi udāharaṇena bhauma ambhasa taijaseṣu triṣu api dravyeṣu aviśeṣeṇa trivṛtkaraṇam uktam bhavati upakrama upasaṃhārayoḥ sādhāraṇa tvāt
tathā hi aviśeṣeṇa eva upakramaḥ imāḥ tisraḥ devatāḥ trivṛt itravṛt ekaikā bhavati iti aviśeṣeṇa eva ca upasaṃhāraḥ yat u rohitam iva abhūt iti tejasaḥ tat rūpam iti evamādiḥ yat u avijñātam iva abhūt iti etāsām eva devatānām samāsaḥ iti evamantaḥ
tāsām tisṛṇām devatānām bahis trivṛt kṛtānām satīnām adhyātmam aparam trivṛt karaṇam uktam imāḥ tisraḥ devatāḥ puruṣam prāpya trivṛt itravṛt ekaikā bhavati iti
tat idānīm ācāryaḥ yathāśrutyā iva upadarśayati āśaṅkitam kaṃcid doṣam parihariṣyan
māṃsa ādi bhaumam yathāśabdam itarayoḥ ca
bhūmeḥ trivṛtkṛtāyāḥ puruṣeṇa upabhujyamānāyāḥ māṃsa ādi kāryam yathāśabdam niṣpadyate
tathā hi śrutiḥ annam aśitam tredhā vidhīyate tasya yaḥ sthaviṣṭhaḥ dhātuḥ tat purīṣam bhavati yaḥ madhyamaḥ tat māṃsam yaḥ ṇiṣṭhaḥ tat manaḥ iti
trivṛtkṛtā bhūmiḥ eva eṣā vrīhi yava ādi anna rūpeṇa adyate iti abhiprāyaḥ
tasyāḥ ca sthaviṣṭham rūpam purīṣa bhāvena bahis nirgacchati
madhyamam adhyātmam māṃsam vardhayati
aṇiṣṭham tu manaḥ
evam itarayoḥ ap tejasoḥ yathāśabdam kāryam avagantavyam mūtram lohitam prāṇaḥ ca apām kāryam asthi majjā vāc tejasaḥ iti
atra āha yadi sarvam eva trivṛt kṛtam bhūta bhautikam a viśeṣa śruteḥ tāsām trivṛtam trivṛtam ekaikām akarot iti kim kṛtaḥ tarhi ayam viśeṣa vyapadeśaḥ idam tejaḥ imāḥ āpaḥ idam annam iti
tathā adhyātmam idam annasya aśitasya kāryam māṃsa ādi idam apām pītānām kāryam lohita ādi idam tejasaḥ u śitasya kāryam asthi ādi iti
atrā ucyate
vaiśeṣyāt tu tad vādaḥ tad vādaḥ
tu śabdena coditam doṣam apanudati
viśeṣasya bhāvaḥ vaiśeṣyam bhūyaḥ tvam iti yāvat
sati api trivṛtkaraṇe kvacid kasyacid bhūta dhātoḥ bhūyaḥ tvam upalabhyate agneḥ tejaḥ bhūyaḥ tvam udakasya ap bhūyaḥ tvam pṛthivyāḥ anna bhūyaḥ tvam iti
vyavahāra prasiddhi artham ca idam trivṛtkaraṇam
vyavahāraḥ ca trivṛtkṛta rajju vat eka tva āpattau satyām na bhedena bhūta traya gocaraḥ lokasya prasidhyet
tasmāt sati api trivṛtkaraṇe vaiśeṣyāt eva
text2:
samaḥ ebhiḥ tribhiḥ lokaiḥ samaḥ sarveṇa iti evamādiṣu pradeśeṣu tat ucyate ādhidaivikea samaṣṭi vyaṣṭi rūpeṇa hairaṇyagarbheṇa prāṇa ātmā eva etat vibhu tvam āmāyate a ādhyātmikea api
ca samaḥ prāṇasya paricchedaḥ eva pradarśyate tasmāt adoṣaḥ jyotiḥ ādi adhiṣṭhāam tu jyotiḥ ādi adhikaraṇam te puaḥ prakṛtāḥ prāṇāḥ kim
sva mahimā eva svasmai svasmai kāryāya prabhavati āhosvit devatā dhiṣṭhitāḥ prabhavati iti vicāryate tatra prāptam tāvat yathāsvam kārya śakti yogāt sva mahimā eva prāṇāḥ pravarteraiti api ca devatā dhiṣṭhitāḥ
prāṇāām pravṛttau abhyugamyamāāyām tāsām eva adhiṣṭhātrīṇām devatāām bhoktṛ tva prasaṅgāt śārīrasya bhoktṛ tvam pralīyeta atas sva mahimā eva eṣām pravṛttiḥ iti evam prāpte idam ucyate tu iti tuśabdena pūrvapakṣaḥ
vyāvartyate jyotiḥ ādibhiḥ agi ādi abhimāiībhiḥ devatābhiḥ adhiṣṭhitam vāc ādi karaṇa jātam sva kāryeṣu pravartate iti hetum ca vyācaṣṭhe tat āmaaāt iti tathā hi agiḥ vāc bhūtvā mukham prāviśat ityādi ageḥ ca ayam vāc bhāvaḥ
mukha praveśaḥ ca devatā ātmā adhiṣṭhātṛ tvam aṅgīkṛtya ucyate hi devatā saṃbadham pratyākhyāya ageḥ vāci mukhe vā kaścid viśeṣa saṃbadhaḥ dṛśyate tathā vāyuḥ prāṇaḥ bhūtvā āsike prāviśat
iti evamādi api yojayitavyam tathā vāc eva brahmaṇaḥ caturthaḥ pādaḥ jyotiṣā bhāti ca tapati ca iti evamādiā vāc ādīām etam eva artham draḍhayati sa vai
vācam eva prathamām atyavahat sā yadā mṛtyum atyamucyata iti ca evamādiā etam eva artham dyotayati sarvatra ca adhyātma adhidaivata vibhāge pratyāsattyā bhavati smṛtau api vāc adhyātmam iti
prāhuḥ brāhmaṇāḥ tattva darśiṇaḥ vaktavyam adhibhūtam tu vahis tatra adhidaivatam ityādiā vāc ādīām agi ādi devatā dhiṣṭhita tvam sa prapañcam pradarśitam yat uktam sva kārya śakti yogāt sva mahimā eva prāṇāḥ pravarteraiti tat ayuktam śaktāām api śakaṭa ādīām aaḍuha ādi adhiṣṭhitāām pravṛtti darśaāt ubhayathā upapattau ca āgamāt vāc ādīām agi ādi devatā adhiṣṭhātām pravṛtti darśaāt ubhayathā upapattau ca āgamāt vāc ādīām
devatā adhiṣṭhita tvam eva yat api uktam devatāām eva adhiṣṭhātrīṇām bhoktṛ tva prasaṅgaḥ a śārīrasya iti tat parihriyate prāṇavatā śabdāt satīṣu api prāṇāām adhiṣṭhātrīṣu devatāsu prāṇavatā kārya karaṇa saṃghāta śārīreṇa eva eṣām prāṇāām śruteḥ avagamyate
tathā hi śrutiḥ atha yatra etat ākāśam auviṣaṇṇam cakṣuḥ sa cākṣuṣaḥ puruṣaḥ darśaāya cakṣuḥ atha yaḥ veda idam jighrāṇi iti saḥ ātmā gadhāya ghrāṇam iti evaṃjātīyakā śārīreṇa eva
śrāvayati api ca a eka tvāt pratikaraṇam adhiṣṭhātrīṇām devatāām bhoktṛ tvam asmi ekaḥ hi ayam asmi śarīre śārīraḥ bhoktā pratisaṃdhā ādi saṃbhavāt avagamyate tasya ca itya tvāt
tasya ca śārīrasya asmi śarīre puṇya pāpa upalepa saṃbhavāt sukha duḥkha upabhoga saṃbhavāt ca hi śarīre bhoktṛ tvam pratilabdhum arhati śrutiḥ ca
bhavati puṇyam eva amum gacchati ha vai deva apāpam gacchati iti śārīreṇa eva ca prāṇānām saṃbadhaḥ utkrāti ādiṣu tad auvṛtti darśaāt tam utkrāmatam prāṇaḥ utkrāmati prāṇam a ūtkrāmatam sarve
prāṇāḥ aūtkrāmati ityādi śrutibhyaḥ tasmāt satīṣu api karaṇāām iyatrīṣu devatāsu a śārīrasya bhoktṛ tvam apagacchati karaṇa pakṣasya eva hi devatā a bhoktṛ pakṣasya iti te idriyāṇi tad vyapadeśāt ayatra śreṣṭhāt
idriya adhikaraṇam mukhyaḥ ca ekaḥ itare ca ekādaśa prāṇāḥ aukrātāḥ tatra idam a param saṃdihyate kim mukhyasya eva prāṇasya vṛtti bhedāḥ itare prāṇāḥ āhosvit tattva ātarāṇi iti kim tāvat prāptam mukhyasya eva itare
vṛtti bhedāḥ iti kutas śruteḥ tathā hi śrutiḥ mukhyam itarān ca mukhya ātma tām itareṣām khyāpayati hata asya eva sarve rūpam asāma iti te etasya eva sarve rūpam abhavaḥ iti prāṇa eka śabda tvāt ca
ekatva adhyavasāyaḥ itarathā hi ayāyyam a eka artha tvam prāṇa śabdasya prasajyeta ekatra vā mukhyasya itaratra lākṣaṇika tvam āpadyeta tasmāt yathā ekasya eva prāṇasya prāṇa ādyāḥ pañca vṛttayaḥ evam vāc ādyāḥ api ekādaśā iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ
kutas vyapadeśa bhedāt kaḥ yam vyapadeśa bhedaḥ te prakṛtāḥ prāṇāḥ śreṣṭham varjayitvā avaśiṣṭāḥ ekādaśa idriyāṇi iti ucyate śrutau evam vyapadeśa bheda darśaāt etasmāt jāyate prāṇaḥ sarva idriyāṇi ca
iti hi evaṃjātīyakeṣu pradeśeṣu pṛthak prāṇaḥ vyapadiśyate pṛthak ca idriyāṇi sati prāṇa vat syāt maaḥ sarva idriyāṇi ca iti pṛthak vyapadeśa darśaāt
satyam etat smṛtau tu ekādaśa idriyāṇi iti śrotra ādi vat saṃgṛhyate prāṇasya tu idriya tvam a śrutau smṛtau vā prasiddham asti vyapadeśa bhedaḥ ca ayam tattva bheda pakṣe upapadyate tattva ekatve
tu saḥ eva ekaḥ sa prāṇa idriya vyapadeśam labhate a labhate ca iti vipratiṣiddham tasmāt tattva atara bhūtāḥ mukhyāt itare kutas ca tattva atara bhūtāḥ bheda śruteḥ vāc ādibhyaḥ prāṇaḥ
sarvatra śrūyate te ha vācam ūcuḥ iti upakramya upasaṃhṛtya vāc ādi prakaraṇam atha ha imam āsayam prāṇam ūcuḥ iti asura vidhvaṃsiḥ mukhyasya prāṇasya pṛthak upakramaṇāt tathā vācam prāṇam
iti evamādyāḥ api bheda śrutayaḥ udāhartavyāḥ tasmāt api tattva atara bhūtāḥ mukhyāt itare kutas ca tattva atara bhūtāḥ vailakṣaṇyāt ca vailakṣaṇyam ca bhavati mukhyasya itareṣām ca supteṣu vāc ādiṣu mukhya antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar antar an
ekaḥ jāgarti saḥ eva ca ekaḥ mṛtyuā a āptaḥ āptāḥ tu itare tasya eva ca sthiti utkrātibhyām idriyāṇām viṣaya āloca a hetu tvam ca idriyāṇām a prāṇasya
iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ bhūyāt lakṣaṇa bhedaḥ prāṇa idriyāṇām tasmāt api eṣām tattva atara bhāva siddhiḥ yat uktam te etasya eva sarve rūpam abhavaḥ iti śruteḥ prāṇe eva idriyāṇi iti tat ayuktam tatra api paurvāparya ālocaāt bheda pratīteḥ tathā hi vadiṣyāmi eva aham iti
vāc dadhre iti mṛtyuḥ śramaḥ bhūtvā upayeme tasmāt śrāmyati eva vāc iti ca śrama rūpeṇa mṛtyuā grasta tvam vāc ādīām abhidhāya atha imam eva madhyamaḥ prāṇaḥ iti
pṛthak prāṇam mṛtyunā a abhibhūtam ayam vai śreṣṭhaḥ iti ca śreṣṭha tām asya avadhārayati tasmāt vāc ādiṣu parispada lābhasya prāṇa āyatta tvam vāc ādīām iti
matavyam a tu tādātmyam atas eva ca prāṇa śabdasya idriyeṣu lākṣaṇika tva siddhiḥ tathā ca śrutiḥ te etasya eva sarve rūpam abhava tasmāt ete ete ākhyāyate prāṇāḥ iti
mukhya prāṇa viṣayasya eva prāṇa śabdasya idriyeṣu lākṣaṇikīm vṛttim darśayati prāṇāt vāc ādīni idriyāṇi iti saṃjñā mūrti klṛptiḥ tu trivṛt kurvataḥ upadeśāt saṃjñā mūrti klṛpti adhikaraṇam sat prakriyāyām sṛṣṭim abhidhāya upadiśyate sā iyam devatā aikṣata hatā aham imāḥ tisraḥ devatāḥ
āma rūpe vyākaravāṇi iti tāsām trivṛtam trivṛtam ekaikām karavāṇi iti tatra saṃśayaḥ kim jīva kartṛkam idam āma rūpa vyākaraṇam āhosvit parameśvara kartṛkam iti tatra prāptam tāvat jīva kartṛkam eva idam āma rūpa vyākaraṇam iti kutas
iti viśeṣaṇāt yathā loke cāreṇa aham saṃkalayāi iti evaṃjātīyake prayoge cāra kartṛkam eva sat hetu kartṛ tvāt rājā hetu kartṛkam eva
sat āma rūpa vyākaraṇam hetu kartṛ tvāt devatāḥ ātmayā adhyāropayati vyākaravāṇi iti uttamapuruṣa prayogeṇa api ca ḍittha ḍavittha ādiṣu āmasu ghaṭa śarāva ādiṣu ca rūpeṣu jīvasya eva vyākartṛ tvam dṛṣṭam tasmāt jīva kartṛkam eva idam āma rūpa vyākaraṇam iti evam prāpte abhidhatte
saṃjñā mūrti klṛptiḥ tu iti tuśabde pakṣam vyāvartayati saṃjñā mūrti klṛptiḥ iti āma rūpa vyākriyā iti etat trivṛt kurvataḥ iti parameśvaram lakṣayati trivṛt karaṇe tasya yā iyam saṃjñā klṛptiḥ mūrti klṛptiḥ ca agiḥ ādityaḥ cadramāḥ vidyut iti
tathā kuśa kāśa palāśa ādiṣu paśu mṛga mauṣya ādiṣu ca pratyākṛti prativyakti ca aeka prakārā sā khalu parameśvarasya eva kṛtiḥ bhavitum arhati kutas upadeśāt tathā hi sā iyam devatā
iti upakramya vyākaravāṇi iti uttamapuruṣa prayogeṇa parasya eva brahmaṇaḥ vyākartṛ tvam iha upadiśyate iti viśeṣaṇāt jīva kṛrtṛka tvam vyākaraṇasya adhyavasitam saṃbadhyate aupraviśyaḥ saṃbadhyate
vyākaravāṇi hi vyākaravāṇi iti ayam devatā viṣaye uttama puruṣa aupacārikaḥ kalpyeta ca giri adī samudra ādiṣu aāvidheṣu aīśvarasya jīvasya vyākaraṇa sāmarthyam asti yeṣu api
ca asti sāmarthyam teṣu api parameśvara āyattam eva tat ca cāraḥ iva rājñaḥ iti viśeṣaṇāt jīva bhāvasya
tad kṛtam api āma rūpa vyākaraṇam parameśvara kṛtam eva bhavati parameśvaraḥ eva ca āma rūpayoḥ vyākartā iti sarva upaiṣat siddhātaḥ ākāśaḥ ha vai āmaḥ āma rūpayoḥ irvahitā ityādi śrutibhyaḥ tasmāt parameśvarasya eva trivṛt kurvataḥ karma āma rūpa vyākaraṇam
trivṛtkaraṇa pūrvakam eva idam iha āma rūpa vyākaraṇam vivakṣyate pratyekam āma rūpa vyākaraṇasya tat ca trivṛtkaraṇam agi āditya cadra vidyutsu śrutiḥ darśayati yat age rohitam rūpam tejasaḥ tat rūpam yat śuklam tat apām yat kṛṣṇam tat aasya iti ādiā tatra agiḥ iti
idam rūpam vyākriyate sati ca rūpa vyākaraṇe viṣaya pratilambhāt agiḥ iti idam vyākriyate evam eva āditya ca dra vidyutsu api draṣṭavyam ca bhauma ambhasa taijaseṣu triṣu api dravyeṣu aviśeṣeṇa trivṛtkaraṇam uktam bhavati
upakrama upasaṃhārayoḥ sādhāraṇa tvāt tathā hi aviśeṣeṇa eva upakramaḥ imāḥ tisraḥ devatāḥ trivṛt itravṛt ekaikā bhavati iti aviśeṣeṇa eva ca upasaṃhāraḥ yat u rohitam iva abhūt iti tejasaḥ tat rūpam iti evamādiḥ yat u avijñātam iva abhūt iti etāsām eva devatāām samāsaḥ
iti evam atas tāsām tisṛṇām devatāām bahis trivṛt kṛtāām satīām adhyātmam aparam trivṛt karaṇam uktam imāḥ tisraḥ devatāḥ puruṣam prāpya trivṛt itravṛt ekaikā bhavati iti tat idāīm ācāryaḥ yathāśrutyā eva upadarśayati āśaṅkitam kaṃcid doṣam
parihariṣya māṃsa ādi bhaumam yathāśabdam itarayoḥ ca bhūmeḥ trivṛtkṛtāyāḥ puruṣeṇa upabhujyamāāyāḥ māṃsa ādi kāryam yathāśabdam iṣpadyate tathā hi śrutiḥ tredhā vidhīyate tasya yaḥ sthaviṣṭhaḥ dhātuḥ tat purīṣam bhavati
yaḥ madhyamaḥ tamāṃsam yoṇiṣṭhaḥ tamaaḥ iti trivṛtkṛtā bhūmiḥ eva eṣā adyate iti abhiprāyaḥ tasyāḥ ca sthaviṣṭham rūpam madhyamam adhyātmam māṃsam vardhayati aṇiṣṭham tu
evam itarayoḥ ap tejasoḥ yathāśabdam kāryam avagatavyam mūtram lohitam prāṇaḥ ca apām kāryam asthi majjā vāc tejasaḥ iti atra āha yadi sarvam eva trivṛt kṛtam bhūta bhautikam aviśeṣa śruteḥ tāsām trivṛtam asthi
trivṛtam ekaikām akarot iti kiṃkṛtaḥ tarhi ayam viśeṣa vyapadeśaḥ idam tejaḥ imāḥ āpaḥ idam aam iti tathā adhyātmam idam aasya aśitasya kāryam māṃsa ādi idam apām pītāām kāryam lohita ādi idam
tejasā uśitasya kāryam asthi ādi iti atra ucyate vaiśeṣyāt tu tad vādaḥ tad vādaḥ ca uditam viśeṣasya bhāvaḥ vaiśeṣyam bhūyaḥ tvam iti yāvat sati api trivṛt karaṇe kvacid kasyacid bhūta dhātoḥ bhūyaḥ tvam upalabhyate ageḥ tejaḥ bhūyaḥ tvam udakasya ap bhūyaḥ tvam pṛthivyāḥ
iti vyavahāra prasiddhi artham ca idam trivṛtkaraṇam vyavahāraḥ ca trivṛt kṛta rajju vat ekatva āpattau satyām a bhede bhūta traya gocaraḥ lokasya prasidhyet tasmāt sati api trivṛtkaraṇe vaiśeṣyāt eva

text1:
iti
vyavahāra prasiddhi artham ca idam trivṛtkaraṇam
vyavahāraḥ ca trivṛtkṛta rajju vat eka tva āpattau satyām na bhedena bhūta traya gocaraḥ lokasya prasidhyet
tasmāt sati api trivṛtkaraṇe vaiśeṣyāt eva tejaḥ banna viśeṣa vādaḥ bhūta bhautika viṣayaḥ upapadyate
tad vādaḥ tad vādaḥ iti pada abhyāsaḥ adhyāya parisamāptim dyotayati
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye dvitīyaḥ dhyāyaḥ

tṛtīyaḥ dhyāyaḥ
prathamaḥ pādaḥ
tad antara pratipattau raṃhati sampariṣvaktaḥ praśna nirūpaṇābhyām
tad antara pratipatti adhikaraṇam
dvitīye
adhyāye smṛti nyāya virodhaḥ vedānta vihite brahma darśane parihṛtaḥ
parapakṣāṇām ca anapekṣa tvam prapañcitam
śruti vipratiṣedhaḥ ca parihṛtaḥ
tatra ca jīva vyatiriktāni tattvāni jīva upakaraṇāni brahmaṇaḥ jāyante iti uktam
atha idānīm upakaraṇa upahitasya jīvasya saṃsāra gati prakāraḥ tad avasthā antarāṇi brahma tattvam vidyā bheda abhedau guṇa upasaṃhāra anupasaṃhārau samyak darśanāt puruṣa artha siddhaḥ samyak darśana upāya vidhi prabhedaḥ mukti phala aniyamaḥ ca iti etad artha jātam tṛtīye
adhyāye nirūpayiṣyate prasaṅga āgatam ca kim api anyat
tatra prathame tāvat pāde pañcāgni vidyām āśritya saṃsāra gati prabhedaḥ pradarśyate vairāgya hetoḥ
tasmāt jugupset iti ca ante śravaṇāt
jīvaḥ mukhya prāṇa sacivaḥ sa indriyaḥ sa manaḥ kaḥ
avidyā karma pūrva prajñā parigrahaḥ pūrva deham vihāya deha antaram pratipadyate iti etat avagatam
atha enam ete prāṇāḥ abhisamāyanti iti evamādeḥ anyan avataram kalyāṇataram rūpam kurute
iti evama antāt saṃsāra prakaraṇa sthāt śabdāt dharma adharma phala upabhoga saṃbhavāt ca
sa kim deha bījaiḥ bhūta sūkṣmaiḥ a saṃpariṣvaktaḥ gacchati āhosvit saṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti cintyate
kim tāvat prāptam
a saṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti
kutas
karaṇa upādāna vat bhūta upādānasya a śruta tvāt
saḥ etāḥ tejaḥ mātrāḥ samabhyādadānaḥ SNPaPrM
iti hi atra tejaḥ mātrā śabdena karaṇānām upādānam saṃkīrtayati
vākya śeṣe cakṣuḥ ādi saṃkīrtanāt
na evam bhūtamātra upādāna saṃkīrtanam asti
sulabhāḥ ca sarvatra bhūtamātrāḥ
yatra eva dehaḥ ārabdhavyaḥ tatra eva santi tatas ca tāsām nayanam niṣprayojanam
tasmāt a saṃpariṣvaktaḥ yāti iti
evam prāpte paṭhati ācāryaḥ tad antara pratipattau raṃhati saṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti
tad antara pratipattau deha antara pratipattau deha bījaiḥ bhūta sūkṣmaiḥ saṃpariṣvaktaḥ raṃhati gacchati iti avagantavyam
kutas
praśna nirūpaṇābhyām
tathā hi praśnaḥ vettha yathā pañcamyām āhutau āpaḥ puruṣa vacasaḥ bhavanti iti
nirūpaṇam ca prativacanam dyu parjanya pṛthivī puruṣa yoṣitsu pañcasu agniṣu śraddhā soma vṛṣṭi anna retaḥ rūpāḥ pañca āhutīḥ darśayitvā iti tu pañcamyām āhutau āpaḥ puruṣa vacasaḥ bhavanti iti
tasmāt adbhiḥ pariveṣṭitaḥ jīvaḥ raṃhati vrajati iti gamyate
nanu anyā śrutiḥ jalūkā vat pūrva deham na muñcati yāvat na deha antaram ākramati iti darśayati tat yathā tṛṇajalāyukāḥ iti
tatra api ap pariveṣṭitasya eva jīvasya karma upasthāpita pratipattavya deha viṣaya bhāvanā dīrghībhāva mātram jalūkayā upamīyate iti avirodhaḥ
evam śruti ukte deha antara pratipatti prakāre sati yāḥ puruṣam ati prabhavāḥ kalpanāḥ vyāpinām karaṇānām ātmanaḥ ca deha antara pratipattau karma vaśāt vṛtti lābhaḥ tatra bhavati kevalasya eva ātmanaḥ vṛtti lābhaḥ tatra bhavati indriyāṇi tu deha vat abhinavāni eva tatra tatra bhogasthāne utpadyante manaḥ eva vā kevalam bhogasthānam abhipratiṣṭhate jīvaḥ eva vā utplutya dehāt deha antaram pratipadyate śukaḥ iva vṛkṣāt vṛkṣa antaram iti evam
nanu udāhṛtābhyām praśna prativacanābhyām kevalābhiḥ adbhiḥ saṃpariṣvaktaḥ raṃhati iti prāpnoti ap śabda śravaṇa sāmarthyāt
tatra katham sāmānyena pratijñāyate sarvaiḥ eva bhūta sūkṣmaiḥ saṃpariṣvaktaḥ raṃhati iti
atas uttaram paṭhati
tri ātmaka tvāt tu bhūyaḥ tvāt
tu śabdena ca uditām āśaṅkām ucchinatti
tri ātmikāḥ hi āpaḥ trivṛtkaraṇa śruteḥ
tāsu ārambhikāsu abhyupagatāsu itarat api bhūta dvayam avaśyam abhyupagantavyam bhavati
tri ātmakaḥ ca dehaḥ trayāṇām api tejaḥ bannānām tasmin kārya upalabdheḥ
punar ca tri ātmakaḥ tri dhātu tvāt tribhiḥ vāta pitta śleṣmabhiḥ
na sa bhūta antarāṇi pratyākhyāya kevalābhiḥ adbhiḥ ārabdhum śakyate
tasmāt bhūyastva apekṣaḥ yam āpaḥ puruṣa vacasaḥ iti praśna prativacanayoḥ ap śabdaḥ na kaivalya apekṣaḥ
sarva deheṣu hi rasa lohita ādi drava bhūyaḥ tvam dṛśyate
nanu pārthivaḥ dhātuḥ bhūyiṣṭhaḥ deheṣu upalabhyate
na eṣa doṣaḥ itara apekṣayā apām bāhulyam bhaviṣyati
dṛśyate ca śukra śoṇita lakṣaṇe deha bīje drava bāhulyam
karma ca nimitta kāraṇam deha antara ārambhe
karmāṇi ca agnihotra ādīni soma ājya payaḥ prabhṛti drava dravya vyapāśrayāṇi
karma samavāyinyaḥ ca āpaḥ śraddhā śabda uditāḥ saha karmabhiḥ dyu loka ākhye gnau hūyante iti vakṣyati
tasmāt api apām bāhulya prasiddhiḥ
bāhulyāt ca ap śabdena sarveṣām eva deha bījānām bhūta sūkṣmāṇām upādānam iti niravadyam
prāṇa gateḥ ca
prāṇānām ca deha antara pratipattau gatiḥ śrāvyate tam utkrāmantam prāṇaḥ nu utkrāmati prāṇam anūtkrāmantam sarve prāṇāḥ anūtkrāmanti ityādi śrutibhiḥ
sā ca prāṇānām gatiḥ na āśrayam antareṇa saṃbhavati iti atas prāṇa gati prayuktā tad āśraya bhūtānām apām api bhūta antara upasṛṣṭānām gatiḥ arthāt avagamyate
na hi nirāśrayāḥ prāṇāḥ kvacid gacchanti tiṣṭhanti vā jīvataḥ darśanāt
aṃgni ādi gati śruteḥ iti ced na bhākta tvāt
syāt etat na eva prāṇāḥ deha antara pratipattau saha jīvena gacchanti agni ādi gati śruteḥ
tathā hi śrutiḥ maraṇa kāle vāc ādayaḥ prāṇāḥ agni ādīn devān gacchanti iti darśayati yatra asya puruṣasya mṛtasya agnim vāc apyeti vātam prāṇaḥ ityādinā iti ced na bhākta tvāt
vāc ādīnām agni ādi gati śrutiḥ gauṇī lomasu keśeṣu ca adarśanāt oṣadhīḥ lomāni vanaspatīn keśāḥ iti hi tatra āmnāyate na hi lomāni keśāḥ ca utplutya oṣadhīḥ vanaspatīn ca gacchanti iti saṃbhavati
na ca jīvasya prāṇa upādhi pratyākhyāne gamanam avakalpate
nā api prāṇaiḥ vinā deha antare upabhogaḥ upapadyate
vispaṣṭam ca prāṇānām saha jīvena gamanam anyatra śrāvitam
atas vāc ādi adhiṣṭhātrīṇām agni ādi devatānām vāc ādi upakāriṇīnām maraṇa kāle upakāra nivṛtti mātram apekṣya vāc ādayaḥ gni ādīn gacchanti iti upacaryate
prathame śravaṇāt iti ced na tāḥ eva hi upapatteḥ
syāt etat katham punar pañcamyām āhutau āpaḥ puruṣa vacasaḥ bhavanti iti etat nirdhārayitum pāryate yāvatā na eva prathame gnau apām śravaṇam asti
iha hi dyu loka prabhṛtayaḥ pañca agnyaḥ pañcānām āhutīnām ādhāra tvena adhītāḥ
teṣām ca pramukhe asau vāva lokaḥ gautama agniḥ iti upanyasya tasmin etasmin agnau devāḥ śraddhām juhvati iti śraddhā homya dravya tvena āveditā
na tatra āpaḥ homya dravya tayā śrutāḥ
yadi nāma parjanya ādiṣu uttareṣu caturṣu agniṣu apām homya dravya tā parikalpyeta parikalpyatām nāma teṣu hotavya tayā upāttānām soma ādīnām ap bahula tva upapatteḥ
prathame tu agnau śrutām śraddhām parityajya a śrutāḥ āpaḥ parikalpyante iti sāhasam etat
śraddhā ca nāma pratyaya viśeṣaḥ prasiddhi sāmarthyāt
tasmāt ayuktaḥ pañcamyām āhutau apām puruṣa bhāvaḥ iti ced na eṣa doṣaḥ
hi yatas tatra api prathame gnau tāḥ eva āpaḥ śraddhā śabdena abhipreyante
kutas
upapatteḥ
evam hi ādi madhya avasāna saṃgānāt an ākulam etat eka vākyam upapadyate
itarathā punar pañcamyām āhutau apām puruṣa vacaḥ tva prakāre pṛṣṭe prativacana avasare prathama āhuti sthāne yadi an apaḥ homya dravyam śraddhām nāma avatārayet tatas anyathā praśnaḥ nyathā prativacanam iti ekavākya tā na syāt
iti tu pañcamyām āhutau āpaḥ puruṣa vacasaḥ bhavanti iti ca upasaṃharan etat eva darśayati
śraddhā kāryam ca soma vṛṣṭi ādi sthūlībhavat ap bahulam lakṣyate
sā ca śraddhāyāḥ ap tve yuktiḥ
kāraṇa anurūpam hi kāryam bhavati
na ca śraddhā ākhyaḥ pratyayaḥ manasaḥ jīvasya vā dharmaḥ san dharmiṇaḥ niṣkṛṣya homāya upādātum śakyate paśu ādibhyaḥ iva hṛdaya ādīni iti āpaḥ eva śraddhā śabdāḥ bhaveyuḥ
śraddhā śabdaḥ ca apsu upapadyate vaidika prayoga darśanāt śraddhā vai āpaḥ iti
tanu tvam śraddhā sārūpyam gacchanti āpaḥ deha bīja bhūtāḥ iti atas śraddhā śabdāḥ syuḥ yathā siṃha parākramaḥ naraḥ siṃha śabdaḥ bhavati
śraddhā pūrvaka karma samavāyāt ca apsu śraddhā śabdaḥ upapadyate mañca śabdaḥ iva puruṣeṣu
śraddhā hetu tvāt ca śraddhā śabda upapattiḥ āpaḥ ha asmai śraddhām saṃnamante puṇyāya karmaṇe iti śruteḥ
aśruta tvāt iti ced na iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām pratīteḥ
atha api syāt praśna prativacanābhyām nāma āpaḥ śraddhā ādi krameṇa pañcamyām āhutau puruṣa ākāram pratipadyeran
na tu tad saṃpariṣvaktāḥ jīvāḥ raṃheyuḥ a śruta tvāt na hi atra apām iva jīvānām śrāvayitā kaścid śabdaḥ sti
tasmāt raṃhati saṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti ayuktam iti ced na eṣa doṣaḥ
kutas
iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām pratīteḥ atha ye ime grāme iṣṭāpūrte dattam iti upāsate te dhūmam abhisaṃbhavanti iti upakramya iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām dhūma ādinā pitṛyāṇena pathā candra prāptim kathayati ākāśāt candramasam eṣa somaḥ rājā iti
te eva iha api pratīyante tasmin etasmin agnau devāḥ śraddhām juhvati tasyāḥ āhuteḥ somaḥ rājā saṃbhavati iti śruti sāmānyāt
teṣām ca agnihotra darśa pūrṇamāsa ādi karma sādhana bhūtāḥ dadhi payaḥ prabhṛtayaḥ drava dravya bhūyaḥ tvāt pratyakṣam eva āpaḥ santi
tāḥ āhavanīye hutāḥ sūkṣmāḥ pūrva rūpāḥ satyaḥ tān iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ āśrayanti teṣām ca śarīram naidhanena vidhānena antye gnau ṛtvijaḥ juhvati asau svargāya lokāya svāhā iti
tatas tāḥ śraddhā pūrvaka karma samavāyinyaḥ āhuti mayyaḥ āpaḥ pūrva rūpāḥ satyaḥ tān iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ jīvān pariveṣṭya amum lokam phala dānāya nayanti iti yat tat atra juhotinā abhidhīyate śraddhām juhvati iti
tathā ca agnihotre ṣaṭpraśnī nirvacana rūpeṇa vākyaśeṣeṇa te vai ete āhutī hute utkrāmataḥ iti evamādinā agnihotra āhutyoḥ phala ārambhāya loka antara prāptiḥ darśitā
tasmāt āhutī mayībhiḥ adbhiḥ saṃpariṣvaktāḥ jīvāḥ raṃhanti sva karma phala upabhogāya iti śliṣyate
katham punar idam iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām sva karma phala upabhogāya raṃhaṇam pratijñāyate yāvatā teṣām dhūma pratīkena vartmanā candramasam adhirūḍhānām anna bhāvam darśayati eṣa somaḥ rājā tat devānām annam tam bhakṣayanti iti te candram prāpya annam bhavanti tān tatra devāḥ yathā somam rājānam āpyāyasva apakṣīyasva iti evam etān tatra bhakṣayanti iti ca samāna viṣayam śruti antaram
na ca vyāghra ādibhiḥ iva devaiḥ bhakṣyamāṇānām upabhogaḥ saṃbhavati iti
atas uttaram paṭhati
bhāktam vā an ātma vid tvāt tathā hi darśayati
vā śabdaḥ codita doṣa vyāvartana arthaḥ
bhāktam eṣām anna tvam na mukhyam
mukhye hi anna tve svarga kāmaḥ yajeta iti evaṃjātīyaka adhikāra śrutiḥ uparudhyeta
candra maṇḍale ced iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām upabhogaḥ na syāt kimartham adhikāriṇaḥ iṣṭa ādi āyāsa bahulam karma kuryuḥ
anna śabdaḥ ca upabhoga hetu tva sāmānyāt an anne pi upacaryamāṇaḥ dṛśyate yathā viśaḥ nnam rājñām paśavaḥ nnam viśām iti
tasmāt iṣṭa strī putra mitra bhṛtya ādibhiḥ iva guṇa bhāva upagataiḥ iṣṭa ādi kāribhiḥ yat sukha viharaṇam devānām tat eva eṣām bhakṣaṇam abhipretam na modaka ādi vat carvaṇam nigaraṇam vā
na ha vai devāḥ aśnanti na pibanti etat eva amṛtam dṛṣṭvā tṛpyanti iti ca devānām carvaṇā ādi vyāpāram vārayati
teṣām ca iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām devān prati guṇa bhāva upagatānām api upabhogaḥ upapadyate rāja upajīvinām iva parijanānām
anātma vid tvāt ca iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām deva upabhogya bhāvaḥ upapadyate
tathā hi śrutiḥ anātma vidām deva upabhogya tām darśayati atha yaḥ nyām devatām upāste saḥ anyaḥ ham asmi iti na sa veda yathā paśuḥ evam sa devānām iti
sa ca asmin api loke iṣṭa ādibhiḥ karmabhiḥ prīṇayan paśu vat devānām upakaroti amuṣmin api loke tad upajīvī tad ādiṣṭam phalam upabhuñjānaḥ paśu vat eva devānām upakaroti iti gamyate
anātma vid tvāt tathā hi darśayati iti asya aparā vyākhyā anātma vidaḥ hi ete kevala karmiṇaḥ iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ na jñāna karma samuccaya anuṣṭhāyinaḥ pañcāgni vidyām iha ātma vidyā iti upacaranti prakaraṇāt
pañcāgni vidyā vihīna tvāt ca idam iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām guṇa vādena anna tvam udbhāvyate pañcāgni vijñāna praśaṃsāyai
pañcāgni vidyā iha vidhitsitā vākya tātparya avagamāt

iti vyavahāra prasiddhi artham ca idam trivṛtkaraṇam vyavahāraḥ ca trivṛt kṛta rajju vat ekatva āpattau satyām a bhede bhūta traya gocaraḥ lokasya prasidhyet tasmāt sati api trivṛtkaraṇe vaiśeṣyāt eva bhūta bhautika viṣayaḥ upapadyate tad vādaḥ tad vādaḥ
iti pada abhyāsaḥ adhyāya parisamāptim dyotayati iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye dvitīyaḥ udhyāyaḥ murat tṛtīyaḥ udhyāyaḥ prathamaḥ pādaḥ tad atara pratipattau raṃhati sampariṣvaktaḥ praśairūpaṇābhyām tad atara pratipatti adhikaraṇam
dvitīye adhyāye smṛti yāya virodhaḥ parihṛtaḥ parapakṣāṇām ca a apekṣa tvam prapañcitam śruti vipratiṣedhaḥ ca parihṛtaḥ tatra ca jīva vyatiriktāi tattvāi jīva upakaraṇāi brahmaṇaḥ jāyate iti
uktam atha idāīm upakaraṇa upahitasya jīvasya saṃsāra gati prakāraḥ tad avasthātarāṇi brahma tattvam vidyā bheda abhedau guṇa upasaṃhāra a upasaṃhārau samyagdarśaāt puruṣa artha siddhaḥ samyagdarśa upāya vidhi prabhedaḥ ca iti etad artha jātam tṛtīye adhyāye prasaṅga āgatam ca
tatra prathame tāvat pāde pañcāgi vidyām āśritya saṃsāra gati prabhedaḥ pradarśyate vairāgya hetoḥ tasmāt jugupset iti ca ate śravaṇāt jīvaḥ mukhya prāṇa sacivaḥ sa idriyaḥ
avidyā karma pūrva prajñā parigrahaḥ pūrva deham vihāya dehātaram pratipadyate iti etat avagatam atha īam ete prāṇāḥ iti evamādeḥ iti evamādeḥ
kurute iti saṃsāra prakaraṇa sthāt śabdāt dharma adharma phala upabhoga saṃbhavāt ca sa kim deha bījaiḥ bhūta sūkṣmaiḥ asaṃpariṣvaktaḥ gacchati āhosvit saṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti cityate kim tāvat
prāptam asaṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti kutas karaṇa upādāa vat bhūta upādāasya a śruta tvāt saḥ etāḥ tejaḥ mātrāḥ samabhyādadāaḥ iti hi atra tejaḥ mātrā śabda upādāam saṃkīrtayati vākya śeṣe cakṣuḥ ādi saṃkīrtaāt

ma loke vibhūtim anubhūya punar āvartate iti
tathā anyat api śruti antaram atha ye śatam pitṛṇām jita lokānām ānandāḥ saḥ ekaḥ karma devānām ānandaḥ ye karmaṇā deva tvam abhisaṃpadyante iti iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām devaiḥ saha saṃvasatām bhoga prāptim darśayati
evam bhākta tvāt anna bhāva vacanasya iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ jīvāḥ raṃhanti iti pratīyate

kṛta atyaya adhikaraṇam
iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām dhūma ādinā vartmanā candra maṇḍalam adhirūḍhānām bhukta bhogānām tatas pratyavarohaḥ āmnāyate tasmin yāvat saṃpātam uṣitvā atha etam eva adhvānam punar nivartante yathetam iti ārabhya yāvat ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ brāhmaṇa ādi yonim āpadyante kapūya caraṇāḥ śva ādi yonim iti
tatra idam vicāryate kim niranuśayāḥ bhukta kṛtsna karmāṇaḥ varohanti āhosvit sa anuśayāḥ iti

niranuśayāḥ iti
kutas
yāvat saṃpātam iti viśeṣaṇāt saṃpāta śabdena atra karma āśayaḥ ucyate saṃpatanti anena asmāt lokāt amum lokam phala upabhogāya iti
yāvat saṃpātam uṣitvā iti ca kṛtsnasya tasya kṛtasya tatra eva bhukta tām darśayati
teṣām yadā tat paryavaiti iti ca śruti antareṇa eva eva arthaḥ pradarśyate
syāt etat yāvat amuṣmin loke upabhoktavyam karma tāvat upabhuṅkte iti kalpayiṣyāmi iti
na evam kalpayitum śakyate yat kiṃca iti anyatra parāmarśāt prāpya antam karmaṇaḥ tasya yat kiṃca iha karoti ayam
tasmāt lokāt punar aiti asmai lokāya karmaṇe iti hi aparā śrutiḥ yat kiṃca iti a viśeṣa parāmarśena kṛtsnasya iha kṛtasya karmaṇaḥ tatra kṣayita tām darśayati
api ca prāyaṇam an ārabdha phalasya karmaṇaḥ bhivyañjakam
prāk prāyaṇāt ārabdha phalena karmaṇā pratibaddhasya abhivyakti anupapatteḥ
tat ca aviśeṣāt yāvat kiṃcid anārabdha phalam tasya sarvasya abhivyañjakam
na hi sādhāraṇe nimitte naimittikam asādhāraṇam bhavitum arhati
na hi aviśiṣṭe pradīpa saṃnidhau ghaṭaḥ bhivyajyate na paṭaḥ iti upapadyate
tasmāt niranuśayāḥ avarohanti iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ kṛta atyaye iti
yena karma bṛndena candramasam ārūḍhāḥ phala upabhogāya tasmin upabhogena kṣayite teṣām yat am mayam śarīram candramasi upabhogāya ārabdham tat upabhoga kṣaya darśana śoka agni saṃparkāt pravilīyate savitṛ kiraṇa saṃparka ādi vahima karakāḥ hutabhuj arciḥ saṃparkāt iva ca ghṛta kāṭhinyam
tatas kṛta atyaye kṛtasya iṣṭa ādeḥ karmaṇaḥ phala upabhogena upakṣaye sati sa anuśayāḥ eva imam avarohanti
kena hetunā
dṛṣṭa smṛtibhyām iti āha
tathā hi pratyakṣā śrutiḥ sa anuśayānām avaroham darśayati tat ye iha ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ abhyāśaḥ ha yat te ramaṇīyām yonim āpadyeran brāhmaṇa yonim vā kṣatriya yonim vā vaiśya yonim vā atha ye iha kapūya caraṇāḥ abhyāśaḥ ha yat te kapūyām yonim āpadyeran śva yonim vā sūkara yonim vā cāṇḍāla yonim vā iti
caraṇa śabdena anuśayaḥ sūcyate iti varṇayiṣyati
dṛṣṭaḥ ca ayam janmanā eva prati prāṇi uccāvaca rūpaḥ upabhogaḥ pravibhajyamānaḥ ākasmika tva asaṃbhavāt anuśaya sadbhāvam sūcayati abhyudaya pratyavāyayoḥ sukṛta duṣkṛta hetu tvasya sāmānyatas śāstreṇa avagamita tvāt
smṛtiḥ api varṇāḥ āśramāḥ ca sva karma niṣṭhāḥ pretya karma phalam anubhūya tatas śeṣeṇa viśiṣṭa deśa jāti kula rūpa āyuḥ śruta vṛtta vitta sukha medhasaḥ janma pratipadyante iti sa anuśayānām eva avaroham darśayati
kaḥ punar anuśayaḥ nāma iti kecid tāvat āhuḥ svarga arthasya karmaṇaḥ bhukta phalasya avaśeṣaḥ kaścid anuśayaḥ nāma bhāṇḍa anusāri sneha vat yathā hi sneha bhāṇḍam ricyamānam na sarva ātmanā ricyate bhāṇḍa anusāri eva kaścid sneha śeṣaḥ vatiṣṭhate tathā anuśayaḥ u pi iti
nanu kārya virodhi tvāt adṛṣṭasya na bhukta phalasya avaśeṣa avasthānam nyāyyam
na ayam doṣaḥ
na hi sarva ātmanā bhukta phala tvam karmaṇaḥ pratijānīmahe
nanu niravaśeṣa karma phala upabhogāya candra maṇḍalam ārūḍhāḥ
bāḍham tathā api su alpa karma avaśeṣa mātreṇa tatra avasthānam na labhyate
yathā kila kaścid sevakaḥ sakalaiḥ sevā upakaraṇaiḥ rājakulam upasṛptaḥ cira pravāsāt parikṣīṇa bahu upakaraṇaḥ chatra pādukā ādi mātra avaśeṣaḥ na rājakule vasthātum śaknoti evam anuśaya mātra parigrahaḥ na candra maṇḍale vasthātum śaknoti iti
na ca etat yuktam iva eva
na hi svarga arthasya karmaṇaḥ bhukta phalasya avaśeṣa anuvṛttiḥ upapadyate kārya virodhi tvāt iti uktam
nanu etat api uktam na svarga phalasya karmaṇaḥ nikhilasya bhukta phala tvam bhaviṣyati iti
tat etat apeśalam svarga artham kila karma svarga sthasya eva svarga phalam nikhilam na janayati svarga cyutasya api kaṃcid phala leśam janayati iti
na śabdapramāṇakānām īdṛśī kalpanā avakalpate
sneha bhāṇḍe tu sneha leśa anuvṛttiḥ dṛṣṭa tvāt upapadyate
tathā sevakasya upakaraṇa leśa anuvṛttiḥ ca dṛśyate
na tu iha tathā svarga phalasya karmaṇaḥ leśa anuvṛttiḥ dṛśyate
na api kalpayitum śakyate svarga phala tva śāstra virodhāt
avaśyam ca etat evam vijñeyam na svarga phalasya iṣṭa ādeḥ karmaṇaḥ bhāṇḍa anusāri sneha vat eka deśaḥ nuvartamānaḥ nuśayaḥ iti
yadi hi yena su kṛtena karmaṇā iṣṭa ādinā svargam anvabhūvan tasya eva kaścid eka deśaḥ nuśayaḥ kalpyeta tatas ramaṇīyaḥ eva ekaḥ nuśayaḥ syāt na viparītaḥ
tatra iyam anuśaya vibhāga śrutiḥ uparudhyeta tat ye iha ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ
atha ye iha kapūya caraṇāḥ iti
tasmāt āmuṣmika phale karma jāte upabhukte aihika phalam karma antara jātam anuśayaḥ tadvantaḥ varohanti iti
yat uktam yat kiṃca iti a viśeṣa parāmarśāt sarvasya iha kṛtasya karmaṇaḥ phala upabhogena antam prāpya niranuśayāḥ avarohanti iti na etat evam
anuśaya sadbhāvasya avagamita tvāt yat kiṃcid iha kṛtam āmuṣmika phalam karma ārabdha bhogam tat sarvam phala upabhogena kṣapayitvā iti gamyate
yat api uktam prāyaṇam aviśeṣāt anārabdha phalam kṛtsnam eva karma abhivyanakti
tatra kenacid phalam ārabhyate kenacid asmin iti ayam vibhāgaḥ na saṃbhavati iti tat api anuśaya sadbhāva pratipādanena eva pratyuktam
api ca kena hetunā prāyaṇam anārabdha phalasya karmaṇaḥ bhivyañjakam pratijñāyate iti vaktavyam
ārabdha phalena karmaṇā pratibaddhasya itarasya vṛtti udbhava anupapatteḥ tad upaśamāt prāyaṇa kāle vṛtti udbhavaḥ bhavati iti yadi ucyeta tatas vaktavyam yathā eva tarhi pāk prāyaṇāt ārabdha phalena karmaṇā pratibaddhasya itarasya vṛtti udbhava anupapattiḥ evam prāyaṇa kāle pi viruddha phalasya anekasya karmaṇaḥ yugapad phala ārambha asaṃbhavāt balavatā pratibaddhasya durbalasya vṛtti udbhava anupapattiḥ iti
na hi anārabdha phalatva sāmānyena jāti antara upabhogya phalam api anekam karma ekasmin prāyaṇe yugapad abhivyaktam sat ekām jātim ārabhate iti śakyam vaktum pratiniyata phalatva virodhāt
nā api kasyacid karmaṇaḥ prāyaṇe bhivyaktiḥ kasyacid ucchedaḥ iti śakyate vaktum aikāntika phala tva virodhāt
na hi prāyaścitta ādibhiḥ hetubhiḥ vinā karmaṇām ucchedaḥ saṃbhāvyate
smṛtiḥ api viruddha phalena karmaṇā pratibaddhasya karma antarasya ciram avasthānam darśayati kadācid su kṛtam karma kūṭastham iha tiṣṭhati
majjamānasya saṃsāre yāvat duḥkhāt vimucyate iti evaṃjātīyākā
yadi ca kṛtsnam anārabdha phalam karma ekasmin prāyaṇe bhivyaktam sat ekām jātim ārabheta tatas svarga naraka tiryagyoniṣu adhikāra anavagamāt dharma adharma anutpattau nimitta abhāvāt na uttarā jātiḥ upapadyeta brahmahatyā ādīnām ca ekaikasya karmaṇaḥ neka janma nimitta tvam smaryamāṇam uparudhyeta
na ca dharma adharmayoḥ svarūpa phala sādhana ādi samadhigame śāstrāt atiriktam kāraṇam śakyam saṃbhāvayitum
na ca dṛṣṭa phalasya karmaṇaḥ kārīrī ādeḥ prāyaṇam abhivyañjakam saṃbhavati iti avyāpikā api iyam prāyaṇasya abhivyañjaka tva kalpanā
pradīpa upanyāsaḥ u pi karma bala abala pradarśanena eva pratinītaḥ
sthūla sūkṣma rūpa abhivyakti vat ca idam draṣṭavyam yathā hi pradīpaḥ samāne saṃnidhāne sthūlam rūpam abhivyanakti na sūkṣmam evam prāyaṇam samāne pi anārabdha phalasya karma jātasya prāpta avasara tve balavataḥ karmaṇaḥ vṛttim udbhāvayati na durbalasya iti
tasmāt śruti smṛti nyāya virodhāt aśliṣṭaḥ yama śeṣa karma abhivyakti abhyupagamaḥ
śeṣa karma sadbhāve nirmokṣa prasaṅgaḥ iti ayam api asthāne saṃbhramaḥ samyak darśanāt aśeṣa karma kṣaya śruteḥ
tasmāt sthitam etat eva anuśayavantaḥ varohanti iti
te ca avarohantaḥ yathetam anevam ca avarohanti
yathetam iti yathāgatam iti arthaḥ
anevam iti tad viparyayeṇa iti arthaḥ
dhūma ākāśayoḥ pitṛyāṇe dhvani upāttayoḥ avarohe saṃkīrtanāt yathetam śabdāt ca yathāgatam iti pratīyate
rātri ādi a saṃkīrtanāt abhra ādi upasaṃkhyānāt ca viparyayaḥ pi pratīyate
caraṇāt iti ced na upalakṣaṇa arthā iti kārṣṇājiniḥ
atha api syāt yā śrutiḥ anuśaya sadbhāva pratipādanāya udāhṛtā tat ye iha ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ iti sā khalu caraṇāt yoni āpattim darśayati na anuśayāt
anyat caraṇam anyaḥ nuśayaḥ caraṇam cāritram ācāraḥ śīlam iti anartha antaram anuśayaḥ tu bhukta phalāt karmaṇaḥ tiriktam karma abhipretam
śrutiḥ ca karma caraṇe bhedena vyapadiśati yathā kārī yathā cārī tathā bhavati iti yāni anavadyāni karmāṇi tāni sevitavyāni no itarāṇi yāni asmākäsu caritāni tāni tvayā upāsyāni iti ca
tasmāt caraṇāt yoni āpatti śruteḥ na anuśaya siddhiḥ iti ced nā eṣa doṣaḥ yatas nuśaya upalakṣaṇa arthā eva eṣā caraṇa śrutiḥ iti kārṣṇājiniḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
ānarthakyam iti ced na tat apekṣa tvāt
syāt etat kasmāt punar caraṇa śabdena śrautam śīlam vihāya lākṣaṇikaḥ anuśayaḥ pratyāyyate
nanu śīlasya eva śrautasya vihita pratiṣiddhasya sādhu asādhu rūpasya śubha aśubha yoni āpattiḥ phalam bhaviṣyati
avaśyam ca śīlasya api kiṃcid phalam abhyupagantavyam anyathā hi ānarthakyam eva śīlasya prasajyeta iti ced nā eṣa doṣaḥ
kutas
tad apekṣa tvāt
iṣṭa ādi hi karma jātam caraṇa apekṣam
na hi sat ācāra hīnaḥ kaścid adhikṛtaḥ syāt ācāra hīnam na punanti vedāḥ ityādi smṛtibhyaḥ
puruṣa artha tve pi ācārasya na ānarthakyam
iṣṭa ādau hi karma jāte phalam ārabhamāṇe tad apekṣaḥ eva ācāraḥ tatra eva kaṃcid atiśayam ārapsyate
karma ca sarva artha kāri iti śruti smṛti prasiddhiḥ
tasmāt karma eva śīla upalakṣitam anuśaya bhūtam yoni āpattau kāraṇam iti kārṣṇājineḥ matam
na hi karmaṇi saṃbhavati śīlāt yoni āpattiḥ yuktā
na hi padbhyām palāyitum pārayamāṇaḥ jānubhyām raṃhitum arhati iti
sukṛta duṣkṛte eva iti tu bādariḥ
bādariḥ tu ācāryaḥ sukṛta duṣkṛte eva caraṇa śabdena pratyāyyete iti manyate
caraṇam anuṣṭhāna karma iti anartha antaram
tathā hi aviśeṣeṇa karma mātre caratiḥ prayujyamānaḥ dṛśyate yaḥ hi iṣṭa ādi lakṣaṇam puṇyam karma karoti tam laukikāḥ ācakṣate dharmam carati eṣa mahātmā iti
ācāraḥ ca dharma viśeṣaḥ eva
bheda vyapadeśaḥ tu karma caraṇayoḥ brāhmaṇa parivrājaka nyāyena api upapadyate
tasmāt ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ praśasta karmāṇaḥ kapūya caraṇāḥ nindita karmāṇaḥ iti nirṇayaḥ
aniṣṭa ādi kāriṇām api ca śrutam
aniṣṭa ādi kāri adhikaraṇam
iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ candramasam gacchanti iti uktam
ye tu itare niṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ te kim candramasam gacchanti uta na gacchanti iti cintyate
tatra tāvat āha iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ eva candramasam gacchanti iti etat na
kasmāt
yatas niṣṭa ādi kāriṇām api candra maṇḍalam gantavya tvena śrutam
tathā hi aviśeṣeṇa kauṣītakinaḥ samāmananti ye vai ke ca asmāt lokāt prayanti candramasam eva te sarve gacchanti iti
ca punar jāyamānānām na antareṇa candra prāptim avakalpate pañcamyām āhutau iti āhuti saṃkhyā niyamāt
tasmāt sarve eva candramasam āsīdeyuḥ
iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām itareṣām ca samāna gati tvam na yuktam iti ced na itareṣām candra maṇḍale bhoga abhāvāt
saṃyamane tu anubhūya itareṣām āroha avarohau tad gati darśanāt
tu śabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati
na etat asti sarve candramasam gacchanti iti
kasmāt
bhogāya eva hi candra ārohaṇam na niṣprayojanam
na api pratyavarohāya eva yathā kaścid vṛkṣam ārohati puṣpa phala upādānāya na niṣprayojanam na api patanāya eva
bhogaḥ ca aniṣṭa ādi kāriṇām candramasi na asti iti uktam
tasmāt iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ eva candramasam ārohanti na itare
te tu saṃyamanam yama ālayam avagāhya sva duṣkṛta anurūpāḥ yāmīḥ yātanāḥ anubhūya punar eva imam lokam pratyavarohanti
evaṃbhūtau teṣām āroha avarohau bhavataḥ
kutas
tad gati darśanāt
tathā hi yama vacana sarūpā śrutiḥ prayatām aniṣṭa ādi kāriṇām yama vaśya tām darśayati na sāṃparāyaḥ pratibhāti bālam pramādyantam vitta mohena mūḍham
ayam lokaḥ na asti paraḥ iti mānī punar punar vaśam āpadyate me iti
vaivasvatam saṃgamanam janānām iti evaṃjātīyakam ca bahu eva yama vaśya tā prāpti liṅgam bhavati
smaranti ca
api ca manu vyāsa prabhṛtayaḥ śiṣṭāḥ saṃyamane pure yama ā
text2:
ma loke vibhūtim aubhūya puarāvartate iti tathā ayat api śrutyataram atha ye
śatam pitṛṇām jita lokāāmāadāḥ saḥ ekaḥ karma ye karmaṇā deva tvam abhisaṃpadyate iti iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām devaiḥ saha saṃvasatām bhoga prāptim darśayati evam bhākta tvāt a bhāvavat asya iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ utra
jīvāḥ raṃhati iti pratīyate tasmāt raṃhati saṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti yuktam eva uktam kṛta atyaye dṛṣṭa smṛtibhyām ca kṛta atyaya adhikaraṇam iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām dhūma ādiā vartmaā cadra maṇḍalam adhirūḍhāām bhukta bhogāām tatas
pratyavarohe yāvat saṃpātam uṣitvā atha etam eva ādhvāam yathetam iti ārabhya yāvat ramaṇīya caraṇā āpadyate kapūya caraṇāḥ śva ādi yoim iti tatra idam vicāryate
kim irauśayāḥ bhuktakṛt sakarmāṇaḥ varohati āhosvit sāuśayāḥ iti kim tāvat prāptam irauśayāḥ iti kutas yāvat saṃpātam iti viśeṣaṇāt saṃpāta śabdena atra karma āśayaḥ ucyate
saṃpatati asmāt lokāt amum lokam phala upabhogāya iti yāvat saṃpātam uṣitvā iti ca kṛtsasya tasya kṛtasya tatra eva bhukta tām darśayati teṣām yadā
tat paryavaiti iti ca śrutyatareṇa eva eva arthaḥ pradarśyate syāt etat yāvat amuṣmin loke upabhoktavyam karma tāvat upabhuṅkte iti kalpayiṣyāmi iti ā evam kalpayitum
śakyate yat kiṃca iti ayatra parāmarśāt karmaṇaḥ tasya yat kiṃca iha karoti ayam tasmāt lokāt puar aiti asmai lokāya karmaṇe iti hi
aparā śrutiḥ yat kiṃca iti kṛtsasya iha kṛtasya karmaṇaḥ tatra kṣayita tām darśayati api ca prāyaṇam a ārabdha phalasya karmaṇaḥ bhivyañjakam prāk prāyaṇāt ārabdha phalea karmaṇā
pratibaddhasya abhivyakti aupapatteḥ tat ca aviśeṣāt yāvat kiṃcid aārabdha phalam tasya sarvasya abhivyañjakam a hi sādhāraṇe imitte aimittikam asādhāraṇam bhavitum arhati a hi aviśiṣṭe
pradīpa saṃidhau ghaṭaḥ bhivyajyate a paṭaḥ iti upapadyate tasmai avarohati iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ kṛta atyaye iti ārūḍhāḥ
phala upabhogāya tasmin upabhoge kṣayite teṣām yat am mayam śarīram upabhogāya ārabdham tat upabhoga kṣaya darśa aśoka āgi saṃparkāt pravilīyate savitṛ kiraṇa saṃparka ādi vahima karakāḥ hutabhuj arciḥ saṃparkāt iva ca ghṛta kāṭhiyam tatas kṛta atyaye
kṛtasya iṣṭa ādeḥ karmaṇaḥ phala upabhoge upakṣaye sati sāuśayā eva imam avarohati dṛṣṭa smṛtibhyām iti āha tathā hi pratyakṣā śrutiḥ avaroham darśayati tat
ye iha ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ abhyāśaḥ ha yat te ramaṇīyām yoim āpadyera brāhmaṇa yoim vā kṣatriya yoim vā vaiśya yoim vā atha ye iha kapūya caraṇāḥ abhyāśaḥ ha
yat te kapūyām yoim āpadyeran śva yoim vā sūkara yoim vā cāṇḍāla yoim vā iti sūcyate iti varṇayiṣyati dṛṣṭaḥ ca ayam pratiprāṇi uccāvaca rūpaḥ upabhogaḥ
ākasmika tva asaṃbhavāt auśaya sadbhāvam sūcayati abhyudaya pratyavāyayoḥ sukṛta duṣkṛta hetu tvasya sāmāyataḥ śāstreṇa avagamita tvāt smṛtiḥ api varṇāḥ āśramāḥ ca sva karma eṣṭhāḥ pretya karma phalam tatas śeṣeṇa viśiṣṭa deśa jāti kula rūpa āyuḥ śruta vṛtta vitta sukha medhasaḥ
pratipadyate iti eva avaroham darśayati kaḥ puar auśayaḥ iti kecid tāvat āhuḥ svarga arthasya karmaṇaḥ bhukta phalasya avaśeṣaḥ kaścid auśayaḥ
yathā hi seha bhāṇḍam ricyamāam ricyate bhāṇḍāusārī eva kaścid vatiṣṭhate tathā kārya virodhi tvāt adṛṣṭasya bhukta phalasya avaśeṣa avasthānam
doṣaḥ hi bhukta phala tvam karmaṇaḥ bhukta phala tvam karmaṇaḥ ārūḍhāḥ bāḍham tathā api su alpa karma avaśeṣa mātreṇa labhyate yathā
kila kaścid sevakaḥ sakalaiḥ sevā upakaraṇaiḥ rāja kulam upasṛptaḥ cira pravāsāt parikṣīṇa bahu upakaraṇaḥ chatra pādukā ādi mātra avaśeṣaḥ rāja kule vasthātum evam auśaya mātra parigrahaḥ a cadra maṇḍale vasthātum śakoti iti
a ca etat yuktam iva eva a hi svarga arthasya karmaṇaḥ bhukta phalasya avaśeṣa āvṛttiḥ upapadyate kārya virodhi tvāt iti uktam etat api uktam a svarga phalasya karmaṇaḥ
ikhilasya bhukta phala tvam bhaviṣyati iti tat etat apeśalam svarga artham kila karma svarga sthasya eva svarga phalam ikhilam svarga cyutasya api kaṃcid phala leśam iti
īdṛśī kalpaā avakalpate sehabhāṇḍe tu seha leśāuvṛttiḥ dṛṣṭa tvāt upapadyate tathā sevakasya upakaraṇa leśāuvṛttiḥ ca dṛśyate a tu iha tathā svarga phalasya karmaṇaḥ leśāuvṛttiḥ dṛśyate
ā api kalpayitum śakyate svarga phala tva śāstra virodhāt avaśyam ca etat evam vijñeyam a svarga phalasya iṣṭa ādeḥ karmaṇaḥ iti yadi hi sukṛtea
karmaṇā svargam avabhūva tasya eva kaścid eka deśaḥ uśayaḥ kalpyeta tatas ramaṇīyaḥ eva ekaḥ uśayaḥ syāt a viparītaḥ tatra iyam auśaya vibhāga śrutiḥ uparudhyeta tat
ye iha ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ atha ye iha kapūya caraṇāḥ iti tasmāt āmuṣmika phale karma jāte upabhukte aihika phalam karma atara jātam auśayaḥ tadvataḥ varohati iti yat uktam
yat kiṃca iti aviśeṣa parāmarśāt sarvasya iha kṛtasya karmaṇaḥ prāpya avarohati iti evam auśaya sadbhāvasya avagamita tvāt yat kiṃcid iha kṛtam āmuṣmika phalam karma
ārabdha bhogam tat sarvam phala upabhoge kṣapayitvā iti gamyate yat api uktam prāyaṇam aviśeṣāt a ārabdha phalam kṛtsam eva karma abhivyaakti tatra keacid
ārabhyate asmi iti ayam vibhāgaḥ saṃbhavati iti pratyuktam api ca prāyaṇam aārabdha phalasya karmaṇaḥ abhivyañjakam pratijñāyate iti vaktavyam
karmaṇā pratibaddhasya itarasya vṛtti udbhava aupapatteḥ tad upaśamāt prāyaṇa kāle vṛtti udbhavaḥ bhavati iti yadi ucyeta tatas vaktavyam yathā eva tarhi pāk prāyaṇāt karmaṇā pratibaddhasya itarasya vṛtti udbhava aupapattiḥ evam prāyaṇa kāle api
viruddha phalasya a ekasya karmaṇaḥ yugapad phala ārambha asaṃbhavāt balavatā pratibaddhasya durbalasya vṛtti udbhava aupapattiḥ iti hi karma ekasmin prāyaṇe yugapad abhivyaktam sat ekām jātim ārabhate iti śakyam vaktum
pratiiyata phala tva virodhāt kasyacid karmaṇaḥ kasyacid ucchedaḥ iti śakyate vaktum aikātika phala tva virodhāt hi prāyaścitta ādibhiḥ hetubhiḥ karmaṇām ucchedaḥ saṃbhāvyate smṛtiḥ api karmaṇā pratibaddhasya karma ātarasya ciram avasthāam
darśayati kadācid su kṛtam karma kūṭastham iha tiṣṭhati saṃsāre yāvat duḥkhāt vimucyate iti evaṃjātīyākā yadi ca kṛt sama ārabdha phalam karma sat ekām jātim ārabheta tatas svarga araka tiryagyoiṣu adhikāra avagamāt dharma adharma a utpattau
imitta abhāvāt ā uttarā jātiḥ upapadyeta brahmahatyā ādīām ca ekaikasya smaryamāṇam uparudhyeta a ca dharma adharmayoḥ svarūpa phala sādhu ādi samadhigame śāstrāt atiriktam kāraṇam śakyam saṃbhāvayitum a ca dṛṣṭa phalasya karmaṇaḥ
kārīrī ādeḥ prāyaṇam abhivyañjakam saṃbhavati iti avyāpikā api iyam prāyaṇasya abhivyañjaka tva kalpaā pradīpa upayāsaḥ api sthūla sūkṣma rūpa abhivyakti vat ca idam draṣṭavyam yathā hi pradīpaḥ sthūlam rūpam abhivyaakti a sūkṣmam evam
prāyaṇam samāepya ārabdha phalasya karma jātasya prāpta avasara tve balavataḥ karmaṇaḥ vṛttim udbhāvayati a durbalasya iti tasmāt śruti smṛti yāya virodhāt aśliṣṭaḥ yam aśeṣa karma abhivyakti abhyupagamaḥ śeṣa karma sadbhāveiḥ mokṣa prasaṅgaḥ iti ayam api asthāe saṃbhramaḥ samyak darśaāt aśeṣa karma kṣaya śruteḥ tasmāt sthitam etat eva auśayavataḥ varohati iti te ca avarohataḥ
yathetam aevam ca avarohati yathetam iti yathāgatam iti arthaḥ aevam iti tad viparyayeṇa iti arthaḥ dhūma ākāśayoḥ avarohe saṃkīrtaāt yathetam śabdāt ca yathāgatam iti pratīyate rātri ādi asaṃkīrtaāt abhra ādi upasaṃkhyāāt ca viparyayaḥ api pratīyate caraṇāt iti atha api
syāt yā śrutiḥ auśaya sadbhāva pratipāda āya udāhṛtā tat ye iha ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ iti sā khalu caraṇāt darśayati āuśayāt caraṇam cāritram ācāraḥ śīlam iti aarthātaram auśayaḥ tu
bhukta phalāt karmaṇā utiriktam karma abhipretam śrutiḥ ca karma caraṇe vyapadiśati yathā kārī yathā cārī tathā bhavati karmāṇi tāi sevitavyāi itarāṇi tāi tvayā upāsyāi
iti ca tasmāt āuśaya siddhiḥ iti ced ā eṣa doṣaḥ yatas ouśaya upalakṣaṇa arthā eva eṣā caraṇa śrutiḥ iti kārṣṇājiiḥ ācāryaḥ mayate āarthakyam iti tat apekṣa tvāt syāt etat kasmāt puaścaraṇa śabde
śrautam śīlam vihāya lākṣaṇikaḥ auśayaḥ pratyāyyate śīlasya eva śrautasya vihita pratiṣiddhasya sādhu asādhu rūpasya phalam bhaviṣyati avaśyam ca śīlasya api kiṃcid phalam abhyupagatavyam ayathā hi āarthakyam eva
śīlasya prasajyeta iti ced ā eṣa doṣaḥ kutas tad apekṣa tvāt iṣṭa ādi hi karma jātam caraṇa apekṣam a hi sat ācāra hīaḥ kaścid adhikṛtaḥ syāt ācāra hīam a
vedāḥ ityādi smṛtibhyaḥ puruṣa artha tve pi ācārasya āarthakyam iṣṭa ādau hi karma jāte phalam ārabhamāṇe tad apekṣaḥ eva ācāraḥ tatra eva kaṃcid atiśayam ārapsyate karma ca sarva artha kāri iti śruti smṛti prasiddhiḥ tasmāt karma eva śīla upalakṣitam auśaya bhūtam
kāraṇam iti kārṣṇājieḥ matam a hi karmaṇi saṃbhavati śīlāt hi padbhyām palāyitum pārayamāṇaḥ raṃhitum arhati iti sukṛta duṣkṛte eva iti tu bādariḥ
bādariḥ tu ācāryaḥ sukṛta duṣkṛte eva caraṇa śabde pratyāyyete iti caraṇam karma iti aarthātaram tathā hi aviśeṣeṇa karma mātre caratiḥ dṛśyate
yaḥ hi iṣṭa ādi lakṣaṇam puṇyam karma karoti tam laukikāḥ ācakṣate dharmam carati eṣa mahātmā iti ca dharma viśeṣaḥ eva bheda vyapadeśaḥ tu
karma caraṇayoḥ upapadyate tasmāt ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ praśasta karmāṇaḥ kapūya caraṇāḥ idita karmāṇaḥ iti aiṣṭa ādi kāriṇām api ca śrutam aiṣṭa ādi kāri adhikaraṇam iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ ca dramasam gacchati iti uktam ye tu itare iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ te api kim
cadramasam gacchati uta a gacchati iti cityate tatra tāvat āha iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ eva cadramasam gacchati iti etat a kasmāt yatas iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām api cadra maṇḍalam śrutam tathā hi
aviśeṣeṇa kauṣītakiḥ samāmaati ye vai ke ca asmāt lokāt prayati cadramasam eva te sarve gacchati iti ca cadra prāptim avakalpate pañcamyām āhutau iti āhuti saṃkhyā iyamāt
tasmāt sarve eva cadramasam āsīdeyuḥ iṣṭa ādi kāriṇām itareṣām ca yuktam iti ced a itareṣām cadra maṇḍale bhoga abhāvāt tuśabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati tuśabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati
sarve cadramasam gacchati iti kasmāt bhogāya eva hi cadra ārohaṇam pratyavarohāya eva yathā kaścid vṛkṣam ārohati puṣpa phala upādāāya pataāya eva bhogaḥ ca aiṣṭa ādi kāriṇām
cadramasi āsti iti uktam tasmāt iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ eva cadramasam ārohati etare te tu yama ālayam avagāhya puar eva imam lokam pratyavarohati evaṃbhūtau teṣām āroha avarohau bhavataḥ
kutas tad gati darśaāt tathā hi śrutiḥ prayatām aiṣṭa ādi kāriṇām yama vaśya tām darśayati a sāṃparāyaḥ pratibhāti bālam mūḍham ayam
paras iti puas puarvaśam āpadyate me iti vaivasvatam saṃgamaam iti evaṃjātīyakam ca bahu eva yam avaśya tā prāpti liṅgam bhavati smarati ca api ca mauvyāsa prabhṛtayaḥ śiṣṭāḥ
pure yama ā

text1:
ar vaśam āpadyate me iti
vaivasvatam saṃgamanam janānām iti evaṃjātīyakam ca bahu eva yama vaśya tā prāpti liṅgam bhavati
smaranti ca
api ca manu vyāsa prabhṛtayaḥ śiṣṭāḥ saṃyamane pure yama āyattam kapūya karma vipākam smaranti nāciketa upākhyāna ādiṣu
api ca sapta
api ca sapta narakāḥ raurava pramukhāḥ duṣkṛta phala upabhoga bhūmi tvena smaryante paurāṇikaiḥ
tān aniṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ prāpnuvanti
kutas te candram prāpnuyuḥ iti abhiprāyaḥ
nanu viruddham idam yama āyattāḥ yātanāḥ pāpa karmāṇaḥ nubhavanti iti yāvatā teṣu raurava ādiṣu anye citragupta ādayaḥ nānā adhiṣṭhātāraḥ smaryante iti
na iti āha
tatra api ca tad vyāpārāt avirodhaḥ
teṣu api saptasu narakeṣu tasya eva yamasya adhiṣṭhātṛ tva vyāpāra abhyupagamāt avirodhaḥ
yama prayuktāḥ eva hi te citragupta ādayaḥ dhiṣṭhātāraḥ smaryante
vidyā karmaṇoḥ iti tu prakṛta tvāt
pañcāgni vidyāyām vettha yathā asau lokaḥ na saṃpūryate iti asya praśnasya prativacana avasare śrūyate atha etayoḥ pathoḥ na katareṇa cana tāni imāni kṣudrāṇi asakṛt āvartīni bhūtāni bhavanti
jāyasva mriyastvā iti etat tṛtīyam sthānam tena asau loke na saṃpūryate iti
tatra etayoḥ pathoḥ iti vidyā karmaṇoḥ iti etat
kasmāt
prakṛta tvāt
vidyā karmaṇī hi deva yāna pitṛyāṇayoḥ pathoḥ pratipade prakṛte tat ye ittham viduḥ iti vidyā tayā pratipattavyaḥ deva yānaḥ panthāḥ prakīrtitaḥ
iṣṭāpūrte dattam iti karma tena pratipattavyaḥ pitṛyāṇaḥ panthāḥ prakīrtitaḥ tad prakriyāyām atha etayoḥ pathoḥ na katareṇa cana iti śrutam
etat uktam bhavati ye na vidyā sādhanena deva yāne pathi adhikṛtāḥ na api karmaṇā pitṛyāṇe teṣām eṣa sakṛdāvartī tṛtīyaḥ panthāḥ bhavati iti
tasmāt api na aniṣṭa ādi kāribhiḥ candramāḥ prāpyate
syāt etat te candra bimbam āruhya tatas varuhya kṣudra jantu tvam pratipatsyante iti
tat api na asti āroha ānarthakyāt
api ca sarveṣu prayatsu candra lokam prāpnuvatsu asau lokaḥ prayadbhiḥ saṃpūryeta iti atas praśna viruddham prativacanam prasajyeta
tathā hi prativacanam dātavyam yathā asau lokaḥ na saṃpūryate
avaroha abhyupagamāt asaṃpūraṇa upapattiḥ iti ced na aśruta tvāt
satyam avarohāt api a saṃpūraṇam upapadyate
śrutiḥ tu tṛtīya sthāna saṃkīrtanena asaṃpūraṇam darśayati etat tṛtīyam sthānam tena asau lokaḥ na saṃpūryate iti
tena anārohāt eva asaṃpūraṇam iti yuktam
avarohasya iṣṭa ādi kāriṣu api aviśiṣṭa tve sati tṛtīya sthāna ukti ānarthakya prasaṅgāt
tu śabdaḥ tu śākhā antarīya vākya prabhavām aśeṣa gamana āśaṅkām ucchinatti
evam sati adhikṛta apekṣaḥ śākhāntarīye vākye sarva śabdaḥ vatiṣṭhate ye vai kecid adhikṛtāḥ asmāt lokāt prayanti candramasam eva te sarve gacchanti iti
yat punar uktam deha lābha upapattaye sarve candramasam gantum arhanti pañcamyām āhutau
iti āhuti saṃkhyā niyamāt iti tat pratyucyate
na tṛtīye tathā upalabdheḥ
na tṛtīye sthāne deha lābhāya pañca saṃkhyā niyamaḥ āhutīnām ādartavyaḥ
kutas
tathā upalabdheḥ
tathā hi antareṇa eva āhuti saṃkhyā niyamam varṇitena prakāreṇa tṛtīya sthāna prāptiḥ upalabhyate jāyasva mriyasva iti etat tṛtīyam sthānam iti
api ca pañcamyām āhutau āpaḥ puruṣa vacasaḥ bhavanti iti manuṣya śarīra hetu tvena āhuti saṃkhyā kīrtyate na kīṭa pataṅga ādi śarīra hetu tvena puruṣa śabdasya manuṣya jāti vacana tvāt
api ca pañcamyām āhutau apām puruṣavacaḥ tvam upadiśyate na a pañcamyām āhutau puruṣavacaḥ tvam pratiṣidhyate vākyasya dvi artha tā doṣāt
tatra yeṣām āroha avarohau saṃbhavataḥ teṣām pañcamyām āhutau dehaḥ udbhaviṣyati
anyeṣām tu vinā eva āhuti saṃkhyayā bhūta antara upasṛṣṭābhiḥ adbhiḥ dehaḥ ārapsyate
smaryate pi ca loke
api ca smaryate loke droṇa dhṛṣṭadyumna prabhṛtīnām sītā draupadī prabhṛtīnām ca a yoni ja tvam
tatra droṇa ādīnām yoṣit viṣayā ekā āhutiḥ na asti
dhṛṣṭadyumna ādīnām tu yoṣit puruṣa viṣaye dve api āhutī na staḥ
yathā ca tatra āhuti saṃkhyā niyama an ādaraḥ bhavati evam anyatra api bhaviṣyati
balākā api antareṇa eva retaḥ sekam garbham dhatte iti loka rūḍhiḥ
darśanāt ca
api ca caturvidhe bhūta grāme jarāyu ja aṇḍa ja sveda ja udbhid ja lakṣaṇe sveda ja udbhid jayoḥ antareṇa eva grāmya dharmam utpatti darśanāt āhuti saṃkhyāna ādaraḥ bhavati
evam anyatra api bhaviṣyati
nanu teṣām khalu eṣām bhūtānām trīṇi eva bījāni bhavanti āṇḍa jam jīva jam udbhijjam iti atra trividhaḥ eva bhūta grāmaḥ śrūyate
katham caturvidha tvam bhūta grāmasya pratijñātam iti atra ucyate
tṛtīya śabda avarodhaḥ saṃśoka jasya
āṇḍa jam jīva jam udbhijjam iti atra tṛtīyena udbhijja śabdena eva sveda ja upasaṃgrahaḥ kṛtaḥ pratyetavyaḥ ubhayoḥ api sveda ja udbhijjayoḥ bhūmi udaka udbheda prabhava tvasya tulya tvāt
sthāvara udbhedāt tu vilakṣaṇaḥ jaṅgama udbhedaḥ iti anyatra sveda ja udbhid jayoḥ bheda vādaḥ iti avirodhaḥ
sābhāvya āpattiḥ upapatteḥ
sābhāvya āpatti adhikaraṇam
iṣṭa ādi kāriṇaḥ candramasam āruhya tasmin yāvat saṃpātam uṣitvā tatas sa anuśayāḥ avarohanti iti uktam
atha avaroha prakāraḥ parīkṣyate
tatra iyam avaroha śrutiḥ bhavati atha etam eva adhvānam punar nivartante yathetam ākāśam ākāśāt vāyum vāyuḥ bhūtvā dhūmaḥ bhavati dhūmaḥ bhūtvā abhram bhavati abhram bhūtvā meghaḥ bhavati meghaḥ bhūtvā pravarṣati iti
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim ākāśa ādi svarūpam eva avarohantaḥ pratipadyante kim vā ākāśa ādi sāmyam iti
tatra prāptam tāvat ākāśa ādi sva rūpam eva pratipadyante iti
kutas
evam hi śrutiḥ bhavati
itarathā lakṣaṇā syāt
śruti lakṣaṇā viśaye ca śrutiḥ nyāyyā na lakṣaṇā
tathā ca vāyuḥ bhūtvā dhūmaḥ bhavati iti evamādīni akṣaraṇi tad tad svarūpa āpattau āñjasyena avakalpante
tasmāt ākāśa ādi svarūpa pratipattiḥ iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ ākāśa ādi sāmyam pratipadyante iti
candra maṇḍale yat am mayam śarīram upabhoga artham ārabdham tat upabhoga kṣaye sati pravilīyamānam sūkṣmam ākāśa samam bhavati
tatas vāyoḥ vaśam eti
tatas dhūma ādibhiḥ saṃpṛcyate iti
tat etat ucyate yathā itam ākāśam ākāśāt vāyum iti evamādinā
kutas etat
upapatteḥ
evam hi etat upapadyate
na hi anyasya anya bhāvaḥ mukhyaḥ upapadyate
ākāśa svarūpa pratipattau ca vāyu ādi krameṇa avarohaḥ na upapadyate
vibhu tvāt ca ākāśena nitya saṃbaddha tvāt na tad sādṛśya āpatteḥ anyaḥ tad saṃbandhaḥ ghaṭate
śruti asaṃbhave ca lakṣaṇa āśrayaṇam nyāyyam eva
atas ākāśa ādi tulya tā āpattiḥ eva atra ākāśa ādi bhāvaḥ iti upacaryate
na ati cireṇa viśeṣāt
na ati cira adhikaraṇam
tatra akāśa ādi pratipattau prāk vrīhi ādi bhāva āpatteḥ bhavati viśayaḥ kim dīrgham dīrgham kālam pūrva pūrva sādṛśyena avasthāya uttara uttara sādṛśyam gacchanti uta alpam alpam iti
tatra aniyamaḥ niyama kāriṇaḥ śāstrasya abhāvāt iti evam prāpte idam āha na aticireṇa iti
alpam alpam kālam ākāśa ādi bhāvena avasthāya varṣa dhārābhiḥ saha imām bhuvam āpatanti
kutas etat
viśeṣa darśanāt
tathā hi vrīhi ādi bhāva āpatteḥ anantaram viśinaṣṭi atas vai khalu durniṣprapataram iti
takāraḥ ekaḥ chāndasyām prakriyāyām luptaḥ mantavyaḥ
dus niṣprapatataram dus niṣkramataram duḥkhataram asmāt vrīhi ādi bhāvāt niḥsaraṇam bhavati iti arthaḥ
tat atra duḥkham niṣprapatanam pradarśayan pūrveṣu sukham niṣprapatanam darśayati
sukha duḥkha tā viśeṣaḥ ca ayam niṣprapatanasya kāla alpatva dīrgha tva nimittaḥ tasmin avadhau śarīra aniṣpatteḥ upabhoga asaṃbhavāt
tasmāt vrīhi ādi bhāva āpatteḥ prāk alpena eva kālena avarohaḥ syāt iti
anya dhiṣṭhiteṣu pūrvavat abhilāpāt
anya adhiṣṭhita adhikaraṇam
tasmin eva avarohe pravarṣaṇa anantaram paṭhyate te iha vrīhi yavāḥ oṣadhi vanaspatayaḥ tila māṣāḥ iti jāyante iti
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim asmin avadhau sthāvara jāti āpannāḥ sthāvara sukha duḥkha bhājaḥ nuśayinaḥ bhavanti āhosvit kṣetrajña antara dhiṣṭhiteṣu sthāvara śarīreṣu saṃśleṣa mātram gacchanti iti
kim tāvat prāptam
sthāvara jāti āpannāḥ tad sukha duḥkha bhājaḥ nuśayinaḥ bhavanti iti
kutas etat
janeḥ mukhya artha tva upapatteḥ sthāvara bhāvasya ca śruti smṛtyoḥ upabhoga sthāna tva prasiddheḥ paśu hiṃsā ādi yogāt ca iṣṭa ādeḥ karma jātasya aniṣṭa phala tva upapatteḥ
tasmāt mukhyam eva idam anuśayinām vrīhi ādi janma śva ādi janma vat yathā śva yonim vā sūkara yonim vā cāṇḍāla yonim vā iti mukhyam eva anuśayinām śva ādi janma tat sukha duḥkha anvitam bhavati evam vrīhi ādi janma api iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ anyaiḥ jīvaiḥ adhiṣṭhiteṣu vrīhi ādiṣu saṃsarga mātram anuśayinaḥ pratipadyante na tad sukha duḥkha bhājaḥ bhavanti pūrvavat yathā vāyu dhūma ādi bhāvaḥ nuśayinām tad saṃśleṣa mātram evam vrīhi ādi bhāvaḥ jāti sthāvaraiḥ saṃśleṣa mātram
kutas etat
tadvat eva iha api abhilāpāt
kaḥ abhilāpasya tadvat bhāvaḥ
karma vyāpāram antareṇa saṃkīrtanam yathā ākāśa ādiṣu pravarṣaṇa anteṣu na kiṃcid karma vyāpāram parāmṛśati evam vrīhi ādi janmani api
tasmāt na asti atra sukha duḥkha bhāktvam anuśayinām
yatra tu sukha duḥkha bhāktvam abhipraiti parāmṛśati tatra karma vyāpāram ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ
kapūya caraṇāḥ iti
api ca mukhye nuśayinām vrīhi ādi janmani vrīhi ādiṣu lūyamāneṣu kaṇḍyamāneṣu pacyamāneṣu bhakṣyamāṇeṣu ca tad abhimāninaḥ nuśayinaḥ pravaseyuḥ
yaḥ hi jīvaḥ yat śarīram abhimanyate sa tasmin pīḍyamāne pravasati iti prasiddham
tatra vrīhi ādi bhāvāt retaḥ sic bhāvaḥ nuśayinām na abhilapyeta
atas saṃsarga mātram anuśayinām anya dhiṣṭhiteṣu vrīhi ādiṣu bhavati
etena janeḥ mukhya artha tvam pratibrūyāt upabhoga sthāna tvam ca sthāvara bhāvasya
na ca vayam upabhoga sthāna tvam sthāvara bhāvasya avajānīmahe
bhavatu anyeṣām jantūnām apuṇya sāmarthyena sthāvara bhāvam upagatānām etat upabhoga sthānam
candramasaḥ tu avarohantaḥ nuśayinaḥ na sthāvara bhāvam upabhuñjate iti ācakṣmahe
aśuddham iti ced na śabdāt
yat punar uktam paśu hiṃsā ādi yogāt aśuddham ādhvarikam karma tasya aniṣṭam api phalam avakalpate iti atas mukhyam eva anuśayinām vrīhi ādi janma astu
tatra gauṇī kalpanā anarthikā iti tat parihriyate na śāstra hetu tvāt dharma adharma vijñānasya
ayam dharmaḥ ayam adharmaḥ iti śāstram eva vijñāne kāraṇam atīndriya tvāt tayoḥ
aniyata deśa kāla nimitta tvāt ca yasmin deśe kāle nimitte ca yaḥ dharmaḥ nuṣṭhīyate saḥ eva deśa kāla nimitta antareṣu adharmaḥ bhavati
tena na śāstrāt ṛte dharma adharma viṣayam vijñānam kasyacid asti
śāstrāt ca hiṃsā anugraha ādi ātmakaḥ jyotiṣṭomaḥ dharmaḥ iti avadhāritaḥ sa katham aśuddhaḥ iti śakyate vaktum
nanu na hiṃsyāt sarvā bhūtāni iti śāstram eva bhūta viṣayām hiṃsām adharmaḥ iti avagamayati
bāḍham utsargaḥ tu saḥ
apavādaḥ yam ca agnīṣomīyam paśum ālabheta iti
utsarga apavādayoḥ ca vyavasthita viṣaya tvam
tasmāt viśuddham karma vaidikam śiṣṭaiḥ anuṣṭhīyamāna tvāt a nindyamāna tvāt ca
tena na tasya pratirūpam phalam jāti sthāvara tvam
na ca śva ādi janma vat api vrīhi ādi janma bhavitum arhati
tat hi kapūya caraṇa an adhikṛtyaḥ ucyate
na evam iha vaiśeṣikaḥ kaścid adhikāraḥ sti
atas khalitānām anuśayinām vrīhi ādi saṃśleṣa mātram tad bhāvaḥ iti upacaryate
retaḥ sic yogaḥ tha
itas ca vrīhi ādi saṃśleṣa mātram tad bhāvaḥ yat kāraṇam vrīhi ādi bhāvasya anantaram anuśayinām retaḥ sic bhāvaḥ āmnāyate yaḥ yaḥ hi annam atti yaḥ retaḥ siñcati tat bhūyaḥ eva bhavati iti
na ca atra mukhyaḥ retaḥ sigbhāvaḥ saṃbhavati
cira jātaḥ hi prāpta yauvanaḥ retaḥsic bhavati
katham iva an upacaritam tad bhāvam adyamāna anna anugataḥ nuśayī pratipadyate
tatra tāvat avaśyam retaḥ sic yogaḥ eva retaḥ sic bhāvaḥ bhyupagantavyaḥ
tadvat vrīhi ādi bhāvaḥ vrīhi ādi yogaḥ eva iti avirodhaḥ
yoneḥ śarīram
atha retaḥ sigbhāvasya anantaram yonau niṣikte retasi yoneḥ adhi śarīram anuśayinām anuśaya phala upabhogāya jāyate iti āha śāstram tat ye iha ramaṇīya caraṇāḥ ityādi
