brahmā api tad ākāra tām iva pratipadyate tad ālambaḥ brahmaṇaḥ ākāra viśeṣa upadeśaḥ upāsa arthaḥ virudhyate evam a vaiyarthyam ākāravat brahma viṣayāṇām api vākyāām bhaviṣyati a hi veda vākyāām kasyacid arthavat tvam kasyacid aarthavat tvam iti
yuktam pratipattum pramāṇa tva aviśeṣāt yat purastāt pratijñātam opādhi yogāt api ubhaya liṅga tvam brahmaṇoḥ ti iti tat virudhyate ā iti brūmaḥ upādhi nimittasya vastu dharma tva aupapatteḥ upādhīnām ca avidyā pratyupasthāpita tvāt satyām eva ca aisargikyām avidyāyām loka veda vyavahāra avatāraḥ iti
tatra tatra avocāma āha ca ta mātram āha ca śrutiḥ caitaya mātram vilakṣaṇa rūpa atara rahitam brahma sa yathā kṛtsaḥ rasa ghaaḥ eva evam vā
kṛtsaḥ prajñā aghaaḥ eva iti etat uktam bhavati āsye ātma otar bahis vā caitayādayat rūpam asti caitayam eva tu irataram asya svarūpam yathā saidhavaghaasya atas bahis ca lavaṇa rasaḥ eva irataraḥ bhavati
a rasātaram tathā eva iti darśayati ca atho api smaryate darśayati ca śrutiḥ brahma brahma atha atas ādeśaḥ u eti eti ayat eva tat viditāt atha u a viditāt adhiyataḥ vācaḥ
iva ārtate a prāpya maasā saha iti evamādyā ca bādhvaḥ pṛṣṭaḥ saḥ brahma provāca iti śrūyate sa ha uvāca adhīhi bho iti sa tūṣṇīm
babhūva tam ha dvitīye tṛtīye vā vacaḥ uvāca brūmaḥ khalu tvam tu iti tathā smṛtiṣu api jñeyam
yat tat pravakṣyāmi yat jñātvā amṛtam a ādimat param brahma a sattā asat ucyate iti evamādyāsu tathā viśva rūpa dharaḥ ārāyaṇaḥ āradam uvāca iti smaryate māyā hi eṣā mayā sṛṣṭā yamām paśyasi ārada sarva bhūta guṇaiḥ yuktam
ā evam mām jñātum arhasi iti atas eva ca upamā sūryaka ādi vat yatas eva ca ayam ātmā vāc maasa atītaḥ para pratiṣedha upadeśyaḥ atas eva ca asya upādhi nimittām apāramārthikīm
viśeṣavat tām abhipretya jala sūryaka ādi vat iti upamā upādīyate mokṣa śāstreṣu yathā hi ayam jyotiḥ ātmā vivasvā apaḥ kriyate bheda rūpaḥ devaḥ kṣetreṣu evam ajaḥ yam ātmā iti ekaḥ eva hi bhūtātmā bhūte
bhūte vyavasthitaḥ ekadhā bahudhā ca eva dṛśyate jala cadravat iti ca evamādiṣu atra pratyavasthīyate ambu vat agrahaṇāt tu a tathātvam a jala sūryaka ādi tulya tvam iha upapadyate tadvat agrahaṇāt sūrya ādibhyaḥ hi mūrtebhyaḥ
pṛthak bhūtam viprakṛṣṭa deśam mūrtam jalam gṛhyate tatra yuktaḥ sūrya ādi pratibimba udayaḥ tu ātmā mūrtaḥ ca asmāt pṛthak bhūtāḥ viprakṛṣṭa deśāḥ ca upādhayaḥ sarvagata tvāt sarva āaya tvāt ca tasmāt ayuktaḥ yam dṛṣṭātaḥ iti
atra pratividhīyate vṛddhi hrāsa bhāktva matarbhāvāt ubhaya sāmañjasyāt evam yuktaḥ eva tu ayam dṛṣṭātaḥ vivakṣita aṃśa saṃbhavāt hi dṛṣṭāta dārṣṭātikayoḥ kvacid kaṃcid vivakṣitam aṃśam muktvā sarva sārūpyam keacid darśayitum śakyate
sarva sārūpye hi darśa āt ca darśayati ca śrutiḥ parasya eva brahmaṇaḥ deha ādiṣu upādhiṣu atarau praveśam puras cakre dvipadaḥ puras cakre catuṣpadaḥ puras sa pakṣī bhūtvā puras puruṣa
āviśat iti ca tasmāt yuktam etat atas eva ca upamā sūryaka ādi vat iti tasmāt brahma ubhaya liṅgam viparīta liṅgam vā iti siddham atra
kecid dve adhikaraṇe kalpayati prathamam tāvat kim pratyastamita aśeṣa prapañcam eka ākāram brahma uta prapañcavat a eka ākāra upetam iti dvitīyam tu pratyastamita prapañca tve kim sat lakṣaṇam brahma uta bodha lakṣaṇam uta
ubhaya lakṣaṇam iti atra vayam vadāmaḥ sarvathā api āarthakyam adhikaraṇa atara ārambhasya iti yadi tāvat a eka liṅga tvam parasya brahmaṇaḥ irā kartavyam iti ayam prayāsaḥ tat irā kṛtam iti uttaram adhikaraṇam prakāśavat ca iti etat vyartham eva bhavet a bhavat
ca sat lakṣaṇam eva brahma a bodha lakṣaṇam iti śakyam baktum eva ityādi śruti vaiyarthya prasaṅgāt katham vā brahma jīvasya ātmatveā upadiśyeta bodha lakṣaṇam eva brahma a
sat lakṣaṇam iti śakyam vaktum asti iti eva upalabdhavyaḥ ityādi śruti vaiyarthya prasaṅgāt katham vā irasta sattākaḥ bodhaḥ abhyupagamyeta āpi ubhaya lakṣaṇam eva brahma iti śakyam vaktum pūrva abhyupagama virodha prasaṅgāt sattā vyāvṛttyā ca bodhe bodha vyāvṛttayā ca
sattayā upetam brahma tat eva pūrva adhikaraṇa pratiṣiddham sa prapañca tvam prasajyeta śruta tvāt adoṣaḥ iti ced a ekasya a eka svabhāva tva aupapatteḥ atha sattā eṣa bodhaḥ bodhaḥ eva ca
sattā paraspara vyāvṛttiḥ asti iti yadi ucyeta tathā api kim sat lakṣaṇam brahma uta bodha lakṣaṇam uta ubhaya lakṣaṇam iti ayam eva syāt sūtrāṇi api ca
brahma viṣayāsu śrutiṣu a ākāre brahmaṇi parigṛhīte avaśyam vaktavyā itarāsām śrutīām gatiḥ sūtrāṇi arthavattarāṇi saṃpadyate yat api āhuḥ śrutayaḥ śrutayaḥ
aākāra pratipatti arthāḥ eva a pṛthak arthāḥ iti tat api lakṣyate katham ye hi paravidyā adhikāre kecid prapañcāḥ ucyate yathā yuktāḥ hi asya harayaḥ śatā
daśa iti ayam vai vai daśa ca sahasrāṇi ca iti evamādayaḥ te bhavatu pravilaya arthāḥ tat etat brahma apūrvam aaparam aataram abāhyam iti upasaṃhārāt ye ucyate
yathā maomayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ bhā rūpaḥ iti evamādayaḥ teṣām pravilaya artha tvam kratum kurvīta iti evaṃjātīyake prakṛtea eva teṣām teṣām śrutyā ca evaṃjātīyakāām guṇāām
lakṣaṇayā pravilaya artha tvam avakalpate sarveṣām ca sādhāraṇe pravilaya artha tve sati a rūpa vat eva hi tad pradhā tvāt iti syāt phalam api eṣām yathopadeśam kvacid durita kṣayaḥ kvacid aiśvairya prāptiḥ kvacid krama muktiḥ iti avagamyate eva
iti atas pārthagarthyam eva brahma vākyāām ca yāyyam a ekavākyatvam katham ca eṣām ekavākyatā utprekṣyate iti vaktavyam eka eyoga pratīteḥ prayāja darśa pūrṇamāsa vākya vat iti ced a brahma vākyeṣu iyoga abhāvāt vastu mātra paryavasāyi iti
hi iti etat vistareṇa pratiṣṭhāpitam tat tu iti atra kiṃviṣayaḥ ca atra iti vaktavyam puruṣaḥ hi iti sva vyāpāre dvaita prapañca pravilayaḥ
bhaviṣyati apravilāpite hi dvaita prapañce brahma tattva ābodhaḥ bhavati iti atas brahma tattva avabodha pratyaīka bhūtaḥ dvaita prapañcaḥ pravilāpyaḥ yathā svarga kāmasya upadiśyate evam apavarga kāmasya prapañca pravilayaḥ yathā ca tamasi
vyavasthitam ghaṭa ādi tattvam avabubhutsamāea tad pratyaīka bhūtam tamaḥ pravilāpyate evam brahma tattvam avabubhutsamāea tad pratyaīka bhūtaḥ prapañcaḥ pravilāpayitavyaḥ brahma svabhāvaḥ hi prapañcaḥ a prapañca svabhāvam brahma brahma tea brahma tattva avabodhaḥ bhavati
iti atra vayam pṛcchāmaḥ kaḥ yam prapañca pravilayaḥ kimagi pratāpa saṃparkāt ghṛta kāṭhiya pravilayaḥ iva prapañca pravilayaḥ kartavyaḥ āhosvit ekasmin cadre avidyā kṛtaḥ brahmaṇi āma rūpa prapañcaḥ vidyayā pravilāpayitavyaḥ iti
tatra yadi tāvat vidyamānaḥ ayam prapañcaḥ deha ādi lakṣaṇaḥ ādhyātmikaḥ bāhyaḥ ca pṛthivī ādi lakṣaṇaḥ pravilāpayitavyaḥ iti ucyeta sa puruṣa mātreṇa aśakyaḥ pravilāpayitum iti tad pravilaya upadeśa uśakya viṣayaḥ eva syāt ca pṛthivī ādi pravilayaḥ
kṛtaḥ iti idāīm jagat abhaviṣyat atha avidyā adhyastaḥ brahmaṇi ekasmin ayam prapañcaḥ vidyayā pravilāpyate iti brūyāt tatas brahma eva āvedayitavyam ekam eva advitīyam brahma tat satyam
saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi iti tasmin āvedite vidyā svayam eva utpadyate tayā ca avidyā bādhyate tatas ca avidyā adhyastaḥ sakalaḥ yam āma rūpa prapañcaḥ svapa prapañca vat pravilīyate a āvedite tu
kuru prapañca pravilayam ca iti prapañca pravilayaḥ vā jāyeta brahmaṇi prapañca pravilayaḥ vā jāyeta brahmaṇi syāt ubhaya siddheḥ
hi avidyā adhyasta sarpa ādi prapañca pravilayaḥ ca bhavati ca kṛtam eva kriyate ca prapañca avasthāyām sa prapañca pakṣasya eva vā syāt
brahma pakṣasya eva vā prathame vikalpe pṛthivī ādi vat jīvasya api pravilāpita tvāt kasya prapañca vilaye iyogaḥ ucyeta kasya vā iyoga eṣṭha tayā mokṣaḥ uvāptavyaḥ ucyeta dvitīye api brahma eva aiyojya svabhāvam
jīvasya svarūpam jīva tvam tu avidyā kṛtam eva iti pratipādite brahmaṇi iyojya abhāvāt iyoga abhāvaḥ eva draṣṭavya ādi śabdāḥ api paravidyā adhikāra paṭhitāḥ tattva abhimukhīkaraṇa pradhāāḥ a tattva avabodha vidhi pradhāāḥ bhavati loke pi idam
paśya idam ākarṇaya iti ca evaṃjātīyakeṣu praṇidhā a mātram kuru iti ucyate a sākṣāt jñāam eva kuru iti jñeya abhimukhasya api jñāam kadācid jāyate jāyate tasmāt tam prati jñā a viṣayaḥ eva
darśayitavyaḥ jñāpayitu kāmaḥ tasmin

text1:
sa prapañca pakṣasya eva vā syāt brahma pakṣasya eva vā prathame vikalpe niṣprapañca brahma tattva pratipādanena pṛthivī ādi vat jīvasya api pravilāpita tvāt kasya prapañca vilaye niyogaḥ ucyeta
kasya vā niyoga niṣṭha tayā mokṣaḥ vāptavyaḥ ucyeta
dvitīye pi brahma eva aniyojya svabhāvam jīvasya svarūpam jīva tvam tu avidyā kṛtam eva iti pratipādite brahmaṇi niyojya abhāvāt niyoga abhāvaḥ eva
draṣṭavya ādi śabdāḥ api paravidyā adhikāra paṭhitāḥ tattva abhimukhīkaraṇa pradhānāḥ na tattva avabodha vidhi pradhānāḥ bhavanti
loke pi idam paśya idam ākarṇaya iti ca evaṃjātīyakeṣu nirdeśeṣu praṇidhāna mātram kuru iti ucyate na sākṣāt jñānam eva kuru iti
jñeya abhimukhasya api jñānam kadācid jāyate kadācid na jāyate
tasmāt tam prati jñāna viṣayaḥ eva darśayitavyaḥ jñāpayitu kāmena
tasmin darśite svayam eva yathāviṣayam yathāpramāṇam ca jñānam utpadyate
na ca pramāṇa antareṇa anyathā prasiddhe rthe anyathā jñānam niyuktasya api upapadyate
yadi punar niyuktaḥ ham iti anyathā jñānam kuryāt na tu tat jñānam kim tarhi mānasī sā kriyā
svayam eva ced anyathā utpadyeta bhrāntiḥ eva syāt
jñānam tu pramāṇa janyam yathā bhūta viṣayam ca
na tat niyoga śatena api kārayitum śakyate na ca pratiṣedha śatena api vārayitum śakyate
na hi tat puruṣa tantram vastu tantram eva hi tat
atas pi niyoga abhāvaḥ
kiṃca anyat niyoga niṣṭhatayā eva paryavasyati āmnāye yat abhyupagatam a niyojya brahma ātmatvam jīvasya tat apramāṇakam eva syāt
atha śāstram eva aniyojya brahma ātmatvam ācakṣīta tad avabodhe ca puruṣam niyuñjīta tatas brahmaśāstrasya ekasya dvi artha para tā viruddha artha para tā ca prasajyeyātām
niyoga para tāyām ca śruta hāniḥ aśruta kalpanā karma phala vat mokṣasya adṛṣṭa phala tvam anitya tvam ca iti evamādayaḥ doṣāḥ na kenacid parihartum śakyāḥ
tasmāt avagati niṣṭhāni eva brahma vākyāni na niyoga niṣṭhāni
atas ca eka niyoga pratīteḥ eka vākya tā iti ayuktam
abhyupagamyamāne ca brahma vākyeṣu niyoga sadbhāve tad eka tvam niṣprapañca upadeśeṣu sa prapañca upadeśeṣu ca asiddham
na hi śabda antara ādibhiḥ pramāṇaiḥ niyoga bhede vagamyamāne sarvatra ekaḥ niyogaḥ iti śakyam āśrayitum
prayāja darśa pūrṇamāsa vākyeṣu tu adhikāra aṃśena abhedāt yuktam eka tvam
na tu iha saguṇa nirguṇa codanāsu kaścid ekatva kara oṃśaḥ sti
na hi bhā rūpa tva ādayaḥ guṇāḥ prapañca pravilaya upakāriṇaḥ na api prapañca vilayaḥ bhā rūpa tva ādi guṇa upakārī paraspara virodhi tvāt
na hi kṛtsna prapañca pravilāpanam prapañca eka deśa apekṣaṇam ca ekasmin dharmiṇi yuktam samāveśayitum
tasmāt asmad uktaḥ eva vibhāgaḥ ākāra vat anākāra upadeśānām yuktataraḥ iti
prakṛtā etāvat tvam hi pratiṣedhati tatas bravīti ca bhūyas
prakṛta etāvat tva adhikaraṇam
dve vāva brahmaṇaḥ rūpe mūrtam ca eva amūrtam ca iti upakramya pañca mahābhūtāni dvairāśyena pravibhajya amūrta rasasya ca puruṣa śabda uditasya māhārajana ādīni rūpāṇi darśayitvā punar paṭhyate atha atas ādeśaḥ na iti na iti na hi etasmāt iti na iti anyat param asti iti
tatra kaḥ sya pratiṣedhasya viṣayaḥ iti jijñāsāmahe
na hi atra idam tat iti viśeṣitam kiṃcid pratiṣedhyam upalabhyate
iti śabdena tu atra pratiṣedhyam kim api samarpyate na iti na iti iti iti paratvāt nañ prayogasya
iti śabdaḥ ca ayam saṃnihita ālambanaḥ evaṃśabda samāna vṛttiḥ prayujyamānaḥ dṛśyate iti ha sma upādhyāyaḥ kathayati iti evamādiṣu
saṃnihitam ca atra prakaraṇa sāmarthyāt rūpa dvayam sa prapañcam brahmaṇaḥ tat ca brahma yasya te dve rūpe
tatra naḥ saṃśayaḥ upajāyate kim ayam pratiṣedhaḥ rūpe rūpavat ca ubhayam api pratiṣedhati āhosvit ekataram
yadā api ekataram tadā api kim brahma pratiṣedhati rūpe pariśinaṣṭi āhosvit rūpe pratiṣedhati brahma pariśinaṣṭi iti
tatra prakṛta tva aviśeṣāt ubhayam api pratiṣedhati iti āśaṅkāmahe dvau ca etau pratiṣedhau dvis na iti śabda prayogāt
tayoḥ ekena sa prapañcam brahmaṇaḥ rūpam pratiṣidhyate apareṇa rūpavat brahma iti bhavati matiḥ
athavā brahma eva rūpavat pratiṣidhyate
tat hi vāc manasā atīta tvāt asaṃbhāvyamāna sadbhāvam pratiṣedha arham
na tu rūpa prapañcaḥ pratyakṣa ādi gocara tvāt pratiṣedha arhaḥ
abhyāsaḥ tu ādara arthaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ na tāvat ubhaya pratiṣedhaḥ upapadyate śūnyavāda prasaṅgāt kaṃcid hi paramārtham ālambya aparamārthaḥ pratiṣidhyate yathā rajju ādiṣu sarpa ādayaḥ
tat ca pariśiṣyamāṇe kasmiṃścid bhāve avakalpate
kṛtsna pratiṣedhe tu kaḥ nyaḥ bhāvaḥ pariśiṣyeta
a pariśiṣyamāṇe ca anyasmin yaḥ itaraḥ pratiṣeddhum ārabhyate pratiṣeddhum aśakya tvāt tasya eva parama artha tva āpatteḥ pratiṣedha anupapattiḥ
nā api brahma pratiṣedhaḥ upapadyate brahma te bravāṇi ityādi upakrama virodhāt asannā eva sa bhavati
asat brahma iti veda ced ityādi nindā virodhāt asti iti eva upalabdhavyaḥ ityādi avadhāraṇa virodhāt sarva vedānta vyākopa prasaṅgāt ca
vāc manasā atīta tvam api brahmaṇaḥ na abhāva abhiprāyeṇa abhidhīyate
na hi mahatā parikara bandhena brahma vidā āpnoti param satyam jñānam anantam brahma iti evamādinā vedānteṣu brahma pratipādya tasya eva punar abhāvaḥ bhilapyeta
prakṣālanāt hi paṅkasya dūrāt asparśanam varam iti hi nyāyaḥ
pratipādana prakriyā tu eṣā yatas vācaḥ nivartante
a prāpya manasā saha iti
etat uktam bhavati vāc manasā atītam aviṣaya antaḥpāti pratyagātma bhūtam nitya śuddha buddha mukta svabhāvam brahma iti
tasmāt brahmaṇaḥ rūpa prapañcam pratiṣedhati pariśinaṣṭi brahma iti avagantavyam
tat etat ucyate prakṛtā etāvat tvam hi pratiṣedhati iti
prakṛtam yat etāvat iyat tā paricchinnam mūrta amūrta lakṣaṇam brahmaṇaḥ rūpam tat eṣa śabdaḥ pratiṣedhati
tat hi prakṛtam prapañcitam ca pūrvasmin granthe adhidaivatam adhyātmam ca
tad janitam eva ca vāsanā lakṣaṇam aparam rūpam amūrta rasa bhūtam puruṣa śabda uditam liṅga ātma vyapāśrayam māhārajana ādi upamābhiḥ darśitam amūrta rasasya puruṣasya cakṣuḥ grāhya rūpa yogi tva anupapatteḥ
tat etat sa prapañcam brahmaṇaḥ rūpam saṃnihita ālambanena iti karaṇena pratiṣedhakam nañam prati upanīyate iti gamyate
brahma tu rūpa viśeṣaṇa tvena ṣaṣṭhyā nirdiṣṭam pūrvasmin granthe na sva pradhāna tvena
prapañcite ca tadīye rūpa dvaye rūpavataḥ svarūpa jijñāsāyām idam upakrāntam atha atas ādeśaḥ na iti na iti iti
tatra kalpita rūpa pratyākhyānena brahmaṇaḥ svarūpa āvedanam iti nirṇīyate
tad āspadam hi idam samastam kāryam na iti na iti iti pratiṣiddham
yuktam ca kāryasya vācā ārambhaṇa śabda ādibhyaḥ sattvam iti na iti na iti iti pratiṣedhanam
na tu brahmaṇaḥ sarva kalpanā mūla tvāt
na ca atra iyam āśaṅkā kartavyā katham hi śāstram svayam eva brahmaṇaḥ rūpa dvayam darśayitvā svayam eva punar pratiṣedhati prakṣālanāt hi paṅkasya dūrāt asparśanam varam iti yatas na idam śāstram pratipādya tvena brahmaṇaḥ rūpa dvayam nirdiśati loka prasiddham tu idam rūpa dvayam brahmaṇi kalpitam parāmṛśati pratiṣedhya tvāya śuddha brahma svarūpa pratipādanāya ca iti niravadyam
dvau ca etau pratiṣedhau yathā saṃkhya nyāyena dve api mūrta amūrte pratiṣedhataḥ
yat vā pūrvaḥ pratiṣedhaḥ bhūta rāśim pratiṣedhati uttaraḥ vāsanā rāśim
athavā na iti na iti iti vīpsā iyam iti iti yāvat kiṃcid utprekṣyate tat sarvam na bhavati iti arthaḥ parigaṇita pratiṣedhe hi kriyamāṇe yadi na etat brahma kim anyat brahma bhavet iti jijñāsā syāt
vīpsāyām tu satyām samastasya viṣaya jātasya pratiṣedhāt aviṣayaḥ pratyagātmā brahma iti jijñāsā nivartate
tasmāt prapañcam eva brahmaṇi kalpitam pratiṣedhati pariśinaṣṭi brahma iti nirṇayaḥ
itas ca eṣaḥ eva nirṇayaḥ yatas tatas prapañca pratiṣedhāt bhūyas brahma bravīti anyat param asti iti
abhāva avasāne hi pratiṣedhe kriyamāṇe kim anyat param asti iti brūyāt
tatra eṣā akṣara yojanā na iti na iti iti brahma ādiśya tam eva ādeśam punar nirvakti na iti na iti iti asya kaḥ rthaḥ
na hi etasmāt brahmaṇaḥ vyatiriktam asti iti atas na iti na iti iti ucyate na punar svayam eva na asti iti arthaḥ
tat ca darśayati anyat param apratiṣiddham brahma asti iti
yadā punar evam akṣarāṇi yojyante na hi etasmāt iti na iti na iti prapañca pratiṣedha rūpāt ādeśanāt anyat param ādeśanam brahmaṇaḥ asti iti tadā tatas bravīti ca bhūyas iti etat nāmadheya viṣayam yojayitavyam atha nāmadheya asatyasya satyam iti prāṇāḥ vai satyam teṣām eṣa satyam iti hi bravīti iti
tat ca brahma avasāne pratiṣedhe samañjasam bhavati
abhāva avasāne tu pratiṣedhe kim satyasya satyam iti ucyeta
tasmāt brahma avasānaḥ ayam pratiṣedhaḥ na abhāva avasānaḥ iti adhyavasyāmaḥ
tat avyaktam āha hi
yat tat pratiṣiddhāt prapañca jātāt anyat param brahma tat asti ced kasmāt na gṛhyate iti ucyate tat avyaktam an indriya grāhyam sarva dṛśya sākṣi tvāt
āha hi evam śrutiḥ na cakṣuṣā gṛhyate na api vācā na anyaiḥ devaiḥ tapasā karmaṇā vā saḥ eṣa na iti na iti ātmā a gṛhyaḥ na hi gṛhyate yat tat a dreśyam a grāhyam yadā hi eva eṣa etasmin adṛśye na ātmye nirukte nilayane ityādyā
smṛtiḥ api avyaktaḥ yam acintyaḥ yam avikāryaḥ yam ucyate ityādyā
api ca saṃrādhane pratyakṣa anumānābhyām
api ca enam ātmānam nirasta samasta prapañcam avyaktam saṃrādhana kāle paśyanti yoganaḥ
saṃrādhanam ca bhakti dhyāna praṇidhāna ādi anuṣṭhānam
katham punar avagamyate saṃrādhana kāle paśyanti iti
pratyakṣa anumānābhyām śruti smṛtibhyām iti arthaḥ
tathā hi śrutiḥ parāñci khāni vyatṛṇat svayaṃbhūḥ tasmāt parāṅ paśyati na antarātman
kaścid dhīraḥ pratyagātmānam aikṣat āvṛtta cakṣuḥ amṛta tvam icchan iti jñāna prasādena viśuddha sattvaḥ tatas tu tam paśyate niṣkalam dhyāyamānaḥ iti ca evamādyā
smṛtiḥ api ye vinidrā jita śvāsāḥ saṃtuṣṭāḥ saṃyata indriyāḥ
jyotiḥ paśyanti yuñjānāḥ tasmai yoga ātmane namaḥ
yoginaḥ tam prapaśyanti bhagavantam sanātanam iti ca evamādyā
nanu saṃrādhya saṃrādhaka bhāva abhyupagamāt para apara ātmanoḥ anya tvam syāt iti
na iti ucyate
prakāśa ādi vat ca a vaiśeṣyam prakāśaḥ ca karmaṇi abhyāsāt
yathā prakāśa ākāśa savitṛ prabhṛtayaḥ aṅguli karaka udaka prabhṛtiṣu karmasu upādhi bhūteṣu sa viśeṣāḥ iva avabhāsante na ca svābhāvikīm aviśeṣa ātmatām jahati
evam upādhi nimittaḥ eva ayam ātma bhedaḥ svatas tu aikātmyam eva
tathā hi vedānteṣu abhyāsena asakṛt jīva prājñayoḥ abhedaḥ pratipādyate
atas na antena tathā hi liṅgam
atas ca svābhāvika tvāt abhedasya avidyā kṛta tvāt ca bhedasya vidyayā avidyām vidhūya jīvaḥ pareṇa anantena prājñena ātmanā ekatām gacchati
tathā hi liṅgam sa yaḥ ha vai tat paramam brahma veda brahma eva bhavati brahma eva san brahma apyeti ityādi
ubhaya vyapadeśāt tu ahi kuṇḍala vat
tasmin eva saṃrādhya saṃrādhaka bhāve mata antaram upanyasyati sva mata viśuddhaye
kvacid jīva prājñayoḥ bhedaḥ vyapadiśyate tatas tu tam paśyate niṣkalam dhyāyamānaḥ iti dhyātṛ dhyātavya tvena draṣṭṛ draṣṭavya tvena ca
parātparam puruṣam upaiti divyam iti gantṛ gantavya tvena
yaḥ sarvāṇi bhūtāni antaraḥ yamayati iti niyantṛ niyantavya tvena ca
kvacid tu tayoḥ eva abhedaḥ vyapadiśyate tat tvam asi aham brahma asmi eṣa te ātmā sarva antaraḥ eṣa te ātmā antaryāmī amṛtaḥ iti
tatra evam ubhaya vyapadeśe sati yadi abhedaḥ eva ekāntataḥ gṛhyate bheda vyapadeśaḥ nirālambanaḥ eva syāt
atas ubhaya vyapadeśa darśanāt ahi kuṇḍala vat atra tattvam bhavitum arhati yathā ahiḥ iti abhedaḥ kuṇḍala ābhoga prāṃśu tva ādīni iti ca bhedaḥ evam iha api iti
prakāśa āśrayavat vā tejaḥ tvāt
athavā prakāśa āśraya vat etat pratipattavyam yathā prakāśaḥ sāvitraḥ tad āśrayaḥ ca savitā na atyanta bhinnau ubhayoḥ api tejaḥ tva aviśeṣāt
atha ca bheda vyapadeśa bhājau bhavataḥ evam iha api iti
pūrvavat vā
yathā vā pūrvam upanyastam prakāśa ādi vat ca a vaiśeṣyam iti tathā eva etat bhavitum arhati
tathā hi avidyā kṛta tvāt bandhasya vidyayā mokṣaḥ upapadyate
yadi punar paramārthataḥ eva baddhaḥ kaścid ātmā ahi kuṇḍala nyāyena parasya ātmanaḥ saṃsthāna bhūtaḥ prakāśa āśraya nyāyena ca eka deśa bhūtaḥ bhyupagamyeta
tatas pāramārthikasya bandhasya tiraskartum aśakya tvāt mokṣa śāstra vaiyarthyam prasajyeta
na ca atra ubhau api bheda abhedau śrutiḥ tulya vat vyapadiśati
abhedam eva hi pratipādya tvena nirdiśati bhedam tu pūrva prasiddham eva anuvadati artha antara vivakṣayā
tasmāt prakāśa ādi vat ca avaiśeṣyam iti eṣaḥ eva siddhāntaḥ
pratiṣedhāt ca
itas ca eṣaḥ eva siddhāntaḥ yatkāraṇam parasmāt ātmanaḥ cetanam pratiṣedhati śāstram draṣṭā iti evamādi
atha atas ādeśaḥ na iti na iti tat etat brahma apūrvam anaparam anantaram abāhyam iti ca brahma vyatirikta prapañca nirākaraṇāt br
text2:
sa prapañca pakṣasya eva vā syāt
brahma pakṣasya eva vā prathame vikalpe pṛthivī ādi vat jīvasya api pravilāpita tvāt kasya prapañca vilaye iyogaḥ ucyeta kasya vā iyoga eṣṭha tayā mokṣaḥ uvāptavyaḥ ucyeta dvitīye api brahma eva aiyojya svabhāvam
jīvasya svarūpam jīva tvam tu avidyā kṛtam eva iti pratipādite brahmaṇi iyojya abhāvāt iyoga abhāvaḥ eva draṣṭavya ādi śabdāḥ api paravidyā adhikāra paṭhitāḥ tattva abhimukhīkaraṇa pradhāāḥ a tattva avabodha vidhi pradhāāḥ bhavati loke pi idam
paśya idam ākarṇaya iti ca evaṃjātīyakeṣu praṇidhā a mātram kuru iti ucyate a sākṣāt jñāam eva kuru iti jñeya abhimukhasya api jñāam kadācid jāyate jāyate tasmāt tam prati jñā a viṣayaḥ eva
darśayitavyaḥ jñāpayitu kāmaḥ tasmin darśite svayam eva yathāviṣayam yathāpramāṇam ca jñāam utpadyate ca pramāṇa atareṇa ayathā prasiddha ṛthe ayathājñāam iyuktasya api upapadyate yadi ayathā jñāam kuryāt ayathā
tu tat jñāam kim tarhi māasī sā kriyā svayam eva ced ayathā utpadyeta bhrātiḥ eva syāt tu pramāṇa jayam yathā bhūta viṣayam ca
kārayitum śakyate ca vārayitum śakyate a hi tat puruṣa tatram vastu tatram eva hi tat atas api iyoga abhāvaḥ kiṃca ayat iyoga eṣṭha tayā eva paryavasyati ā māye yat abhyupagatam
aiyojya brahma ātmatvam jīvasya tat apramāṇakam eva syāt atha śāstram eva aiyojya brahma ātmatvam ācakṣīta tad avabodhe ca puruṣam iyuñjīta tatas brahma śāstrasya ekasya dvi artha para tā viruddha artha para tā ca prasajyeyātām iyoga para tāyām ca
śruta hāiḥ a śruta kalpaā ca iti evamādayaḥ doṣāḥ a keacid parihartum śakyāḥ tasmāt eva brahma vākyāi atas ca eka eyoga pratīteḥ ekavākya tā iti ayuktam
ca brahma vākyeṣu iyoga sadbhāve tad ekatvam sa prapañca upadeśeṣu ca asiddham hi sarvatra ekaḥ iyogaḥ iti śakyam āśrayitum prayāja darśa pūrṇamāsa vākyeṣu tu
adhikāra aṃśe ā bhedāt yuktam ekatvam a tu iha kaścid ekatva kara oṃśo asti hi bhā rūpa tva ādayaḥ guṇāḥ prapañca pravilaya upakāriṇaḥ prapañca vilayaḥ bhā rūpa tva ādi guṇa upakārī paraspara virodhi tvāt a hi prapañca eka deśa apekṣaṇam ca
ekasmin dharmiṇi yuktam samāveśayitum tasmāt asmad uktaḥ eva vibhāgaḥ ākāravat a ākāra upadeśāām yuktataraḥ iti prakṛta etāvat tvam hi pratiṣedhati tatas bravīti ca bhūyas prakṛta etāvat tva adhikaraṇam dve vāva
brahmaṇaḥ rūpe mūrtam ca eva amūrtam ca iti upakramya pañca mahābhūtāi pravibhajya amūrta rasasya ca puruṣa śabda uditasya rūpāṇi darśayitvā puas paṭhyate atha atas ādeśaḥ eti
eti a hi etasmāt iti eti ayat param asti iti tatra kaḥ sya pratiṣedhasya viṣayaḥ iti jijñāsāmahe a hi atra idam tat iti viśeṣitam kiṃcid pratiṣedhyam upalabhyate tu atra
pratiṣedhyam kim api samarpyate eti ā iti iti iti paratvāt añ prayogasya iti śabdaḥ ca ayam saṃihita ālambaḥ evaṃśabda sama a vṛttiḥ dṛśyate iti ha sma upādhyāyaḥ kathayati iti evamādiṣu saṃihitam ca atra prakaraṇa sāmarthyāt rūpa dvayam
sa prapañcam brahmaṇaḥ tat ca brahma yasya te dve rūpe tatra saṃśayaḥ upajāyate kim ayam pratiṣedhaḥ rūpe rūpavat ca ubhayam api pratiṣedhati āhosvit ekataram yadā api ekataram
tadā api kim brahma pratiṣedhati rūpe pariśiaṣṭi āhosvit rūpe pratiṣedhati brahma pariśiaṣṭi iti tatra prakṛta tva aviśeṣāt ubhayam api pratiṣedhati iti āśaṅkāmahe dvau ca etau pratiṣedhau dvis eti śabda prayogāt tayoḥ eke
sa prapañcam brahmaṇaḥ rūpam pratiṣidhyate apareṇa rūpavat brahma iti bhavati matiḥ athavā brahma eva rūpavat pratiṣidhyate tat hi pratiṣedha arham tu rūpa prapañcaḥ pratyakṣa ādi gocara tvāt
pratiṣedha arhaḥ abhyāsaḥ tu ādara arthaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ a tāvat ubhaya pratiṣedhaḥ upapadyate śūya vāda prasaṅgāt kaṃcid hi paramārtham ālambya aparamārthaḥ pratiṣidhyate yathā rajju ādiṣu sarpa ādayaḥ tat ca pariśiṣyamāṇe kasmiṃścid bhāve avakalpate
tu koyaḥ bhāvaḥ pariśiṣyeta a pariśiṣyamāṇe yaḥ itaraḥ pratiṣeddhum ārabhyate pratiṣeddhum aśakya tvāt tasya eva paramārtha tva āpatteḥ pratiṣedha aupapattiḥ brahma pratiṣedhaḥ upapadyate brahma te bravāṇi
ityādi upakrama virodhāt asaḥ eva sa bhavati asat brahma iti veda ced ityādi idā virodhāt asti iti eva upalabdhavyaḥ ityādi avadhāraṇa virodhāt sarva veda atavya ākopa prasaṅgāt ca brahmaṇaḥ a abhāva abhiprāyeṇa abhidhīyate hi mahatā param satyam brahma
iti evamādiāḥ brahma pratipādya tasya eva hi paṅkasya dūrāt asparśaam varam iti hi pratipāda a prakriyā tu eṣā yatas vācaḥ a ṛtate a prāpya
saha iti etat uktam bhavati iti aśuddha buddha mukta svabhāvam brahma iti tasmāt brahmaṇaḥ rūpa prapañcam pratiṣedhati brahma iti avagatavyam tat etat ucyate prakṛta etāvattvam hi pratiṣedhati iti prakṛtam yat etāvat
mūrta amūrta lakṣaṇam brahmaṇaḥ rūpam tat eṣa śabdaḥ pratiṣedhati tat hi prakṛtam prapañcitam ca pūrvasmin rathe adhidaivatam adhyātmam ca tat jaitam eva ca aparam rūpam amūrta rasa bhūtam puruṣa śabda uditam
liṅga ātma vyapāśrayam māhāraja ādi upamābhiḥ darśitam amūrta rasasya puruṣasya cakṣuḥ grāhya rūpa yogi tva aupapatteḥ tat etat sa prapañcam brahmaṇaḥ rūpam pratiṣedhakam prati upaīyate iti gamyate brahma tu rūpa viśeṣaṇa tvea
ṣaṣṭhyā prapañcite ca tadīye rūpa dvaye rūpavataḥ svarūpa jijñāsāyām idam upakrātam atha atas ādeśaḥ eti eti iti tatra brahmaṇaḥ
tad āspadam hi idam samastam kāryam eti eti iti pratiṣiddham yuktam ca kāryasya tu brahmaṇaḥ
sarva kalpa ā mūla tvāt ca atra iyam āśaṅkā kartavyā katham hi śāstram svayam eva brahmaṇaḥ rūpa dvayam darśayitvā svayam eva puas pratiṣedhati hi paṅkasya dūrāt asparśaam varam
iti yatas brahmaṇaḥ rūpa dvayam irdiśati loka prasiddham tu idam rūpa dvayam brahmaṇi kalpitam parāmṛśati pratiṣedhya tvāya śuddhabrahma svarūpa pratipādaāya ca iti
dvau ca etau pratiṣedhau dve api mūrta amūrte pratiṣedhataḥ yat vā pūrvaḥ pratiṣedhaḥ bhūta rāśim pratiṣedhati uttaraḥ vā asaā rāśim athavā eti eti iti vīpsā
iyam iti iti yāvat kiṃcid utprekṣyate tat sarvam bhavati iti arthaḥ parigaṇita pratiṣedhe hi kriyamāṇe yadi kim ayat brahma bhavet iti jijñāsā syāt vīpsāyām tu satyām
samastasya viṣaya jātasya pratiṣedhāt aviṣayaḥ pratyagātmā brahma iti jijñāsā iva ārtate tasmāt prapañcam eva brahmaṇi kalpitam pratiṣedhati pariśiaṣṭi brahma iti itas ca eṣaḥ eva
yatas tatas prapañca pratiṣedhāt bhūyaḥ brahma bravīti ayat param asti iti hi pratiṣedhe kriyamāṇe kim ayat param asti iti brūyāt tatra eṣā eti eti iti
brahma ādiśya tam eva ādeśam puariḥ vakti eti eti iti asya kaḥ ṛthaḥ a hi etasmāt brahmaṇaḥ vyatiriktam asti iti atas eti eti iti ucyate a svayam eva āsti iti arthaḥ
tat ca darśayati ayatparam apratiṣiddham brahma asti iti yadā puar evam akṣarāṇi yojyate hi etasmāt iti aiti a iti prapañca pratiṣedha rūpāt ādeśaāt brahmaṇaḥ asti iti
tadā tatas bravīti ca bhūyas iti etat āmadheya viṣayam yojayitavyam atha āmadheya satyasya satyam iti prāṇāḥ vai satyam teṣām eṣa satyam iti hi bravīti iti
tat ca brahmāvasāe pratiṣedhe samañjasam bhavati abhāvāvasāe tu pratiṣedhe kim satyasya satyam iti ucyeta tasmāt brahmāvasāaḥ ayam pratiṣedhaḥ ābhāvāvasāaḥ iti adhyavasyāmaḥ tat avyaktam āha hi yat tat pratiṣiddhāt prapañca jātāt ayat
param brahma tat asti ced kasmai gṛhyate iti ucyate tat avyakta maidriya grāhyam sarva dṛśya sākṣi tvāt āha hi evam śrutiḥ a cakṣuṣā gṛhyate vācā

text1:
itas ca eṣaḥ eva siddhāntaḥ yatkāraṇam parasmāt ātmanaḥ cetanam pratiṣedhati śāstram draṣṭā iti evamādi
atha atas ādeśaḥ na iti na iti tat etat brahma apūrvam anaparam anantaram abāhyam iti ca brahma vyatirikta prapañca nirākaraṇāt brahma mātra pariśeṣāt ca eṣaḥ eva siddhāntaḥ iti gamyate
yat etat nirasta samasta prapañcam brahma nirdhāritam asmāt param anyat tattvam asti na asti iti śruti vipratipatteḥ saṃśayaḥ
kānicid hi vākyāni āpātena eva pratibhāsamānāni param anyat tattvam pratipādayanti iva
teṣām hi parihāram abhidhātum ayam upakramaḥ kriyate
paramatas setu unmāna sambandha bheda vyapadeśebhyaḥ
param atas brahmaṇaḥ anyat tattvam bhavitum arhati
kutas
setu vyapadeśāt unmāna vyapadeśāt saṃbandha vyapadeśāt bheda vyapadeśāt ca
setu vyapadeśaḥ tāvat atha yaḥ ātmā sa setuḥ vidhṛtiḥ iti ātma śabda abhihitasya brahmaṇaḥ setu tvam saṃkīrtayati
setu śabdaḥ ca hi loke jala saṃtāna viccheda kare mṛd dārva ādi pracaye prasiddhaḥ
iha ca setu śabdaḥ ātmani prayuktaḥ iti laukika setoḥ iva ātma setoḥ anyasya vastunaḥ stitvam gamayati
setu tītrvā iti ca tarati śabda prayogāt yathā laukikam setum tītrvā jāṅgalam a setum prāpnoti evam ātmānam setum tītrvā anātmānam a setum prāpnoti iti gamyate
unmāna vyapadeśaḥ ca bhavati tat etat brahma catuṣpād aṣṭāśapham ṣoḍaśa kalam iti
yat ca loke unmitam etāvat idam iti paricchinnam kārṣāpaṇa ādi tatas nyat vastu asti iti prasiddham
tathā brahmaṇaḥ pi unmānāt tatas nyena vastunā bhavitavyam iti gamyate
tathā saṃbandha vyapadeśaḥ bhavati satā somya tadā saṃpannaḥ bhavati iti śārīraḥ ātmā prājñena ātmanā saṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti ca
mitānām ca mitena saṃbandhaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ yathā narāṇām nagareṇa
jīvānām ca brahmaṇā saṃbandham vyapadiśati suṣuptau
atas tatas param anyat amitam asti iti gamyate
bheda vyapadeśaḥ ca enam artham gamayati
tathā hi atha yaḥ eṣaḥ ntarāditye hiraṇmayaḥ puruṣaḥ dṛśyate iti āditya ādhāram īśvaram vyapadiśya tatas bhedena akṣi ādhāram īśvaram vyapadiśati atha yaḥ eṣa u kṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate iti
atideśam ca asya amunā rūpa ādiṣu karoti tasya etasya tat eva rūpam yat amuṣya rūpam yau amuṣya geṣṇau tau geṣṇau yat nāma tat nāma iti
ca īśvara tvam ubhayoḥ vyapadiśati ye ca amuṣmāt parāñcaḥ lokāḥ teṣām ca iṣṭe deva kāmānām ca iti ekasya ye ca etasmāt arvāñcaḥ lokāḥ teṣām ca iṣṭe manuṣya kāmānām ca iti ekasya yathā idam māgadhasya rājyam idam vaidehasya iti
evam etebhyaḥ setu ādi vyapadeśebhyaḥ brahmaṇaḥ param asti iti
evam prāpte pratipādyate
sāmānyāt tu
tu śabdena pradarśitām prāptim niruṇaddhi
na brahmaṇaḥ nyat kiṃcid bhavitum arhati pramāṇa abhāvāt na hi anyasya astitve kiṃcid pramāṇam upalabhāmahe
sarvasya hi janimataḥ vastu jātasya janma ādi brahmaṇaḥ bhavati iti nirdhāritam ananya tvam ca kāraṇāt kāryasya
na ca brahma vyatiriktam kiṃcid ajam saṃbhavati sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ekam eva advitīyam iti avadhāraṇāt
eka vijñānena ca sarva vijñāna pratijñānāt na brahma vyatirikta vastu astitvam avakalpate
nanu setu ādi vyapadeśāḥ brahma vyatiriktam tattvam sūcayanti iti uktam
na iti ucyate setu vyapadeśaḥ tāvat na brahmaṇaḥ bāhyasya sadbhāvam pratipādayitum kṣamate
setuḥ ātmā iti hi āha na atas param asti iti
tatra parasmin asati setu tvam na avakalpate iti param kim api kalpyeta
na ca etat nyāyyam
haṭhaḥ hi aprasiddha kalpanā
api ca setu vyapadeśāt ātmanaḥ laukika setu nidarśanena sa bāhya vastu tām prasañjayatā mṛd dāru maya tā api prāsaṅkṣyata
na ca etat nyāyyam aja tva ādi śruti virodhāt
setu sāmānyāt tu setu śabdaḥ ātmani prayuktaḥ iti śliṣyate
jagataḥ tad maryādānām ca vidhāraka tvam setu sāmānyam ātmanaḥ
atas setuḥ iva setuḥ iti prakṛtaḥ ātmā stūyate
setum tītrvā iti api taratiḥ atikrama asaṃbhavāt prāpnoti arthaḥ eva vartate yathā vyākaraṇam tīrṇaḥ iti prāptaḥ ucyate na atikrāntaḥ tadvat
buddhi arthaḥ pāda vat
yat api uktam unmāna vyapadeśāt asti param iti tatra abhidhīyate unmāna vyapadeśaḥ u pi na brahma vyatirikta vastu astitva pratipatti arthaḥ
kimarthaḥ tarhi
buddhi arthaḥ upāsana arthaḥ iti yāvat
catuṣpād aṣṭāśapham ṣoḍaśa kalam iti evaṃrūpā buddhiḥ katham nu nāma brahmaṇi sthirā syāt iti vikāra dvāreṇa brahmaṇaḥ unmāna kalpanā eva kriyate
na hi avikāre nante brahmaṇi sarvaiḥ puṃbhiḥ śakyā buddhiḥ sthāpayitum manda madhyama uttama buddhi tvāt puṃsām iti
pāda vat yathā manaḥ ākāśayoḥ adhyātmam adhidaivatam ca brahma pratīkayoḥ āmnātayoḥ catvāraḥ vāc ādayaḥ manaḥ saṃbandhinaḥ pādāḥ kalpyante catvāraḥ ca agni ādayaḥ ākāśa saṃbandhinaḥ ādhyānāya tadvat
athavā pāda vat iti yathā kārṣāpaṇe pāda vibhāgaḥ vyavahāra prācuryāya kalpyate na hi sakalena eva kārṣāpaṇena sarvadā sarve janāḥ vyavahartum īśate kraya vikraye parimāṇa aniyamāt tadvat iti arthaḥ
sthāna viśeṣāt prakāśa ādi vat
iha sūtre dvayoḥ api saṃbandha bheda vyapadeśayoḥ parihāraḥ abhidhīyate
yat api uktam saṃbandha vyapadeśāt bheda vyapadeśāt ca paramatas syāt iti tat api asat
yatas ekasya api sthāna viśeṣa apekṣayā etau vyapadeśau upapadyete
saṃbandha vyapadeśe tāvat ayam arthaḥ buddhi ādi upādhi sthāna viśeṣa yogāt udbhūtasya viśeṣa vijñānasya upādhi upaśame yaḥ upaśamaḥ sa paramātmanā saṃbandhaḥ iti upādhi apekṣayā upacaryate na parimita tva apekṣayā
tathā bheda vyapadeśaḥ u pi brahmaṇaḥ upādhi bheda apekṣayā eva upacaryate na svarūpa bheda apekṣayā
prakāśa ādi vat iti upamā upādānam yathā ekasya prakāśasya sauryasya cāndramasasya vā upādhi yogāt upajāta viśeṣasya upādhi upaśamāt saṃbandha vyapadeśaḥ bhavati upādhi bhedāt ca bheda vyapadeśaḥ
yathā vā sūcī pāśa ākāśa ādiṣu upādhi apekṣayā eva etau saṃbandha bheda vyapadeśau bhavataḥ tadvat
upapatteḥ ca
upapadyate ca atra īdṛśaḥ eva saṃbandhaḥ na anyādṛśaḥ svam api itas bhavati iti hi sva rūpa saṃbandham enam āmananti
sva rūpasya ca anapāyi tvāt na nara nagara nyāyena saṃbandhaḥ ghaṭate
upādhi kṛta svarūpa tirobhāvāt tu svam api itas bhavati iti upapadyate
tathā bhedaḥ u pi nā anyādṛśaḥ saṃbhavati bahutara śruti prasiddha eka īśvara tva virodhāt
tathā ca śrutiḥ ekasya api ākāśasya sthāna kṛtam bheda vyapadeśam upapādayati yaḥ yam bahirdhā puruṣāt ākāśaḥ yaḥ yam antar puruṣe ākāśaḥ yaḥ yam antar hṛdaye ākāśaḥ iti
tathā anya pratiṣedhāt
evam setu ādi vyapadeśān parapakṣa hetūn unmathya saṃprati sva pakṣam hetu antareṇa upasaṃharati
tathā anya pratiṣedhā api na brahmaṇaḥ param vastu antaram asti iti gamyate
tathā hi saḥ eva adhastāt
aham eva adhastāt ātmā eva adhastāt sarvam tam parādāt yaḥ nyatra ātmanaḥ sarvam veda brahma eva idam sarvam ātmā eva idam sarvam na iha nānā asti kiṃcana yasmāt param na aparam asti kiṃcid tat etat brahma apūrvam anaparam anantaram abāhyam iti evamādīni vākyāni sva prakaraṇa sthāni anya artha tvena pariṇetum aśakyāni brahma vyatiriktam vastu antaram vārayanti
sarva antara śruteḥ ca na paramātmanaḥ nyaḥ antarātmā asti iti avagamyate
anena sarvagata tvam āyāma śabda ādibhyaḥ
anena setu ādi vyapadeśa nirākaraṇena anya pratiṣedha samāśrayaṇena ca sarvagata tvam api ātmanaḥ siddham bhavati
anyathā hi tat na sidhyet
setu ādi vyapadeśeṣu hi mukhyeṣu aṅgīkriyamāṇeṣu paricchedaḥ ātmanaḥ prasajyeta setu ādīnām evam ātmaka tvāt
tathā anya pratiṣedhe pi asati vastu vastu antarāt vyāvartate iti paricchedaḥ eva ātmanaḥ prasajyeta
sarva gata tvam ca asya āyāma śabda ādibhyaḥ vagamyate
āyāma śabdaḥ vyāpti vacanaḥ śabdaḥ
yāvān vai ayam ākāśaḥ tāvān eṣaḥ ntar hṛdaye ākāśaḥ ākāśa vat sarva gataḥ ca nityaḥ jyāyān divaḥ jyāyān ākāśāt nityaḥ sarva gataḥ sthāṇuḥ acalaḥ yam sanātanaḥ iti evamādayaḥ hi śruti smṛti nyāyāḥ sarva gata tvam ātmanaḥ vabodhayanti
phalam atas upapatteḥ
phala adhikaraṇam
tasya eva brahmaṇaḥ vyāvahārikyām īśitṛ īśitavya vibhāga avasthāyām ayam anyaḥ svabhāvaḥ varṇyate
yat etat iṣṭa aniṣṭa vyāmiśra lakṣaṇam karma phalam saṃsāra gocaram trividham prasiddham jantūnām kim etat karmaṇaḥ bhavati āhosvit īśvarāt iti bhavati vicāraṇā
tatra tāvat pratipādyate phalam atas īśvarāt bhavitum arhati
kutas
upapatteḥ
sa hi sarva adhyakṣaḥ sṛṣṭi sthiti saṃhārān vicitrān vidadhat deśa kāla viśeṣa abhijña tvāt karmiṇām karma anurūpam phalam saṃpādayati iti upapadyate
karmaṇaḥ tu anu kṣaṇa vināśinaḥ kāla antara bhāvi phalam bhavati iti anupapannam abhāvāt bhāva anutpatteḥ
syāt etat karma vinaśyat sva kālam eva sva anurūpam phalam janayitvā vinaśyati tat phalam kāla antaritam kartrā bhokṣyate iti
tat api na pariśudhyati prāk bhoktṛ saṃbandhāt phalatva anupapatteḥ yatkālam hi yat sukham duḥkham vā ātmanā bhujyate tasya eva loke phala tvam prasiddham
na hi asaṃbaddhasya ātmanā sukhasya duḥkhasya vā phala tvam pratiyanti laukikāḥ
atha ucyeta mā bhūt karma anantaram phala utpādaḥ karma kāryāt apūrvāt phalam utpatsyate iti tat api nā upapadyate apūrvasya acetanasya kāṣṭha loṣṭa samasya cetanena a pravartitasya pravṛtti anupapatteḥ tad astitve eva pramāṇa abhāvāt
arthāpattiḥ pramāṇam iti ced na īśvara siddheḥ arthāpatti kṣayāt
śruta tvāt ca
na kevalam upapatteḥ eva īśvaram phala hetum kalpayāmaḥ kim tarhi śrutatvāt api īśvaram eva phala hetum manyāmahe tathā ca śrutiḥ bhavati sa vai eṣa mahān ajaḥ ātmā anna ādaḥ vasu dānaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakā
dharmam jaiminiḥ atas eva
jaiminiḥ tu ācāryaḥ dharmam phalasya dātāram manyate atas eva hetoḥ śruteḥ upapatteḥ ca
śrūyate tāvat ayam arthaḥ svarga kāmaḥ yajeta iti evamādiṣu vākyeṣu
tatra ca vidhi śruteḥ viṣaya bhāva upagamāt yāgaḥ svargasya utpādakaḥ iti gamyate
anyathā hi an anuṣṭhātṛkaḥ yāgaḥ āpadyeta
tatra asya upadeśa vaiyarthyam syāt
nanu anu kṣaṇa vināśinaḥ karmaṇaḥ phalam na upapadyate iti parityaktaḥ yam pakṣaḥ
na eṣa doṣaḥ śruti prāmāṇyāt śrutiḥ ced pramāṇam yathā ayam karma phala saṃbandhaḥ śrutaḥ upapadyate tathā kalpayitavyaḥ
na ca an utpādya kim api apūrvam karma vinaśyat kāla antaritam phalam dātum śaknoti
atas karmaṇaḥ vā sūkṣmā kācid uttara avasthā phalasya vā pūrva avasthā apūrvam nāma asti iti tarkyate
upapadyate ca ayam artham uktena prakāreṇa
īśvaraḥ tu phalam dadāti iti anupapannam avicitrasya kāraṇasya vicitra kārya anupapatteḥ vaiṣamya nairghṛṇya prasaṅgāt tad anuṣṭhāna vaiyarthya āpatteḥ ca
tasmāt dharmāt eva phalam iti
pūrvam tu bādarāyaṇaḥ hetu vyapadeśāt
bādarāyaṇaḥ tu ācāryaḥ pūrva uktam eva īśvaram phala hetum manyate
kevalāt karmaṇaḥ apūrvāt vā kevalāt phalam iti ayam pakṣaḥ tuśabdena vyāvartyate
karma apekṣāt apūrva apekṣāt vā yathā tathā astu īśvarāt phalam iti siddhāntaḥ
kutas
hetu vyapadeśāt
dharma adharmayoḥ api hi kārayitṛ tvena īśvaraḥ hetuḥ vyapadiśyate phalasya ca dātṛ tvena eṣa hi eva sādhu karma kārayati tam yam ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ unninīṣate
eṣaḥ u eva asādhu karma kārayati tam yam adhas ninīṣate iti
smaryate ca ayam arthaḥ bhagavadgītāsu yaḥ yaḥ yām yām tanum bhaktaḥ śraddhayā arcitum icchati
tasya tasya acalām śraddhām tām eva vidadhāmi aham
sa tayā śraddhayā yuktaḥ tasya ārādhanam īhate
labhate ca tatas kāmān mayā eva vihitān hitān iti
sarva vedānteṣu ca īśvara hetukāḥ eva sṛṣṭayaḥ vyapadiśyante
tat eva ca īśvarasya phala hetu tvam yat sva karma anurūpāḥ prajāḥ sṛjati
vicitra kārya anupapatti ādayaḥ api doṣāḥ kṛta prayatna apekṣa tvāt īśvarasya na prasajyante
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye tṛtīya adhyāyasya dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ
tṛtīyaḥ dhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyaḥ pādaḥ
sarva vedānta pratyayam codana ādi aviśeṣāt
sarva vedānta pratyaya adhikaraṇam
sarva vedānta pratyayāni vijñānāni tasmin tasmin vedānte tāni tāni eva bhavitum arhanti
kutas
codanā ādi aviśeṣāt
ādi grahaṇena śākhā antara adhikaraṇa siddhānta sūtra uditāḥ abheda hetavaḥ iha ākṛṣyante saṃyoga rūpa codana ākhyā viśeṣāt iti arthaḥ
yathā ekasmin agnihotre śākhā bhede pi puruṣa prayatnaḥ tādṛśaḥ eva codyate juhuyāt iti evam yaḥ ha vai jyeṣṭham ca śreṣṭham ca veda iti vājasaneyinām chandogānām ca tādṛśī eva codanā
prayojana saṃyogaḥ u pi a viśiṣṭaḥ eva jyeṣṭhaḥ ca śreṣṭhaḥ ca svānām bhavati iti
rūpam api ubhayatra tat eva vijñānasya yat uta jyeṣṭha śreṣṭha ādi viśeṣaṇa anvitam prāṇa tattvam yathā ca dravya devate yāgasya rūpam evam vijñeyam rūpam vijñānasya
tena hi tat rūpyate
samākhyā api sā eva prāṇa vidyā iti
tasmāt sarva vedānta pratyaya tvam vijñānānām
evam pañca agni vidyāḥ vaiśvānara vidyā śāṇḍilya vidyā iti evamādiṣu api yojayitavyam
ye tu
text2:
itas ca
eṣaḥ eva siddhātaḥ yatkāraṇam parasmāt ātmaoyam pratiṣedhati śāstram draṣṭā iti evamādi atha atas ādeśaḥ eti eti tat etat brahma apūrvam aaparam aataram abāhyam iti ca brahma vyatirikta prapañcaiḥ ākaraṇāt brahma mātra pariśeṣāt ca eṣaḥ eva
iti gamyate yat etat brahma asmāt param ayat tattvam asti āsti iti śruti vipratipatteḥ saṃśayaḥ kāicid hi vākyāi brahmaṇaḥ api param ayat tattvam pratipādayati iva
teṣām hi parihāram abhidhātum ayam upakramaḥ kriyate param atas setu umāa sambadha bheda vyapadeśebhyaḥ param atas brahmaṇaḥ ayat tattvam bhavitum arhati kutas setu vyapadeśāt umāa vyapadeśāt saṃbadha vyapadeśāt bheda vyapadeśāt ca setu vyapadeśaḥ tāvat atha yaḥ ātmā
sa setuḥ vidhṛtiḥ iti ātma śabda abhihitasya brahmaṇaḥ setu tvam saṃkīrtayati setu śabdaḥ ca hi loke jala saṃtā a viccheda kare mṛd dāru ādi pracaye prasiddhaḥ iha ca setu śabdaḥ prayuktaḥ iti laukika setoḥ iva ātma setoḥ rayasya
vastu ostitvam gamayati setu iti ca tarati śabda prayogāt yathā laukikam setum tītrvā jāṅgalam asetum evam setum tītrvā setum iti gamyate umā a vyapadeśaḥ ca bhavati
tat etat brahma catuṣpād aṣṭāśapham ṣoḍaśa kalam iti yat ca loke etāvat idam iti paricchiam kārṣāpaṇa ādi tatas yat vastu asti iti prasiddham tathā brahmaṇā upi umāāt vastuā bhavitavyam iti gamyate tathā
bhavati satā somya tadā saṃpaaḥ bhavati iti saṃpariṣvaktaḥ iti ca ca dṛṣṭaḥ yathā arāṇām agareṇa
jīvāām ca brahmaṇā vyapadiśati suṣuptau atas tatas gamyate bheda vyapadeśaḥ ca eam artham gamayati tathā hi atha yaḥ eṣa utarāditye hiraṇmayaḥ puruṣaḥ
dṛśyate iti āditya ādhāram īśvaram vyapadiśya tatas akṣi ādhāram īśvaram vyapadiśati atha yaḥ eṣa ukṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate iti atideśam ca asya rūpa ādiṣu karoti tasya etasya
tat eva rūpam yat amuṣya rūpam yau amuṣya geṣṇau tau geṣṇau iti saḥ avadhikam ca īśvara tvam ubhayoḥ vyapadiśati ye ca amuṣmāt parāñcaḥ lokāḥ teṣām ca iṣṭe deva kāmāām ca
iti ekasya ye ca etasmāt arvāñcaḥ lokāḥ teṣām ca iṣṭe ca iti ekasya yathā idam māgadhasya rājyam idam vaidehasya iti evam etebhyaḥ setu ādi vyapadeśebhyaḥ brahmaṇaḥ param asti iti evam prāpte pratipādyate
tuśabde pradarśitām prāptim pradarśitām prāptim a brahmaṇaḥ yat kiṃcid bhavitum arhati pramāṇa abhāvāt kiṃcid pramāṇam upalabhāmahe sarvasya hi jaimataḥ vastu jātasya brahmaṇaḥ bhavati iti
ca kāraṇāt kāryasya a ca brahma vyatiriktam kiṃcid ajam saṃbhavati sat eva somya idam agre āsīt ekam eva advitīyam iti avadhāraṇāt ca sarvavijñāa pratijñāāt a brahma vyatirikta vastu astitvam avakalpate setu ādi vyapadeśāḥ
brahma vyatiriktam tattvam sūcayati iti uktam ā iti ucyate setu vyapadeśaḥ tāvat a brahmaṇaḥ bāhyasya sadbhāvam pratipādayitum kṣamate setuḥ ātmā iti hi āha a atas param asti iti tatra asati
setu tvam iti param kim api kalpyeta ca etat yāyyam haṭhaḥ hi aprasiddha kalpaā api ca setu vyapadeśāt ātmā sa bāhya vastu tām prasañjayatā mṛd dāru maya tā api prāsaṅkṣyata
a aja tva ādi śruti virodhāt setusāmāyāt tu setu śabdaḥ prayuktaḥ iti śliṣyate ca vidhāraka tvam setusāmāyam ātman atas setuḥ iva setuḥ iti prakṛtaḥ ātmā stūyate setum
tītrvā iti api taratiḥ atikrama asaṃbhavāt eva vartate yathā vyākaraṇam tīrṇaḥ iti prāptaḥ ucyate a atikrātaḥ tadvat buddhi arthaḥ pāda vat yat api uktam umā a vyapadeśāt asti
param iti tatra abhidhīyate umā a vyapadeśaḥ api a brahma vyatirikta vastu astitva pratipatti arthaḥ kimarthaḥ tarhi buddhi arthaḥ upāsa arthaḥ iti yāvat catuṣpād aṣṭāśapham ṣoḍaśakalam iti evaṃrūpā buddhiḥ katham brahmaṇi sthirā syāt iti vikāra dvāreṇa
brahmaṇaḥ kriyate brahmaṇi sarvaiḥ puṃbhiḥ śakyā buddhiḥ sthāpayitum mada madhyama uttama buddhi tvāt puṃsām iti pāda vat yathā maa ākāśayoḥ adhyātmam adhidaivatam ca brahma pratīkayoḥ āmātayoḥ catvāraḥ
vāc ādayaḥ pādāḥ kalpyate catvāraḥ ca agi ādayaḥ ākāśa saṃbadhiḥ tadvat athavā pāda vat iti yathā kārṣāpaṇe pāda vibhāgaḥ vyavahāra prācuryāya kalpyate hi hi
sarvadā sarve vyavahartum īśate kraya vikraye tadvat iti arthaḥ sthā a viśeṣāt prakāśa ādi vat iha sūtre dvayoḥ api parihāraḥ abhidhīyate yat api uktam saṃbadha vyapadeśāt bheda vyapadeśāt ca param atas syāt iti tat api asat yatas
ekasya api sthā a viśeṣa apekṣayā etau vyapadeśau upapadyete saṃbadha vyapadeśe tāvat ayam arthaḥ buddhi ādi upādhi sthā a viśeṣa yogāt udbhūtasya viśeṣa vijñāasya upādhi upaśame yaḥ upaśamaḥ sa paramātmā iti upādhi apekṣayā upacaryate a parimita tva apekṣayā tathā bheda vyapadeśaḥ api
brahmaṇaḥ upādhi bheda apekṣayā eva upacaryate a svarūpa bheda apekṣayā prakāśa ādi vat iti yathā ekasya prakāśasya sauryasya ca ādramasasya vā upādhi yogāt upajāta viśeṣasya upādhi upaśamāt bhavati upādhi bhedāt ca bheda vyapadeśaḥ yathā vā
sūcī pāśa ākāśa ādiṣu upādhi apekṣayā eva etau saṃbadha bheda vyapadeśau bhavataḥ tadvat upapatteḥ ca upapadyate ca atra īdṛśaḥ eva saṃbadhaḥ svam api itas bhavati iti hi sva rūpa saṃbadha ca a apāyi tvāt
ghaṭate upādhi kṛta sva rūpa tirobhāvāt tu svam api itas bhavati iti upapadyate tathā bhedaḥ api saṃbhavati bahutara śruti prasiddha eka īśvara tva virodhāt tathā ca śrutiḥ ekasya api ākāśasya bheda vyapadeśam upapādayati yaḥ yam bahirdhā puruṣāt ākāśaḥ yaḥ yam atas
puruṣaḥ ākāśaḥ yaḥ yam atas hṛdaye ākāśaḥ iti tathāya pratiṣedhāt evam setu ādi vyapadeśā saṃprati sva pakṣam hetu atareṇa upasaṃharati tathāya pratiṣedhā api a brahmaṇaḥ param vastu ataram asti iti gamyate tathā hi saḥ
eva adhastāt aham eva adhastāt ātmā eva adhastāt sarvam tam parādāt yaḥ yatra ātma aḥ sarvam veda brahma eva idam sarvam ātmā eva idam sarvam eha ā asti kiṃca a yasmāt param ā aparam asti kiṃcid tat etat brahma apūrvam aaparam aataram abāhyam iti evamādīi vākyāi sva prakaraṇa sthāi pariṇetum aśakyāi brahma vyatiriktam vastu ataram vārayati
sarvātara śruteḥ ca atarātmā asti iti avagamyate sarvagata tvam āyāma śabda ādibhyaḥ ca sarvagata tvam api ātmanaḥ siddham bhavati ayathā hi sidhyet setu ādi vyapadeśeṣu hi
mukhyeṣu aṅgīkriyamāṇeṣu paricchedaḥ ātmaaḥ prasajyeta setu ādīām evam ātmaka tvāt tathā vastu vastu atarāt vyāvartate iti paricchedaḥ eva ātmaaḥ prasajyeta sarvagata tvam ca asya āyāma śabda ādibhyaḥ avagamyate āyāma śabdaḥ vyāpti vacaḥ
śabdaḥ ayam ākāśaḥ tāvai eṣa utar hṛdaye ākāśaḥ ākāśa vat sarva gataḥ ca ityaḥ jyāyāt ivaḥ jyāyā ākāśāt ityaḥ sarva gataḥ sthāṇuḥ acalaḥ yam iti evamādayaḥ hi śruti smṛti yāyāḥ sarvagata tvam ātma uvabodhayati phalam atas upapatteḥ phala adhikaraṇam tasya eva brahmaṇaḥ vyāvahārikyām īśitṛ īśitavya vibhāga avasthāyām ayam ayaḥ
svabhāvaḥ varṇyate yat etat iṣṭa a iṣṭa vyāmiśra lakṣaṇam karma phalam saṃsāra gocaram trividham prasiddham jatūām kim etat karmaṇaḥ bhavati āhosvit īśvarāt iti bhavati vicāraṇā tatra tāvat pratipādyate phalam atas īśvarāt
bhavitum arhati kutas upapatteḥ sa hi sarva adhyakṣaḥ sṛṣṭi sthiti saṃhārāḥ vicitrāḥ vidadhat deśa kāla viśeṣa abhijña tvāt karmiṇām karma aurūpam phalam saṃpādayati iti upapadyate karmaṇaḥ tu kāla atara bhāvi phalam bhavati iti aupapaam abhāvāt bhāva autpatteḥ
syāt etat karma viaśyat sva kālam eva svāurūpam phalam viaśyati tat phalam kāla ātaritam kartrā bhokṣyate iti tat api a pariśudhyati prāk bhoktṛ saṃbadhāt phala tva aupapatteḥ yatkālam hi
yat sukham duḥkham vā ātmaā bhujyate tasya eva loke phala tvam prasiddham hi asaṃbaddhasya ātmā sukhasya duḥkhasya vā phala tvam laukikāḥ atha ucyeta
mā phala utpādaḥ karma kāryāt apūrvāt phalam utpatsyate iti tat api opapadyate apūrvasya acetaasya kāṣṭha loṣṭa samasya cetaeā pravartitasya pravṛtti aupapatteḥ tad astitve eva pramāṇa abhāvāt arthāpattiḥ pramāṇam iti ced ā īśvara siddheḥ arthāpatti kṣayāt śruta tvāt ca
a kevalam upapatteḥ eva īśvaram phala hetum kalpayāmaḥ kim tarhi śruta tvāt api īśvaram eva phala hetum tathā ca śrutiḥ bhavati sa vai eṣa mahā ajaḥ
vasudāaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ dharmam jaimiiḥ atas eva jaimiiḥ tu ācāryaḥ dharmam phalasya dātāram atas eva hetoḥ śruteḥ upapatteḥ ca śrūyate tāvat ayam arthaḥ svarga kāmaḥ yajeta iti evamādiṣu vākyeṣu
tatra ca vidhi śruteḥ viṣaya bhāva upagamāt yāgaḥ svargasya utpādakaḥ iti gamyate ayathā hi aauṣṭhātṛkaḥ yāgaḥ āpadyeta tatra asya upadeśa vaiyarthyam syāt karmaṇaḥ phalam
opapadyate iti parityaktaḥ iyam pakṣaḥ ā eṣa doṣaḥ śruti prāmāṇyāt śrutiḥ ced pramāṇam yathā ayam śrutaḥ upapadyate tathā kalpayitavyaḥ ca autpādya kim api apūrvam karma
atas karmaṇaḥ vā sūkṣmā kācid uttara avasthā phalasya vā pūrva avasthā apūrvam asti iti tarkyate upapadyate ca ayam artham
prakāreṇa īśvaraḥ tu phalam dadāti iti aupapam avicitrasya kāraṇasya vicitra kārya aupapatteḥ vaiṣamya airghṛṇya prasaṅgāt tad auṣṭhā avaiyarthya āpatteḥ ca tasmāt dharmāt eva phalam iti pūrvam tu bādarāyaṇaḥ hetu vyapadeśāt bādarāyaṇaḥ tu ācāryaḥ pūrva uktam eva īśvaram
phala hetum kevalāt karmaṇaḥ apūrvāt vā kevalāt phalam iti ayam pakṣaḥ tuśabdena vyāvartyate karma apekṣāt apūrva apekṣāt vā yathā tathā astu īśvarāt phalam iti siddhātaḥ kutas hetu vyapadeśāt dharma adharmayoḥ api hi kārayitṛ tve
īśvaraḥ hetuḥ vyapadiśyate phalasya ca dātṛ tve eṣa hi eva sādhu karma kārayati tam yam ebhyaḥ lokebhyaḥ uiīṣate eṣaḥ u eva asādhu karma kārayati
tam yam adhas iti smaryate ca ayam arthaḥ bhagavadgītāsu yaḥ yaḥ yām yām taum bhaktaḥ śraddhayā arcitum icchati tasya tasya acalām śraddhām tām eva vidadhāmi aham
sa tayā śraddhayā yuktaḥ tasya ārādhaam īhate labhate ca tatas kāmāḥ mayā eva vihita ahitāḥ iti ca īśvara hetukāḥ eva sṛṣṭayaḥ vyapadiśyate tat eva ca īśvarasya
phala hetu tvam yat sva karma aurūpāḥ prajāḥ sṛjati doṣāḥ kṛta prayata apekṣa tvāt īśvarasya a prasajyate iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye tṛtīya adhyāyasya dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ tṛtīyaḥ udhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyaḥ pādaḥ sarva vedāta pratyayam coda ādi aviśeṣāt sarva vedāta pratyaya adhikaraṇam tasmin tasmin bhavitum arhati kutas coda ādi aviśeṣāt abheda hetavaḥ iha ākṛṣyate saṃyoga rūpa coda ākhyā viśeṣāt iti arthaḥ
yathā puruṣa prayataḥ tādṛśaḥ eva codyate juhuyāt iti evam yaḥ ha vai jyeṣṭham ca śreṣṭham ca veda iti vājasaeyiām chadogāām ca tādṛśī eva
eva jyeṣṭhaḥ ca śreṣṭhaḥ ca bhavati iti rūpam api ubhayatra tat eva yat uta jyeṣṭha śreṣṭha ādi viśeṣaṇa āvitam prāṇa tattvam yathā ca dravya devate yāgasya rūpam evam
vijñeyam rūpam vijñāasya hi tat rūpyate samākhyā api sā eva prāṇa vidyā iti tasmāt sarva vedāta pratyaya tvam vijñāāām evam pañcāgi vidyā vaiśvāara vidyā śāṇḍilya vidyā iti evamādiṣu api yojayitavyam ye tu

text1:
a rūpam evam vijñeyam rūpam vijñānasya
tena hi tat rūpyate
samākhyā api sā eva prāṇa vidyā iti
tasmāt sarva vedānta pratyaya tvam vijñānānām
evam pañca agni vidyāḥ vaiśvānara vidyā śāṇḍilya vidyā iti evamādiṣu api yojayitavyam
ye tu nāma rūpa ādayaḥ bheda hetvābhāsāḥ te prathame eva kāṇḍe na nāmnā syāt acodana abhidhāna tvāt iti ārabhya parihṛtāḥ
iha api kaṃcid viśeṣam āśaṅkya pariharati
bhedāt na iti ced na ekasyām api
syāt etat sarva vedānta pratyaya tvam vijñānānām guṇa bhedāt na upapadyate
tathā hi vājasaneyinaḥ pañcāgni vidyām prastutya ṣaṣṭham aparam agnim āmananti tasya agniḥ eva agniḥ bhavati ityādinā
chandogāḥ tu tam naḥ āmananti pañca saṃkhyayā eva ca te upasaṃharanti atha ha yaḥ etān evam pañca agnīn veda iti
yeṣām ca sa guṇaḥ sti yeṣām ca na asti katham ubhayeṣām ekā vidyā upapadyeta
na ca atra guṇa upasaṃhāraḥ śakyate pratyetum pañca saṃkhyā virodhāt
tathā prāṇa saṃvāde śreṣṭhāt anyān caturaḥ prāṇān vāc cakṣuḥ śrotra manāṃsi chandogāḥ āmananti
vājasaneyinaḥ tu pañcamam api āmananti retaḥ vai prajāpatiḥ prajāyate ha prajayā paśubhiḥ yaḥ evam veda iti
āvāpa udvāpa bhedāt ca vedya bhedaḥ bhavati vedya bhedāt ca vidyā bhedaḥ dravya devatā bheda ādiva yāgasya iti ced na eṣa doṣaḥ
yatas ekasyām api vidyāyām evaṃjātīyakaḥ guṇa bhedaḥ upapadyate
yadi api ṣaṣṭhasya agneḥ upasaṃhāraḥ na saṃbhavati tathā api dyu prabhṛtīnām pañcānām agnīnām ubhayatra pratyabhijñāyamāna tvāt na vidyā bhedaḥ bhavitum arhati
na hi ṣoḍaśi grahaṇa agrahaṇayoḥ atirātraḥ bhidyate
paṭhyate ca ṣaṣṭhaḥ gniḥ chandogaiḥ tam pretam diṣṭam itas gnayaḥ eva haranti iti
vājasaneyinaḥ tu sāṃpādikeṣu pañcasu agniṣu anuvṛttāyāḥ samidh dhūma ādi kalpanāyāḥ nivṛttaye tasya agniḥ eva agniḥ bhavati samidh samidh ityādi samāmananti
sa nitya anuvādaḥ
atha api upāsana arthaḥ eṣa vādaḥ tathā api sa guṇaḥ śakyate chandogaiḥ api upasaṃhartum
na ca atra pañca saṃkhyā virodhaḥ āśaṅkyaḥ
sāṃpādikā agni abhiprāyā hi eṣā pañca saṃkhyā nitya anuvāda bhūtā na vidhi samavāyinī iti adoṣaḥ
evam prāṇa saṃvāda ādiṣu api adhikasya guṇasya itaratra upasaṃhāraḥ na virudhyate
na ca āvāpa udvāpa bhedāt vedya bhedaḥ vidyā bhedaḥ ca āśaṅkyaḥ kasyacid vedya aṃśasya āvāpa udvāpayoḥ api bhūyasaḥ vedya rāśeḥ abheda avagamāt
tasmāt aikavidyam eva
svādhyāyasya tathā tvena hi samācāre dhikārāt ca sava vat ca tad niyamaḥ
yat api uktam ātharvaṇikānām vidyām prati śiraḥ vrata ādi apekṣaṇāt anyeṣām ca tad anapekṣaṇāt vidyā bhedaḥ iti tat pratyucyate
svādhyāyasya eṣa dharmaḥ na vidyāyāḥ
katham idam avagamyate
yatas tathātvena svādhyāya dharma tvena samācāre veda vrata upadeśa pare granthe ātharvaṇikāḥ idam api veda vrata tvena vyākhyātam iti samāmananti
na etat acīrṇa vrataḥ dhīte iti ca adhikṛta viṣayāt etad śabdāt adhyayana śabdāt ca sva upaniṣad adhyayana dharmaḥ eva eṣaḥ iti nirdhāryate
nanu teṣām eva etām brahma vidyām vadeta śirovratam vidhivat yaiḥ tu cīrṇam iti brahma vidyā saṃyoga śravaṇāt ekā eva sarvatra brahma vidyā iti saṃkīryeta eṣa dharmaḥ na tatra api etām iti prakṛta pratyavamarśāt
prakṛta tvam ca brahma vidyāyāḥ grantha viśeṣa apekṣam iti grantha viśeṣa saṃyogī eva eṣa dharmaḥ
sava vat ca tad niyamaḥ iti nidarśana nirdeśaḥ yathā ca savāḥ sapta saurya ādayaḥ śataudana paryantāḥ veda antara udita tretāgni anabhisaṃbandhāt ātharvaṇa udita ekāgni abhisaṃbandhāt ca ātharvaṇikānām eva niyamyante tathā eva ayam api dharmaḥ svādhyāya viśeṣa saṃbandhāt tatra eva niyamyate
tasmāt api anavadyam vidyā ekatvam
darśayati ca
darśayati ca vidyā eka tvam sarva vedānteṣu vedya eka tva upadeśāt sarve vedāḥ yat padam āmananti iti tathā etam hi eva bahvṛcāḥ mahati ukthe mīmāṃsante etam agnau adhvaryavaḥ etam mahāvrate chandogāḥ iti ca
tathā mahat bhayam vajram udyatam iti kāṭhake uktasya īśvara guṇasya bhaya hetu tvasya taittirīyake bheda darśana nindāyai parāmarśaḥ dṛśyate yadā hi eva eṣa etasmin udaram antaram kurute
atha tasya bhayam bhavati
tat tu eva bhayam viduṣaḥ manvānasya iti
tathā vājasaneyake prādeśa mātra saṃpāditasya vaiśvānarasya chāndogye siddha vat upādānam yaḥ tu etam evam prādeśa mātram abhivimānam ātmānam vaiśvānaram upāste iti
tathā sarva vedānta pratyaya tvena anyatra vihitānām uktha ādīnām anyatra upāsana vidhānāya upādānāt prāya darśana nyāyena upāsanānām api sarva vedānta pratyaya tva siddhiḥ
upasaṃhāraḥ rtha abhedāt vidhi śeṣa vat samāne ca
upasaṃhāra adhikaraṇam
idam prayojana sūtram
sthite ca evam sarva vedānta pratyaya tve sarva vijñānānām anyatra uditānām vijñāna guṇānām anyatra api samāne vijñāne upasaṃhāraḥ bhavati
artha abhedāt yaḥ eva hi teṣām guṇānām ekatra arthaḥ viśiṣṭa vijñāna upakāraḥ saḥ eva anyatra api
ubhayatra api hi tat eva ekam vijñānam
tasmāt upasaṃhāraḥ
vidhi śeṣa vat yathā vidhi śeṣāṇām agnihotra ādi dharmāṇām tat eva ekam agnihotra ādi karma sarvatra iti artha abhedāt upasaṃharaṇam
evam iha api
yadi hi vijñāna bhedaḥ bhavet tatas vijñāna antara nibaddha tvāt guṇānām prakṛti vikṛti bhāva abhāvāt ca na syāt upasaṃhāraḥ
vijñāna eka tve tu na evam iti
asya eva tu prayojana sūtrasya prapañcaḥ sarva abhedāt iti ārabhya bhaviṣyati
anyathātvam śabdāt iti ced na aviśeṣāt
anyathātva adhikaraṇam
vājasaneyake te ha devāḥ ūcuḥ hanta asurān yajñe udgīthena atyayāma iti te ha vācam ūcuḥ tvam naḥ udgāye iti prakramya vāc ādīn prāṇān asura pāpma viddha tvena ninditvā mukhya prāṇa parigrahaḥ paṭhyate atha ha imam āsanyam prāṇam ūcuḥ tvam naḥ udgāya iti tathā iti tebhyaḥ eṣa prāṇaḥ udagāyat iti
tathā chāndogye pi tat ha devāḥ udgītham ājahruḥ anena enān abhibhaviṣyāmaḥ iti prakramya itarān prāṇān asura pāpma viddha tvena ninditvā tathā eva mukhya prāṇa parigrahaḥ paṭhyate atha ha yaḥ eva ayam mukhyaḥ prāṇaḥ tam udgītham upāsāṃcakrire iti
ubhayatra api ca prāṇa praśaṃsayā prāṇa vidyā vidhiḥ adhyavasīyate
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim atra vidyā bhedaḥ syāt āhosvit vidyā eka tvam iti
kim tāvat prāptam pūrveṇa nyāyena vidyā ekatvam iti
nanu na yuktam vidyā eka tvam prakrama bhedāt
anyathā hi prakramante vājasaneyinaḥ anyathā chandogāḥ tvam naḥ udgāye iti vājasaneyinaḥ udgīthasya kartṛ tvena prāṇam āmananti chandogāḥ tu udgītha tvena tam udgītham upāsāṃcakrire iti tat katham vidyā ekatvam syāt iti ced na eṣa doṣaḥ
na hi etāvatā viśeṣeṇa vidyā eka tvam apagacchati aviśeṣasya api bahutarasya pratīyamāna tvāt
tathā hi deva asura saṃgrāma upakrama tvam asura atyaya abhiprāyaḥ udgītha upanyāsaḥ vāc ādi saṃkīrtanam tad nindayā mukhya prāṇa vyapāśrayaḥ tad vīryāt ca asura vidhvaṃsanam aśma loṣṭa nidarśanena iti evam bahavaḥ rthāḥ ubhayatra api aviśiṣṭāḥ pratīyante
vājasaneyake ca udgītha sāmānādhikaraṇyam prāṇasya śrutam eṣaḥ u vai udgīthaḥ iti
tasmāt chāndogye pi kartṛ tvam lakṣayitavyam
tasmāt ca vidyā eka tvam iti
na vā prakaraṇa bhedāt paraḥ varīyaḥ tva ādi vat
na vā vidyā eka tvam atra nyāyyam

prakaraṇa bhedāt prakrama bhedāt iti arthaḥ

tatra yadi udgītha śabdena sakalā bhaktiḥ abhipreyeta tasyāḥ ca kartā udgātā ṛtvij tatas upakramaḥ ca uparudhyeta lakṣaṇā ca prasajyeta

tvam naḥ udgāye iti api tasyāḥ kartā udgātā ṛtvij prāṇa tvena nirūpyate iti prasthāna antaram
yat api tatra udgītha sāmānādhikaraṇyam prāṇasya tat api udgātṛ tvena eva didarśayiṣitasya prāṇasya sarva ātma tva pratipādana artham iti na vidyā ekatvam āvahati
sakala bhakti viṣayaḥ eva ca tatra api udgītha śabdaḥ iti vaiṣamyam
na ca prāṇasya udgātṛ tvam asaṃbhavena hetunā parityajyate udgītha bhāva vat udgātṛ bhāvasya api upāsana artha tvena upadiśyamāna tvāt
prāṇa vīryeṇa eva ca udgātā audgātram karoti iti na asti asaṃbhavaḥ
tathā ca tatra eva śrāvitam vācā ca hi eva sa prāṇena ca udagāyat iti

a rūpam evam
vijñeyam rūpam vijñāasya hi tat rūpyate samākhyā api sā eva prāṇa vidyā iti tasmāt sarva vedāta pratyaya tvam vijñāāām evam pañcāgi vidyā vaiśvāara vidyā śāṇḍilya vidyā iti evamādiṣu api yojayitavyam ye tu
āma rūpa ādayaḥ bheda hetvābhāsāḥ te prathame eva syāt iti ārabhya parihṛtāḥ iha api kaṃcid viśeṣam āśaṅkya pariharati ced ekasyām api syāt etat vijñāāām guṇa bhedāt upapadyate
tathā hi vājasaeyiḥ pañcāgi vidyām prastutya ṣaṣṭham aparam agim āmaati tasya āgiḥ eva āgiḥ bhavati iti ādiā chadogāḥ tu tam pañca saṃkhyayā eva ca te upasaṃharati atha ha yaḥ etā evam
pañcāgī vedaḥ iti yeṣām ca sa guṇaḥ usti yeṣām ca ā asti katham ubhayeṣām ekā vidyā upapadyeta ca atra guṇa upasaṃhāraḥ śakyate pratyetum pañca saṃkhyā virodhāt tathā prāṇa saṃvāde
śreṣṭhāt caturaḥ prāṇāḥ vāc cakṣuḥ śrotra maāṃsi chadogāḥ āmaati vājasaeyiḥ tu pañcamam api āmaati retaḥ vai prajāpatiḥ prajāyate ha prajayā paśubhiḥ yaḥ evam veda iti āvāpa udvāpa bhedāt ca
vedya bhedaḥ bhavati vedya bhedāt ca vidyā bhedaḥ dravya devatā bheda iva yāgasya iti ced ā eṣa doṣaḥ yatas ekasyām api vidyāyām evaṃjātīyakaḥ guṇa bhedaḥ upapadyate yadi api ṣaṣṭhasya āgeḥ upasaṃhāraḥ saṃbhavati tathā api
ubhayatra a vidyā bhedaḥ bhavitum arhati a hi ṣoḍaśi grahaṇa agrahaṇayoḥ atirātraḥ bhidyate paṭhyate api ca chadogaiḥ tam pretam diṣṭam itas gayaḥ eva harati iti vājasaeyiḥ tu
sāṃpādikeṣu pañcasu agiṣu auvṛttāyāḥ samidh dhūma ādi kalpaāyāḥ samidh samidh ityādi samāmaati saḥ atha api upāsa arthaḥ eṣa vādaḥ tathā api sa guṇaḥ śakyate chadogaiḥ api upasaṃhartum chadogaiḥ api upasaṃhartum ca
atra pañca saṃkhyā virodhaḥ āśaṅkyaḥ sāṃpādikā āgi abhiprāyā hi eṣā pañca saṃkhyā iti āuvāda bhūtā a vidhi samavāyiī iti adoṣaḥ evam prāṇa saṃvāda ādiṣu api adhikasya guṇasya itaratra upasaṃhāraḥ virudhyate a ca
āvāpa udvāpa bhedāt vedya bhedaḥ vidyā bhedaḥ ca āśaṅkyaḥ kasyacid vedya aṃśasya āvāpa udvāpayoḥ api bhūyasaḥ vedya rāśeḥ abheda avagamāt tasmāt aikavidyam eva svādhyāyasya tathātve hi samācāra adhikārāt ca sava vat ca taiyamaḥ yat api uktam ātharvaṇikāām
vidyām prati śiraḥ vrata ādi apekṣaṇāt ca tad a apekṣaṇāt vidyā bhedaḥ iti tat pratyucyate svādhyāyasya eṣa dharmaḥ a vidyāyāḥ katham idam avagamyate yatas samācāre veda vrata upadeśa pare
