tāvat prāptam iyamaḥ iti yatra eva śrūyate tatra eva bhavitum arhati prakaraṇasya iyāmaka tvāt yadi a yatra a śrūyamāṇā api gatiḥ vidyātaram gacchet śruti ādīām prāmāṇyam hīyeta sarvasya sarva artha tva prasaṅgāt api
ca arciḥ ādikā ekā eva gatiḥ upakosala vidyāyām pañcāgi vidyāyām ca tulya vat paṭhyate tat syāt tasmāt aiyamaḥ iti evam prāpte paṭhati aiyamaḥ iti sarvāsām eva abhyudaya prāpti phalāām
sa guṇāām vidyāām aviśeṣeṇa eṣā devayā ākhyā gatiḥ bhavitum arhati aiyama abhyupagame prakaraṇa virodhaḥ uktaḥ virodhaḥ śruti smṛtibhyām iti arthaḥ tathā hi śrutiḥ tat ye ittham viduḥ
iti pañcāgi vidyāvatām devayāam avatārayati iye ceme iraṇye śraddhā tapaḥ iti upāsate iti vidyātara śīliām api pañcāgi vidyā vidbhiḥ samāa mārga tām gamayati katham vidyātara śīliām iyam gatiḥ iti śraddhā tapaḥ parāyaṇāām eva syāt
ta mātra śravaṇāt ā eṣa doṣaḥ a hi kevalābhyām śraddhā tapobhyām atareṇa vidyā balam eṣā gatiḥ labhyate vidyayā tat ārohati yatra kāmāḥ parāgatāḥ a tatra dakṣiṇāḥ yati
āvidvāṃsaḥ tapasviḥ iti śrutyatarāt tasmāt iha śraddhā tapobhyām vidyātara upalakṣaṇam vājasaeyiḥ tu pañcāgi vidyā adhikāre dhīyate yaḥ evam etat viduḥ ye ca amī araṇye śraddhām satyam upāsate iti tatra śraddhālavaḥ ye satyam
brahma upāsate iti vyākhyeyam satya śabdasya brahmaṇi asakṛt prayukta tvāt pañcāgi vidyā vidām ca itthaṃvittayā eva upātta tvāt vidyā tara parāyaṇāām eva etat upādāam yāyyam atha ye etau pathau viduḥ te kīṭāḥ pataṅgāḥ
yat idam dadaśūkam iti ca mārga dvaya bhraṣṭāām kaṣṭām adhogatim gamayatī śrutiḥ deva yāa pitṛyāṇayoḥ eva atas bhāvayati tatra api vidyā viśeṣāt eṣām smṛtiḥ api śukla kṛṣṇe gatī hi ete jagataḥ śāśvate
mate ekayā puas iti yat puas devayāasya pathaḥ upakosala vidyāyām pañcāgi vidyāyām ca tat ubhayatra api aucita ārtham tasmāt aiyamaḥ yāvadadhikāram avasthitiḥ ādhikārikāṇām yāvat adhikāra adhikaraṇam
viduṣaḥ deha ataram utpadyate vā iti cityate vidyāyāḥ saṃpattau kaivalyaiḥ vṛttiḥ syāt a vā iti citā upapadyate a
hi odaaḥ bhavet a vā iti citā saṃbhavati ā api tṛpyet a vā iti cityate upapaā tu iyam citā brahma vidām api
keṣāṃcid itihāsa purāṇayoḥ deha atara utpatti darśaāt tathā hi veda ācāryaḥ purāṇa ṛṣiḥ kali dvāparayoḥ saṃdhau kṛṣṇadvaipāyaaḥ saṃbabhūva iti smarati vasiṣṭhaḥ ca brahmaṇaḥ putraḥ
saḥ imi śāpāt apagata pūrva dehaḥ puar brahmā ādeśāḥ mitrāvaruṇābhyām saṃbabhūva iti bhṛgu ādīām api brahmaṇaḥ eva māasa putrāṇām vāruṇe yajñe utpattiḥ smaryate saatkumāraḥ api brahmaṇaḥ eva māasaḥ
putraḥ svayam rudrāya vara pradāāt prādurbabhūva evam eva dakṣa ārada prabhṛtīām bhūyasī deha atara utpattiḥ kathyate smṛtau śrutau api matra arthavādayoḥ prāyeṇa upalakṣyate
te ca kecid patite pūrva dehe dehātaram ādadate kecid tu sthite eva yoga aiśvarya vaśāt sarve ca ete samadhigata sakala veda arthāḥ smaryate tat
eteṣām deha atara utpatti darśaāt prāptam brahma vidyāyāḥ pākṣikam mokṣa hetu tvam ahetu tvam vā iti atas uttaram ucyate teṣām veda pravarta ādiṣu loka sthiti hetuṣu adhikāreṣu adhikāra tatra tvāt sthiteḥ
yathā asau bhagavā savitā sahasra yuga paryatam jagataḥ dhikāram caritvā tad avasāe udaya astamaya varjitam kaivalyam atha tatas ūrdhvaḥ udetya a eva udetā āstametā ekalaḥ eva madhye sthātā
iti śruteḥ yathā ca vartamāā brahma vidaḥ ārabdha bhoga kṣaye kaivalyam tasya tāvat eva ciram a vimokṣye saṃpatsye iti śruteḥ
evam pi īśvarāḥ parameśvareṇa teṣu teṣu adhikāreṣu sataḥ sati api samyagdarśae kaivalya hetau akṣīṇa karmāṇaḥ yāvat adhikāram avatiṣṭhate ca
iti aviruddham sakṛt pravṛttam eva hi te phalāt āāya karma āśayam ativāhayataḥ svātatryeṇa eva gṛhāt iva gṛhātaram ayam ayam deham saṃcarataḥ a parimuṣita smṛtaye
eva deha idriya prakṛti vaśi tvāt yugapad krameṇa vā adhitiṣṭhati a ca ete jātismarāḥ iti ucyate te eva ete iti smṛti prasiddheḥ yathā hi
vyudasya svam deham jāakam deham āviśya vyudya paścāt svam eva deham āviveśa iti smaryate
yadi hi upayukte sakṛt pravṛtte karmaṇi karma ātaram deha atara ārambha kāraṇam āvirbhavet tatas ayat api adagdha bījam karma ataram tadvat eva prasajyeta iti brahmavidyāyāḥ pākṣikam mokṣa hetu tvam ahetu tvam
vā śaṅkyeta a tu iyam āśaṅkā yuktā jñāāt karma bīja dāhasya śruti smṛti prasiddha tvāt tathā hi śrutiḥ bhidyate hṛdayagrathiḥ chidyate sarva saṃśayāḥ kṣīyate ca asya karmāṇi
dṛṣṭe parāvare iti smṛti lambhe vipramokṣaḥ iti ca evamādyā smṛtiḥ api yathā edhāṃsi samiddhaḥ giḥ bhasmasāt kurute sarva karmāṇi bhasmasāt kurute tathā
iti rohati yathā puas jñā a dagdhaiḥ tathā kleśaiḥ ātmā saṃpadyate iti ca evamādyāḥ ca avidyā ādi kleśa dāhe sati
kleśa bījasya karma āśayasya eka deśa dāhaḥ eka deśa prarohaḥ ca iti upapadyate hi agi dagdhasya śāli bījasya eka deśa prarohaḥ dṛśyate pravṛtta phalasya tu karma āśayasya mukta iṣoḥ iva vega kṣayāt
tasya tāvat eva ciram iti śarīrapātau adhikṣepa karaṇāt tasmāt yāvadadhikāram ādhikārikāṇām avasthitiḥ ca jñā a phalasya aaikātika tā tathā ca śrutiḥ aviśeṣeṇa eva sarveṣām
jñāā mokṣam darśayati tat yaḥ yaḥ devāām prati abudhyata saḥ eva tat abhavat tathā ṛṣīṇām tathā mauṣyāṇām iti jñāātareṣu ca aiśvarya ādi phaleṣu
āsaktāḥ syuḥ mahā ṛṣayaḥ te paścāt aiśvarya kṣaya darśae irviṇṇāḥ paramātma jñāe pariiṣṭhāya kaivalyam prāpuḥ iti upapadyate brahmaṇā saha te sarve saṃprāpte pratisaṃcare
kṛtātmā aḥ praviśati param padam iti smaraṇāt pratyakṣa phala tvāt ca jñāasya phala viraha āśaṅkā upapattiḥ karma phale hi svarga ādau aubhava ārūḍhe syāt āśaṅkā bhavet vā a vā iti
aubhava ārūḍham tu jñā a phalam yat sāṃkṣāt aparokṣāt brahma iti śruteḥ tat tvam asi iti siddha vat upadeśāt a hi tat tvam asi iti asya vākyasya arthaḥ
tat tvam mṛtaḥ bhaviṣyasi iti evam pariṇetum śakyaḥ tat ha etat paśya ṛṣiḥ vāmadevaḥ pratipede ham mauḥ abhavam sūryaḥ ca iti ca samyak darśa a kālam
eva tad phalam sarva ātma tvam darśayati tasmāt aikātikī viduṣaḥ kaivalya siddhiḥ akṣara dhiyām tu avarodhaḥ sāma āya tad bhāvābhyām aupasada vat tat uktam akṣara dhi adhikaraṇam vājasaeyake śrūyate etat vai tat akṣaram gārgi brāhmaṇāḥ abhivadati a sthūlam a aṇu a hrasvam a dīrgham a lohitam a seham ityādi
tathā ātharvaṇe śrūyate atha parā yayā tat akṣaram adhigamyate yat tat a dreśyam a grāhyam a gotram a varṇam ityādi tathā eva ayatra api viśeṣaiḥ ākaraṇa dvāreṇa akṣaram param brahma śrāvyate tatra ca kvacid kecid
atiriktāḥ viśeṣāḥ pratiṣidhyate tāsām viśeṣa pratiṣedha buddhīām kim sarvāsām sarvatra prāptiḥ uta vyavasthā iti saṃśaye śruti vibhāgāt vyavasthā prāptau ucyate akṣara viṣayāḥ tu viśeṣa pratiṣedha buddhayaḥ sarvāḥ sarvatra avaroddhavyāḥ sāmāya tad bhāvābhyām
hi sarvatra viśeṣaiḥ ākaraṇa rūpaḥ brahma pratipāda a prakāraḥ tat eva ca sarvatra pratipādyam brahma pratyabhijñāyate tatra kim iti ayatra kṛtāḥ buddhayaḥ ayatra a syuḥ
tathā ca āad ādayaḥ iti atra vyākhyātam tatra vidhi rūpāṇi iha pratiṣedha rūpāṇi iti viśeṣaḥ prapañca arthaḥ ca ayam citā bhedaḥ aupasada vat iti yathā coditāsu
puroḍāśa pradā amatrāṇām ageḥ veḥ hotram veḥ adhvaram iti evamādīām udgātṛ veda utpāām api adhvaryubhiḥ bhavati adhvaryu kartṛka tvāt puroḍāśa pradā asya evam iha api akṣara tatra tvāt tad viśeṣaṇāām yatra kvacid api akṣareṇa sarvatra abhisaṃbadhaḥ iti arthaḥ tat uktam prathame kāṇḍe guṇa mukhya vyatikrame
veda saṃyogaḥ iti atra iyat adhikaraṇam dvā suparṇā sayujā sakhāyā vṛkṣam pariṣasvajāte tayoḥ ayaḥ pippalam abhicākaśīti iti adhyātma adhikāre matram ātharvaṇikāḥ śvetāśvatarāḥ ca paṭhati
tathā kaṭhāḥ ṛtam pibatau sukṛtasya loke guhām praviṣṭau parame parārdhye chāyā ātapau brahma vidaḥ vadati pañca āgayaḥ ye ca triṇāciketāḥ iti kim atra vidyā eka tvam
uta vidyāāātvam iti saṃśayaḥ kim tāvat prāptam vidyāāātvam iti kutas viśeṣa darśaāt dvā suparṇāḥ iti atra hi ekasya bhoktṛ tvam dṛśyate ekasya ca abhoktṛ tvam dṛśyate ṛtam pibatau
iti atra ubhayoḥ api bhoktṛ tvam eva dṛśyate tat vedya rūpam vidyām bhidyāt iti evam prāpte bravīti vidyā ekatvam iti kutas yatas ubhayoḥ api aayoḥ matrayoḥ dvi tva upetam vedyam rūpam
darśitaḥ rūpa bhedaḥ darśitaḥ rūpa bhedaḥ e ti ucyate ubhau api etau matrau jīva dvitīyam īśvaram pratipādayataḥ dvā suparṇāḥ iti atra tāvat ubhicākaśīti iti aśaāya ādi atītaḥ paramātmā pratipādyate vākyaśeṣe pi ca
saḥ eva dṛśyate juṣṭam yadā paśyati ayam īśam asya mahimā iti ṛtam pibatau iti atra tu jīve pibati pibati iti upacaryate paramātma prakaraṇam hi
etat ayatra dharmāt ayatra adharmāt iti upakramāt tad viṣayaḥ eva ca atra api vākyaśeṣaḥ bhavati yaḥ setuḥ īja akṣaram brahma yat param iti guhām praviṣṭau ātma au hi iti atra ca etat prapañcitam
vedya bhedaḥ tasmāt ca vidyā eka tvam api ca triṣu api eteṣu paurvāparya ālocae paramātma vidyā eva avagamyate tādātmya vivakṣayā eva ca paramātma vidyāyām bheda abheda vicāra avatāraḥ asti iti uktam tasmāt prapañca arthaḥ eva
eṣa prayogaḥ tasmāt ca adhika dharma upasaṃhāraḥ iti atarā bhūta grāma vat sva ātma atara tva adhikaraṇam yat sākṣāt aparokṣāt brahma yaḥ ātmā sarva ataraḥ iti evam dvis uṣastaka hola praśayoḥ airataryeṇa vājasaeyiḥ tatra saṃśayaḥ
vidyā eka tvam vā syāt vidyā āā tvam vā iti vidyā āā tvam iti tāvat prāptam abhyāsa sāmarthyāt ayathā hi aarthakam eva syāt tasmāt yathā abhyāsāt karma bhedaḥ evam abhyāsāt vidyā bhedaḥ iti evam prāpte
pratyāha sva ātman

text1:
hi sarvatra viśeṣa nirākaraṇa rūpaḥ brahma pratipādana prakāraḥ
tat eva ca sarvatra pratipādyam brahma abhinnam pratyabhijñāyate
tatra kimiti anyatra kṛtāḥ buddhayaḥ anyatra na syuḥ
tathā ca ānanda ādayaḥ pradhānasya iti atra vyākhyātam
tatra vidhi rūpāṇi viśeṣaṇāni cintitāni iha pratiṣedha rūpāṇi iti viśeṣaḥ
prapañca arthaḥ ca ayam cintā bhedaḥ
aupasada vat iti nidarśanam
yathā jāmadagnye hīne puroḍāśinīṣu upasatsu coditāsu puroḍāśa pradāna mantrāṇām agneḥ veḥ hotram veḥ adhvaram iti evamādīnām udgātṛ veda utpannānām api adhvaryubhiḥ abhisaṃbandhaḥ bhavati adhvaryu kartṛka tvāt puroḍāśa pradānasya pradhāna tantra tvāt ca aṅgānām evam iha api akṣara tantra tvāt tad viśeṣaṇānām yatra kvacid api utpannānām akṣareṇa sarvatra abhisaṃbandhaḥ iti arthaḥ
tat uktam prathame kāṇḍe guṇa mukhya vyatikrame tad artha tvāt mukhyena veda saṃyogaḥ iti atra
iyat āmananāt
iyat adhikaraṇam
dvā suparṇā sayujā sakhāyā samānam vṛkṣam pariṣasvajāte
tayoḥ anyaḥ pippalam svādvatti an aśnan anyaḥ abhicākaśīti iti adhyātma adhikāre mantram ātharvaṇikāḥ śvetāśvatarāḥ ca paṭhanti
tathā kaṭhāḥ ṛtam pibantau sukṛtasya loke guhām praviṣṭau parame parārdhye
chāyā ātapau brahma vidaḥ vadanti pañca agnayaḥ ye ca triṇāciketāḥ iti
kim atra vidyā ekatvam uta vidyā nānātvam iti saṃśayaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam
vidyā nānātvam iti
kutas
viśeṣa darśanāt dvā suparṇāḥ iti atra hi ekasya bhoktṛ tvam dṛśyate ekasya ca abhoktṛ tvam dṛśyate
ṛtam pibantau iti atra ubhayoḥ api bhoktṛ tvam eva dṛśyate
tat vedya rūpam bhidyamānam vidyām bhindyāt iti evam prāpte bravīti vidyā ekatvam iti
kutas
yatas ubhayoḥ api anayoḥ mantrayoḥ iyat tā paricchinnam dvi tva upetam vedyam rūpam abhinnam āmananti
nanu darśitaḥ rūpa bhedaḥ na iti ucyate
ubhau api etau mantrau jīva dvitīyam īśvaram pratipādayataḥ na artha antaram
dvā suparṇā iti atra tāvat an aśnan anyaḥ abhicākaśīti iti aśanāyādi atītaḥ paramātmā pratipādyate
vākyaśeṣe ca saḥ eva pratipādyamānaḥ dṛśyate juṣṭam yadā paśyati anyam īśam asya mahimānam iti
ṛtam pibantau iti atra tu jīve pibati aśanāya ādi atītaḥ paramātmā api sāhacaryāt chatri nyāyena pibati iti upacaryate
paramātma prakaraṇam hi etat anyatra dharmāt anyatra adharmāt iti upakramāt
tad viṣayaḥ eva ca atra api vākyaśeṣaḥ bhavati yaḥ setuḥ ījānānām akṣaram brahma yat param iti
guhām praviṣṭau ātmānau hi iti atra ca etat prapañcitam
tasmāt na asti vedya bhedaḥ
tasmāt ca vidyā eka tvam
api ca triṣu api eteṣu vedānteṣu paurvāparya ālocane paramātma vidyā eva avagamyate
tādātmya vivakṣayā eva jīva upādānam na artha antara vivakṣayā
na ca paramātma vidyāyām bheda abheda vicāra avatāraḥ sti iti uktam
tasmāt prapañca arthaḥ eva eṣa prayogaḥ
tasmāt ca adhika dharma upasaṃhāraḥ iti
antarā bhūta grāma vat sva ātmanaḥ
antara tva adhikaraṇam
yat sākṣāt aparokṣāt brahma yaḥ ātmā sarva antaraḥ iti evam dvis uṣastaka hola praśnayoḥ nairantaryeṇa vājasaneyinaḥ samāmananti
tatra saṃśayaḥ vidyā ekatvam vā syāt vidyā nānātvam vā iti
vidyā nānātvam iti tāvat prāptam abhyāsa sāmarthyāt
anyathā hi anūna anatirikta arthe dvis āmnānam anarthakam eva syāt
tasmāt yathā abhyāsāt karma bhedaḥ evam abhyāsāt vidyā bhedaḥ iti evam prāpte pratyāha antarā āmnāna aviśeṣāt svātmanaḥ vidyā eka tvam iti
sarva antaraḥ hi svātmā ubhayatra api a viśiṣṭaḥ pṛcchayate pratyucyate ca
na hi dvau ātmānau ekasmin dehe sarva antarau saṃbhavataḥ
tadā hi ekasya āñjasam sarva antara tvam avakalpeta ekasya tu bhūta grāma vat na eva sarva antara tvam syāt
yathā ca pañcabhūta samūhe dehe pṛthivyāḥ āpaḥ ntarāḥ adbhyaḥ tejaḥ ntaram iti sati api āpekṣike ntara tve nā eva mukhyam sarva antara tvam bhavati tathā iha api iti arthaḥ
athavā bhūta grāma vat iti śruti antaram nidarśayati
yathā ekaḥ devāḥ sarva bhūteṣu gūḍhaḥ sarva vyāpī sarva bhūta antarātmā iti asmin mantre samasteṣu bhūta grāmeṣu ekaḥ eva sarva antaraḥ ātmā āmnāyate evam anayoḥ api brāhmaṇayoḥ iti arthaḥ
tasmāt vedya aikyāt vidyā eka tvam iti
anyathā bheda anupapattiḥ iti ced nā upadeśa antara vat
atha yat uktam an abhyupagamyamāne vidyā bhede āmnāna bheda anupapattiḥ iti tat parihartavyam
atra ucyate na ayam doṣaḥ
upadeśa antara vat upapatteḥ
yathā tāṇḍinām upaniṣadi ṣaṣṭhe prapāṭhake saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi śvetaketo iti nava kṛtvā u pi upadeśe na vidyā bhedaḥ bhavati evam iha api bhaviṣyati
katham ca nava kṛtvas upi upadeśe vidyā bhedaḥ na bhavati
upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām eka artha tā avagamāt bhūyas eva mā bhagavān vijñāpayatu iti ca ekasya eva arthasya punar punar pratipipādayiṣita tvena upakṣepāt āśaṅkā antara nirākaraṇena ca asakṛt upadeśa upapatteḥ
evam iha api praśna rūpa abhedāt atas nyadā ārtam iti ca parisamāpti aviśeṣāt upakrama upasaṃhārau tāvat eka artha viṣayau dṛśyete
yat eva sākṣāt aparokṣāt brahma iti dvitīye praśne evakāram prayuñjānaḥ pūrva praśna gatam eva artham uttaratra anukṛṣyamāṇam darśayati
pūrvasmin ca brāhmaṇe kārya karaṇa vyatiriktasya ātmanaḥ sadbhāvaḥ kathyate
uttarasmin tu tasya eva aśanāya ādi saṃsāra dharma atīta tvam viśeṣaḥ kathyate iti ekārtha tā upapattiḥ
tasmāt ekā vidyā iti
vyatihāraḥ viśiṃṣanti hi itara vat
vyatihāra adhikaraṇam
yathā tat yaḥ ham saḥ sau saḥ sau saḥ ham iti āditya puruṣam prakṛti aitareyiṇaḥ samāmananti tathā jābālāḥ tvam vai aham asmi bhagavaḥ devate ham vai tvam asi iti
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha vyatihāreṇa ubhaya rūpā matiḥ kartavyā uta eka rūpā eva iti
eka rūpā eva iti tāvat āha
na hi atra ātmanaḥ īśvareṇa ekatvam muktvā anyat kiṃcid cintayitavyam asti
yadi ca evam cintayitavya viśeṣaḥ parikalpyeta saṃsāriṇaḥ ca īśvara ātmatvam īśvarasya saṃsāri ātmatvam iti tatra saṃsāriṇaḥ tāvat īśvara ātmatve utkarṣaḥ bhavet
īśvarasya tu saṃsārya ātma tve nikarṣaḥ kṛtaḥ syāt
tasmāt aikarūpyam eva mateḥ
vyatihāra āmnāyaḥ tu ekatva dṛḍhīkāra arthaḥ iti evam prāpte pratyāha vyatihāraḥ yam ādhyānāya āmnāyate
itaravat yathā itare guṇāḥ sarva ātma tva prabhṛtayaḥ ādhyānāya āmnāyante tadvat
tathā hi viśiṃṣanti samāmnātāraḥ ubhaya uccāraṇena tvam aham asmi aham ca tvam asi iti
tat ca ubhaya rūpāyām matau kartavyāyām arthavat bhavati
anyathā hi idam anarthakam syāt ekena eva kṛta tvāt
nanu ubhaya āmnānasya artha viśeṣe parikalpyamāne devatāyāḥ saṃsāri ātma tva āpatteḥ nikarṣaḥ prasajyeta iti uktam na eṣa doṣaḥ
aikātmyasya eva anena prakāreṇa anucintyamāna tvāt
nanu evam sati saḥ eva ekatva dṛḍhīkāraḥ āpadyeta na vayam ekatva dṛḍhīkāram vārayāmaḥ
kim tarhi vyatihāreṇa iha dvi rūpā matiḥ kartavyā vacana prāmāṇyāt na ekarūpā iti etāvat upapādayāmaḥ
phalatas tu ekatvam api dṛḍhībhavati
yathā satya kāma ādi guṇa upadeśe tad guṇaḥ īśvaraḥ prasidhyati tadvat
tasmāt ayam ādhyātavyaḥ vyatihāraḥ samāne ca viṣaye upasaṃhartavyaḥ bhavati iti
sā eva hi satya ādayaḥ
satya ādi adhikaraṇam
sa yaḥ ha etam mahat yakṣam prathama jam veda satyam brahma ityādinā vājasaneyake satya vidyām sanāma akṣara upāsanām vidhāya anantaram āmnāyate tat yat tat satyam asau saḥ ādityaḥ yaḥ eṣaḥ etasmin maṇḍale puruṣaḥ yaḥ ca ayam dakṣiṇe kṣan puruṣaḥ ityādi
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim dve ete satya vidye kim vai ekā eva iti
dve iti tāvat prāptam
bhedena hi phala saṃyogaḥ bhavati iti purastāt hanti pāpmānam jahāti ca iti upariṣṭāt
prakṛta ākarṣaṇam tu upāsya ekatvāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ekā eva iyam satya vidyā iti
kutas
tat yat tat satyam iti prakṛta ākarṣaṇāt
nanu vidyā bhede pi prakṛta ākarṣaṇam upāsya ekatvāt upapadyate iti uktam na etat evam
yatra tu vispaṣṭāt kāraṇa antarāt vidyā bhedaḥ pratīyate tatra etat evam syāt
atra tu ubhayathā saṃbhave tat yat tat satyam iti prakṛta ākarṣaṇāt pūrvavidyā saṃbaddham eva satyam uttaratra ākṛṣyate iti eka vidyā tva niścayaḥ
yat punar uktam phala antara śravaṇāt vidyā antaram iti atra ucyate tasya upaniṣad ahar
aham iti ca aṅga antara upadeśasya stāvakam idam phala antara śravaṇam iti adoṣaḥ
api ca arthavādāt eva phale kalpayitavye sati vidyā eka tve ca avayaveṣu śrūyamāṇāni bahūni api phalāni avayavinyām eva vidyāyām upasaṃhartavyāni bhavanti
tasmāt sā eva iyam ekā satya vidyā tena tena viśeṣeṇa upetā āmnātā iti atas sarve eva satya ādayaḥ guṇāḥ ekasmin prayoge upasaṃhartavyāḥ
kecid punar asmin sūtre idam ca vājasaneyakam akṣi āditya puruṣa viṣayam vākyam chāndogye ca atha yaḥ eṣaḥ ntarāditye hiraṇmayaḥ puruṣaḥ dṛśyate yaḥ eṣaḥ u kṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate iti udāhṛtya sā eva iyam akṣi āditya puruṣa viṣayā vidyā ubhayatra ekā eva iti kṛtvā satya ādīn guṇān vājasaneyibhyaḥ chandogānām upasaṃhāryān manyante
tat na sādhu lakṣyate
chāndogye hi karma saṃbandhinī udgītha vyapāśrayā vidyā vijñāyate
tatra hi ādi madhya avasāneṣu karma saṃbandhi cihnāni bhavanti iyam eva ṛc agniḥ sāma iti upakrame tasya ṛc ca sāma ca geṣṇau tasmāt udgīthaḥ iti madhye yaḥ evam vidvān sāma gāyati iti upasaṃhāre
na evam vājasaneyake kiṃcid karma saṃbandhi cihnam asti
tatra prakrama bhedāt vidyā bhede sati guṇa vyavasthā eva yuktā iti
kāma ādi itaratra tatra ca āyatana ādibhyaḥ
kāma ādi adhikaraṇam
atha yat idam asmin brahma pure daharam puṇḍarīkam veśma daharaḥ smin antarākāśaḥ iti prastutya chandogāḥ adhīyate eṣaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā vijaraḥ vimṛtyuḥ viśokaḥ vijighatsaḥ pipāsaḥ satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ ityādi
tathā vājasaneyinaḥ sa vai eṣa mahān ajaḥ ātmā yaḥ yam vijñāna mayaḥ prāṇeṣu yaḥ eṣaḥ ntar hṛdaye ākāśaḥ tasmin śete sarvasya vaśī ityādi
tatra vidyā eka tvam paraspara guṇa yogaḥ ca kim vā na iti saṃśaye vidyā eka tvam iti
tatra idam ucyate kāma ādi iti satya kāma ādi iti arthaḥ yathā devadattaḥ dattaḥ satyabhāmā bhāmā iti
yat etat chāndogye hṛdaya ākāśasya satya kāma tva ādi guṇa jātam upalabhyate tat itaratra vājasaneyake sa vai eṣa mahān ajaḥ ātmā iti atra saṃbadhyeta
yat ca vājasaneyake vaśi tva ādi upalabhyate tat api itaratra chāndogye eṣaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā iti atra saṃbadhyeta
kutas
āyatana ādi sāmānyāt
samānam hi ubhayatra api hṛdayam āyatanam samānaḥ ca vedyaḥ īśvaraḥ samānam ca tasya setu tvam loka a saṃbheda prayojanam iti evamādi bahu sāmānyam dṛśyate
nanu dṛśyate chāndogye hṛdaya ākāśasya guṇa yogaḥ vājasaneyake tu ākāśa āśrayasya brahmaṇaḥ iti na daharaḥ uttarebhyaḥ iti atra chāndogye pi ākāśa śabdam brahma eva iti pratiṣṭhāpita tvāt
ayam tu atra vidyate viśeṣaḥ sa guṇā hi brahma vidyā chāndogye upadiśyate atha ye iha ātmānam a nuvidya vrajanti etān ca satyān kāmān iti ātma vat kāmānām api vedya tva śravaṇāt vājasaneyake tu nirguṇam eva brahma upadiśyamānam dṛśyate atha urdhvam vimokṣāya brūhi a saṅgaḥ hi ayam puruṣaḥ ityādi praśna prativacana samanvayāt
vaśi tva ādi tu stuti artham eva guṇa jātam vājasaneyake saṃkīrtyate
tathā ca upariṣṭāt saḥ eṣa na iti na iti ātmā ityādinā nirguṇam eva brahma upasaṃharati
guṇavataḥ tu brahmaṇaḥ eka tvāt vibhūti pradarśanāya ayam guṇa upasaṃhāraḥ sūtritaḥ na upāsanāya iti draṣṭavyam
ādara āda lopaḥ
ādara adhikaraṇam
chāndogye vaiśvānara vidyām prakṛtya śrūyate tat yat bhaktam prathamam āgacchet tat homīyam sa yām prathamām āhutim juhuyāt tām juhuyāt prāṇāya svāhā ityādi
tatra pañca prāṇa āhutayaḥ vihitāḥ
tāsu ca parastāt agnihotra śabdaḥ prayuktaḥ yaḥ etat evam vidvān agnihotram juhoti iti yathā iha kṣudhitāḥ bālāḥ mātaram paryupāsate
evam sarvāṇi bhūtāni agnihotram upāsate iti ca
tatra idam vicāryate kim bhojana lope lopaḥ prāṇa agnihotrasya uta alopaḥ iti
tat yat bhaktam iti bhakta āgamana saṃyoga śravaṇāt bhakta āgamanasya ca bhojana artha tvāt bhojana lope lopaḥ prāṇa agnihotrasya iti evam prāpte na lupyeta iti tāvat āha
kasmāt
ādarāt
tathā hi vaiśvānara vidyāyām eva jābālānām śrutiḥ tithibhyaḥ śnīyāt
yathā ha vai svayam a hutvā agnihotram parasya juhuyāt evam tat iti atithi bhojanasya prāthamyam ninditvā svāmi bhojanam prathamam prāpayantī prāṇa agnihotre ādaram karoti
yā hi na prāthamya lopam sahate natarām sā prāthamyavataḥ gnihotrasya lopam saheta iti manyate
nanu bhojana artha bhakta āgamana saṃyogāt bhojana lope lopaḥ prāpitaḥ na tasya dravya viśeṣa vidhāna artha tvāt
prākṛte hi agnihotre payaḥ prabhṛtīnām dravyāṇām niyata tvāt iha api agnihotra śabdāt kauṇḍapāyi nāmayana vat tad dharma prāptau satyām bhakta dravya tā guṇa viśeṣa vidhāna artham idam vākyam tat yat bhaktam iti
atas guṇa lope na mukhyasya iti evam prāptam
bhojana lope pi adbhiḥ vā anyena vā dravyeṇa a viruddhena pratinidhāna nyāyena prāṇa agnihotrasya anu
text2:
hi sarvatra viśeṣaiḥ ākaraṇa rūpaḥ brahma pratipāda a prakāraḥ tat eva ca sarvatra pratipādyam brahma pratyabhijñāyate tatra kim iti ayatra kṛtāḥ buddhayaḥ ayatra a syuḥ
tathā ca āad ādayaḥ iti atra vyākhyātam tatra vidhi rūpāṇi iha pratiṣedha rūpāṇi iti viśeṣaḥ prapañca arthaḥ ca ayam citā bhedaḥ aupasada vat iti yathā coditāsu
puroḍāśa pradā amatrāṇām ageḥ veḥ hotram veḥ adhvaram iti evamādīām udgātṛ veda utpāām api adhvaryubhiḥ bhavati adhvaryu kartṛka tvāt puroḍāśa pradā asya evam iha api akṣara tatra tvāt tad viśeṣaṇāām yatra kvacid api akṣareṇa sarvatra abhisaṃbadhaḥ iti arthaḥ tat uktam prathame kāṇḍe guṇa mukhya vyatikrame
veda saṃyogaḥ iti atra iyat adhikaraṇam dvā suparṇā sayujā sakhāyā vṛkṣam pariṣasvajāte tayoḥ ayaḥ pippalam abhicākaśīti iti adhyātma adhikāre matram ātharvaṇikāḥ śvetāśvatarāḥ ca paṭhati
tathā kaṭhāḥ ṛtam pibatau sukṛtasya loke guhām praviṣṭau parame parārdhye chāyā ātapau brahma vidaḥ vadati pañca āgayaḥ ye ca triṇāciketāḥ iti kim atra vidyā eka tvam
uta vidyāāātvam iti saṃśayaḥ kim tāvat prāptam vidyāāātvam iti kutas viśeṣa darśaāt dvā suparṇāḥ iti atra hi ekasya bhoktṛ tvam dṛśyate ekasya ca abhoktṛ tvam dṛśyate ṛtam pibatau
iti atra ubhayoḥ api bhoktṛ tvam eva dṛśyate tat vedya rūpam vidyām bhidyāt iti evam prāpte bravīti vidyā ekatvam iti kutas yatas ubhayoḥ api aayoḥ matrayoḥ dvi tva upetam vedyam rūpam
darśitaḥ rūpa bhedaḥ darśitaḥ rūpa bhedaḥ e ti ucyate ubhau api etau matrau jīva dvitīyam īśvaram pratipādayataḥ dvā suparṇāḥ iti atra tāvat ubhicākaśīti iti aśaāya ādi atītaḥ paramātmā pratipādyate vākyaśeṣe pi ca
saḥ eva dṛśyate juṣṭam yadā paśyati ayam īśam asya mahimā iti ṛtam pibatau iti atra tu jīve pibati pibati iti upacaryate paramātma prakaraṇam hi
etat ayatra dharmāt ayatra adharmāt iti upakramāt tad viṣayaḥ eva ca atra api vākyaśeṣaḥ bhavati yaḥ setuḥ īja akṣaram brahma yat param iti guhām praviṣṭau ātma au hi iti atra ca etat prapañcitam
vedya bhedaḥ tasmāt ca vidyā eka tvam api ca triṣu api eteṣu paurvāparya ālocae paramātma vidyā eva avagamyate tādātmya vivakṣayā eva ca paramātma vidyāyām bheda abheda vicāra avatāraḥ asti iti uktam tasmāt prapañca arthaḥ eva
eṣa prayogaḥ tasmāt ca adhika dharma upasaṃhāraḥ iti atarā bhūta grāma vat sva ātma atara tva adhikaraṇam yat sākṣāt aparokṣāt brahma yaḥ ātmā sarva ataraḥ iti evam dvis uṣastaka hola praśayoḥ airataryeṇa vājasaeyiḥ tatra saṃśayaḥ
vidyā eka tvam vā syāt vidyā āā tvam vā iti vidyā āā tvam iti tāvat prāptam abhyāsa sāmarthyāt ayathā hi aarthakam eva syāt tasmāt yathā abhyāsāt karma bhedaḥ evam abhyāsāt vidyā bhedaḥ iti evam prāpte
pratyāha sva ātmanaḥ vidyā eka tvam iti sarvātaraḥ hi sva ātmā ubhayatra api aviśiṣṭaḥ pṛcchayate pratyucyate ca a hi dvau ātmau ekasmin dehe sarvātarau saṃbhavataḥ tadā hi
ekasya āñjasam sarvātaratvam avakalpeta ekasya tu bhūta grāma vat syāt yathā ca pañcabhūta samūhe dehe pṛthivyāḥ āpaḥ utarāḥ adbhyaḥ tejaḥ utaram iti sati api āpekṣika itaratve ā eva mukhyam sarvātaratvam
bhavati tathā iha api iti arthaḥ athavā bhūta grāma vat iti śrutyataram darśayati yathā ekaḥ devāḥ sarva bhūteṣu gūḍhaḥ sarva vyāpī sarva bhūta atarātmā iti asmin atre samasteṣu bhūta grāmeṣu ekaḥ eva sarvātaraḥ ātmā āmāyate
evam aayoḥ api brāhmaṇayoḥ iti arthaḥ tasmāt vedya aikyāt vidyā eka tvam iti ayathā bheda aupapattiḥ iti ayathā bheda aupapattiḥ iti atha yat uktam vidyā bhede tat parihartavyam atra ucyate doṣaḥ upadeśa atara vat upapatteḥ yathā
ṣaṣṭhe prapāṭhake saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi śvetaketo iti avakṛtvā upi upadeśe vidyā bhedaḥ bhavati evam iha api bhaviṣyati katham ca avakṛtvā upi upadeśe vidyā bhedaḥ bhavati upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām eka artha tā avagamāt
bhūyas eva mā bhagavān āvijñāpayatu iti ca ekasya eva arthasya puas puas upakṣepāt ca asakṛt upadeśa upapatteḥ evam iha api iti ca parisamāpti aviśeṣāt upakrama upasaṃhārau
tāvat eka artha viṣayau dṛśyeta iyat eva sākṣāt aparokṣāt brahma iti dvitīye praśe evakāram prayuñjāaḥ pūrva praśa gatam eva artham uttaratra ākṛṣyamāṇam darśayati pūrvasmin ca brāhmaṇe kārya karaṇa vyatiriktasya ātmaaḥ sadbhāvaḥ kathyate uttarasmin tu tasya eva aśaāya ādi saṃsāra dharma atīta tvam
viśeṣaḥ kathyate iti eka artha tā upapattiḥ tasmāt ekā vidyā iti vyatihāraḥ viśiṃṣati hi itara vat vyatihāra adhikaraṇam yathā saḥ u sau yaḥ u sau saḥ u ham iti āditya puruṣam prakṛti aitareyiṇaḥ tathā jābālāḥ
tvam vai aham asmi bhagavaḥ devatā iham vai tvam asi iti tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha vyatihāreṇa ubhaya rūpā matiḥ kartavyā uta eka rūpā eva iti eka rūpā eva iti tāvat āha a
hi atra ātmanaḥ īśvareṇa ekatvam muktvā a yat kiṃcid citayitavyam asti yadi ca evam citayitavya viśeṣaḥ parikalpyeta saṃsāriṇaḥ ca īśvara ātmatvam īśvarasya saṃsāri ātmatvam iti tatra saṃsāriṇaḥ tāvat īśvara ātmatve utkarṣaḥ bhavet īśvarasya tu
saṃsāri ātma tve ikarṣaḥ kṛtaḥ syāt tasmāt aikarūpyam eva mateḥ vyatihāra āmāyaḥ tu ekatva dṛḍhīkāra arthaḥ iti evam prāpte pratyāha vyatihāraḥ yam ādhyāāya āmāyate itaravat yathā itare guṇāḥ sarva ātma tva prabhṛtayaḥ ādhyāāya āmāyate
tadvat tathā hi viśiṃṣati samā mātāraḥ ubhaya uccāraṇe tvam aham asmi aham ca tvam asi iti tat ca ubhaya rūpāyām matau kartavyāyām arthavat bhavati ayathā hi idam aarthakam
syāt kṛta tvāt au artha viśeṣe devatāyāḥ saṃsāri ātma tva āpatteḥ ikarṣaḥ prasajyeta iti uktam doṣaḥ aikātmyasya eva evam sati sa
eva ekatva dṛḍhīkāraḥ āpadyeta a vayam ekatva dṛḍhīkāram vārayāmaḥ kim tarhi vyatihāreṇa iha dvirūpā matiḥ kartavyā aikarūpā iti etāvat upapādayāmaḥ phalatas tu ekatvam api dṛḍhībhavati yathā
satya kāma ādi guṇa upadeśe tad guṇaḥ īśvaraḥ prasidhyati tadvat tasmāt ayam ādhyātavyaḥ vyatihāraḥ ca viṣaye upasaṃhartavyaḥ bhavati iti sā eva hi satya ādayaḥ satya ādi adhikaraṇam sa yaḥ ha etam
mahat yakṣam prathama jam veda satyam brahma ityādiā vājasaeyake satya vidyām saāma akṣara upāsaām vidhāya tat yat tat satyam asau saḥ ādityaḥ yaḥ eṣaḥ etasmin maṇḍale puruṣaḥ yaḥ ca ayam dakṣiṇa īkṣa puruṣaḥ
ityādi tatra saṃśayaḥ kim dve ete satya vidye kim vai ekā eva iti dve iti tāvat prāptam hi phala saṃyogaḥ bhavati jayati imān lokān iti
pāpmāam jahāti ca iti upariṣṭāt prakṛta ākarṣaṇam tu upāsya ekatvāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ekā eva iyam satya vidyā iti kutas tat yat tat satyam iti prakṛta ākarṣaṇāt vidyā bhede pi
prakṛta ākarṣaṇam upāsya ekatvāt upapadyate iti uktam aitadevam yatra tu vispaṣṭāt kāraṇātarāt vidyā bhedaḥ pratīyate tatra etat evam syāt atra tu ubhayathā saṃbhaveta yat tat satyam iti prakṛta ākarṣaṇāt pūrvavidyā saṃbaddham eva
satyam uttaratra ākṛṣyate iti ekavidyā tva aiścayaḥ yat puaruktam phala atara śravaṇāt vidyātaram iti atra ucyate aham iti ca aṅga atara upadeśasya stāvakam idam phala atara śravaṇam iti adoṣaḥ api ca arthavādāt eva phale kalpayitavye
sati vidyā eka tve ca avayaveṣu śrūyamāṇāi phalāi avayaviyām eva vidyāyām upasaṃhartavyāi bhavati tasmāt sā eva iyam ekā satya vidyā iti atas sarva
eva satya ādayaḥ guṇāḥ ekasmin prayoge upasaṃhartavyāḥ kecid puarasmin sūtre idam ca vājasaeyakam akṣi āditya puruṣa viṣayam vākyam chādogye ca atha yaḥ eṣa utarāditye hiraṇmayaḥ puruṣaḥ dṛśyate yaḥ eṣa ukṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate
iti udāhṛtya sā eva iyam akṣi āditya puruṣa viṣayā vidyā ubhayatra ekā eva iti kṛtvā satya ādi guṇāḥ vājasaeyibhyaḥ chadogāām upasaṃhāryāḥ sādhu lakṣyate chādogye hi udgītha vyapāśrayā vidyā vijñāyate
tatra hi ādi madhya avasāeṣu bhavati iyam eva ṛgagiḥ sāma iti upakrametasya ṛc ca sāma ca geṣṇau tasmāt udgīthaḥ iti madhyeye evam gāyati iti upasaṃhāre aivam vājasaeyake

vājasaeyiḥ sa vai eṣa mahāḥ ajaḥ ātmā yaḥ yam prāṇeṣu yaḥ eṣa u tar hṛdaye ākāśaḥ tasmin śete sarvasya vaśī
ityādi tatra vidyā eka tvam paraspara guṇa yogaḥ ca kim vā ā iti saṃśaye vidyā eka tvam iti tatra idam ucyate kāma ādi iti satya kāma ādi iti arthaḥ yathā devadattaḥ dattaḥ satyabhāmā bhāmā iti
mahābhāṣya yat etat chādogye hṛdaya ākāśasya satya kāma tva ādi guṇa jātam upalabhyate tat itaratra vājasaeyake sa vai eṣa mahā ajaḥ ātmā iti atra saṃbadhyeta yat ca
vājasaeyake vaśi tva ādi upalabhyate tat api itaratra chādogye eṣaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā iti atra saṃbadhyeta kutas āyataādi sāmāyāt hi ubhayatra api hṛdayam
ca vedyaḥ īśvaraḥ ca tasya setu tvam iti evamādi bahu sāmāyam dṛśyate viśeṣaḥ api dṛśyate chādogye hṛdaya ākāśasya guṇa yogaḥ vājasaeyake tu ākāśa āśrayasya
brahmaṇe iti a dahara uttarebhyaḥ iti atra chādogye pi ākāśa śabdam brahma eva iti pratiṣṭhāpita tvāt ayam tu atra vidyate viśeṣaḥ sa guṇā hi brahma vidyā chādogye
upadiśyate atha yaḥ iha ātmā amaḥ u vidya vrajati etān ca satya akāmāḥ iti ātma vat kāmāām api vedya tva śravaṇāt vājasaeyake tu brahma upadiśyamāam dṛśyate atha urdhvam
vimokṣāya brūhi a saṅgaḥ hi ayam puruṣaḥ vaśi tva ādi tu stuti artham eva guṇa jātam vājasaeyake saṃkīrtyate tathā ca upariṣṭāt saḥ eṣaḥ eti eti ātmā ityādi ā irguṇam eva
brahma upasaṃharati guṇavataḥ tu brahmaṇaḥ ekatvāt vibhūti pradarśaāya ayam guṇa upasaṃhāraḥ sūtritaḥ iti draṣṭavyam ādarāt alopaḥ ādara adhikaraṇam chādogye vaiśvāara vidyām prakṛtya śrūyate tat yat bhaktam prathamam āgacchet tat homīyam
sa yām prathamām āhutim juhuyāt tām juhuyāt prāṇāya svāhā ityādi tatra pañca prāṇa āhutayaḥ vihitāḥ tāsu ca parastāt agihotra śabdaḥ prayuktaḥ yaḥ etat evam vidvāḥ agihotram juhoti iti yathā iha kṣudhitā
bālāḥ mātaram paryupāsate evam sarvāṇi bhūtāyagihotram upāsate iti ca tatra idam vicāryate kim bhoja a lope lopaḥ prāṇāgihotrasya uta a lopaḥ iti tat yat bhaktam iti bhakta āgama asaṃyoga śravaṇāt bhakta āgama asya
ca bhoja artha tvāt bhoja a lope lopaḥ prāṇāgihotrasya iti evam prāpte a lupyeta iti tāvat āha kasmāt ādarāt tathā hi vaiśvāara vidyāyām eva jābālāām śrutiḥ yathā ha vai
parasya juhuyāt evam tat iti atithi bhojaasya prāthamyam svāmi bhojaam prathamam prāpayatī ādaram karoti yā hi a prāthamya lopam sahate
sā prāthamyavataḥ gihotrasya lopam saheta iti bhoja artha bhakta āgama asaṃyogāt bhoja a lope lopaḥ prāpitaḥ tasya dravya viśeṣa vidhā artha tvāt prākṛte hi a gihotre payaḥ prabhṛtīām dravyāṇām iyata tvāt iha api a gihotra śabdāt
tad dharma prāptau satyām bhakta dravya tā guṇa viśeṣa vidhā artham idam vākyam tat yat bhaktam iti atas guṇa lope mukhyasya iti evam prāptam adbhiḥ vā vā dravyeṇa a viruddhea a iti atas
uttaram paṭhati upasthita itas tad vacaāt upasthite bhojae atas tasmāt eva bhoja a dravyāt prathama upaipatitāt kasmāt tad vacaāt tathā hi tat yat bhaktam prathamam āgacchet tat homīyam iti siddha vat bhakta upaipāta parāmarśe parārtha dravya sādhya tām
vidadhāti tāḥ satyaḥ katham bhoja a lope dravya ātaram pratidhāpayeyuḥ ca atra prākṛta āgihotra dharma prāptiḥ asti juhoti iti vidhi uddeśa gataḥ gihotra śabdaḥ tadvat bhāvam vidhāpayet iti
yuktā tad dharma prāptiḥ iha arthavāda gataḥ gihotra śabdaḥ a tadvat bhāvam vidhāpayitum arhati tad dharma prāptau ca abhyupagamyamāāyām agi uddharaṇa ādayaḥ api prāpyera a ca asti saṃbhavaḥ agi uddharaṇam tāvat homa adhikaraṇa bhāvāya
ca ayam agau homaḥ bhoja ārtha tā vyāghāta prasaṅgāt bhoja ārtha upaīta dravya saṃbadhāt ca āsyaḥ eva eṣa homaḥ tathā ca jābāla śrutiḥ pūrvaḥ utithibhyaḥ uśīyāt iti āsya ādhārām eva imām homaiḥ vṛttim darśayati atas
eva ca iha api darśayati uraḥ eva vediḥ lomāi barhiḥ hṛdayam gārhapatyaḥ āsyam āhavaīyaḥ iti vedi śrutiḥ ca atra sthaṇḍila mātra upalakṣaṇa arthā draṣṭavyā mukhya āgihotre vedi abhāvāt tad aṅgāām ca
iha ca saṃpipādayiṣita tvāt ca saṃyogāt upasthā ādayaḥ dharmāḥ kecid kathaṃcid virudhyate tasmāt bhoja a pakṣe eva ete matra dravya devatā saṃyogāt pañca homāḥ
yat tu ādara darśa avacaam tat bhoja a pakṣe prāthamya vidhā artham a hi asti vacaasya atibhāraḥ a tu asya ityatā śakyate darśayitum tasmāt bhoja a lope lopaḥ eva
prāṇa gihotrasya iti pṛthak hi a pratibadhaḥ phalam taiḥ dhāraṇa adhikaraṇam sati karma aṅga vyapāśrayāṇi om iti etat akṣaram udgītham upāsīta iti evamādīi kim syuḥ karmasu parṇa mayī tva ādi vat uta godoha ādi vat iti vicārayāmaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam ityāi iti kutas prayoga vaca a parigrahāt hi udgītha ādi dvāreṇa kratu saṃbandhāt aṅga atara vat saṃspṛśyate yat tu

text1:
kta dravya tā guṇa viśeṣa vidhāna artham idam vākyam tat yat bhaktam iti
atas guṇa lope na mukhyasya iti evam prāptam
bhojana lope pi adbhiḥ vā anyena vā dravyeṇa a viruddhe

text1:
juhoti iti vidhi uddeśa gataḥ gnihotra śabdaḥ tadvat bhāvam vidhāpayet iti yuktā tad dharma prāptiḥ
iha punar arthavāda gataḥ gnihotra śabdaḥ na tadvat bhāvam vidhāpayitum arhati
tad dharma prāptau ca abhyupagamyamānāyām agni uddharaṇa ādayaḥ pi prāpyeran
na ca asti saṃbhavaḥ
agni uddharaṇam tāvat homa adhikaraṇa bhāvāya
na ca ayam agnau homaḥ bhojana artha tā vyāghāta prasaṅgāt
bhojana artha upanīta dravya saṃbandhāt ca āsyaḥ eva eṣa homaḥ
tathā ca jābāla śrutiḥ tithibhyaḥ śnīyāt iti āsya ādhārām eva imām homa nirvṛttim darśayati
atas eva ca iha api sāṃpādikāni eva agnihotra aṅgāni darśayati uraḥ eva vediḥ lomāni barhiḥ hṛdayam gārhapatyaḥ manaḥ nu āhāryapacanaḥ āsyam āhavanīyaḥ iti
vedi śrutiḥ ca atra sthaṇḍila mātra upalakṣaṇa arthā draṣṭavyā mukhya agnihotre vedi abhāvāt tad aṅgānām ca iha saṃpipādayiṣita tvāt
bhojanena eva ca kṛta kālena saṃyogāt na agnihotra kāla avarodha saṃbhavaḥ
evam anye pi upasthāna ādayaḥ dharmāḥ kecid kathaṃcid virudhyante
tasmāt bhojana pakṣe eva ete mantra dravya devatā saṃyogāt pañca homāḥ nirvartayitavyāḥ
yat tu ādara darśana vacanam tat bhojana pakṣe prāthamya vidhāna artham
na hi asti vacanasya atibhāraḥ
na tu anena asya nitya tā śakyate darśayitum
tasmāt bhojana lope lopaḥ eva prāṇa agnihotrasya iti
tad nirdhāraṇa aniyamaḥ tad dṛṣṭeḥ pṛthak hi apratibandhaḥ phalam
tad nirdhāraṇa adhikaraṇam
santi karma aṅga vyapāśrayāṇi vijñānāni om iti etat akṣaram udgītham upāsīta iti evamādīni
kim tāni nityāni eva syuḥ karmasu parṇa mayī tva ādi vat
uta anityāni godohana ādi vat iti vicārayāmaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam
nityāni iti
kutas
prayoga vacana parigrahāt an ārabhya adhītāni api hi etāni udgītha ādi dvāreṇa kratu saṃbandhāt kratu prayoga vacanena eva aṅga antara vat saṃspṛśyante
yat tu eṣām sva vākyeṣu phala śravaṇam āpayitā ha vai kāmānām bhavati ityādi tad vartamāna apadeśa rūpa tvāt arthavāda mātram eva apāpa śloka śravaṇa ādi vat na phala pradhānam
tasmāt yathā yasya parṇa mayī juhūḥ bhavati na sa pāpam ślokam śrṛṇoti iti evamādīnām a prakaraṇa paṭhitānām api juhu ādi dvāreṇa kratu praveśāt prakaraṇa paṭhita vat nitya tā evam udgītha ādi upāsanānām api iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ tad nirdhāraṇa aniyamaḥ iti
yāni etāni udgītha ādi karma guṇa yāthātmya nirdhāraṇāni rasatamaḥ āptiḥ samṛddhiḥ mukhya prāṇaḥ ādityaḥ iti evamādīni na etāni nitya vat karmasu niyamyeran
kutas
tad dṛṣṭeḥ
tathā hi anitya tvam evaṃjātīyakānām darśayati śrutiḥ tena ubhau kurutaḥ yaḥ ca etat evam veda yaḥ ca na veda iti a viduṣaḥ kriyā abhyanujñānāt
prastāva ādi devatā vijñāna vihīnānām api prastotṛ ādīnām yājana adhyavasāna darśanāt prastotar yā devatā prastāvam anvāyattā tām ced a vidvān prastoṣyasi tām ced a vidvān udgāsyasi tām ced a vidvān pratihariṣyasi iti ca
api ca evaṃjātīyakasya karma vyapāśrayasya vijñānasya pṛthak eva karmaṇaḥ phalam upalabhyate karma phala siddhi apratibandhaḥ tad samṛddhiḥ atiśaya viśeṣaḥ kaścid tena ubhau kurutaḥ yaḥ ca etat evam veda yaḥ ca na veda
nānā tu vidyā ca avidyā ca yat eva vidyayā karoti śraddhayā upaniṣadā tat eva vīryavattaram bhavati iti
tatra nānā tu iti vidvat avidvat prayogayoḥ pṛthakkaraṇāt vīryavattaram iti ca tarap pratyaya prayogāt vidyā hīnam api vīryavat iti gamyate
tat ca anitya tve vidyāyāḥ upapadyate
nitya tve tu katham tad vihīnam karma vīryavat iti anujñāyeta
sarva aṅga upasaṃhāre hi vīryavat karma iti sthitiḥ
tathā loka sāma ādiṣu pratiniyatāni pratyupāsanam phalāni śiṣyante kalpante ha asmai lokāḥ ūrdhvāḥ ca āvṛttāḥ ca iti evamādīni
na ca idam phala śravaṇam arthavāda mātram yuktam pratipattum
tathā hi guṇa vādaḥ āpadyeta
phala upadeśe tu mukhya vāda upapattiḥ
prayāja ādiṣu tu itikartavya tā ākāṅkṣasya kratoḥ prakṛta tvāt tādarthye sati yuktam phala śruteḥ arthavāda tvam
tathā an ārabhya adhīteṣu api parṇa mayī tva ādiṣu na hi parṇa mayī tva ādīnām akriyā ātmakānām āśrayam antareṇa phala saṃbandhaḥ
godohana ādīnām hi prakṛta ap praṇayana ādi āśraya lābhāt upapannaḥ phala vidhiḥ
tathā bailva ādīnām api prakṛta yūpa ādi āśraya lābhāt upapannaḥ phala vidhiḥ
na tu parṇamayī tva ādiṣu evaṃvidhaḥ kaścid āśrayaḥ sti
vākyena eva tu juhū ādi āśrayatām vivakṣitvā phale vidhim vivakṣataḥ vākya bhedaḥ syāt
upāsanānām tu kriyā ātmaka tvāt viśiṣṭa vidhāna upapatteḥ udgītha ādi āśrayāṇām phale vidhānam na virudhyate
tasmāt yathā kratu āśrayāṇi api godohana ādīni phala saṃyogāt anityāni evam udgītha ādi upāsanāni api iti draṣṭavyam
atas eva ca kalpasūtra kārāḥ na evaṃjātīyakāni upāsanāni kratuṣu kalpayāṃcakruḥ
pradāna vat eva tat uktam
pradāna adhikaraṇam
vājasaneyake vadiṣyāmi eva aham iti vāc dadhre iti atra adhyātmam vāc ādīnām prāṇaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ adhidaivatam agni ādīnām vāyuḥ
tathā chāndogye vāyuḥ vāva saṃvargaḥ iti atra adhidaivatam agni ādīnām vāyuḥ saṃvargaḥ prāṇaḥ vāva saṃvargaḥ iti atra adhyātmam vāc ādīnām prāṇaḥ
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim pṛthak eva imau vāyu prāṇau upagantavyau syātām uta apṛthak iti
apṛthak iti tāvat prāptam tattva abhedāt
na hi abhinne tattve pṛthak anucintanam nyāyyam
darśayati ca śrutiḥ adhyātmam adhidaivatam ca tattva abhedam agniḥ vāc bhūtvā mukham prāviśat iti ārabhya
tathā te ete sarve eva samāḥ sarve nantāḥ iti ādhyātmikānām prāṇānām ādhidaivikīm vibhūtim ātma bhūtām darśayati
tathā anyatra api tatra tatra adhyātmam adhidaivatam ca bahudhā tattva abheda darśanam bhavati
kvacid ca yaḥ prāṇaḥ sa vāyuḥ iti spaṣṭam eva vāyum prāṇam ca ekam karoti
tathā udāhṛte pi vājasaneyi brāhmaṇe yatas ca udeti sūryaḥ iti asmin upasaṃhāra śloke prāṇāt vai eṣaḥ udeti prāṇe stameti iti prāṇena eva upasaṃharan ekatvam darśayati
tasmāt ekam eva vratam caret prāṇyāt ca eva apānyāt ca iti ca prāṇa vratena eva ekena upasaṃharan etat eva draḍhayati
tathā chāndogye pi parastāt mahātmanaḥ caturaḥ devaḥ ekaḥ kaḥ sa jagāra bhuvanasya gopāḥ iti ekam eva saṃvargam gayam ati
na bravīti ekaḥ eva eṣām caturṇām saṃvargaḥ aparaḥ pareṣām iti
tasmāt apṛthak tvam upagamanasya iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ pṛthak eva vāyu prāṇau upagantavyau iti
kasmāt
pṛthak upadeśāt
ādhyāna arthaḥ hi ayam adhyātma adhidaiva vibhāga upadeśaḥ
saḥ asatya adhyāna pṛthaktve anarthakaḥ eva syāt
nanu uktam apṛthak anucintanam tattva abhedāt iti na eṣa doṣaḥ
tattva abhede pi avasthā bhedāt upadeśa bheda vaśena anucintana bheda upapatteḥ śloka upanyāsasya ca tattva abheda abhiprāyeṇa api upapadyamānasya pūrva udita dhyeya bheda nirākaraṇa sāmarthya abhāvāt sa yathā eṣām prāṇānām madhyamaḥ prāṇaḥ evam etāsām devatānām vāyuḥ iti ca upamāna upameya karaṇāt
etena vrata upanyāsaḥ vyākhyātaḥ
ekam eva vratam iti ca eva kāraḥ vāc ādi vrata nivartanena prāṇa vrata pratipatti arthaḥ
bhagna vratāni hi vāc ādīni uktāni tāni mṛtyuḥ śramaḥ bhūtvā upayeme iti śruteḥ
na vāyu vrata nivṛtti arthaḥ atha atas vrata mīmāṃsā iti prastutya tulya vat vāyu prāṇayoḥ abhagna vrata tvasya nirdhārita tvāt
ekam eva vratam caret iti ca uktvā tena u etasyai devatāyai sāyujyam salokatām jayati iti vāyu prāptim phalam bruvan vāyuvratam anivartitam darśayati
devatā iti atra vāyuḥ syāt aparicchinna ātmaka tvasya purastāt prayogāt ca sā eṣā an astamitā devatā yat vāyuḥ iti
tathā tau vai etau dvau saṃvargau vāyuḥ eva deveṣu prāṇaḥ prāṇeṣu iti bhedena vyapadiśati
te vai ete pañca anye pañca anye daśa santaḥ tat kṛtam iti ca bhedena eva upasaṃharati
tasmāt pṛthak eva upagamanam
pradāna vat yathā indrāya rājñe puroḍāśam ekādaśa kapālam indrāya adhirājāya indrāya sva rājñe iti asyām tri puroḍāśinyām iṣṭau sarveṣām abhigamayan avadyati a chaṃbaṭkāram iti atas vacanāt indra abhedāt ca saha pradāna āśaṅkāyām rāja ādi guṇa bhedāt yājyā anuvākyā vyatyāsa vidhānāt ca yathānyāsam eva devatā pṛthaktvāt pradāna pṛthaktvam bhavati
evam tattva abhede pi ādhyeya aṃśa pṛthaktvāt ādhyāna pṛthaktvam iti arthaḥ
tat uktam saṃkarṣe nānā vā devatā pṛthak jñānāt iti
tatra tu dravya devatā bhedāt yāga bhedaḥ vidyate
na evam iha vidyā bhedaḥ sti upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām adhyātma adhidaiva upadeśeṣu eka vidyā vidhāna pratīteḥ
vidyā aikye tu adhyātma adhidaiva bhedāt pravṛtti bhedaḥ bhavati agnihotre iva sāyaṃprātar kāla bhedāt iti etāvat abhipretya pradāna vat iti uktam
liṅga bhūyaḥ tvāt tat hi balīyaḥ tāt api
liṅga bhūyaḥ tva adhikaraṇam
vājasaneyinaḥ gnirahasye na eva vai idam agre sadā āsīt iti etasmin brāhmaṇe manaḥ dhikṛtya adhīyate tat ṣaṭtriṃśatam sahasrāṇi apaśyat ātmanaḥ gnīn arkān manaḥ mayān manaḥ citaḥ ityādi
tathā eva vāc citaḥ prāṇa citaḥ cakṣuḥ citaḥ śrotra citaḥ karma citaḥ gni citaḥ iti pṛthak agnīn āmananti sāṃpādikān
teṣu saṃśayaḥ kim ete manaḥ cit ādayaḥ kriyā anupraveśinaḥ tad śeṣa bhūtāḥ uta svatantrāḥ kevala vidyā ātmakāḥ iti
tatra prakaraṇāt kriyā anupraveśe prāpte svātantryam tāvat pratijānīte liṅga bhūyaḥ tvāt iti
bhūyāṃsi hi liṅgāni asmin brāhmaṇe kevala vidyā ātmaka tvam eṣām upodbalayanti dṛśyante tat yat kiṃca imāni bhūtāni manasā saṃkalpayanti teṣām eva sā kṛtiḥ iti tān ha etān evaṃvide sarvadā sarvāṇi bhūtāni cinvanti api svapate iti ca evaṃjātīyakāni
tat hi liṅgam prakaraṇāt balīyaḥ
tat api uktam pūrvasmin kāṇḍe śruti liṅga vākya prakaraṇa sthāna samākhyānām samavāye pāra daurbalyam artha viprakarṣāt iti
pūrva vikalpaḥ prakaraṇāt syāt kriyā mānasa vat
na etat yuktam svatantrāḥ ete gnayaḥ an anya śeṣa bhūtāḥ iti
pūrvasya kriyā mayasya agneḥ prakaraṇāt tad viṣayaḥ eva ayam vikalpa viśeṣa upadeśaḥ syāt na svatantraḥ
nanu prakaraṇāt liṅgam balīyaḥ satyam evam etat
liṅgam api tu evaṃjātīyakam na prakaraṇāt balīyaḥ bhavati
anya artha darśanam hi etat sāṃpādika agni praśaṃsā rūpa tvāt
anya artha darśanam ca asatyām anyasyām prāptau guṇa vādena api upapadyamānam na prakaraṇam bādhitum utsahate
tasmāt sāṃpādikāḥ api ete gnayaḥ prakaraṇa atikraya anupraveśinaḥ eva syuḥ
mānasa vat yathā daśarātrasya daśame hani avivākye pṛthivyā pātreṇa samudrasya somasya prajāpataye devatāyai gṛhyamāṇasya grahaṇa āsādana havana āharaṇa upahvāna bhakṣaṇāni mānasāni eva āmnāyante sa ca mānasaḥ api graha kalpaḥ kriyā prakaraṇāt kriyā śeṣaḥ eva bhavati evam ayam api agni kalpaḥ iti arthaḥ
atideśāt ca
atideśaḥ ca eṣām agnīnām kriyā anupraveśam upodbalayati ṣaṭtriṃśat sahasrāṇi agnayaḥ rkāḥ teṣām ekaikaḥ eva tāvān yāvān asau pūrvaḥ iti
sati hi sāmānye atideśaḥ pravartate
tatas ca pūrveṇa iṣṭakā citena kriyā anupraveśinā agninā sāṃpādikān agnīn atidiśan kriyā anupraveśam eva eṣām dyotayati
vidyā eva tu nirdhāraṇāt
tu śabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati
vidyā ātmakāḥ eva ete svatantrāḥ manaḥ cit ādayaḥ gnayaḥ syuḥ na kriyā śeṣa bhūtāḥ
tathā hi nirdhārayati te ha ete vidyā citaḥ eva iti vidyayā ha eva ete evaṃvidaḥ citāḥ bhavanti iti ca
darśanāt ca
dṛśyate ca eteṣām svātantrye liṅgam
tat purastāt darśitam liṅga bhūyaḥ tvāt iti atra
nanu liṅgam api asatyām anyasyām prāptau asādhakam kasyacid arthasya iti apāsya tat prakaraṇa sāmarthyāt kriyā śeṣa tvam adhyavasitam iti atas uttaram paṭhati
śruti ādi balīyaḥ tvāt ca na bādhaḥ
na evam prakaraṇa sāmarthya atikraya aśeṣa tvam adhyavasāya svātantrya pakṣaḥ bādhitavyaḥ śruti ādeḥ balīyaḥ tvāt
balīyāṃsi hi prakaraṇāt śruti liṅga vākyāni iti sthitam śruti liṅga sūtre
tāni ca iha svātantrya pakṣam sādhayanti dṛśyante
katham
śrutiḥ tāvat te ha ete vidyā citaḥ eva iti
tathā liṅgam sarvadā sarvāṇi bhūtāni cinvanti api svapate iti
tathā vākyam api vidyayā ha eva ete evaṃvidaḥ citāḥ bhavanti iti
vidyā citaḥ eva iti hi sa avadhāraṇām iyam śrutiḥ kriyā anupraveśe mīṣām abhyupagamyamāne pīḍitā syāt
nanu abāhya sādhanatva abhiprāyam idam avadhāraṇam bhaviṣyati
text2:
juhoti iti vidhi uddeśa gataḥ gihotra śabdaḥ tadvat bhāvam vidhāpayet iti
yuktā tad dharma prāptiḥ iha arthavāda gataḥ gihotra śabdaḥ a tadvat bhāvam vidhāpayitum arhati tad dharma prāptau ca abhyupagamyamāāyām agi uddharaṇa ādayaḥ api prāpyera a ca asti saṃbhavaḥ agi uddharaṇam tāvat homa adhikaraṇa bhāvāya
ca ayam agau homaḥ bhoja ārtha tā vyāghāta prasaṅgāt bhoja ārtha upaīta dravya saṃbadhāt ca āsyaḥ eva eṣa homaḥ tathā ca jābāla śrutiḥ pūrvaḥ utithibhyaḥ uśīyāt iti āsya ādhārām eva imām homaiḥ vṛttim darśayati atas
eva ca iha api darśayati uraḥ eva vediḥ lomāi barhiḥ hṛdayam gārhapatyaḥ āsyam āhavaīyaḥ iti vedi śrutiḥ ca atra sthaṇḍila mātra upalakṣaṇa arthā draṣṭavyā mukhya āgihotre vedi abhāvāt tad aṅgāām ca
iha ca saṃpipādayiṣita tvāt ca saṃyogāt upasthā ādayaḥ dharmāḥ kecid kathaṃcid virudhyate tasmāt bhoja a pakṣe eva ete matra dravya devatā saṃyogāt pañca homāḥ
yat tu ādara darśa avacaam tat bhoja a pakṣe prāthamya vidhā artham a hi asti vacaasya atibhāraḥ a tu asya ityatā śakyate darśayitum tasmāt bhoja a lope lopaḥ eva
prāṇa gihotrasya iti pṛthak hi a pratibadhaḥ phalam taiḥ dhāraṇa adhikaraṇam sati karma aṅga vyapāśrayāṇi om iti etat akṣaram udgītham upāsīta iti evamādīi kim syuḥ karmasu parṇa mayī tva ādi vat uta godoha ādi vat iti vicārayāmaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam ityāi iti kutas prayoga vaca a parigrahāt hi udgītha ādi dvāreṇa kratu saṃbandhāt aṅga atara vat saṃspṛśyate yat tu eṣām sva vākyeṣu phala śravaṇam āpayitā ha vai
bhavati ityādi tat vartamāna apadeśa rūpatvāt arthavāda mātram eva apāpa śloka śravaṇa ādi vat tasmāt a prakaraṇa paṭhitāām api juhū ādi dvāreṇa kratu praveśāt
prakaraṇa paṭhita vat ityatā evam udgītha ādi upāsāām api iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ taiḥ dhāraṇāiyamaḥ iti udgītha ādi karma guṇa yāthātmyaiḥ dhāraṇāi rasatamaḥ āptiḥ samṛddhiḥ mukhya prāṇaḥ ādityaḥ iti evamādi ityavat karmasu iyamyera kutas
tad dṛṣṭeḥ tathā hi aityatvam evaṃjātīyakāām darśayati śrutiḥ kurutaḥ yaḥ ca etat evam veda yaḥ ca a veda iti a viduṣaḥ api kriyā abhyaujñāāt prastāva ādi devatā vijñā a vihīāām api prastotṛ ādīām yāja ādhyavasā adarśaāt prastotar yāḥ devatā
prastāvam avāyattā tām ced avidvā prastoṣyasi tām ced avidvā udgāsyasi tām ced avidvā pratihariṣyasi iti ca api ca evaṃjātīyakasya karma vyapāśrayasya vijñāasya pṛthak eva karmaṇaḥ phalam upalabhyate karma phala siddhi a pratibadhaḥ tad samṛddhiḥ atiśaya viśeṣaḥ kaścid
te ubhau kurutaḥ yaḥ ca etat evam veda yaḥ ca a veda tu vidyā ca avidyā ca yat eva vidyayā karoti śraddhayā upaiṣadā tat eva vīryavattaram bhavati iti
tu iti vidvat avidvat prayogayoḥ iti ca tarap pratyaya prayogāt iti ca tarap pratyaya prayogāt vīryavat iti gamyate tat ca aityatve vidyāyāḥ upapadyate ityatve tu katham tad vihīam karma
sarva aṅga upasaṃhāre hi vīryavat karma iti sthitiḥ tathā loka sāma ādiṣu śiṣyate kalpate ha asmai lokāḥ ūrdhvāḥ ca āvṛttāḥ ca iti evamādi a ca idam phala śravaṇam arthavāda mātram
yuktam pratipattum tathā hi guṇa vādaḥ āpadyeta phala upadeśe tu mukhya vāda upapattiḥ prayāja ādiṣu tu itikartavya tā ākāṅkṣasya kratoḥ prakṛta tvāt tādarthye sati yuktam phala śruteḥ arthavāda tvam tathā a ārabhya adhīteṣu api
parṇa mayī tva ādiṣu hi godoha ādīām akriyā ātmakāām āśrayam atareṇa godoha ādīām hi prakṛta appraṇaya ādi āśraya lābhāt phala vidhiḥ tathā bailva ādīām api prakṛta yūpa ādi āśraya lābhāt upapaaḥ phala vidhiḥ a tu parṇa mayī tva ādiṣu evaṃvidhaḥ kaścid āśrayaḥ prakṛtaḥ asti
tu juhū ādi āśrayatām vivakṣitvā phale api vidhim vivakṣataḥ vākya bhedaḥ syāt upāsaāām tu kriyā ātmaka tvāt viśiṣṭa vidhā upapatteḥ udgītha ādi āśrayāṇām phale virudhyate tasmāt yathā
kratu āśrayāṇi api phala saṃyogāt aityāi evam udgītha ādi upāsaāi api iti draṣṭavyam atas eva ca kalpasūtra kārāḥ kratuṣu kalpayāṃcakruḥ tat uktam pradā adhikaraṇam vājasaeyaka vat iṣyāmi eva aham iti vāc dadhre iti atra adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam adhyātmam a
vāc ādīām prāṇaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ uvadhāritaḥ adhidaivatam agi ādīām vāyuḥ tathā chādogyā iva āyuḥ vāva saṃvargaḥ iti atra adhidaivatam vāyuḥ saṃvargaḥ iti atra adhidaivatam prāṇaḥ vāva saṃvargaḥ iti atra adhyātmam vāc ādīām prāṇaḥ
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim pṛthak eva imau vāyu prāṇau upagatavyau syātām uta apṛthak iti apṛthak iti tāvat prāptam tattva abhedāt hi tattve yāyyam darśayati ca śrutiḥ
adhyātmam adhidaivatam ca tattva abhedam agiḥ vāc bhūtvā mukham prāviśat iti ārabhya tathā atas ete sarve eva samāḥ iti ādhyātmikāām prāṇāām ādhidaivikīm vibhūtim ātma bhūtām darśayati tathā
tatra tatra adhyātmam adhidaivatam ca bahudhā tattva abheda darśaam bhavati kvacid cayaḥ prāṇaḥ sa vāyuḥ iti spaṣṭam eva vāyum prāṇam ca ekam karoti tathā
udāhṛte api vājasaeyibrāhmaṇeyataḥ ca udeti sūryaḥ iti asmi upasaṃhāra śloke prāṇāt vai eṣaḥ udeti prāṇeḥ tam eti iti upasaṃhare ekatvam darśayati tasmāt ekam eva vratam caret prāṇyāt ca eva apāyāt ca iti ca prāṇa vrate eva eke upasaṃhare etat eva
draḍhayati tathā chādogye pi devaḥ ekaḥ kaḥ sa jagāra bhuvaḥ asya gopāḥ iti ekam eva saṃvargam gayamati bravīti ekaḥ eva eṣām caturṇām
saṃvargaḥ apara upareṣām iti tasmāt apṛthaktvam upagama asya iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ pṛthak eva vāyu prāṇau upagatavyau iti kasmāt pṛthak upadeśāt hi ayam adhyātma adhidaiva vibhāga upadeśaḥ saḥ asatya ādhyā apṛthaktve aarthakaḥ eva syāt uktam
tattva abhedāt iti doṣaḥ tattva abhede pi avasthā bhedāt aucita abheda upapatteḥ śloka upayāsasya ca tattva abheda abhiprāyeṇa api upapadyamānasya pūrva udita dhyeya bhedaiḥ ākaraṇa sāmarthya abhāvāt sa yathā eṣām prāṇāām madhyamaḥ prāṇaḥ evam etāsām devatāām vāyuḥ iti
ca upamā opameya karaṇāt vrata upayāsaḥ vyākhyātaḥ ekam eva vratam iti ca eva kāraḥ prāṇa vrata pratipatti arthaḥ bhaga vratāi hi mṛtyuḥ śramaḥ bhūtvā upayeme iti śruteḥ
a vāyu vrata evṛtti arthaḥ atha atas vrata mīmāṃsā iti prastutya tulya vat vāyu prāṇayoḥ abhaga vrata tvasya ekam eva vratam caret iti ca uktvā eva etasyai devatāyai sāyujyam salokatām jayati iti vāyu prāptim
phalam bruva darśayati devatā iti atra vāyuḥ syāt purastāt prayogāt ca sā eṣā astamitā devatā yat vāyuḥ iti tathā atau vai etau dvau saṃvargau vāyuḥ eva
deveṣu prāṇaḥ prāṇeṣu iti vyapadiśati te vai ete pañcāye pañcāye daśa sataḥ tat kṛtam iti ca upasaṃharati tasmāt pṛthak eva yathā idrāya
rājñe puroḍāśam ekādaśa kapālam idrāya adhirājāya idrāya sva rājñe iti asyām ityatas idrā bhedāt ca saha pradā āśaṅkāyām rāja ādi guṇa bhedāt yathāyāsam eva devatā pṛthaktvāt pradā a pṛthaktvam bhavati evam tattva abhede pi ādhyeya aṃśa pṛthaktvāt ādhyā apṛthaktvam iti arthaḥ tat uktam saṃkarṣe
vā devatā iti tatra tu dravya devatā bhedāt yāga bhedaḥ vidyate aivam iha vidyā bhedaḥ usti upakrama upasaṃhārābhyām adhyātma adhidaiva upadeśeṣu ekavidyā vidhā apratīteḥ vidyā aikye api tu adhyātma adhidaiva bhedāt pravṛtti bhedaḥ bhavati
a gihotre iva sāyam prātar kāla bhedāt iti etāvat abhipretya pradāa vat iti uktam liṅga bhūyaḥ tvāt tat hi balīyaḥ tāt api liṅga bhūyaḥ tva adhikaraṇam vājasaeyi ogi rahasye eva vai idam agre sadā āsīt iti etasmin brāhmaṇe adhīyate tat ṣaṭtriṃśatam sahasrāṇi apaśyat ātma ogī arka ama oma yāma aścitaḥ
ityādi tathā eva vāc citaḥ prāṇa citaḥ cakṣuḥ citaḥ śrotra citaḥ karma citaḥ ogi citaḥ iti pṛthak agī sāṃpādikā teṣu saṃśayaḥ kim ete tad śeṣa bhūtāḥ uta svatatrāḥ kevala vidyā ātmakāḥ iti tatra
prakaraṇāt kriyā upraveśe prāpte svātatryam tāvat pratijāīte liṅga bhūyaḥ tvāt iti bhūyāṃsi hi liṅgāi asmin brāhmaṇe kevalavidyā ātmaka tvam eṣām upodbalayati dṛśyate tat yat kiṃca imāi bhūtāi saṃkalpayati teṣām eva sā kṛtiḥ iti tā aha etāḥ evaṃvide
sarvadā sarvāṇi svapate iti ca evaṃjātīyakāi tat hi liṅgam prakaraṇāt balīyaḥ tat api uktam pūrvasmin kāṇḍe samavāye pāra daurbalyam artha viprakarṣāt iti pūrva vikalpaḥ prakaraṇāt syāt
kriyā svatatrāḥ etegayaḥ iti pūrvasya kriyā mayasya ageḥ prakaraṇāt tad viṣayaḥ eva ayam vikalpa viśeṣa upadeśaḥ syāt a svatatraḥ prakaraṇāt liṅgam
balīyaḥ satyam evam etat liṅgam api tu evaṃjātīyakam a prakaraṇāt balīyaḥ bhavati hi etat sāṃpādika āgi praśaṃsā rūpa tvāt ca asatyām ayasyām prāptau a prakaraṇam bādhitum utsahate
tasmāt sāṃpādikāḥ api etegayaḥ eva syuḥ māasa vat yathā daśarātrasya avivākye pṛthivyā pātreṇa samudrasya somasya prajāpataye devatāyai gṛhyamāṇasya māasāya iva
sa ca graha kalpaḥ kriyā prakaraṇāt kriyā śeṣaḥ eva bhavati evam ayam api agi kalpaḥ iti arthaḥ atideśāt ca atideśaḥ ca eṣām agīām kriyā upraveśam upodbalayati ṣaṭtriṃśat sahasrāṇi agayoḥ ṛkāḥ teṣām ekaikaḥ eva iti
sati hi sāmāye atideśaḥ pravartate tatas ca pūrveṇa eṣām dyotayati vidyā eva tu tuśabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati
vidyā ātmakāḥ eva ete svatatrāḥ maaścit āda yogayaḥ syuḥ a kriyā śeṣa bhūtāḥ tathā hi te ha ete vidyā citaḥ eva iti vidyayā ha eva ete evaṃvidaḥ citā bhavati iti
ca darśaāt ca dṛśyate ca eteṣām svātatrye liṅgam tat purastāt darśitam liṅga bhūyaḥ tvāt iti atra liṅgam api asatyām ayasyām prāptau asādhakam kasyacid arthasya iti apāsya tat prakaraṇa sāmarthyāt kriyā śeṣa tvam adhyavasitam
iti atas uttaram paṭhati śruti ādi balīyaḥ tvāt ca prakaraṇa sāmarthya atikraya aśeṣa tvam adhyavasāya svātatrya pakṣaḥ bādhitavyaḥ śruti ādeḥ balīyaḥ tvāt balīyāṃsi hi prakaraṇāt śruti liṅga vākyāi iti sthitam śruti liṅga sūtre ca iha
svātatrya pakṣam sādhayati dṛśyate katham śrutiḥ tāvat te ha ete vidyā citaḥ eva iti tathā liṅgam sarvadā sarvāṇi bhūtāi svapate iti tathā vākyam api

iti iyatā kṛta tvāt aarthakam avadhāraṇam bhavet sva rūpam eva hi eṣām abāhya sādhaatvam iti abāhya sādhaatve pi tu māasagraha vat avadhāraṇam arthavat bhaviṣyati

text1:
kṛta tvāt anarthakam avadhāraṇam bhavet sva rūpam eva hi eṣām abāhya sādhanatvam iti
abāhya sādhana tve tu mānasa graha vat kriyā anupraveśa śaṅkāyām tad nivṛtti phalam avadhāraṇam arthavat bhaviṣyati
tathā svapate jāgrate ca evaṃvide sarvadā sarvāṇi

text1:
iti sātatya darśanam eṣām svātantrye yathā sāṃpādike vāc prāṇa maye gnihotre prāṇam tadā vāci juhoti
vācam tadā prāṇe juhoti iti ca uktvā ucyate ete anante amṛte āhutī jāgrat ca svapan ca satatam juhoti iti tadvat
kriyā anupraveśe tu kriyā prayogasya alpa kāla tvāt na sātatyena eṣām prayogaḥ kalpeta
na ca idam arthavāda mātram iti nyāyyam
yatra hi vispaṣṭaḥ vidhāyakaḥ liṅ ādiḥ upalabhyate yuktam tatra saṃkīrtana mātrasya arthavāda tvam
iha tu vispaṣṭa vidhi antara anupalabdheḥ saṃkīrtanāt eva eṣām vijñāna vidhānam kalpanīyam
tat ca yathā saṃkīrtanam eva kalpayitum śakyate iti sātatya darśanāt tathābhūtam eva kalpyate
tatas ca sāmarthyāt eṣām svātantrya siddhiḥ
etena tat yat kiṃca imāni bhūtāni manasā saṃkalpayanti teṣām eva sā kṛtiḥ ityādi vyākhyātam
tathā vākyam api evaṃvide iti puruṣa viśeṣa saṃbandham eva eṣām ācakṣāṇam na kratu saṃbandham mṛṣyate
tasmāt svātantrya pakṣaḥ eva jyāyān iti
anubandha ādibhyaḥ prajñā antara pṛthaktva vat dṛṣṭaḥ ca tat uktam
itas ca prakaraṇam upamṛdya svātantryam manaḥ cit ādīnām pratipattavyam yat kriyā avayavān manaḥ ādi vyāpāreṣu anubadhnāti te manasā eva ādhīyanta manasā acīyanta manasā eva grahāḥ agṛhyanta
text2:
iti sātatya darśam eṣām svātatrī eva kalpate yathā sāṃpādike vāc prāṇa maye gihotre prāṇam tadā vāci juhoti vācam tadā prāṇe juhoti iti ca uktvā
ucyate ete aate amṛte āhutī jāgrat ca svapan ca satatam juhoti iti tadvat tu kriyā prayogasya alpa kāla tvāt eṣām prayogaḥ kalpeta
ca idam arthavāda mātram iti yāyyam yatra hi vispaṣṭaḥ vidhāyakaḥ liṅ ādiḥ upalabhyate yuktam tatra saṃkīrtaa mātrasya arthavāda tvam iha tu eṣām
tat ca yathā saṃkīrtaam eva kalpayitum śakyate iti sātatya darśaāt tathābhūtam eva kalpyate tatas ca sāmarthyāt eṣām svātatrya siddhiḥ saṃkalpayati teṣām eva sā kṛtiḥ ityādi vyākhyātam
tathā vākyam api evaṃvide iti puruṣa viśeṣa saṃbadham eva eṣām ācakṣāṇam a kratu saṃbadham mṛṣyate tasmāt svātatrya pakṣaḥ eva jyāyāḥ iti aubadha ādibhyaḥ prajñātara pṛthaktva vat dṛṣṭaḥ ca tat uktam itas ca prakaraṇam upamṛdya svātatryam pratipattavyam
yat kriyā avayavāḥ te maasā eva adhīyata maasā acīyata maasā eva grahāḥ agṛhyata

text1:
saṃpad phalaḥ hi ayam anubandhaḥ
na ca pratyakṣāḥ kriyā avayavāḥ santaḥ saṃpadā lipsitavyāḥ
na ca atra udgītha ādi upāsana vat kriyā aṅga saṃbandhāt tad anupraveśi tvam āśaṅkitavyam śruti vairūpyāt
na hi atra kriyā aṅgam kiṃcid ādāya tasmin adaḥ nāma adhyavasitavyam iti vadati
ṣaṭtriṃśat sahasrāṇi tu
text2:
saṃpad phalaḥ hi ayam aubadhaḥ ca pratyakṣāḥ kriyā avayavāḥ sataḥ saṃpadā lipsitavyāḥ ca atra udgītha ādi upāsa avat tad aupraveśi tvam āśaṅkitavyam śruti vairūpyāt
a hi atra kriyā aṅgam kiṃcid ādāya vadati ṣaṭtriṃśat sahasrāṇi tu

text1:
graha ādīn ca kalpayati puruṣa yajña ādi vat
saṃkhyā ca iyam puruṣa āyuṣasya ahar su dṛṣṭā satī tad saṃbandhinīṣu manaḥ vṛttiṣu āropyate iti draṣṭavyam
evam anubandhāt svātantryam manaḥ cit ādīnām
ādi śabdāt atideśa ādi api yathāsaṃbhavam yojayitavyam
tathā hi teṣām ekaikaḥ eva tāvān yāvān asau pūrvaḥ iti kriyā mayasya agneḥ māhātmyam
text2:
graha ādīn ca kalpayati puruṣa yajña ādi vat saṃkhyā ca iyam
puruṣa āyuṣasya ahar su dṛṣṭā satī āropyate iti draṣṭavyam eva aubadhāt svātatryam ādi śabdāt atideśa ādi api yathāsaṃbhavam yojayitavyam tathā hi teṣām ekaikaḥ eva iti kriyā mayasya āgeḥ māhātmyam

text1:
atidiśan kriyāyām anādaram darśayati
na ca sati eva kriyā saṃbandhe vikalpaḥ pūrveṇa uttareṣām iti śakyam vaktum
na hi yena vyāpāreṇa
text2: atidiśa kriyāyām a ādaram darśayati a ca sati eva vikalpaḥ pūrveṇa uttareṣām iti śakyam vaktum hi vyāpāreṇa

text1:
pūrvaḥ kriyāyām upakaroti tena uttare upakartum śaknuvanti
yat tu pūrvapakṣe pi atideśaḥ upodbalakaḥ iti uktam sati hi sāmānye tideśaḥ pravartate iti tat asmad pakṣe pi agni tva sāmānyena atideśa saṃbhavāt pratyuktam asti hi sāṃpādikānām api agnīnām agni tvam iti
śruti ādīni ca
text2:
pūrvaḥ kriyāyām upakaroti
uttare upakartum śakuvati yat tu pūrvapakṣe pi atideśaḥ upodbalakaḥ iti uktam sati hi sāmāyā itideśaḥ pravartate iti tat asmad pakṣe pi agitva sāmāyeātideśa saṃbhavāt pratyuktam asti hi ca

text1: evam anubandha ādibhyaḥ kāraṇebhyaḥ svātantrya

text1:
i pṛthak eva karmabhyaḥ prajñā antarebhyaḥ ca svatantrāṇi bhavanti evam iti
dṛṣṭaḥ ca aveṣṭeḥ rājasūya prakaraṇa paṭhitāyāḥ prakaraṇāt utkarṣaḥ varṇa traya anubandhāt
rājayajña tvāt ca rājasūyasya
tat uktam prathame kāṇḍe kratu arthāyām iti ced na varṇa traya saṃyogāt iti
na sāmānyāt api upalabdheḥ mṛtyu vat na hi loka āpattiḥ
yat uktam mānasa vat iti tat pratyucyate
na mānasa graha sāmānyāt api manaḥ cit ādīnām kriyā śeṣa tvam kalpyam pūrva uktebhyaḥ śruti ādi hetubhyaḥ kevala puruṣa artha tva upalabdheḥ
na hi kiṃcid kasyacid kenacid sāmānyam na saṃbhavati
na ca tāvatā yathāsvam vaiṣamyam nivartate
mṛtyu vat yathā sa vai eṣaḥ eva mṛtyuḥ yaḥ eṣaḥ etasmin maṇḍale puruṣaḥ iti agniḥ vai mṛtyuḥ iti ca agni āditya puruṣayoḥ samāne mṛtyu śabda prayoge na atyanta sāmya āpattiḥ
yathā ca asau vāva lokaḥ gautama agniḥ tasya ādityaḥ eva samidh iti atra na samidh ādi sāmānyāt lokasya agni bhāva āpattiḥ tadvat
pareṇa ca śabdasya tādvidhyam bhūyaḥ tvāt tu anubandhaḥ
parastāt api ayam vāva loke eṣaḥ gniḥ citaḥ iti asmin anantare brāhmaṇe tādvidhyam kevala vidyā vidhi tvam śabdasya prayojanam lakṣyate na śuddha karma aṅga vidhi tvam
tatra hi vidyayā tat ārohanti yatra kāmāḥ parāgatāḥ
na tatra dakṣiṇāḥ yanti na a vidvāṃsaḥ tapasvaniḥ iti anena ślokena kevalam karma nindan vidyām ca praśaṃsan idam gamayati
tathā purastāt api yat etat maṇḍalam tapati iti asmin brāhmaṇe vidyā pradhāna tvam eva lakṣyate saḥ mṛtaḥ bhavati mṛtyuḥ hi asya ātmā bhavati iti vidyā phalena eva upasaṃhārāt na karma pradhāna tā
tad sāmānyāt iha api tathātvam
bhūyān tu agni avayavāḥ saṃpādayitavyāḥ vidyāyām iti etasmāt kāraṇāt agninā anubadhyate vidyā na karma aṅga tvāt
tasmāt manaḥ cit ādīnām kevala vidyā ātmaka tva siddhiḥ
eka ātmanaḥ śarīre bhāvāt
śarīrebhāva adhikaraṇam
iha deha vyatiriktasya ātmanaḥ sadbhāvaḥ samarthyate bandha mokṣa adhikāra siddhaye
na hi asati deha vyatirikte ātmani para loka phalāḥ codanāḥ upapadyeran
kasya vā brahma ātmatvam upadiśyeta
nanu śāstra pramukhe eva prathame pāde śāstra phala upabhoga yogyasya deha vyatiriktasya ātmanaḥ stitvam uktam satyam uktam bhāṣyakṛtā
na tu tatra ātma astitve sūtram asti
iha tu svayam eva sūtrakṛtā tat astitvam ākṣepa puraḥsaram pratiṣṭhāpitam
itas eva ca ākṛṣya ācāryeṇa śabarasvāminā pramāṇa lakṣaṇe varṇitam
atas eva ca bhagavatā upavarṣeṇa prathame tantre ātma astitva abhidhāna prasaktau śārīrake vakṣyāmaḥ iti uddhāraḥ kṛtaḥ
iha ca idam codanā lakṣaṇeṣu upāsaneṣu vicāryamāṇeṣu ātma astitvam vicāryate kṛtsna śāstra śeṣa tva pradarśanāya
api ca pūrvasmin adhikaraṇe prakaraṇa utkarṣa abhyupagamena manaḥ cit ādīnām puruṣa artha tvam varṇitam
kaḥ sau puruṣaḥ yad arthāḥ ete manaḥ cit ādayaḥ iti asyām prasaktau idam deha vyatiriktasya ātmanaḥ stitvam ucyate
tad astitva ākṣepa artham idam ādimam sūtram ākṣepa pūrvikā hi parihāra uktiḥ vivakṣite rthe sthūṇā nikhanana nyāyena dṛḍhām buddhim utpādayet iti
atra eke deha mātra ātma darśinaḥ lokāyatikāḥ deha vyatiriktasya ātmanaḥ bhāvam manyamānāḥ samasta vyasteṣu bāhyeṣu pṛthivī ādiṣu adṛṣṭam api caitanyam śarīra ākāra pariṇateṣu bhūteṣu syāt iti saṃbhāvayantaḥ tebhyaḥ caitanyam mada śakti vat vijñānam caitanya viśiṣṭaḥ kāyaḥ puruṣaḥ iti ca āhuḥ
na svarga gamanāya apavarga gamanāya vā samarthaḥ deha vyatiriktaḥ ātmā asti yat kṛtam caitanyam dehe syāt
dehaḥ eva tu cetanaḥ ca ātmā ca iti pratijānate
hetum ca ācakṣate śarīre bhāvāt iti yat hi yasmin sati bhavati asati ca na bhavati tat tad dharma tvena adhyavasīyate yathā agni dharmau auṣṇya prakāśau
prāṇa ceṣṭā caitanya smṛti ādayaḥ ca ātma dharma tvena abhimatāḥ ātma vādinām te pi antar eva dehe upalabhyamānāḥ bahis ca anupalabhyamānāḥ asiddhe deha vyatirikte dharmiṇi deha dharmāḥ eva bhavitum arhanti
tasmāt a vyatirekaḥ dehāt ātmanaḥ iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ
vyatirekaḥ tad bhāva abhāvi tvāt na tu upalabdhi vat
na tu etat asti yat uktam a vyatirekaḥ dehāt ātmanaḥ iti
vyatirekaḥ eva asya dehāt bhavitum arhati
tad bhāva abhāvi tvāt
yadi deha bhāve bhāvāt deha dharma tvam ātma dharmāṇām manyeta tatas deha bhāve
api abhāvāt a tad dharma tvam eva eṣām kim na manyeta
deha dharma vailakṣaṇyāt
ye hi deha dharmāḥ rūpa ādayaḥ te yāvat deham bhavanti
prāṇa ceṣṭā ādayaḥ tu sati api dehe mṛta avasthāyām na bhavanti
deha dharmāḥ ca rūpa ādayaḥ paraiḥ api upalabhyante na tu ātma dharmāḥ caitanya smṛti ādayaḥ
api ca sati hi tāvat dehe jīvat avasthāyām eṣām bhāvaḥ śakyate niścetum na tu asati abhāvaḥ
patite
api kadācid asmin dehe jīvat avasthāyām eṣām bhāvaḥ śakyate niścetum na tu asatya bhāvaḥ
patite
api kadācid asmin dehe deha antara saṃcāreṇa ātma dharmāḥ anuvarteran
saṃśaya mātreṇa pi parapakṣaḥ pratiṣidhyate
kimātmakam ca punar idam caitanyam manyate yasya bhūtebhyaḥ utpattim icchati iti paraḥ paryanuyoktavyaḥ
na hi bhūta catuxṭaya vyatirekeṇa lokāyatikaḥ kiṃcid tattvam pratyeti
yat anubhavanam bhūta bhautikānām tat caitanyam iti ced tarhi viṣaya tvāt teṣām na tad dharma tvam svātmani kriyā virodhāt
na hi agniḥ uṣṇaḥ san sva ātmānam dahati
na hi naṭaḥ śikṣitaḥ san sva skandham adhirokṭati
na hi bhūta bhautika dharmeṇa satā caitanyena bhūta bhautikāni viṣayīkriyeran
na hi rūpa ādibhiḥ sva rūpam para rūpam vā viṣayīkriyate
viṣayīkriyante tu bāhya ādhyātmikāni bhūta bhautikāni caitanyena
atas ca yathā eva asyāḥ bhūta bhautika viṣayāyāḥ upalabdheḥ
abhyupagamyate evam vyatirekaḥ
api asyāḥ tebhyaḥ
abhyupagantavyaḥ
upalabdhi svarūpaḥ eva ca naḥ ātmā iti ātmanaḥ deha vyatirikta tvam
nitya tvam ca upalabdheḥ aikarūpyāt
yat tu uktam śarīre bhāvāt śarīra dharmaḥ upalabdhiḥ iti tad varṇitena prakāreṇa pratyuktam
api ca satsu pradīpa ādiṣu upakaraṇeṣu upalabdhiḥ bhavati asatsu na bhavati
na ca etāvatā pradīpa ādi dharmaḥ eva upalabdhiḥ bhavati
evam sati dehe upalabdhiḥ bhavati asati ca na bhavati iti na deha dhearmaḥ bhavitum arhati
upakaraṇa tva mātreṇa api pradīpa ādi vat deha upayoga upapatteḥ
na ca atyantam dehasya upalabdhau upayogaḥ
api dṛśyate niśceṣṭaḥ
api asmin dehe svapet nānāvidha upalabdhi darśanāt
tasmāt anavadyam deha vyatiriktasya ātmanaḥ
astitvam
iti triṃśam aikātmya adhikaraṇam
aṅga avabaddhāḥ tu na śākhāsu hi prativedam
aṅga avabaddha adhikaraṇam
samāptā prāsaṅgikī kathā
saṃprati prakṛtām eva anuvartāmahe
om iti etat akṣaram udgītham upāsīta lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāsīta uktham uktham iti vai prajāḥ vadanti tat idam eva uktham iyam eva pṛthivī ayam vāva lokaḥ eṣaḥ gniḥ citaḥ iti evamādyāḥ ye udgītha ādi karma aṅga avabaddhāḥ pratyayāḥ prativedam śākhā bhedeṣu vihitāḥ te tad śākhā gateṣu eva udgītha ādiṣu bhaveyuḥ athavā sarva śākhā gateṣu iti viśayaḥ
pratiśākham ca svara ādi bhedāt udgītha ādi bhedān upādāya ayam upanyāsaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam
sva śākhā gateṣu eva udgītha ādiṣu vidhīyeran iti
kutas
saṃnidhānāt udgītham upasīte iti hi sāmānya vihitānām viśeṣa ākāṅkṣāyām saṃnikṛṣṭena eva sva śākhā gatena viśeṣeṇa ākāṅkṣā ādi nivṛtteḥ tad atilaṅghanena śākhā antara vihita viśeṣa upādāne kāraṇam na asti
tasmāt pratiśākham vyavasthā iti evam prāpte bravīti aṅga avabaddhā astu iti
tu śabdaḥ pakṣam vyāvartayati
na ete prativedam sva śākhāsu eva vyavatiṣṭheran api tu sarva śākhāsu anuvarteran
kutas
udgītha ādi śruti aviśeṣāt
sva śākhā vyavasthāyām hi udgītham upāsīta iti sāmānya śrutiḥ aviśeṣa pravṛttā satī saṃnidhāna vaśena viśeṣe vyavasthāpyamānā pīḍitā syāt
na ca etat nyāyyam
saṃnidhānāt hi śrutiḥ balīyasī
na ca sāmānya āśrayaḥ pratyayaḥ na upapadyate
tasmāt svara ādi bhede sati api udgītha tva ādi aviśeṣāt sarva śākhā gateṣu eva udgītha ādiṣu evaṃjātīyakāḥ pratyayāḥ syuḥ
mantra ādi vat vā virodhaḥ
athavā na eva atra virodhaḥ śaṅkitavyaḥ katham anya śākhā gateṣu udgītha ādiṣu anya śākhā vihitāḥ pratyayāḥ bhaveyuḥ iti mantra ādi vat avirodha upapatteḥ
tathā hi mantrāṇām karmaṇām guṇānām ca śākhā antara utpannānām api śākhā antare upasaṃgrahaḥ dṛśyate
yeṣām api hi śākhinām kuṭaruḥ asi iti aśma ādāna mantraḥ nāmnā ātaḥ teṣām api asau viniyogaḥ dṛśyate kukkuṭaḥ si iti aśmānam ādatte kuṭaruḥ asi iti vā iti
yeṣām api samidh ādayaḥ prayājāḥ na āmnātāḥ teṣām api teṣu guṇa vidhiḥ āmnāyate ṛtavaḥ vai prayājāḥ samānatra hotavyāḥ iti
tathā yeṣām api ajaḥ gnīṣomīyaḥ iti jāti viśeṣa upadeśaḥ na asti teṣām api tad viṣayaḥ mantra varṇaḥ upalabhyate chāgasya vapāyāḥ medasaḥ nubrūhi iti
tathā veda antara utpannānām api agneḥ veḥ hotram veḥ adhvaram iti evamādi mantrāṇām veda antare parigrahaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ
tathā bahvṛca paṭhitasya sūktasya yaḥ jātaḥ eva prathamaḥ manasvān ityasya adhvaryave sajanīyam śasyam iti atra parigrahaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ
tasmāt yathā āśrayāṇām karma aṅgānām sarvatra anuvṛttiḥ evam āśritānām api pratyayānām iti avirodhaḥ
bhūmnaḥ kratu vat jyāyaḥ tvam tathā hi darśayati
bhūma jyāyaḥ tva adhikaraṇam
prācīnaśālaḥ aupamanyavaḥ iti asyām ākhyāyikāyām vyastasya samastasya ca vaiśvānarasya upāsanam śrūyate
vyasta upāsanam tāvat aupamanyava kam tvam ātmānam upāsse iti divam eva bhagavaḥ rājan iti ha uvāca eṣa va
