tu svayam eva sūtrakṛtā tat astitvam ākṣepa puraḥsaram pratiṣṭhāpitam itas eva ca ākṛṣya ācāryeṇa śabarasvāmiā pramāṇa lakṣaṇe varṇitam atas eva ca bhagavatā upavarṣeṇa prathame tatre
ātma astitva abhidhā aprasaktau śārīrake vakṣyāmaḥ iti uddhāraḥ kṛtaḥ iha ca idam vicāryamāṇeṣu ātma astitvam vicāryate api ca pūrvasmin adhikaraṇe prakaraṇa utkarṣa abhyupagame puruṣa artha tvam
varṇitam kaḥ asau puruṣaḥ yad arthāḥ ete maaścit ādayaḥ iti asyām prasaktau idam deha vyatiriktasya ātma ustitvam ucyate tad astitva ākṣepa artham idam ādimam sūtram ākṣepa pūrvikā hi
parihāra uktiḥ vivakṣite rthe dṛḍhām buddhim utpādayet iti atra eke lokāyatikāḥ deha vyatiriktasya bhāvam samasta vyasteṣu bāhyeṣu pṛthivī ādiṣu adṛṣṭam
api caitayam śarīra ākāra pariṇateṣu bhūteṣu syāt iti saṃbhāvayataḥ tebhyaḥ caitayam mada śakti vat caitaya viśiṣṭaḥ kāyaḥ puruṣaḥ iti ca āhuḥ a svarga gamaāya apavarga gamaāya
vā samarthaḥ deha vyatiriktaḥ ātmā asti yat kṛtam dehe syāt dehe eva tu cetaaḥ ca ātmā ca iti hetum ca
ācakṣate śarīre bhāvāt iti yat hi yasmin sati bhavati asati ca a bhavati tat tad dharma tveā adhyavasīyate yathā ca
ātma dharma tveā abhimatāḥ ātmavādiām te pi atarā iva dehe upalabhyamāāḥ bahis ca aupalabhyamāāḥ asiddhe deha vyatirikte dharmiṇi deha dharmāḥ eva bhavitum arhati tasmāt a vyatirekaḥ dehāt
ātmā iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ vyatirekaḥ tad bhāva abhāvi tvā tu upalabdhi vat a tu etat asti yat uktam a vyatirekaḥ dehāt ātmā iti vyatirekaḥ eva
asya dehāt bhavitum arhati tad bhāva abhāvi tvāt yadi deha bhāve bhāvāt deha dharma tvam ātma dharmāṇām tatas deha bhāve api abhāvāt a tad dharma tvam eva eṣām kim
deha dharma vailakṣaṇyāt ye hi deha dharmāḥ rūpa ādayaḥ te yāvat deham bhavati prāṇa ceṣṭā ādayaḥ tu sati api dehe mṛta avasthāyām bhavati deha dharmāḥ ca rūpa ādayaḥ
paraiḥ api upalabhyate a tu ātma dharmāḥ caitaya smṛti ādayaḥ api ca sati hi tāvat dehe jīvat avasthāyām eṣām bhāvaḥ śakyate tvad
asati abhāvaḥ patite api kadācid asmi dehe jīvat avasthāyām eṣām bhāvaḥ śakyate a tu asati abhāvaḥ patite api kadācid asmi dehe
deha atara saṃcāreṇa ātma dharmāḥ parapakṣaḥ pratiṣidhyate kimātmakam ca idam yasya bhūtebhyaḥ utpattim icchati iti paraḥ hi bhūta catuṭaya vyatirekeṇa
lokāyatikaḥ kiṃcid tattvam pratyeti bhūta bhautikāām tat iti ced tarhi viṣaya tvāt teṣām a tad dharma tvam sva ātmai kriyā virodhāt a hi
agiḥ uṣṇaḥ sa sva ātmā am dahati a hi aṭaḥ śikṣitaḥ sa svaskadham adhirokati a hi bhūta bhautika dharmeṇa satā bhūta bhautikāi a
hi rūpa ādibhiḥ sva rūpam para rūpam vā viṣayīkriyate viṣayīkriyate tu atas ca yathā eva asyāḥ bhūta bhautika viṣayāyāḥ upalabdheḥ bhāvaḥ abhyupagamyate evam vyatirekaḥ
api asyāḥ tebhyaḥ abhyupagatavyaḥ upalabdhi svarūpaḥ eva ca deha vyatirikta tvam ca upalabdheḥ aikarūpyāt yat tu uktam śarīre bhāvāt śarīra dharmaḥ upalabdhiḥ
iti prakāreṇa pratyuktam api ca satsu pradīpa ādiṣu upakaraṇeṣu upalabdhiḥ bhavati asatsu a bhavati ca etāvatā pradīpa ādi dharme eva upalabdhiḥ bhavati evam sati deha
upalabdhiḥ bhavati asati ca a bhavati iti a deha dhearmaḥ bhavitum arhati upakaraṇa tva mātreṇa api pradīpa ādi vat deha upayoga upapatteḥ ca atyatam dehasya upalabdhau upayogaḥ api dṛśyate
api asmi dehe svape tasmāt aavadyam deha vyatiriktasya ātmanaḥ astitvam iti triṃśam aikātmya adhikaraṇam aṅga avabaddhāḥ tu a śākhāsu hi prativedam aṅga avabaddha adhikaraṇam samāptā
prāsaṅgikī kathā saṃprati prakṛtām eva āvartāmahe om iti etat akṣaram udgītham upāsīta lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāsīta auktham uktham iti vai prajāḥ vadati tat idam eva uktham iyam eva pṛthivī ayam vāva lokaḥ eṣaḥ giḥ citaḥ iti evamādyāḥ ye udgītha ādi karma aṅga avabaddhāḥ pratyayāḥ prativedam śākhā bhedeṣu vihitāḥ
te tad śākhā gateṣu eva udgītha ādiṣu bhaveyuḥ athavā sarva śākhā gateṣu iti viśayaḥ pratiśākham ca svara ādi bhedāt udgītha ādi bhedāḥ upādāya ayam upayāsaḥ kim tāvat prāptam sva śākhā gateṣu eva udgītha ādiṣu vidhīyera eti kutas
udgītham upasīte iti hi sāmāya vihitāām viśeṣa ākāṅkṣāyām saṃikṛṣṭe eva viśeṣeṇa ākāṅkṣā ādi vṛtteḥ tad atilaṅghaea śākhātara vihita viśeṣa upādāe kāraṇam tasmāt pratiśākham vyavasthā iti evam prāpte bravīti aṅga avabaddhā astu iti tuśabdaḥ pakṣam
vyāvartayati ā ete prativedam sva śākhāsu eva vyavatiṣṭhera api tu sarva śākhāsu auvartera kutas udgītha ādi śruti aviśeṣāt sva śākhā vyavasthāyām hi udgītham upāsīta iti sāmāya śrutiḥ aviśeṣa pravṛttā satī viśeṣe pīḍitā syāt
ca etayāyyam śrutiḥ balīyasī ca sāmāya āśrayaḥ tasmāt svara ādi bhede sati api udgītha tva ādi aviśeṣāt sarva śākhā gateṣu eva udgītha ādiṣu evaṃjātīyakāḥ pratyayāḥ syuḥ matra ādi vat vā avirodhaḥ athavā
ā eva atra virodhaḥ śaṅkitavyaḥ katham aya śākhā gateṣu udgītha ādiṣu aya śākhā vihitāḥ pratyayāḥ bhaveyuḥ iti matra ādi vat avirodha upapatteḥ tathā hi matrāṇām karmaṇām guṇāām ca śākhātara utpāām api śākhātare upasaṃgrahaḥ dṛśyate
yeṣām api hi teṣām api asau viiyogaḥ dṛśyate kukkuṭaḥ asi iti aśmā ādatte kuṭaruḥ asi iti vā iti yeṣām api samidh ādayaḥ prayājāḥ āmātāḥ teṣām api teṣu guṇa vidhiḥ āmāyate
ṛtavaḥ vai prayājāḥ samāḥ atra hotavyāḥ iti tathā yeṣām api iti jāti viśeṣa upadeśaḥ teṣām api tad viṣayaḥ matra varṇaḥ upalabhyate chāgasya vapāyāḥ medasaḥ ubrūhi iti tathā
iti evamādi matrāṇām vedātare parigrahaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ tathā bahvṛca paṭhitasya sūktasya yaḥ jātaḥ eva prathamaḥ iti asya adhvaryave sajaīyam śasyam iti atra parigrahaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ tasmāt
yathā āśrayāṇām karma aṅgāām sarvatra auvṛttiḥ evam āśritāām api pratyayāām iti avirodhaḥ bhūmaḥ kratu vat jyāyaḥ tvam tathā hi darśayati bhūma jyāyaḥ tva adhikaraṇam prācīaśālaḥ aupamayavaḥ iti asyām ākhyāyikāyām vyastasya samastasya ca
vaiśvāarasya upāsaam śrūyate vyasta upāsaam tāvat aupamayava kam tvam ātmāam upāsse iti divam eva bhagavaḥ rājā eti ha uvāca eṣa va

text1:
āyaḥ tva adhikaraṇam
prācīnaśālaḥ aupamanyavaḥ iti asyām ākhyāyikāyām vyastasya samastasya ca vaiśvānarasya upāsanam śrūyate
vyasta upāsanam tāvat aupamanyava kam tvam ātmānam upāsse iti divam eva bhagavaḥ rājan iti ha uvāca eṣa vai su tejāḥ ātmā vaiśvānaraḥ yam tvam ātmānam upāsse ityādi
tathā samasta upāsanam api tasya ha vai etasya ātmanaḥ vaiśvānarasya mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ cakṣuḥ viśva rūpaḥ prāṇaḥ pṛthak vartmā ātmā saṃdehaḥ bahulaḥ vastiḥ eva rayiḥ pṛthivī eva pādau ityādi
tatra saṃśayaḥ kim iha ubhayathā api upāsanam syāt vyastasya samastasya ca uta samastasya eva iti
kim tāvat prāptam
pratyavayavam su tejaḥ prabhṛtiṣu upāsse iti kriyā pada śravaṇāt tasmāt tava sutam prasutam āsutam kule dṛśyate iti ādi phala bheda śravaṇāt ca vyastāni api upāsanāni syuḥ iti prāptam
tatas abhidhīyate bhūmnaḥ padārtha upacaya ātmakasya samastasya vaiśvānara upāsanasya jyāyastvam prādhānyena asmin vākye vivakṣitam bhavitum arhati na pratyekam avayava upāsanānām api
kratu vat yathā kratuṣu darśa pūrṇamāsa prabhṛtiṣu sāmastyena sa aṅga pradhāna prayogaḥ eva ekaḥ vivakṣyate na vyastānām api prayogaḥ prayāja ādīnām na api eka deśa aṅga yuktasya pradhānasya tadvat
kutas etat bhūmā eva jyāyān iti
tathā hi śrutiḥ bhūmnaḥ jyāyaḥ tvam darśayati eka vākya tā avagamāt
ekam hi idam vākyam vaiśvānara vidyā viṣayam paurvāparya ālocanāt pratīyate
tathā hi prācīnaśāla prabhṛtayaḥ uddālaka avasānāḥ ṣaṭ ṛṣayaḥ vaiśvānara vidyāyām pariniṣṭhām a pratipadyamānāḥ aśvapatim kaikeyam rājānam abhyājagmuḥ iti upakramya ekaikasya ṛṣeḥ upāsyam dyu prabhṛtīnām ekaikam śrāvayitvā mūrdhā tu eṣaḥ ātmanaḥ iti ha uvāca ityādinā mūrdha ādi bhāvam teṣām vidadhāti
mūrdhā te vyapatiṣyat yat mām na agamiṣyaḥ ityādinā ca vyasta upāsanam apavadati
punar ca vyasta upāsanam vyāvartya samasta upāsanam eva anuvartya sa sarveṣu lokeṣu sarveṣu bhūteṣu sarveṣu ātmasu annam atti iti bhūma āśrayam eva phalam darśayati
yat tu pratyekam sutejaḥ prabhṛtiṣu phala bheda śravaṇam tat evam sati aṅga phalāni pradhāne eva abhyuccinoti iti draṣṭavyam
tathā upāsse iti api pratyavayavam ākhyāta śravaṇam para abhiprāya anuvāda artham na vyasta upāsana vidhāna artham
tasmāt samasta upāsana pakṣaḥ eva śreyān iti
kecid tu atra samasta upāsana pakṣam jyāyāṃsam pratiṣṭhāpya jyāyas tva vacanāt eva kila vyasta upāsana pakṣam api sūtrakāraḥ nu manyate iti kalpayanti
tat ayuktam ekavākyatā avagatau satyām vākya bheda kalpanasya anyāyya tvāt mūrdhā te vyapatiṣyat iti ca evamādi nindā virodhāt spaṣṭe ca upasaṃhāra sthe samasta upāsana avagame tad abhāvasya pūrvapakṣe vaktum aśakya tvāt sautrasya ca jyāyastva vacanasya pramāṇavat tva abhiprāyeṇa api upapadyamāna tvāt
nānā śabda ādi bhedāt
śabda ādi bheda adhikaraṇam
pūrvasmin adhikaraṇe satyām api sutejaḥ prabhṛtīnām phala bheda śrutau samastasya upāsanam jyāyaḥ iti uktam
atas prāptā buddhiḥ anyāni api bhinna śrutīni upāsanāni samasya upāsiṣyante iti
api ca na eva vedya abhede vidyā bhedaḥ vijñātum śakyate
vedyam hi rūpam vidyāyāḥ dravya daivatam iva yāgasya
vedyaḥ ca ekaḥ eva īśvaraḥ śruti nānātve pi avagamyate manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ kam brahma kham brahma satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ iti evamādiṣu tathā ekaḥ eva prāṇaḥ prāṇaḥ vāva saṃvargaḥ prāṇaḥ vāva jyeṣṭhaḥ ca śreṣṭhaḥ ca prāṇaḥ ha pitā prāṇaḥ mātā iti evamādiṣu
vedya eka tvāt ca vidyā eka tvam
śruti nānātvam api asmin pakṣe guṇa antara paratvāt na anarthakam
tasmāt sva para śākhā vihitam eka vedya vyapāśrayam guṇa jātam upasaṃhartavyam vidyā kārtsnyāya iti evam prāpte pratipādyate nānā iti
vedya abhede pi evaṃjātīyakā vidyā bhinnā bhavitum arhati
kutas
śabda ādi bhedāt
bhavati hi śabda bhedaḥ vedaḥ upāsīta sa kratum kurvīta iti evamādiḥ
śabda bhedaḥ ca karma bheda hetuḥ samadhigataḥ purastāt śabda antare karma bhedaḥ kṛta anubandha tvāt iti
ādi grahaṇāt guṇa ādayaḥ pi yathāsaṃbhavam bheda hetavaḥ yojayitavyāḥ
nanu vedaḥ ityādiṣu śabda bhedaḥ eva avagamyate na yajati ityādi vat artha bhedaḥ sarveṣām eva eṣām manaḥ vṛtti artha tva abhedāt artha antara asaṃbhavāt ca
tat katham śabda bhedāt vidyā bhedaḥ iti na eṣa doṣaḥ manaḥ vṛtti artha tva abhede pi anubandha bhedāt vedya bhede sati vidyā bheda upapatteḥ
ekasya api īśvarasya upāsyasya prati prakaraṇam vyāvṛttāḥ guṇāḥ śiṣyante
tathā ekasya api prāṇasya tatra tatra upāsyasya abhede anyādṛś guṇaḥ nyatra upāsitavyaḥ anyādṛś guṇaḥ ca anyatra iti evam anubandha bhedāt vidhi bhede sati vidyā bhedaḥ vijñāyate
na ca atra ekaḥ vidyā vidhiḥ itare guṇa vidhayaḥ iti śakyam vaktum vinigamanāyām hetu abhāvāt aneka tvāt ca prati prakaraṇam guṇānām prāpta vidyā anuvādena vidhāna anupapatteḥ
na ca asmin pakṣe samānāḥ santaḥ satya kāma ādayaḥ guṇāḥ asakṛt śrāvayitavyāḥ
prati prakaraṇam ca idaṃkāmena idam upāsitavyam idaṃkāmena ca idam iti nairākāṅkṣya avagamāt na ekavākya tā āpattiḥ
na ca atra vaiśvānara vidyāyām iva samasta codanā aparā asti yad balena prati prakaraṇa vartīni avayava upāsanāni bhūtvā ekavākya tām iyuḥ
vedya ekatva nimitte ca vidyā ekatve sarvatra niraṅkuśe pratijñāyamāne samasta guṇa upasaṃhāraḥ śakyaḥ pratijñāyeta
tasmāt suṣṭhu ucyate nānā śabda ādi bhedāt iti
sthite ca etasmin adhikaraṇe sarva vedānta pratyayam ityādi draṣṭavyam
vikalpaḥ viśiṣṭa phala tvāt
vikalpa adhikaraṇam
sthite vidyā bhede vicāryate kim āsām icchayā samuccayaḥ vikalpaḥ vā syāt athavā vikalpaḥ eva niyamena iti
tatra sthita tvāt tāvat vidyā bhedasya na samuccaya niyame kiṃcid kāraṇam asti
nanu bhinnānām api agnihotra darśa pūrṇamāsa ādīnām samuccaya niyamaḥ dṛśyate na eṣa doṣaḥ
nitya tā śrutiḥ hi tatra kāraṇam
na evam vidyānām kācid nityatā śrutiḥ asti
tasmāt na samuccaya niyamaḥ
na api vikalpa niyamaḥ vidyā antara adhikṛtasya vidyā antara a pratiṣedhāt
pāriśeṣyāt yāthākāmyam āpadyate
nanu aviśiṣṭa phala tvāt āsām vikalpaḥ nyāyyaḥ
tathā hi manaḥ mayaḥ prāṇa śarīraḥ kam brahma kham brahma satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ iti evamādyāḥ tulya vat īśvara tva prāpti phalāḥ lakṣyante na eṣa doṣaḥ samāna phaleṣu api svarga ādi sādhaneṣu karmasu yāthākāmya darśanāt
tasmāt yāthākāmya prāptau ucyate vikalpaḥ eva āsām bhavitum arhati na samuccayaḥ
kasmāt
a viśiṣṭa phala tvāt
a viśiṣṭam hi āsām phalam upāsya viṣaya sākṣātkaraṇam
ekena ca upāsanena sākṣātkṛte upāsye viṣaye īśvara ādau dvitīyam anarthakam
api ca asaṃbhavaḥ eva sākṣātkaraṇasya samuccaya pakṣe citta vikṣepa hetu tvāt
sākṣātkaraṇa sādhyam ca vidyā phalam darśayanti śrutayaḥ yasya syāt addhā na vicikitsā asti iti devaḥ bhūtvā devān apyeti iti ca evamādyāḥ
smṛtayaḥ ca sadā tad bhāva bhāvitaḥ iti evamādyāḥ
tasmāt a viśiṣṭa phalānām vidyānām anyatamām ādāya tatparaḥ syāt yāvat upāsya viṣaya sākṣātkaraṇena tad phalam prāptam iti
kāmyāḥ tu yathākāmam samuccīyeran na vā pūrva hetu abhāvāt
kāmya adhikaraṇam
a viśiṣṭa phala tvāt iti asya pratyudāharaṇam
yāsu punar kāmyāsu vidyāsu sa yaḥ etam evam vāyum diśām vatsam veda na putra rodam roditi sa yaḥ nāma brahma iti upāste yāvat nāmnaḥ gatam tatra asya yathākāma cāraḥ bhavati iti ca evamādyāsu kriyā vat adṛṣṭena ātmanā ātmīyam phalam sādhayantīṣu sākṣātkaraṇa apekṣā na asti
tāḥ yathākāmam samuccīyeran na vā samuccīyeran pūrva hetu abhāvāt pūrvasya a viśiṣṭa phala tvāt ityasya vikalpa hetoḥ abhāvāt
aṅgeṣu yathā āśraya bhāvaḥ
yathā āśraya bhāva adhikaraṇam
karma aṅgeṣu udgītha ādiṣu ye āśritāḥ pratyayāḥ veda traya vihitāḥ kim te samuccīyeran kim vā yathākāmam syuḥ iti saṃśaye yathā āśraya bhāvaḥ iti āha
yathā eva eṣām āśrayāḥ stotra ādayaḥ saṃbhūya bhavanti evam pratyayāḥ api āśraya tantra tvāt pratyayānām
śiṣṭeḥ ca
yathā vā āśrayāḥ stotra ādayaḥ triṣu vedeṣu śiṣyante evam āśritāḥ api pratyayāḥ kaścid viśeṣaḥ aṅgānām tad āśrayāṇām ca pratyayānām iti arthaḥ
samāhārāt
hotṛṣadanāt ha eva api durudgītam anusamāharati iti ca praṇava udgītha eka tva vijñāna māhātmyāt udgātā sva karmaṇi utpannam kṣatam hautrāt karmaṇaḥ pratisamādadhāti iti bruvan veda antara uditasya pratyayasya veda antara udita padārtha saṃbandha sāmānyāt sarva veda udita pratyaya upasaṃhāram sūcayati iti liṅga darśanam
guṇa sādhāraṇya śruteḥ ca
vidyā guṇam ca vidyā āśrayam santam oṃkāram veda traya sādhāraṇam śrāvayati tena iyam trayī vidyā vartate om iti āśrāvayati om iti śaṃsati om iti udgāyati iti ca
tatas ca āśraya sādhāraṇyāt āśrita sādhāraṇyam iti liṅga darśanam eva
athavā guṇa sādhāraṇya śruteḥ ca iti
yadi ime karma guṇāḥ udgītha ādayaḥ sarve sarva prayoga sādhāraṇāḥ na syuḥ na syāt tatas tad āśrayāṇām pratyayānām sahabhāvaḥ
te tu udgītha ādayaḥ sarva aṅga grāhiṇā prayoga vacanena sarve sarva prayoga sādhāraṇāḥ śrāvyante
tatas ca āśraya sahabhāvāt pratyaya sahabhāvaḥ iti
na vā tad sahabhāva aśruteḥ
na vā iti pakṣa vyāvartanam
na yathā āśraya bhāvaḥ āśritānām upāsanānām bhavitum arhati
kutas
tad sahabhāva aśruteḥ
yathā hi tri veda vihitānām aṅgānām stotra ādīnām sahabhāvaḥ śrūyate graham vā gṛhītvā camasam vā unnīya stotram upākaroti stutam anuśaṃsati prastotar sāma gāya hotar etat yaje ityādinā
na evam upāsanānām sahabhāva śrutiḥ asti
nanu prayoga vacanaḥ eṣām sahabhāvam prāpayet na iti brūmaḥ puruṣa artha tvāt upāsanānām
prayoga vacanaḥ hi kratu arthānām udgītha ādīnām sahabhāvam prāpayet
udgītha ādi upāsanāni tu kratu artha āśrayāṇi api godohana ādi vat puruṣa arthāni iti avocāma pṛthak hi apratibandhaḥ phalam iti atra
ayam eva ca upadeśa āśrayaḥ viśeṣaḥ aṅgānām tad ālambanānām ca upāsanānām yat ekeṣām kratu artha tvam ekeṣām puruṣa artha tvam iti
param ca liṅga dvayam akāraṇam upāsana sahabhāvasya śruti nyāya abhāvāt
na ca pratiprayogam āśraya kārtsnya upasaṃhārāt āśritānām api tathātvam vijñātum śakyam a tad prayukta tvāt upāsanānām āśraya tantrāṇi api hi upāsanāni kāmam āśraya abhāve mā bhūvan
na tu āśraya sahabhāvena sahabhāva niyamam arhanti tad sahabhāva aśruteḥ eva
tasmāt yathākāmam eva upāsanāni anuṣṭhīyeran
darśanāt ca
darśayati ca śrutiḥ asahabhāvam pratyayānām evaṃvid ha vai brahmā yajñam yajamānam sarvān ca ṛtvijaḥ bhirakṣati iti
sarva pratyaya upasaṃhāre hi sarve sarva vidaḥ iti na vijñānavatā brahmaṇā paripālya tvam itareṣām saṃkīrtyeta
tasmāt yathākāmam upāsanānām samuccayaḥ vikalpaḥ vā iti
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye tṛtīya adhyāyasya tṛtīyaḥ pādaḥ
tṛtīyaḥ dhyāyaḥ
caturthaḥ pādaḥ

te iti
asmāt vedānta vihitāt ātma jñānāt svatantrāt puruṣa arthaḥ sidhyati iti bādarāyaṇaḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
kutas etat avagamyate
śabdāt iti āha
tathā hi tarati śokam ātma vid sa yaḥ ha vai tat paramam brahma veda brahmā eva bhavati brahma vid āpnoti param ācāryavān puruṣaḥ veda tasya tāvat eva ciram yāvat na vimokṣye saṃpatsye yaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā iti upakramya sa sarvān ca lokān āpnoti sarvān ca kāmān yaḥ tam ātmānam anuvidya vijānāti iti
ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ iti upakramya etāvat are khalu amṛta tvam iti evaṃjātīyakā śrutiḥ kevalāyāḥ vidyāyāḥ puruṣa artha hetu tvam śrāvayati
atha atra pratyavatiṣṭhate
śeṣa tvāt puruṣa artha vādaḥ yathā nyeṣu iti jaiminiḥ
kartṛ tvena ātmanaḥ karma śeṣa tvāt tad vijñānam api vrīhi prokṣaṇa ādi vat viṣaya dvāreṇa karma saṃbandhi eva iti atas tasmin avagata prayojane ātma jñāne yā phala śrutiḥ sā arthavādaḥ iti jaiminiḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
yathā anyeṣu dravya saṃskāra karmasu yasya parṇa mayī juhūḥ bhavati na sa pāpam ślokam śrṛṇoti yat āṅkte cakṣuḥ eva bhrātṛvyasya vṛṅkte yat prayāja anūyājāḥ ijyante varma vai etat yajñasya kriyate varma yajamānāya bhrātṛvya abhibhūtyai iti evaṃjātīyakā phala śrutiḥ arthavādaḥ tadvat
katham punar asya an ārabhya adhītasya ātma jñānasya prakaraṇa ādīnām anyatamena api hetunā vinā kratu praveśaḥ āśaṅkyate
kartṛ dvāreṇa vākyāt tad vijñānasya kratu saṃbandhaḥ iti ced na vākyāt viniyoga anupapatteḥ avyabhicāriṇā hi kenacid dvāreṇa an ārabhya adhītānām api vākya nimittaḥ kratu saṃbandhaḥ
kartā tu vyabhicāri dvāram laukika vaidika karma sādhāraṇyāt
tasmāt na tad dvāreṇa ātma jñānasya kratu saṃbandha siddhiḥ iti na vyatireka vijñānasya vaidikebhyaḥ karmabhyaḥ nyatra anupayogāt
na hi deha vyatirikta ātma jñānam laukikeṣu karmasu upayujyate sarvathā dṛṣṭa artha pravṛtti upapatteḥ
vaidike
text2:
āyaḥ tva adhikaraṇam prācīaśālaḥ aupamayavaḥ iti asyām ākhyāyikāyām vyastasya samastasya ca
vaiśvāarasya upāsaam śrūyate vyasta upāsaam tāvat aupamayava kam tvam ātmāam upāsse iti divam eva bhagavaḥ rājā eti ha uvāca eṣa vai su tejāḥ ātmā vaiśvāaraḥ yam tvam ātmāam upāsse ityādi
tathā samasta upāsaam api tasya ha vai etasya ātmaaḥ vaiśvāarasya mūrdhā eva su tejāḥ cakṣuḥ viśva rūpaḥ prāṇaḥ pṛthak vartmā ātmā saṃdehaḥ bahulaḥ vastiḥ eva rayiḥ pṛthivī eva pādau ityādi tatra saṃśayaḥ
kim iha ubhayathā api syāt vyastasya samastasya ca uta samastasya eva iti kim tāvat prāptam pratyavayavam su tejaḥ prabhṛtiṣu upāsse iti kriyā pada śravaṇāt tasmāt tava sutam prasutam āsutam kule dṛśyate
ityādi phala bheda śravaṇāt ca syuḥ iti prāptam tatas abhidhīyate bhūmaḥ padārtha upacaya ātmakasya samastasya vaiśvāara upāsaasya jyāyastvam asmi vākye vivakṣitam bhavitum arhati a pratyekam avayava upāsaāām api kratu vat yathā
kratuṣu darśa pūrṇamāsa prabhṛtiṣu sāmastye sa aṅga pradhā a prayogaḥ eva ekaḥ vivakṣyate a vyastāām api prayogaḥ prayāja ādīām tadvat kutas etat bhūmā eva jyāyāḥ iti tathā hi
śrutiḥ bhūmaḥ jyāyaḥ tvam darśayati eka vākyatā avagamāt ekam hi idam vākyam vaiśvāara vidyā viṣayam paurvāparya ālocaāt pratīyate tathā hi prācīaśāla prabhṛtayaḥ uddālaka avasāāḥ ṣaṭ ṛṣayaḥ vaiśvāara vidyāyām pariiṣṭhām a pratipadyamāāḥ aśvapatim
kaikeyam rājāam abhyājagmuḥ iti upakramya ekaikasya ṛṣeḥ upāsyam dyu prabhṛtīām ekaikam śrāvayitvā mūrdhā tu eṣaḥ ātmā iti ha uvāca ityādiā mūrdha ādi bhāvam teṣām vidadhāti mūrdhā te vyapatiṣyat yamām āgamiṣyaḥ ityādiā ca
vyasta upāsaam apavadati puas ca vyasta upāsaam vyāvartya samasta upāsaam sarveṣu lokeṣu sarveṣu bhūteṣu sarveṣu ātmasu amatti iti bhūma āśrayam eva phalam darśayati yat tu pratyekam su tejaḥ prabhṛtiṣu phala bheda śravaṇam tat evam
sati iti draṣṭavyam tathā upāsse iti api pratyavayavam ākhyāta śravaṇam para abhiprāya āuvāda artham a vyasta upāsa a vidhā artham tasmāt samasta upāsa pakṣaḥ eva śreyāḥ iti kecid tu atra samasta upāsa a pakṣam jyāyāṃsam pratiṣṭhāpya
jyāyas tva vacaāt eva kila vyasta upāsa a pakṣam api iti kalpayati tat ayuktam ekavākyatā avagatau satyām vākya bheda kalpa asya āyāyya tvāt mūrdhā te vyapatiṣyat iti ca evamādi idam avirodhāt spaṣṭe ca upasaṃhāra sthe samasta upāsa avagame tad abhāvasya
pūrvapakṣe vaktum aśakya tvāt sautrasya ca pramāṇavat tva abhiprāyeṇa api śabda ādi bhedāt śabda ādi bheda adhikaraṇam pūrvasmin adhikaraṇe satyām api sutejaḥ prabhṛtīām phala bheda śrutau samastasya upāsaam jyāyaḥ iti uktam atas prāptā buddhiḥ
samasyaḥ upāsiṣyate iti api ca vedya abhede vidyā bhedaḥ vijñātum śakyate vedyam hi rūpam vidyāyāḥ dravya daivatam iva yāgasya vedyaḥ ca eka
eva īśvaraḥ śruti āātve pi avagamyate brahma kham brahma satya kāmaḥ satya saṃkalpaḥ iti evamādiṣu tathā ekaḥ eva prāṇaḥ prāṇaḥ vāva saṃvargaḥ prāṇaḥ vāva jyeṣṭhaḥ ca śreṣṭhaḥ ca prāṇaḥ ha pitā
prāṇaḥ mātā iti evamādiṣu vedya ekatvāt ca vidyā ekatvam śruti āātvam api asmin pakṣe guṇa atara paratvāt a arthakam tasmāt sva para śākhā vihitam eka vedya vyapāśrayam guṇa jātam upasaṃhartavyam vidyā kārtsyāya iti evam prāpte pratipādyate vedya abhede pi
evaṃjātīyakā vidyā bhiā bhavitum arhati kutas śabda ādi bhedāt bhavati hi śabda bhedaḥ kratum kurvīta iti evamādiḥ śabda bhedaḥ ca karma bheda hetuḥ samadhigataḥ purastāt śabda atare karma bhedaḥ iti
ādi grahaṇāt guṇa ādayaḥ api yathāsaṃbhavam bheda hetavaḥ yojayitavyāḥ auvedaḥ ityādiṣu śabda bhedaḥ eva avagamyate ayajati ityādi vat artha bhedaḥ sarveṣām eva eṣām artha atara asaṃbhavāt ca tat katham śabda bhedāt vidyā bhedaḥ iti
ā eṣa doṣaḥ aubadha bhedāt vedya bhede sati vidyā bheda upapatteḥ ekasya api īśvarasya upāsyasya prati prakaraṇam vyāvṛttāḥ guṇāḥ śiṣyate tathā ekasya api prāṇasya tatra tatra upāsyasya abhede pi ayādṛś guṇaḥ yatra upāsitavyaḥ
ayādṛś guṇaḥ ca ayatra iti evam aubadha bhedāt vidhi bhede sati vidyā bhedaḥ vijñāyate ca atra ekaḥ vidyā vidhiḥ itare guṇa vidhayaḥ iti śakyam vaktum viigamaāyām hetu abhāvāt a eka tvāt ca pratiprakaraṇam
ca sataḥ satya kāma ādayaḥ guṇāḥ asakṛt śrāvayitavyāḥ pratiprakaraṇam ca ca ca idam iti airākāṅkṣya avagamāt aikavākya tā āpattiḥ
ca atra vaiśvāara vidyāyām iva aparā asti bhūtvā ekavākyatām iyuḥ vedya eka tva aimitte ca vidyā eka tve sarvatra bhūtvā eka vākya tām iyuḥ vedya eka tva aimitte ca vidyā eka tve sarvatra iraṅkuśe pratijñāyamāe samasta guṇa upasaṃhāraḥ śakyaḥ pratijñāyeta tasmāt
suṣṭhu ucyate śabda ādi bhedāt iti sthite ca etasmin adhikaraṇe draṣṭavyam vikalpaḥ viśiṣṭa phala tvāt vikalpa adhikaraṇam sthite vidyā bhede vicāryate kim āsām icchayā samuccayaḥ vikalpaḥ vā syāt athavā
vikalpaḥ eva tatra sthita tvāt tāvat vidyā bhedasya a samuccaya aiyame kiṃcid kāraṇam asti samuccaya aiyamaḥ dṛśyate doṣaḥ ityatā śrutiḥ hi tatra kāraṇam hi tatra kāraṇam
asti vikalpa aiyamaḥ vidyātara adhikṛtasya vidyātara a pratiṣedhāt pāriśeṣyāt yāthākāmyam āpadyate au a viśiṣṭa phala tvāt āsām vikalpaḥ yāyyaḥ tathā hi brahma kham brahma satya kāmaḥ
satya saṃkalpaḥ iti evamādyāḥ tulya vat īśvara tva prāpti phalā lakṣyate ā eṣa doṣaḥ samā a phaleṣu api svarga ādi sādhaeṣu karmasu yāthākāmya darśaāt tasmāt yāthākāmya prāptau ucyate vikalpaḥ eva āsām bhavitum arhati a samuccayaḥ
kasmāt aviśiṣṭa phala tvāt aviśiṣṭam hi āsām phalam upāsya viṣaya sākṣātkaraṇam ca sākṣātkṛte upāsye viṣaye īśvara ādau dvitīyam aarthakam api ca asaṃbhavaḥ eva sākṣātkaraṇasya samuccaya pakṣe
citta vikṣepa hetu tvāt sākṣātkaraṇa sādhyam ca vidyā phalam darśayati śrutayaḥ yasya syādaddhā a vicikitsā asti itidevaḥ bhūtvā devāḥ apyeti iti ca evamādyāḥ smṛtayaḥ ca sadā tad bhāva bhāvitaḥ iti evamādyāḥ
tasmāt a viśiṣṭa phalāām vidyāām ayatamām ādāya tatparaḥ syāt yāvat upāsya viṣaya sākṣātkaraṇe tat phalam prāptam iti kāmyāḥ tu yathākāmam samuccīyeraa vā pūrva hetu abhāvāt kāmya adhikaraṇam a viśiṣṭa phala tvāt iti asya pratyudāharaṇam yāsu kāmyāsu vidyāsu saṃ
yaḥ etam evam vāyum diśām vatsam veda a putra rodam roditi sa yaḥ āma brahma iti upāste yāva āmaḥ gatam tatra asya yathākāma cāraḥ bhavati iti ca evamādyāsu kriyā vat
ātmīyam phalam sādhayatīṣu sākṣātkaraṇa apekṣā tāḥ yathākāmam samuccīyera a vā samuccīyera pūrva hetu abhāvāt pūrvasya a viśiṣṭa phala tvāt ityasya vikalpa hetoḥ abhāvāt aṅgeṣu yathā āśraya bhāvaḥ yathā āśraya bhāva adhikaraṇam
karma aṅgeṣu udgītha ādiṣu ye āśritāḥ pratyayāḥ veda traya vihitāḥ kim te samuccīyera kim vā yathākāmam syuḥ iti saṃśaye yathā āśraya bhāvaḥ iti āha yathā eva eṣām āśrayāḥ stotra ādayaḥ saṃbhūya
bhavati evam pratyayāḥ api śiṣṭeḥ ca yathā vā āśrayāḥ stotra ādayaḥ triṣu vedeṣu śiṣyate evam āśritāḥ api pratyayāḥ opadeśa kṛtaḥ api kaścid viśeṣaḥ aṅgāām tad āśrayāṇām
ca pratyayāām iti arthaḥ samāhārāt iti ca praṇava udgītha ekatva vijñā māhātmyāt udgātā sva karmaṇi utpaam kṣatam hautrāt karmaṇaḥ pratisamādadhāti iti bruva vedātara uditasya pratyayasya sarva veda udita pratyaya upasaṃhāram sūcayati
iti guṇa sādhāraṇya śruteḥ ca vidyā guṇam ca vidyā āśrayam satam oṃkāram veda traya sādhāraṇam śrāvayati te iyam trayī vidyā vartate om iti āśrāvayati om iti śaṃsati om iti udgāyati iti ca tatas ca āśraya sādhāraṇyāt
āśrita sādhāraṇyam iti liṅga darśam eva athavā guṇa sādhāraṇya śruteḥ ca iti yadi ime karma guṇāḥ udgītha ādayaḥ sarve sarva prayoga sādhāraṇāḥ syuḥ a syāt tatas tad āśrayāṇām pratyayāām sahabhāvaḥ te tu udgītha ādayaḥ
sarva aṅga grāhiṇā sarve sarva prayoga sādhāraṇāḥ śrāvyate tatas ca āśraya sahabhāvāt pratyaya sahabhāvaḥ iti a vā tad sahabhāva a śruteḥ a vā iti yathā āśraya bhāvaḥ āśritāām upāsaāām bhavitum arhati kutas tad sahabhāva a śruteḥ
yathā hi tri veda vihitāām aṅgāām stotra ādīām sahabhāvaḥ śrūyate graham vā gṛhītvā camasam vā ūīya stotram upākaroti stutam auśaṃsati prastotar sāma gāya hotar etat yaja ityādiā aivam upāsaāām sahabhāva śrutiḥ asti
eṣām sahabhāvam prāpayet ā iti brūmaḥ puruṣa artha tvāt upāsaāām prayoga vacaḥ hi kratu arthāām udgītha ādīām sahabhāvam prāpayet udgītha ādi upāsaāi tu kratu artha āśrayāṇi api godoha ādi vat puruṣa artha iti avocām apṛthak hi a pratibadhaḥ phalam iti atra
ayam eva ca upadeśa āśrayaḥ viśeṣaḥ aṅgāām ca upāsaāām yat ekeṣām kratu artha tvam ekeṣām puruṣa artha tvam iti param ca liṅga dvayam akāraṇam upāsa asahabhāvasya ca ca pratiprayogam
āśraya kārtsya upasaṃhārāt āśritāām api tathātvam vijñātum śakyam a tad prayukta tvāt upāsaāām āśraya tatrāṇi api hi kāmam āśraya abhāve mā tad sahabhāva aiyamam arhati tad sahabhāva aśruteḥ eva tasmāt yathākāmam eva darśaāt ca
darśayati ca śrutiḥ asahabhāvam pratyayāām evaṃvid ha vai brahmā yajñam sarvān ca ṛtvijaḥ bhiḥ akṣati iti sarva pratyaya upasaṃhāre hi sarve sarva vidaḥ iti a vijñāavatā brahmaṇā paripālya tvam itareṣām
saṃkīrtyeta tasmāt yathākāmam upāsaāām samuccayaḥ vikalpaḥ vā iti iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye tṛtīya adhyāyasya tṛtīyaḥ pādaḥ tṛtīyaḥ udhyāyaḥ caturthaḥ pādaḥ
śabdāt iti bādarāyaṇaḥ puruṣa artha adhikaraṇam puruṣa arthaḥ u te iti asmāt svatatrāt puruṣa arthaḥ sidhyati iti bādarāyaṇaḥ ācāryaḥ kutas etat avagamyate śabdāt
iti āha tathā hi tarati śokam ātma vid sa yaḥ ha vai tat paramam brahma veda brahmā eva bhavati brahma vid param
veda tasya tāvat eva ciram a vimokṣye saṃpatsye yaḥ ātmā apahata pāpmā iti upakramya sa sarvān ca lokān sarvān ca kāmān
yaḥ tam ātmāam auvidya iti ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ iti upakramya etāvat are khalu amṛta tvam iti evaṃjātīyakā śrutiḥ kevalāyāḥ
vidyāyāḥ puruṣa artha hetu tvam śrāvayati atha atra pratyavatiṣṭhate śeṣa tvāt puruṣa artha vādaḥ yathā yeṣu iti jaimiiḥ api vrīhi prokṣaṇa ādi vat viṣaya dvāreṇa karma saṃbadhi eva
iti atas tasmi avagata prayojae ātma jñāe yā phala śrutiḥ sā artha vādaḥ iti jaimiiḥ ācāryaḥ yathā ayeṣu dravya saṃskāra karmasu yasya parṇa mayī juhūḥ bhavati
a sa pāpam ślokam śrṛṇoti yat āṅkte cakṣuḥ eva bhrātṛvyasya vṛṅkte yat prayāja aūyājāḥ ijyate varma vai etat yajñasya kriyate varma yajamāāya bhrātṛvya abhibhūtyai iti evaṃjātīyakā phala śrutiḥ

text1:
ad dvāreṇa ātma jñānasya kratu saṃbandha siddhiḥ iti na vyatireka vijñānasya vaidikebhyaḥ karmabhyaḥ nyatra anupayogāt
na hi deha vyatirikta ātma jñānam laukikeṣu karmasu upayujyate sarvathā dṛṣṭa artha pravṛtti upapatteḥ
vaidikeṣu tu dehapāta uttara kāla phaleṣu deha vyatirikta ātma jñānam antareṇa pravṛttiḥ na upapadyate iti upayujyate vyatireka vijñānam
nanu apahata pāpma tva ādi viśeṣaṇāt asaṃsāri ātma viṣayam aupaniṣadam darśanam na pravṛtti aṅgam syāt na priya ādi saṃsūcitasya saṃsāriṇaḥ eva ātmanaḥ draṣṭavya tva upadeśāt
apahata pāpma tva ādi viśeṣaṇam tu stuti artham bhaviṣyati
nanu tatra tatra prasādhitam etat adhikam asaṃsāri brahma jagat kāraṇam
tat eva ca saṃsāriṇaḥ ātmanaḥ pāramārthikam svarūpam upaniṣatsu upadiśyate iti satyam prasādhitam
tasya eva tu sthūṇā nikhanana vat phala dvāreṇa ākṣepa samādhāne kriyete dārḍhyāya
ācāra darśanāt

a hi deha vyatirikta ātma jñāam laukikeṣu karmasu upayujyate sarvathā dṛṣṭārtha pravṛtti upapatteḥ vaidikeṣu tu dehapāta uttara kāla phaleṣu pravṛttiḥ opapadyate iti upayujyate vyatireka vijñāam apahata pāpma tva ādi viśeṣaṇāt asaṃsārya ātma viṣayam

adhikam asaṃsāri brahma jagat kāraṇam tat eva ca saṃsāriṇaḥ pāramārthikam svarūpam upaiṣatsu upadiśyate iti satyam prasādhitam tasya eva tu phala dvāreṇa ākṣepa samādhāe kriyete

yat api uktam tam vidyā karmaṇī samanvārabhete iti etat samanvārambha vacanam asvātantrye vidyāyāḥ liṅgam iti tat pratyucyate vibhāgaḥ tra draṣṭavyaḥ vidyā anyam puruṣam anvārabhate karma anyam iti
śatavat yathā śatam ābhyām dīyatām iti ukte vibhajya dīyate pañcāśat ekasmai pañcāśat aparasmai tadvat
na ca idam samanvārambha vacanam mumukṣu viṣayam iti nu kāmayamānaḥ iti saṃsāri viṣaya tva upasaṃhārāt atha a kāmayamānaḥ iti ca mumukṣoḥ pṛthak upakramāt

evam sati avibhāgena api idam samanvārambha vacanam avakalpate

sāmya śruteḥ
samā hi gārhasthyena āśrama antarasya parāmarśa śrutiḥ dṛśyate trayaḥ dharma skandhāḥ ityādyā
yathā iha śruti antara vihitam eva gārhasthyam parāmṛṣṭam evam āśrama antaram api iti pratipattavyam yathā ca śāstra antara prāptayoḥ eva nivīta prācīnāvītayoḥ parāmarśaḥ upavīta vidhi pare vākye
tasmāt tulyam anuṣṭheya tvam gārhasthyena āśrama antarasya

na ca yajña ādayaḥ bhūyāṃsaḥ dharmāḥ utpatti bhinnāḥ santaḥ anyatra āśrama saṃbandhāt tritve ntarbhāvayitum śakyante
tatra yajña ādi liṅgaḥ gṛhāśramaḥ ekaḥ dharma skandhaḥ nirdiṣṭaḥ brahmacārī iti ca spaṣṭaḥ āśrama nirdeśaḥ tapaḥ iti api kaḥ nyaḥ tapaḥ pradhānāt āśramāt dharma skandhaḥ bhyupagamyeta
ye ca ime raṇye iti ca araṇya liṅgāt śraddhā tapobhyām āśrama gṛhītiḥ

are draṣṭavyaḥ yaḥ prāṇea prāṇiti sa te ātmā sarvātaraḥ yaḥ eṣa ukṣiṇi puruṣaḥ dṛśyate iti upakramya etam tu eva te bhūyas uvyākhyāsyāmi iti ca evamādi
tat api asya mahataḥ bhūtasya iḥśvasitam etat yat ṛgvedaḥ śokam moham jarām mṛtyum atyeti param jyotiḥ upasaṃpadya svea rūpeṇa abhiiṣpadyate saḥ uttamaḥ puruṣaḥ iti evamādibhiḥ vākya śeṣaiḥ satyām eva adhika upadidikṣāyām
atyata abheda abhiprāyam iti avirodhaḥ pārameśvaram eva hi śārīrasya pāramārthikam svarūpam upādhi kṛtam tu śārīra tvam tattvam asi draṣṭṛ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ sarvam ca etat vistareṇa asmābhiḥ purastāt tatra tatra
varṇitam tulyam tu darśaam yat tu uktam ācāra darśaāt karma śeṣaḥ vidyā iti atra brūmaḥ tulyam ācāra darśaam a karma śeṣa tve pi vidyāyāḥ tathā hi śrutiḥ bhavati etat ha sma vai tad vidvāṃsaḥ āhuḥ ṛṣayaḥ
kāvaṣeyāḥ kimarthāḥ vayam adhyeṣyāmahe kimarthāḥ vayam yakṣyāmahe etat ha sma vai tat pūrve juhavāṃcakrire etam vai tam ātmā am viditvā brāhmaṇāḥ putra eṣaṇāyāḥ ca vitta eṣaṇāyāḥ ca
loka eṣaṇāyāḥ ca vyutthāya atha bhikṣā caryam carati iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ yājñavalkya ādīām api brahma vidām akarma eṣṭha tvam dṛśyate etāvat are khalu amṛta tvam iti ha uktvā yājñavalkyaḥ pravavrāje ityādi śrutibhyaḥ api ca yakṣyamāṇaḥ vai
bhagavataḥ ham asmi iti etat liṅga darśaam vaiśvāara vidyā viṣayam saṃbhavati ca sa upādhikāyām brahma vidyāyām karma sāhitya darśaam a tu atra api karma aṅga tvam asti prakaraṇa ādi abhāvāt yat puaruktam tat śruteḥ iti atra brūmaḥ asārvatrikī
yat eva vidyayā karoti iti eṣā śrutiḥ sarva vidyā viṣayā prakṛta vidyā abhisaṃbadhāt prakṛtā ca udgītha vidyā om iti etat akṣaram udgītham upāsīta iti atra vibhāgaḥ śata vat yat api uktam tam vidyā karmaṇī samavārabhete iti etat samavārambha vacam
asvātatrye vidyāyāḥ liṅgam iti tat pratyucyate vibhāgaḥ utra draṣṭavyaḥ vidyā ayam puruṣam avārabhate karma ayam iti śatavat yathā śatam ābhyām dīyatām iti ukte vibhajya dīyate pañcāśat ekasmai
pañcāśat aparasmai tadvat a ca idam mumukṣu viṣayam iti u kāmayamāaḥ iti saṃsāri viṣaya tva upasaṃhārāt atha a kāmayamāaḥ iti ca mumukṣoḥ pṛthak upakramāt tatra saṃsāri viṣaye vidyā
vihitā pratiṣiddhā ca parigṛhyate viśeṣa abhāvāt karma api vihitam pratiṣiddham ca yathā prāpta āuvādi tvāt evam sati idam yat ca etat tadvataḥ iti
uttaram paṭhati adhyaya a mātravataḥ ācārya kulāt vedam adhītya iti atra adhyaya a mātrasya śravaṇāt eva karma vidhiḥ iti adhyavasyāmaḥ evam sati avidyā tvāt a adhikāraḥ karmasu prasajyeta ā eṣa doṣaḥ a prasañjyeta
vayam adhyaya a prabhavam karma avabodhaam adhikāra kāraṇam vārayāmaḥ kim tarhi svātatryeṇa eva a karma adhikāra kāraṇatām pratipadyate iti etat pratipādayāmaḥ yathā ca a kratvatara jñāam kratvatara adhikāreṇa
apekṣyate evam etat api draṣṭavyam iti yat api uktam iyamāt ca iti atra abhidhīyate ā viśeṣāt kurva eva iha karmāṇi jijīviṣet iti evamādiṣu iyama śravaṇeṣu a viduṣaḥ iti viśeṣaḥ usti aviśeṣeṇa stuta yeumatiḥ vā
kurve eva iha karmāṇi iti atra aparaḥ viśeṣaḥ ākhyāyate yadi api atra prakaraṇa sāmarthyāt vidvā eva kurve iti saṃbadhyeta tathā api vidyā stutaye etat draṣṭavyam a karma lipyate
are iti hi vakṣyati etat uktam bhavati yāvajjīvam karma kurvati api tvayi viduṣi puruṣe a karma lepāya bhavati vidyā sāmarthyāt iti tat evam vidyā stūyate
kāmakāreṇa ca eke api ca eke vidvāṃsaḥ pratyakṣīkṛta vidyā phalāḥ sataḥ tad avaṣṭambhāt phala atara sādhaeṣu prajā ādiṣu prayojaā bhāvam parāmṛśati kāmakāreṇa iti śrutiḥ bhavati vājasaeyiām etat ha sma vai
tad pūrve vidvān upamardam ca api ca karma adhikāra hetoḥ kriyā kāraka phala lakṣaṇasya samastasya prapañcasya avidyā kṛtasya vidyā sāmarthyāt sva rūpa upamardam āmaati yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat ke kam paśyet tat ke kam jighret
ityādiā karma adhikāra siddhim karma adhikāra ucchittiḥ eva prasajyeta tasmāt api svātatryam vidyāyāḥ ūrdhvaretaḥsu ca śabde hi ūrdhvaretaḥsu ca āśrameṣu vidyā śrūyate a
ca tatra karma aṅga tvam vidyāyāḥ upapadyate karma abhāvāt hi vaidikāi karmāṇi teṣām sati syāt etat ūrdhvaretasaḥ āśramāḥ a śrūyate vedaḥ iti
tat api hi vaidikeṣu śabdeṣu avagamyate trayaḥ dharmaskadhāḥ ye ca imā iraṇye śraddhā tapaḥ iti upāsate tapaḥ śraddhe ye hi upavasati araṇye etam eva pravrājiḥ lokam icchataḥ pravrajati
brahmacaryāt eva pravrajet iti evamādiṣu ca ūrdhvaretaḥ tvam śruti smṛti prasiddham tasmāt api svātatryam vidyāyāḥ parāmarśam ca apavadati hi parāmarśa adhikaraṇam trayaḥ dharma skadhāḥ ityādayaḥ ye
śabdāḥ ūrdhvaretasām āśramāṇām sadbhāvāya udāhṛtāḥ a te tad pratipāda āya prabhavati yatas parāmarśam eṣu śabdeṣu āśramātarāṇām jaimiiḥ ācāryaḥ a vidhim kutas a hi atra
artha atara para tvam ca eṣu pratyekam upalabhyate trayaḥ dharma skadhāḥ iti atra tāvat prathamaḥ tapaḥ eva dvitīyaḥ brahmacārī ācārya kula vāsī ete puṇya lokāḥ bhavati iti
parāmarśa pūrvakam āśramāṇām aātyatika phala tvam saṃkīrtya ātyatika phala tayā brahma saṃstha tā stūyate brahma saṃsthaḥ umṛta tvam eti iti parāmarśe api āśramāḥ gamyate eva satyam gamyate smṛti ācārābhyām tu teṣām prasiddhiḥ a pratyakṣa śruteḥ
atas ca pratyakṣa śruti virodhe sati a ādaraṇīyāḥ te bhaviṣyati a adhikṛta viṣayāḥ vā gārhasthyam api saha eva ūrdhvaretobhiḥ parāmṛṣṭam prathamaḥ iti satyam evam tathā api tu gṛhastham prati eva
karmaṇām śruti prasiddham eva hi tad astitvam tasmāt stuti arthaḥ eva ayam parāmarśaḥ a api ca apavadati hi pratyakṣā śrutiḥ āśramātaram vīra hā vā
eṣa devāām yogim udvāsayate ācāryāya priyam dhaam āhṛtya mā vyavacchetsīḥ ā putrasya lokaḥ asti iti tat sarve paśavaḥ viduḥ iti evamādyā tathā ye ca imā iraṇye śraddhā tapa
iti upāsate tapaḥ śraddhe ye hi upavasati araṇye iti ca āśramātara upadeśaḥ saṃdigdham ca tapaḥ eva dvitīyaḥ iti evamādiṣu tathā etam eva lokam icchataḥ
pravrajati iti loka saṃstavaḥ yam brahmacaryāt eva pravrajet iti vispaṣṭam idam pratyakṣam jābālāām satyam evam etat a apekṣya tu etām śrutim ayam vicāra
iti draṣṭavyam auṣṭheyam bādarāyaṇaḥ sāmya śruteḥ auṣṭheyam āśramātaram bādarāyaṇaḥ ācāryaḥ ca avaśya āuṣṭheya tvāt tad virodhāt a dhikṛta āuṣṭheyam āśramātaram iti hi imām matim irākaroti gārhasthya vat eva
āśramātaram api aicchatā pratipattavyam iti kutas sāmya śruteḥ samā hi parāmarśa śrutiḥ dṛśyate trayaḥ dharma skadhāḥ ityādyā yathā iha śruti atara vihitam eva gārhasthyam parāmṛṣṭam evam āśramātaram api iti pratipattavyam
yathā ca śāstra atara prāptayoḥ eva ivīta prācīāvītayoḥ parāmarśaḥ upavīta vidhi pare vākye tasmāt tulyam auṣṭheya tvam tathā etam eva lokam icchataḥ pravrajati iti asya samabhivyāhāraḥ ye
cema iraṇye śraddhā tapaḥ iti upāsate iti asya ca pañcāgi vidyayā yat tu uktam tapaḥ eva dvitīyaḥ ityādiṣu āśrama ātarābhidhāam saṃdigdham iti ā eṣa doṣaḥ iścaya kāraṇa sadbhāvāt trayaḥ dharma skadhāḥ iti hi
dharma skadha tri tvam pratijñātam a ca yajña ādayaḥ bhūyāṃsaḥ dharmāḥ sataḥ śakyate tatra yajña ādi liṅgaḥ gṛha āśramaḥ ekaḥ brahmacārī iti ca
spaṣṭaḥ āśramaiḥ deśaḥ tapaḥ iti api ye ca imā iraṇye iti ca araṇya liṅgāt śraddhā tapobhyām āśrama gṛhītiḥ tasmāt vidhiḥ vā dhāraṇa vat vidhiḥ vā ayam āśramātarasya a parāmarśa mātram
vidhi tva abhyupagame ekavākyatā pratītiḥ uparudhyeta pratīyate caṃ atra ekavākyatā puṇya loka phalāḥ trayaḥ dharma skadhāḥ brahma saṃsthatā tu amṛta tva phalā iti satyam etat satīm api tu ekavākyatā pratītim parityajya vidhiḥ eva abhyupagatavyaḥ apūrva tvāt vidhi atarasya ādarśaāt vispaṣṭāt ca āśrama ātara pratyayāt
guṇavāda kalpaayā ekavākyatva yoja ā upapatteḥ dhāraṇa vat yathā adh

text1:
atyam etat
satīm api tu ekavākyatā pratītim parityajya vidhiḥ eva abhyupagantavyaḥ apūrva tvāt vidhi antarasya adarśanāt vispaṣṭāt ca āśrama antara pratyayāt guṇavāda kalpanayā ekavākyatva yojana anupapatteḥ
dhāraṇa vat yathā adhastāt samidham dhārayan anudravet upari hi devebhyaḥ dhārayati iti atra satyām api adhas dhāraṇena eka vākya tā pratītau vidhīyate eva upari dhāraṇam apūrva tvāt
tathā ca uktam śeṣa lakṣaṇe vidhiḥ tu dhāraṇe pūrva tvāt iti
tadvat iha api āśrama parāmarśa śrutiḥ vidhiḥ eva iti kalpyate
yadā api parāmarśaḥ eva ayam āśrama antarāṇām tadā api brahma saṃstha tā tāvat saṃstava sāmarthyāt avaśyam vidheyā abhyupagantavyā
sā ca kim caturṣu āśrameṣu yasya kasya cit āhosvit parivrājakasya eva iti vivektavyam
yadi ca brahmacarya anteṣu āśrameṣu parāmṛśyamāneṣu parivrājakaḥ u pi parāmṛṣṭaḥ tatas caturṇām api āśramāṇām parāmṛṣṭa tva aviśeṣāt anāśrami tva anupapatteḥ ca yaḥ kaścid caturṣu āśrameṣu brahma saṃsthaḥ bhaviṣyati
atha na parāmṛṣṭaḥ tatas pariśiṣyamāṇaḥ parivrāj eva brahma saṃsthaḥ iti setsyati
tatra tapaḥ śabdena vaikhānasa grāhiṇā parāmṛṣṭaḥ parivrāj api iti kecid
tat ayuktam
na hi satyām gatau vānaprastha viśeṣaṇena parivrājakaḥ grahaṇam arhati
yathā atra brahmacāri gṛhamedhinau asādhāraṇena eva svena svena viśeṣaṇena viśeṣitau evam bhikṣu vaikhānasau api iti yuktam
tapaḥ ca asādhāraṇaḥ dharmaḥ vānaprasthānām kāya kleśa pradhāna tvāt tapaḥ śabdasya tatra rūḍheḥ
bhikṣoḥ tu dharmaḥ indriya saṃyama ādiḥ lakṣaṇayā eva tapaḥ śabdena abhilapyeta
catuṣṭvena ca prasiddhāḥ āśramāḥ tri tvena parāmṛśyante iti anyāyyam
api ca bheda vyapadeśaḥ bhavati trayaḥ ete puṇya loka bhājaḥ ekaḥ mṛta tva bhāj iti
pṛthaktve ca bheda vyapadeśaḥ
na hi evam bhavati devadatta yajñadattau manda prajñau anyataraḥ tu anayoḥ mahā prajñaḥ iti
bhavati tu evam devadatta yajñadattau manda prajñau viṣṇumitraḥ tu mahā prajñaḥ iti
tasmāt pūrve trayaḥ āśramiṇaḥ puṇya loka bhājaḥ pariśiṣyamāṇaḥ parivrāj amṛta tva bhāj
katham punar brahma saṃstha śabdaḥ yogāt pravartamānaḥ sarvatra saṃbhavan parivrājakaḥ eva avatiṣṭheta
rūḍhi abhyupagame ca āśrama mātrāt amṛta tva prāpteḥ jñāna ānarthakya prasaṅgaḥ iti atrā ucyate brahma saṃsthaḥ iti hi brahmaṇi parisamāptiḥ ananya vyāpāra tā rūpam tad niṣṭhatvam abhidhīyate
tat ca trayāṇām āśramāṇām na saṃbhavati sva āśrama vihita karma ananuṣṭhāne pratyavāya śravaṇāt
parivrājakasya tu sarva karma saṃnyāsāt pratyavāyaḥ na saṃbhavati an anuṣṭhāna nimittaḥ
śama dama ādiḥ tu tadīyaḥ dharmaḥ brahma saṃsthāyāḥ upodbalakaḥ na virodhī
brahma niṣṭha tvam eva hi tasya śama dama ādi upabṛṃhitam sva āśrama vihitam karma
yajña ādīni ca itareṣām
tad vyatikrame ca tasya pratyavāyaḥ
tathā ca nyāsaḥ iti brahmā brahmā hi paraḥ paraḥ hi brahmā
tāni vai etāni avarāṇi tapāṃsi nyāsaḥ eva atyarecayat vedānta vijñāna su niścita arthāḥ saṃnyāsa yoga ādi atayaḥ śuddha sattvāḥ ityādyāḥ śrutayaḥ smṛtayaḥ ca tad buddhayaḥ tad ātmānaḥ tad niṣṭhāḥ tad parāyaṇāḥ ityādyāḥ brahma saṃsthasya karma abhāvam darśayanti
tasmāt parivrājakasya āśrama mātrāt amṛta tva prāpteḥ jñāna ānarthakya prasaṅgaḥ iti eṣaḥ u pi doṣaḥ na avatarati
tat evam parāmarśe itareṣām āśramāṇām pārivrājyam tāvat brahma saṃstha tā lakṣaṇam labhyeta eva
an apekṣya eva jābāla śrutim āśrama antara vidhāyinīm ayam ācāryeṇa vicāraḥ pravartitaḥ
vidyate eva tu āśrama antara vidhi śrutiḥ pratyakṣā brahmacaryam samāpya gṛhī bhavet gṛhī bhūtvā vanī bhavet vanī bhūtvā pravrajet
yadi vā itarathā brahmacaryāt eva pravrajet gṛhāt vā vanāt vā iti
na ca iyam śrutiḥ anadhikṛta viṣayā śakyā vaktum aviśeṣa śravaṇāt pṛthak vidhānāt ca anadhikṛtānām atha punar r eva vratī vā a vratī vā snātakaḥ vā a snātakaḥ vā utsanna agniḥ anagnikaḥ vā ityādinā
brahma jñāna paripāka aṅga tvāt ca pārivrājyasya na anadhikṛta viṣaya tvam tat ca darśayati atha parivrāj vivarṇa vāsāḥ muṇḍaḥ parigrahaḥ śuciḥ adrohī bhaikṣāṇaḥ brahma bhūyāya bhavati iti
tasmāt siddhāḥ ūrdhvaretasām āśramāḥ
siddham ca ūrdhvaretaḥsu vidhānāt vidyāyāḥ svātantryam iti
stuti mātram upādānāt iti ced na apūrva tvāt
stuti mātra adhikaraṇam
saḥ eṣa rasānām rasatamaḥ paramaḥ parārdhyaḥ ṣṭamaḥ yat udgīthaḥ iyam eva ṛc agniḥ sāma ayam vāva lokaḥ eṣaḥ gniḥ citaḥ tat idam eva uktham iyam eva pṛthivī iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ śrutayaḥ kim udgītha ādeḥ stuti arthāḥ āhosvit upāsanā vidhi arthāḥ iti asmin saṃśaye stuti arthāḥ iti yuktam udgītha ādīni karma aṅgāni upādāya śravaṇāt
yathā iyam eva juhūḥ ādityaḥ kūrmaḥ svargaḥ lokaḥ āhavanīyaḥ ityādyāḥ juhū ādi stuti arthāḥ tadvat iti ced na iti āha
na hi stuti mātram āsām śrutīnām prayojanam yuktam apūrva tvāt
vidhi artha tāyām hi apūrvaḥ rthaḥ vihitaḥ bhavati
stuti artha tāyām tu ānarthakyam eva syāt
vidhāyakasya hi śabdasya vākyaśeṣa bhāvam pratipadyamānā stutiḥ upayujyate iti uktam vidhinā tu ekavākya tvāt stuti arthena vidhīnām syuḥ iti atra
pradeśa antara vihitānām tu udgītha ādīnām iyam pradeśa antara paṭhitā stutiḥ vākyaśeṣa bhāvam a pratipadyamānā anarthikā eva syāt
iyam eva juhūḥ ityādi tu vidhi saṃnidhau eva āmnātam iti vaiṣamyam
tasmāt vidhi arthāḥ eva evaṃjātīyakāḥ śrutayaḥ
bhāva śabdāt ca
udgītham upāsīta sāma upāsīta aham uktham asmi iti vidyāt ityādayaḥ ca vispaṣṭāḥ vidhi śabdāḥ śrūyante
te ca stuti mātra prayojana tāyām vyāhanyeran
tathā ca nyāya vidām smaraṇam kuryāt kriyeta kartavyam bhavet syāt iti pañcamam
etat syāt sarva vedeṣu niyatam vidhi lakṣaṇam iti
liṅ ādi arthaḥ vidhiḥ iti manyamānāḥ te evam smaranti
prati prakaraṇam ca phalāni śrāvyante āpayitā ha vai kāmānām bhavati eṣa hi eva kāma āgānasya iṣṭe kalpante ha asmai lokāḥ ūrdhvāḥ ca āvṛttāḥ ca ityādīni
tasmāt api upāsana vidhāna arthāḥ udgītha ādi śrutayaḥ
pāriplava arthāḥ iti ced na viśeṣita tvāt
pāriplava adhikaraṇam
atha ha yājñavalkyasya dve bhārye babhūvatuḥ maitreyī ca kātyāyanī ca pratardanaḥ ha vai daivodāsiḥ indrasya priyam dhāma upajagāma jānaśrutiḥ ha pautrāyaṇaḥ śraddhā deyaḥ bahu dāyī bahu pākyaḥ āsa iti evamādiṣu vedānta paṭhiteṣu ākhyāneṣu saṃśayaḥ kim imāni pāriplava prayoga arthāni āhosvit saṃnihita vidyā pratipatti arthāni iti
pāriplava arthāḥ imāḥ ākhyāna śrutayaḥ ākhyāna sāmānyāt ākhyāna prayogasya ca pāriplave codita tvāt
tatas ca vidyā pradhāna tvam vedāntānām na syāt mantra vat prayoga śeṣa tvāt iti ced tat na
kasmāt
viśeṣita tvāt pāriplavam ācakṣīta iti hi prakṛtya manuḥ vaivasvataḥ rājā iti evamādīni kānicid eva ākhyānāni tatra viśeṣyante
ākhyāna sāmānyāt ced sarva gṛhītiḥ syāt anarthakam eva idam viśeṣaṇam bhavet
tasmāt na pāriplava arthāḥ etāḥ ākhyāna śrutayaḥ
tathā ca eka vākya tā upabandhāt
asati ca pāriplava artha tve ākhyānānām saṃnihita vidyā pratipādana upayogi tā eva nyāyyā eka vākya tā upabandhāt
tathā hi tatra tatra saṃnihitābhiḥ vidyābhiḥ ekavākyatā dṛśyate prarocana upayogāt pratipatti saukarya upayogāt ca maitreyībrāhmaṇe tāvat ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ ityādyayā vidyayā ekavākyatā dṛśyate
prātardane pi prāṇaḥ smi prajñā ātmā iti ādyayā
jānaśrutiḥ iti atra api vāyuḥ vāva saṃvargaḥ ityādyayā yathā saḥ ātmanaḥ vapām udakhidat iti evamādīnām karma śruti gatānām ākhyānānām saṃnihita vidhi stuti artha tā tadvat
tasmāt na pāriplava artha tvam
atas eva ca agni indhana ādi anapekṣā
agni indhana ādi adhikaraṇam
śabdāt iti etat vyavahitam api saṃbhavāt atas iti parāmṛśyate
atas eva ca vidyāyāḥ puruṣa artha hetu tvāt agni indhana ādīni āśrama karmāṇi vidyayā svārtha siddhau na apekṣitavyāni iti ādyasya eva adhikaraṇasya phalam upasaṃharati adhika vivakṣayā
sarva apekṣā ca yajña ādi śruteḥ aśva vat
sarva apekṣā adhikaraṇam
idam idānīm cintyate kim vidyāyāḥ atyantam evā anapekṣā āśrama karmaṇām uta asti kācid apekṣā iti
tatra atas eva agni indhana ādīni āśrama karmāṇi vidyayā sva artha siddhau na apekṣyante
evam atyantam eva anapekṣāyām prāptāyām idam ucyate sarva apekṣā ca iti
apekṣate ca vidyā sarvāṇi āśrama karmāṇi na atyantam anapekṣā eva
nanu viruddham idam vacanam apekṣate ca āśrama karmāṇi vidyā na apekṣate ca iti
na iti brūmaḥ
utpannā hi vidyā phala siddhim prati na kiṃcid anyat apekṣate utpattim prati tu apekṣate
kutas
yajña ādi śruteḥ
tathā hi śrutiḥ tam etam veda anuvacanena brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣanti yajñena dānena tapasā anāśakena iti yajña ādīnām vidyā sādhana bhāvam darśayati
vividiṣā saṃyogāt ca eṣām utpatti sādhana bhāvaḥ vasīyate
atha yat yajñaḥ iti ācakṣate brahmacaryam eva tat iti atra ca vidyā sādhana bhūtasya brahmacaryasya yajña ādibhiḥ saṃstavāt yajña ādīnām api hi sādhana bhāvaḥ sūcyate
sarve vedāḥ yat padam āmananti tapāṃsi sarvāṇi ca yat vadanti
yat icchantaḥ brahmacaryam caranti tat te padam saṃgraheṇa bravīmi iti evamādyā ca śrutiḥ āśrama karmaṇām vidyā sādhana bhāvam sūcayati
smṛtiḥ api kaṣāya paktiḥ karmāṇi jñānam tu paramā gatiḥ
kaṣāye karmabhiḥ pakve tatas jñānam pravartate iti evamādyā
aśva vat iti yogyatā nidarśanam yathā ca yogyatā vaśena aśvaḥ na lāṅgala ākarṣaṇe yujyate rathacaryāyām tu yujyate evam āśrama karmāṇi vidyayā phala siddhau na apekṣyante utpattau ca apekṣyante iti
śama dama ādi upetaḥ syāt tathā api tu tad vidheḥ tad aṅga tayā teṣām avaśya anuṣṭheya tvāt
yadi kaścid manyeta yajña ādīnām vidyā sādhana bhāvaḥ na nyāyyaḥ vidhi abhāvāt
yajñena vividiṣanti iti evaṃjātīyakā hi śrutiḥ anuvāda svarūpā vidyā abhiṣṭava parā na yajña ādi vidhi parā ittham mahābhāgā vidyā yat yajña ādibhiḥ etām avāptum icchanti iti tathā api tu śama dama ādi upetaḥ syāt vidyā arthī tasmāt evaṃvid śāntaḥ dāntaḥ uparataḥ titikṣuḥ samāhitaḥ bhūtvā ātmani eva ātmānam paśyati iti vidyā sādhana tvena śama dama ādīnām vidhānāt vihitānām ca avaśya anuṣṭheya tvāt
nanu atra api śama ādi upetaḥ bhūtvā paśyati iti vartamāna apadeśaḥ upalabhyate na vidhiḥ na iti brūmaḥ tasmāt iti prakṛta praśaṃsā parigrahāt vidhi tva pratīteḥ
paśyet iti ca mādhyaṃdināḥ vispaṣṭam eva vidhim adhīyate
tasmāt yajña ādi anapekṣāyām api śama ādīni apekṣitavyāni
yajña ādīni api tu apekṣitavyāni yajña ādi śruteḥ eva
nanu uktam yajña ādibhiḥ vividiṣanti iti atra na vidhiḥ upalabhyate iti satyam uktam
tathā api tu apūrva tvāt saṃyogasya vidhiḥ parikalpyate
na hi ayam yajña ādīnām vividiṣā saṃyogaḥ pūrvam prāptaḥ yena anūdyeta
tasmāt pūṣā prapiṣṭa bhāgaḥ dantakaḥ hi iti evamādiṣu ca aśruta vidhikeṣu api vākyeṣu apūrva tvāt vidhim parikalpya pauṣṇam peṣaṇam vikṛtau pratīyeta ityādi vicāraḥ prathame tantre pravartitaḥ
tathā ca uktam vidhiḥ vā dhāraṇa vat iti
smṛtiṣu api bhagavadgītā ādyāsu an abhisaṃdhāya phalam anuṣṭhitāni yajña ādīni mumukṣoḥ jñāna sādhanāni bhavanti iti prapañcitam
tasmāt yajña ādīni śama dama ādīni ca yathāśramam sarvāṇi eva āśrama karmāṇi vidyā utpattau apekṣitavyāni
tatra api evaṃvid iti vidyā saṃyogāt pratyāsannāni vidyā sādhanāni śama ādīni vividiṣā saṃyogāt tu bāhyatarāṇi yajña ādīni iti vivektavyam
sarva anna anumatiḥ ca prāṇātyaye tad darśanāt
sarva anna anumati adhikaraṇam
prāṇa saṃvāde śrūyate chandogānām na ha vai evaṃvidi kiṃcana anannam bhavati iti
tathā vājasaneyinām na ha vai asya an annam jagdham bhavati na an annam pratigṛhītam iti
sarvam asya adanīyam eva bhavati iti arthaḥ
kim idam sarva anna anujñānam śama ādi vat vidyā aṅgam vidhīyate uta stuti artham saṃkīrtyate iti saṃśaye vidhiḥ iti tāvat prāptam
tathā hi pravṛtti viśeṣa karaḥ upadeśaḥ bhavati
atas prāṇa vidyā saṃnidhānāt tad aṅga tvena iyam niyama nivṛttiḥ upadiśyate
nanu evam sati bhakṣya abhakṣya vibhāga śāstra vyāghātaḥ syāt na eṣa doṣaḥ sāmānya viśeṣa bhāvāt bādha upapatteḥ
yathā prāṇi hiṃsā pratiṣedhasya paśu saṃjñapana vidhinā bādhaḥ yathā ca na kāṃcana striyam pariharet tat vratam iti anena vāmadevya vidyā viṣayeṇa sarva strī a parihāra vacanena sāmānya viṣayam gamya agamya vibhāga śāstram bādhyate evam anena api prāṇa vidyā viṣayeṇa sarva anna bhakṣaṇa vacanena bhakṣya abhakṣya vibhāga śāstram bādhyeta iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ na idam sarva anna anujñānam vidhīyate iti
na hi atra vidhāyakaḥ śabdaḥ upalabhyate na ha vai evaṃvidi kiṃcana anannam bhavati iti vartamāna apadeśāt
na ca asatyām api vidhi pratītau pravṛtti viśeṣa kara tva lobhena eva vidhiḥ abhyupagantum śakyate
api ca śva ādi maryādam prāṇasya annam iti uktvā idam ucyate na evaṃvidaḥ kiṃcid anannam bhavati iti
na ca śva ādi maryādam annam mānuṣeṇa dehena upabhoktum śakyate
śakyate
text2:
atyam etat satīm api tu ekavākyatā pratītim parityajya vidhiḥ eva abhyupagatavyaḥ apūrva tvāt vidhi atarasya ādarśaāt vispaṣṭāt ca āśrama ātara pratyayāt
guṇavāda kalpaayā ekavākyatva yoja ā upapatteḥ dhāraṇa vat yathā adhastāt samidham ekavākya tā pratītau vidhīyate eva upari dhāraṇam apūrva tvāt tathā ca uktam śeṣa lakṣaṇe
vidhiḥ tu dhāraṇe pūrva tvāt iti tadvat iha api āśrama parāmarśa śrutiḥ vidhiḥ eva iti kalpyate yadā api parāmarśaḥ eva ayam āśramātarāṇām tadā api brahma saṃstha tā tāvat saṃstava sāmarthyāt avaśyam vidheyā abhyupagatavyā sā ca kim
caturṣu āśrameṣu yasya kasya cit āhosvit parivrājakasya eva iti vivektavyam yadi ca brahmacaryāteṣu āśrameṣu parāmṛśyamāeṣu parivrājakaḥ api parāmṛṣṭaḥ tatas caturṇām api āśramāṇām parāmṛṣṭa tva aviśeṣāt a āśrami tva aupapatteḥ ca yaḥ kaścid caturṣu āśrameṣu brahma saṃsthaḥ bhaviṣyati atha yaḥ kaścid caturṣu āśrameṣu brahma saṃsthaḥ bhaviṣyati atha yaḥ kaścid caturṣu āśrameṣu brahma saṃsthaḥ bhaviṣyati ath
a parāmṛṣṭaḥ tatas pariśiṣyamāṇaḥ parivrāj eva brahma saṃsthaḥ iti setsyati tatra tapaḥ śabde vaikhāasa grāhiṇā parāmṛṣṭaḥ parivrāj api iti kecid tat ayuktam a hi satyām gatau
parivrājakaḥ grahaṇam arhati yathā atra brahmacāri gṛhamedhiau asādhāraṇea eva svea svea viśeṣaṇea viśeṣitau evam bhikṣu vaikhāasau api iti yuktam tapaḥ ca asādhāraṇaḥ dharmaḥ kāya kleśa pradhā tvāt tapaḥ śabdasya
tatra rūḍheḥ bhikṣoḥ tu dharmaḥ idriya saṃyama ādiḥ lakṣaṇayā eva catuṣṭve ca prasiddhāḥ āśramāḥ tritve parāmṛśyate iti ayāyyam api ca bheda vyapadeśaḥ utra bhavati trayaḥ ete
puṇya loka bhājaḥ ekaḥ umṛta tva bhāj iti pṛthaktve ca bheda vyapadeśaḥ uvakalpate a hi evam bhavati devadatta yajñadattau mada prajñau ayataraḥ tu a ayoḥ mahā prajñaḥ iti bhavati tu evam devadatta yajñadattau mada prajñau viṣṇumitraḥ tu mahā prajñaḥ iti
tasmāt pūrve trayaḥ āśramiṇaḥ puṇya loka bhājaḥ pariśiṣyamāṇaḥ parivrāj amṛta tva bhāj katham brahma saṃstha śabdaḥ yogāt pravartamāaḥ sarvatra saṃbhava parivrājakaḥ eva avatiṣṭheta rūḍhi abhyupagame ca āśrama mātrāt amṛta tva prāpteḥ jñā āarthakya prasaṅgaḥ iti
atra ucyate brahma saṃsthaḥ iti hi brahmaṇi parisamāptiḥ taiṣṭha tvam abhidhīyate tat ca trayāṇām āśramāṇām saṃbhavati sva āśrama vihita karma pratyavāya śravaṇāt parivrājakasya tu sarva karma saṃyāsāt pratyavāyaḥ saṃbhavati
śama dama ādiḥ tu tadīyaḥ dharmaḥ brahma saṃsthāyāḥ upodbalakaḥ a virodhī brahmaiṣṭha tvam eva hi tasya śama dama ādi upabṛṃhitam sva āśrama vihitam karma ca itareṣām tad vyatikrame ca tasya
pratyavāyaḥ tathā ca yāsaḥ iti brahmā brahmā hi paraḥ paraḥ hi brahmā vai tapāṃsi yāsaḥ eva atyarecayat saṃyāsa yoga ādi atayaḥ
śuddha sattvāḥ ityādyāḥ śrutayaḥ smṛtayaḥ ca ityādyāḥ brahma saṃsthasya karma abhāvam darśayati tasmāt parivrājakasya āśrama mātrāt amṛta tva prāpteḥ jñā āāarthakya prasaṅgaḥ iti eṣaḥ api doṣaḥ āvatarati tat evam parāmarśe pi itareṣām āśramāṇām pārivrājyam tāvat brahma saṃstha tā lakṣaṇam
labhyeta eva a apekṣya eva jābāla śrutim āśramātara vidhāyiīm ayam ācāryeṇa vicāraḥ pravartitaḥ vidyate eva tu āśramātara vidhi śrutiḥ pratyakṣā brahmacaryam samāpya gṛhī bhavet gṛhī bhūtvā vaī bhavet vaī bhūtvā pravrajet
yadi vā itarathā brahmacaryāt eva pravrajet gṛhāt vā iti a ca iyam śrutiḥ aadhikṛta viṣayā śakyā vaktum aviśeṣa śravaṇāt atha vratī
vā avratī vā sātakaḥ vā a sātakaḥ vā vā ityādiā brahma jñā a paripāka aṅga tvāt ca pārivrājyasya tat ca darśayati atha parivrāj vivarṇa vāsāḥ muṇḍa uparigrahaḥ śuciḥ adrohī bhaikṣāṇaḥ brahma bhūyāya bhavati
iti tasmāt siddhāḥ ūrdhvaretasām āśramāḥ siddham ca ūrdhvaretaḥsu vidhāāt vidyāyāḥ svātatryam iti stuti mātram upādāāt iti ca iāpūrva tvāt stuti mātra adhikaraṇam saḥ eṣa rasāām rasatamaḥ paramaḥ parārdhyaḥ aṣṭamaḥ yat udgīthaḥ iyam eva ṛgagiḥ sāma
ayam vāva lokaḥ tat idam eva uktham iyam eva pṛthivī iti evaṃjātīyakāḥ śrutayaḥ kim udgītha ādeḥ stuti arthāḥ āhosvit upāsa āvidhi arthāḥ iti asmin saṃśaye stuti arthāḥ iti yuktam udgītha ādi karma aṅgāi upādāya śravaṇāt
yathā iyam eva juhūḥ ādityaḥ kūrmaḥ svargaḥ lokaḥ āhavaīyaḥ ityādyāḥ juhū ādi stuti arthāḥ tadvat iti ced etya āha a hi stuti mātram āsām śrutīām yuktam apūrva tvāt
vidhi artha tāyām hi apūrvaḥ ṛthaḥ vihitaḥ bhavati stuti artha tāyām tu āarthakyam eva syāt vidhāyakasya hi śabdasya vākyaśeṣa bhāvam stutiḥ upayujyate iti uktam tu ekavākya tvāt stuti arthe vidhīām syuḥ iti atra
pradeśa atara vihitāām tu udgītha ādīām iyam pradeśa atara paṭhitā stutiḥ vākyaśeṣa bhāvam apratipadyamāā aarthikā eva syāt iyam eva juhūḥ ityādi tu vidhi saṃidhau eva amātam iti vaiṣamyam tasmāt vidhi arthāḥ eva evaṃjātīyakāḥ śrutayaḥ
bhāva śabdāt ca udgītham upāsīta sāma upāsīta aham uktham asmi iti vidyāt ityādayaḥ ca vispaṣṭāḥ vidhi śabdāḥ śrūyate te ca stuti mātra prayojaa tāyām vyāhayera tathā ca smaraṇam kuryāt kriyeta kartavyam bhavet syāt iti
pañcamam etat syāt sarva vedeṣu iyatam vidhi lakṣaṇam iti liṅ ādi arthaḥ vidhiḥ iti evam smarati prati prakaraṇam ca śrāvyate āpayitā ha vai kāmāām bhavati eṣa
hi eva kalpate ha asmai lokāḥ ūrdhvāḥ ca āvṛttāḥ ca tasmāt api udgītha ādi śrutayaḥ pāriplava arthāḥ iti viśeṣita tvāt pāriplava adhikaraṇam atha ha yājñavalkyasya dve bhārye babhūvatuḥ maitreyī
ca kātyāyaī ca pratardaaḥ ha vai daivodāsiḥ idrasya priyam dhāma upajagāma jāaśrutiḥ ha pautrāyaṇaḥ śraddhā deyaḥ bahu dāyī bahu pākyaḥ āsa iti evamādiṣu saṃśayaḥ kim imāi pāriplava prayoga arthāi
āhosvit saṃihita vidyā pratipatti arthāḥ iti pāriplava arthāḥ imāḥ ākhyā aśrutayaḥ ākhyā a sāmāyāt ākhyā a prayogasya ca pāriplave codita tvāt tatas ca vidyā pradhā a tvam syāt matra vat prayoga śeṣa tvāt iti ced kasmāt viśeṣita tvāt
pāriplavam ācakṣīta iti hi prakṛtya mauḥ vaivasvataḥ rājā iti evamādi kāicid eva tatra viśeṣyate ākhyā a sāmāyāt ced sarva gṛhītiḥ syāt aarthakam eva idam viśeṣaṇam bhavet tasmāt a pāriplava arthā
etāḥ ākhyā aśrutayaḥ tathā ca ekavākyatā upabadhāt asati ca pāriplava artha tve ākhyāāām saṃihita vidyā pratipāda upayogi tā eva yāyyā ekavākyatā upabadhāt tathā hi tatra tatra saṃihitābhiḥ vidyābhiḥ ekavākyatā dṛśyate praroca upayogāt pratipatti saukarya upayogāt ca maitreyībrāhmaṇe
tāvat ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ ityādyayā vidyayā ekavākyatā dṛśyate prāṇaḥ asmi prajñā ātmā ityādyayā iti atra api vāyuḥ vāva saṃvargaḥ ityādyayā yathā saḥ
ātman o vapām udakhidat iti evamādīām karma śruti gatāām ākhyāām saṃihita vidhi stuti artha tā tadvat tasmāa pāriplava artha tvam atas eva ca āgīdha ādi aapekṣā agīdha ādi adhikaraṇam puruṣa artha utas śabdāt iti etat vyavahitam api saṃbhavāt atas iti parāmṛśyate
atas eva ca vidyāyāḥ puruṣa artha hetu tvāt agīdha ādīya āśrama karmāṇi vidyayā sva artha siddhau āpekṣitavyāi iti ādyasya eva adhikaraṇasya phalam upasaṃharati adhika vivakṣayā sarva apekṣā ca yajña ādi śruteḥ aśva vat sarva apekṣā adhikaraṇam idam idāīm cityate kim
vidyāyāḥ atyatam eva a apekṣā āśrama karmaṇām uta asti kācid apekṣā iti tatra atas āśrama karmāṇi vidyayā sva artha siddhau āpekṣyate evam atyatam eva a apekṣāyām prāptāyām idam
ucyate sarva apekṣā ca iti apekṣate ca vidyā sarvāṇi āśrama karmāṇi ātyatam aapekṣā eva viruddham idam apekṣate ca āśrama karmāṇi vidyā āpekṣate ca iti
eti brūmaḥ hi vidyā phala siddhim prati a kiṃcid ayat apekṣate utpattim prati tu apekṣate kutas yajña ādi śruteḥ tathā hi śrutiḥ
tam etam brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣati iti vidyā sādha abhāvam darśayati vividiṣā saṃyogāt ca eṣām utpatti sādha abhāvaḥ avasīyate atha yat yajñaḥ iti ācakṣate brahmacaryam eva
tat iti atra ca vidyā sādhaa bhūtasya brahmacaryasya yajña ādibhiḥ saṃstavāt yajña ādīām api hi sādhaa bhāvaḥ sūcyate sarve vedāḥ yat padam tapāṃsi sarvāṇi ca
yat vadati yat icchataḥ brahmacaryam carati tat te padam saṃgraheṇa bravīmi iti evamādyā ca śrutiḥ āśrama karmaṇām vidyā sādha abhāvam sūcayati smṛtiḥ api kaṣāya paktiḥ karmāṇi
tu paramā gatiḥ kaṣāye karmabhiḥ pakve tatas jñāam pravartate iti evamādyā aśva vat iti yathā ca lāṅgala ākarṣaṇe
yujyate rathacaryāyām tu yujyate evam āśrama karmāṇi vidyayā phala siddhau āpekṣyate utpattau ca apekṣyate iti śama dama ādi upetaḥ syāt tathā api tu tad vidheḥ tad aṅga tayā teṣām avaśya auṣṭheya tvāt yadi kaścid cimayeta
yajña ādīām vidyā sādha abhāvaḥ vidhi abhāvāt vividiṣati iti evaṃjātīyakā hi śrutiḥ auvāda svarūpā vidyā abhiṣṭava parā a yajña ādi vidhi parā ittham mahābhāgā vidyā yat yajña ādibhiḥ etām avāptum icchati iti tathā api
tu śama dama ādi upetaḥ syāt vidyā arthī tasmāt evam vicchātaḥ dātaḥ uparataḥ titikṣuḥ samāhitaḥ bhūtvā ātmayā iva ātmānam paśyati iti śama dama ādīām vidhāāt vihitāām ca atra api
bhūtvā paśyati iti upalabhyate a vidhiḥ ā iti brūmaḥ tasmāt iti prakṛta praśaṃsā parigrahāt vidhi tva pratīteḥ paśyet iti ca mādhyaṃdiāḥ vispaṣṭam eva vidhim adhīyate tasmāt yajña ādi aapekṣāyām api śama ādīya pekṣitavyā ai
tu apekṣitavyā yajña ādi śruteḥ eva uktam yajña ādibhiḥ vividiṣati iti atra a vidhiḥ upalabhyate iti satyam uktam tathā api tu apūrva tvāt saṃyogasya vidhiḥ parikalpyate a hi ayam yajña ādīām
vividiṣā saṃyogaḥ pūrvam prāptaḥ tasmāt pūṣā prapiṣṭabhāga udatakaḥ hi iti evamādiṣu ca aśruta vidhikeṣu api vākyeṣu apūrva tvāt vidhim parikalpya pauṣṇam peṣaṇam vikṛtau pratīyeta ityādi vicāraḥ prathame tatre
pravartitaḥ tathā ca uktam vidhiḥ vā dhāraṇa vat iti smṛtiṣu api bhagavadgītā ādyāsu bhavati iti prapañcitam tasmāt yajña ādīi śama dama ādīi ca yathāśramam
sarvāṇi eva āśrama karmāṇi vidyā utpattau apekṣitavyāi tatra api evaṃvid iti vidyā saṃyogāt vidyā sādhaāi śama ādīi vividiṣā saṃyogāt tu bāhyatarāṇi vivektavyam sarvāāumatiḥ ca prāṇa atyaye tad darśaāt sarvāāumati adhikaraṇam prāṇa saṃvāde śrūyate
chadogāām a ha vai evaṃvidi kiṃcaāaam bhavati iti tathā vājasaeyiām a ha vai jagdham bhavati āaam pratigṛhītam iti sarvam asya adaīyam eva
bhavati iti arthaḥ kim idam śama ādi vat vidyā aṅgam vidhīyate uta stuti artham saṃkīrtyate iti saṃśaye vidhiḥ iti tāvat prāptam tathā hi pravṛtti viśeṣa karaḥ upadeśaḥ bhavati atas prāṇa vidyā saṃidhāāt
tad aṅga tve iyam evam sati bhakṣya abhakṣya vibhāga śāstra vyāghātaḥ syāt doṣaḥ sāmāya viśeṣa bhāvāt bādha upapatteḥ yathā prāṇi hiṃsā pratiṣedhasya bādhaḥ yathā ca a bādhaḥ yathā ca

hi atra vidhāyakaḥ śabdaḥ upalabhyate a ha vā evaṃvidi bhavati iti ca asatyām api vidhi pratītau pravṛtti viśeṣa karatva lobhe eva vidhiḥ abhyupagatum śakyate
api ca śva ādi maryādam prāṇasyāam iti uktvā idam ucyate aivaṃvidaḥ kiṃcid aaam bhavati iti ca śva ādi maryādam aam māuṣeṇa dehena upabhoktum śakyate śakyate

text1:
avṛtti viśeṣa kara tva lobhena eva vidhiḥ abhyupagantum śakyate
api ca śva ādi maryādam prāṇasya annam iti uktvā idam ucyate na evaṃvidaḥ kiṃcid anannam bhavati iti
na ca śva ādi maryādam annam mānuṣeṇa dehena upabhoktum śakyate
śakyate tu prāṇasya annam idam sarvam iti vicintayitum
tasmāt prāṇa anna vijñāna praśaṃsā arthaḥ yam arthavādaḥ na sarva anna anujñāna vidhiḥ
tat darśayati sarva anna anumatiḥ ca prāṇātyaye iti
etat uktam bhavati prāṇa atyayaḥ eva hi parasyām āpadi sarvam annam adanīya tvena abhyanujñāyate tad darśanāt
tathā hi śrutiḥ cākrāyaṇasya ṛṣeḥ kaṣṭāyām avasthāyām abhakṣya bhakṣaṇe pravṛttim darśayati maṭacī hateṣu kuruṣu iti asmin brāhmaṇe cākrāyaṇaḥ kila ṛṣiḥ āpad gataḥ ibhyena sāmi khāditān kulmāṣān cakhāda
anupānam tu tadīyam ucchiṣṭa doṣāt pratyācacakṣe
kāraṇam ca atra uvāca na vai ajīviṣyam imān akhādan iti kāmaḥ me udapānam iti ca
punar ca uttaredyus tān eva sva para ucchiṣṭān paryuṣitān kulmāṣān bhakṣayāṃbabhūva iti
tat etat ucchiṣṭa ucchiṣṭa paryuṣita bhakṣaṇam darśayantyāḥ śruteḥ āśaya atiśayaḥ lakṣyate prāṇa atyaya prasaṅge prāṇa saṃdhāraṇāya abhakṣyam api bhakṣayitavyam iti
svastha avasthāyām tu tat na kartavyam vidyāvatā api iti anupāna pratyākhyānāt gamyate
tasmāt arthavādaḥ na ha vai evaṃvidi iti evamādiḥ
a bādhāt ca
evam ca sati āhāra śuddhau sattva śuddhiḥ iti evamādi bhakṣya abhakṣya vibhāga śāstram abādhitam bhaviṣyati
api ca smaryate
api ca āpadi sarva anna bhakṣaṇam api smaryate viduṣaḥ viduṣaḥ ca aviśeṣeṇa jīvita atyayam āpannaḥ yaḥ nnam atti yatas tatas
lipyate na sa pāpena padma patram iva ambhasā iti
tathā madyam nityam brāhmaṇaḥ surā pasya brāhmaṇasya uṣṇām āsiñceyuḥ surā pāḥ kṛmayaḥ bhavanti abhakṣya bhakṣaṇāt iti ca smaryate varjanam anannasya
śabdaḥ ca a taḥ kāmakāre
śabdaḥ ca anannasya pratiṣedhakaḥ kāmakāra nivṛtti prayojanaḥ kaṭhānām saṃhitāyām śrūyate tasmāt brāhmaṇaḥ surām na pibet iti
saḥ u pi na ha vai evaṃvidi iti asya arthavāda tvāt upapannataraḥ bhavati
tasmāt evaṃjātīyakāḥ arthavādāḥ na vidhayaḥ iti
vihita tvāt ca āśrama karma api
āśrama karma adhikaraṇam
sarva apekṣā ca iti atra āśrama karmaṇām vidyā sādhanatvam avadhāritam
idānīm tu kim amumukṣoḥ api āśrama mātra niṣṭhasya vidyām akāmayamānasya tāni anuṣṭheyāni uta aho na iti cintyate
tatra tam etam veda anuvacanena brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣanti ityādinā āśrama karmaṇām vidyā sādhana tvena vihita tvāt vidyām an icchataḥ phala antaram kāmayamānasya nityāni an anuṣṭheyāni
atha tasya api anuṣṭheyāni na tarhi eṣām vidyā sādhana tvam nitya anitya saṃyoga virodhāt iti asyām prāptau paṭhati āśrama mātra niṣṭhasya api amumukṣoḥ kartavyāni eva nityāni karmāṇi yāvajjīvam agnihotram juhoti ityādinā vihita tvāt
na hi vacanasya atibhāraḥ nāma kaścid asti
atha yat uktam na evam sati vidyā sādhana tvam eṣām syāt iti atas uttaram paṭhati
sahakāri tvena ca
vidyā sahakārīṇi ca etāni syuḥ vihita tvāt eva tam etam veda anuvacanena brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣanti ityādinā
tat uktam sarva apekṣā ca yajña ādi śruteḥ aśva vat iti
na ca idam vidyā sahakāri tva vacanam āśrama karmaṇām prayāja ādi vat vidyā phala viṣayam mantavyam avidhi lakṣaṇa tvāt vidyāyāḥ asādhya tvāt ca vidyā phalasya
vidhi lakṣaṇam hi sādhanam darśa pūrṇamāsa ādi svarga phala siṣādhayiṣayā sahakāri sādhana antaram apekṣate na evam vidyā
tathā ca uktam atas eva ca agni indhana ādi anapekṣāḥ iti
tasmāt utpatti sādhana tve eva eṣām sahakāri tva vācoyuktiḥ
na ca atra nitya anitya saṃyoga virodhaḥ āśaṅkyaḥ karma abhede pi saṃyoga bhedāt
nityaḥ hi ekaḥ saṃyogaḥ yāvat jīva ādi vākya kalpitaḥ na tasya vidyā phala tvam
anityaḥ tu aparaḥ saṃyogaḥ tam etam veda anuvacanena ityādi vākya kalpitaḥ tasya vidyā phala tvam yathā ekasya api khādira tvasya nityena saṃyogena kratu artha tvam anityena saṃyogena puruṣa artha tvam tadvat
sarvathā tu te eva ubhaya liṅgāt
sarvathā api āśrama karma tva pakṣe vidyā sahakāri tva pakṣe ca te eva agnihotra ādayaḥ dharmāḥ anuṣṭheyāḥ
te eva iti avadhārayan ācāryaḥ kim nivartayati
karma bheda śaṅkām iti brūmaḥ
yathā kuṇḍapāyinām ayane māsam agnihotram juhvati iti atra nityāt agnihotrāt karmāntaram upadiśyate na evam iha karma bhedaḥ sti iti arthaḥ
kutas
ubhaya liṅgāt śruti liṅgāt smṛti liṅgāt ca
śruti liṅgam tāvat tam etam veda anuvacanena brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣanti iti siddha vat utpanna rūpāṇi eva yajña ādīni vividiṣāyām viniyuṅkte na tu juhvati ityādi vat apūrvam eṣām rūpam utpādayati iti
smṛti liṅgam api anāśritaḥ karma phalam kāryam karma karoti yaḥ iti vijñāta kartavyatākam eva karma vidyā utpatti artham darśayati
yasya ete ṣṭācatvāriṃśat saṃskārāḥ ityādyā ca saṃskāra tva prasiddhiḥ vaidikeṣu karmasu tad saṃskṛtasya vidyā utpattim abhipretya smṛtau bhavati
tasmāt sādhu idam abheda avadhāraṇam
an abhibhavam ca darśayati
sahakāri tvasya eva etat upodbalakam liṅga darśanam
anabhibhavam ca darśayati śrutiḥ brahmacarya ādi sādhana saṃpannasya rāga ādibhiḥ kleśaiḥ eṣa hi ātmā na naśyati yam brahmacaryeṇa anuvindate ityādinā
tasmāt yajña ādīni āśrama karmāṇi ca bhavanti vidyā sahakārīṇi ca iti sthitam
antarā ca api tu tad dṛṣṭeḥ
vidhura adhikaraṇam
vidhura ādīnām dravya ādi saṃpad rahitānām ca anyatama āśrama pratipatti hīnānām antarāla vartinām kim vidyāyām adhikāraḥ sti kim vā na asti iti saṃśaye na asti iti tāvat prāptam āśrama karmaṇām vidyā hetu tva avadhāraṇāt āśrama karma asaṃbhavāt ca eteṣām iti evam prāpte idam āha antarā ca api tu anāśrami tvena vartamānaḥ vidyāyām adhikriyate
kutas
tad dṛṣṭeḥ raikva vācaknavī prabhṛtīnām evaṃbhūtānām api brahma vid tva śruti upalabdheḥ
api ca smaryate
saṃvarta prabhṛtīnām ca nagna caryā ādi yogāt an apekṣita āśrama karmaṇām api mahā yogi tvam smaryate itihāse
nanu liṅgam idam śruti smṛti darśanam upanyastam
kā nu khalu prāptiḥ iti sā abhidhīyate
viśeṣa anugrahaḥ ca
teṣām api ca vidhura ādīnām aviruddhaiḥ puruṣa mātra saṃbandhibhiḥ japa upavāsa devatā ārādhana ādibhiḥ dharma viśeṣaiḥ anugrahaḥ vidyāyāḥ saṃbhavati
tathā ca smṛtiḥ japyena eva tu saṃsidhyet brāhmaṇaḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ
kuryāt anyat na vā kuryāt maitraḥ brāhmaṇaḥ ucyate iti japye dhikāram darśayati
janma antara anuṣṭhitaiḥ api ca āśrama karmabhiḥ saṃbhavati eva vidyāyāḥ anugrahaḥ
tathā ca smṛtiḥ aneka janma saṃsiddhaḥ tatas yāti parām gatim iti janma antara saṃcitān api saṃskāra viśeṣān anugrahītṛn vidyāyām darśayati
dṛṣṭa arthā ca vidyā pratiṣedha abhāva mātreṇa api arthinam adhikaroti śravaṇa ādiṣu
tasmāt vidhura ādīnām api adhikāraḥ na virudhyate
