āvṛttiḥ asakṛt upadeśāt
āvṛti adhikaraṇam
ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ śrotavyaḥ mantavyaḥ nididhyāsitavyaḥ tam eva dhīraḥ vijñāya prajñām kurvīta saḥ nveṣṭavyaḥ sa vijijñāsitavyaḥ iti ca evamādi śravaṇeṣu saṃśayaḥ kim sakṛt pratyayaḥ kartavyaḥ āhosvit āvṛttyā iti
kim tāvat prāptam
sakṛt pratyayaḥ syāt prayāja ādi vat tāvatā śāstrasya kṛtārtha tvāt
a śrūyamāṇāyām hi āvṛttau kriyamāṇāyām a śāstra arthaḥ kṛtaḥ bhavet
nanu asakṛt upadeśāḥ udāhṛtāḥ śrotavyaḥ mantavyaḥ nididhyāsitavyaḥ iti evamādayaḥ evam api yāvacchabdam āvartayet sakṛt śravaṇam sakṛt mananam sakṛt nididhyāsanam ca iti na atiriktam
sakṛt upadeśeṣu tu vedaḥ upāsīta iti evamādiṣu anāvṛttiḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ pratyaya āvṛttiḥ kartavyā
kutas
asakṛt upadeśāt śrotavyaḥ mantavyaḥ nididhyāsitavyaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ hi asakṛt upadeśaḥ pratyaya āvṛttim sūcayati
nanu uktam yāvacchabdam eva āvartayet na adhikam iti na darśana paryavasāna tvāt eṣām
darśana paryavasānāni hi śravaṇa ādīni āvartyamānāni dṛṣṭa arthāni bhavanti yathā avaghāta ādīni taṇḍula ādi niṣpatti paryavasānāni hi tadvat
api ca upāsanam nididhyāsanam ca iti antarṇīta āvṛtti guṇā eva kriyā abhidhīyate
tathā hi loke gurum upāste rājānam upāste iti ca yaḥ tātparyeṇa guru ādīn anuvartate saḥ evam ucyate
tathā dhyāyati proṣita nāthā patim iti yā nirantara smaraṇā patim prati sa utkaṇṭhā sā evam abhidhīyate
vidi upāstyoḥ ca vedānteṣu a vyatirekeṇa prayogaḥ dṛśyate
kvacid vidinā upakramya upāsinā upasaṃharati yathā yaḥ tat veda yat sa veda sa mayā etat uktaḥ iti atra anu me etām bhagavaḥ devatām śādhi yām devatām upāsse iti
kvacid ca upāsinā upakramya vidinā upasaṃharati yathā manaḥ brahma iti upāsīta iti atra bhāti ca tapati ca kīrtyā yaśasā brahmavarcasena yaḥ evam veda iti
tasmāt sakṛt upadeśeṣu api āvṛtti siddhiḥ
asakṛt upadeśaḥ tu āvṛtteḥ sūcakaḥ
liṅgāt ca
liṅgam api pratyaya āvṛttim pratyāyayati
tathā hi udgītha vijñānam prastutya ādityaḥ udgīthaḥ iti etat eka putra tā doṣeṇa apodya raśmīn tvam paryāvartayāt iti raśmi bahu tva vijñānam bahu putra tāyai vidadhat siddha vat pratyaya āvṛttim darśayati
tad sāmānyāt sarva pratyayeṣu āvṛtti siddhiḥ
atra āha bhavatu nāma sādhya phaleṣu pratyayeṣu āvṛttiḥ teṣu āvṛtti sādhyasya atiśayasya saṃbhavāt
yaḥ tu para brahma viṣayaḥ pratyayaḥ nitya śuddha buddha mukta svabhāvam eva ātma bhūtam param brahma samarpayati tatra kimarthā āvṛttiḥ iti
sakṛt śrutau ca brahma ātmatva pratīti anupapatteḥ āvṛtti abhyupagamaḥ iti ced na āvṛttau api tad anupapatteḥ
yadi hi tat tvam asi iti evaṃjātīyakam vākyam sakṛt śrūyamāṇam brahma ātmatva pratītim na utpādayet tatas tat eva āvartyamānam utpādayiṣyati iti kā pratyāśā syāt
atha ucyeta na kevalam vākyam kaṃcid artham sākṣātkartum śaknoti
atas yukti apekṣam vākyam anubhāvayiṣyati brahma ātmatvam iti tathā api āvṛtti ānarthakyam eva
sā api hi yuktiḥ sakṛt pravṛttā eva svam artham anubhāvayiṣyati
atha api syāt yuktyā vākyena ca sāmānya viṣayam eva vijñānam kriyate na viśeṣa viṣayam
yathā asti me hṛdaye śūlam iti atas vākyāt gātra kampa ādi liṅgāt ca śūla sadbhāva sāmānyam eva paraḥ pratipadyate na viśeṣam anubhavati yathā saḥ eva śūlī
viśeṣa anubhavaḥ ca avidyāyāḥ nivartakaḥ
tad arthā āvṛttiḥ iti ced na asakṛt api tāvat mātre kriyamāṇe viśeṣa vijñāna utpatti asaṃbhavāt
na hi sakṛt prayuktābhyām śāstra yuktibhyām anavagataḥ viśeṣaḥ śata kṛtvas u pi prayujyamānābhyām avagantum śakyate
tasmāt yadi śāstra yuktibhyām viśeṣaḥ pratipādyeta yadi vā sāmānyam eva ubhayathā api sakṛt pravṛtte eva te sva kāryam kurutaḥ iti āvṛtti anupayogaḥ
na ca sakṛt prayukte śāstra yuktī kasyacid api anubhavam na utpādayataḥ iti śakyate niyantum vicitra prajña tvāt pratipattṛṇām
api ca aneka aṃśa upete laukike padārthe sāmānya viśeṣavati ekena avadhānena ekam aṃśam avadhārayati apareṇa aparam iti syāt api abhyāsa upayogaḥ yathā dīrgha prapāṭhaka grahaṇa ādiṣu
na tu nirviśeṣe brahmaṇi sāmānya viśeṣa rahite caitanya mātra ātmake pramā utpattau abhyāsa apekṣā yuktā iti
atrā ucyate bhavet āvṛtti ānarthakyam tam prati yaḥ tat tvam asi iti sakṛt uktam eva brahma ātmatvam anubhavitum śaknuyāt
yaḥ tu na śaknoti tam prati upayujyate eva āvṛttiḥ
tathā hi chāndogye tat tvam asi śvetaketo iti upadiśya bhūyas eva mā bhagavān vijñāpayatu iti punar punar paricodyamānaḥ tat tat āśaṅkā kāraṇam nirākṛtya tat tvam asi iti eva asakṛt upadiśati
tathā ca śrotavyaḥ mantavyaḥ nididhyāsitavyaḥ ityādi darśitam
nanu uktam sakṛt śrutam ced tattvamasi vākyam svam artham anubhāvayitum na śaknoti tatas āvartyamānam api nā eva śakṣyati iti nā eṣa doṣaḥ
na hi dṛṣṭe nupapannam nāma
dṛśyante hi sakṛt śrutāt vākyāt manda pratītam vākya artham āvartayantaḥ tad tad ābhāsa vyudāsena samyak pratipadyamānāḥ
api ca tat tvam asi iti etat vākyam tvam padārthasya tad padārtha bhāvam ācaṣṭe
tad padena ca prakṛtam sat brahma īkṣitṛ jagataḥ janma ādikāraṇam abhidhīyate satyam jñānam anantam brahma vijñānam ānandam brahma adṛṣṭam draṣṭṛ avijñātam vijñātṛ ajam ajaram amaram a sthūlam an aṇu a hrasvam adīrgham iti ādi śāstra siddham
tatra aja ādi śabdaiḥ janma ādayaḥ bhāva vikārāḥ nivartitāḥ
a sthūla ādi śabdaiḥ ca sthaulya ādayaḥ dravya dharmāḥ
vijñāna ādi śabdaiḥ ca caitanya prakāśa ātmaka tvam uktam
eṣa vyāvṛtta sarva saṃsāra dharmakaḥ nubhava ātmakaḥ brahma saṃjñakaḥ tad padārthaḥ vedānta abhiyuktānām prasiddhaḥ
tathā pratyagātmā śrotā dehāt ārabhya pratyagātma tayā sa
text2:
avṛtti viśeṣa karatva lobhe eva vidhiḥ abhyupagatum śakyate
api ca śva ādi maryādam prāṇasyāam iti uktvā idam ucyate aivaṃvidaḥ kiṃcid aaam bhavati iti ca śva ādi maryādam aam māuṣeṇa dehena upabhoktum śakyate śakyate tu prāṇasyāam idam sarvam iti vicitayitum tasmāt
prāṇa avijñā a praśaṃsā arthaḥ yam arthavādaḥ tat darśayati sarva aumatiḥ ca prāṇa atyaye iti etat uktam bhavati prāṇa atyayaḥ eva hi parasyām āpadi tad darśaāt tathā hi śrutiḥ cākrāyaṇasya ṛṣeḥ
kaṣṭāyām avasthāyām abhakṣya bhakṣaṇe pravṛttim darśayati maṭacī hateṣu kuruṣu iti asmi brāhmaṇe cākrāyaṇaḥ kila ṛṣiḥ āpad gataḥ sāmi khāditā kulmāṣān cakhāda aupāam tu tadīyam ucchiṣṭa doṣāt pratyācacakṣe kāraṇam ca atra uvāca
a vā ajīviṣyam imā akhādaḥ iti kāmaḥ me iti ca uttaredyus tāḥ eva sva para ucchiṣṭa a paryuṣita a kulmāṣāḥ bhakṣayāṃbabhūva iti tat etat ucchiṣṭa ucchiṣṭa paryuṣita bhakṣaṇam darśayatyāḥ śruteḥ āśaya atiśayaḥ
lakṣyate prāṇa atyaya prasaṅge prāṇa saṃdhāraṇāya abhakṣyam api bhakṣayitavyam iti svastha avasthāyām tu kartavyam vidyāvatā api iti aupāa pratyākhyāāt gamyate tasmāt artha vādaḥ a ha vā evaṃvidi iti evamādiḥ abādhāt ca evam
ca sati āhāra śuddhau sattva śuddhiḥ iti evamādi bhakṣya abhakṣya vibhāga śāstram abādhitam bhaviṣyati api ca smaryate api ca āpadi sarva a bhakṣaṇam api smaryate viduṣaḥ viduṣaḥ ca aviśeṣeṇa jīvita atyayam āpao yaḥ am atti
yatas tatas lipyate padma patram iva ambhasā iti tathā madyam brāhmaṇaḥ surā pasya brāhmaṇasya uṣṇām āsiñceyuḥ surā pāḥ kṛmayaḥ bhavati abhakṣya bhakṣaṇāt iti ca smaryate
śabdaḥ kāmakāre śabdaḥ ca pratiṣedhakaḥ saṃhitāyām śrūyate tasmāt brāhmaṇaḥ surām a pibet iti saḥ api a ha vā
evaṃvidi iti asya arthavāda tvāt upapaataraḥ bhavati tasmāt evaṃjātīyakāḥ arthavādāḥ a vidhayaḥ iti vihita tvāt ca āśrama karma api āśrama karma adhikaraṇam sarva apekṣā ca iti atra āśrama karmaṇām vidyā sādhaatvam avadhāritam idāīm tu
kim amumukṣoḥ api āśrama mātraiṣṭhasya vidyām a kāmayamā asya uta aho brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣati ityādiā āśrama karmaṇām vidyā sādhaa tvea vihita tvāt vidyām a icchataḥ phalātaram kāmayamā asya atha
tarhi eṣām vidyā sādhaa tvam tarhi eṣām vidyā sādhaa tvam ityāitya saṃyoga virodhāt iti asyām prāptau paṭhati āśrama mātraiṣṭhasya api amumukṣoḥ kartavyāya iva karmāṇi yāvajjīvam agihotram juhoti vihita tvāt hi
kaścid asti atha yat uktam sati vidyā sādhaatvam eṣām syāt iti atas uttaram paṭhati ca vidyā sahakārīṇi ca syuḥ vihita tvāt eva tam etam
brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣati tat uktam sarva apekṣā ca yajña ādi śruteḥ aśva vat iti ca idam vidyā sahakāri tva vacaam āśrama karmaṇām prayāja ādi vat vidyā phala viṣayam matavyam avidhi lakṣaṇa tvāt vidyāyāḥ asādhya tvāt ca vidyā phalasya vidhi lakṣaṇam hi
darśa pūrṇamāsa ādi svarga phala siṣādhayiṣayā sahakāri sādhaātaram apekṣate vidyā tathā ca uktam atas eva iti tasmāt utpatti sādhaatve eva eṣām sahakāri tva vācoyuktiḥ ca atra
āśaṅkyaḥ karma abhede pi saṃyoga bhedāt hi ekaḥ saṃyogaḥ yāvajjīva ādi vākya kalpitaḥ tasya vidyā phala tvam aityaḥ tu aparaḥ saṃyogaḥ tam etam ityādi vākya kalpitaḥ tasya vidyā phala tvam yathā
ekasya api khādira tvasya saṃyoge kratu artha tvam saṃyoge puruṣa artha tvam tadvat sarvathā api tu te eva ubhaya liṅgāt sarvathā api āśrama karma tva pakṣe vidyā sahakāri tva pakṣe ca te eva agihotra ādayaḥ
dharmāḥ auṣṭheyāḥ te eva iti avadhāraya ācāryaḥ kim karma bheda śaṅkām iti brūmaḥ yathā māsam agihotram juhvati iti atra ityāt agihotrāt karmātaram upadiśyate ā evam iha karma bhedaḥ usti iti arthaḥ kutas ubhaya liṅgāt śruti liṅgāt smṛti liṅgāt ca
śruti liṅgam tāvat tam etam brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣati iti siddha vat utpa rūpāṇi eva vividiṣāyām viiyuṅkte a tu juhvati ityādi vat apūrvam eṣām rūpam utpādayati iti smṛti liṅgam api a āśritaḥ karma phalam
kāryam karma karoti yaḥ iti vijñāta kartavyatākam eva karma vidyā utpatti artham darśayati yasya ete ṣṭācatvāriṃśat saṃskārāḥ iti ādyā ca saṃskāra tva prasiddhiḥ vaidikeṣu karmasu tad saṃskṛtasya vidyā utpattim abhipretya smṛtau bhavati tasmāt sādhu idam
abheda avadhāraṇam a abhibhavam ca darśayati sahakāri tvasya eva etad upodbalakam liṅga darśaam a abhibhavam ca darśayati śrutiḥ rāga ādibhiḥ kleśaiḥ eṣa hi ātmā a aśyati yam brahmacaryeṇa a uvidate
tasmāt yajña ādīya āśrama karmāṇi ca bhavati vidyā sahakārīṇi ca iti sthitam ca api tu tad dṛṣṭeḥ vidhura adhikaraṇam vidhura ādīām dravya ādi saṃpad rahitāām ca ayatam āśrama pratipatti hīām kim vidyāyām
adhikāraḥ u sti kim vā āsti iti saṃśaye āsti iti tāvat prāptam āśrama karmaṇām vidyā hetu tva avadhāraṇāt āśrama karma asaṃbhavāt ca eteṣām iti evam prāpte idam āha atarā
tu vidyāyām adhikriyate kutas tad dṛṣṭeḥ raikva vāca kavī prabhṛtīām evaṃbhūtāām api brahma vid tva śruti upalabdheḥ api ca smaryate saṃvarta prabhṛtīām ca a ga caryā ādi yogāt a apekṣita āśrama karmaṇām api
mahā yogi tvam smaryate itihāse liṅgam idam kā u khalu prāptiḥ iti sā abhidhīyate viśeṣa augrahaḥ ca teṣām api ca aviruddhaiḥ puruṣa mātra saṃbadhibhiḥ japa upavāsa devatā ārādha ādibhiḥ dharma viśeṣaiḥ augrahaḥ vidyāyāḥ saṃbhavati
tathā ca smṛtiḥ tu saṃsidhyet brāhmaṇaḥ saṃśayaḥ vā kuryām maitraḥ brāhmaṇaḥ ucyate iti asaṃbhavat āśrama karmaṇaḥ api japya adhikāram darśayati ca āśrama karmabhiḥ
saṃbhavati eva vidyāyāḥ augrahaḥ tathā ca smṛtiḥ aikajama saṃsiddhaḥ tatas yāti parām gatim iti saṃskāra viśeṣāḥ vidyāyām darśayati dṛṣṭārthā ca vidyā pratiṣedha abhāva mātreṇa api
arthiam adhikaroti śravaṇa ādiṣu tasmāt vidhura ādīām api adhikāraḥ virudhyate atas tu itarat jyāyaḥ liṃṅgāt ca atas tu a tarāla varti tvāt itarat āśrama varti tvam jyāyaḥ vidyā sādhaam śruti smṛti saṃdṛbdha tvāt
śruti liṅgāt ca brahma vid puṇya kṛt taijasaḥ ca iti aāśramī a  tiṣṭheta diam ekam api  dvijaḥ saṃvatsaram aāśramī sthitvā kṛcchram
ekam caret iti ca smṛti liṅgāt caturthaḥ udhyāyaḥ prathamaḥ pādaḥ āvṛttiḥ asakṛt upadeśāt āvṛti adhikaraṇam ātmā vai are draṣṭavyaḥ śrotavyaḥ matavyaḥ ididhyāsitavyaḥ tam eva dhīraḥ vijñāya
prajñām kurvīta saḥ u veṣṭavyaḥ sa vijijñāsitavyaḥ iti ca evamādi śravaṇeṣu saṃśayaḥ kim sakṛt pratyayaḥ kartavyaḥ āhosvit āvṛttyā iti kim tāvat prāptam sakṛt pratyayaḥ syāt prayāja ādi vat tāvatā
śāstrasya kṛtārtha tvāt aśrūyamāṇāyām hi āvṛttau kriyamāṇāyām aśāstra arthaḥ kṛtaḥ bhavet asakṛt upadeśāḥ udāhṛtāḥ śrotavyaḥ matavyaḥ ididhyāsitavyaḥ iti evamādayaḥ evam api yāvacchabdam āvartayet sakṛt śravaṇam
ca iti ātiriktam sakṛt upadeśeṣu tu vedaḥ upāsīta iti evamādiṣu a āvṛttiḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ pratyaya āvṛttiḥ kartavyā kutas asakṛt upadeśāt śrotavyaḥ matavyaḥ ididhyāsitavyaḥ iti evaṃjātīyakaḥ hi
asakṛt upadeśaḥ pratyaya āvṛttim sūcayati uktam yāvacchabdam eva āvartayet ādhikam iti a darśa a paryavasāa tvāt eṣām hi hi tadvat
api ca upāsaam ididhyāsaam ca iti atarṇīta āvṛtti guṇā eva kriyā abhidhīyate tathā hi loke gurum upāste rājā aam upāste iti ca yaḥ tātparyeṇa saḥ evam ucyate tathā
dhyāyati patim iti yā iratara smaraṇā patim prati sa utkaṇṭhā sā evam abhidhīyate vidi upāstyoḥ ca a vyatirekeṇa prayogaḥ dṛśyate kvacid vidiā upakramyaḥ upāsiā upasaṃharati yathā
yaḥ tat veda yat sa veda sa mayā etat uktaḥ iti atra me etām bhagavaḥ devatām śādhi yām devatām upāsse iti kvacid ca upāsiā upakramya vidiā upasaṃharati yathā
brahma iti upāsīta iti atra bhāti ca tapati ca kīrtyā yaśasā brahmavarcase yaḥ evam veda iti tasmāt sakṛt upadeśeṣu api āvṛtti siddhiḥ asakṛt upadeśaḥ tu āvṛtteḥ sūcakaḥ liṅgāt ca liṅgam api
pratyaya āvṛttim pratyāyayati tathā hi udgītha vijñāam prastutya ādityaḥ udgīthaḥ iti etat eka putra tā doṣeṇa apodya raśmīn tvam paryāvartayāt iti raśmi bahu tva vijñāam bahu putra tāyai vidadhat siddha vat pratyaya āvṛttim darśayati sarva pratyayeṣu āvṛtti siddhiḥ
atra āha bhavatu āma sādhya phaleṣu pratyayeṣu āvṛttiḥ teṣu āvṛtti sādhyasya atiśayasya saṃbhavāt yaḥ tu para brahma viṣayaḥ iti aśuddha buddha mukta svabhāvam eva ātma bhūtam param brahma samarpayati tatra kimarthā āvṛttiḥ iti sakṛt śrutau ca
brahma ātmatva pratīti aupapatteḥ āvṛtti abhyupagamaḥ iti ced a āvṛttau api tad aupapatteḥ yadi hi tat tvam asi iti evaṃjātīyakam vākyam sakṛt śrūyamāṇam brahma ātmatva pratītim ā utpādayet tatas tat eva āvartyam āam utpādayiṣyati iti kā pratyāśā syāt atha ucyeta
a kevalam vākyam kaṃcid artham sākṣātkartum śakoti atas yukti apekṣam brahma ātmatvam iti tathā api āvṛtti āarthakyam eva sā api hi yuktiḥ sakṛt pravṛttā eva svam artham aubhāvayiṣyati atha api syāt yuktyā vākyea
ca sāmāya viṣayam eva kriyate a viśeṣa viṣayam yathā asti me hṛdaye śūlam iti atas vākyāt gātra kampa ādi liṅgāt ca śūla sadbhāva sāmāyam eva paraḥ pratipadyate yathā
saḥ eva śūlī viśeṣa aubhavaḥ ca avidyāyāḥ tad arthā āvṛttiḥ iti ced a asakṛt api tāvamātre kriyamāṇe viśeṣa vijñā utpatti asaṃbhavāt a hi sakṛt prayuktābhyām śāstra yuktibhyām a avagataḥ viśeṣaḥ śata kṛtvā upi
śakyate tasmāt yadi śāstra yuktibhyām viśeṣaḥ pratipādyeta yadi vā sāmāyam eva ubhayathā api sakṛt pravṛtte eva te sva kāryam kurutaḥ iti āvṛttyā aupayogaḥ ca
sakṛt prayukte śāstra yuktī kasyacid api aubhavam otpādayataḥ iti śakyate iyatum vicitra prajña tvāt pratipattṛṇām api ca laukike padārthe sāmāya viśeṣavati ekam aṃśam avadhārayati apareṇa aparam iti syāt api abhyāsa upayogaḥ
yathā dīrgha prapāṭhaka grahaṇa ādiṣu a tu i rviśeṣe brahmaṇi sāmāya viśeṣa rahite caitaya mātra ātmake pramā utpattau abhyāsa apekṣā yuktā iti atra ucyate bhavet āvṛtti āarthakyam tam prati yaḥ tat tvam asi iti sakṛt uktam eva śakuyāt
yaḥ tu a śakoti tam prati upayujyate eva āvṛttiḥ tathā hi chādogye tat tvam asi śvetaketo iti upadiśya bhūyas eva mā bhagavān vijñāpayatu iti puaḥ
tat tad āśaṅkā kāraṇam tat tad āśaṅkā kāraṇam tat tvam asi iti eva asakṛt upadiśati tathā ca śrotavyaḥ matavyaḥ ididhyāsitavyaḥ ityādi darśitam uktam sakṛt śrutam ced tattvamasi vākyam svam artham aubhāvayitum an
tatas śakṣyati iti doṣaḥ hi dṛśyate hi sakṛt śrutāt vākyāt mad apratītam vākya artham āvartayataḥ samyak pratipadyamānaḥ api
ca tat tvam asi iti etat vākyam tvam padārthasya tad padārtha bhāvam ācaṣṭe ca prakṛtam sat brahma īkṣitṛ jagataḥ ca adṛṣṭam draṣṭṛ
avijñātam vijñātṛ ajam ajaram amaram asthūlam aaṇu ahrasvam adīrgham iti ādi śāstra siddham tatra aja ādi śabdaiḥ jama ādayaḥ bhāva vikārāḥ asthūla ādi śabdaiḥ ca sthaulya ādayaḥ dravya dharmāḥ vijñā ādi śabdaiḥ ca caitaya prakāśa ātmaka tvam uktam eṣa vyāvṛtta sarva saṃsāra dharmakaḥ ubhava ātmakaḥ brahma saṃjñakaḥ tad padārthaḥ prasiddhaḥ tathā
tvam padārthaḥ api pratyagātmā śrotā dehāt ārabhya pratyagātma tayā tatra yeṣām etau padārthau ajñā a sa

text1:
ādi śabdaiḥ ca caitanya prakāśa ātmaka tvam uktam
eṣa vyāvṛtta sarva saṃsāra dharmakaḥ nubhava ātmakaḥ brahma saṃjñakaḥ tad padārthaḥ vedānta abhiyuktānām prasiddhaḥ
tathā pratyagātmā śrotā dehāt ārabhya pratyagātma tayā
text2:
ādi śabdaiḥ ca caitaya prakāśa ātmaka tvam uktam eṣa vyāvṛtta sarva saṃsāra dharmakaḥ ubhava ātmakaḥ brahma saṃjñakaḥ tad padārthaḥ prasiddhaḥ tathā
tvam padārthaḥ api pratyagātmā śrotā dehāt ārabhya pratyagātma tayā

text1:
tatra yeṣām etau padārthau ajñāna saṃśaya viparyaya pratibaddhau teṣām tat tvam asi iti etat vākyam svārthe pramām na utpādayitum śaknoti padārtha jñāna pūrvaka tvāt vākya artha jñānasya iti atas tān prati eṣṭavyaḥ padārtha viveka prayojanaḥ śāstra yukti abhyāsaḥ
yadi api ca pratipattavyaḥ ātmā niraṃśaḥ tathā api adhyāropitam tasmin bahu aṃśa tvam deha indriya manaḥ buddhi viṣaya vedanā ādi lakṣaṇam
tatra ekena avadhānena ekam aṃśam apohati apareṇa aparam iti yujyate tatra kramavatī pratipattiḥ
tat tu pūrvarūpam eva ātma pratipatteḥ
yeṣām punar nipuṇa matīnām na ajñāna saṃśaya viparyaya lakṣaṇaḥ padārtha viṣayaḥ pratibandhaḥ u sti te śaknuvanti sakṛt uktam eva tattvam asi vākya artham anubhavitum iti tān prati āvṛtti ānarthakyam iṣṭam eva
sakṛt utpannā eva hi ātma pratipattiḥ avidyām nivartayati iti na atra kaścid api kramaḥ bhyupagamyate
satyam evam yujyeta yadi kasyacid evam pratipattiḥ bhavet
balavatī hi ātmanaḥ duḥkhi tva ādi pratipattiḥ
atas na duḥkhi tva ādi abhāvam kaścid pratipadyate iti ced na deha ādi abhimāna vat duḥkhi tva ādi abhimānasya mithyā abhimāna tva upapatteḥ
pratyakṣam hi dehe chidyamāne dahyamāne vā aham chidye dahye iti ca mithyā abhimānaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ
tathā bāhyatareṣu api putra mitra ādiṣu saṃtapyamāneṣu aham eva saṃtapye iti adhyāropaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ
tathā duḥkhi tva ādi abhimānaḥ syāt deha ādi vat eva caitanyāt bahis upalabhyamāna tvāt duḥkhi tva ādīnām suṣupta ādiṣu ca ananuvṛtteḥ
caitanyasya tu suṣupte anuvṛttim āmananti yat vai tat na paśyati paśyan vai tat na paśyati ityādinā
tasmāt sarva duḥkha vinirmukta eka caitanya ātmakaḥ ham iti eṣaḥ ātmā anubhavaḥ
na ca evam ātmānam anubhavataḥ kiṃcid anyat kṛtyam avaśiṣyate
tathā ca śrutiḥ kim prajayā kariṣyāmaḥ yeṣām naḥ yam ātmā ayam lokaḥ iti ātma vidaḥ kartavya abhāvam darśayati
smṛtiḥ api yaḥ tu ātma ratiḥ eva syāt ātma tṛptaḥ ca mānavaḥ
ātmani eva ca saṃtuṣṭaḥ tasya kāryam na vidyate iti
yasya tu na eṣaḥ nubhavaḥ drāk iva jāyate tam prati anubhava arthaḥ eva āvṛtti abhyupagamaḥ
tatra api na tattvamasi vākya arthāt pracyāvya āvṛttau pravartayet
na hi vara ghātāya kanyām udvāhayanti
niyuktasya ca asmin adhikṛtaḥ ham kartā mayā idam kartavyam iti avaśyam brahma pratyayāt viparīta pratyayaḥ utpadyate
yaḥ tu svayam eva manda matiḥ apratibhānāt tam vākya artham jihāset tasya etasmin eva vākya arthe sthirīkāraḥ āvṛtti ādi vācoyuktyā abhyupeyate
tasmāt para brahma viṣaye pi pratyaye tad upāya upadeśeṣu āvṛtti siddhiḥ
ātmā iti tu upagacchanti grāhayanti ca
ātma tva upāsana adhikaraṇam
yaḥ śāstra ukta viśeṣaṇaḥ paramātmā sa kim aham iti grahītavyaḥ kim vā mad anyaḥ iti etat vicārayati
katham punar ātma śabde pratyagātma viṣaye śrūyamāṇe saṃśayaḥ iti ucyate ayam ātma śabdaḥ mukhyaḥ śakyate bhyupagantum sati jīva īśvarayoḥ abheda saṃbhave
itarathā tu gauṇaḥ yam abhyupagantavyaḥ iti manyate
kim tāvat prāptam
na aham iti grāhyaḥ
na hi apahatapāpma tva ādi guṇaḥ viparīta guṇa tvena śakyate grahītum viparīta guṇaḥ vā apahatapāpma tva ādi guṇa tvena
apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇaḥ ca parameśvaraḥ tad viparīta guṇaḥ tu śārīraḥ
īśvarasya ca saṃsārya ātma tve īśvara abhāva prasaṅgaḥ
tatas śāstra ānarthakyam
saṃsāriṇaḥ pi īśvara ātma tve adhikāri abhāvāt śāstra ānarthakyam eva pratyakṣa ādi virodhaḥ ca
anya tve pi tādātmya darśanam śāstrāt kartavyam pratimā ādiṣu iva viṣṇu ādi darśanam iti ced kāmam evam bhavatu
na tu saṃsāriṇaḥ mukhyaḥ ātmā īśvaraḥ iti etat naḥ prāpayitavyam
evam prāpte brūmaḥ ātmā iti eva parameśvaraḥ pratipattavyaḥ
tathā hi parameśvara prakriyāyām jābālāḥ ātma tvena eva etam upagacchanti tvam vai aham asmi bhagavaḥ devate ham vai tvam asi devate iti
tathā anye pi aham brahma asmi iti evamādayaḥ ātma tva upagamāḥ draṣṭavyāḥ
grāhayanti ca ātma tvena eva īśvaram vedānta vākyāni eṣa te ātmā sarva antaraḥ eṣa te ātmā antaryāmī amṛtaḥ tat satyam saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi iti evamādīni
yat uktam pratīka darśanam idam viṣṇu pratimā nyāyena bhaviṣyati iti tat ayuktam gauṇa tva prasaṅgāt vākya vairūpyāt ca yatra hi pratīka dṛṣṭiḥ abhipreyate sakṛt eva tatra vacanam bhavati yathā manaḥ brahma ādityaḥ brahma ityādi
iha punar tvam aham asmi aham ca tvam asi iti āha atas pratīka śruti vairūpyāt abheda pratipattiḥ
bheda dṛṣṭi apavādāt ca
tathā hi atha yaḥ nyām devatām upāste sau anyaḥ ham asmi iti na sa veda mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyum āpnoti yaḥ iha nānā iva paśyati sarvam tam parādāt yaḥ nyatra ātmanaḥ sarvam veda iti evamādyā bhūyasī śrutiḥ bheda darśanam apavadati
yat tu uktam na viruddha guṇayoḥ anyonya ātmatva saṃbhavaḥ iti na ayam doṣaḥ viruddha guṇa tāyāḥ mithyātva upapatteḥ
yat punar uktam īśvara abhāva prasaṅgaḥ iti tat asat śāstra prāmāṇyāt anabhyupagamāt ca
na hi īśvarasya saṃsāryātmatvam pratipādyate iti abhyupagacchāmaḥ
kim tarhi saṃsāriṇaḥ saṃsāri tva apohena īśvara ātma tvam iti
evam ca sati advaita īśvarasya apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇatā viparīta guṇatā tu itarasya mithyā iti vyavatiṣṭhate
yat api uktam adhikāri abhāvaḥ pratyakṣa ādi virodhaḥ ca iti tat api asat prāk prabodhāt saṃsāri tva abhyupagamāt tad viṣaya tvāt ca pratyakṣa ādi vyavahārasya
yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kena kam paśyet ityādinā hi prabodhe pratyakṣa ādi abhāvam darśayati
pratyakṣa ādi abhāve śruteḥ api abhāva prasaṅgaḥ iti ced na iṣṭa tvāt
atra pitā a pitā bhavati iti upakramya vedāḥ a vedāḥ iti vacanāt iṣyate eva asmābhiḥ śruteḥ api abhāvaḥ prabodhe
kasya punar ayam aprabodhaḥ iti ced yaḥ tvam pṛcchasi tasya te iti vadāmaḥ
nanu aham īśvaraḥ eva uktaḥ śrutyā yadi evam pratibuddhaḥ si na asti kasyacid aprabodhaḥ
yaḥ pi doṣaḥ codyate kaiḥ cit avidyayā kila ātmanaḥ sa dvitīya tvāt advaita anupapattiḥ iti saḥ u pi etena pratyuktaḥ
tasmāt ātmā iti eva īśvare manaḥ dadhīta
na pratīke na hi saḥ
pratīka adhikaraṇam
manaḥ brahma iti upāsīta iti adhyātmam atha adhidaivatam ākāśaḥ brahma iti tathā ādityaḥ brahma iti ādeśaḥ sa yaḥ nāma brahma iti upāste iti evamādiṣu pratīka upāsaneṣu saṃśayaḥ kim teṣu api ātma grahaḥ kartavyaḥ na vā iti
kim tāvat prāptam

kasmāt
brahmaṇaḥ śrutiṣu ātma tvena prasiddha tvāt pratīkānām api brahma vikāra tvāt brahma tve sati ātma tva upapatteḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ na pratīkeṣu ātma matim badhnīyāt
na hi sa upāsakaḥ pratīkāni vyastāni ātmatvena ākalayet
yat punar brahma vikāra tvāt pratīkānām brahmatvam tatas ca ātma tvam iti tat asat pratīka abhāva prasaṅgāt
vikāra svarūpa upamardena hi nāma ādi jātasya brahmatvam eva āśritam bhavati
sva rūpa upamarde ca nāma ādīnām kutas pratīka tvam ātma grahaḥ vā
na ca brahmaṇaḥ ātma tvāt brahma dṛṣṭi upadeśeṣu ātma dṛṣṭiḥ kalpyā kartṛ tva ādi anirākaraṇāt
kartṛ tva ādi sarva saṃsāra dharma nirākaraṇena hi brahmaṇaḥ ātmatva upadeśaḥ
tad anirākaraṇena ca upāsana vidhānam
atas ca upāsakasya pratīkaiḥ sama tvāt ātma grahaḥ na upapadyate
na hi rucaka svastikayoḥ itaretarātma tvam asti
suvarṇa ātmanā iva tu brahma ātmanā ekatve pratīka abhāva prasaṅgam avocāma
atas na pratīkeṣu ātma dṛṣṭiḥ kriyate
brahma dṛṣṭiḥ utkarṣāt
brahma dṛṣṭi adhikaraṇam
teṣu eva udāharaṇeṣu anyaḥ saṃśayaḥ kim āditya ādi dṛṣṭayaḥ brahmaṇi adhyasitavyāḥ kim vā brahma dṛṣṭiḥ āditya ādiṣu iti
kutas saṃśayaḥ
sāmānādhikaraṇye kāraṇa anavadhāraṇāt
atra hi brahma śabdasya āditya ādi śabdaiḥ sāmānādhikaraṇyam upalabhyate ādityaḥ brahma prāṇaḥ brahma vidyut brahma ityādi samāna vibhakti nirdeśāt
na ca atra āñjasam sāmānādhikaraṇyam avakalpate artha antara vacana tvāt brahma āditya ādi śabdānām
na hi bhavati gauḥ aśvaḥ iti sāmānādhikaraṇyam
nanu prakṛti vikāra bhāvāt brahma āditya ādīnām mṛd śarāva ādi vat sāmānādhikaraṇyam syāt na iti ucyate
vikāra pravilayaḥ hi evam prakṛti sāmānādhikaraṇyāt syāt tatas ca pratīka abhāva prasaṅgam avocāma
paramātma vākyam ca idam tadānīm syāt tatas ca upāsana adhikāraḥ bādhyeta parimita vikāra upādānam ca vyartham
tasmāt brāhmaṇaḥ gniḥ vaiśvānaraḥ ityādi vat anyataratra anyatara dṛṣṭi adhyāse sati kva kiṃdṛṣṭiḥ adhyasyatām iti saṃśayaḥ
tatra aniyamaḥ niyama kāriṇaḥ śāstrasya abhāvāt iti evam prāptam
athavā āditya ādi dṛṣṭayaḥ eva brahmaṇi kartavyāḥ iti evam prāptam
evam hi āditya ādi dṛṣṭibhiḥ brahma upāsitam bhavati
brahma upāsanam ca phalavat iti śāstra maryādā
tasmāt na brahma dṛṣṭiḥ āditya ādiṣu iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ brahma dṛṣṭiḥ eva āditya ādiṣu syāt iti
kasmāt
utkarṣāt
evam utkarṣeṇa āditya ādayaḥ dṛṣṭāḥ bhavanti utkṛṣṭa dṛṣṭeḥ teṣu adhyāsāt
tathā ca laukikaḥ nyāyaḥ anugataḥ bhavati
utkṛṣṭa dṛṣṭiḥ hi nikṛṣṭe dhī asitavyā iti laukikaḥ nyāyaḥ yathā rāja dṛṣṭiḥ kṣattari
sa ca anusartavyaḥ viparyaye pratyavāya prasaṅgāt
na hi kṣattṛ dṛṣṭi parigṛhītaḥ rājā nikarṣam nīyamānaḥ śreyase syāt
nanu śāstra prāmāṇyāt an āśaṅkanīyaḥ pratyavāya prasaṅgaḥ na ca laukikena nyāyena śāstrīyā dṛṣṭiḥ niyantum yuktā iti atrā ucyate nirdhārite śāstra arthe etat evam syāt
saṃdigdhe tu tasmin tad nirṇayam prati laukikaḥ nyāyaḥ āśrīyamāṇaḥ na virudhyate
tena ca utkṛṣṭa dṛṣṭi adhyāse śāstra arthe vadhāryamāṇe nikṛṣṭa dṛṣṭim adhyasyan pratyaveyāt iti śliṣyate
prāthamyāt ca āditya ādi śabdānām mukhya artha tvam avirodhāt grahītavyam
taiḥ svārtha vṛttibhiḥ avaruddhāyām buddhau paścāt avatarataḥ brahma śabdasya mukhyayā vṛttyā sāmānādhikaraṇya asaṃbhavāt brahma dṛṣṭi vidhāna artha tā eva avatiṣṭhate
iti paratvāt api brahma śabdasya eṣaḥ eva arthaḥ nyāyyaḥ
tathā hi brahma iti ādeśaḥ brahma iti upāsīta brahma iti upāste iti ca sarvatra iti param brahma śabdam uccārayati śuddhān tu āditya ādi śabdān
tatas ca yathā śuktikām rajatam iti pratyeti iti atra śukti vacanaḥ eva śuktikā śabdaḥ rajata śabdaḥ tu rajata pratīti lakṣaṇa arthaḥ pratyeti eva hi kevalam rajatam iti na tu tatra rajatam asti evam atra api āditya ādīn brahma iti pratīyāt iti gamyate
ca dvitīyā nirdeśena āditya ādīn eva upāsti kriyayā vyāpyamānān darśayati sa yaḥ etat evam vidvān ādityam brahma iti upāste yaḥ vācam brahma iti upāste yaḥ saṃkalpam brahma iti upāste iti ca
yat tu uktam brahma upāsanam eva atra ādaraṇīyam phalavat tvāya iti tat ayuktam uktena nyāyena āditya ādīnām eva upāsya tva avagamāt
phalam tu atithi ādi upāsane iva āditya ādi upāsane brahmā eva dāsyati sarva adhyakṣa tvāt
varṇitam ca etat phalam atas upapatteḥ iti atra
īdṛśam ca atra brahmaṇaḥ upāsya tvam yat pratīkeṣu tad dṛṣṭi adhyāropaṇam pratimā ādiṣu iva viṣṇu ādīnām
āditya ādi matayaḥ ca aṅge upapatteḥ
āditya ādimati adhikaraṇam
yaḥ eva asau tapati tam udgītham upāsīta lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāsīta vāci saptavidham sāma upāsīta iyam eva ṛc agniḥ sāmaḥ iti evamādiṣu aṅga avabaddheṣu upāsaneṣu saṃśayaḥ kim āditya ādiṣu udgītha ādi dṛṣṭayaḥ vidhīyante kim vā udgītha ādiṣu eva āditya ādi dṛṣṭayaḥ iti
tatra aniyamaḥ niyama kāraṇa abhāvāt iti prāptam
na hi atra brahmaṇaḥ iva kasyacid utkarṣa viśeṣaḥ vadhāryate
brahma hi samasta jagat kāraṇatvāt apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇa yogāt ca āditya ādibhyaḥ utkṛṣṭam iti śakyam avadhārayitum
na tu āditya udgītha ādīnām vikāra tva aviśeṣāt kiṃcid utkarṣa viśeṣa avadhāraṇe kāraṇam asti
athavā niyamena eva udgītha ādi matayaḥ āditya ādiṣu adhyasyeran
kasmāt
karma ātmaka tvāt udgītha ādīnām karmaṇaḥ ca phala prāpti prasiddheḥ
udgītha ādi matibhiḥ upāsyamānāḥ āditya ādayaḥ karma ātmakāḥ santaḥ phala hetavaḥ bhaviṣyanti
tathā ca iyam eva ṛc agniḥ sāmaḥ iti atra tat etat etasyām ṛci adhyūḍham sāmaḥ iti ṛk śabdena pṛthivīm nirdiśati sāma śabdena agnim
tat ca pṛthivī agnyoḥ ṛk sāma dṛṣṭi cikīrṣāyām avakalpate na ṛk sāmayoḥ pṛthivī agni dṛṣṭi cikīrṣāyām
kṣattari hi rāja dṛṣṭi karaṇāt rāja śabdaḥ upacaryate na rājani kṣattṛ śabdaḥ
api ca lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāsīta iti adhikaraṇa nirdeśāt lokeṣu sāma adhyasitavyam iti pratīyate
etat gāyatram prāṇeṣu protam iti ca etat eva darśayati
prathama nirdiṣṭeṣu ca āditya ādiṣu carama nirdiṣṭam brahma adhyastam ādityaḥ brahma iti ādeśaḥ ityādiṣu
prathama nirdiṣṭāḥ ca pṛthivī ādayaḥ carama nirdiṣṭāḥ hiṃkāra ādayaḥ pṛthivī hiṃkāraḥ ityādi śrutiṣu
atas anaṅgeṣu āditya ādiṣu aṅgam atikṣepaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ād

tatra yeṣām etau padārthau ajñā a saṃśaya viparyaya pratibaddhau teṣām tat tvam asi iti etat vākyam svārthe pramām ā utpādayitum śakoti padārtha jñā a pūrvaka tvāt vākya artha jñā asya
ityatas eṣṭavyaḥ padārtha viveka prayojaḥ śāstra yukti abhyāsaḥ yadi api ca pratipattavyaḥ ātmā tathā api adhyāropitam bahu aṃśa tvam deha idriya maaḥ buddhi viṣaya veda ādi lakṣaṇam tatra ekam aṃśam apohati apareṇa
aparam iti yujyate tatra kramavatī pratipattiḥ tat tu pūrvarūpam eva ātma pratipatteḥ yeṣām punar a ajñā asaṃśaya viparyaya lakṣaṇaḥ padārtha viṣayaḥ te sakṛt uktam eva tattvamasi vākya artham
āvṛtti āarthakyam iṣṭam eva sakṛt utpaā eva hi ātma pratipattiḥ avidyām kaścid api kramaḥ abhyupagamyate satyam evam yujyeta yadi kasyacid evam pratipattiḥ bhavet balavatī hi ātma obhavat
duḥkhi tva ādi pratipattiḥ atas a duḥkhi tva ādi abhāvam kaścid pratipadyate iti ced a deha ādi abhimāa vat duḥkhi tva ādi abhimāasya mithyā abhimāa tva upapatteḥ pratyakṣam hi dehe chidyamāe dahyamāe vā aham chidye dahye
iti ca mithyā abhimāaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ tathā bāhyatareṣu api putra mitra ādiṣu aham eva saṃtapye iti adhyāropaḥ dṛṣṭaḥ tathā duḥkhi tva ādi abhimāaḥ api syāt deha ādi vat eva suṣupta ādiṣu ca suṣupta ādiṣu ca
caitayasya tu suṣupte pi yat vai paśyati tasmāt tasmāt ca evam ca evam kiṃcid ayatkṛtyam avaśiṣyate tathā
ca śrutiḥ kim prajayā kariṣyāmaḥ yeṣām ā oyam ātmā ayam lokaḥ iti ātma vidaḥ kartavya abhāvam darśayati smṛtiḥ api yaḥ tu ātma ratiḥ eva syāt ātma tṛptaḥ ca māavaḥ ātmayā iva ca saṃtuṣṭaḥ tasya kāryam as
vidyate iti yasya tu a eṣaḥ uubhavaḥ drāk iva jāyate tam prati aubhava arthaḥ eva āvṛtti abhyupagamaḥ tatra api a tattvamasi vākya arthāt pracyāvya āvṛttau pravartayet a
hi vara ghātāya kayām udvāhayati ca asmi adhikṛtaḥ aham kartā mayā idam kartavyam iti avaśyam brahma pratyayāt viparīta pratyayaḥ utpadyate yaḥ tu svayam eva mada matiḥ apratibhā tam vākya artham jihāset tasya
etasmin eva vākya arthe sthirīkāraḥ āvṛtti ādi vācoyuktyā abhyupeyate tasmāt para brahma viṣaye api pratyaye tad upāya upadeśeṣu āvṛtti siddhiḥ ātmā iti tu upagacchati grāhayati ca ātma tva upāsa adhikaraṇam yaḥ śāstra ukta viśeṣaṇaḥ paramātmā sa kim aham
iti grahītavyaḥ kim vā madayaḥ iti etat vicārayati katham puar ātma śabde pratyagātma viṣaye śrūyamāṇe saṃśayaḥ iti ucyate ayam ātma śabdaḥ mukhyaḥ śakyate abhyupagatum
sati jīva īśvarayoḥ abheda saṃbhave itarathā tu gauṇaḥ ūyam abhyupagatavyaḥ iti mayate kim tāvat prāptam a aham iti grāhyaḥ hi apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇaḥ
śakyate grahītum viparīta guṇaḥ vā apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇa tve apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇaḥ ca parameśvaraḥ tad viparīta guṇaḥ tu śārīraḥ īśvarasya ca saṃsāri ātma tve īśvara abhāva prasaṅgaḥ tatas śāstra āarthakyam saṃsāriṇaḥ api īśvara ātma tve adhikārī abhāvāt
eva pratyakṣa ādi virodhaḥ ca tādātmya darśaam śāstrāt kartavyam pratimā ādiṣu iva viṣṇu ādi darśaam iti ced kāmam evam bhavatu a tu saṃsāriṇaḥ mukhya
ātmā īśvaraḥ iti etat prāpayitavyam evam prāpte brūmaḥ ātmā iti eva parameśvaraḥ pratipattavyaḥ tathā hi parameśvara prakriyāyām jābālāḥ etam upagacchati
tvam vai aham asmi bhagavaḥ devatā iham vai tvam asi devate iti tathā aham brahma asmi iti evamādayaḥ ātma tva upagamāḥ draṣṭavyāḥ grāhayati
ca īśvaram eṣa te ātmā sarva ataraḥ eṣa te ātmā ataryāmī amṛtaḥ tat satyam saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi iti evamādi
yat uktam pratīka darśaam idam bhaviṣyati iti tat ayuktam gauṇa tva prasaṅgāt vākya vairūpyāt ca yatra hi pratīka dṛṣṭiḥ abhipreyate sakṛt eva tatra bhavati
yathā brahma ādityaḥ brahma ityādi iha puas tvam aham asmi aham ca tvam asi iti āha atas pratīka śruti vairūpyāt abheda pratipattiḥ bheda dṛṣṭi apavādāt
ca tathā hi atha yaḥ yām devatām upāste iya usau asmi iti a sa veda mṛtyoḥ sa mṛtyum yaḥ iha paśyati
sarvam tam parādāt yaḥ yatra ātmā sarvam veda iti evamādyā bhūyasī śrutiḥ apavadati yat tu uktam a viruddha guṇayoḥ iti doṣaḥ viruddha guṇa tāyāḥ mithyātva upapatteḥ
yat uktam īśvara abhāva prasaṅgaḥ iti tat asat śāstra prāmāṇyāt a abhyupagamāt ca a hi īśvarasya saṃsāri ātmatvam pratipādyate iti abhyupagacchāmaḥ kiṃtarhi saṃsāriṇaḥ īśvara ātmatvam
iti evam ca sati advaita īśvarasya apahatapāpmatva ādi guṇatā viparīta guṇatā tu itarasya mithyā iti vyavatiṣṭhate yat api uktam adhikāri abhāvaḥ pratyakṣa ādi virodhaḥ ca iti tat api
asat prāk prabodhāt saṃsāri tva abhyupagamāt tad viṣaya tvāt ca pratyakṣa ādi vyavahārasya yatra tu asya sarvam ātmā eva abhūt tat kam paśyet ityādiā hi prabodhe pratyakṣa ādi abhāvam darśayati
pratyakṣa ādi abhāve śruteḥ api abhāva prasaṅgaḥ iti ced a iṣṭa tvāt atra pitā a pitā bhavati iti upakramya vedāḥ a vedāḥ iti vacaāt iṣyate eva asmābhiḥ
śruteḥ api abhāvaḥ prabodhe kasya ayam aprabodhaḥ iti ced yaḥ tvam pṛcchasi tasya te iti vadāmaḥ aham īśvara
eva uktaḥ śrutyā yadi evam pratibuddhaḥ asi āsti kasyacid aprabodhaḥ yaḥ api doṣaḥ codyate kaiḥ cid avidyayā kila ātmā sa dvitīya tvāt advaita aupapattiḥ iti saḥ upi

brahma iti tathā ādityaḥ brahma iti ādeśaḥ sa yaḥ āma brahma iti upāste iti evamādiṣu pratīka upāsaeṣu saṃśayaḥ kim teṣu api ātma grahaḥ kartavyaḥ a vā iti kim tāvat prāptam
teṣu api ātma grahaḥ eva yuktaḥ kartum kasmāt brahmaṇaḥ śrutiṣu prasiddha tvāt pratīkāām api brahma vikāra tvāt brahma tve sati ātma tva upapatteḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ a pratīkeṣu ātma matim badhīyāt a pratīkeṣu ātma matim badhīyāt
hi saḥ upāsakaḥ ākalayet yat puas brahma vikāra tvāt pratīkānām brahmatvam tatas ca ātmatvam iti tat asat pratīka abhāva prasaṅgāt vikāra svarūpa upamardea hi āma ādi jātasya brahmatvam eva āśritam bhavati
sva rūpa upamarde ca kutas pratīka tvam ātma grahaḥ vā ca brahmaṇaḥ ātma tvāt brahma dṛṣṭi upadeśeṣu ātma dṛṣṭiḥ kalpyā kartṛ tva ādyaiḥ ākaraṇāt kartṛ tva ādi sarva saṃsāra dharmaiḥ ākaraṇe hi brahmaṇaḥ ātma tva upadeśaḥ ca
atas ca upāsakasya pratīkaiḥ sama tvāt ātma grahaḥ upapadyate hi rucaka svastikayoḥ itaretara ātma tvam asti suvarṇa ātmā eva tu brahma ātmā ekatve pratīka abhāva prasaṅgam avocāma atas a pratīkeṣu ātma dṛṣṭiḥ kriyate
brahma dṛṣṭiḥ utkarṣāt brahma dṛṣṭi adhikaraṇam teṣu eva udāharaṇeṣu ayaḥ saṃśayaḥ kim āditya ādi dṛṣṭayaḥ brahmaṇi adhyasitavyāḥ kim vā brahma dṛṣṭiḥ āditya ādiṣu iti kutas saṃśayaḥ sāmāādhikaraṇye kāraṇa aavadhāraṇāt atra hi brahma śabdasya āditya ādi śabdaiḥ sāmāādhikaraṇyam upalabhyate āditya upāstiḥ anupūrvaḥ anupūrvaḥ anupūrvaḥ anupūrvaḥ anupūrvaḥ anupūrvaḥ anupūrvaḥ anupūrvaḥ anupūrva
brahma prāṇaḥ brahma vidyut brahma ityādi sama a vibhakti nirdeśāt a ca atra āñjasam sāmāādhikaraṇyam avakalpate artha ataravacaatvāt brahma āditya ādi śabdāām a hi bhavati gauḥ aśvaḥ iti sāmāādhikaraṇyam prakṛti vikāra bhāvāt brahma āditya ādīām mṛd śarāva ādi vat sāmāādhikaraṇyam
syāt ā iti ucyate vikāra pravilayaḥ hi evam prakṛti sāmādhikaraṇyāt syāt tatas ca pratīka abhāva prasaṅgam avocāma paramātma vākyam ca idam syāt tatas ca upāsa adhikāraḥ bādhyeta ca vyartham tasmāt ityādi vat ityādi vat ca vyartham tasmāt
sati kva kiṃdṛṣṭiḥ adhyasyatām iti saṃśayaḥ tatra aiyamaḥ iyama kāriṇaḥ śāstrasya abhāvāt iti evam prāptam athavā āditya ādi dṛṣṭayaḥ eva brahmaṇi kartavyāḥ iti evam prāptam evam hi āditya ādi dṛṣṭibhiḥ brahma
upāsitam bhavati brahma upāsaam ca phalavat iti śāstra maryādā tasmāt a brahma dṛṣṭiḥ āditya ādiṣu iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ brahma dṛṣṭiḥ eva āditya ādiṣu syāt iti kasmāt utkarṣāt evam utkarṣeṇa āditya ādayaḥ dṛṣṭāḥ
bhavati utkṛṣṭa dṛṣṭeḥ teṣu adhyāsāt tathā ca laukikaḥ yāyougataḥ bhavati utkṛṣṭa dṛṣṭiḥ hi laukikaḥ yāyaḥ yathā rāja dṛṣṭiḥ kṣattari sa ca viparyaye pratyavāya prasaṅgāt asitavyaḥ
hi kṣattṛ dṛṣṭi parigṛhītaḥ rājā śreyase syāt śāstra prāmāṇyāt pratyavāya prasaṅgaḥ ca śāstra arthe
etat evam syāt saṃdigdhe tu prati laukikaḥ api virudhyate ca utkṛṣṭa dṛṣṭi adhyāse śāstra artha avadhāryamāṇe śliṣyate prāthamyāt ca āditya ādi śabdāām
mukhya artha tvam avirodhāt grahītavyam taiḥ sva artha vṛttibhiḥ avaruddhāyām buddhau paścāt avatarataḥ brahma śabdasya mukhyayā vṛttyā sāmāādhikaraṇya asaṃbhavāt brahma dṛṣṭi vidhā artha tā eva avatiṣṭhate iti para tvāt api brahma śabdasya eṣaḥ eva arthaḥ yāyyaḥ tathā hi
brahma iti ādeśaḥ brahma iti upāsīta brahma iti upāste iti ca sarvatra iti param brahma śabdam uccārayati śuddhān tu āditya ādi śabdā tatas ca yathā śuktikām rajatam iti pratyeti iti atra eva śuktikā śabdaḥ rajata śabdaḥ tu rajata pratīti lakṣaṇa arthaḥ pratyeti eva
hi kevalam rajatam iti tu tatra rajatam asti evam atra api āditya ādī brahma iti pratīyāt iti gamyate vākyaśeṣaḥ upi ca upāsti kriyayā sa yaḥ etat evam
vidvāḥ ādityam brahma iti upāste yaḥ vācam brahma iti upāste yaḥ saṃkalpam brahma iti upāste iti ca yat tu uktam brahma upāsaam eva atra ādaraṇīyam phalavat tvāya iti tat ayuktam āditya ādīām eva upāsya tva avagamāt phalam
tu atithi ādi upāsaaḥ iva brahmā eva dāsyati sarva adhyakṣa tvāt varṇitam ca etat phalam atas upapatteḥ iti atra īdṛśam ca atra brahmaṇaḥ upāsya tvam yat pratīkeṣu tad dṛṣṭi adhyāropaṇam pratimā ādiṣu
iva viṣṇu ādīnām āditya ādi matayaḥ ca aṅge upapatteḥ āditya ādi mati adhikaraṇam yaḥ eva asau tapati tam udgītham upāsīta lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāsīta vāci saptavidham sāma upāsīta iyam eva ṛgagiḥ sāmaḥ iti evamādiṣu aṅga avabaddheṣu upāsa eṣu saṃśayaḥ
kim āditya ādiṣu udgītha ādi dṛṣṭayaḥ vidhīyate kim vā udgītha ādiṣu eva āditya ādi dṛṣṭayaḥ iti tatra aiyamaḥ iyam akāraṇa abhāvāt iti prāptam a hi atra brahmaṇaḥ iva kasyacid utkarṣa viśeṣaḥ avadhāryate brahma
hi samasta jagat kāraṇatvāt apahata pāpma tva ādi guṇa yogāt ca āditya ādibhyaḥ utkṛṣṭam iti śakyam avadhārayitum a tu āditya udgītha ādīām vikāra tva aviśeṣāt kiṃcid utkarṣa viśeṣa avadhāraṇe kāraṇam asti athavā udgītha ādi matayaḥ āditya ādiṣu adhyasyera kasmāt karma ātmaka tvāt udgītha ādīām karmaṇaḥ ca
phala prāpti prasiddheḥ āditya ādayaḥ karma ātmakāḥ sataḥ phala hetavaḥ bhaviṣyati tathā ca iyam eva ṛgagiḥ sāma iti atra tat etat etasyām ṛci adhyūḍham sāma iti ṛc śabde pṛthivīm sāma śabde āgim tat ca
pṛthivī agyoḥ ṛk sāma dṛṣṭi cikīrṣāyām avakalpate a ṛk sāmayoḥ pṛthivī agi dṛṣṭi cikīrṣāyām kṣattari hi rāja dṛṣṭi karaṇāt rāja śabdaḥ upacaryate a kṣattṛ śabdaḥ api ca lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāsīta iti adhikaraṇaiḥ deśāt
lokeṣu sāma adhyasitavyam iti pratīyate etat gāyatram prāṇeṣu protam iti ca etat eva darśayati prathamaiḥ diṣṭeṣu ca āditya ādiṣu caramaiḥ diṣṭam brahma adhyastam ādityaḥ brahma iti ādeśaḥ ityādiṣu prathamaiḥ diṣṭāḥ ca
pṛthivī ādayaḥ caramaiḥ diṣṭāḥ hiṃkāra ādayaḥ pṛthivī hiṃkāraḥ ityādi śrutiṣu atas a aṅgeṣu āditya ādiṣu aṅgam atikṣepaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ād

text1:
diṣṭam brahma adhyastam ādityaḥ brahma iti ādeśaḥ ityādiṣu
prathama nirdiṣṭāḥ ca pṛthivī ādayaḥ carama nirdiṣṭāḥ hiṃkāra ādayaḥ pṛthivī hiṃkāraḥ ityādi śrutiṣu
atas anaṅgeṣu āditya ādiṣu aṅgam atikṣepaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ āditya ādi matayaḥ eva aṅgeṣu udgītha ādiṣu kṣipyeran
kutas
upapatteḥ
upapadyate hi evam apūrva saṃnikarṣāt āditya ādi matibhiḥ saṃskriyamāṇeṣu udgītha ādiṣu karma samṛddhiḥ
yat eva vidyayā karoti śraddhayā upaniṣadā tat eva vīryavattaram bhavati iti ca vidyāyāḥ karma samṛddhi hetu tvam darśayati
bhavatu karma samṛddhi phaleṣu evam
svatantra phaleṣu tu katham yaḥ etat evam vidvān lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāste ityādiṣu
teṣu api adhikṛta adhikārāt prakṛta apūrva saṃnikarṣeṇa eva phala kalpanā yuktā godohana ādi niyama vat
phala ātmaka tvāt ca āditya ādīnām udgītha ādibhyaḥ karma ātmakebhyaḥ utkarṣa upapattiḥ
āditya ādi prāpti lakṣaṇam hi karma phalam śiṣyate śrutiṣu
api ca om iti etat akṣaram udgītham upāsīta khalu etasya eva akṣarasya upavyākhyānam bhavati iti ca udgītham eva upāsya tvena upakramya āditya ādimatīḥ vidadhāti
yat tu uktam udgītha ādi matibhiḥ upāsyamānāḥ āditya ādayaḥ karma bhūyam bhūtvā phalam kariṣyanti iti tat ayuktam svayam eva upāsanasya karma tvāt phalavat tva upapatteḥ āditya ādi bhāvena api ca dṛśyamānānām udgītha ādīnām karma ātmaka tva anapāyāt
tat etat etasyām ṛci adhyūḍham sāma iti tu lākṣaṇikaḥ eva pṛthivī agnyoḥ ṛk sāma śabda prayogaḥ
lakṣaṇā ca yathāsaṃbhavam saṃnikṛṣṭena viprakṛṣṭena vā sva artha saṃbandhena pravartate
tatra yadi api ṛk sāmayoḥ pṛthivī agni dṛṣṭi cikīrṣā tathā api prasiddhayoḥ ṛk sāmayoḥ bhedena anukīrtanāt pṛthivī agnyoḥ ca saṃnidhānāt tayoḥ eva eṣaḥ ṛk sāma śabda prayogaḥ ṛk sāma saṃbandhāt iti niścīyate
kṣattṛ śabdaḥ u pi hi kutaścid kāraṇāt rājānam upasarpan na nivārayitum pāryate
iyam eva ṛc iti ca yathākṣaranyāsam ṛcaḥ eva pṛthivī tvam avadhārayati
pṛthivyāḥ hi ṛk tve vadhāryamāṇe iyam ṛgā iva iti akṣara nyāsaḥ syāt
yaḥ evam vidvān sāma gāyati iti ca aṅga āśrayam avavijñānam upasaṃharati na pṛthivī ādi āśrayam
tathā lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāsīta iti yadi api saptamī nirdiṣṭāḥ lokāḥ tathā api sāmni eva te adhyasyeran dvitīyā nirdeśena sāmnaḥ upāsya tva avagamāt
sāmani hi lokeṣu adhyasyamāneṣu sāma loka ātmanā upāsitam bhavati anyathā punar lokāḥ sāma ātmanā upāsitāḥ syuḥ
etena etat gāyatram prāṇeṣu protam ityādi vyākhyātam
yatra api tulyaḥ dvitīyā nirdeśaḥ atha khalu amum ādityam saptavidham sāma upāsīta iti tatra api samastasya khalu sāmnaḥ upāsanam sādhu tu pañcavidhasya atha saptavidhasya iti ca sāmnaḥ eva upāsya tva upakramāt tasmin eva āditya ādi adhyāsaḥ
etasmāt eva ca sāmnaḥ upāsya tva avagamāt pṛthivī hiṃkāraḥ ityādi nirdeśa viparyaye hiṃkāra ādiṣu eva pṛthivī ādi dṛṣṭiḥ
tasmāt anaṅga āśrayāḥ āditya ādi matayaḥ aṅgeṣu udgītha ādiṣu kṣipyeran iti siddham
āsīnaḥ sambhavāt
āsīnādhikaraṇam
karma aṅga saṃbaddheṣu tāvat upāsaneṣu karma tantra tvāt na āsana ādi cintā
nā api samyak darśane vastu tantra tvāt vijñānasya
itareṣu tu upāsaneṣu kim aniyamena tiṣṭhan āsīnaḥ śayānaḥ vā pravarteta uta niyamena āsīnaḥ eva iti cintayati
tatra aniyamaḥ śarīra sthiteḥ iti evam prāpte bravīti āsīnaḥ eva upāsīta iti
kutas
saṃbhavāt
upāsanam nāma samāna pratyaya pravāha karaṇam
na ca tat gacchataḥ dhāvataḥ vā saṃbhavati gati ādīnām citta vikṣepa kara tvāt
tiṣṭhataḥ pi deha dhāraṇe vyāpṛtam manaḥ na sūkṣma vastu nirīkṣaṇa kṣamam bhavati
śayānasya api akasmāt eva nidrayā abhibhūyate
āsīnasya tu evaṃjātīyakaḥ bhūyān doṣaḥ su pariharaḥ iti saṃbhavati tasya upāsanam
dhyānāt ca
api ca dhyāyati arthaḥ eṣaḥ yat samāna pratyaya pravāha karaṇam
dhyāyatiḥ ca praśithila aṅga ceṣṭeṣu pratiṣṭhita dṛṣṭiṣu eka viṣaya ākṣipta citteṣu upacaryamāṇaḥ dṛśyate dhyāyati bakaḥ dhyāyati proṣita bandhuḥ iti
āsīnaḥ ca anāyāsaḥ bhavati
tasmāt api āsīna karma upāsanam
acala tvam ca apekṣya
api ca dhyāyati iva pṛthivī iti atra pṛthivī ādiṣu acala tvam eva apekṣya dhyāyati vādaḥ bhavati
tat ca liṅgam upāsanasya āsīna karma tve
smaranti ca
smaranti api ca śiṣṭāḥ upāsana aṅga tvena āsanam śucau deśe pratiṣṭhāpya sthiram āsanam ātmanaḥ ityādinā
atas eva padmaka ādīnām āsana viśeṣāṇām upadeśaḥ yoga śāstre
yatra ekāgra tā tatra aviśeṣāt
ekāgra tā adhikaraṇam
diś deśa kāleṣu saṃśayaḥ kim asti kaścid niyamaḥ na asti vā iti
prāyeṇa vaidikeṣu ārambheṣu diś ādi niyama darśanāt syāt iha api kaścid niyamaḥ iti yasya matiḥ tam pratyāha diś deśa kāleṣu artha lakṣaṇaḥ eva niyamaḥ
yatra eva asya diśi deśe kāle vā manasaḥ saukaryeṇa ekāgra tā bhavati tatra eva upāsīta prācī diś pūrvāhṇa prācīna pravaṇa ādi vat viśeṣa aśravaṇāt ekāgra tāyāḥ iṣṭāyāḥ sarvatra aviśeṣāt
nanu viśeṣam api kecid āmananti same śucau śarkarā vahni vālukā vivarjite śabda jala āśraya ādibhiḥ
manaḥ nukūle na tu cakṣu pīḍane guhā nivāta āśrayaṇe prayojayet iti yathā iti ucyate
satyam asti evaṃjātīyakaḥ niyamaḥ
sati tu etasmin tad gateṣu viśeṣeṣu aniyamaḥ iti suhṛd bhūtvā ācāryaḥ ācaṣṭe
manaḥ nukūle iti ca eṣā śrutiḥ yatra ekāgra tā tatra eva iti etat eva darśayati
ā prāyaṇāt tatra api hi dṛṣṭam
āprāyaṇa adhikaraṇam
āvṛttiḥ sarva upāsaneṣu ādartavyā iti sthitam ādye dhikaraṇe
tatra yāni tāvat samyak darśana arthāni upāsanāni tāni avaghāta ādi vat kārya paryavasānāni iti jñātam eva eṣām āvṛttiṃparimāṇam
na hi samyak darśane kārye niṣpanne yatna antaram kiṃcid śāsitum śakyam a niyojya brahma ātmatva pratipatteḥ śāstrasya aviṣaya tvāt
yāni punar abhyudaya phalāni teṣu eṣā cintā kim kiyantaṃcid kālam pratyayam āvartya uparamet uta yāvajjīvam āvartayet iti
kim tāvat prāptam
kiyantaṃcid kālam pratyayam abhyasya utsṛjet āvṛtti viśiṣṭasya upāsana śabda arthasya kṛta tvāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ā prāyaṇāt eva āvartayet pratyayam antya pratyaya vaśāt adṛṣṭa phala prāpteḥ
karmāṇi api hi janma antara upabhogyam phalam ārabhamāṇāni tad anurūpam bhāvanā vijñānam prāyaṇa kāle ākṣipanti sa vijñānaḥ bhavati sa vijñānam eva anvavakrāmati yad cittaḥ tena eṣa prāṇam āyāti prāṇaḥ tejasā yuktaḥ saha ātmanā yathā saṃkalpitam lokam nayati iti ca evamādi śrutibhyaḥ
tṛṇa jalūkā nidarśanāt ca
pratyayāḥ tu ete svarūpa anuvṛttim muktvā kim anyat prāyaṇa kāla bhāvi bhāvanā vijñānam apekṣeran
tasmāt ye pratipattavya phala bhāvanā ātmakāḥ pratyayāḥ teṣu ā prāyaṇāt āvṛttiḥ
tathā ca śrutiḥ sa yāvat kratuḥ ayam asmāt lokāt praiti iti prāyaṇa kāle pi pratyaya anuvṛttim darśayati
smṛtiḥ api yam yam vā api smaran bhāvam tyajati ante kalebaram
tam tam eva eti kauntaya sadā tad bhāva bhāvitaḥ iti prayāṇa kāle manasā acalena iti ca
saḥ nta velāyām etat trayam pratipadyeta iti ca maraṇa velāyām api kartavya śeṣam śrāvayati
tad adhigame uttara pūrva aghayoḥ aśleṣa vināśau tad vyapadeśāt
tad adhigama adhikaraṇam
gataḥ tṛtīya śeṣaḥ
atha idānīm brahma vidyā phalam prati cintā pratāyate
brahma adhigame sati tad viparīta phalam duritam kṣīyate na kṣīyate vā iti saṃśayaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam
phala artha tvāt karmaṇaḥ phalam a dattvā na saṃbhāvyate kṣayaḥ
phala dāyinī hi asya śaktiḥ śrutyā samadhigatā
yadi tat antareṇa eva phala upabhogam apavṛjyeta śrutiḥ kadarthitā syāt
smaranti ca na hi karma kṣīyate iti
nanu evam sati prāyaścitta upadeśaḥ narthakaḥ prāpnoti na eṣa doṣaḥ prāyaścittānām naimittika tva upapatteḥ gṛha dāha iṣṭi ādi vat
api ca prāyaścittānām doṣa saṃyogena vidhānāt bhavet api doṣa kṣapaṇa artha tā
na tu evam brahma vidyāyām vidhānam asti
nanu an abhyupagamyamāne brahma vidaḥ karma kṣaye tad phalasya avaśya bhoktavya tvāt anirmokṣaḥ syāt nā iti ucyate
deśa kāla nimitta apekṣaḥ mokṣaḥ karma phala vat bhaviṣyati
tasmāt na brahma adhigame durita nivṛttiḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ tad adhigame brahma adhigame sati uttara pūrvayoḥ aghayoḥ aśleṣa vināśau bhavataḥ uttarasya aśleṣaḥ pūrvasya vināśaḥ
kasmāt
tad vyapadeśāt
tathā hi brahma vidyā prakriyāyām saṃbhāvyamāna saṃbandhasya āgāminaḥ duritasya anabhisaṃbandham viduṣaḥ vyapadiśati yathā puṣkarapalāśe āpaḥ na śliṣyante evam evaṃvidi pāpam karma na śliṣyate iti
tathā vināśam api pūrva upacitasya duritasya vyapadiśati tat yathā iṣīkā tūlam agnau protam pradūyeta evam ha asya sarve pāpmānaḥ pradūyante iti
ayam aparaḥ karma kṣaya vyapadeśaḥ bhavati bhidyate hṛdaya grandhiḥ chidyante sarva saṃśayāḥ
kṣīyante ca asya karmāṇi tasmin dṛṣṭe parāvare iti
yat uktam anupabhukta phalasya karmaṇaḥ kṣaya kalpanāyām śāstram kadarthitam syāt iti na eṣa doṣaḥ
na hi vayam karmaṇaḥ phala dāyinīm śaktim avajānīmahe
vidyate eva sā
sā tu vidyā ādinā kāraṇa antareṇa pratibadhyate iti vadāmaḥ
śakti sadbhāva mātre ca śāstram vyāpriyate na pratibandha apratibandhayoḥ api
na hi karma kṣīyate iti etat api smaraṇam autsargikam na hi bhogāt ṛte karma kṣīyate tad artha tvāt iti
iṣyate eva tu prāyaścitta ādinā tasya kṣayaḥ sarvam pāpmānam tarati tarati brahmahatyām yaḥ u śvamedhena yajate yaḥ ca enam evam veda ityādi śruti smṛtibhyaḥ
yat tu uktam naimittikāni prāyaścittāni bhaviṣyanti iti tat asat doṣa saṃyogena codyamānānām eṣām doṣa nirghāta phala saṃbhave phala antara kalpanā anupapatteḥ
yat punar etat uktam na prāyaścitta vat doṣa kṣaya uddeśena vidyā vidhānam asti iti atra brūmaḥ saguṇāsu tāvat vidyāsu vidyate eva vidhānam tāsu ca vākyaśeṣe aiśvarya prāptiḥ pāpa nivṛttiḥ ca vidyāvataḥ ucyate tayoḥ ca avivakṣā kāraṇam na asti iti atas pāpma prahāṇa pūrvaka aiśvarya prāptiḥ tāsām phalam iti niścīyate
nirguṇāyām tu vidyāyām yadi api vidhānam nā asti tathā api akartṛ ātma tva bodhāt karma pradāha siddhiḥ
aśleṣaḥ iti ca āgāmiṣu karmasu kartṛ tvam eva na pratipadyate brahma vid iti darśayati
atikrānteṣu tu yadi api mithyājñānāt kartṛ tvam pratipede iva tathā api vidyā sāmarthyāt mithyājñāna nivṛtteḥ tāni api pravilīyante iti āha vināśe iti
pūrva siddha kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tva viparītam hi triṣu api kāleṣu akartṛ tva abhoktṛ tva svarūpam brahma aham asmi na itas pūrvam api kartā bhoktā vā aham āsam na idānīm na api bhaviṣyat kāle iti brahma vid avagacchati
evam eva ca mokṣaḥ upapadyate
anyathā hi anādi kāla pravṛttānām karmaṇām kṣaya abhāve mokṣa abhāvaḥ syāt
na ca deśa kāla nimitta apekṣaḥ mokṣaḥ karma phala vat bhavitum arhati
anitya tva prasaṅgāt parokṣa tva anupapatteḥ ca jñāna phalasya
tasmāt brahma adhigame durita kṣayaḥ iti sthitam
itarasya api evam asaṃśleṣaḥ pāte tu
itarā saṃśleṣa adhikaraṇam
pūrvasmin adhikaraṇe bandha hetoḥ aghasya svābhāvikasya aśleṣa vināśau jñāna nimittau śāstra vyapadeśāt nirūpitau
dharmasya punar śāstrīya tvāt śāstrīyeṇa jñānena avirodhaḥ iti āśaṅkya tad nirākaraṇāya pūrva adhikaraṇa nyāya atideśaḥ kriyate itarasya api puṇyasya karmaṇaḥ evam agha vat asaṃśleṣaḥ vināśaḥ ca jñānavataḥ bhavataḥ
kutas
tasya api sva phala hetu tvena jñāna phala pratibandhi tva prasaṅgāt ubhe u ha eva eṣa ete tarati ityādi śrutiṣu ca duṣkṛta vat sukṛtasya api praṇāśa vyapadeśāt akartṛ ātmatva bodha nimittasya ca karma kṣayasya sukṛta duṣkṛtayoḥ tulya tvāt kṣīyante ca asya karmāṇi iti ca aviśeṣa śruteḥ
yatra api kevalaḥ eva pāpma śabdaḥ paṭhyate tatra api tena eva puṇyam api ākalitam iti draṣṭavyam jñāna apekṣayā nikṛṣṭa phala tvāt
asti ca śrutau puṇye pi pāpma śabdaḥ na enam setum ahar rātre tarataḥ iti atra saha duṣkṛtena sukṛtam api anukramya sarve pāpmānaḥ tasmāt nivartante iti aviśeṣeṇa eva prakṛte puṇye pāpma śabda prayogāt
pāte tu iti tu śabdaḥ
evam dharma adharmayoḥ bandha hetvoḥ vidyā sāmarthyāt aśleṣa vināśa siddheḥ avaśyaṃbhāvinī viduṣaḥ śarīrapāte muktiḥ iti avadhārayati
anārabdha kārye eva tu pūrve tad avadheḥ
anārabdha adhikaraṇam
pūrvayoḥ adhikaraṇayoḥ jñāna nimittaḥ sukṛta duṣkṛtayoḥ vināśaḥ vadhāritaḥ
sa kim aviśeṣeṇa ārabdha kāryayoḥ anārabdha kāryayoḥ ca bhavati uta viśeṣeṇa anārabdha kāryayoḥ eva iti vicāryate
tatra ubhe u ha eva eṣa ete tarati iti evamādi śrutiṣu aviśeṣa śravaṇāt aviśeṣeṇa eva kṣayaḥ iti evam prāpte pratyāha anārabdha kārye eva tu iti
apravṛtta phale eva pūrve janma antara saṃcite asmin api ca janmani prāk jñāna utpatteḥ saṃcite sukṛta duṣkṛte jñāna adhigamāt kṣīyete
na tu ārabdha kārye sāmi bhukta phale yābhyām etat brahma jñāna āyatanam janma nirmitam
kutas etat
tasya tāvat eva ciram yāvat na vimokṣye saṃpatsye iti śarīrapātau adhikaraṇāt kṣema prāpteḥ
itarathā hi jñānāt aśeṣa karma kṣaye sati sthiti hetu abhāvāt jñāna prāpti anantaram eva kṣemam
text2:
diṣṭam brahma adhyastam ādityaḥ brahma iti ādeśaḥ ityādiṣu prathamaiḥ diṣṭāḥ ca
pṛthivī ādayaḥ caramaiḥ diṣṭāḥ hiṃkāra ādayaḥ pṛthivī hiṃkāraḥ ityādi śrutiṣu atas a aṅgeṣu āditya ādiṣu aṅgam atikṣepaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ āditya ādi matayaḥ eva aṅgeṣu udgītha ādiṣu kṣipyera kutas upapatteḥ upapadyate
hi evam apūrva saṃikarṣāt āditya ādi matibhiḥ saṃskriyamāṇeṣu udgītha ādiṣu karma samṛddhiḥ yat eva vidyayā karoti śraddhayā upaiṣadā tat eva vīryavattaram bhavati iti ca vidyāyāḥ karma samṛddhi hetu tvam darśayati bhavatu
karma samṛddhi phaleṣu evam svatatra phaleṣu tu katham yaḥ etat evam vidvān lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāste ityādiṣu teṣu api adhikṛta adhikārāt prakṛta apūrva saṃikarṣeṇa eva phala kalpaāḥ yuktāḥ godoha ādi iyama vat phala ātmaka tvāt ca udgītha ādibhyaḥ karma ātmakebhyaḥ
utkarṣa upapattiḥ āditya ādi prāpti lakṣaṇam hi karma phalam śiṣyate śrutiṣu api ca om iti etat akṣaram udgītham upāsīta khalu etasya eva akṣarasya upavyākhyā bhavati iti ca udgītham eva upāsya tveā upakramya āditya ādi matīḥ vidadhāti yat tu uktam udgītha ādi matibhiḥ upāsyamānāḥ āditya ādayaḥ karma bhūyam
bhūtvā phalam kariṣyati iti tat ayuktam svayam eva upāsaasya karma tvāt phalavat tva upapatteḥ āditya ādi bhāve api ca tat etat etasyām ṛci adhyūḍham sāma iti tu lākṣaṇikaḥ eva ṛk sāma śabda prayogaḥ lakṣaṇā
ca yathāsaṃbhavam viprakṛṣṭe vā sva artha pravartate tatra yadi api ṛk sāmayoḥ pṛthivī agi dṛṣṭi cikīrṣā tathā api prasiddhayoḥ ṛk sāmayoḥ pṛthivī agi dṛṣṭi cikīrṣā tathā api prasiddhayoḥ ṛk sāmayoḥ pṛthivī agyoḥ ca saṃidhāāt tayoḥ eva eṣaḥ ṛk sāma śabda prayogaḥ ṛk sāma saṃbadhāt iti
kṣattṛ śabdaḥ api hi kutaścid kāraṇāt rājāam upasarpe iva ārayitum pāryate iyam eva ṛc iti ca yathā akṣara yāsam ṛcaḥ eva pṛthivī tvam avadhārayati pṛthivyāḥ hi ṛc tu eva dhāryamāṇe iyam ṛc eva iti akṣara yāsaḥ syāt yat
evam gāyati iti ca aṅga āśrayam upasaṃharati a pṛthivī ādi āśrayam tathā lokeṣu pañcavidham sāma upāsīta iti yadi api saptamīiḥ diṣṭāḥ lokāḥ tathā api sāmi eva te adhyasyera
sāmaḥ upāsya tva avagamāt hi lokeṣu adhyasyamāeṣu sāma loka ātma upāsitam bhavati ayathā puas lokāḥ sāma ātma ā upāsitāḥ syuḥ ete etat gāyatram prāṇeṣu protam ityādi vyākhyātam
yatra api tulyaḥ dvitīya airdeśaḥ atha khalu amum ādityam saptavidham sāma upāsīta iti tatra api samastasya khalu sāma tu pañcavidhasya atha saptavidhasya iti
ca sāmaḥ eva upāsya tva upakramāt tasmin eva āditya ādi adhyāsaḥ etasmāt eva ca sāmaḥ upāsya tva avagamāt pṛthivī hiṃkāraḥ ityādi nirdeśa viparyaye pi hiṃkāra ādiṣu eva pṛthivī ādi dṛṣṭiḥ tasmāt a aṅga āśrayāḥ āditya ādi matayaḥ aṅgeṣu udgītha ādiṣu kṣipyera eti
siddham sambhavāt āsīādhikaraṇam karma aṅga saṃbaddheṣu tāvat upāsaeṣu karma tatra tvāt samyagdarśae vastu tatra tvāt vijñāasya itareṣu tu upāsaeṣu kim tiṣṭha
vā pravarteta uta eva iti citayati tatra aiyamaḥ śarīra sthiteḥ iti evam prāpte bravīti eva upāsīta iti kutas saṃbhavāt
ca tat gacchataḥ dhāvataḥ vā saṃbhavati gati ādīām citta vikṣepa kara tvāt tiṣṭhataḥ api dehadhāraṇe vyāpṛtam bhavati akasmāt eva
abhibhūyate tu evaṃjātīyakaḥ bhūyādoṣaḥ supariharaḥ iti saṃbhavati dhyā āt ca api ca dhyāyati arthaḥ eṣaḥ yat samāa pratyaya pravāha karaṇam dhyāyatiḥ ca praśithila aṅga ceṣṭeṣu pratiṣṭhita dṛṣṭiṣu
eka viṣaya ākṣipta citteṣu upacaryamāṇaḥ dṛśyate dhyāyati bakaḥ dhyāyati proṣita badhuḥ iti ca bhavati tasmāt api acala tvam ca apekṣya api ca dhyāyati iva
pṛthivī iti atra pṛthivī ādiṣu acalatvam eva apekṣya dhyāyativādaḥ bhavati tat ca liṅgam smarati ca smarati api ca śiṣṭāḥ śucau deśe
pratiṣṭhāpya sthiram ityādiā atas eva atas eva upadeśaḥ yoga śāstre yatra ekāgra tā tatra aviśeṣāt ekāgra tā adhikaraṇam diś deśa kāleṣu saṃśayaḥ kim asti vā iti prāyeṇa
vaidikeṣu ārambheṣu diś ādi iyama darśaāt syāt iha api kaścid iyamaḥ iti yasya matiḥ tam pratyāha diś deśa kāleṣu artha lakṣaṇaḥ eva iyamaḥ yatra eva asya diśi deśe kāle vā maasaḥ
saukaryeṇa ekāgra tā bhavati tatra eva upāsīta prācī diś pūrvāhṇa prācī apravaṇa ādi vat viśeṣa aśravaṇāt ekāgra tāyāḥ iṣṭāyāḥ sarvatra aviśeṣāt viśeṣam api same śucau śarkarā vahi vālukā vivarjite śabda jala āśraya ādibhiḥ tu cakṣu pīḍae
prayojayet iti yathā iti ucyate satyam asti evaṃjātīyakaḥ iyamaḥ sati tu etasmin tad gateṣu viśeṣeṣu aiyamaḥ iti suhṛd bhūtvā ācāryaḥ ācaṣṭe maoukūle iti ca eṣā śrutiḥ yatra ekāgra tā
tatra eva eti etat eva darśayati āprāyaṇāt tatra api hi dṛṣṭam āprāyaṇa adhikaraṇam āvṛttiḥ sarva upāsaeṣu ādartavyā iti sthitam ādye adhikaraṇe tatra tāvat avaghāta ādi vat kārya paryavasāāi iti jñātam eva eṣām āvṛttiṃparimāṇam a hi
samyak darśae kārye kiṃcid śāsitum śakyam aiyojya brahma ātmatva pratipatteḥ śāstrasya aviṣaya tvāt teṣu eṣā citā kim kiyataṃcid kālam pratyayam āvartya uparamet uta yāvajjīvam āvartayet iti kim
tāvat prāptam kiyataṃcid kālam pratyayam abhyasya utsṛjet āvṛtti viśiṣṭasya upāsa a śabda arthasya kṛta tvāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ā prāyaṇāt eva āvartayet pratyayam ati a pratyaya vaśāt adṛṣṭa phala prāpteḥ karmāṇi api hi phalam ārabhamāṇāi prāyaṇa kāle ākṣipati
sa vijñāaḥ bhavati sa vijñāam eva avakrāmati prāṇam āyāti prāṇaḥ tejasā yuktaḥ saha ātmaā yathā saṃkalpitam lokam iti ca evamādi śrutibhyaḥ tṛṇa jalūkā ai darśaāt ca pratyayāḥ tu ete muktvā kim ayat prāyaṇa kāla bhāvi apekṣera
tasmāt ye pratipattavya phala bhāva ātmakāḥ pratyayāḥ teṣu ā prāyaṇāt āvṛttiḥ tathā ca śrutiḥ sa yāvat kratuḥ ayam asmāt lokāt praiti iti prāyaṇa kāle api pratyaya āvṛttim darśayati smṛtiḥ api yam yam
vā api smara bhāvam tyajatyate kalebaram tam tam eva eti kautaya sadā tad bhāva bhāvitaḥ iti prayāṇa kāle iti ca sota velāyām etat trayam pratipadyeta iti ca maraṇa velāyām api kartavya śeṣam
śrāvayati tad adhigame uttara pūrva aghayoḥ aśleṣa viāśau tad vyapadeśāt tad adhigama adhikaraṇam gataḥ tṛtīya śeṣaḥ atha idāīm brahma vidyā phalam prati citā pratāyate brahma adhigame sati tad viparīta phalam duritam kṣīyate a kṣīyate vā iti saṃśayaḥ
kim tāvat prāptam phala artha tvāt karmaṇaḥ phalam a dattvā a saṃbhāvyate kṣayaḥ phala dāyiī hi asya śaktiḥ śrutyā samadhigatā yadi tat atareṇa eva phala upabhogam apavṛjyeta śrutiḥ kadarthitā syāt
smarati ca a hi karma kṣīyate iti sati prāyaścitta upadeśaḥ arthakaḥ ā eṣa doṣaḥ prāyaścittāām aimittika tva upapatteḥ gṛha dāha iṣṭi ādi vat api ca prāyaścittāām doṣa saṃyoge
doṣa kṣapaṇa artha tā tu evam brahmavidyāyām brahma vidaḥ karma kṣaye tad phalasya avaśya bhoktavya tvāt brahma vidaḥ karma kṣaye tad phalasya avaśya bhoktavya tvāt syāt ucyate deśa kāla aimitta apekṣaḥ mokṣaḥ karma phala vat bhaviṣyati tasmāt
a brahma adhigame iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ tad adhigame brahma adhigame sati uttara pūrvayoḥ aghayoḥ aśleṣa viāśau bhavataḥ uttarasya aśleṣaḥ pūrvasya viāśaḥ kasmāt tad vyapadeśāt
tathā hi brahma vidyā prakriyāyām viduṣaḥ vyapadiśati yathā puṣkarapalāśe śliṣyate evam evaṃvidi pāpam karma śliṣyate iti tathā
viāśam api pūrva upacitasya duritasya vyapadiśati tat yathā iṣīkā tūlam agau protam pradūyeta evam ha asya sarve pāpmā pradūyate iti ayam aparaḥ karma kṣaya vyapadeśaḥ bhavati bhidyate hṛdaya gradhiḥ
chidyate sarva saṃśayāḥ kṣīyate ca asya karmāṇi tasmin dṛṣṭe parāvare iti yat uktam aupabhukta phalasya karmaṇaḥ kṣaya kalpaāyām śāstram kadarthitam syāt iti ā eṣa doṣaḥ a hi vayam
karmaṇaḥ phala dāyiīm śaktim avajāīmahe vidyate eva sā sā tu kāraṇa atareṇa pratibadhyate iti vadāmaḥ śakti sadbhāva mātre ca śāstram vyāpriyate a pratibadha a pratibadhayoḥ api
a hi karma kṣīyate iti etat api smaraṇam autsargikam a hi bhogāt ṛte karma kṣīyate tad artha tvāt iti iṣyate eva tu
tasya kṣayaḥ sarvam pāpmā tarati tarati brahmahatyām yaḥ uśvamedhea yajate yaḥ u ca evam veda ityādi śruti smṛtibhyaḥ yat tu uktam
bhaviṣyati iti tat asat doṣa saṃyoge doṣaiḥ ghāta phala saṃbhave phala atara kalpa ā upapatteḥ yat puar etat uktam a prāyaścitta vat doṣa kṣaya uddeśe a vidyā vidhāam asti iti atra brūmaḥ saguṇāsu tāvat vidyāsu vidyate eva tāsu
ca vākyaśeṣe aiśvarya prāptiḥ vidyāvataḥ ucyate tayoḥ ca avivakṣā kāraṇam āsti iti atas pāpma prahāṇa pūrvaka aiśvarya prāptiḥ tāsām phalam iti tu vidyāyām yadi api tathā api
akartṛ ātmatva bodhāt karma pradāha siddhiḥ aśleṣaḥ iti ca āgāmiṣu karmasu kartṛ tvam eva a pratipadyate brahma vid iti darśayati atikrāteṣu tu yadi api mithyājñāāt kartṛ tvam pratipede iva tathā api vidyā sāmarthya a mithyājñā ai vṛtteḥ
pravilīyate iti āha viāśaḥ iti pūrva siddha kartṛ tva bhoktṛ tva viparītam hi triṣu api kāleṣu akartṛ tva abhoktṛ tva svarūpam brahma aham asmi etaḥ pūrvam api kartā bhoktā vā aham āsam bhaviṣyat kāle iti
brahma vid avagacchati evam eva ca mokṣaḥ upapadyate ayathā hi a ādi kāla pravṛttāām karmaṇām kṣaya abhāve mokṣa abhāvaḥ syāt ca deśa kāla aimitta apekṣaḥ mokṣaḥ karma phala vat bhavitum arhati
aitya tva prasaṅgāt parokṣa tva aupapatteḥ ca jñā a phalasya tasmāt brahma adhigame durita kṣayaḥ iti sthitam itarasya api evam asaṃśleṣaḥ pāte tu itara asaṃśleṣa adhikaraṇam pūrvasmin adhikaraṇe badha hetoḥ aghasya svābhāvikasya aśleṣa viāśau jñā aimittau śāstra vyapadeśa airūpitau dharmasya puaḥ
śāstrīya tvāt śāstrīyeṇa avirodhaḥ iti āśaṅkya taiḥ ākaraṇāya pūrva adhikaraṇayāya atideśaḥ kriyate itarasya api puṇyasya karmaṇaḥ evam agha vat asaṃśleṣaḥ viāśaḥ ca bhavataḥ kutas tasya api sva phala hetu tveai
jñā a phala pratibadhi tva prasaṅgāt ubhe u ha eva eṣa ete tarati ityādi śrutiṣu ca duṣkṛta vat sukṛtasya api praṇāśa vyapadeśāt akartṛ ātmatva bodha aimittasya ca karma kṣayasya sukṛta duṣkṛtayoḥ tulya tvāt kṣīyate ca asya karmāṇi iti ca aviśeṣa śruteḥ
yatra api kevalaḥ eva pāpma śabdaḥ paṭhyate tatra api puṇyam api ākalitam iti draṣṭavyam jñā āpekṣayā ikṛṣṭa phala tvāt asti ca śrutau puṇye api pāpma śabdaḥ setum ahar rātre tarataḥ iti atra
saha sukṛtam api aukramya sarve iti aviśeṣeṇa eva prakṛte puṇye pāpma śabda prayogāt pāte tu iti tuśabdaḥ avadhāraṇa arthaḥ evam dharma adharmayoḥ badha hetvoḥ vidyā sāmarthyāt aśleṣa viāśa siddheḥ viduṣaḥ śarīrapāte
muktiḥ iti avadhārayati aārabdha kārye eva tu pūrve tad avadheḥ aārabdha adhikaraṇam pūrvayoḥ adhikaraṇayoḥ sukṛta duṣkṛtayoḥ sa kim aviśeṣeṇa ārabdha kāryayoḥ aārabdha kāryayoḥ ca bhavati
uta viśeṣeṇa aārabdha kāryayoḥ eva iti vicāryate tatra ubhe u ha eva eṣa ete tarati iti evamādi śrutiṣu aviśeṣa śravaṇāt aviśeṣeṇa eva kṣayaḥ iti evam prāpte pratyāha aārabdha kārye
eva tu iti apravṛtta phale eva pūrve asmi api ca prāk jñā utpatteḥ saṃcite sukṛta duṣkṛte jñā adhigamāt kṣīyete a tu ārabdha kārye sāmi bhukta phale
yābhyām etat kutas etat tasya tāvat eva ciram a vimokṣye saṃpatsye iti śarīrapātau adhikaraṇāt kṣema prāpteḥ
itarathā hi jñāāt aśeṣa karma kṣaye sati sthiti hetu abhāvāt eva kṣemam

text1:
kutas etat
tasya tāvat eva ciram yāvat na vimokṣye saṃpatsye iti śarīrapātau adhikaraṇāt kṣema prāpteḥ
itarathā hi jñānāt aśeṣa karma kṣaye sati sthiti hetu abhāvāt jñāna prāpti anantaram eva kṣemam aśnuvīta
tatra śarīrapāta pratīkṣām na ācakṣīta
nanu vastu balena eva ayam akartṛ ātma avabodhaḥ karmāṇi kṣapayan katham kānicid kṣapayet kānicid ca upekṣeta
text2:
kutas etat tasya tāvat eva ciram a vimokṣye saṃpatsye iti śarīrapātau adhikaraṇāt kṣema prāpteḥ
itarathā hi jñāāt aśeṣa karma kṣaye sati sthiti hetu abhāvāt eva kṣemam tatra śarīrapāta pratīkṣām ācakṣīta ayam akartṛ ātma avabodhaḥ karmāṇi kṣapaya
katham kāicid kṣapayet kāicid ca upekṣeta

text1:
a tāvat an āśritya ārabdha kāryam karma āśayam jñāna utpattiḥ upapadyate
āśrite ca tasmin kulāla cakra vat pravṛtta vegasya antarāle pratibandha asaṃbhavāt bhavati vega kṣaya pratipālanam
akartṛ ātma bodhaḥ u hi mithyājñāna bādhanena karmāṇi ucchinatti
bādhitam api tu mithyājñā
text2:
a tāvat a āśritya ārabdha kāryam karma āśayam jñā utpattiḥ upapadyate āśrite ca tasmin kulāla cakra vat pravṛtta vegasya a tarāle pratibadha asaṃbhavāt bhavati vega kṣaya pratipālaam hi
bādhitam api tu mithyājñā

text1:
eva
api ca na eva atra vivaditavyam brahma vidā kaṃcid kālam śarīram dhriyate na vā dhriyate iti
katham hi ekasya sva hṛdaya pratyayam brahma vedanam deha dhāraṇam ca apareṇa pratikṣeptum śakyeta
śruti smṛtiṣu ca sthita prajña lakṣaṇa nirdeśena etat eva
text2:
eva api ca vivaditavyam brahma vidā kaṃcid kālam śarīram
dhriyate a vā dhriyate iti katham hi ekasya sva hṛdaya pratyayam dehadhāraṇam ca apareṇa pratikṣeptum śakyeta śruti smṛtiṣu ca etat eva

text1:
tasmāt anārabdha kāryayoḥ eva sukṛta duṣkṛtayoḥ vidyā sāmarthyāt kṣayaḥ iti nirṇayaḥ
agnihotra ādi tu tad kāryāya eva tad darśanāt
agnihotra ādi adhikaraṇam
text2: tasmāt a ārabdha kāryayoḥ eva sukṛta duṣkṛtayoḥ vidyā sāmarthyāt kṣayaḥ iti agihotra ādi tu tad kāryāya eva tad darśaāt agihotra ādi adhikaraṇam

text1:
saḥ u tideśaḥ sarva puṇya viṣayaḥ iti āśaṅkya prativakti agnihotra ādi tu iti
tu śabdaḥ āśaṅkām apanudati
yat nityam karma vaidikam agnihotra ādi tat tad kāryāya eva bhavati
jñānasya yat kāryam tat eva asya api kāryam iti arthaḥ
kutas
tam etam veda anuvacanena brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣanti yajñena dānena ityādi darśanāt
nanu jñāna karmaṇoḥ vilakṣaṇa kārya tvāt kārya ekatva anupapattiḥ na eṣa doṣaḥ jvara maraṇa kāryayoḥ api dadhi viṣayoḥ guḍa mantra saṃyuktayoḥ tṛpti puṣṭi kārya darśanāt tadvat karmaṇaḥ api jñāna saṃyuktasya mokṣa kārya upapatteḥ
nanu anārabhyaḥ mokṣaḥ katham asya karma kārya tvam ucyate
na eṣa doṣaḥ ārāt upakāraka tvāt karmaṇaḥ
jñānasya eva hi prāpakam sat karma praṇāḍyā mokṣa kāraṇam iti upacaryate
atas eva ca atikrānta viṣayam etat kārya ekatva abhidhānam
na hi brahma vidaḥ āgāmi agnihotra ādi saṃbhavati a niyojya brahma ātmatva pratipatteḥ śāstrasya aviṣaya tvāt
saguṇāsu tu vidyāsu kartṛ tva anativṛtteḥ saṃbhavati āgāmi api agnihotra ādi
tasya api nirabhisaṃdhinaḥ kārya antara abhāvāt vidyā saṃgati upapattiḥ
kiṃviṣayam punar idam aśleṣa vināśa vacanam kiṃviṣayam vā adaḥ viniyoga vacanam ekeṣām śākhinām tasya putrāḥ dāyam upayanti suhṛdaḥ sādhu kṛtyām dviṣantaḥ pāpa kṛtyām iti atas uttaram paṭhati
atas nyā pi hi ekeṣām ubhayoḥ
atas gnihotra ādeḥ nityāt karmaṇaḥ anyā api hi asti sādhu kṛtyā yā phalam abhisaṃdhāya kriyate tasyāḥ eṣa viniyogaḥ uktaḥ ekeṣām śākhinām suhṛdaḥ sādhu kṛtyām upayanti iti
tasyāḥ eva ca idam agha vat aśleṣa vināśa nirūpaṇam itarasya api evam asaṃśleṣaḥ iti
tathājātīyakasya kāmyasya karmaṇaḥ vidyām prati anupakāraka tve saṃpratipattiḥ ubhayoḥ api jaimini bādarāyaṇayoḥ ācāryayoḥ
yat eva vidyayā iti hi
vidyā jñāna sādhanatva adhikaraṇam
samadhigatam etat anantara adhikaraṇe nityam agnihotra ādikam karma mumukṣuṇā mokṣa prayojana uddeśena kṛtam upātta durita kṣaya hetu dvāreṇa sattva śuddhi kāraṇatām pratipadyamānam mokṣa prayojana brahma adhigama nimitta tvena brahmavidyayā saha eka kāryam bhavati iti
tatra agnihotra ādi karma aṅga vyapāśraya vidyā saṃyuktam kevalam ca asti yaḥ evam vidvān yajati yaḥ evam vidvān juhoti yaḥ evam vidvān śaṃsati yaḥ evam vidvān gāyati tasmāt evaṃvidam eva brahmāṇam kurvīta tena ubhau kurutaḥ yaḥ ca etat evam veda yaḥ ca na veda ityādi vacanebhyaḥ vidyā saṃyuktam asti kevalam api asti
tatra idam vicāryate kim vidyā saṃyuktam eva agnihotra ādikam karma mumukṣoḥ vidyā hetutvena tayā saha eka kāryatvam pratipadyate na kevalam
uta vidyā saṃyuktam kevalam ca aviśeṣeṇa iti
kutas saṃśayaḥ
tam etam ātmānam yajñena vividiṣanti iti yajña ādīnām aviśeṣeṇa ātma vedana aṅgatvena śravaṇāt vidyā saṃyuktasya ca agnihotra ādeḥ viśiṣṭa tva avagamāt
kim tāvat prāptam
vidyā saṃyuktam eva karma agnihotra ādi ātma vidyā śeṣa tvam pratipadyate na vidyā hīnam vidyā upetasya viśiṣṭa tva avagamāt vidyā vihīnāt yat ahar eva juhoti tat ahar punar mṛtyum apajayati evam vidvān ityādi śrutibhyaḥ buddhyā yuktaḥ yayā pārtha karma bandham prahāsyasi dūreṇa hi avaram karma buddhi yogāt dhanaṃjayaḥ ityādi smṛtibhyaḥ ca iti evam prāpte pratipādyate yat eva vidyayā iti hi
satyam etat vidyā saṃyuktam karma agnihotra ādikam vidyā vihīnāt karmaṇaḥ gnihotrāt viśiṣṭam vidvān iva brāhmaṇaḥ vidyā vihīnāt brāhmaṇāt
tathā api na atyantam anapekṣam vidyā vihīnam karma agnihotra ādikam
kasmāt
tam etam ātmānam yajñena vividiṣanti iti aviśeṣeṇa agnihotra ādeḥ vidyā hetutvena śruta tvāt
nanu vidyā saṃyuktasya agnihotra ādeḥ vidyā vihīnāt viśiṣṭa tva avagamāt vidyā vihīnam agnihotra ādi ātma vidyā hetutvena anapekṣam eva iti yuktam na etat evam
vidyā sahāyasya agnihotra ādeḥ vidyā nimittena sāmarthya atiśayena yogāt ātma jñānam prati kaścid kāraṇatva atiśayaḥ bhaviṣyati na tathā vidyā vihīnasya iti yuktam kalpayitum
na tu yajñena vividiṣanti iti atra aviśeṣeṇa ātma jñāna aṅgatvena śrutasya agnihotra ādeḥ anaṅgatvam śakyam abhyupagantum
tathā hi śrutiḥ yat eva vidyayā karoti śraddhayā upaniṣadā tat eva vīryavattaram bhavati iti vidyā saṃyuktasya karmaṇaḥ gnihotra ādeḥ vīryavattara tva abhidhānena sva kāryam prati kaṃcid atiśayam bruvāṇā vidyā vihīnasya tasya eva tad prayojanam prati vīryavat tvam darśayati
karmaṇaḥ ca vīryavat tvam tat yat sva prayojana sādhana saha tvam
tasmāt vidyā saṃyuktam nityam agnihotra ādi vidyā vihīnam ca ubhayam api mumukṣuṇā mokṣa prayojana uddeśena iha janmani janmāntare ca prāk jñāna utpatteḥ kṛtam tat yathā sāmarthyam brahma adhigama pratibandha kāraṇa upātta durita kṣaya hetutva dvāreṇa brahma adhigama kāraṇa tvam pratipadyamānam śravaṇa manana śraddhā tātparya ādi antaraṅga kāraṇa apekṣam brahma vidyayā saha eka kāryam bhavati iti sthitam
bhogena tu itare kṣapayitvā sampadyate
itara kṣapaṇa adhikaraṇam
anārabdha kāryayoḥ puṇya pāpayoḥ vidyā sāmarthyāt kṣayaḥ uktaḥ
itare tu ārabdha kārye puṇya pāpe upabhogena kṣapayitvā brahma saṃpadyate tasya tāvat eva ciram yāvat na vimokṣye saṃpatsye iti brahma eva san brahma apyeti iti ca evamādi śrutibhyaḥ
nanu sati api samyagdarśane yathā prāk dehapātāt bheda darśanam dvi candra darśana nyāyena anuvṛttam evam paścāt api unuvarteta na nimitta abhavāt
upabhoga śeṣa kṣapaṇam hi tatra anuvṛtti nimittam na ca tādṛśam atra kiṃcid asti
nanu aparaḥ karma āśayaḥ bhinavam upabhogam ārapsyate na tasya dagdha bīja tvāt
mithyājñāna avaṣṭambham hi karmāntaram dehapāte upabhoga antaram ārabheta
tat ca mithyājñānam samyak jñānena dagdham iti atas sādhu etat ārabdha kārya kṣaye viduṣaḥ kaivalyam avaśyam bhavati iti
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye caturtha adhyāyasya prathamaḥ pādaḥ

caturthaḥ dhyāyaḥ
dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ
vāc manasi darśanāt śabdāt ca
vāc adhikaraṇam
asti prāyaṇa viṣayā śrutiḥ asya somya puruṣasya prayataḥ vāc manasi saṃpadyate manaḥ prāṇe prāṇaḥ tejasi tejaḥ parasyām devatāyām iti
kim iha vācaḥ eva vṛttimattyāḥ manasi saṃpattiḥ ucyate uta vāc vṛtteḥ iti viśayaḥ
tatra vāc eva tāvat manasi saṃpadyate iti prāptam
tathā hi śrutiḥ anugṛhītā bhavati
itarathā lakṣaṇā syāt
śruti lakṣaṇā viśaye ca śrutiḥ nyāyyā na lakṣaṇā
tasmāt vācaḥ eva ayam manasi pralayaḥ iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ vāc vṛttiḥ manasi saṃpadyate iti
katham vāc vṛttiḥ iti vyākhyāyate yāvatā vāc manasi iti eva ācāryaḥ paṭhati
satyam etat
paṭhiṣyati tu parastāt avibhāgaḥ vacanāt iti
tasmāt atra vṛtti upaśama mātram vivakṣati iti gamyate
tattva pralaya vivakṣāyām tu sarvatra eva avibhāga sāmyāt kim paratra eva viśiṃṣyāt avibhāgaḥ iti
tasmāt atra vṛtti upasaṃhāra vivakṣā
vāc vṛttiḥ pūrvam upasaṃhriyate manaḥ vṛttau avasthitāyām iti arthaḥ
kasmāt
darśanāt dṛśyate hi vāc vṛtteḥ pūrva upasaṃhāraḥ manaḥ vṛttau vidyamānāyām
na tu vācaḥ eva vṛttimattyā manasi upasaṃhāraḥ kenacid api draṣṭum śakyate
nanu śruti sāmarthyāt vācaḥ eva ayam manasi apyayaḥ yuktaḥ iti uktam na iti āha a tad prakṛti tvāt
yasya hi yatas utpattiḥ tasya tatra pralayaḥ nyāyyaḥ mṛdi iva śarāvasya
na ca manasaḥ vāc utpadyate iti kiṃcana pramāṇam asti
vṛtti udbhava abhibhavau tu aprakṛti samāśrayau api dṛśyete
pārthivebhyaḥ hi indhanebhyaḥ taijasasya agneḥ vṛttiḥ udbhavati apsu ca upaśāmyati
katham tarhi asmin pakṣe śabdaḥ vāc manasi saṃpadyate iti
atas āha śabdāt ca iti
śabdaḥ upi asmin pakṣe vṛtti vṛttimatoḥ abheda upacārāt iti arthaḥ
atas eva ca sarvāṇi anu
tasmāt upaśānta tejāḥ punarbhavam indriyaiḥ manasi saṃpadyamānaiḥ iti atra aviśeṣeṇa sarveṣām eva indriyāṇām manasi saṃpattiḥ śrūyate
tatra api atas eva vācaḥ iva cakṣuḥ ādīnām api sa vṛttike manasi avasthite vṛtti lopa darśanāt tattva pralaya asaṃbhavāt śabda upapatteḥ ca vṛtti dvāreṇa eva sarvāṇi indriyāṇi manaḥ nuvartante
sarveṣām karaṇānām manasi upasaṃhāra aviśeṣe sati vācaḥ pṛthak grahaṇam vāc manasi saṃpadyate iti udāharaṇa anurodhena
tat manaḥ prāṇaḥ uttarāt
manaḥ dhi karaṇam
samadhigatam etat vāc manasi saṃpadyate iti atra vṛtti saṃpatti vivakṣā iti
atha yat uttaram vākyam manaḥ prāṇe iti kim atra api vṛtti saṃpattiḥ eva vivakṣyate uta vṛttimat saṃpattiḥ iti vicikitsāyām vṛttimat saṃpattiḥ eva atra iti prāptam śruti anugrahāt
tad prakṛti tva upapatteḥ ca
tathā hi anna mayam hi somya manaḥ āpaḥ mayaḥ prāṇaḥ iti anna yoni manaḥ āmananti ap yonim ca prāṇam
āpaḥ ca annam asṛjanta iti śrutiḥ
atas ca yat manaḥ prāṇe pralīyate annam eva tat apsu pralīyate
annam hi manaḥ āpaḥ ca prāṇaḥ prakṛti vikāra abhedāt iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ tat api āgṛhīta bāhya indriya vṛtti manaḥ vṛtti dvāreṇa eva prāṇe pralīyate iti uttarāt vākyāt avagantavyam
tathā hi suṣupsoḥ mumūrṣoḥ ca prāṇa vṛttau parispanda ātmikāyām avasthitāyām manaḥ vṛttīnām upaśamaḥ dṛśyate
na ca manasaḥ sva rūpa apyayaḥ prāṇe saṃbhavati
a tad prakṛti tvāt
nanu darśitam manasaḥ prāṇa prakṛti tvam na etat sāram
na hi īdṛśena tad prakṛti tvena manaḥ prāṇe saṃpattum arhati
evam api hi anne manaḥ saṃpadyeta apsu ca annam apsu eva ca prāṇaḥ
na hi etasmin api pakṣe prāṇa bhāva pariṇatābhyaḥ dbhyaḥ manaḥ jāyate iti kiṃcana pramāṇam asti
tasmāt na manasaḥ prāṇe sva rūpa apyayaḥ
vṛtti apyaye tu śabdaḥ vakalpate vṛtti vṛttimatoḥ abheda upacārāt iti darśitam
saḥ dhī akṣe tad upagama ādibhyaḥ
adhyakṣa adhikaraṇam
sthitam etat yasya yatas na utpattiḥ tasya tasmin vṛtti pralayaḥ na svarūpa pralayaḥ iti
idam idānīm prāṇaḥ tejasi iti atra cintyate kim yathāśruti prāṇasya tejasi eva vṛtti upasaṃhāraḥ kim vā deha indriya pañjara adhyakṣe jīve iti
tatra śruteḥ anatiśaṅkya tvāt prāṇasya tejasi eva saṃpattiḥ syāt aśruta kalpanāyāḥ anyāyya tvāt iti evam prāpte pratipadyate saḥ dhyakṣaḥ iti
sa prakṛtaḥ prāṇaḥ adhyakṣe avidyā karma pūrva prajñā upādhike vijñāna ātmani avatiṣṭhate
tad pradhānā prāṇa vṛttiḥ bhavati iti arthaḥ
kutas
tad upagama ādibhyaḥ evam eva imam ātmānam anta kāle sarve prāṇāḥ abhisamāyanti yatra etat ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva
viśeṣeṇa ca tam utkrāmantam prāṇaḥ nu utkrāmati iti pañca vṛtteḥ prāṇasya adhyakṣa anugāmi tām darśayati tad anuvṛtti tām ca itareṣām prāṇam anūtkrāmantam sarve prāṇāḥ anūtkrāmanti iti
sa vijñānaḥ bhavati iti ca adhyakṣasya antar vijñānavat tva pradarśanena tasmin apīta karaṇa grāmasya prāṇasya avasthānam gamayati
nanu prāṇaḥ tejasi iti śrūyate
katham prāṇaḥ dhyakṣe iti adhika āvāpaḥ kriyate
na eṣa doṣaḥ adhyakṣa pradhāna tvāt utkramaṇa ādi vyavahārasya śruti antara gatasya api ca viśeṣasya apekṣaṇīya tvāt
katham tarhi prāṇaḥ tejasi iti śrutiḥ iti atas āha
tad śruteḥ
sa prāṇa saṃpṛktaḥ dhyakṣaḥ tejaḥ sahacariteṣu bhūteṣu deha bīja bhūteṣu sūkṣmeṣu avatiṣṭhate iti avagantav
text2:
sa utideśaḥ sarva puṇya viṣayaḥ iti āśaṅkya prativakti agihotra ādi
tu iti tuśabdaḥ āśaṅkām apaudati yaityam karma vaidikam agihotra ādi tat tad kāryāya eva bhavati yat kāryam tat eva asya api kāryam iti arthaḥ kutas tam etam brāhmaṇāḥ vividiṣati
ityādi darśaāt au jñā a karmaṇoḥ vilakṣaṇa kārya tvāt kārya ekatva aupapattiḥ ā eṣa doṣaḥ jvara maraṇa kāryayoḥ api dadhi viṣayoḥ guḍa matra saṃyuktayoḥ tṛpti puṣṭi kārya darśaāt tadvat karmaṇaḥ api jñā a saṃyuktasya mokṣa kārya upapatteḥ au a ārabhyaḥ mokṣaḥ katham asya karma kārya tvam ucyate ā eṣa doṣaḥ
ārāt upakāraka tvāt karmaṇaḥ jñāasya eva hi prāpakam sat karma praṇāḍyā mokṣa kāraṇam iti upacaryate atas eva ca atikrāta viṣayam etat kārya ekatva abhidhāam hi brahma vidaḥ āgāmi a gihotra ādi saṃbhavati aiyojya brahma ātmatva pratipatteḥ śāstrasya aviṣaya tvāt saguṇāsu
tu vidyāsu kartṛ tvā ativṛtteḥ saṃbhavati āgāmi api tasya api kārya atara abhāvāt vidyā saṃgati upapattiḥ kiṃviṣayam kiṃviṣayam vā adaḥ viiyogavacaam ekeṣām tasya tasya putrāḥ tasya tasya putrāḥ tasya putrāḥ tasya putrāḥ tasya putrāḥ tasya putrāḥ tasya putrāḥ tasya putrāḥ tasya putrāḥ tasya putrāḥ tasya tasya putrāḥ
dāyam upayati suhṛdaḥ sādhu kṛtyām dviṣataḥ pāpa kṛtyām iti atas uttaram paṭhati hi ekeṣām ubhayoḥ hi ekeṣām ubhayoḥ atas gihotra ādeḥ iti āt karmaṇaḥ ayā api hi asti sādhu kṛtyā yā phalam abhisaṃdhāya kriyate tasyāḥ eṣa
viiyogaḥ uktaḥ ekeṣām suhṛdaḥ sādhu kṛtyām upayati iti tasyāḥ eva ca idam itarasya api evam asaṃśleṣaḥ iti tathā jātīyakasya kāmyasya karmaṇaḥ vidyām prati aupakāraka tve saṃpratipattiḥ
ubhayoḥ api jaimii bādarāyaṇayoḥ ācāryayoḥ yat eva vidyayā iti hi vidyā jñā asādhaatva adhikaraṇam samadhigatam etat aatara adhikaraṇe karma mumukṣuṇā kṛtam upātta durita kṣaya hetu dvāreṇa sattva śuddhi kāraṇatām pratipadyamāam brahma vidyayā saha eka kāryam bhavati iti
tatra agihotra ādi karma aṅga vyapāśraya vidyā saṃyuktam kevalam ca asti yaḥ evam vidvā yajati yaḥ evam vidvān juhoti yaḥ evam vidvān śaṃsati yaḥ evam vidvān gāyati tasmāt evaṃvidam eva brahmāṇam kurvīta
te ubhau kurutaḥ yaḥ ca etat evam veda yaḥ ca a veda ityādi vacaebhyaḥ vidyā saṃyuktam asti kevalam api asti tatra idam vicāryate kim vidyā saṃyuktam eva a gihotra ādikam karma mumukṣoḥ vidyā hetutvā tayā saha eka kāryatvam
pratipadyate a kevalam uta vidyā saṃyuktam kevalam ca aviśeṣeṇa iti kutas saṃśayaḥ tam etam ātmā yajñe vividiṣati iti śravaṇāt vidyā saṃyuktasya ca a gihotra ādeḥ viśiṣṭa tva avagamāt
kim tāvat prāptam vidyā saṃyuktam eva karma agihotra ādi ātma vidyā śeṣa tvam pratipadyate vidyā upetasya viśiṣṭa tva avagamāt vidyā vihīāt yat ahar eva juhoti tat ahar puar mṛtyum apajayati evam vidvāḥ ityādi śrutibhyaḥ buddhyā yuktaḥ yayā
pārtha karma badham prahāsyasi dūreṇa hi avaram karma buddhi yogāt haaṃjayaḥ ityādi smṛtibhyaḥ ca iti evam prāpte pratipādyate yat eva vidyayā iti hi satyam etat vidyā saṃyuktam karma agihotra ādikam vidyā vihīāt karmaṇaḥ gihotrāt viśiṣṭam vidvāḥ iva
brāhmaṇaḥ vidyā vihīāt brāhmaṇāt tathā api vidyā vihīam karma agihotra ādikam kasmāt tam etam ātmāam yajñe vividiṣati iti aviśeṣeṇa agihotra ādeḥ vidyā hetu tve śruta tvāt vidyā saṃyuktasya agihotra ādeḥ viśiṣṭa tva avagamāt vidyā vihīam agihotra ādi ātma vidyā hetu tve aapekṣam eva iti yuktam
yogāt ātma jñāam prati kaścid kāraṇatva atiśayaḥ bhaviṣyati a tathā vidyā vihīasya iti yuktam kalpayitum a tu vividiṣati iti atra aviśeṣeṇa ātma jñā aṅgatve śrutasya āgihotra ādeḥ śrutasya āgihotra ādeḥ a aṅgatvam
śakyam abhyupagatum tathā hi śrutiḥ yat eva vidyayā karoti śraddhayā upaiṣadā tat eva vīryavattaram bhavati iti vidyā saṃyuktasya sva kāryam prati kaṃcid atiśayam bruvāṇāḥ
tasya eva tad prayojaam prati vīryavat tvam darśayati karmaṇaḥ ca vīryavat tvam tat yat sva prayojaa sādha asahatvam tasmāt vidyā saṃyuktam ca ubhayam api mumukṣuṇā mokṣa prayojaa uddeśea iha ca
prāk jñā utpatteḥ kṛtam tat yathā sāmarthyam brahma adhigama pratibadha kāraṇa upātta durita kṣaya hetutva dvāreṇa brahma adhigama kāraṇa tvam pratipadyamāam śravaṇa maaa śraddhā tātparya ādya taraṅga kāraṇa apekṣam brahma vidyayā saha eka kāryam bhavati iti sthitam tu itare kṣapayitvā sampadyate itara kṣapaṇa adhikaraṇam a ārabdha kāryayoḥ puṇya pāpayoḥ vidyā sāmarthyāt kṣaya adhikaraṇam a ārabdha kāryayoḥ puṇya pāpayoḥ vidyā sāmarth
uktaḥ itare tu ārabdha kārye puṇya pāpe upabhoge kṣapayitvā brahma saṃpadyate tasya tāvat eva ciram yāvat saṃpatsye iti brahma eva sa brahmā apyeti iti ca
evamādi śrutibhyaḥ sati api samyagdarśae yathā prāk dehapātāt bheda darśaam evam paścāt api uu varteta a imitta ābhavāt upabhoga śeṣa kṣapaṇam hi tatra au vṛtti imittam ca tādṛśam atra kiṃcid asti aparaḥ
tasya dagdha bīja tvāt mithyājñā a avaṣṭambham hi karma ātaram dehapātaḥ upabhoga ātaram ārabheta tat ca mithyājñāam dagdham iti atas sādhu etat ārabdha kārya kṣaye viduṣaḥ kaivalyam avaśyam bhavati iti iti
śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye caturtha adhyāyasya prathamaḥ pādaḥ murat caturthaḥ udhyāyaḥ dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ vāc maasi vāc adhikaraṇam asti prāyaṇa viṣayā śrutiḥ asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya asya somya
puruṣasya prayataḥ vāc maasi saṃpadyate maaḥ prāṇe prāṇaḥ tejasi tejaḥ parasyām devatāyām iti kim iha vācaḥ eva vṛttimattyāḥ maasi saṃpattiḥ ucyate uta vāc vṛtteḥ iti viśayaḥ
tatra vāc eva tāvat maasi saṃpadyate iti prāptam tathā hi śrutiḥ augṛhītā bhavati itarathā lakṣaṇā syāt śruti lakṣaṇā viśaye ca śrutiḥ yāyyā a lakṣaṇā tasmāt
vācaḥ eva ayam maasi pralayaḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ vāc vṛttiḥ maasi saṃpadyate iti katham vāc vṛttiḥ iti vyākhyāyate yāvatā vāc maasi iti eva ācāryaḥ paṭhati
satyam etat paṭhiṣyati tu parastāt avibhāgaḥ iti tasmāt atra vṛtti upaśama mātram vivakṣati iti gamyate tattva pralaya vivakṣāyām tu sarvatra eva avibhāga sāmyāt kim paratra eva viśiṃṣyāt avibhāgaḥ iti
tasmāt atra vṛtti upasaṃhāra vivakṣā vāc vṛttiḥ pūrvam upasaṃhriyate mao vṛttau avasthitāyām iti arthaḥ kasmāt darśaāt dṛśyate hi vāc vṛtteḥ pūrva upasaṃhāraḥ mao vṛttau vidyamāāyām a tu vācaḥ eva vṛttimattyā maasi upasaṃhāraḥ keacid api
draṣṭum śakyate śruti sāmarthyāt vācaḥ eva ayam maasi apyayaḥ yuktaḥ iti uktam etya āha a tad prakṛti tvāt yasya hi yatas utpattiḥ tasya tatra pralayaḥ yāyyaḥ mṛdi iva
śarāvasya ca vāc utpadyate iti kiṃca a pramāṇam asti vṛtti udbhava abhibhavau tu a prakṛti samāśrayau api dṛśyete pārthivebhyaḥ hi taijasasya ageḥ vṛttiḥ udbhavati apsu ca upaśāmyati katham
tarhi asmipakṣe śabdaḥ vāc maasi saṃpadyate iti atas āha śabdāt ca iti vṛtti vṛttimatoḥ abheda upacārāt iti arthaḥ atas eva ca tasmāt upaśāta tejāḥ iti atra aviśeṣeṇa
