sarveṣām eva idriyāṇām maasi saṃpattiḥ śrūyate tatra api atas eva vācaḥ iva cakṣuḥ ādīām api sa vṛttike maasi avasthite vṛtti lopa darśaāt tattva pralaya asaṃbhavāt śabda upapatteḥ ca vṛtti dvāreṇa eva sarvāṇi idriyāṇi sarveṣām karaṇāām
sati vācaḥ pṛthak grahaṇam vāc maasi saṃpadyate iti udāharaṇa prāṇa uttarāt samadhigatam etat vāc maasi saṃpadyate iti atra vṛtti saṃpatti vivakṣā iti atha yat uttaram vākyam maasi
prāṇe iti kim atra api vṛtti saṃpattiḥ eva vivakṣyate uta vṛttimat saṃpattiḥ iti vicikitsāyām vṛttimat saṃpattiḥ eva atra iti prāptam śruti augrahāt tad prakṛti tva upapatteḥ ca tathā hi aamayam hi somya
maa āpaḥ mayaḥ prāṇaḥ iti ca prāṇam āpaḥ ca amasṛjata iti śrutiḥ atas ca yam aaḥ prāṇe pralīyate aam eva tat apsu pralīyate aam
hi āpaḥ ca prāṇaḥ prakṛti vikāra abhedāt iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ tat api āgṛhīta bāhya idriya vṛtti vṛtti dvāreṇa eva prāṇe pralīyate iti uttarāt vākyāt avagatavyam tathā hi suṣupsoḥ mumūrṣoḥ ca prāṇa vṛttau
parispada ātmikāyām avasthitāyām dṛśyate ca maasaḥ svarūpa apyayaḥ prāṇe saṃbhavati a tad prakṛti tvāt darśitam maasaḥ prāṇa prakṛti tvam hi hi tad prakṛti tve
maaḥ prāṇe saṃpattum arhati evam api hi ae maaḥ saṃpadyeta apsu ca aam apsu eva ca prāṇaḥ hi etasmin api pakṣe prāṇa bhāva pariṇatābhyaḥ udbhyaḥ maaḥ jāyate iti
kiṃca a pramāṇam asti tasmāt prāṇe svarūpa apyayaḥ vṛtti apyaye pi tu śabdaḥ uvakalpate vṛtti vṛttimatoḥ abheda upacārāt iti darśitam saḥ udhyakṣe tad upagama ādibhyaḥ adhyakṣa adhikaraṇam sthitam etat yasya yatas otpattiḥ
tasya a svarūpa pralayaḥ a svarūpa pralayaḥ iti idam idāīm prāṇaḥ tejasi iti atra cityate kim yathāśruti prāṇasya tejasi eva vṛtti upasaṃhāraḥ kim vā deha idriya pañjara adhyakṣe jīve iti tatra
śruteḥ a atiśaṅkya tvāt prāṇasya tejasi eva saṃpattiḥ syāt a śruta kalpa āyāḥ ayāyya tvāt iti evam prāpte pratipadyate saḥ udhyakṣaḥ iti sa prakṛtaḥ prāṇaḥ adhyakṣe avidyā karma pūrva prajñā upādhike vijñā ātmaiḥ avatiṣṭhate tad pradhāā
prāṇa vṛttiḥ bhavati iti arthaḥ kutas tad upagama ādibhyaḥ evam eva imam ātmā amata kāle sarve prāṇāḥ yatra etat ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ūrdhva ū
iti pañca vṛtteḥ prāṇasya adhyakṣa augāmi tām darśayati ca itareṣām sarve prāṇāḥ aūtkrāmati iti bhavati iti ca adhyakṣasya tasmin
apīta karaṇa grāmasya prāṇasya avasthāam gamayati prāṇaḥ tejasi iti śrūyate katham prāṇa udhyakṣe iti adhika āvāpaḥ kriyate ā eṣa doṣaḥ adhyakṣa pradhā a tvāt utkramaṇa ādi vyavahārasya śruti atara gatasya api ca viśeṣasya apekṣaṇīya tvāt katham tarhi
prāṇaḥ tejasi iti śrutiḥ iti atas āha bhūteṣu tad śruteḥ sa prāṇa saṃpṛkta adhyakṣaḥ tejaḥ sahacariteṣu bhūteṣu deha bīja bhūteṣu sūkṣmeṣu avatiṣṭhate iti avagatav

text1:
vahārasya śruti antara gatasya api ca viśeṣasya apekṣaṇīya tvāt
katham tarhi prāṇaḥ tejasi iti śrutiḥ iti atas āha
tad śruteḥ
sa prāṇa saṃpṛktaḥ dhyakṣaḥ tejaḥ sahacariteṣu bhūteṣu deha bīja bhūteṣu sūkṣmeṣu avatiṣṭhate iti avagantavyam prāṇaḥ tejasi iti śruteḥ
nanu ca iyam śrutiḥ prāṇasya tejasi sthitim darśayati na prāṇa saṃpṛktasya adhyakṣasya na eṣa doṣaḥ saḥ iti adhyakṣasya api antarāle upasaṃkhyāta tvāt
yaḥ u pi hi srughnāt mathurām gatvā mathurāyāḥ pāṭaliputram vrajati saḥ u pi srughnāt pāṭaliputram yāti iti śakyate vaditum
tasmāt prāṇaḥ tejasi iti prāṇa saṃpṛktasya adhyakṣasya eva etat tejaḥ sahacariteṣu bhūteṣu avasthānam
katham tejaḥ sahacariteṣu bhūteṣu iti ucyate yāvatā ekam eva tejaḥ śrūyate prāṇaḥ tejasi iti
atas āha
na ekasmin darśayataḥ hi
na ekasmin eva tejasi śarīra antara prepsā velāyām jīvaḥ vatiṣṭhate kāryasya śarīrasya aneka ātmaka tva darśanāt
darśayataḥ ca etam artham praśna prativacane āpaḥ puruṣa vacasaḥ iti
tat vyākhyātam tri ātmaka tvāt tu bhūyaḥ tvāt iti atra
śruti smṛtī ca etam artham darśayataḥ
śrutiḥ pṛthvī mayaḥ āpaḥ mayaḥ vāyu mayaḥ ākāśa mayaḥ tejaḥ mayaḥ ityādyā
smṛtiḥ api aṇvyaḥ mātrā vināśinyaḥ daśārdhānām tu yāḥ smṛtāḥ
tābhiḥ sārdham idam sarvam saṃbhavati anupūrvaśas ityādyā
nanu ca upasaṃhṛteṣu vāc ādiṣu karaṇeṣu śarīra antara prepsā velāyām kva ayam tadā puruṣaḥ bhavati iti upakramya śruti antaram karma āśraya tām nirūpayati tau ha yat ūcatuḥ karma ha eva tat ūcatuḥ atha ha yat praśaśaṃsatuḥ karma ha eva tat praśaśaṃsatuḥ iti
atrā ucyate tatra karma prayuktasya graha atigraha saṃjñakasya indriya viṣaya ātmakasya bandhanasya pravṛttiḥ iti karma āśraya tā uktā
iha punar bhūta upādānāt deha antara utpattiḥ iti bhūta āśraya tvam uktam
praśaṃsā śabdāt api tatra prādhānya mātram karmaṇaḥ pradarśitam na tu āśraya antaram nivāritam
tasmāt avirodhaḥ
samānā ca asṛti upakramāt amṛta tvam ca an upoṣya
āsṛti upakrama adhikaraṇam
sā iyam utkrāntiḥ kim vidvat aviduṣoḥ samānā kim vā viśeṣavatī iti viśayānānām viśeṣavatī iti tāvat prāptam
bhūta āśraya viśiṣṭā hi eṣā
punarbhavāya ca bhūtāni āśrīyante
na ca viduṣaḥ punarbhavaḥ saṃbhavati
amṛta tvam hi vidvān aśnute iti sthitiḥ
tasmāt a viduṣaḥ eva eṣā utkrāntiḥ
nanu vidyā prakaraṇe samāmnānāt viduṣaḥ eva eṣā bhavet na svāpa ādi vat yathā prāpta anukīrtanāt
yathā hi yatra etat puruṣaḥ svapiti nāma aśiśiṣati nāma pipāsati nāma iti ca sarva prāṇi sādhāraṇāḥ eva svāpa ādayaḥ nukīrtyante vidyā prakaraṇe pi pratipipādayiṣita vastu pratipādana ānuguṇyena na tu viduṣaḥ viśeṣavantaḥ vidhitsyante
evam iyam api utkrāntiḥ mahā jana gatā eva anukīrtyate yasyām parasyām devatāyām puruṣasya prayataḥ tejaḥ saṃpadyate saḥ ātmā tat tvam asi iti etat pratipādayitum
pratiṣiddhā ca eṣā viduṣaḥ na tasya prāṇāḥ utkrāmanti iti
tasmāt a viduṣaḥ eva eṣā iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ samānā ca eṣā utkrāntiḥ vāc manasi ityādyā vidvat aviduṣoḥ āsṛti upakramāt bhavitum arhati aviśeṣa śravaṇāt
avidvān deha bīja bhūtāni bhūta sūkṣmāṇi āśritya karma prayuktaḥ deha grahaṇam anubhavan saṃsarati vidvān tu jñāna prakāśitam mokṣanāḍī dvāram āśrayate tat etat āsṛti upakramāt iti uktam
nanu amṛta tvam viduṣā prāptavyam na ca tat deśa antara āyattam tatra kutas bhūta āśraya tvam sṛti upakramaḥ vā iti atra ucyate an upoṣya ca idam a dagdhvā atyantam avidyā ādīn kleśān apara vidyā sāmarthyāt āpekṣikam amṛta tvam prepsate saṃbhavati tatra sṛti upakramaḥ
bhūta āśraya tvam ca na hi nirāśrayāṇām prāṇānām gatiḥ upapadyate
tasmāt adoṣaḥ
tadā apīteḥ saṃsāra vyapadeśāt
saṃsāra vyapadeśa adhikaraṇam
tejaḥ parasyām devatāyām iti atra prakaraṇa sāmarthyāt tat yathā prakṛtam tejaḥ sa adhyakṣam sa prāṇam sa karaṇa grāmam bhūta antara sahitam prayataḥ puṃsaḥ parasyām devatāyām saṃpadyate iti etat uktam bhavati
kīdṛśī punar iyam saṃpattiḥ syāt iti cintyate
tatra ātyantikaḥ eva tāvat svarūpa pravilayaḥ iti prāptam tad prakṛti tva upapatteḥ
sarvasya hi janimataḥ vastu jātasya prakṛtiḥ parā devatā iti pratiṣṭhāpitam
tasmāt ātyantikī iyam avibhāga āpattiḥ iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ tat tejaḥ ādi bhūta sūkṣmam śrotra ādi karaṇa āśraya bhūtam āpīteḥ ā saṃsāra mokṣāt samyak jñāna nimittāt avatiṣṭhate yonim anye prapadyante śarīra tvāya dehinaḥ
sthāṇum anye nusaṃyanti yathākarma yathāśrutam iti ādi saṃsāra vyapadeśāt
anyathā hi sarvaḥ prāyaṇa samaye eva upādhi prati astamayāt atyantam brahma saṃpadyeta tatra vidhi śāstram anarthakam syāt vidyā śāstram ca
mithyā jñāna nimittaḥ ca bandhaḥ na samyak jñānāt ṛte visraṃsitum arhati
tasmāt tad prakṛti tve pi suṣupti pralaya vat bīja bhāva avaśeṣā eva eṣā sat saṃpattiḥ iti
sūkṣmam pramāṇataḥ ca tathā upalabdheḥ
tat ca itara bhūta sahitam tejaḥ jīvasya asmāt śarīrāt pravasataḥ āśraya bhūtam svarūpataḥ parimāṇataḥ ca sūkṣmam bhavitum arhati
tathā hi nāḍī niṣkramaṇa śravaṇa ādibhyaḥ sya saukṣmyam upalabhyate
tatra tanu tvāt saṃcāra upapattiḥ
svaccha tvāt ca apratighāta upapattiḥ
atas eva ca dehāt nirgacchat pārśva sthaiḥ nā upalabhyate
na upamardena atas
atas eva ca sūkṣma tvāt na asya sthūlasya śarīrasya upamardena dāha ādi nimittena itarat sūkṣmam śarīram upamṛdyate
asya eva ca upapatteḥ eṣaḥ ūṣmā
asya eva ca sūkṣmasya śarīrasya eṣaḥ ūṣmā yam etasmin jīvat śarīre saṃsparśena ūṣmāṇam vijānanti
tathā hi mṛta avasthāyām avasthite dehe vidyamāneṣu api ca rūpa ādiṣu deha guṇeṣu na ūṣmā upalabhyate jīvat avasthāyām eva tu upalabhyate iti atas upapadyate prasiddha śarīra vyatirikta vyapāśrayaḥ eva eṣaḥ ūṣmā iti
tathā ca śrutiḥ uṣṇaḥ eva jīviṣyan śītaḥ mariṣyan iti
pratiṣedhāt iti ced na śārīrāt
pratiṣedha adhikaraṇam
amṛta tvam ca an upoṣyaḥ iti atas viśeṣaṇāt ātyantike mṛta tve gati utkrāntyoḥ abhāvaḥ bhyupagataḥ
tatra api kenacid kāraṇena utkrāntim āśaṅkya pratiṣedhati atha a kāmayamānaḥ yaḥ kāmaḥ niṣkāmaḥ āpta kāmaḥ ātma kāmaḥ bhavati na tasya prāṇāḥ utkrāmanti brahma eva san brahma apyeti iti
atas para vidyā viṣayāt pratiṣedhāt na para brahma vidaḥ dehāt prāṇānām utkrāntiḥ asti iti ced nā iti ucyate yatas śārīrāt ātmanaḥ eṣaḥ utkrānti pratiṣedhaḥ prāṇānām na śarīrāt
katham avagamyate
na tasmāt prāṇāḥ utkrāmanti iti śākhā antare pañcamī prayogāt
saṃbandha sāmānya viṣayā hi ṣaṣṭhī śākhā antara gatayā pañcamyā saṃbandha viśeṣe vyavasthāpyate
tasmāt iti ca prādhānyāt abhyudaya niḥśreyasa adhikṛtaḥ dehī saṃbadhyate na dehaḥ
na tasmāt uccikramiṣoḥ jīvāt prāṇāḥ apakrāmanti saha eva tena bhavanti iti arthaḥ
sa prāṇasya ca pravasataḥ bhavati utkrāntiḥ dehāt iti
evam prāpte pratyucyate
spaṣṭaḥ hi ekeṣām
na etat asti yat uktam para brahma vidaḥ api dehāt asti utkrāntiḥ utkrānti pratiṣedhasya dehi apādāna tvāt iti
yatas deha apādāne eva utkrānti pratiṣedhaḥ ekeṣām samāmnātṛṇām spaṣṭaḥ upalabhyate
tathā hi ārtabhāgapraśne yatra ayam puruṣaḥ mriyate ud asmāt prāṇāḥ krāmanti āho na iti iti atra na iti ha uvāca yājñavalkyaḥ iti an utkrānti pakṣam parigṛhya na tarhi ayam an utkrānteṣu prāṇeṣu mṛtaḥ iti asyām āśaṅkāyām atra eva samavanīyante iti pravilayam prāṇānām pratijñāya tad siddhaye saḥ ucchvayati ādhmāyati ādhmātaḥ mṛtaḥ śete iti sa śabda parāmṛṣṭasya prakṛtasya utkrānti avadheḥ ucchvayana ādīni samāmananti
dehasya ca etāni syuḥ na dehinaḥ
tad sāmānyāt na tasmāt prāṇāḥ utkrāmanti atra eva samavanīyante iti atra api abheda upacāreṇa deha apādānasya eva utkramaṇasya pratiṣedhaḥ yadi api prādhānyam dehinaḥ iti vyākhyeyam yeṣām pañcamī pāṭhaḥ
yeṣām tu ṣaṣṭhī pāṭhaḥ teṣām vidvat saṃbandhinī utkrāntiḥ pratiṣidhyate iti prāpta utkrānti pratiṣedha artha tvāt asya vākyasya deha apādānā eva sā pratiṣiddhā bhavati dehāt utkrāntiḥ prāptā na dehinaḥ
api ca cakṣuṣṭas vā mūrdhnaḥ vā anyebhyaḥ vā śarīra deśebhyaḥ tam utkrāmantam prāṇaḥ nu utkrāmati prāṇam anūtkrāmantam sarve prāṇāḥ anūtkrāmanti iti evam avidvat viṣaye sa prapañcam utkramaṇam saṃsāra gamanam ca darśayitvā iti nu kāmayamānaḥ iti upasaṃhṛtya avidvat kathām atha a kāmayamānaḥ iti vyapadiśya vidvāṃsam yadi tad viṣaye pi utkrāntim eva prāpayet asamañjasaḥ eva vyapadeśaḥ syāt
tasmāt avidvat viṣaye prāptayoḥ gati utkrāntyoḥ vidvat viṣaye pratiṣedhaḥ iti evam eva vyākhyeyam vyapadeśa arthavat tvāya
na ca brahma vidaḥ sarvagata brahma ātma bhūtasya prakṣīṇa kāma karmaṇaḥ utkrāntiḥ gatiḥ vā upapadyate nimitta abhāvāt
atra brahma samaśnute iti ca evaṃjātīyakāḥ śrutayaḥ gati utkrāntyoḥ abhāvam sūcayanti
smaryate ca
smaryate ca mahābhārate gati utkrāntyoḥ abhāvaḥ sarva bhūta ātma bhūtasya samyak bhūtāni paśyataḥ
devāḥ api mārge muhyanti apadasya pada eṣiṇaḥ iti
nanu gatiḥ api brahma vidaḥ sarvagata brahma ātma bhūtasya smaryate śukaḥ kila vaiyāsakiḥ mumukṣuḥ āditya maṇḍalam abhipratasthe pitrā ca anugamya āhūtaḥ bho iti pratiśuśrāva iti na
sa śarīrasya eva ayam yoga balena viśiṣṭa deśa prāpti pūrvakaḥ śarīra utsargaḥ iti draṣṭavyam sarva bhūta dṛśya tva ādi upanyāsāt
na hi aśarīram gacchantam sarva bhūtāni draṣṭum śaknuyuḥ
tathā ca tatra eva upasaṃhṛtam śukaḥ tu mārutāt śīghrām gatim kṛtvā antarikṣa gaḥ
darśayitvā prabhāvam svam sarva bhūta gataḥ bhavat iti
tasmāt abhāvaḥ para brahma vidaḥ gati utkrāntyoḥ
gati śrutīnām tu viṣayam upariṣṭāt vyākhyāsyāmaḥ
tāni pare tathā himāha
vāc ādi laya adhikaraṇam
tāni punar prāṇa śabda uditāni indriyāṇi bhūtāni ca para brahma vidaḥ tasmin eva parasmin ātmani pralīyante
kasmāt
tathā hi āha śrutiḥ evam eva asya paridraṣṭuḥ imāḥ ṣoḍaśa kalāḥ puruṣāyaṇāḥ puruṣam prāpya astam gacchanti iti
nanu gatāḥ kalāḥ pañcadaśa pratiṣṭhāḥ iti vidvat viṣayā eva aparā śrutiḥ parasmāt ātmanaḥ nyatra api kalānām pralayam āha sma na
sā khalu vyavahāra apekṣā pārthiva ādyāḥ kalāḥ pṛthivī ādīḥ eva sva prakṛtīḥ apiyanti iti
itarā tu vidvat pratipatti apekṣā kṛtsnam kalā jātam para brahma vidaḥ brahma eva saṃpadyate iti
tasmāt adoṣaḥ
a vibhāgaḥ vacanāt
a vibhāga adhikaraṇam
sa punar viduṣaḥ kalā pralayaḥ kim itareṣām iva sa avaśeṣaḥ bhavati āhosvit niravaśeṣaḥ iti
tatra pralaya sāmānyāt śakti avaśeṣa tā prasaktau bravīti avibhāga āpattiḥ eva iti
kutas
vacanāt
tathā hi kalā pralayam uktvā vakti bhidyete tāsām nāma rūpe puruṣaḥ iti evam procyate saḥ eṣa u kalaḥ mṛtaḥ bhavati iti
avidyā nimittānām ca kalānām na vidyā nimitte pralaye sa avaśeṣa tva upapattiḥ
tasmāt avibhāgaḥ eva iti
tad okaḥ tad prakāśita dvāraḥ vidyā sāmarthyāt tad śeṣa gati anusmṛti yogāt ca hārda anugṛhītaḥ śata adhikayā
tadā okaḥ dhikaraṇam
samāptā prāsaṅgikī para vidyā gatā cintā
saṃprati tu apara vidyā viṣayām eva cintām anuvartayati
samānā ca āsṛti upakramāt vidvat aviduṣoḥ utkrāntiḥ iti uktam
tam idānīm sṛti upakramam darśayati
tasya upasaṃhṛta vāc ādi kalāpasya uccikramiṣataḥ vijñāna ātmanaḥ okaḥ āyatanam hṛdayam saḥ etāḥ tejaḥ mātrāḥ samabhyādadānaḥ hṛdayam eva anvavakrāmati iti śruteḥ tad agra prajvalana pūrvikā cakṣuḥ ādi sthāna apādānā ca utkrāntiḥ śrūyate tasya ha etasya hṛdayasya agram pradyotate tena pradyotena eṣaḥ ātmā niṣkrāmati cakṣuṣṭas vā mūrdhnaḥ vā anyebhyaḥ vā śarīra deśebhyaḥ iti
sā kim aniyamena eva vidvat aviduṣoḥ bhavati atha asti kaścid viduṣaḥ viśeṣa niyamaḥ iti vicikitsāyām śruti aviśeṣāt aniyama prāptau ācaṣṭe samāne hi vidvat aviduṣoḥ hṛdaya agra pradyotane tad prakāśita dvāra tve ca mūrdha sthānāt eva vidvān niṣkrāmati sthāna antarebhyaḥ tu itare
kutas
vidyā sāmarthyāt
yadi vidvān api itara vat yatas kutaścid deha deśāt utkrāmet na eva utkṛṣṭam lokam labheta tatra anarthikā eva vidyā syāt
tad śeṣa gati anusmṛti yogāt ca vidyā śeṣa bhūtā ca mūrdhanyanāḍī saṃbaddhā gatiḥ anuśīlayitavyā vidyā viśeṣeṣu vihitā
tām abhyasyan tayā eva pratiṣṭhate iti yuktam
tasmāt hṛdayālayena brahmaṇā su upāsitena anugṛhītaḥ tad bhāvam samāpannaḥ vidvān mūrdhanyayā eva śata adhikayā śatāt atiriktayā ekaśatatamyā nāḍyā niṣkrāmati itarābhiḥ itare
tathā hi hārda vidyām prakṛtya samāmananti śatam ca ekā ca hṛdayasya nāḍyaḥ tāsām mūrdhānam abhiniḥsṛtā ekā
tayā ūrdhvam āyan amṛta tvam eti viṣvaṅ anyāḥ utkramaṇe bhavanti iti
raśmi anusārī
raśmi adhikaraṇam
asti hārdavidyā atha yat idam asmin brahmapure daharam puṇḍarīkam veśma iti upakramya vihitā
tad prakriyāyām atha yāḥ etāḥ hṛdayasya nāḍyaḥ iti upakramya sa prapañcam nāḍī raśmi saṃbandham uktvā uktam atha yatra etat asmāt śarīrāt utkrāmati atha etaiḥ eva raśmibhiḥ ūrdhvam ākramate iti
punar ca uktam tayā ūrdhvam āyan amṛta
text2:
vahārasya śruti atara gatasya api ca viśeṣasya apekṣaṇīya tvāt katham tarhi
prāṇaḥ tejasi iti śrutiḥ iti atas āha bhūteṣu tad śruteḥ sa prāṇa saṃpṛkta adhyakṣaḥ tejaḥ sahacariteṣu bhūteṣu deha bīja bhūteṣu sūkṣmeṣu avatiṣṭhate iti avagatavyam prāṇaḥ tejasi iti śruteḥ ca iyam
śrutiḥ prāṇasya tejasi sthitim darśayati a prāṇa saṃpṛktasya adhyakṣasya ā eṣa doṣaḥ saḥ adhyakṣe iti adhyakṣasya api atarāle upasaṃkhyāta tvāt yaḥ api hi srughāmathurām gatvā mathurāyāḥ pāṭaliputram vrajati
saḥ upi srughāt pāṭaliputram yāti iti śakyate vaditum tasmāt prāṇaḥ tejasi iti prāṇa saṃpṛktasya adhyakṣasya eva etat tejaḥ sahacariteṣu bhūteṣu katham tejaḥ sahacariteṣu bhūteṣu iti ucyate yāvatā ekam eva tejaḥ śrūyate prāṇaḥ tejasi
iti atas āha hi hi ekasmin eva tejasi śarīra atara prepsā velāyām jīvaḥ vatiṣṭhate kāryasya śarīrasya a eka ātmaka tva darśaāt darśayataḥ ca etam artham āpaḥ puruṣa vacasaḥ
iti tat vyākhyātam tri ātmaka tvāt tu bhūyaḥ tvāt iti atra śruti smṛtī ca etam artham darśayataḥ śrutiḥ pṛthvī mayaḥ āpaḥ mayaḥ vāyu mayaḥ ākāśa mayaḥ tejaḥ mayaḥ ityādyā smṛtiḥ
api aṇvyaḥ tu yāḥ smṛtāḥ tābhiḥ sārdham idam sarvam saṃbhavati aupūrvaśas ityādyāḥ ca upasaṃhṛteṣu vāc ādiṣu karaṇeṣu śarīra atara prepsā velāyām
kva ayam tadā puruṣaḥ bhavati iti upakramya śrutyataram karma āśraya tām tau ha yat ūcatuḥ karma ha eva tat ūcatuḥ atha ha yat praśaśaṃsatuḥ karma ha eva tat praśaśaṃsatuḥ
iti atra ucyate tatra karma prayuktasya grahātigraha saṃjñakasya idriya viṣaya ātmakasya pravṛttiḥ iti karma āśraya tā uktā iha puaḥ deha atara utpattiḥ iti bhūta āśraya tvam uktam praśaṃsā śabdāt api tatra
prādhāya mātram karmaṇaḥ pradarśitam a tu tasmāt avirodhaḥ samāā ca āsṛti upakramāt amṛta tvam ca a upoṣyaḥ āsṛti upakrama adhikaraṇam sā iyam utkrātiḥ kim vidvat aviduṣoḥ kim vā viśeṣavatī
iti viśayāām viśeṣavatī iti tāvat prāptam bhūta āśraya viśiṣṭā hi eṣā puarbhavāya ca bhūtāya āśrīyate a ca viduṣaḥ puarbhavaḥ saṃbhavati amṛta tvam hi iti sthitiḥ tasmāt aviduṣaḥ
eva eṣā utkrātiḥ vidyā prakaraṇe viduṣaḥ eva eṣā bhavet a svāpa ādi vat yathāprāpta āukīrtaāt yathā hi yatra etat puruṣaḥ svapiti āma aśiśiṣati āma
pipāsati iti ca sarva prāṇi sādhāraṇā eva vidyā prakaraṇe pi tu viduṣaḥ viśeṣavataḥ vidhitsyate evam iyam api utkrātiḥ yasyām parasyām
devatāyām puruṣasya prayataḥ tejaḥ saṃpadyate saḥ ātmā tattvam asi iti etat pratipādayitum pratiṣiddhā ca eṣā viduṣaḥ a tasya prāṇā utkrāmati iti tasmāt a viduṣaḥ
eva eṣā iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ samāā ca eṣā utkrātiḥ vāc maasi ityādyā vidvat aviduṣoḥ āsṛti upakramāt bhavitum arhati aviśeṣa śravaṇāt avidvāḥ bhūta sūkṣmāṇi āśritya karma prayuktaḥ deha grahaṇa maubhava saṃsarati vidvān tu
mokṣa āḍī dvāram āśrayate tat etat ā sṛti upakramāt iti uktam au amṛta tvam viduṣā prāptavyam ca tad deśa atara āyattam tatra kutas bhūta āśraya tvam sṛti upakramaḥ vā iti atra ucyate ca
idam a dagdhvā atyatam avidyā ādi kleśāḥ apara vidyā sāmarthyāt āpekṣikam amṛta tvam prepsate saṃbhavati tatra sṛti upakramaḥ bhūta āśraya tvam ca gatiḥ upapadyate tasmāt adoṣaḥ tadā apīteḥ saṃsāra vyapadeśāt saṃsāra vyapadeśa adhikaraṇam
tejaḥ parasyām devatāyām iti atra prakaraṇa sāmarthyāt tat yathā prakṛtam tejaḥ sa adhyakṣam sa prāṇam sa karaṇa grāmam bhūta atara sahitam prayataḥ puṃsaḥ parasyām devatāyām saṃpadyate iti etat uktam bhavati
kīdṛśī puar iyam saṃpattiḥ syāt iti cityate tatra ātyatikaḥ eva tāvat sva rūpa pravilayaḥ iti prāptam tad prakṛti tva upapatteḥ sarvasya hi jaimataḥ vastu jātasya prakṛtiḥ parā devatā iti
pratiṣṭhāpitam tasmāt ātyatikī iyam avibhāga āpattiḥ iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ tat tejaḥ ādi bhūta sūkṣmam śrotra ādi karaṇa āśraya bhūtam āpīteḥ ā saṃsāra mokṣāt samyagjñā aimittāt avatiṣṭhate prapadyate śarīra tvāya
yathākarma yathāśrutam ityādi saṃsāra vyapadeśāt ayathā hi sarvaḥ prāyaṇa samaye eva upādhi prati astamayāt atyatam brahma saṃpadyeta tatra vidhi śāstram aarthakam syāt vidyā śāstram ca mithyājñā aimittaḥ ca samyagjñā ādṛte
visraṃsitum arhati tasmāt tat prakṛti tve pi suṣupti pralaya vat bīja bhāva avaśeṣā eva eṣā sat saṃpattiḥ iti sūkṣmam pramāṇataḥ ca tathā upalabdheḥ tat ca itara bhūta sahitam tejaḥ jīvasya asmāt śarīrāt pravasataḥ āśraya bhūtam svarūpataḥ parimāṇataḥ ca sūkṣmam bhavitum arhati
tathā hi āḍīiṣkramaṇa śravaṇa ādibhyaḥ saukṣmyam upalabhyate tatra tautvāt saṃcāra upapattiḥ svaccha tvāt ca apratighāta upapattiḥ atas eva ca pārśva sthaiḥ upalabhyate atas eva ca sūkṣma tvāt atas eva ca sūkṣma tvāt sthūlasya
śarīrasya upamarde dāha ādi nimitte itarat sūkṣmam śarīram upamṛdyate asya eva ca upapatteḥ eṣaḥ ūṣmā asya eva ca sūkṣmasya śarīrasya eṣaḥ ūṣmā yam etasmin jīvat śarīre saṃsparśe ūṣmāṇam tathā hi mṛta avasthāyām avasthite pi
dehe vidyamāeṣu api ca rūpa ādiṣu deha guṇeṣu a ūṣmā upalabhyate jīvat avasthāyām eva tu upalabhyate iti atas upapadyate prasiddha śarīra vyatirikta vyapāśrayaḥ eva eṣaḥ ūṣmā iti tathā ca śrutiḥ
uṣṇaḥ eva jīviṣyan śītaḥ mariṣye iti pratiṣedhāt iti śārīrāt pratiṣedha adhikaraṇam amṛta tvam ca a upoṣyaḥ iti atas viśeṣaṇāt ātyatika imṛtatve gati utkrātyoḥ abhāvaḥ abhyupagataḥ tatra api utkrātim āśaṅkya pratiṣedhati
yokāmaḥ iṣkāmaḥ āpta kāmaḥ ātma kāmaḥ bhavati a tasya prāṇāḥ utkrāmati brahma eva sa brahma apyeti iti atas para vidyā viṣayāt pratiṣedhāt a para brahma vidaḥ dehāt prāṇānām utkrātiḥ asti iti
ced ā iti ucyate yatas śārīrāt ātmā eṣaḥ utkrāti pratiṣedhaḥ prāṇāām a śarīrāt katham avagamyate a tasmāt prāṇāḥ utkrāmati iti śākhātare pañcamī prayogāt hi
ṣaṣṭhī śākhātara gatayā pañcamyā vyavasthāpyate tasmāt iti ca prādhāyāt abhyudaya aiḥśreyasa adhikṛtaḥ dehī saṃbadhyate a dehaḥ a tasmāt uccikramiṣoḥ jīvāt prāṇāḥ apakrāmati saha eva te
bhavati iti arthaḥ sa prāṇasya ca pravasataḥ bhavati utkrātiḥ dehāt iti evam prāpte pratyucyate spaṣṭaḥ hi ekeṣām yat uktam para brahma vidaḥ api dehāt asti utkrātiḥ utkrāti pratiṣedhasya
dehi a pādāa tvāt iti yatas deha apādāaḥ eva utkrāti pratiṣedhaḥ ekeṣām spaṣṭaḥ upalabhyate tathā hi ārtabhāgapraśe yatra ayam puruṣaḥ mriyate ud asmāt prāṇāḥ krāmati āho eti
iti atra ā iti ha uvāca yājñavalkyaḥ iti autkrāti pakṣam parigṛhya tarhi ayam autkrāteṣu prāṇeṣu mṛtaḥ iti asyām āśaṅkāyām atra eva samavaīyate iti pravilayam
pratijñāya tad siddhaye saḥ ucchvayati ādhmāyati ādhmātaḥ mṛtaḥ śete iti sa śabda parāmṛṣṭasya prakṛtasya dehasya ca syuḥ tad sāmāyāt
tasmāt prāṇāḥ utkrāmati atra eva samavaīyate iti atra api abheda upacāreṇa utkramaṇasya pratiṣedhaḥ yadi api iti vyākhyeyam yeṣām pañcamī pāṭhaḥ yeṣām tu ṣaṣṭhī pāṭhaḥ teṣām
utkrātiḥ pratiṣidhyate iti prāpta utkrāti pratiṣedha artha tvāt asya vākyasya sā pratiṣiddhā bhavati dehāt utkrātiḥ prāptā api ca cakṣuṣṭas vā
mūrdhaḥ vāyebhyaḥ vā śarīra deśebhyaḥ tam utkrāmatam prāṇaḥ u utkrāmati prāṇam a utkrāmatam sarve prāṇāḥ a utkrāmati iti evam avidvat viṣaye sa prapañcam utkramaṇam saṃsāra gamaam ca darśayitvā iti u iti upasaṃhṛtya avidvat kathām
iti vyapadiśya vidvāṃsam yadi tad viṣaye pi utkrātim eva prāpayet asamañjasaḥ eva vyapadeśaḥ syāt tasmāt avidvat viṣaye prāptayoḥ gati utkrātyoḥ vidvat viṣaye pratiṣedhaḥ iti evam eva vyākhyeyam vyapadeśa arthavat tvāya as
ca brahma vidaḥ sarvagata brahma ātma bhūtasya prakṣīṇa kāma karmaṇaḥ utkrātiḥ gatiḥ vā upapadyate imitta abhāvāt atra brahma iti ca evaṃjātīyakāḥ śrutayaḥ gati utkrātyoḥ abhāvam sūcayati smaryate
ca smaryate api ca mahābhārate gati utkrātyoḥ abhāvaḥ sarva bhūta ātma bhūtasya samyak bhūtāi paśyataḥ devāḥ api mārge muhyati apadasya pada eṣiṇaḥ iti gatiḥ api brahma vidaḥ sarva gata brahma ātma bhūtasya smaryate
śukaḥ kila vaiyāsakiḥ mumukṣuḥ āditya maṇḍalam abhipratasthe pitrā ca āugamya āhūtaḥ bho iti pratiśuśrāva iti a sa śarīrasya eva ayam viśiṣṭa deśa prāpti pūrvakaḥ śarīra utsargaḥ iti draṣṭavyam sarva bhūta dṛśya tva ādi upayāsāt a hi
aśarīram gacchatam sarva bhūtāi draṣṭum śakuyuḥ tathā ca tatra eva upasaṃhṛtam śukaḥ tu mārutāt śīghrām gatim kṛtvā ātarikṣa gaḥ darśayitvā prabhāvam svam sarva bhūta gataḥ bhavat iti tasmāt abhāvaḥ para brahma vidaḥ gati utkrātyoḥ
gati śrutīām tu viṣayam upariṣṭāt vyākhyāsyāmaḥ pare tathā vāc ādi laya adhikaraṇam tāi puaḥ prāṇa śabda uditāi idriyāṇi ca para brahma vidaḥ tasmin eva parasmin ātmai pralīyate
kasmāt tathā hi āha śrutiḥ evam eva asya paridraṣṭuḥ imāḥ ṣoḍaśa kalāḥ puruṣāyaṇāḥ puruṣam prāpya astam gacchati iti gatāḥ kalāḥ pañcadaśa pratiṣṭhāḥ iti
vidvat viṣayā eva aparā śrutiḥ sma sā khalu vyavahāra apekṣā pārthiva ādyāḥ kalāḥ pṛthivī ādīḥ eva sva prakṛtīḥ apiyati iti itarā tu vidvat pratipatti apekṣā kṛtsam kalā jātam
para brahma vidaḥ brahma eva saṃpadyate iti tasmāt adoṣaḥ avibhāgaḥ vacaāt avibhāga adhikaraṇam sa puar viduṣaḥ kalā pralayaḥ kim itareṣām iva sa avaśeṣaḥ bhavati āhosvit avaśeṣaḥ iti tatra pralaya sāmāyāt śakti avaśeṣa tā prasaktau
bravīti avibhāga āpattiḥ eva iti kutas vacaāt tathā hi kalā pralayam uktvā vakti bhidyete tāsām āma rūpe puruṣaḥ iti evam procyate saḥ eṣa ukalaḥ mṛtaḥ bhavati iti avidyā nimittāām ca
a vidyā nimitte pralaye sa avaśeṣa tva upapattiḥ tasmāt avibhāgaḥ eva iti tad oka ugra jvalaam tad prakāśita dvāraḥ vidyā sāmarthyāt tad śeṣa gati ausmṛti yogāt ca śata adhikayā tad oka udhikaraṇam samāptā prāsaṅgikī para vidyā gatā citā saṃprati tu apara vidyā viṣayām eva
citām auvartayati samāā ca ā sṛti upakramāt vidvat a viduṣoḥ utkrātiḥ iti uktam tam idāīm sṛti upakramam darśayati tasya upasaṃhṛta vāc ādi kalāpasya uccikramiṣataḥ vijñā ātmanaḥ okaḥ hṛdayam saḥ etāḥ tejaḥ mātrāḥ samabhyādadānaḥ hṛdayam eva avavakrāmati
iti śruteḥ tad agra prajvala a pūrvikā cakṣuḥ ādi ca utkrātiḥ śrūyate tasya ha etasya hṛdayasya agram pradyotate ātmā iṣkrāmati cakṣuṣṭas vā mūrdhaḥ vāyebhyaḥ vā
śarīra deśebhyaḥ iti sā vidvat aviduṣoḥ bhavati atha asti kaścid viduṣaḥ viśeṣa aiyamaḥ iti vicikitsāyām śruti aviśeṣāt aiyama prāptau ācaṣṭe hi vidvat aviduṣoḥ hṛdaya agra pradyotae tad prakāśita dvāra tve ca mūrdha sthāāt eva vidvāiṣkrāmati sthāātarebhyaḥ tu
itare kutas vidyā sāmarthyāt yadi vidvā api itara vat yatas kutaścid deha deśāt utkrāmet ā eva utkṛṣṭam lokam labheta tatra aarthikā eva vidyā syāt vidyā śeṣa gatyā ausmṛti yogāt ca vidyā śeṣa bhūtā ca
mūrdhayaāḍī saṃbaddhā gatiḥ auśīlayitavyā vidyā viśeṣeṣu vihitā tām abhyasya tayā eva pratiṣṭhate iti yuktam tasmāt brahmaṇā su upāsite augṛhītaḥ tad bhāvam vidvāḥ mūrdhayayā eva śata adhikayā
śatāt atiriktayā ekaśatatamyā āḍyā iṣkrāmati itarābhiḥ itare tathā hi hārdavidyām prakṛtya śatam ca ekā ca hṛdayasya āḍyaḥ tāsām tayā ūrdhvamāya amṛta tvam eti viṣvaṅṅayā utkramaṇe bhavati
iti raśmyausārī raśmi adhikaraṇam asti hārdavidyā atha yat idam asmin brahmapure daharam puṇḍarīkam veśma iti upakramya vihitā tad prakriyāyām atha yāḥ etāḥ hṛdayasya āḍyaḥ iti upakramya sa prapañcam
uktam atha yatra etat asmāt śarīrāt utkrāmati atha etaiḥ eva raśmibhiḥ ūrdhvam ākramate iti tayā ūrdhvam āya amṛta

text1:
itā
tad prakriyāyām atha yāḥ etāḥ hṛdayasya nāḍyaḥ iti upakramya sa prapañcam nāḍī raśmi saṃbandham uktvā uktam atha yatra etat asmāt śarīrāt utkrāmati atha etaiḥ eva raśmibhiḥ ūrdhvam ākramate iti
punar ca uktam tayā ūrdhvam āyan amṛta tvam eti iti
tasmāt śata adhikayā nāḍyā niṣkrāman raśmi anusārī niṣkrāmati iti gamyate
tat kim aviśeṣeṇa eva ahani rātrau vā mriyamāṇasya raśmi anusāri tvam āhosvit ahani eva iti saṃśaye sati aviśeṣa śravaṇāt aviśeṣeṇa eva tāvat raśmi anusāri iti pratijñāyate
niśi nā iti ced na sambandhasya yāvaddehabhāvi tvāt darśayati ca
asti ahani nāḍī raśmi saṃbandhaḥ iti ahani mṛtasya syāt raśmi anusāri tvam
rātrau tu pretasya na syāt nāḍī raśmi saṃbandha vicchedāt iti ced na nāḍī raśmi saṃbandhasya yāvaddehabhāvi tvāt
yāvat deha bhāvī hi śirā kiraṇa saṃparkaḥ
darśayati ca etam artham śrutiḥ amuṣmāt ādityāt pratāyante tāḥ āsu nāḍīṣu sṛptāḥ ābhyaḥ nāḍībhyaḥ pratāyante te muṣmin āditye sṛptāḥ iti
nidāgha samaye ca niśāsu api kiraṇa anuvṛttiḥ upalabhyate pratāpa ādi kārya darśanāt
stoka anuvṛtteḥ tu durlakṣya tvam ṛtu antara rajanīṣu śaiśireṣu iva durdineṣu
ahar eva etat rātrau dadhāti iti ca etat eva darśayati
yadi ca rātrau pretaḥ vinā eva raśmi anusāreṇa ūrdhvam ākrameta raśmi anusāra ānarthakyam bhavet
na hi etat viśiṣya abhidhīyate yaḥ divā praiti sa raśmīn apekṣya ūrdhvam ākramate yaḥ tu rātrau saḥ n apekṣya eva iti
atha tu vidvān api rātri prāyaṇa aparādha mātreṇa na ūrdhvam ākrameta pākṣika phalā vidyā iti apravṛttiḥ eva tasyām syāt mṛtyu kāla aniyamāt
atha api rātrau uparataḥ hara āgamam udīkṣeta ahar āgame pi asya kadācid a raśmi saṃbandha arham śarīram syāt pāvaka ādi saṃparkāt
sa yāvat kṣipyet manaḥ tāvat ādityam gacchati iti ca śrutiḥ anudīkṣām darśayati
tasmāt aviśeṣeṇa eva idam rātriṃdivam raśmi anusāri tvam
atas ca ayane pi dakṣiṇe
dakṣiṇāyana adhikaraṇam
atas eva ca udīkṣā anupapatteḥ a pākṣika phala tvāt ca vidyāyāḥ aniyata kāla tvāt ca mṛtyoḥ dakṣiṇāyane mriyamāṇaḥ vidvān prāpnoti eva vidyā phalam
uttarāyaṇa maraṇa prāśastya prasiddheḥ bhīṣmasya ca pratīkṣā darśanāt āpūryamāṇapakṣāt yān ṣaṭ udaṅ eti māsān tān iti ca śruteḥ apekṣitavyam uttarāyaṇam iti imām āśaṅkām anena sūtreṇa apanudati
prāśastya prasiddhiḥ avidvat viṣayā
bhīṣmasya pratipālanam ācāra paripālana artham pitṛ prasāda labdha svacchanda mṛtyu tā khyāpana artham ca
śruteḥ tu artham vakṣyati ātivāhikāḥ tad liṅgāt iti
nanu ca yatra kāle tu anāvṛttim āvṛttim ca eva yoginaḥ
prayātāḥ yānti tam kālam vakṣyāmi bharata ṛṣabhaḥ iti kāla prādhānyena upakramya ahar ādi kāla viśeṣaḥ smṛtau anāvṛttaye niyataḥ
katham rātrau dakṣiṇāyane vā prayātaḥ na āvṛttim yāyāt iti atra ucyate
yoginaḥ prati ca smaryate smārte ca ete
yoginaḥ prati ca ayam ahar ādi kāla viniyogaḥ anāvṛttaye smaryate
smārte ca ete yoga sāṃkhye na śraute
atas viṣaya bhedāt pramāṇa viśeṣāt ca na asya smārtasya kāla viniyogasya śrauteṣu vijñāneṣu avatāraḥ
nanu agniḥ jyotiḥ ahar śuklaḥ ṣaṣ māsāḥ uttarāyaṇam
dhūmaḥ rātriḥ tathā kṛṣṇaḥ ṣaṣ māsāḥ dakṣiṇāyanam iti ca śrautau etau deva yāna pitṛyāṇau pratyabhijñāyete smṛtau api iti ucyate tam kālam vakṣyāmi iti smṛtau kāla pratijñānāt virodham āśaṅkya ayam parihāraḥ uktaḥ
yadā punar smṛtau api agni ādyāḥ devatāḥ eva ātivāhikyaḥ gṛhyante tadā na kaścid virodhaḥ iti
iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya śrī govinda bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye caturtha adhyāyasya dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ

caturthaḥ udhyāyaḥ
tṛtīyaḥ pādaḥ
arciḥ ādinā tad prathiteḥ
arciḥ ādi adhikaraṇam
arciḥ ādinā iti
sarvaḥ brahma prepsuḥ arciḥ ādinā eva adhvanā raṃhati iti pratijānīmahe
kutas
tad prathiteḥ
prathitaḥ hi eṣa mārgaḥ sarveṣām viduṣām
tathā hi pañcāgni vidyā prakaraṇe ye ca amī araṇye śraddhām satyam upāsate iti vidyā antara śīlinām api arciḥ ādikā sṛtiḥ śrāvyate
syāt etat yāsu vidyāsu na kācid gatiḥ ucyate tāsu iyam arciḥ ādikā upatiṣṭhatām
yāsu tu anyā śrāvyate tāsu kim iti arciḥ ādi āśrayaṇam iti atra ucyate bhavet etat evam yadi atyanta bhinnāḥ eva etāḥ sṛtayaḥ syuḥ
ekā eva tu eṣā sṛtiḥ aneka viśeṣaṇā brahma loka prapadanī kvacid kenacid viśeṣaṇena upalakṣitā iti vadāmaḥ sarvatra eka deśa pratyabhijñānāt itaretara viśeṣaṇa viśeṣya bhāva upapatteḥ
prakaraṇa bhede pi hi vidyā eka tve bhavati itaretara viśeṣaṇa upasaṃhāra vat gati viśeṣaṇānām api upasaṃhāraḥ
vidyā bhede tu gati eka deśa pratyabhijñānāt gantavya abhedāt ca gati abhedaḥ eva
tathā hi te teṣu brahma lokeṣu parāḥ parāvataḥ vasanti tasmin vasanti śāśvatīḥ samāḥ sā yā brahmaṇaḥ jitiḥ yā vyuṣṭiḥ tām jitim jayati tām vyuṣṭim vyaśnute tat yaḥ eva etam brahma lokam brahmacaryeṇa anuvindati iti ca tatra tatra tat eva ekam phalam brahma loka prāpti lakṣaṇam pradarśyate
yat tu etaiḥ eva iti avadhāraṇam arciḥ ādi āśrayaṇe na syāt iti na eṣa doṣaḥ raśmi prāpti paratvāt asya
na hi ekaḥ eva śabdaḥ raśmīn ca prāpayitum arhati arciḥ ādīn ca vyāvartayitum
tasmāt raśmi saṃbandhaḥ eva ayam avadhāryate iti draṣṭavyam
tvarā vacanam tu arciḥ ādi apekṣāyām api gantavya antara apekṣayā kṣaiprya artha tvāt na uparudhyate yathā nimeṣa mātreṇa atra āgamyate iti
api ca atha etayoḥ pathoḥ na katareṇa cana iti mārga dvaya bhraṣṭānām kaṣṭam tṛtīyam sthānam ācakṣāṇā pitṛyāṇa vyatiriktam ekam eva deva yānam arciḥ ādi parvāṇam panthānam prathayati
bhūyāṃsi arciḥ ādi sṛtau mārga parvāṇi alpīyāṃsi tu anyatra
bhūyasām ca ānuguṇyena alpīyasām nayanam nyāyyam iti atas arciḥ ādinā tad prathiteḥ iti uktam
vāyum abdāt aviśeṣa viśeṣābhyām
vāyu adhikaraṇam
kena punar saṃniveśa viśeṣeṇa gati viśeṣaṇānām itaretara viśeṣaṇa viśeṣya bhāvaḥ iti tat etat suhṛd bhūtvā ācāryaḥ grathayati
saḥ etam deva yānam panthānam āsādya agni lokam āgacchati sa vāyu lokam sa varuṇa lokam saḥ indra lokam sa prajāpati lokam sa brahma lokam iti kauṣītakinām deva yānaḥ panthāḥ paṭhyate
tatra arciḥ agni loka śabdau tāvat eka arthau jvalana vacana tvāt iti na atra saṃniveśa kramaḥ kaścid anveṣyaḥ
vāyuḥ tu arciḥ ādau vartmani katamasmin sthāne niveśayitavyaḥ iti ucyate te rciṣam eva abhisaṃbhavanti arciṣaḥ har ahnaḥ āpūryamāṇapakṣam āpūryamāṇapakṣāt yān ṣaṭ udaṅ eti māsān tān māsebhyaḥ saṃvatsaram saṃvatsarāt ādityam iti atra saṃvatsarāt parāñcam ādityāt arvāñcam vāyum abhisaṃbhavanti
kasmāt
aviśeṣa viśeṣābhyām
tathā hi sa vāyu lokam iti atra aviśeṣa upadiṣṭasya vāyoḥ śruti antareṇa viśeṣa upadeśaḥ dṛśyate yadā vai puruṣaḥ u smāt lokāt praiti sa vāyum āgacchati tasmai sa tatra vijihīte yathā ratha cakrasya kham tena saḥ ūrdhvam ākramate saḥ ādityam āgacchati iti
etasmāt ādityāt vāyoḥ pūrva tva darśanāt viśeṣāt abda ādityayoḥ antarāle vāyuḥ niveśayitavyaḥ
kasmāt punar agneḥ paratva darśanāt viśeṣāt arciṣaḥ nantaram vāyuḥ na niveśyate
na eṣaḥ sti viśeṣaḥ iti vadāmaḥ
nanu udāhṛtā śrutiḥ saḥ etam deva yānam panthānam āsādya agni lokam āgacchati sa vāyu lokam sa varuṇa lokam iti
ucyate kevalaḥ tra pāṭhaḥ paurvāparyeṇa avasthitaḥ na atra krama vacanaḥ kaścid śabdaḥ sti
padārtha upadarśana mātram hi atra kriyate etam etam ca āgacchati iti
itaratra punar vāyu prattena ratha cakra mātreṇa chidreṇa ūrdhvam ākramya ādityam āgacchati iti avagamyate kramaḥ
tasmāt sūktam a viśeṣa viśeṣābhyām iti
vājasaneyinaḥ tu māsebhyaḥ deva lokam deva lokāt ādityam iti samāmananti
tatra āditya ānantaryāya deva lokāt vāyum abhisaṃbhaveyuḥ
vāyum abdāt iti tu chandoga śruti apekṣayā uktam
chāndogya vājasaneyakayoḥ tu ekatra deva lokaḥ na vidyate paratra saṃvatsaraḥ
tatra śruti dvaya pratyayāt ubhau api ubhayatra grathayitavyau
tatra api māsa saṃbandhāt saṃvatsaraḥ pūrvaḥ paścimaḥ deva lokaḥ iti vivektavyam
taḍitaḥ dhi varuṇaḥ sambandhāt
taḍit adhikaraṇam
ādityāt candramasam candramasaḥ vidyutam iti asyāḥ vidyutaḥ upariṣṭāt sa varuṇa lokam iti ayam varuṇaḥ saṃbadhyeta
asti hi saṃbandhaḥ vidyut varuṇayoḥ
yadā hi viśālāḥ vidyutaḥ tīvra stanita nirghoṣāḥ jīmūta udareṣu pranṛtyanti atha āpaḥ prapatanti
vidyotate stanayati varṣiṣyati vā iti ca brāhmaṇam
apām ca adhipatiḥ varuṇaḥ iti śruti smṛti prasiddhiḥ
varuṇāt adhi indra prajāpatī sthāna antara abhāvāt pāṭha sāmarthyāt ca
āgantuka tvāt api varuṇa ādīnām ante eva niveśaḥ vaiśeṣika sthāna abhāvāt
vidyut ca antyā arciḥ ādau vartmani
ātivāhikāḥ tad liṅgāt
ātivāhika adhikaraṇam
teṣu eva arciḥ ādiṣu saṃśayaḥ kim etāni mārga cihnāni uta bhogabhūmayaḥ athavā netāraḥ gantṛṇām iti
tatra mārga lakṣaṇa bhūtāḥ arciḥ ādayaḥ iti tāvat prāptam tad svarūpa tvāt upadeśasya
yathā hi loke kaścid grāmam nagaram vā pratiṣṭhā samānaḥ nuśiṣyate gaccha itas tvam amum girim tatas nyagrodham tatas nadīm tatas grāmam tatas nagaram vā prāpsyasi iti evam iha api arciṣaḥ har ahnaḥ āpūryamāṇapakṣam ityādi āha
atha vā bhogabhūmayaḥ iti prāptam
tathā hi loka śabdena agni ādīn anubadhnāti agni lokam āgacchati ityādi
loka śabdaḥ ca prāṇinām bhogāyataneṣu bhāṣyate manuṣya lokaḥ pitṛ lokaḥ deva lokaḥ iti ca
tathā ca brāhmaṇam ahar rātreṣu te lokeṣu sajjante ityādi
tasmāt na ativāhikāḥ arciḥ ādayaḥ
acetana tvāt api eṣām ātivāhika tva anupapattiḥ
cetanāḥ hi loke rāja niyuktāḥ puruṣāḥ durgeṣu mārgeṣu ativāhyān ativāhayanti iti
evam prāpte brūmaḥ ātivāhikāḥ eva ete bhavitum arhanti
kutas
tad liṅgāt
tathā hi candramasaḥ vidyutam tatpuruṣaḥ mānavaḥ saḥ etān brahma gamayati iti siddha vat gamayitṛ tvam darśayati
tad vacanam tad viṣayam evā upakṣīṇam iti ced na prāpta mānavatva nivṛtti paratvāt viśeṣaṇasya
yadi arciḥ ādiṣu puruṣāḥ gamayitāraḥ prāptāḥ te ca mānavāḥ tatas yuktam tad nivṛtti artham puruṣa viśeṣaṇam amānavaḥ iti
nanu tat liṅga mātram agamakam nyāya abhāvāt
na eṣa doṣaḥ
ubhaya vyāmohāt tad siddheḥ
ye tāvat arciḥ ādi mārga gāḥ te deha viyogāt saṃpiṇḍita karaṇa grāmāḥ iti asvatantrāḥ
arciḥ ādīnām api acetana tvāt asvātantryam iti atas arciḥ ādi abhimāninaḥ cetanāḥ devatā viśeṣāḥ atiyātrāyām niyuktāḥ iti gamyate
loke hi matta mūrchita ādayaḥ saṃpiṇḍita karaṇāḥ para prayukta vartmānaḥ bhavanti
anavasthita tvāt api arciḥ ādīnām na mārga lakṣaṇa tva upapattiḥ
na hi rātrau pretasya ahar sva rūpa abhisaṃbhavaḥ upapadyate
na ca pratipālanam asti iti uktam purastāt
dhruva tvāt tu devatā ātmanām na ayam doṣaḥ bhavati
arciḥ ādi śabda tā ca eṣām arciḥ ādi abhimānāt upapadyate
arciṣaḥ haḥ ityādi nirdeśaḥ tu ātivāhika tve pi na virudhyate arciṣā hetunā ahar abhisaṃbhavati ahnā hetunā āpūryamāṇapakṣam iti
tathā ca loke prasiddheṣu api ātivāhikeṣu evaṃjātīyakaḥ upadeśaḥ dṛśyate gaccha tvam itas balavarmāṇam tatas jayasiṃham tatas kṛṣṇaguptam iti
api ca upakrame te rciḥ abhisaṃbhavanti iti saṃbandha mātram uktam na saṃbandha viśeṣaḥ kaścid
upasaṃhāre tu saḥ etān brahma gamayati iti saṃbandha viśeṣaḥ ativāhya ativāhaka tva lakṣaṇaḥ uktaḥ
tena saḥ eva upakrame pi iti nirdhāryate
saṃpiṇḍita karaṇa tvāt eva ca gantṛṇām na tatra bhoga saṃbhavaḥ
loka śabdaḥ tu an upabhuñjāneṣu api gantṛṣu gamayitum śakyate anyeṣām talloka vāsinām bhogabhūmi tvāt
atas agni svāmikam lokam prāptaḥ agninā ativāhyate vāyu svāmikam prāptaḥ vāyunā iti yojayitavyam
katham punar ātivāhika tva pakṣe varuṇa ādiṣu tad saṃbhavaḥ
vidyutaḥ hi adhi varuṇa ādayaḥ upakṣiptāḥ vidyutaḥ tu anantaram ā brahma prāpteḥ amānavasya eva puruṣasya gamayitṛ tvam śrutam iti atas uttaram paṭhati
vaidyutena eva tatas tad śruteḥ
tatas vidyut abhisaṃbhavanāt ūrdhvam vidyut anantara vartinā eva amānavena puruṣeṇa varuṇa loka ādiṣu ativāhyamānāḥ brahma lokam gacchanti iti avagantavyam tān vaidyutāt puruṣaḥ mānavaḥ saḥ etya brahma lokam gamayati iti tasya eva gamayitṛ tva śruteḥ
varuṇa ādayaḥ tu tasya eva apratibandha karaṇena sāhāyya anuṣṭhānena vā kenacid anugrāhakāḥ iti avagantavyam
tasmāt sādhu uktam ātivāhikāḥ devatā ātmānaḥ rciḥ ādayaḥ iti
kāryam bādariḥ asya gati upapatteḥ
kārya adhikaraṇam
saḥ enān brahma gamayati iti atra vicikitsyate kim kāryam aparam brahma gamayati āhosvit param eva avikṛtam mukhyam brahma iti
kutas saṃśayaḥ
brahma śabda prayogāt gati śruteḥ ca
tatra kāryam eva saguṇam aparam brahma enān gamayati amānavaḥ puruṣaḥ iti bādariḥ ācāryaḥ manyate
kutas
asya gati upapatteḥ asya hi kārya brahmaṇaḥ gantavya tvam upapadyate pradeśavat tvāt
na tu parasmin brahmaṇi gantṛ tvam gantavya tvam gatiḥ vā avakalpate sarvagata tvāt pratyagātma tvāt ca gantṛṇām
viśeṣita tvāt ca

text2:
itā tad prakriyāyām atha yāḥ etāḥ hṛdayasya āḍyaḥ iti upakramya sa prapañcam
uktam atha yatra etat asmāt śarīrāt utkrāmati atha etaiḥ eva raśmibhiḥ ūrdhvam ākramate iti tayā ūrdhvam āya amṛta tvam eti iti tasmāt śata adhikayā āḍyā iṣkrāma raśmī ausārī iṣkrāmati iti gamyate tat kim aviśeṣeṇa eva
rātrau vā mriyamāṇasya raśmyausāri tvam āhosvit ahayā iva iti saṃśaye sati aviśeṣa śravaṇāt aviśeṣeṇa eva tāvat raśmyausārī iti pratijñāyate yāvaddehabhāvi tvāt darśayati ca asti
ahai āḍīraśmisaṃbadha iti ahai mṛtasya syāt raśmyausāri tvam rātrau tu pretasya a syāt āḍīraśmisaṃbadhavicchedāt iti ced a āḍīraśmisaṃbadhasya yāvaddehabhāvi tvāt yāvaddehabhāvī hi
śirā kiraṇa saṃparkaḥ darśayati ca etam artham śrutiḥ amuṣmāt ādityāt pratāyate tāḥ āsu āḍīṣu sṛptāḥ ābhyaḥ āḍībhyaḥ pratāyate tāḥ amuṣmin āditye sṛptāḥ iti idāgha samaye ca iśāsu api kiraṇa āu vṛttiḥ upalabhyate pratāpa ādi kārya darśaāt
stoka āuvṛtteḥ tu durlakṣya tvam śaiśireṣu iva ahar eva etat rātrau dadhāti iti ca etat eva darśayati yadi ca rātrau pretaḥ raśmi ausāreṇa ūrdhvam ākrameta raśmi ausāra āarthakyam bhavet
a hi etat viśiṣya abhidhīyate yaḥ divā praiti sa raśmī apekṣya ūrdhvam ākramate yaḥ tu rātrau saḥ apekṣya eva iti atha tu vidvā api rātri prāyaṇa aparādha mātreṇa ā ūrdhvam ākrameta pākṣika phalā vidyā iti apravṛttiḥ eva
tasyām syāt atha api rātrau uparataḥ hara āgamam udīkṣeta ahar āgame pi asya kadācid śarīram syāt pāvaka ādi saṃparkāt sa yāvat kṣipya imaḥ tāvat ādityam gacchati iti ca śrutiḥ audīkṣām darśayati
tasmāt aviśeṣeṇa eva idam rātriṃdivam dakṣiṇe dakṣiṇāyai adhikaraṇam atas eva ca u dīkṣā upapatteḥ a pākṣika phala tvāt ca vidyāyāḥ aiyata kāla tvāt ca mṛtyoḥ dakṣiṇāyai pi mriyamāṇaḥ vid vā prāpa iti eva
vidyā phalam uttarāyaṇa maraṇa prāśastya prasiddheḥ bhīṣmasya ca pratīkṣā darśaāt māsān tāḥ iti ca śruteḥ apekṣitavyam uttarāyaṇam iti imām āśaṅkām prāśastya prasiddhiḥ avidvat viṣayā bhīṣmasya ācāra paripālaa artham pitṛ prasāda labdha svacchada mṛtyu tā khyāpa artham
ca śruteḥ tu artham vakṣyati ātivāhikāḥ tad liṅgāt iti ca yatra kāle ca eva yogiḥ prayātā yāti tam kālam vakṣyāmi bharata ṛṣabhaḥ iti
upakramya ahar ādi kāla viśeṣaḥ smṛtau aāvṛttaye iyataḥ katham rātrau vā prayātaḥ āvṛttim yāyāt iti atra ucyate yogiḥ prati ca smaryate smārte ca ete yogiḥ prati
ca ayam ahar ādi kāla viiyogaḥ a āvṛttaye smaryate smārte ca ete yoga sāṃkhye a śraute atas viṣaya bhedāt pramāṇa viśeṣāt ca smārtasya kāla viiyogasya śrauteṣu vijñāeṣu avatāraḥ
agiḥ jyotiḥ ahar śuklaḥ ṣaṣ māsāḥ uttarāyaṇam dhūmaḥ rātriḥ tathā kṛṣṇaḥ ṣaṣ māsāḥ iti ca śrautau etau devayāa pitṛyāṇau pratyabhijñāyete smṛtau api iti ucyate tam kālam vakṣyāmi iti
smṛtau kāla pratijñāāt virodham āśaṅkya ayam parihāraḥ uktaḥ yadā puas smṛtau api agi ādyāḥ devatāḥ eva ātivāhikyaḥ gṛhyate tadā kaścid virodhaḥ iti iti śrīmat paramahaṃsa parivrājaka ācāryasya
śrī govida bhagavat pūjya pāda śiṣyasya śrīmat śaṃkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau śārīraka mīmāṃsā sūtra bhāṣye caturtha adhyāyasya dvitīyaḥ pādaḥ murat caturthaḥ udhyāyaḥ tṛtīyaḥ pādaḥ tad prathiteḥ arciḥ ādi adhikaraṇam arciḥ ādi iti sarvaḥ brahma prepsuḥ arciḥ ādi eva adhvaā raṃhati iti
kutas tad prathiteḥ prathitaḥ hi eṣa mārgaḥ sarveṣām viduṣām tathā hi pañcāgi vidyā prakaraṇe ye ca amī araṇye śraddhām satyam upāsate iti arciḥ ādikā sṛtiḥ śrāvyate
syāt etat yāsu vidyāsu a kācid gatiḥ ucyate tāsu iyam arciḥ ādikā upatiṣṭhatām yāsu tu ayā śrāvyate tāsu kim iti arciḥ ādi āśrayaṇam iti atra ucyate bhavet etat evam yadi atyata bhiāḥ eva etāḥ sṛtayaḥ
syuḥ ekā eva tu eṣā sṛtiḥ kvacid keacid viśeṣaṇe upalakṣitā iti vadāmaḥ sarvatra eka deśa pratyabhijñāāt itaretara viśeṣaṇa viśeṣya bhāva upapatteḥ prakaraṇa bhede pi hi vidyā eka tve bhavati itaretara viśeṣaṇa upasaṃhāra vat gati viśeṣaṇāām api upasaṃhāraḥ vidyā bhede pi tu
gati eka deśa pratyabhijñāāt gata vyā bhedāt ca gati abhedaḥ eva tathā hi te teṣu brahma lokeṣu parāḥ parāvataḥ vasati śāśvatīḥ samāḥ sā yā brahmaṇaḥ jitiḥ yā vyuṣṭiḥ tām
jitim jayati tām vyuṣṭim vyaśute tat yaḥ eva etam brahma lokam brahmacaryeṇa auvidati iti ca tatra tatra tat eva ekam phalam brahma loka prāpti lakṣaṇam pradarśyate yat tu etaiḥ eva
iti avadhāraṇam arciḥ ādi āśrayaṇe a syāt iti ā eṣa doṣaḥ raśmi prāpti para tvāt asya a hi ekaḥ eva śabdaḥ raśmīn ca prāpayitum arhati arciḥ ādīn ca vyāvartayitum tasmāt eva ayam avadhāryate iti
draṣṭavyam tvarā vacaam tu arciḥ ādi apekṣāyām api kṣaiprya artha tvāt oparudhyate yathā imeṣa mātreṇa atra āgamyate iti api ca atha etayoḥ pathoḥ iti mārga dvaya bhraṣṭāām kaṣṭam tṛtīyam sthāam ācakṣāṇā
pitṛyāṇa vyatiriktam ekam eva prathayati bhūyāṃsi arciḥ ādi parvāṇam prathayati bhūyāṃsi arciḥ ādi sṛtau mārga parvāṇi alpīyāṃsi bhūyasām ca alpīyasām tad prathiteḥ iti uktam vāyum abdāt aviśeṣa viśeṣābhyām vāyu adhikaraṇam
saṃiveśa viśeṣeṇa gati viśeṣaṇāām itaretara viśeṣaṇa viśeṣya bhāvaḥ iti tat etat suhṛd bhūtvā ācāryaḥ grathayati saḥ etam deva yāam pathāam āsādya āgi lokam āgacchati sa vāyu lokam sa varuṇa lokam saḥ idra lokam sa prajāpati lokam
sa brahma lokam iti kauṣītakiām deva yāḥ pathāḥ paṭhyate tatra arciḥ agi loka śabdau tāvat eka arthau saṃiveśa kramaḥ vāyuḥ tu arciḥ ādau vartmai
iti ucyate tā ṛciṣam eva abhisaṃbhavati arciṣā uhar ahar āpūryamāṇapakṣam āpūryamāṇapakṣa ādyāḥ ṣaṣ udaṅ eti māsān tā māsebhyaḥ saṃvatsaram saṃvatsarāt ādityam iti atra saṃvatsarāt parāñcam ādityāt arvāñcam vāyum abhisaṃbhavati kasmāt aviśeṣa viśeṣābhyām tathā hi sa vāyu lokam iti atra aviśeṣa upadiṣṭasya vāyoḥ
śrutyatareṇa viśeṣa upadeśaḥ dṛśyate yadā vai puruṣaḥ asmāt lokāt praiti sa vāyum āgacchati tasmai sa tatra vijihīte yathā ratha cakrasya kham saḥ ūrdhvam ākramate saḥ ādityam āgacchati
iti etasmāt ādityāt vāyoḥ pūrva tva darśaāt viśeṣāt abda ādityayoḥ atarāle vāyuḥ iva īśayitavyaḥ kasmāt puarageḥ paratva darśaāt viśeṣāt arciṣoataram vāyuḥ iva īśyate ā eṣa asti viśeṣaḥ iti vadāmaḥ śrutiḥ saḥ etam
deva yāam āsādya āgi lokam āgacchati sa vāyu lokam sa varuṇa lokam iti ucyate kevalaḥ tra pāṭhaḥ paurvāparyeṇa avasthitaḥ krama vacaḥ kaścid sti padārtha upadarśa amātram
hi atra kriyate etam etam ca āgacchati iti itaratra ratha cakra mātreṇa chidreṇa ūrdhvam ākramya ādityam āgacchati iti avagamyate kramaḥ tasmāt sūktam
aviśeṣa viśeṣābhyām iti vājasaeyiḥ tu māsebhyaḥ deva lokam deva lokāt ādityam iti tatra deva lokāt vāyum abhisaṃbhaveyuḥ vāyum abdāt iti tu chadoga śruti apekṣayā uktam chādogya vājasaeyakayoḥ tu ekatra deva lokaḥ
a vidyate paratra saṃvatsaraḥ tatra śruti dvaya pratyayāt ubhau api ubhayatra grathayitavyau tatra api māsa saṃbadhāt saṃvatsaraḥ pūrvaḥ paścimaḥ deva lokaḥ iti vivektavyam taḍitaḥ dhi varuṇaḥ sambadhāt
taḍit adhikaraṇam ādityāt cadramasam cadramasaḥ vidyutam iti asyāḥ vidyutaḥ upariṣṭāt sa varuṇa lokam iti ayam varuṇaḥ saṃbadhyeta asti hi vidyut varuṇayoḥ yadā
hi viśālāḥ vidyutaḥ jīmūta udareṣu praṛtyati atha āpaḥ prapatati vidyotate staayati varṣiṣyati vā iti ca brāhmaṇam apām ca adhipatiḥ varuṇa
iti śruti smṛti prasiddhiḥ varuṇāt adhi sthāātara abhāvāt pāṭha sāmarthyāt ca api varuṇa ādīām eva iva īśaḥ vaiśeṣika sthāā abhāvāt vidyut ca atyā arciḥ ādau
ātivāhikāḥ tad liṅgāt ātivāhika adhikaraṇam teṣu eva arciḥ ādiṣu saṃśayaḥ kim uta bhogabhūmayaḥ athavā iti tatra mārga lakṣaṇa bhūtāḥ arciḥ ādayaḥ iti
tāvat prāptam tad svarūpa tvāt upadeśasya yathā hi loke kaścid grāmam agaram vā gaccha itas tvam amum girim tatas yagrodham
tatas adīm tatas grāmam tatas agaram vā prāpsyasi iti evam iha api arciṣaḥ har ahar āpūryamāṇapakṣam ityādi āha atha vā bhogabhūmayaḥ iti
prāptam tathā hi agi lokam āgacchati ityādi loka śabdaḥ ca prāṇiām bhāṣyate mauṣya lokaḥ pitṛ lokaḥ deva lokaḥ iti ca tathā
ca brāhmaṇam ahar rātreṣu te lokeṣu sajjate ityādi tasmai ātivāhikāḥ arciḥ ādayaḥ aceta a tvāt api eṣām ātivāhika tva aupapattiḥ cetaāḥ hi loke puruṣāḥ durgeṣu
mārgeṣu ativāhyāḥ ativāhayati iti evam prāpte brūmaḥ ātivāhikāḥ eva ete bhavitum arhati kutas tad liṅgāt tathā hi vidyutam tad puruṣaḥ māavaḥ saḥ etā
brahma gamayati iti siddha vat gamayitṛ tvam darśayati tad viṣayam eva upakṣīṇam iti ced viśeṣaṇasya yadi arciḥ ādiṣu puruṣāḥ gamayitāraḥ prāptāḥ te
ca māavāḥ tatas yuktam puruṣa viśeṣaṇam amāavaḥ iti tat liṅga mātram agamakam doṣaḥ ubhaya vyāmohāt tad siddheḥ ye tāvat arciḥ ādi mārga gāḥ te
deha viyogāt saṃpiṇḍita karaṇa grāmāḥ iti asvatatrāḥ arciḥ ādīām api acetaa tvāt asvātatryam iti atas arciḥ ādi abhimāiaḥ cetaā devatā viśeṣāḥ atiyātrāyām iti gamyate loke hi
matta mūrchita ādayaḥ saṃpiṇḍita karaṇāḥ bhavati a avasthita tvāt api arciḥ ādīnām mārga lakṣaṇa tva upapattiḥ hi rātrau pretasya ahar sva rūpa abhisaṃbhavaḥ upapadyate ca asti iti uktam
purastāt dhruva tvāt tu doṣaḥ bhavati arciḥ ādi śabda tā ca eṣām upapadyate arciṣaḥ haḥ ityādi nirdeśaḥ tu ātivāhika tve virudhyate
arciṣā hetuā ahar abhisaṃbhavati ahar hetuā āpūryamāṇapakṣam iti tathā ca loke prasiddheṣu api ātivāhikeṣu evaṃjātīyakaḥ upadeśaḥ dṛśyate gaccha tvam itas
balavarmāṇam tatas jayasiṃham tatas kṛṣṇaguptam iti api ca upakrame te rciḥ abhisaṃbhavati iti saṃbadha mātram uktam a saṃbadha viśeṣaḥ kaścid upasaṃhāre tu
saḥ etāḥ brahma gamayati iti saḥ eva upakrame saṃpiṇḍita karaṇa tvāt eva ca tatra bhoga saṃbhavaḥ
loka śabdaḥ tu aupabhuñjāeṣu api gatṛṣu gamayitum śakyate bhogabhūmi tvāt atas agi svāmikam lokam prāptaḥ ativāhyate vāyu svāmikam prāptaḥ iti
yojayitavyam katham ātivāhika tva pakṣe varuṇa ādiṣu tad saṃbhavaḥ vidyutaḥ hi adhi varuṇa ādayaḥ upakṣiptāḥ vidyutaḥ tu ā brahma prāpteḥ amāavasya eva puruṣasya gamayitṛ tvam śrutam
iti atas uttaram paṭhati tatas tad śruteḥ tatas vidyut abhisaṃbhavaāt ūrdhvam puruṣeṇa brahma lokam gacchati iti avagatavyam saḥ etya brahma lokam gamayati iti tasya eva
gamayitṛ tva śruteḥ varuṇa ādayaḥ tu tasya eva vā keacid augrāhakāḥ iti avagatavyam tasmāt sādhu uktam ātivāhikāḥ devatā ātmā orciḥ ādayaḥ iti kāryam bādariḥ asya gati upapatteḥ kārya adhikaraṇam saḥ eā
brahma gamayati iti atra vicikitsyate kim kāryam aparam brahma gamayati āhosvit param eva avikṛtam mukhyam brahma iti kutas saṃśayaḥ brahma śabda prayogāt gati śruteḥ ca tatra

text1:
ati upapatteḥ asya hi kārya brahmaṇaḥ gantavya tvam upapadyate pradeśavat tvāt
na tu parasmin brahmaṇi gantṛ tvam gantavya tvam gatiḥ vā avakalpate sarvagata tvāt pratyagātma tvāt ca gantṛṇām
viśeṣita tvāt ca
brahma lokān gamayati te teṣu brahma lokeṣu parāḥ parāvataḥ vasanti iti ca śruti antare viśeṣita tvāt kārya brahma viṣayā eva gatiḥ iti gamyate
na hi bahuvacanena viśeṣaṇam parasmin brahmaṇi avakalpate
kārye tu avasthā bheda upapatteḥ saṃbhavati bahuvacanam
loka śrutiḥ api vikāra gocarāyām eva saṃniveśa viśiṣṭāyām bhogabhūmau āñjasī
gauṇī tu anyatra brahmā eva lokaḥ eṣa samrāj ityādiṣu
adhikaraṇa adhikartavya nirdeśaḥ pi parasmin brahmaṇi anāñjasaḥ syāt
tasmāt kārya viṣayam eva idam nayanam
nanu kārya viṣaye pi brahma śabdaḥ na upapadyate samanvaye hi samastasya jagataḥ janma ādikāraṇam brahma iti sthāpitam iti atra ucyate
sāmīpyāt tu tad vyapadeśaḥ
tu śabdaḥ āśaṅkā vyāvṛtti arthaḥ
para brahma sāmīpyāt aparasya brahmaṇaḥ tasmin api brahma śabda prayogaḥ na virudhyate
param eva hi brahma viśuddha upādhi saṃbandham kvacid kaiścid vikāra dharmaiḥ manaḥ maya tva ādibhiḥ upāsanāya upadiśyamānam aparam iti sthitiḥ
nanu kārya prāptau anāvṛtti śravaṇam na ghaṭate
na hi parasmāt brahmaṇaḥ nyatra kvacid nitya tām saṃbhāvayanti
darśayati ca deva yānena pathā prasthitānām anāvṛttim etena pratipadyamā
text2:
ati upapatteḥ asya hi kārya brahmaṇaḥ gatavya tvam upapadyate pradeśavat tvāt a tu
brahmaṇi gatṛ tvam gatavya tvam gatiḥ vai avakalpate sarvagata tvāt pratyagātma tvāt ca gatṛṇām viśeṣita tvāt ca brahma lokāḥ gamayati te teṣu brahma lokeṣu parāḥ parāvataḥ vasati iti ca śruti atare viśeṣita tvāt
kārya brahma viṣayā eva gatiḥ iti gamyate hi viśeṣaṇam parasmin brahmaṇi avakalpate kārye tu avasthā bheda upapatteḥ saṃbhavati loka śrutiḥ api vikāra gocarāyām eva bhogabhūmau āñjasī gauṇī brahmā eva
lokaḥ eṣa samrāj ityādiṣu adhikaraṇa adhikartavyaiḥ deśaḥ api parasmin brahmaṇi syāt tasmāt kārya viṣayam eva idam kārya viṣaye pi hi samastasya jagataḥ hi samastasya jagataḥ hi
brahma iti sthāpitam iti atra ucyate tad vyapadeśaḥ tuśabdaḥ āśaṅkā vyāvṛtti arthaḥ para brahma sāmīpyāt aparasya brahmaṇaḥ brahma śabda prayogaḥ virudhyate param eva hi brahma kvacid kaiścid vikāra dharmaiḥ maomayatva ādibhiḥ
aparam iti sthitiḥ kārya prāptau ghaṭate hi parasmāt brahmaṇaḥ yatra saṃbhāvayati darśayati ca pathā pratipadyamā
